// mx.preTrade.completion.COM.Closing.TradabilityCheck

/*
MXpress COM Specific completion

Version 2.3
Call TradabilityCheckCommon function for Common Tradability Checks

Version 2.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 2.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

Version 2.0

Notes:
If the tradability is active, the goal of this rule is to analyze every component of a transaction and check if they are tradable.
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	Generic Common Tradability Checks (See TradabilityCheckCommon for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
    For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
    For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,    
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		sIsTradabilityCheckActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","TradabilityCheck.COM" ) ),
		IF ( ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = TradabilityCheck.COM ( should be YES or NO )" ),
		
		IF ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive == "YES" ) THEN
	        callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon","COM" )
	}
};

legGetNumeric ( pComponent, sNominalField ), sTotalQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ), sTotalQuantityDesc := "The total quantity of the contract is " + sTotalQuantity + " " + sDeliveryQty + ". " + endline( ) + endline( ), npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sTotalQuantityDesc ), // Sales margin amount of the transaction pFieldResult := pNULL, sField := "SalesMargin", pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField, "Registration",sRegistration, "Criteria 1","Amount", "Criteria 2","", "Criteria 3","" ), IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN { sSalesMarginAmountField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ), fSalesMarginAmount := legGetNumeric ( pComponent,sSalesMarginAmountField ), sSalesMarginAmount := toString( fSalesMarginAmount,15,0,TRUE,0 ) }, pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField, "Registration",sRegistration, "Criteria 1","Currency", "Criteria 2","", "Criteria 3","" ), IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN { sSalesMarginCurrencyField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ), sSalesMarginCurrency := legGetString ( pComponent,sSalesMarginCurrencyField) }, IF (fSalesMarginAmount <> 0.) THEN { sSalesMarginDesc := "The sales margin amount is " + sSalesMarginAmount + " " + sSalesMarginCurrency + ". " + endline( ) + endline( ), npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sSalesMarginDesc ) }, // Footer of the text description IF ( sCashOrPhysical == "Delivery" ) THEN { IF ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" ) THEN sFooterDescription := "The option is physically settled." ELSE sFooterDescription := "The contract is physically settled. " + sMaturity + "." } ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Asian" ) OR ( NOT bIsComOption AND ( ( sRegistration <> "COM Future" ) OR ( sRegistration <> "COM Forward" ) OR ( sRegistration <> "COM Cleared swap" ) ) ) ) THEN sFooterDescription := sMaturity, npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sFooterDescription ) } };

// mx.preTrade.completion.CRD.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
CRD short text description rule

Used algorithm
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifiying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty then
		Retrieve few fields shared between all CRD products
		If the registration is Default swaps then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Credit index then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is First default basket or Nth default basket or Portfolio CDS then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Synthetic cdo tranche then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Default swaptions then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Credit index option then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is CDO tranche option then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Risky total return swaps then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Risky loans then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		Else if the registration is Equity default swaps then
			Initialized fields
			Build short description accordingly
		End if
		Store built short description in DIST_DESC UDF
	End if
End if

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.3
Amendments to homogenize the short description

Version 1.2
Asset swaps is no more handled by CRD, but IRD

Version 1.1
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version  1.0
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter and in the mail communication
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			// Field Initialization/Reset
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			sBlotterDescription := "",
			sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := "",
			sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent,"Trade purpose" ),
			
			IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
			{
				sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),
				IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := " @ Market price"
				ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := " @ Limit price"
			},
			
			IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell_risk" ),
				sPremium := toString( legGetNumeric(pLeg,"Premium"),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sPremium := sheaderOrder,
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference" ),

				IF ( sUnderlying == "Bond" ) THEN
					sIssuerOrBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference bond" )
				ELSE
					sIssuerOrBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Issuer" ),

                	sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " on " + sIssuerOrBond + " Premium " + sPremium + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Credit index" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell_risk" ),
				sPremium := toString(legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Premium"),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sPremium := sheaderOrder,
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sBasket := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " on " + sBasket + " Premium" + sPremium + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "First default basket" ) 
			OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" ) 
			OR ( sRegistration == "Portfolio CDS" ) ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell_risk" ),
				sPremium := toString( legGetNumeric(pLeg,"Premium"),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sBasket := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " on " + sBasket + " Premium" + sPremium + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Synthetic cdo tranche" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell_risk" ),
				fTrancheDown := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche down" ),
				sTrancheDown := toString( fTrancheDown,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fTrancheUp := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche up" ),
				sTrancheUp := toString( fTrancheUp,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fTrancheNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche nominal" ),
				sTrancheNominal := toString( fTrancheNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sBasket := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sTrancheDown + " - " + sTrancheUp + " on " + sBasket + " Tranche nominal " + sTrancheNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaptions" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				dOptionMturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sOptionMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dOptionMturity ),
				sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference" ),
				IF ( sUnderlying == "Bond" ) THEN 
					sIssuerOrBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference bond" )
				ELSE
					sIssuerOrBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Issuer" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " on " + sIssuerOrBond + " Nominal " + sNominal + sOptionMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Credit index option" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell" ),
				sBasket := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dOptionMturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sOptionMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dOptionMturity ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " on " + sBasket + " Nominal " + sNominal + sOptionMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy_Sell" ),
				fTrancheDown := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche down" ),
				sTrancheDown := toString( fTrancheDown,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fTrancheUp := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche up" ),
				sTrancheUp := toString( fTrancheUp,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fTrancheNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Init. tranche nominal" ),
				sTrancheNominal := toString( fTrancheNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dOptionMturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sOptionMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dOptionMturity ),
				sBasket := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sTrancheDown + " - " + sTrancheUp + " on " + sBasket + " Tranche nominal " + sTrancheNominal + sOptionMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Risky total return swaps" ) THEN
			{
				sIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Index" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Bond" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBond + " Index " + sIndex + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Risky loans" ) THEN
			{
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sIssuer := legGetString( pComponent,"Issuer" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sIssuer + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Equity default swaps" ) THEN
			{
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sEquity := legGetString( pComponent,"Equity" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sInstrument + " on " + sEquity + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			},
			
			// Blotter and communication
			IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 245 ) THEN
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
			ELSE
			{
				sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription, 0, 244 ),
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
				ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc CRD rule )","DIST_DESC" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.CRD.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
CRD Dynamic Layout rule (Management of Patterns Field Properties)

Used algorithm:
Reset all properties
If Communication or Tradability checks are active then
	Add properties accordingly
End if
If Blocktrade check is active then
	Add properties accordingly
End if
Retrieve the registration of first component
Depending the registration, retrieve fields values
Depending fields values and the registration, add properties accordingly

Version 1.17
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.16
Amendments to handle isda converter part:
- merge Default swap and Credit index registrations condition
- introduce sConverterInput

Version 1.15
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.14
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.13
Amendments to handle: 
 - new CRD payoff "reference price - fixed RR)
 - digital rate, digital amount and fixed RR per item
Fix an issue on the display of the converter input when its type is 'Upfront (%)'
Removal of the propperty on the CMCDS 

Version 1.12
Do not use EXOTIC and FEATURES UDF anymore. In layouts, they were replaced by Groups.

Version 1.11
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.10
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.9
To correct the display in case of ISDA converter for Default swaps

Version 1.8
To handle the customized OTC basket property

Version 1.7
Asset swaps is no more handled by CRD, but IRD

Version 1.6
To handle the deletion of 'Upfront' field

Version 1.5
Amendements to handle ISDA

Version 1.4
- Total return swaps registration is no more handled
- For all CRD registrations except Asset swaps, Risky total return swaps: Fix an issue related the payoff value
- When communication or tradability check is active, the following field property is now added: crd_1_tradabilityStatus
	This will enable the display of the DIST_STAT field which is used to store the Tradability status of the transaction.

Version 1.3
If the BlockTrade check is active, the portfolio/allocation matrix field is added depending on blocktrade field value
A new Look-Up Table is used:
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the BlockTrade check

Version 1.2
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.1
legResetProperties and legAddProperties functions have to be called on pLeg instead of pComponent ( DEF0112958 )

Version  1.0
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sRegistration := "",
	sAmortizing := "",
	sPayoff := "",
	sTenor := "",
	sReference := "",
	fUpFrontAmount := 0.0,
	sBespoke := "",
	sPremiumAppliedTo := "",
	sNature := "",
	sMethod := "",
	sAdjustment := "",
	sCustomized := "",
	
	// Reset the Field Properties for the leg
	legResetProperties( pLeg ),

	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
	
	// for all CRD registration except for "Risky total return swaps" registrations
	sSettlementType := "",
	IF ( sRegistration <> "Risky total return swaps" ) THEN 
	{
		sAmortizing := legGetString( pComponent,"Amortizing" ),
		sPayoff := legGetString( pComponent,"Protection payoff" ),
		sSettlementType := legGetString( pComponent,"Settlement type" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) THEN 
	{
		sTenor := legGetString( pComponent,"Index tenor" ),
		sReference := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaptions" ) THEN 
		sReference := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference" ),
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Synthetic cdo tranche" ) THEN
	{
		fUpFrontAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Up Front Amount" ),
		sBespoke := legGetString( pComponent,"Bespoke" ),
		sPremiumAppliedTo := legGetString( pComponent,"Premium applied to" ),
		sNature := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket nature" ),
		sMethod := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit pricing method" ),
		sAdjustment := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit adj. method" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) THEN
	{
		fUpFrontAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Up Front Amount" ),
		sBespoke := legGetString( pComponent,"Bespoke" ),
		sPremiumAppliedTo := legGetString( pComponent,"Premium applied to" ),
		sNature := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket nature" )
	},
	
	IF ( ( sRegistration == "Credit index" )
	OR ( sRegistration == "Credit index option" ) ) THEN
	{
		sMethod := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit pricing method" ),
		sAdjustment := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit adj. method" )
	},
	
	IF ( ( sRegistration == "First default basket" )
	OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" )
	OR ( sRegistration == "Credit index")
	OR ( sRegistration == "Credit index option")
	OR ( sRegistration == "Synthetic cdo tranche")
	OR ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) ) THEN
		sCustomized := legGetString( pComponent,"Customized_basket" ),
	
	IF ( sAmortizing <> "None" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_amortizingDetails" ),
	
	IF ( ( sMethod == "Multiple" ) AND ( sAdjustment <> "None" ) ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_skews" ),
	
	IF ( sSettlementType == "Cash" ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_settlementType" ),
	
	IF ( sPayoff == "Digital cash payment (rate)" ) THEN
	{
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalRate" ),
		
		IF ( ( sMethod == "Multiple" ) 
		OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "First default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Portfolio CDS" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) ) THEN 
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalRateItem" ),
			bDigitalRateItem:=legGetBoolean( pComponent,"Digital rate by item" ),
			
			IF (bDigitalRateItem == TRUE) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalRateItemDetails" ),
				legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalRate" )
			}
		}
	}
	ELSE IF ( sPayoff == "Digital cash payment (amount)" ) THEN
	{
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalAmount" ),
		
		IF ( ( sMethod == "Multiple" ) 
		OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "First default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Portfolio CDS" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) ) THEN 
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalAmountItem" ),
			bDigitalAmountItem:=legGetBoolean( pComponent,"Digital amount by item" ),
			
			IF (bDigitalAmountItem == TRUE) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalAmountItemDetails" ), 
				legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_digitalAmount" )
			}    
		}
	}
	ELSE IF ( sPayoff == "Reference price - fixed price" ) THEN
	{
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_referencePrice" ),
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_fixedRR" ),
		
		IF ( ( sMethod == "Multiple" ) 
		OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "First default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Portfolio CDS" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) ) THEN 
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_fixedRRItem" ),
			bFixedRRItem:=legGetBoolean( pComponent,"Fixed recovery rate by item" ),
			
			IF (bFixedRRItem == TRUE) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_fixedRRItemDetails" ),
				legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_fixedRR" )
			}
		}
	}
	ELSE IF ( ( sPayoff == "Reference price - final price" )
	OR ( sPayoff == "Par - final price" ) ) THEN 
	{
		IF ( ( sMethod == "Multiple" ) 
		OR ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "First default basket" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Portfolio CDS" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "CDO tranche option" ) ) THEN 
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_recoveryRates" )
		ELSE
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_recoveryRate" ),
		
		IF ( sPayoff == "Reference price - final price" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_referencePrice" )
	},
	
	IF ( sReference == "Bond" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_bond" )
	ELSE IF ( sReference == "Issuer" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_issuer" ),
	
	IF ( sBespoke == "Yes" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_bespokeFactor" ),
	
	IF ( ( sPremiumAppliedTo == "Remaining tranche nominal" )
	OR ( sPremiumAppliedTo == "Remaining portfolio nominal" ) ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_premiumReset" ),
	
	IF ( sNature == "Basket" ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_bespoke" ),
	
	// To handle ISDA converter
	IF ( ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Credit index" ) ) THEN
	{
		sConverterInput := legGetString(pComponent, "Deal premium type"),
        IF ( sConverterInput == "Conv" ) THEN
        	legAddProperty( pLeg, "crd_1_isdaConverter" ),
    	sIsdaConverter := legGetString( pComponent,"ISDA converter" ),		
		IF  ( sIsdaConverter == "Yes" )  THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"crd_1_isdaConverterMore" )
	},
	
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "CRD")
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.CRD.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress CRD Specific completion

Version 2.2
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.1
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	For Default swap:
    	- Reference obligation is missing				: "RO"
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)
        
If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","CRD" ),
    
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	iNbLegs := 0,
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	pAllMessages := pNULL,
	sReference := "",
	sReferenceBond := "",
	
	iCount := 0,    
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform sanity checks            
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		
		// Empty Reference Check
		IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) THEN
		{
			sReference := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference" ),
			IF ( sReference == "Issuer" ) THEN
			{
				sReferenceBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference bond" ),
				IF ( sReferenceBond == "" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-RO-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent,"Reference obligation is required","Reference bond","Sane-RO-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				}
			}
		},
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.CRD.Closing.TradabilityCheck

/*
MXpress
CRD Specific completion

Version 2.2
Call TradabilityCheckCommon function for Common Tradability Checks

Version 2.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

Version 2.0

Notes:
If the tradability is active, the goal of this rule is to analyze every component of a transaction and check if they are tradable.
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	Generic Common Tradability Checks (See TradabilityCheckCommon for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
	For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,    
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		sIsTradabilityCheckActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","TradabilityCheck.CRD" ) ),
		IF ( ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = TradabilityCheck.CRD ( should be YES or NO )" ),
		
		IF ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive == "YES" ) THEN
	        callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon","CRD" )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.CRD.Pricing.FInit

/*
MXpress
CRD Field initialisation in Pricing sequence

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised then
    Retrieve the first component registration
    If the trade is inserted and the typology is CDS then
        Retrieve the calendar from the ( MX.CRD.PSMCal,ALL ) Look-Up Table
    End if
    Set the Additional flows enable
    If the index quotation mode = Price then
        Deal premium type = Deal price
    Else
        Deal premium type = Deal premium
    End if
End if

Version 1.7
Replaced CURRENCy with Currency in MX.CRD.PSMCal

Version 1.6
For Fixed Recovery CDS, legOverwrite the Settlement type and Protection payoff

Version 1.5
For Credit index, replace legOverwrite by  legSetString
For Credit index, replace Deal premium by Conv and Deal Price by Price
For Credit index, Default swaps, compute automatically the upfront thanks to streamsComputeSettlementFlow(pStreams)

Version 1.4
Update the field "Premium" of Default swaps with the pf_FixedCoupon pre-trade field. If this pre-trade field is empty, the Premium is not overwritten.

Version 1.3
Use correction function to retrieve the registation, use the registration as input instead the typology

Version 1.2
Update the field "Deal premium type" or "Option strike type" according to the index quotation mode

Version 1.1
The Additional flows is enabled by default

Version 1.0
ISDA Physical Settlement Matrix (PSM) calendar initialization rule

This rule is designed for CRD products,it uses one Look-Up Table (LUT):
( MX.CRD.PSMCal, ALL) contains the ISDA Physical Settlement Matrix Calendar
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
		sDefaultDetails := "",
		sCurrency := "",
		sPSMCalendar := "",
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
		
		IF ( ( ( sSourceClass == "" ) OR ( sSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" ) ) AND ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) ) THEN //only for CDS trade insertions, no contract events
		{
			sDefaultDetails := legGetString( pComponent,"Default details label" ),
			sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Initial capital currency" ),
			IF ( ( sDefaultDetails <> "" ) AND ( sCurrency <> "" ) ) THEN
			{
				sPSMCalendar := lookupString( "MX.CRD.PSMCal","ALL","DEFAULT DETAILS",sDefaultDetails,"Currency",sCurrency ),
				IF ( sPSMCalendar <> "" ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"Payment calendar",sPSMCalendar )
			}
		},
		legSetString( pComponent,"Additional flows enable","Yes" ),
		
		pStreams := legGetStreams( pLeg ),
		pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
		pCCLabel := streamGetCreditCurve( pStream1,0 ),
		IF NOT ( isNull( pCCLabel ) ) THEN
			bPrice := creditCurvePillarIsBasedOnPrice( pCCLabel,0 ),
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Credit index" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( bPrice == TRUE ) THEN 
				legSetString( pComponent,"Deal premium type","Price" )
			ELSE
				legSetString( pComponent,"Deal premium type","Conv" ),
			pStreams:=legGetStreams(pComponent),
			streamsComputeSettlementFlow(pStreams)
		},
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Credit index option" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( bPrice == TRUE ) THEN
				//legOverwrite ( pComponent, "Option strike type", "Strike price" )
				legSetString ( pComponent, "Option strike type", "Strike price" )
			ELSE
				//legOverwrite ( pComponent, "Option strike type", "Strike premium" )
				legSetString ( pComponent, "Option strike type", "Strike premium" )
		},
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) THEN
		{
			sFixedCoupon := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_FixedCoupon" ),
			IF ( sFixedCoupon <> "" ) THEN
			{
				fPremium := convertSToNumeric( sFixedCoupon ) / 100.0,
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Premium",fPremium )
			},
			pStreams:=legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			streamsComputeSettlementFlow( pStreams )
		},
		
		IF ( sPatternLabel == "Fixed Recovery CDS" ) THEN
		{
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Settlement type","Cash" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Protection payoff","Reference price - fixed price" )
		},
        
        //Add Fixed Recovery CDS case for the npv implied set
	    pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pMainComponent),
		IF ( sPattern == "CDS" ) OR ( sPattern == "Recovery Lock" ) OR ( sPattern == "Fixed Recovery CDS" ) THEN
		{
			IF NOT legIsImplied( pMainComponent,"Npv" ) THEN
				legSetLocalImplied( pMainComponent,"Npv" )
		}        
        
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
EQD short text description rule

Version 1.7
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.6
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.5
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.4
Amended to set more detailed short descriptions

Version 1.3
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.2
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.1
The quantity is not displayed for Equity Illiquid Participation

Version  1.0

Notes:
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter and in the mail communication
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
3. Warrants are handled as securities here
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			// Field Initialization/Reset
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
			sTradePurpose := legGetString( pContract, "Trade purpose" ),

			IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN 
			{
				sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),  
				IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "@ Market price"
				ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "@ Limit price"
			},
			
			IF ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
				sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract )
			ELSE
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			sListOfSecurities := "Equities$"
							+ "Equity futures$"
							+ "Equity Forwards$"
							+ "Convertible Bonds$",
			//sTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
			bIsSecurity := FALSE,
			bIsClassic := FALSE,
			sSecurityGroup := "",
			fQuantity := 0.0,
			sQuantity := "",
			sMaturity := "",
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			sListOfClassics := "EQD OTC Options$"
							+ "EQD Lookback Options$"
							+ "EQD Warrants$"
							+ "EQD Listed Options$"
							+ "EQD Asian Options$"
							+ "EQD Barrier Options$"
							+ "Variance Swap EQD$",
							/*
							to define for this pattern label too:
							sBarR := "Barrier Ratchet Option EQD",
							*/
			sBlotterDescription := "",
			bIsRatio := FALSE,
			sPayout := "",
			fNominal := 0.0,
			sOtherNominalUnit := "",
			fStrike := 0.0,
			sStrike := "",
			sNominal := "",
			sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := "",
			
			bIsSecurity := ( strContain( sListOfSecurities,sRegistration + "$" ) ),
			bIsClassic := strContain( sListOfClassics,sRegistration + "$" ),
			// For EQD producst that are securities or warrants
			IF ( ( bIsSecurity ) ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ) + " ",
				IF ( sBuySell == "Buy " ) THEN
					sPayReceive := "Pay "
				ELSE
					sPayReceive := "Receive ",
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "Convertible Bonds" ) THEN
				{
					fPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Settlement price" ),
					sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Flat settl unit" ) + " "
				}
				ELSE
				{
					fPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price" ),
					sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Other nominal unit" ) + " "
				},
				sPrice := toString( fPrice,15,3,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sPrice := sheaderOrder,
				fFlatAmout := abs( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Flat amount" ) ),
				sFlatAmout := toString( fFlatAmout,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + " ",
                IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sFlatAmout := sheaderOrder,
                
				sFlatAmoutCurrency := legGetString (pComponent, "Flat amount unit"),
				
				// Quantity
				sSecurityGroup := legGetString( pComponent,"ILLIQUID" ),
				IF ( sSecurityGroup == "" ) THEN
				{
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
					sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,12,0,TRUE,0 )
				},
				
				// Maturity
				IF ( sRegistration == "Equity Forwards" ) THEN
				{
					dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent, "Settlement date"),
					sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dSettlementDate ) + " "
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity futures" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Convertible Bonds" ) ) THEN
				{
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ) + " "
				}
				ELSE
				{
					dMaturity := sysGetTradingDate(),
					sMaturity := " on " + toString1( dMaturity ) + " "
				},
				
				// securities blotter text
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sQuantity + " " + sInstrument + " @ " + sPrice + " " + sOtherNominalUnit 
				+ sPayReceive + sFlatAmout + sFlatAmoutCurrency + sMaturity,
                
                IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                // securities blotter text
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sQuantity + " " + sInstrument + "" + sPrice + " " + sOtherNominalUnit 
				+ sPayReceive + sFlatAmout + sFlatAmoutCurrency + sMaturity     
                    
			}
			// For EQD products that are options ( ie classics ) and Warrants
			ELSE IF ( ( bIsClassic ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Warrants" ) ) THEN
			{
				sBarrierSimpleDouble := "",
				sBarrierType := "",
				sBarrier := "",
				
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
					sPayReceive := "Pay "
				ELSE
					sPayReceive := "Receive ",
				
				bIsRatio := legGetString( pComponent,"Ratio" ) == "Yes",
				IF ( bIsRatio ) THEN
				{
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Other nominal unit" ),
					sRatio := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sOtherNominalUnit
				}
				ELSE
				{
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
					sRatio := toString( fQuantity,12,0,TRUE,0 )
				},
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Barrier Options" ) THEN
				{
					sBarrierSimpleDouble := legGetString(pComponent,"Barrier S/D"),
					sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier type" ) + " ",
					IF ( sBarrierSimpleDouble == "Simple" ) THEN
					{
						fBarrier := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Simple barrier"),
						sBarrier := "Barrier " + toString( fBarrier,15,3,TRUE,0 ) + " "
					}
					ELSE IF ( sBarrierSimpleDouble == "Double" ) THEN
					{
						fBarrierDown := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Down" ),
						fBarrierUp := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Up" ),
						sBarrier := "Barriers " + toString( fBarrierDown,15,3,TRUE,0 ) + " and " + toString( fBarrierUp,15,3,TRUE,0 ) + " "
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD OTC Options" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Warrants" ) THEN
					sStyle := legGetString( pComponent,"Style" ) + " "
				ELSE
					sPayoff := legGetString( pComponent,"Payoff" ) + " ",
				
				sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) + " ",
				
				fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Strike" ),
				sStrike := " Strike " + toString( fStrike,15,3,TRUE,0 ),
				
				fFlatSettlement := abs( legGetNumeric( pComponent, "Flat settlement" ) ),
				sFlatSettlement := toString( fFlatSettlement,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sFlatSettlement := sheaderOrder,
				sFlatAmountCurrency := " " + legGetString (pComponent, "Flat amount unit"),
				
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				
				// Classic blotter text
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sRatio + " " + sPayoff + sStyle
				+ sPayout + sBarrierType + sInstrument + sStrike + " " + sBarrier + sPayReceive + sFlatSettlement + sFlatAmountCurrency + sMaturity 
			}
            
        	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Equity autocalls" ) THEN
        	{ 
            	sType := "Autocall ",
                fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Last Calculation Date" ),
				sMaturity := " Maturity " + toString1( dMaturity ),
                pStreams:=legGetStreams(pLeg),
                pUnderlyings:=streamsGetEqUnderlyingsTable(pStreams),
                iNbUnderlyings:=eqUnderlyingsTableGetNumberOfElements(pUnderlyings),
                iLoop:=0,
                sInstrument := "",
                WHILE (iLoop<iNbUnderlyings) DO
                {
                pFirstUnderlying:=eqUnderlyingsTableGetEqUnderlying(pUnderlyings,iLoop),
                sFirstInstrument:=eqUnderlyingGetLabel(pFirstUnderlying),
                sInstrument := sInstrument + " " + sFirstInstrument, 
                iLoop := iLoop + 1
                },			
            
				sBlotterDescription := sType + sNominal + sMaturity + " on " + sInstrument   
            }
            
            ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Volatility futures" ) THEN
            
            {
               sVol := "To be completed"
            
            }
            
			// For exotics products
			ELSE
			{
				sType := "Exotic Option ",
				
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				
				// Exotic blotter text
				sBlotterDescription := sType + sNominal + sMaturity + " on " + sInstrument
			},
			
			// Blotter and communication
			IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 245 ) THEN
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
			ELSE
			{
				sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription,0,244 ),
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
				ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc EQD rule )","DIST_DESC" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
IRD short text description rule

Used algorithm
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifiying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty then
		Retrieve few fields shared between all IRD products
		If registration is Bonds then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Interest rate swap then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Currency swaps then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Caps/floors then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Swaptions then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Short futures or Long futures then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Fra de Cupom then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Interest rate future options then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is FRA's then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Bond options then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Asset swaps then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Asset Swap and Bond then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Extendable Swap IRD then
			Build short text description accordingly
		End if
		Store built short description in the DIST_DESC UDF
	End if
End if

Version 1.12
Handle the Bond forwards and Treasury locks registrations

Version 1.11
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.10
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.9
Handle the Extendable Swap IRD strategy and the Fra de Cupom

Version 1.8
Few corrections on Asset swap and bond

Version 1.7
Handle the Asset swap and bond strategy

Version 1.6
To handle the Asset swaps registration too

Version 1.5
- Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required
- The Short futures, Long futures, Interest rate future options, FRA's and Bond options registrations are handled too

Version 1.4
The Swaptions registration is handled too

Version 1.3
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.2
To handle the Currency swaps product

Version 1.1
Change the way to convert date format into string

Version  1.0

Notes:
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter and in the mail communication
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			// Fields Initialization/Reset
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
			
			IF ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
				sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract )
			ELSE
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			sTradePurpose := legGetString( pContract,"Trade purpose" ),
			
			IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
			{
				sTemplate := legGetString( pContract, "Order_template" ),
				IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := " @ Market price"
				ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := " @ Limit price"
			},
			
			sBlotterDescription := "",
			sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := "",
			
			IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := " " + toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sNominal + sMaturity + " on security " + sInstrument
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) THEN
			{
				// Fields Initialization
				sLegType1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
				sPayReceive1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay Receive1" ),
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),
				sRateMargin := " " + toString( fRateMargin,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fRateMargin2 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin2" ),
				sRateMargin2 := " " + toString( fRateMargin2,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				sIndex1 := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Index1" ),
				sCrdLinked1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit linked" ),
				sLegType2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				sPayReceive2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay Receive2" ),
				sIndex2 := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Index2" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sRateMargin := sheaderOrder,
				sCrdLinked2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit linked2" ),
				
				IF ( sLegType1 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sRateMargin + " on fixed leg "
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sIndex1 + " on floating leg ",
				IF ( sCrdLinked1 == "Yes" ) THEN
				{
					sIssuer1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Issuer" ),
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " credit linked to " + sIssuer1 + " "
				},
				
				IF ( sLegType2 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sRateMargin2 + " on fixed leg "
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sIndex2 + " on floating leg ",
				IF ( sCrdLinked2 == "Yes" ) THEN
				{
					sIssuer2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Issuer2" ),
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " credit linked to " + sIssuer2 + " "
				},
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Currency swaps" ) THEN 
			{
				// Fields Initialization
				sLegType1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
				sPayReceive1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay Receive1" ),
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),
				sRateMargin := " " + toString( fRateMargin,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fRateMargin2 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin2" ),
				sRateMargin2 := " " + toString( fRateMargin2,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				sIndex1 := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Index1" ),
				sCrdLinked1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Credit linked" ),
				sLegType2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				sPayReceive2 := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Pay Receive2" ),
				sIndex2 := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Index2" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				fOthNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Other nominal" ),
				sOthNominal := toString( fOthNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sRateMargin := sheaderOrder,
				IF ( sLegType1 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sRateMargin + " on fixed leg " + sNominal
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sIndex1 + " on floating leg " + sNominal ,
				
				IF ( sLegType2 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sRateMargin2 + " on fixed leg " + sOthNominal
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sIndex2 + " on floating leg " + sOthNominal,
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Caps/floors" ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy/Sell" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := " " + toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sNominal + sMaturity + " on instrument " + sInstrument
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" ) THEN
			{
				//Field initialization
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sNominalCurr := legGetString(pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
				fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Strike" ),
				sStrike := toString( fStrike,6,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sIndexName2 := legGetString (pComponent,"Index2" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate(pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := toString1(dMaturity),
				
				sOptionStyle := legGetString ( pComponent,"Option style" ),
				IF ( sOptionStyle == "European" ) THEN
				{
					dOptionExpiry := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
					sOptionExpiry := toString1( dOptionExpiry ),
					sBlotterDescription := sNominal + " " + sNominalCurr + " on " + sIndexName2 + " Strike " + sStrike + " Option expiry " + sOptionExpiry + " Swap maturity " + sMaturity
				}
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sNominal + " " + sNominalCurr + " on " + sIndexName2 + " Strike " + sStrike + " Swap expiry " + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Short futures" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Long futures" ) ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				sMaturity := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " lots of " + sInstrument + " Expiry " + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fra de cupom" ) THEN
			{
				iCount := 0,
				iCountNb := 2,
				WHILE ( iCount < iCountNb ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
					// Field Initialization
					sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					sMaturity := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
					sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
					
					IF ( iCount == 0 ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := "Near leg: " + sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " " + sInstrument + " Expiry " + sMaturity
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " / Far leg: " + sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " " + sInstrument + " Expiry " + sMaturity,
					
					iCount := iCount + 1
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate future options" ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sCallOrPut := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
				fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Strike" ),
				sStrike := toString( fStrike,7,3,TRUE,0 ),
				sMaturity := legGetString( pComponent,"Option expiration period" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " " + sCallOrPut + "s strike " + sStrike + " Expiry " + sMaturity + " on " + sInstrument
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "FRA's") THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent,"Index tenor2" ),
				sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit"),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sNominal + " " + sCurrency + " Expiry " + sMaturity + ". Underlying " + sUnderlying
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond options" ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sSellOrBuy := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sCallOrPut := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
				fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Strike" ),
				sStrike := toString( fStrike,7,3,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sSellOrBuy + "s " + sQuantity + " " + sCallOrPut + "s on " + sInstrument + " strike " + sStrike + " Expiry " + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Asset swaps" ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Index" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Bond" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBond + " Index " + sIndex + " Nominal " + sNominal + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Asset Swap and Bond" ) THEN
			{
				pAssetSwap := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
				pBond := legGetComponentAt( pContract,1 ),
				
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pBond,"Buy/Sell" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pBond,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sBond := legGetString( pBond,"Instrument" ),
				sIndex := legGetString( pAssetSwap,"Index" ),
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pAssetSwap,"Rate Margin" ),
				
				IF ( fRateMargin > 0.0 ) THEN
					sRateMargin := "+" + toString( fRateMargin,7,3,TRUE,0 )
				ELSE
					sRateMargin := toString( fRateMargin,7,3,TRUE,0 ),
				
				fDirtyPrice := legGetNumeric( pBond,"Settl._dirty_price" ),
				sDirtyPrice := toString( fDirtyPrice,7,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sNominal + " " + sBond + " at " + sDirtyPrice + " and swap coupon to " + sIndex + sRateMargin
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Extendable Swap IRD" ) THEN
			{
				pSwap := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
				pSwaption := legGetComponentAt( pContract,1 ),
				// Fields Initialization
				sLegType1 := legGetString( pSwap,"Leg type" ),
				sPayReceive1 := legGetString( pSwap,"Pay Receive1" ),
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pSwap,"Rate Margin" ),
				sRateMargin := " " + toString( fRateMargin,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				fRateMargin2 := legGetNumeric( pSwap,"Rate Margin2" ),
				sRateMargin2 := " " + toString( fRateMargin2,10,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				sIndex1 := " " + legGetString( pSwap,"Index1" ),
				sLegType2 := legGetString( pSwap,"Leg type2" ),
				sPayReceive2 := legGetString( pSwap,"Pay Receive2" ),
				sIndex2 := " " + legGetString( pSwap,"Index2" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pSwap,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pSwap,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				dExtendedMaturity := legGetDate( pSwaption,"Maturity" ),
				sExtendedMaturity := toString1( dExtendedMaturity ),
				
				IF ( sLegType1 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sRateMargin + " on fixed leg "
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive1 + sIndex1 + " on floating leg ",
				
				IF ( sLegType2 == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sRateMargin2 + " on fixed leg "
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sPayReceive2 + sIndex2 + " on floating leg ",
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sNominal + sMaturity + " extendable up to " + sExtendedMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Forwards" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Treasury locks" ) ) THEN
			{
				// Field Initialization
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy Sell" ),
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := " Expiring on " + toString1( dMaturity ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := " " + toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + sNominal + sMaturity + " on security " + sInstrument
			},
			
			iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
			iComponent := 0,
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
				
				// Blotter and communication
				IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 245 ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
				ELSE
				{
					sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription, 0, 244 ),
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
					ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc IRD rule )","DIST_DESC" )
				},
				
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.DvPFlowsLinking

/*
MXpress
Flows linking in case of payment conditions have been set to "Delivery versus payment"

Used algorithm:
Retrieve package's flows
Retrieve the registration
If Contract Registration is "Bonds" or "Equities" or "Bond Repos"
	Loop on all flows
		If mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf is "mx.deliverable.Cash" or "mx.deliverable.Security" then
			Retrieve the flow typologies
			If the flow is an initial, premium or reimbursement then
				Define the flow pointer according to mx.system.object.IsInstance
				If the payment Conditions field has been set to "Delivery versus payment" then
					Add Cash flow to the security Flow linked flows accordingly
					remove the Cash Flow from the collection
				End if
			End if
		End If
	End loop
End if

Version 1.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","PaymentCondition") lookup table

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	pPackage := This,
	pFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,0 ),
	pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent( pFlow ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
	pCashFlow := pNull,
	pSecFlow := pNull,
	pCashFlow2 := pNull,
	pSecFlow2 := pNull,
	
	IF ( ( sRegistration =="Bonds" ) 
	OR ( sRegistration == "Equities" )
	OR (sRegistration == "Bond Repos") ) THEN
	{
		iFlow := 0,
		iNbFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
		WHILE ( iFlow < iNbFlows ) DO
		{
			pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,iFlow ),
			IF ( ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ) )
			OR ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Security" ) ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ) ) ) THEN
					pTypology := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetTypology( pFlow )
				ELSE
					pTypology := mx.deliverable.Security.GetTypology( pFlow ),
				
				sTypologyType0 := mx.deliverable.Typology.GetFlowType0( pTypology ),
				sTypologyType1 := mx.deliverable.Typology.GetFlowType1( pTypology ),
				sTypologyType2 := mx.deliverable.Typology.GetFlowType2( pTypology ),
				IF ( ( ( sTypologyType0 == "CAP" ) AND ( sTypologyType1 == "NOM" ) AND ( sTypologyType2 == "INIT" ) )
				OR ( ( sTypologyType0 == "CAP" ) AND ( sTypologyType1 == "IPAY" ) ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ) ) ) THEN
						pCashFlow := pFlow
					ELSE
						pSecFlow := pFlow
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sTypologyType0 == "CAP" ) AND ( sTypologyType1 == "NOM" ) AND ( sTypologyType2 == "RTRN" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ) ) ) THEN
						pCashFlow2 := pFlow
					ELSE
						pSecFlow2 := pFlow
				}
			},
			iFlow := iFlow + 1
		},
		
		pFieldResult := pNULL,
		sPaymentConditions := "",
		sField := "PaymentCondition",
		pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
						"Registration",sRegistration,
						"Criteria 1","" ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
		{
			sPaymentConditions := legGetString( pComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ) )
		},
		
		IF ( sPaymentConditions == "Delivery versus payment" ) THEN
		{
			// Remove the cash flow from the package
			mx.system.collection.RemoveElement( pFlows,pCashFlow ),
			// Add it to the linked flows
			pLinkedFlows := mx.deliverable.Security.GetLinkedFlows( pSecFlow ),
			mx.system.collection.AddElement( pLinkedFlows,pCashFlow ),
			IF ( ( toString( pCashFlow2 ) <> "0" ) AND ( toString( pSecFlow2 ) <> "0" ) ) THEN
			{
				// Remove the cash flow from the package
				mx.system.collection.RemoveElement( pFlows,pCashFlow2 ),
				// Add it to the linked flows
				pLinkedFlows := mx.deliverable.Security.GetLinkedFlows( pSecFlow2 ),
				mx.system.collection.AddElement( pLinkedFlows,pCashFlow2 )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.NettingEligibility

/*
MXpress
Deliverable Netting Eligibility Flag Assigment

Purpose:
Setting the netting flag of the deliverable for flows issued by a contract
The default behaviour is to set the flag according to the payment netting flag of the trade

Used algorithm:
Retrieve package's flows
Retrieve the registration, the typology, the counterparty and the instrument
Retrieve the netting eligibility with the counterparty payment netting value
According the component registration, the typology, the counterparty and the instrument, retrieve the Netting eligilibity in the (MX.ALL.DlvNetting, ALL) Lookup table
If the netting payment netting value is TRUE and if the Netting eligilibity from (MX.ALL.DlvNetting, ALL) Lookup table returns a value,
the deliverable will inherit the lookup table netting value. Otherwise, the deliverable will keep the trade inherited netting eligibility flag.
Loop on all flows
	For each flow, set the Netting eligilibity at cash and at linked flows on securities level
End loop

Used look-up tables:
MX.ALL.DlvNetting to manage the case where the netting eligibility is not only dependent of the counterparty label

Version 1.2
Modification of the algorithm: the lookup table is to manage the case where the counterparty is eligible of the netting but for not all the typologies or instruments.

Version 1.1
Add the typology as input in the lookups

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	// Initialization of the variables
	pPackage := This,
	pFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,0 ),
	pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent( pFlow ),
	pDlvCashCtp := pNull,
	pCashInstrument := pNull,
	sEligibleToNetting := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	sCashInstrument := "",
	sDlvCashCtp := "",
	iFlow := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	
	// Test if there is a component creating the flow
	IF ( NOT isNull( pComponent ) ) THEN
	{
		// Get the registration and the typology of the component
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
		// Get the counterparty of the flow
		pDlvCashCtp := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetBeneficiaryParty( pFlow ),
		sDlvCashCtp := mx.statics.organization.Party.GetPartyName( pDlvCashCtp ),
		// Get the cash instrument of the flow
		pCashInstrument := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetCurrency( pFlow ),
		sCashInstrument := mx.statics.fx.CurrencyDefinition.GetCurrencyLabel( pCashInstrument ),
		// Get the netting flag of the componenet
		bToNet := legIsPaymentNettingChecked( pComponent ),
		
		// Get the netting eligibility value from the lookup table MX.ALL.DlvNetting
		pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.DlvNetting","ALL",
									"Registration", sRegistration,
									"Typology",sTypology,
									"Counterpart", sDlvCashCtp,
									"Instrument", sCashInstrument ),
		
		// If the component is eligible to the netting, check if the flow will be eligible itself
		IF ( ( bToNet ) AND ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) ) THEN
		{
			// Get the result of MX.ALL.DlvNetting
			iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
			sEligibleToNetting := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults - 1,0 ),
			
			//Compute the netting eligibility flag
			IF ( sEligibleToNetting <> "" ) THEN
			{
				// If the result of the lookup table is Yes then the flow will be eligible to the netting else it will not
				IF ( sEligibleToNetting == "Yes" ) THEN
					bToNet := TRUE
				ELSE
					bToNet := FALSE
			}
		},
		
		// Set the netting eligibility flag at flow level
		iNbFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
		WHILE ( iFlow < iNbFlows ) DO
		{
			pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,iFlow ),
			
			// Set netting flag for cash
			IF ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ) ) THEN 
				mx.deliverable.Cash.SetToBeNetted( pFlow,bToNet )
			// Set netting flag for Securities
			ELSE IF ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Security" ) ) THEN
				mx.deliverable.Security.SetToBeNetted( pFlow,bToNet ),
			
			iFlow := iFlow + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.ReleaseDate

/*
MXpress
Compute the settlement dates

Purpose:
To compute the settlement:
- initiation date
- netting date and cut-off time
- release date

Used algorithm:
Retrieve package's flows
If empty, retrive flows issued by event on flows
Loop on all cash flows
	Retrieve settlement method
	If settlement method is CLS then
		Set release date with value date of deliverable cash
	Else
		Retrieve flow's currency
		Retrieve currency release date shifter and calendar in ( "MX.ALL.RelDate","Settlement" ) lookup table
		Compute release date accordingly
		Set release date with value date of deliverable cash
		Retrieve the shifter calendar in ("MX.ALL.DlvInitdate", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the initiation date in ODR with value of Release date - Shifter calendar from ("MX.ALL.DlvInitdate", "ALL") lookup table
		Retrieve the shifter calendar and the netting cutoff time in ("MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the netting date in ODR  with value of Release date - Shifter calendar from ("MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the netting cutoff time in ODR
	End if
End loop
Loop on all security flows
	Retrieve settlement method
	If settlement method is CLS then
		Set release date with value date of deliverable cash
	Else
		Retrieve flow's currency
		Retrieve currency release date shifter and calendar in ( "MX.ALL.RelDate","Settlement" ) lookup table
		Compute release date accordingly
		Set release date with value date of deliverable cash
		Retrieve the shifter calendar in ("MX.ALL.DlvInitdate", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the initiation date in ODR with value of Release date - Shifter calendar from ("MX.ALL.DlvInitdate", "ALL") lookup table
		Retrieve the shifter calendar and the netting cutoff time in ("MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the netting date in ODR  with value of Release date - Shifter calendar from ("MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff", "ALL") lookup table
		Set the netting cutoff time in ODR
	End if
End loop

Used look-up tables:
MX.ALL.RelDate: Define the release date shifter based on the currency
MX.ALL.DlvInitDate : Define the initiation date shifter based on the currency, currency calendar, typology, legal entity and counterparty
MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff: Defin the cutoff date shifter and the cut-off time based on currency, legal entity and typology

Version 1,7
Replaced CURRENCY with Currency in MX.ALL.RelDate

Vesrion 1.6
- Updated Calendar, now based on Currency
- Updated Display Labels for Counterpart and Legal Entity

Version 1.5 
- Adding the computation of the initiation date for cash and security deliverables and assigns it to an ODR.
- Adding the computation of the netting date for cash and security deliverables and assigns it to an ODR.
- Adding the computation of the netting cutoff time for cash and security deliverables and assigns it to an ODR.

Version 1.4
- Avoid computing release dates in the past: Release date = Max(rule result, PC date)

Version 1.3
- Added a condition to handle flows issued by events on flows (Netting, Split...)

Version 1.2
- Added a filtering on Cash flows instead of all flows

Version 1.1
- Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions
- used lookup table has been renamed, scripted-rule is renamed accordingly

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pPackage := This,
	pAllFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	
	// For Deliverable issued by Event on Deliverables
	IF ( isNull( pAllFlows ) ) THEN
		pAllFlows := mx.deliverable.event.Event.GetBOs( pPackage ),
	pCashFlows := mx.system.collection.GetFilterByElementClass( pAllFlows,"mx.deliverable.Cash" ),
	pCashFlow := pNull,
	pStlMethod := pNull,
	pCashResults := pNull,
	pResults := pNull,
	pCurrency := pNull,
	pLegalEntity := pNull,
	pTypology := pNull,
	pCounterparty := pNull,
	pSecurityFlows := pNull,
	pSecurityFlow := pNull,
	pSecurityCurrency := pNull,
	pSecurityResults := pNull,
	iCashFlow := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	iNbCashResults := 0,
	iNbOfSecurityFlows := 0,
	iNbSecurityResults := 0,
	fReleaseDate := 0.0,
	sStlMethod := "",
	sCurrencyLabel := "",
    sShifter := "",
	sCalendar := "",
	sCashShifter := "",
	sCutoff := "",
	sLegalEntity := "",
	sTypology := "",
	sCounterparty := "",
	sSecurityCurrencyLabel := "",
	sSecurityShifter := "",
	
	iNbOfCashFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pCashFlows ),
	pPC := sysGetProcessingCenter(),
	dPCDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dValueDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dCashReleaseDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dReleaseDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dNettingDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dInitDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dSecurityValueDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	dSecurityReleaseDate := processingCenterGetDate( pPC ),
	fPCDate := convertDToNumeric( dPCDate ),
	
	//Set the dates for the Cash Flows
	WHILE ( iCashFlow < iNbOfCashFlows ) DO
	{
		pCashFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pCashFlows,iCashFlow ),
		pStlMethod := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetSettlementMethod( pCashFlow ),
		sStlMethod := mx.statics.SettlementMethod.GetLabel( pStlMethod ),
        pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent( pCashFlow ),
        pCurrency := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetCurrency( pCashFlow ),
        sCurrencyLabel := mx.statics.fx.CurrencyDefinition.GetCurrencyLabel( pCurrency ),
        pLegalEntity := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetLegalEntity( pCashFlow ),
        sLegalEntity := ctpGetName( pLegalEntity ),
        pTypology := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetTradeTypology( pCashFlow ),
        sTypology := mx.statics.Typology.GetLabel( pTypology ),
        pCounterparty := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetBeneficiaryParty( pCashFlow ),
        sCounterparty := ctpGetName( pCounterparty ),
        sCalendar := fxCurGetCalendar( sCurrencyLabel ),
        pCashResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.DlvInitDate","ALL",
											"CALENDAR", sCalendar,
											"Currency", sCurrencyLabel,
											"Typology", sTypology,
											"Legal Entity", sLegalEntity,
											"Counterpart", sCounterparty ),
		
		// Specific case for CLS settlements
		IF ( sStlMethod == "CLS" ) THEN
		{
			// Release Date = Value Date
			dValueDate := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetValueDate( pCashFlow ),
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetReleaseDate( pCashFlow,dValueDate ),
			IF ( toString( pCashResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
			{
				iNbCashResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCashResults ),
				sCashShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pCashResults,iNbCashResults -1,0 )
			},
			// Set the initiation date
			dCashReleaseDate := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetReleaseDate( pCashFlow ),
            dTradeDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ), 
            fTradeDate := convertDToNumeric( dTradeDate ),
			dInitDate := shiftschedule( dCashReleaseDate,2,2,sCashShifter,sCalendar ),
            fInitDate := convertDToNumeric( dInitDate ),
			IF ( fTradeDate > fInitDate ) THEN
				mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashInitiationDate ( pCashFlow,dTradeDate )
            ELSE
				mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashInitiationDate ( pCashFlow,dInitDate ),
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff","ALL",
										"Currency",sCurrencyLabel,
										"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity ,
										"Typology",sTypology ),
			
			// Set the netting date and cut-off time
			IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
			{
				iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
				sCashShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pCashResults,iNbResults -1,0 ),
				sCutoff := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults -1,1 )
			},
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashNettingCutOffTime( pCashFlow,sCutoff ),
			dNettingDate := shiftschedule( dCashReleaseDate,2,2,sCashShifter,sCalendar ),                
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashNettingDate( pCashFlow,dNettingDate )
		}
		// Non CLS Cases
		ELSE
		{
			// Set the release date
            sShifter := lookupString( "MX.ALL.RelDate","Settlement",
										"Currency", sCurrencyLabel),
			dValueDate := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetValueDate( pCashFlow ),
			dReleaseDate := shiftschedule( dValueDate,2,2,sShifter,sCalendar ),
			// Check if Release Date is not in the past
			fReleaseDate := convertDToNumeric( dReleaseDate ),
			IF ( ( fPCDate - fReleaseDate ) > 0.0 ) THEN
				dReleaseDate := dPCDate,
			// Sets Release date
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetReleaseDate( pCashFlow,dReleaseDate ),
			// Set the initiation date
			IF ( toString( pCashResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
			{
				iNbCashResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCashResults ),
				sCashShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pCashResults,iNbCashResults -1,0 )
			},
			dCashReleaseDate := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetReleaseDate( pCashFlow ),
            dTradeDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ), 
            fTradeDate := convertDToNumeric( dTradeDate ),
			dInitDate := shiftschedule( dCashReleaseDate,2,2,sCashShifter,sCalendar ),
            fInitDate := convertDToNumeric( dInitDate ),
			IF ( fTradeDate > fInitDate ) THEN
				mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashInitiationDate ( pCashFlow,dTradeDate )
            ELSE
				mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashInitiationDate ( pCashFlow,dInitDate ),
			// Set the netting date and the netting cut-off
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff","ALL",
										"Currency", sCurrencyLabel,
										"Legal Entity", sLegalEntity,
										"Typology",sTypology ),                     
			IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
			{
				iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
				sCashShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults -1,0 ),
				sCutoff := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults -1,1 )
			},
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashNettingCutOffTime( pCashFlow,sCutoff ),
			dNettingDate := shiftschedule( dCashReleaseDate,2,2,sCashShifter,sCalendar ),                
			mx.deliverable.Cash.SetCashNettingDate( pCashFlow,dNettingDate )
		},
		
		iCashFlow := iCashFlow + 1
	},
	
	//Set the dates for SecurityFlows
	iSecFlow := 0,
	pSecurityFlows  := mx.system.collection.GetFilterByElementClass( pAllFlows,"mx.deliverable.Security" ),
	iNbOfSecurityFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pSecurityFlows ),
	WHILE ( iSecFlow < iNbOfSecurityFlows ) DO
	{
		pSecurityFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pSecurityFlows,iSecFlow ),
		dSecurityValueDate := mx.deliverable.Security.GetValueDate( pSecurityFlow ),
