		pSecurityCurrency := mx.deliverable.Security.GetSettlementCurrency( pSecurityFlow ),
		sSecurityCurrencyLabel := mx.statics.fx.CurrencyDefinition.GetCurrencyLabel( pSecurityCurrency ),
        pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent(pSecurityFlow),
        plegalEntity := mx.deliverable.Security.GetLegalEntity( pSecurityFlow ),
        sLegalEntity := ctpGetName( pLegalEntity ),
        pTypology := mx.deliverable.Security.GetTradeTypology( pSecurityFlow ),
        sTypology := mx.statics.Typology.GetLabel( pTypology ),
        pCounterparty := mx.deliverable.Security.GetBeneficiaryParty( pSecurityFlow ),
        sCounterparty := ctpGetName( pCounterparty ),
		// Set the release date
		sCalendar := fxCurGetCalendar( sSecurityCurrencyLabel ),
		pSecurityResults :=lookupResults( "MX.ALL.DlvInitDate","ALL",
										"CALENDAR", sCalendar,
										"Currency", sSecurityCurrencyLabel,
										"Typology", sTypology,
										"Legal Entity", sLegalEntity,
										"Counterpart", sCounterparty ),
        sShifter := lookupString( "MX.ALL.RelDate","Settlement",
									"Currency", sSecurityCurrencyLabel),
		dValueDate := mx.deliverable.Security.GetValueDate( pSecurityFlow ),
		dReleaseDate := shiftschedule( dValueDate,2,2,sShifter,sCalendar ),
		// Check if Release Date is not in the past
		fReleaseDate := convertDToNumeric( dReleaseDate ),
		IF ( ( fPCDate - fReleaseDate ) > 0.0 ) THEN
			dReleaseDate := dPCDate,
		// Sets Release date
		mx.deliverable.Security.SetReleaseDate( pSecurityFlow,dReleaseDate ),
		
		//Set the initiation date
		IF ( toString( pSecurityResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
		{
			iNbSecurityResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pSecurityResults ),
			sSecurityShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pSecurityResults,iNbSecurityResults -1,0 )
		},
		dSecurityReleaseDate := mx.deliverable.Security.GetReleaseDate( pSecurityFlow ),
        dTradeDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ), 
        fTradeDate := convertDToNumeric( dTradeDate ),
		dInitDate := shiftschedule( dSecurityReleaseDate,2,2,sSecurityShifter,sCalendar ),
        fInitDate := convertDToNumeric( dInitDate ),
		IF ( fTradeDate > fInitDate ) THEN
			mx.deliverable.Security.SetSecurityInitiationDate ( pSecurityFlow,dTradeDate )
        ELSE
			mx.deliverable.Security.SetSecurityInitiationDate ( pSecurityFlow,dInitDate ),
		
		// Set the netting date and the netting cut-off time
		pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.Dlv.NettingCutOff","ALL",
									"Currency", sCurrencyLabel,
									"Legal Entity", sLegalEntity,
									"Typology", sTypology ),
		IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
		{
			iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
			sSecurityShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults -1,0 ),
			sCutoff := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults -1,1 )
		},
		mx.deliverable.Security.SetSecurityNettingCutoffTime( pSecurityFlow,sCutoff ),
		dNettingDate := shiftschedule( dSecurityReleaseDate,2,2,sSecurityShifter,sCalendar ),                
		mx.deliverable.Security.SetSecurityNettingDate( pSecurityFlow,dNettingDate ),
		dNettingDate := shiftschedule( dSecurityReleaseDate,2,2,sSecurityShifter,sCalendar ),                
		mx.deliverable.Security.SetSecurityNettingDate( pSecurityFlow,dNettingDate ),
		
		iSecFlow := iSecFlow + 1 
	}
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.ExtCtp

/*
MXpress
EXT_CTP  UDF completion

Used algorithm:
Store the counterparty value
Loop on all event versions
	Loop on all components
		If the current component is internal then
			EXT_CTP udf is set to the counterparty value
		End if
	End loop
End loop

Version 1.0
*/

{
	//Fields initializations
	pOld := evtVersionedBOGetOld( evtGetVersionedBOAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,0 ) ),
	sCounterpart := legGetString( legGetMainComponent( pOld ),"Counterpart" ),
	
	iVersionedBO := 0,
	iNbVersionedBOs := evtGetNumberOfVersionedBOs( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
	WHILE ( iVersionedBO < iNbVersionedBOs ) DO
	{
		pVersionedBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,iVersionedBO ),
		pNew := evtVersionedBOGetNew( pVersionedBO ),
		
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pNew ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponentNew := legGetComponentAt( pNew,iComponent ),
			sInternal := legGetString( pComponentNew,"Internal" ),
			IF ( sInternal == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				pUdfbloc := legGetUserFields( pComponentNew ),
				udfSetString( pUdfbloc,"EXT_CTP",sCounterpart )
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		iVersionedBO := iVersionedBO + 1 
	}
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.ExtImpact

/*
MXpress
CONFIRMABL UDF completion
EVT_CTPMOD completion
Rules for events

Used algorithm:
If the counterparty is changed then EVT_CTPMOD = Y
If the counterparty is changed and the event is a correction, then the event is not possible
If the event reason is "Duplicate" and the event is not a "Cancellation") , then the event is not possible
If the event is a renegociation, then the CONFIRMABL UDF should be set to "Y"
If the event is a modification of portfolio, then the CONFIRMABL UDF should be set to "N"
If the event reason is "Internal Amendment", then the CONFIRMABL UDF should be set to "N"
     
Used look-up tables:
 - MX.ALL.EventClassification.ALL to retrieve the event type classification

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices
 
Version 1.4
Create the CONFIRMABL UDF and add related rules

Version 1.3
Checks if the counterparty was modified

Version 1.2
Update the contract CI if counterparty amendment
Take into account the event type for the update of EXT_IMPACT

Version 1.1
Includes the possibility for the user to prevent the overwrite

Version 1.0
First version of the algorithm
*/


{
	pEvent := This,    
	sEvent := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ),
	pEventUDF := evtGetUserFields( pEvent ),
	sConfirmable := udfGetString( pEventUDF,"CONFIRMABL" ),
	iNbResults := 0,
	sCounterpartyChanged := "N",
	sErrorReason := udfGetString( pEventUDF,"ERR_REASON" ),
	sCategory := "",
	pResults := pNull,
	pVBoOrig := pNull,
	pOrigFc := pNull,	
	iNbVersionedBOs := 0,
	pVersionedBO := pNull,
	pNew := pNull,
	pOld := pNull,
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	pComponentNew := pNull,
	pComponentOld := pNull,
	sNewCounterpart := "",
	sOldCounterpart := "",
	iVersionedBO := 0,

	pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.EventClassification","ALL","Event",sEvent ),
	IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
	{
		iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
		sCategory := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iNbResults - 1,0 )
	},
	
	// Check if the counterparty changed
	pVBoOrig := evtGetVersionedBOAt( This,0 ),
	pOrigFc := evtVersionedBOGetOld( pVBoOrig ),
	iVersionedBO := 0,
	iNbVersionedBOs := evtGetNumberOfVersionedBOs( This ),
	WHILE ( iVersionedBO < iNbVersionedBOs ) DO
	{
		pVersionedBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( This,iVersionedBO ),
		pNew := evtVersionedBOGetNew( pVersionedBO ),
		pOld := evtVersionedBOGetOld( pVersionedBO ),
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pNew ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO	
		{
			pComponentNew := legGetComponentAt( pNew,iComponent ),
			pComponentOld := legGetComponentAt( pOld,iComponent ),
			sNewCounterpart := legGetString( pComponentNew,"Counterpart" ),
			sOldCounterpart := legGetString( pComponentOld,"Counterpart" ),
			IF ( sOldCounterpart <> "" AND sNewCounterpart <> sOldCounterpart ) THEN 
				sCounterpartyChanged := "Y",
			
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		iVersionedBO := iVersionedBO + 1 
	},
	
	// Save the counterparty changed status in an event UDF
	udfSetString( pEventUDF,"EVT_CTPMOD", sCounterpartyChanged ),
	
	// Counterparty changing is not allowed for correction events - Mainly Cancel & Reissue
	IF ( ( sCategory == "Correction" ) AND ( sCounterpartyChanged == "Y" ) ) THEN
		ThrowError( "Error","In order to change the counterpart please cancel the trade and book another" ),
	
	//Setting the Error Reason to duplicate is only allowed for Cancelation events
	IF ( ( sErrorReason == "Duplicate" ) AND ( sCategory <> "Cancellation" ) ) THEN
		ThrowError( "Error","Duplicate error reason is only allowed for Cancellation events. Please use a different reason." ),
	
	// Confirmable is mandatory for renegociation events
	IF ( ( sCategory == "Renegociation" ) AND ( sConfirmable == "N" ) ) THEN
		ThrowError( "Renegociation Event","The Renegociation event must be confirmable" ),
	
	//Confirmable is not needed for Portfolio allocation, assignment, modification, transfer, modify user fields
	IF ( ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIPORTFOLIO_ALLOCATION" ) OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIPORTFOLIO_ASSIGNMENT" ) OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIPORTFOLIO_MODIFICATION" ) OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIPORTFOLIO_TRANSFER" ) OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIMODIFY_UDF" ) ) THEN 
		udfOverwriteString( pEventUDF,"CONFIRMABL","N" ),
	
	//Confirmable is not needed if the error reason is selected to be Internal Amendment
	IF ( ( sErrorReason == "Internal Amendment" ) ) THEN 
		udfOverwriteString( pEventUDF,"CONFIRMABL","N" )
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-COM

/*
MXpress
COM Typology assignment rule

Used algorithm
	If leg is intialized
	If there is a package allocation then
		Set the package typology accordingly
	End if
	Loop on all components
		Get the component registration
		Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.COM.TypA-Reg,ALL ) lookup table
		If the typology is empty
			Retrieve certain criteria depending on the component registration
			Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.COM.TypA-Oth,ALL ) loookup table
		End if
		If the retrieved typology is empty
			Throw an error message
		Else
			Set typology for current component
	End loop
	Get a pointer on the father contract
	If the father contract is a native contract
		If the typology is empty
			Throw an error message
		Else
			Set the typology for the contract
	Else
		Get the contract title ( typology equivalent )
		Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.COM.TypA-Reg,ALL ) lookup table
		If the retrieved typology is empty
			Throw an error message
		Else
			Set the typology for the contract
	If the current package is not null
		Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.COM.TypA-PK,ALL ) Look-Up Table
		If the retrieved typology is empty
			Throw an error message
		Else
			Set the typology for the package
		End if
	End if
End if

Version 1.15
Deletion of Compound Option

Version 1.14
Amended to handle precious metals
Deletion of Lease Swap

Version 1.13
- Amendments to change the way to retrieve the asset for lease products and the spread computation for COM Swap
- Amendment to retrieve criteria to reach the Tapos typology

Version 1.12
Amendments to handle Target Forward COM products

Version 1.11
Amendments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.10
- Addition of Metal Warrant pattern
- Addition of COM Physical Forward registration and Average Forward pattern
- Remove Payout form rule for COM Asian used to set the Digital and Forward Start typologies
- Remove Payout form rule for COM Simple option used to set the Digital and Forward Start typologies
- Add new rule to set the typologies for the Digital and Forward Start of COM Asian
- Add new rule to set the typologies for the Digital and Forward Start of COM Simple option

Version 1.9
Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.8
- Add a miniscule update for barrier handling to test for both NO (COM Simple Option) and None (COM Asian)
- Add handling of Interest rate products (loan/deposits and swap) for COM use
- Clean code from unused variables

Version 1.7
- Minor changes to be inline for barrier management

Version 1.6
- Replace legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile1" ) with legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile_type1" ), idem for Volume profile2, to conform with updated MX.3 code
- Replace the temporary lookup table with a call to legGetRegistration function

Version 1.5
Update exercise mode with modifications due to MX.3 update (remove streamsFutGetExercizeMode, harmonize fields "Exercise1" and "Option exercise" for all registrations)

Version 1.4
Correct the way to retrieve asset information.

Version 1.3
- Activate the COM Asset criteria
- Payout form is tested first then Barrier, it is no longer imbricated, for COM Simple Option

Version 1.2
Criteria to define "Profile type" has been amended

Version 1.1
- Add a loop on components: to set typology for STB contracts
- Amendments performed to resolve few COM inconsistencies related to the handling of the cleared swap,transport and Simple option

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component

This rule is designed for COM products,it uses a set of Look-Up Tables ( LUT ):
( MX.COM.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic from registration and one criterion ( undefined )
( MX.COM.TypA-Oth,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic from registration and multiple others criteria ( defined )
( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) is a utility LUT used to map Family/Group/Type to registration

Assomptions:
- there is no package
- for a contract,all components and the contract himself have the same typology
- there is only one phase
*/
{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pLeg ),
		
		// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) AND legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ) == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
		{
			// Retreive BlockTrade typology to be used in Generic parameters
			sBlockTradeTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTradeTypology" ),     
			legSetTypology(pPackage, sBlockTradeTypology)
		},
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		sRegistration := "",
		sCriteria := "",
		sTypology := "",
		sExercizeMode := "",
		sOptionDeliveryMode:="",
		sUnderlyingPhysFin:="",
		sAsset := "",
		sBarrierType := "",
		sDigital := "",
		sForwardStart := "",
		sExoticType := "",
		sPayout := "",
		sLeg1Nature := "",
		sLeg2Nature := "",
		iNbFloatingLegs := 0,
		sNbFloatingLegs := "",
		sVolumeProfile1 := "",
		sVolumeProfile2 := "",
		sProfileType := "",
		sIsSpread := "No",
		sMaturity := "",
		
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			// for Flex products and some others,another criterion is requested to define the typology
			// for the moment,it is not possible to distinct the Flex registration
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "Flex" ) OR ( sRegistration == "anotherRegistration" ) ) THEN
			{
				// define the other criteria
				// it will be the type of exotics
				// to complete...
				sCriteria := legGetString( pComponent,"other criteria" )
			},
			
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.COM.TypA-Reg","ALL",
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria",sCriteria ),
			
			IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN
			{
				// Define the others criterias
				
				// First filter on the Loans/deposits registration to avoid trouble later
				IF ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
				{
					sIndexationStatus := legGetString( pComponent,"Indexation status" ),
					IF ( sIndexationStatus == "No" ) THEN
						sAsset := "METAL"
				}
				ELSE
				{
					// Exercize mode criteria
					// Get the exercize mode of the underlying
					IF ( sRegistration <> "COM Asian" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sRegistration <> "COM Simple option" ) THEN
						{
							sUnderlyingPhysFin := legGetString( pComponent, "Exercise1" ),
							IF ( sUnderlyingPhysFin == "Physical delivery" ) THEN
								sExercizeMode := "FYS"
						}
						ELSE
						{
							sOptionDeliveryMode := legGetString(pComponent,"Option exercise"),
							IF ( sOptionDeliveryMode <> "Cash" ) THEN
								sExercizeMode := "FYS"
						}
					},
					
					// Asset criteria
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Forward" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Physical Forward" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared asian" ) ) THEN
						sAsset := legGetString( pComponent,"COM Asset" ),
					
					// Exotic type criteria
					IF ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" ) THEN
					{
						sOptionExercise := legGetString( pComponent,"Option exercise" ),
						IF ( sOptionExercise <> "Cash Settled" ) THEN
							sExercizeMode := "FYS" 
						ELSE
							sExercizeMode := "CSH",
						
						sDigital := legGetString( pComponent,"Digital" ),
						IF ( sDigital == "Yes" ) THEN
							sExoticType := "Digital",
						
						sForwardStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
						IF ( sForwardStart == "Yes" ) THEN
							sExoticType := "Forward Start",
						
						sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barriers Type" ),
						IF ( sBarrierType <> "None" ) THEN
							sExoticType := "Barrier"
					}
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Asian" ) THEN
					{
						sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier type" ),
						IF ( sBarrierType <> "None" ) THEN
							sExoticType := "Barrier",
						
						sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
						IF ( sPayout <> "" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( ( sPayout <> "Cap" ) AND ( sPayout <> "Floor" ) ) THEN
								sExoticType := sPayout
							ELSE
							{
								sDigital := legGetString( pComponent,"Digital" ),
								IF ( strCONTAIN( sDigital,"Digital" ) ) THEN
									sExoticType := "Digital",
								
								sForwardStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
								IF ( sForwardStart == "Yes" ) THEN
									sExoticType := "Forward start"
							}
						}
					}
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" ) THEN
					{
						sTARF := legGetString ( pComponent, "TARN_status" ),
						IF ( sTARF == "Yes"  ) THEN
							sExoticType := "Forward start"
					},
					
					// Profile type criteria
					// Nb floating legs criteria
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Future" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swaption" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared swap" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Capacity" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM transport" ) ) THEN
					{
						sLeg1Nature := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
						IF ( ( sRegistration <> "COM Future" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "COM Cleared swap" ) ) THEN
							sLeg2Nature := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
						IF ( sLeg1Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
						{
							// floating legs
							iNbFloatingLegs := 1,
							IF ( ( sRegistration <> "COM Future" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "COM Cleared swap" ) ) THEN
							{
								// get the volume profile of the first leg
								sVolumeProfile1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile_type1" ),
								IF ( sVolumeProfile1 == "Custom" ) THEN
									sProfileType := "OTC"
							}
						},
						IF ( sLeg2Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
						{
							// floating legs
							iNbFloatingLegs := iNbFloatingLegs + 1,
							IF ( sRegistration <> "COM Cleared swap" ) THEN
							{
								// get the volume profile of the first leg
								sVolumeProfile2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile_type2" ),
								IF ( sVolumeProfile2 == "Custom" ) THEN
									sProfileType := "OTC"
							}
						},
						sNbFloatingLegs := toString( iNbFloatingLegs ),
						
						IF ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" ) THEN
						{
							pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
							iStreamsNbLegs := streamsGetNumberOfLegsPerPhase( pStreams ),
							iLeg := 0,
							iPhase := 0,
							WHILE ( iLeg < iStreamsNbLegs ) DO
							{
								pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,iLeg ),
								pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream ),
								iIndexNbComponents := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex ),
								IF ( iIndexNbComponents == 2 ) THEN
								{
									sIndexFormula := indexGetBasketFormula( pIndex ),
									IF ( sIndexFormula == "Sum" ) THEN
									{
										fWeight1 := indexGetWeight( pIndex,0 ),
										fWeight2 := indexGetWeight( pIndex,1 ),
										fProduct := fWeight1 * fWeight2,
										IF ( fProduct < 0.0 ) THEN
											sIsSpread := "Yes"
									}
								},
								iLeg := iLeg + 1
							}
						}
					}
				}, 
				sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared asian" ) THEN
					sPublication := legGetString( pComponent,"Publication" ),
				
				//Maturity criteria (precious metals)
				IF ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) THEN
				{
					sMaturity := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Swap_start_delay" ) ),
					dDeliveryDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Physical_Delivery" ),
					dSpotDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Settl flow date" ),
					bIsSpot := ( ( strCONTAIN( sMaturity,"spot" ) ) OR ( dDeliveryDate<=dSpotDate ) ),
					IF ( bIsSpot ) THEN
						sMaturity := "Spot"
				},
				
				sTypology := lookupString( "MX.COM.TypA-Oth","ALL",
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Exercize mode",sExercizeMode,
									"Asset",sAsset,
									"Exotic type",sExoticType,
									"Profile type",sProfileType,
									"Nb floating",sNbFloatingLegs,
									"Is spread",sIsSpread,
									"Pattern",sPattern,
									"Publication",sPublication,
									"Maturity",sMaturity )
			},
			
			IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN 
				// No typology,then throw an error
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on component " + toString( iComponent + 1 ) + " ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
			ELSE
				legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
			
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		
		// To set typology for father contract
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN 
				// No typology,then throw an error
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on contract ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
			ELSE
				legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
		}
		ELSE
		{
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
			
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.COM.TypA-Reg","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria","" ),
			IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN 
				// No typology,then throw an error
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on contract ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
			ELSE
				legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
		},
		
		//To assign a typology in case of Back-to-back
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN
		{
			sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			IF ( sPackageRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,0 ),
				sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
				
				//Gets the package typology from the LUT
				sTypology := lookupString( "MX.COM.TypA-PK","ALL",
										"Package Label",sPackageRegistrationLabel,
										"Registration",sContractRegistration ),
				
				IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
					//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
					ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
				ELSE
					//Sets the package typology
					legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-CRD

/*
MXpress
CRD Typology assignment rule

Used algorithm:
Checked tif the leg is initialised
If there is a package allocation then
	Set the package typology accordingly
End if
Retrieve the component registration
Retrieve the typology in ( MX.CRD.TypA-Reg,ALL ) Look-Up Table
If the typology is empty
	Retrieve certain criteria depending on the component registration
	Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.CRD.TypA-Oth,ALL ) Look-Up Table
End if
If the retrieved typology is empty
	Throw an error message
Else
	Set typology for the current component
	Set the typology for the contract
End if
If the current package is not null
	Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.CRD.TypA-PK,ALL ) Look-Up Table
	If the retrieved typology is empty
		Throw an error message
	Else
		Set the typology for the package
	End if
End if

Version 1.9
Amendments to handle Fixed Recovery CDS

Version 1.8
Amendments to handle Recovery Lock

Version 1.7
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.6
Amendments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.5
Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.4
Asset swaps registration is no more handled by CRD, but IRD

Version 1.3
Comment part updates

Version 1.2
The Quanto criteria is no more retrieved

Version 1.1
Nth-to-default basket registration with n=1 give First-to-default typology

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component
Hypothesis: All contracts have one component,there is no package

This rule is designed for IRD products,it uses a set of Look-Up Tables (LUT):
( MX.CRD.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic when the only input criterion is the registration
( MX.CRD.TypA-Oth,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic when input criterias are the registration and other criterias
( MX.CRD.TypA-CIF,ALL ) is a utility LUT used to define the kind of credit Index according the "FAMILY" UDF
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pComponent ), 
		
		// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) AND ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ) == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) ) THEN
		{
			// Retreive BlockTrade typology to be used in Generic parameters
			sBlockTradeTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTradeTypology" ),
			legSetTypology( pPackage,sBlockTradeTypology )
		},
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sFamily := "",
		sGroup := "",
		sType := "",
		sRegistration := "",
		sTypology := "",
		sPricePar := "",
		sInitialCapital1 := "",
		sFinalCapital1 := "",
		sInitialCapital2 := "",
		sFinalCapital2 := "",
		sCriteria := "",
		sUDFFamily := "",
		sCreditIndexFamily := "",
		sBasketNature := "",
		sQuanto := "No",
		sIndexTenor :=  "",
		sIndexTenorIsEmpty := "Yes",
		sReferenceBond := "",
		sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond := "",
		sBond := "",
		sUDFBondTypoBond := "",
		sUDFBondTypo := "",
		sPayout := "",
		
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		
		//Gets the typology when the registration is the unique required criterion
		sTypology := lookupString( "MX.CRD.TypA-Reg","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration ),
		
		IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN  //Additional criteria are required
		{
			IF ( sRegistration == "Credit index" ) THEN
			{
				//pUDF := crdBasketGetUserFields( legGetString( pComponent,"Basket" ) ),
				//sUDFFamily := udfGetString( pUDF,"FAMILY" ),
				sUDFFamily := legGetString( pComponent,"Bsk udf#FAMILY"),
				sCreditIndexFamily := lookupString( "MX.CRD.TypA-CIF","ALL",
											"UDF Family",sUDFFamily )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Default swaps" ) THEN
			{
				// The Quanto field is available, but the Quanto typology is no more handled by MXpress. If requested, remove the line in comment below
				//sQuanto := legGetString( pComponent,"Quanto" ),
				sIndexTenor :=  legGetString(pComponent,"Index tenor"),
				IF ( sIndexTenor <> "" ) THEN
					sIndexTenorIsEmpty := "No",
				sReferenceBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference bond" ),
				sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond := secGetUdfString( sReferenceBond,"BOND_TYPO" ),
				sBond := legGetString( pComponent,"Bond" ),
				sUDFBondTypoBond := secGetUdfString( sBond,"BOND_TYPO" ),
				IF ( ( sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond <> "" ) AND ( sUDFBondTypoBond == "" ) ) THEN
					sUDFBondTypo == sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond 
				ELSE IF ( ( sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond == "" ) AND ( sUDFBondTypoBond <> "" ) ) THEN
					sUDFBondTypo == sUDFBondTypoBond
				ELSE IF ( sUDFBondTypoReferenceBond == sUDFBondTypoBond ) THEN
					sUDFBondTypo == sUDFBondTypoBond
				ELSE
					ThrowWarning( "When both the bond and the reference obligation are populated, they should be identical ( Typology assignment rule )","Bond" ),
				
				sProtectionPayoff := legGetString( pComponent,"Protection payoff" ),
				fRefPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Ref. price" ),
				IF ( ( sProtectionPayoff == "Reference price - final price" ) AND ( fRefPrice <> 100.0 ) ) THEN
					sCriteria := "RecoveryLock"
                ELSE IF ( sProtectionPayoff == "Reference price - fixed price" ) THEN 
                	sCriteria := "FixedRecoveryCDS"
            }
                    
			ELSE IF  ( sRegistration == "Risky loans" ) THEN
				sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" )
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Synthetic cdo tranche" ) THEN
				sBasketNature := legGetString( pComponent,"Basket nature" )
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Nth default basket" ) THEN
				sCriteria := toString( legGetInteger( pComponent,"Nth default" ) ),
			
			//Gets the typology
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.CRD.TypA-Oth","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Basket nature",sBasketNature,
								"Quanto",sQuanto,
								"Idx tenor empty",sIndexTenorIsEmpty,
								"Bond typo",sUDFBondTypo,
								"Payout",sPayout,
								"Cdt ind. family",sCreditIndexFamily,
								"Criteria",sCriteria )
		},
		
		IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN
			// No typology,then throw an error
			ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on component " + toString( iComponent + 1 ) + " ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
		ELSE
		{
			legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
			// To set typology for father contract
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
		},
		
		//To assign a typology in case of Back-to-back
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN
		{
			sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			IF ( sPackageRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,0 ),
				sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
				
				//Gets the package typology from the LUT
				sTypology := lookupString( "MX.CRD.TypA-PK","ALL",
										"Package Label",sPackageRegistrationLabel,
										"Registration",sContractRegistration ),
				
				IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
					//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
					ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
				ELSE
					//Sets the package typology
					legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-EQD

/*
MXpress
EQD Typology assignment rule

Version 1.8
- Applied MSL best practices
- Prevent error when the "Payout type" field is not available

Version 1.7
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.6
Amendments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.5
Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.4
Update to handle correctly the typology assignment at the contract level in case of multi-components contracts

Version 1.3
Technical update related to handling of Equity Equity Illiquid Participation

Version 1.2
Technical update related to handling of EQD exotics products

Version 1.1
Handling of EQD exotics products added: ( MX.EQD.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic for EQD from the registration and security criteria
Loop on the components removed

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component
This rule is designed for EQD products,it uses a set of Look-Up Tables ( LUT ):
( MX.EQD.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic for EQD from the registration criterion
( MX.EQD.TypA-Oth,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic for EQD from other criteria

Hypotheses:
- all contracts have 1 component
- there is no package
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pComponent ), 
		
		// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage )  AND legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ) == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
		{
			// Retreive BlockTrade typology to be used in Generic parameters
			sBlockTradeTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTradeTypology" ),     
			legSetTypology( pPackage,sBlockTradeTypology )
		},
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sRegistration := "",
		sTypology := "",
		sInstrument := "",
		sSecurityGroup := "",
		sSecurityType := "",
		sSecurity := "",
		sCompound := "No",
		sDigital := "No",
		sTotalReturn := "No",
		sForwardStart := "No",
		sOtherNominalUnit := "",
		sUnderlyingCurrency := "",
		sFxOption := "No",
		sPayoutType := "",
		
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent )
		ELSE
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Equities" ) THEN
			sSecurityGroup := legGetString( pComponent,"ILLIQUID" )
		ELSE
		{
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sInstrument ),
			sSecurityGroup := securityGetGroup( pSecurity )
		},
        
        //BAB addition for the Equity UDF Investement Type
        IF ( sRegistration == "Equities" ) THEN
        {
        sInstrument := legGetString(pComponent,"Instrument"),
        sSecurityGroup := secGetUdfString(sInstrument, "INV_TYPE")
        },
        //end of BAB addition
        
        IF ( sRegistration == "Equity autocalls" ) THEN    // Product registration:  Equity Autocalls         
        	{
            pStreams := legGetStreams(pComponent),
			pUnderlyings := streamsGetEqUnderlyingsTable(pStreams),
            iNbOfComponents := eqUnderlyingsTableGetNumberOfElements(pUnderlyings),
            IF iNbOfComponents < 2 THEN sSecurityGroup := "Single"
            ELSE sSecurityGroup := "Basket"
            }, 
		        
		
		//To get the typology from the registration and security criteria
		sTypology := lookupString( "MX.EQD.TypA-Reg","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria",sSecurityGroup ),
		
		IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN//To get the typology from other criteria
		{
			// sSecurityType is requested for Fund
			// sSecurityGroup is requested for Basket,Equity,Future. 
			// Nota: if it returns Bond or Spread or Warrant,as there is no entry in ( MX.EQD.TypA-Oth,ALL ) -> ThrowError message
			sSecurityType := securityGetType( pSecurity ),
			IF ( sSecurityType == "Fund" ) THEN
				sSecurity := "Fund"
			ELSE
				sSecurity := sSecurityGroup,
			IF ( ( sSecurityGroup == "Basket" ) OR ( sSecurityGroup == "Equity" ) OR ( sSecurityGroup == "Future" ) ) THEN
			{
				sCompound := legGetString( pComponent,"Compound" ),
				sDigital := legGetString( pComponent,"Digital" ),
				sTotalReturn := legGetString( pComponent,"Total return" ),
				IF ( sTotalReturn <> "No" ) THEN
					sTotalReturn := "Yes",
				sForwardStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
				sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Other nominal unit" ),
				sUnderlyingCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Und. currency" ),
				IF ( sOtherNominalUnit <> sUnderlyingCurrency ) THEN
					sFxOption := "Yes"
			},
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Payout type" ) ) THEN
				sPayoutType := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout type" ),// returns: Basic,Composite or Quanto
			
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.EQD.TypA-Oth","ALL",
									"Security",sSecurity,
									"Compound",sCompound,
									"Digital",sDigital,
									"Total return",sTotalReturn,
									"Forward start",sForwardStart,
									"FX option",sFxOption,
									"Payout type",sPayoutType )
		},
		
		legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
		// No typology,then throw an error
		IF ( legGetTypology( pComponent ) == "" ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on first component ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
		ELSE
		{
			// To set typology for father contract
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			sFatherBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
			iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
			IF ( ( sFatherBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" )
			OR ( ( sFatherBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) AND ( iNbComponents == 1 ) ) ) THEN
				legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
		},
		
		//To assign a typology in case of Back-to-back
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN
		{
			sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			IF ( sPackageRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,0 ),
				sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
				
				//Gets the package typology from the LUT
				sTypology := lookupString( "MX.EQD.TypA-PK","ALL",
										"Package Label",sPackageRegistrationLabel,
										"Registration",sContractRegistration ),
				
				IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
					//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
					ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
				ELSE
					//Sets the package typology
					legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-FUND

/*
MXpress
FUND Typology assignment rule

Used algorithm:
If leg is intialized
	If there is a package allocation then
		Set the package typology accordingly
	End if
	Retrieve the first component
	Get the component registration
	Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.FUND.TypA-Reg,ALL ) lookup table
	Set the typology
	If the retrieved typology is empty
		Throw an error message
	Else
		Retrieve the father contract
		Set the typology for the contract
	End if
End if

Version 1.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.1
Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component
This rule is designed for FUND products, it uses one Look-Up Table ( LUT ):
( MX.FUND.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic for FUND from the registration criterion

Hypotheses:
- All contracts have 1 component
- There is no package
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pComponent ), 
		
		// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) AND legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ) == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
		{
			// Retreive BlockTrade typology to be used in Generic parameters
			sBlockTradeTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTradeTypology" ),     
			legSetTypology( pPackage,sBlockTradeTypology )
		},
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sTypology := "",
		
		//To get the typology from the registration and security criteria
		sTypology := lookupString( "MX.FUND.TypA-Reg","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration ),
		legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
		
		// No typology,then throw an error
		IF ( legGetTypology( pComponent ) == "" ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on first component ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
		ELSE
		{
			// To set typology for father contract
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-HYBRID

/*
MXpress
Typology assignment rule for cross asset strategies

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialized then
	Retrieve the registration
	Set typology at contract levels accordingly
End if

Version 1.2
Amemdments to handle ETF

Version 1.1
Amemdments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract
Typology assigned at each financial contract component is done at the related related typology assignment asset class

This rule is designed for HYBRID products, it uses one Look-Up Table ( LUT ):
( MX.HYB.TypA-Reg,ALL ) contains the typology assignment logic for HYBRID from the registration criterion
*/

{
	pContract := NPD_HDL_THIS,
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pContract ) ) THEN
	{
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
		{
			sCriteria := "",
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.HYB.TypA-Reg","ALL","Registration",sRegistration,"Criteria",sCriteria ),
			legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology ),
			
			// No typology, then throw an error
			IF ( legGetTypology( pContract ) == "" ) THEN
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on " + sRegistration + " contract ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
		},
		
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pContract ),
		//To assign a typology in case of Back-to-back
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN
		{
			sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			pContract := legGetContractAt(NPD_HDL_THIS,0),
            sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
			
			//Gets the package typology from the LUT
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.HYB.TypA-PK","ALL",
									"Package Label",sPackageRegistrationLabel,
									"Registration",sContractRegistration ),
			
			IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
				//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
			ELSE
				//Sets the package typology
				legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-IRD

/*
MXpress
IRD Typology assignment rule

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialized
Loop on the components
	Get the first component registration
	If registration is "Interest rate swaps" then
		Retrieve some criteria: "Callable", "Tarn", "Autocallable", "Snow", "Ratchet", "Ratchet Range", "Inv", "RA", "Dual", "Zero Coupon", "Quanto", "Reset Mode", "Embedded Option", "Inflation", "Credit Linked", "Prdc", "Option"
		Retrieve the typology from ( MX.IRD.TypA-IRS,ALL ) lookup table
	Else if registration is "Caps/floors" then
		Retrieve some criteria: "Bar", "Quanto", "Chooser", "Payout Form", "Payout", "Inflation"
		Retrieve the typology from ( "MX.IRD.TypA-CF","ALL" ) lookup table
	Else
		If registration is "Asset swaps" then
			Retrieve criteria: "Criteria" ( Define is there is an exchange or not )
		Else if registration is "Bonds" or "CP/CD" or "Bond Forwards" or "Callable Bonds" or "Treasury locks" then
			Retrieve criteria: "Criteria" ( Retrieve "BOND_TYPO" UDF )
		Else if registration is "Interest rate future options" then
			Retrieve criteria: "Criteria" ( Retrieve "Underlying type" field )
		Else if registration is "Swaptions" then
			Retrieve criterion: "Option", "Payout"
		Else if registration is "Currency swaps" then
			Retrieve criterion: "Option"
		End if
		Retrieve the typology from ( "MX.IRD.TypA-Oth","ALL" ) lookup table
	End if
	If the typology is empty
		Throw an error message
	Else
		Set typology for current component
		Get father contract
		Set typology for father contract
	End if
End loop

Set the typology for the father contract

Set the typology for the package contract if exists

End if

Version 1.16
Revamping of Non Linear Rates typologies:
- CF: new CMS column
- Swaptions: new Physical/Cash settled distinction, new Midcurve shifter identification
- IRS: new CMS column, new In Arrears column, new European/Bermuda callable distinction, new Fixed Range/Floating Range distinction, less embedded option distinctions

Version 1.15
Amendment to correct Real Rate Swaps handling by changing the initialization of the Criteria field.

Version 1.14
Amendment to exclude the Breakeven Spread from the typology assignment

Version 1.13
Amendments to 
- split inflation trades in the following new typologies: ZC Inflation Swap, YoY Inflaiton Swap, Inflation Strip, Real Rate Swap, ZC Inflation Cap, YoY Inflation Cap. Done by enhancing the Criteria field.
- handle Treasury locks

Version 1.12
Amendments to handle non zero coupon Interest Rate Swap with compounded payments, using a new criteria column in the typology table

Version 1.11
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.10
Amendments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.9
Modify the IRS to take the multi phases into account

Version 1.8
Uncomment the indexGetCategory function

Version 1.7
- Handle the Asset Swap and Bond strategy
- Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.6
- Handle the Asset swaps registration too
- For multi currency swaps, the typology is set to Non Deliverable Swap

Version 1.5
- Handle "Xccy FX Reset" typology for Currency swaps registration

Version 1.4
Initialize pointer on range index of leg 1 before using it

Version 1.3
- Handle IRD exotic products
- Interest Rate Swap registration:
	~ add criteria to define PRDC

Version 1.2
- Interest Rate Swap registration: 
	~ criteria to define "Zero coupon" has been amended

Version 1.1
- Interest Rate Swap registration: 
	~ criteria to define "Inflation" has been updated ( comments to remove )
	~ criteria to define "Ratchet Range" has been amended
- Interest Rate Future Options registration: criterion have been defined

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component

Hypothesis: All contracts have one component,there is no package

This rule is designed for IRD products,it uses a set of Look-Up Tables (LUT):
( MX.IRD.TypA-IRS,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic for Interest rate swaps registration
( MX.IRD.TypA-CF,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic for Caps/floors registration
( MX.IRD.TypA-Oth,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic for other registrations
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ) ),
		
		// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
		IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage )  AND legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ) == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN

                                		sFormulatype := indexGetBasketFormula( pIndex1 ),	
                                		pUnderIndex1 := indexGetIndex( pIndex1,0 ),
										pUnderIndex2 := indexGetIndex( pIndex1,1 ),
										sUnderIndex1Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex1 ),
										sUnderIndex2Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex2 ),
										fIndex1Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex1,0 ),
										fIndex2Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex1,1 ),
										iIndex1Weight := toInt( fIndex1Weight ),
										iIndex2Weight := toInt( fIndex2Weight ),
				
										IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == 1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == -1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
											sCMS := "CMS sp"
										ELSE IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == -1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == 1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
											sCMS := "CMS sp"
									}
                            	}
                        	},
                            pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,1 ),
        	            	pIndex2 := streamGetIndex( pStream2 ),
                    		IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
							{
								sIndexCategory2 := indexGetCategory( pIndex2 ),
								sIndexNature2 := indexGetNature( pIndex2 ),
								sResetMode2 := indexGetResetMode( pIndex2 ),
                            	IF ( sIndexCategory2 == "Rate" AND sIndexNature2 == "Swap rate" ) THEN
                            	{
                            		sCMS := "CMS"
                            	}
                          		ELSE IF ( sResetMode2 == "Basket" ) THEN 
                           		{
                            		iNbUnderlyings2 := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex2 ),
                                	IF ( iNbUnderlyings2 == 2 ) THEN
									{
                                		sFormulatype := indexGetBasketFormula( pIndex2 ),	
                                		pUnderIndex1 := indexGetIndex( pIndex2,0 ),
										pUnderIndex2 := indexGetIndex( pIndex2,1 ),
										sUnderIndex1Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex1 ),
										sUnderIndex2Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex2 ),
										fIndex1Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex2,0 ),
										fIndex2Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex2,1 ),
										iIndex1Weight := toInt( fIndex1Weight ),
										iIndex2Weight := toInt( fIndex2Weight ),
				
										IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == 1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == -1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
											sCMS := "CMS sp"
										ELSE IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == -1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == 1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
											sCMS := "CMS sp"
									}
                            	}
                        	}
                        },
                        
                        //To get "In Arrears" status
                        sInArrears := "No",
                        sFixingMode := legGetString( pComponent, "Fixing mode2" ),
                        IF ( ( sFixingMode == "In arrears" ) ) THEN
                        	sInArrears := "Yes",
                        
                        //To get "Criteria" status
                        
                        //1. Criteria: Compounded payment
                        iFreqRatio1 := legGetInteger( pComponent,"Frequency Ratio" ),
                        iFreqRatio2 := legGetInteger( pComponent,"Frequency Ratio2" ),
                        IF ( ( sZC == "No" ) 
                        AND ( ( ( sFreq1 == "Frequency ratio" ) AND ( iFreqRatio1 <> 1 ) ) OR ( ( sFreq2 == "Frequency ratio" ) AND ( iFreqRatio2 <> 1 ) ) ) ) THEN
                            sCriteriaIRS := "Compounded payment",
                        
                        //2. Criteria: ZC Return
                        IF ( sInflation == "Yes" ) THEN
                        {
                            sReturn1 := legGetString(pComponent,"Return type"),
                            sReturn2 := legGetString(pComponent,"Return type 2"),
                            IF ( ( sReturn1 == "Initial return (P2-P0)/P0" ) OR ( sReturn2 == "Initial return (P2-P0)/P0" ) ) THEN
                                sCriteriaIRS := "ZC Return"
                        },
                        
                        //3. Criteria: Inflation Indexed
                        IF ( NOT isNull( pStreams ) ) THEN
                        {
                            pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,0 ),
                            IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pIndexations1 := streamGetIndexations( pStream1 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndexations1 ) ) THEN
                                {
                                    pIntFlowIndexationList1 := indexationsGetInterestFlowIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
                                    pIntFlowIndexation1 := indexationListGoto( pIntFlowIndexationList1,0 ),
                                    IF ( NOT isNull( pIntFlowIndexation1 ) ) THEN
                                    {
                                        pIndexationTemplate1 := indexationGetTemplate( pIntFlowIndexation1 ),
                                        sNature1 := indexationTemplateGetIndexNature( pIndexationTemplate1 ),
                                        IF ( sNature1 == "Inflation" ) THEN
                                            sCriteriaIRS := "Inflation Indexed"
                                    }
                                }
                            },
                            pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,1 ),
                            IF ( NOT isNull( pStream2 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pIndexations2 := streamGetIndexations( pStream2 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndexations2 ) ) THEN
                                {
                                    pIntFlowIndexationList2 := indexationsGetInterestFlowIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
                                    pIntFlowIndexation2 := indexationListGoto( pIntFlowIndexationList2,0 ),
                                    
                                    IF ( NOT isNull( pIntFlowIndexation2 ) ) THEN
                                    {
                                        pIndexationTemplate2 := indexationGetTemplate( pIntFlowIndexation2 ),
                                        sNature2 := indexationTemplateGetIndexNature( pIndexationTemplate2 ),
                                        IF ( sNature2 == "Inflation" ) THEN
                                            sCriteriaIRS := "Inflation Indexed"
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
    
                        iPhase := iPhase + 1
                    },
                    
                    //Reset the phase to the one before the loop
                    legSetInteger( pComponent,"Current phase",iCurrentPhase ),
                    
                    // To get the typology
                    sTypology := lookupString( "MX.IRD.TypA-IRS","ALL",
                                                "Callable",sCallable,
                                                "Tarn",sTarn,
                                                "Autocallable",sAutocallable,
                                                "Snow",sSnow,
                                                "Ratchet",sRatchet,
                                                "Ratchet Range",sRatchetRange,
                                                "Inv",sInv,
                                                "RA",sRA,
                                                "Dual",sDual,
                                                "Zero Coupon",sZC,
                                                "Quanto",sQuanto,
                                                "Reset Mode",sResetMode,
                                                "Embedded Option",sEmbeddedOption,
                                                "Inflation",sInflation,
                                                "Credit Linked",sCreditLinked,
                                                "Prdc",sPrdc,
                                                "CMS", sCMS,
                                                "In Arrears", sInArrears,
                                                "Option",sOption,
                                                "Criteria",sCriteriaIRS )
                }
                              
                                
                ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Caps/floors" ) THEN // Product registration:  Caps/Floors
                {
                    // To get "Bar" properties
                    sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier type" ),
                    IF ( sBarrierType <> "NO" ) THEN
                        sBarrier := "Yes",
                    
                    // To get "Quanto" properties
                    sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
                    sRangeOp := legGetString( pComponent,"Range Operator" ),
                    pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
                    IF ( NOT isNull( pStream ) ) THEN
                    {
                        pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream ),
                        IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex ) ) THEN
                        {
                            sIndexCurrency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex ),
                            sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex ),
                            sResetModeIndex := indexGetResetMode( pIndex ),
                            iNbComponentsIndex := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex ),
                            IF ( ( sResetModeIndex == "Basket" ) AND ( iNbComponentsIndex == 2 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pIndex1 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,0 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex1 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex1Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
                                pIndex2 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,1 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex2Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex2 )
                            }
                        },
                        pRangeIndex1 := streamGetRangeIndex1( pStream ),
                        IF ( NOT isNull( pRangeIndex1 ) ) THEN
                        {
                            sRangeIndex1Currency := indexGetCurrency( pRangeIndex1 ),
                            sRangeIndex1Category := indexGetCategory( pRangeIndex1 ),
                            sResetModeIndex1 := indexGetResetMode( pRangeIndex1 ),
                            iNbComponentsIndex1 := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pRangeIndex1 ),
                            IF ( ( sResetModeIndex1 == "Basket" ) AND ( iNbComponentsIndex1 == 2 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pIndex11 := indexGetIndex( pRangeIndex1,0 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex11 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex11Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex11 ),
                                pIndex12 := indexGetIndex( pRangeIndex1,1 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex12 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex12Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex12 )
                            }
                        },
                        pRangeIndex2 := streamGetRangeIndex2( pStream ),
                        IF ( NOT isNull( pRangeIndex2 ) ) THEN
                        {
                            sRangeIndex2Currency := indexGetCurrency( pRangeIndex2 ),
                            sRangeIndex2Category := indexGetCategory( pRangeIndex2 ),
                            sResetModeIndex2 := indexGetResetMode( pRangeIndex2 ),
                            iNbComponentsIndex2 := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pRangeIndex2 ),
                            IF ( sResetModeIndex2 == "Basket" ) AND ( iNbComponentsIndex2 == 2 ) THEN
                            {
                                pIndex21 := indexGetIndex( pRangeIndex2,0 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex21 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex21Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex21 ),
                                pIndex22 := indexGetIndex( pRangeIndex2,1 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex22 ) ) THEN
                                    sIndex22Currency := indexGetCurrency( pIndex22 )
                            }
                        },
                        //Check the quanto criteria
                        IF ( ( ( sIndexCategory == "Rate" ) AND ( sCurrency <> sIndexCurrency ) AND ( sIndexCurrency <> "" ) ) 
                        OR ( ( sCurrency <> sRangeIndex1Currency ) AND ( sRangeIndex1Category == "Rate" ) AND ( sRangeIndex1Currency <> "" ) )
                        OR ( ( sRangeOp <> "none" ) AND ( sCurrency <> sRangeIndex2Currency ) AND ( sRangeIndex2Category == "Rate" ) AND ( sRangeIndex2Currency <> "" ) )
                        OR ( ( sIndex1Currency <> sIndex2Currency ) AND ( sIndex1Currency <> "" ) AND ( sIndex2Currency <> "" ) )
                        OR ( ( sIndex11Currency <> sIndex12Currency ) AND ( sIndex11Currency <> "" ) AND ( sIndex12Currency <> "" ) )
                        OR ( ( sIndex21Currency <> sIndex22Currency ) AND ( sIndex21Currency <> "" ) AND ( sIndex22Currency <> "" ) ) ) THEN 
                            sQuanto := "Yes"
                    },
                    
                    // To get "Chooser" properties
                    sChooser := legGetString( pComponent,"Flexible status" ),
                    
                    // To get "Payout form" properties
                    sPayoutForm := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout form" ),
                    IF ( strCONTAIN( sPayoutForm,"Digital" ) ) THEN
                        sPayoutForm := "Digital"
                    ELSE
                        sPayoutForm := "Non Digital",
                    
                    // To get "Payout" properties
                    sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
                    
                    // To get "Inflation" properties
                    pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
                    IF ( NOT isNull( pStreams ) ) THEN
                    {
                        pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
                        pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
                        sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex ),
                        IF ( sIndexCategory == "Inflation" ) THEN
                            sInflation := "Yes"
                    },
                    
                    // To get "ZC" properties
                    sSinglePeriod := legGetString( pComponent,"Single period" ),
                    IF ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) THEN
                        sZCCap := "Yes",
                    
                    //To get "CMS" properties (Multiphase deals, CMS Ranges and CMS indexations are out of scope).
                    sCMS := "No",
                    pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
                    IF ( NOT isNull( pStreams ) ) THEN
                    {
						pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
        	            pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
                    	IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex ) ) THEN
						{
							sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex ),
							sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndex ),
							sResetMode := indexGetResetMode( pIndex ),
                            
                            IF ( sIndexCategory == "Rate" AND sIndexNature == "Swap rate" ) THEN
                            {
                            	sCMS := "CMS"
                            }
                            ELSE IF ( sResetMode == "Basket" ) THEN 
                            {
                            	iNbUnderlyings := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex ),
                                IF ( iNbUnderlyings == 2 ) THEN
								{
                                	sFormulatype := indexGetBasketFormula( pIndex ),	
                                	pUnderIndex1 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,0 ),
									pUnderIndex2 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,1 ),
									sUnderIndex1Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex1 ),
									sUnderIndex2Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex2 ),
									fIndex1Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex,0 ),
									fIndex2Weight := indexGetWeight( pIndex,1 ),
									iIndex1Weight := toInt( fIndex1Weight ),
									iIndex2Weight := toInt( fIndex2Weight ),
				
									IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == 1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == -1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
										sCMS := "CMS sp"
									ELSE IF ( ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) AND ( iIndex1Weight == -1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == 1 ) AND ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
										sCMS := "CMS sp"
								}
                            }
                        }
                    },
                       
                    sTypology := lookupString( "MX.IRD.TypA-CF","ALL",
                                                "Bar",sBarrier,
                                                "Quanto",sQuanto,
                                                "Chooser",sChooser,
                                                "Payout Form",sPayoutForm,
                                                "Payout",sPayout,
                                                "Inflation",sInflation,
                                                "Zero Coupon", sZCCap,
                                                "CMS", sCMS)
                }
                ELSE
                {
                    IF ( sRegistration == "Asset swaps" ) THEN
                    {
                        sPricePar := legGetString( pComponent,"Price-Par" ),
                        sInitialCapital1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Initial Capital" ),
                        sFinalCapital1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Final Capital" ),
                        sInitialCapital2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Initial Capital2" ),
                        sFinalCapital2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Final Capital2" ),
                        IF ( ( sPricePar == "At maturity" )
                            AND ( sInitialCapital1 == "No Exchange" ) AND ( sFinalCapital1 == "No Exchange" )
                            AND ( sInitialCapital2 == "No Exchange" ) AND ( sFinalCapital2 == "No Exchange" ) ) THEN
                            sCriteria := "TRS"
                    }
                    ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bonds" )
                            OR ( sRegistration == "CP/CD" )
                            OR ( sRegistration == "Bond Forwards" )
                            OR ( sRegistration == "Callable Bonds" )
                            OR ( sRegistration == "Treasury locks" ) ) THEN
    
                    {
                        sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
                        //sUDFBondTypoBond := secGetUdfString( sInstrument,"BOND_TYPO" ),
                        
                        //BAB addition: Set criteria for Typology assignment
                        sPattern :=legGetPatternLabel(pComponent),
                        /*IF (sPattern == "SGDM" OR sPattern == "SFRM") THEN
                        {
                            sCriteria := sPattern
                        }	
                        ELSE
                        {*/
                            pSecurityData := secGetSecurityData(sInstrument),
                            sSecurityType := securityGetTypologyType(pSecurityData), 
                            sCriteria := sSecurityType
                        //}
                        //End of BAB addition
                        
  
                    }
                    ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate future options" ) THEN // Product registration:  Interest Rate Future Options
                    {
                        // To get "Criteria" properties
                        sCriteria := legGetString( pLeg,"Underlying category" ) //Available values: rate or bond
                    }
                    ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" ) THEN // Product registration: Swaptions
                    {
                    	//To get "Criteria" properties
                        sSettlement := legGetString( pLeg, "Exercise_Settlement" ),
                        sCashSettlementMode := legGetString( pLeg, "Exercise_Mode"),
                        
                        IF ( sSettlement == "Physical" ) THEN
                        {
                        	sCriteria := "Physical"
                        }    
                        ELSE IF ( ( sCashSettlementMode == "Par yield curve adjusted" ) OR ( sCashSettlementMode == "Par yield curve unadjusted" ) ) THEN
                        {
                        	sCriteria := "Cash settled Yield"
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                        	sCriteria := "Cash settled ZC"
                        },
                        
                        //To get "Option" properties
                        sOption := legGetString( pComponent,"Option style" ),
                        IF ( sOption == "European" ) THEN
                        {	
                        	dExpiry := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
                            dUndStart := legGetDate( pComponent,"Loan start date1" ),
                        	iDelay := toInt(dUndStart - dExpiry),
                            
                            IF ( iDelay >= 15 ) THEN
                            	sOption := "European MC"
                            
                        },
                        
                        //To get "Payout type" properties
                        sPayoutType := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout Type" )
                    }
                    ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Currency swaps" ) THEN // Product registration: Curreny Swaps
                    {
                        //To get "Option" properties for "Currency swaps" products
                        //For COS case:
                        sInitialCapital1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Initial Capital" ),
                        sInitialCapital2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Initial Capital2" ),
                        sIntermCapital1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Intermediate Capital" ),
                        sIntermCapital2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Intermediate Capital2" ),
                        sFinalCapital1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Final Capital" ),
                        sFinalCapital2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Final Capital2" ),
                        IF ( ( sInitialCapital1 == "No Exchange" ) AND ( sInitialCapital2 == "No Exchange" )
                        AND ( sIntermCapital1 == "No Exchange" ) AND ( sIntermCapital2 == "No Exchange" )
                        AND ( sFinalCapital1 == "No Exchange" ) AND ( sFinalCapital2 == "No Exchange" ) ) THEN
                            sOption := "COS",
                        
                        //For NDS case:
                        IF ( NOT isNull( pStreams ) ) THEN
                        {
                            // Properties on stream1
                            pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
                            IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pStreamGenerator1 := streamGetGenerator( pStream1 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pStreamGenerator1 ) ) THEN
                                    bMulti0 := streamGeneratorIsMultiCurrency( pStreamGenerator1 )
                            },
                            // Properties on stream2
                            pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,1 ),
                            IF ( NOT isNull( pStream2 ) ) THEN
                            {
                                pStreamGenerator2 := streamGetGenerator( pStream2 ),
                                IF ( NOT isNull( pStreamGenerator2 ) ) THEN
                                    bMulti1 := streamGeneratorIsMultiCurrency( pStreamGenerator2 )
                            },
                            IF ( ( bMulti0 ) OR ( bMulti1 ) ) THEN
                                sOption := "NDS"
                        },
                        
                        //FX Reset case:
                        sMtm1 := legGetString( pComponent,"MTM flag" ),
                        sMtm2 := legGetString( pComponent,"MTM flag 2" ),
                        IF ( ( sMtm1 == "Yes" ) OR ( sMtm2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
                            sOption := "FX Reset",
                        
                        //For POS case:
                        sLegType1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
                        fRateMargin1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin" ),
                        sLegType2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
                        fRateMargin2 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin2" ),
                        IF ( ( sLegType1 == "Fixed" ) AND ( fRateMargin1 == 0.0 ) AND ( sLegType2 == "Fixed" ) AND ( fRateMargin2 == 0.0 ) ) THEN
                            sOption := "POS"
                    },
                    
                    //Gets the typology
                    sTypology := lookupString( "MX.IRD.TypA-Oth","ALL",
                                                "Registration",sRegistration,
                                                "Criteria",sCriteria,
                                                "Option",sOption,
                                                "Payout type",sPayoutType )
                },
                
                          
                IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN
                    // No typology,then throw an error
                    ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on component " + toString( iComponent + 1 ) + " (Typology assignment rule)","Typology" )
                ELSE
                    legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
                
                iComponent := iComponent + 1
            },
            
            // To set typology for father contract
            pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
            
            sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
            IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
            {
                IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN 
                    // No typology,then throw an error
                    ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on contract ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
                ELSE
                    legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
            }
            ELSE
            {
                sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
                
                sTypology := lookupString( "MX.IRD.TypA-Oth","ALL",
                                    "Registration",sRegistration,
                                    "Criteria","",
                                    "Option","",
                                    "Payout type",""
                                    ),
                IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN 
                    // No typology,then throw an error
                    ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on contract ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
                ELSE
                    legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
            }
    	}
	},
	
	//To assign a typology in case of Back-to-back
	IF ( NOT isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN
	{
		sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
		IF ( sPackageRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
		{
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,0 ),
			sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
			
			//Gets the package typology from the LUT
			sTypology := lookupString( "MX.IRD.TypA-PK","ALL",
									"Package Label",sPackageRegistrationLabel,
									"Registration",sContractRegistration ),
			
			IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
				//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
			ELSE
				//Sets the package typology
				legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.TypA-SF

/*
MXpress
Security Finance Typology assignment rule

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialized
	If there is no poackage Then
		Get the first component registration
		If the registration is "Equity return swaps" then
			Retrieve certain criteria: "Maturity", "Rate Factor", "Income Retro"
		End if
		Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.SF.TypA-FC,ALL ) Look-Up Table
		If current portfolio is Collateral ticked and current registration is EQD Lending Boorowing or IRD Lending Borrowing then
				Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.ALL.TypAColl,ALL ) Look-Up Table
		End if
		If the typology is empty
			Throw an error message
		Else
			Set typology for current component
			Get father contract
			Set typology for father contract
		End if
	Else
		If there is a package allocation then
			Set the package typology accordingly
		Else if there is a single package then
			Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.SF.TypA-PK,ALL ) Look-Up Table
			If the retrieved typology is empty
				Throw an error message
			Else
				Set the typology for the package
		End if
		Loop on all components
			If the registration is "Equity return swaps" then
				Retrieve certain criteria: "Maturity", "Rate Factor", "Income Retro"
			End if
			Retrieve the typology from the ( MX.SF.TypA-PK,ALL ) Look-Up Table
		End loop
	End if
End if

Version 1.6
Addition of asset pool and triparty typology 

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Amended to handle Bond return swaps

Version 1.3
Amemdments to handle Back-to-back packages

Version 1.2
- Adapt to handle Basket Equity retrun swap
- Addition of Block trade typology

Version 1.1
Adapt this scripted rule to handled the Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, IRD Lending Borrowing and EQD Lending Borrowing registrations

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to assign a typology to each contract and each financial contract component
This rule is designed for SF products, it uses one Look-Up Table (LUT):
( MX.SF.TypA-FC,ALL ) contains the typology assignment formula logic for Interest rate swaps registration
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pContract ),
		
		// Field initialization/reset
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		fRateFactor1 := 0.0,
		fIncRetro := 0.0,
		sMaturityLabel := "",
		sRateFactor1 := "",
		sIncRetro	:= "",
		sTypology := "",
		sPackageRegistration := "",
		iComponent := 0,
		IF ( isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN //If there is a package
		{
			IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" OR sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
			{
				fIncRetro := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ),
				IF ( fIncRetro == 0.0 ) THEN
					sIncRetro := "Null"
				ELSE IF ( ( fIncRetro > 0.0 ) AND ( fIncRetro <= 1.0 ) ) THEN
					sIncRetro := "Partial",
				
				fRateFactor1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate factor" ),
				IF ( fRateFactor1 == 0.0 ) THEN
					sRateFactor1 := "Null"
				ELSE IF ( fRateFactor1 == 1.0 ) THEN
					sRateFactor1 := "Full",
				
				sMaturityLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity period" ),
				IF ( strToUpperCase( sMaturityLabel ) <> "OPEN" ) THEN
					sMaturityLabel := "Termed"
				ELSE 
					sMaturityLabel := "Open"
			},
			
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" )) THEN
			{
            	sTreatCollateral := legGetString( pComponent, "Treat collateral"),        
            	IF (sTreatCollateral == "On deal level") THEN
            		sCollateralType := legGetString( pComponent, "Collateral type")     	
            },

            IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" ) THEN
			{
            	sTripartyRepoField := legGetString( pComponent, "Tri_Party_agent"),        
            	IF (strLen(sTripartyRepoField)  > 0 ) THEN
            			sTriparty := "Yes"   	
            },
            
			 //BAB addition to cater for Repo Murabaha and Waad typology assignment based on pattern and payout
            IF ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) THEN
                {
                    sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pComponent),
