                    sPayout := legGetString( pComponent, "Payout")
                },
            //End of BAB addition
            
            sTypology := lookupString( "MX.SF.TypA-FC","ALL",
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Maturity",sMaturityLabel,
									"Rate Factor 1",sRateFactor1,
									"Income Retro",sIncRetro,
                                    "Collateral Type",sCollateralType,
                                    "Triparty", sTriparty,
                                    "Pattern Templ", sPattern,
                                    "Payout", sPayout),
			
			// To set typology in case of Collateral Management
			sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
			IF ( sPortfolio <> "" ) THEN
			{
				bIsCollateralBook := ptfIsCollateralBook( sPortfolio ),
				IF ( bIsCollateralBook ) 
				AND ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					//Define another criteria is needed and store the value in sCriteria
					//sCrieteria := ...
					
					//This gets the typology from the LUT
					sTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.TypAColl","ALL",
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria",sCriteria )
				}
			},
			
			IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN
				// No typology, then throw an error
				ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on component " + toString( iComponent + 1 ) + " (Typology assignment rule)","Typology" )
			ELSE
			{
				legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
				// To set typology for father contract
				legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
			}
		}
		ELSE
		{
			sBORegistrationThis := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			
			// If the package type is package allocation then define Block trade as typology
			IF ( sBORegistrationThis == "mxContractIPACKAGE_ALLOCATION" ) THEN
			{
				// Retreive BlockTrade typology to be used in Generic parameters
				sBlockTradeTypology := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTradeTypology" ),     
				legSetTypology( pPackage,sBlockTradeTypology )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sBORegistrationThis == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) THEN
			{
				sTypology := lookupString( "MX.SF.TypA-PK","ALL",
										 "Package Label",sBORegistrationThis ),
				
				IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
					//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
					ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment  rule )","Typology" )
				ELSE
					//Sets the package typology
					legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pPackage ),//Number of components in the main contract
				iComponent := 0,//Initialization of the component index
				// For each contract,loop on all the components within the contract
				WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
					sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" OR sRegistration == "Bond Return Swaps") THEN
					{
						fIncRetro := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ),
						IF ( fIncRetro == 0.0 ) THEN
							sIncRetro := "Null"
						ELSE IF ( ( fIncRetro > 0.0 ) AND ( fIncRetro <= 1.0 ) ) THEN
							sIncRetro := "Partial",
						
						fRateFactor1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate factor" ),
						IF ( fRateFactor1 == 0.0 ) THEN
							sRateFactor1 := "Null"
						ELSE IF ( fRateFactor1 == 1.0 ) THEN
							sRateFactor1 := "Full",
						
						sMaturityLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity period" ),
						IF ( strToUpperCase( sMaturityLabel ) <> "OPEN" ) THEN
							sMaturityLabel := "Termed"
						ELSE 
							sMaturityLabel := "Open"
					},
					
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" )) THEN
					{
            			sTreatCollateral := legGetString( pComponent, "Treat collateral"),        
            			IF (sTreatCollateral == "On deal level") THEN
            			sCollateralType := legGetString( pComponent, "Collateral type")     	
            		},
                    
                    // Typology Triparty Repo (Ajout Ezechiel)
                      
                    IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" ) THEN
						{
            			sTripartyRepoField := legGetString( pComponent, "Tri_Party_agent"),        
            			IF (strLen(sTripartyRepoField)  > 0 ) THEN
            				sTriparty := "Yes"   	
            			},


					sTypology := lookupString( "MX.SF.TypA-FC","ALL",
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Maturity",sMaturityLabel,
											"Rate Factor 1",sRateFactor1,
											"Income Retro",sIncRetro,
                                    		"Collateral Type",sCollateralType,
                                    		"Triparty", sTriparty),
											
					  IF ( sTypology == "" ) THEN
						// No typology, then throw an error
						ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on component " + toString( iComponent + 1 ) + " (Typology assignment rule)","Typology" )
					ELSE
					{
						legSetTypology( pComponent,sTypology ),
						// To set typology for father contract
						legSetTypology( pContract,sTypology )
					},
					sTypology := "",
					iComponent := iComponent + 1
				},
				
				sPackageRegistration := legGetRegistration( pPackage ),
				IF ( sPackageRegistration == "Strip of Equity return swaps" ) THEN
				{
					//Gets the package typology from the LUT
					sTypology := lookupString( "MX.SF.TypA-PK","ALL",
										 "Registration",sPackageRegistration ),
					
					IF ( sTypology == "" )  THEN
						//Throws an error if no typology was assigned to the package
						ThrowError( "Could not assign typology on package ( Typology assignment rule )","Typology" )
					ELSE
						//Sets the package typology
						legSetTypology( pPackage,sTypology )
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Booking.FCpl

/*
MXpress
Field completions in Booking sequence

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised and the deal is inserted or modified
	//1. to set Asset/liability and 2. to set On/Off balance sheet
	Loop on all components
		Retrieve few fields
		If there are streams
			Set On/Off balance sheet accordingly
			Loop on phases of current stream
				Set Asset/liability accordingly
			End loop
		End if
	End loop
	//3. to set external counterparty
	If setting the external counterparty is requested
		Store counterparty of main contract in sCounterparty1
		Get maturity of main component
		If there are two counterparties
			Store second counterparty of main contract in sCounterparty2
			Store far maturity of main contract
		End if
		Loop on all components
			Get pointer on current component User fields
			If there are two counterparties
				Get maturity of current component
				If current maturity equals maturity of main component
					Set Udf "EXT_CTP" with sCounterparty1
				Else if current maturity equals far maturity of main contract
					Set Udf "EXT_CTP" with sCounterparty2
				End if
			Else
				Set Udf "EXT_CTP" with sCounterparty1
			End if
		End loop
	End if
End if
If the leg is initialised and the deal is inserted 
	If clearing is eligible and ( CCP is SwapClear or CME )
		Set the clearing eligibility to TRUE
	End if
	If CCP is not empty, nor equals to 3.None
	and clearing is eligible
	and there is less than two multi parties
		Add new multi party entry
	End if
	Assign the multi party entry with role, and role behavior
End if
If the leg is initialised and the deal is inserted or modified
	If "Source comment[2]" field starts with "SOURCEMODULE:"
		Loop on all contracts
			Set the source module with the suffix of this field value 
		End loop
End if

Version 1.13
To remove the multi leg swap references

Version 1.12
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument") lookup table
Updated to set the source module of an imported structured. It is based on the value stored at the level of the "Source comment [2]" of the first component of the package
Remove Par Forward Package product

Version 1.11
Correction on clearing eligibility and the multiparty

Version 1.10
To set the clearing eligibility and the multiparty

Version 1.9
Use streamSetAssetLiability() function instead legSetString()

Version 1.8
Add On/Off balance sheet assignment for Asset swaps

Version 1.7
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.6
- For Bonds and short papers, asset/liability split is now based on the buy/sell type
- The external counterpart should only be populated for the internal legs of FX packages and not the external legs

Version 1.5
Run the formula also on modify event (sAction == "MOD")

Version 1.4
Add Asset/Liability Assignment for Equity Repos

Version 1.3
Correct the way to handle counterparty characteristics.

Version 1.2
3. Fill the "EXT_CTP" User Definable Field (UDF) with the counterparty. It is useful for internal trades that are back-to-backs of external trades: the UDF makes the counterparty of the external deal available from the internal trade

Version 1.1
MM Asset/Liability:
- for Bond Repos, correction to set asset/liability ( DEF0108444 )
- for Forward Rate Agrement (FRA), new specifications to set asset/liability ( DEF0109410 )

Version 1.0
1. MM Asset/Liability
This formula is used to set the Asset/Liability attribute.
The Asset/Liability  attribute is based on the streams independently from the product.
Assumption: the max number of phase is 1. and the max number of legs is 2.
Note: There is one exception:
If the product is a bond and we are the issuer,then the Asset/Liability field is set to Liability.
2. MM On/Off balance sheet
This formula is used to set the balance sheet attribute: on or off.
Used rule:
- if there is a swap of money it is Off balance sheet
- if there is no swap of money it is On balance sheet ( loans/depos,bonds,call depo )
- Waiting for availability of DEF0104884, no workaround used.
3. External Counterparty
Fill the "EXT_CTP" User Definable Field (UDF) with the counterparty. It is useful for internal trades that are back-to-backs of external trades: the UDF makes the counterparty of the external deal available from the internal trade
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.action"),
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg )
	AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		sListOfBonds := "Bonds$" + 
					"Bonds Forwards$" +
					"Bond Repos$" +
					"Callable Bonds$" + 
					"CP/CD$" + 
					"Equity Repos$",
		// Balance sheet should be On for "Simple cash flow" too
		// Not available yet. Defect Id: DEF0104884
		sListOfOnBalance := sListOfBonds + 
						"Call deposits$" +
						"Currency swaps$" + 
						"Loans/Deposits$",
		sListOfOffBalance := "FRA's$" + 
						"Interest rate swaps$" + 
						"Asset swaps$",
		
		// Scan all components
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO 
		{
			// Field Initialization/Reset
			sRegistration := "",
			bIsBond := FALSE,
			sSecurity := "",
			bIsRepo := FALSE,
			sIssuer := "",
			bIsIssuerOurself := FALSE,
			bIsOnBalance := FALSE,
			bIsOffBalance := FALSE,
			iStreamsNbPhases := 0,
			iStreamsPhase := 0,
			iPayout := 0,
			sPayout := "",
			sBuySell := "",
			
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			bIsBond := strContain( sListOfBonds,sRegistration+"$" ),
			
			pFieldResult := pNULL,
			sField := "Instrument",
			pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
							"Registration",sRegistration,
							"Criteria 1","" ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( bIsBond ) THEN
					sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) ) THEN
				{
					bIsRepo := TRUE,
					sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ) ),
					sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" )
				}
			},
			
			IF ( ( bIsBond ) OR ( bIsRepo ) ) THEN
			{
				pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sSecurity ),
				sIssuer := securityGetIssuerLabel( pSecurity ),
				// The bank is the issuer if the internal party or the legal entity is checked in the counterparty definition
				bIsIssuerOurself := ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sIssuer,"LEGAL ENTITY" )
								OR ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sIssuer,"INTERNAL PARTY" )
			},
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) OR ( ( bIsBond ) AND ( NOT bIsRepo ) ) ) THEN
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy/Sell" ),
			
			// To set asset/liability and on/off balance sheet
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pStreams ) ) THEN
			{
				// To set on/off balance sheet
				bIsOnBalance := strContain( sListOfOnBalance,sRegistration+"$" ),
				bIsOffBalance := strContain( sListOfOffBalance,sRegistration+"$" ),
				IF ( bIsOnBalance ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"Balance sheet","On" )
				ELSE IF ( bIsOffBalance ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"Balance sheet","Off" )
				ELSE
					legSetString( pComponent,"Balance sheet","" ),
				// On/Off Balance sheet is set
				
				// To set asset/liability
				iStreamsNbPhases := streamsGetNumberOfPhases( pStreams ),
				iStreamsPhase := 0,
				WHILE ( iStreamsPhase < iStreamsNbPhases ) DO
				{
					// General case:
					iStreamsNbLegs := MIN( 2,streamsGetNumberOfLegsPerPhase( pStreams ) ),// According to the assumption
					iStreamsLeg := 0,
					WHILE ( iStreamsLeg < iStreamsNbLegs ) DO
					{
						pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iStreamsPhase,iStreamsLeg ),
						IF ( NOT isNull( pStream ) ) THEN
						{
							iPayout := streamGetPayoutSign( pStream ),
							IF ( iStreamsLeg == 0 ) THEN
							{
								IF ( bIsBond ) AND ( NOT bIsRepo ) THEN
								{
									IF ( sBuySell == "Sell" )  THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
								}
								ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) ) THEN
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
								}
								ELSE IF ( bIsRepo ) THEN
								{
									IF ( sPayout == "Borrow" )  THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
								}
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
								}
							}
							ELSE IF ( iStreamsLeg == 1 ) THEN
							{
								IF ( bIsRepo ) THEN
								{
									IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
								}
								
								ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) ) THEN
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )  
								}
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Asset" )
									ELSE
										streamSetAssetLiability( pStream,"Liability" )
								}
							}
                            /* Below section is an extract of former public.preTrade.completion.ALL.Booking.FCpl rule
                            // It proposes a different way to compute asset/liability
							IF ( iStreamsLeg == 0 ) THEN
							{
								IF ( bIsBond ) THEN
								{
									IF ( bIsIssuerOurself ) THEN
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Liability" )
									ELSE
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Asset" )
								}
								ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sFRABuySell == "Sell" ) ) THEN
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Liability" )
									ELSE
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Asset" )
								}
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Asset" )
									ELSE
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability","Liability" )
								}
							}
							ELSE IF ( iStreamsLeg == 1 ) THEN
							{
								IF ( ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos") ) AND ( sPayout == "Lend" ) ) THEN
									legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Liability" )
								ELSE IF ( ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos") ) AND ( sPayout == "Borrow" ) ) THEN
									legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Asset" )
								ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sFRABuySell == "Sell" ) ) THEN
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Liability" )
									ELSE
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Asset" )  
								}
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Asset" )
									ELSE
										legSetString( pComponent,"Asset liability2","Liability" )
								}
							}*/                            
						},
						iStreamsLeg := iStreamsLeg + 1
					},
					iStreamsPhase := iStreamsPhase + 1
				}
				// Asset/liability is set
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		
		// To set External counterparty
		// Fields Initialization/Reset
		pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		pMainContract := legGetFatherContract(pMainComponent),
		sListExternalCounterpartyProducts1 := "Asset swaps$"
									+ "Bond Repos$"
									+ "Bonds$"
									+ "Call deposits$"
									+ "Callable Bonds$"
									+ "CP/CD$"
									+ "Currency swaps$"
									+ "Equity Repos$"
									+ "FRA's$"
									+ "Funding Package$"
									+ "FX swap$"
									+ "Forex-Swap Leg$"
									+ "Futures$",
		sListExternalCounterpartyProducts2 := "Interest rate swaps$"
									+ "Loans/Deposits$"
									+ "Long futures$"
									+ "Outright Package$"
									+ "Short futures$"
									+ "Split Forex Swap Package$"
									+ "Split Package$"
									+ "Spot-Forward$",
		sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( This ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pMainContract ),
		bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested1 := strContain( sListExternalCounterpartyProducts1,sRegistration + "$" ),
		bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested2 := strContain( sListExternalCounterpartyProducts2,sRegistration + "$" ),
		bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested := bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested1 OR bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested2,
		sCounterparty1 := "",
		bIsFXSwap := FALSE,
		bIsSpotFwd := FALSE,
		sCounterparty2 := "",
		
		IF ( bIsExternalCounterpartyRequested ) THEN
		{
			// counterparty and maturity for only one leg or near leg
			sCounterparty1 := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Counterpart" ),
			dMaturity1 := legGetDate( pMainComponent,"Maturity" ),
			
			sListFXSwapProducts := "FX swap$"
							 + "Forex-Swap Leg$"
							 + "Split Forex Swap Package$",
			sListSpotFwdProducts := "Spot-Forward$",
			bIsFXSwap := strContain( sListFXSwapProducts,sRegistration + "$" ),
			bIsSpotFwd := strContain( sListSpotFwdProducts,sRegistration + "$" ),
			
			IF ( bIsFXSwap ) THEN
			{
				// counterparty and maturity for far leg
				sCounterparty2 := legGetString( pMainContract,"Counterpart__leg2_" ),
				dMaturity2 := legGetDate( pMainContract,"Maturity_2" )
			},
			// Fill the external counterparty UDF for each component
			iComponent := 0,
			iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
				bInternalLeg := ( legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ) == "Yes" ),
				
				pUdfbloc := legGetUserFields( pComponent ),
				bEligibleUDF := FALSE,
				IF ( bIsFXSwap ) THEN
				{
					bSplitSwapNonCross := ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP") AND ( pComponent <> fxLegGetComponent( pLeg,"crossswp","nearleg" ) ) 
										AND ( pComponent <> fxLegGetComponent( pLeg,"crossswp","farleg" ) ),
					bEligibleUDF := bInternalLeg AND bSplitSwapNonCross,
					IF ( bEligibleUDF ) THEN
					{
						dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( dMaturity == dMaturity1 ) THEN
							udfSetString( pUdfbloc,"EXT_CTP",sCounterparty1 )
						ELSE IF ( dMaturity == dMaturity2 ) THEN //To handle the case of the FX Swap 2Ctrps
							udfSetString( pUdfbloc,"EXT_CTP",sCounterparty2 )
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( bIsSpotFwd ) THEN
				{
					bOutrightNonMain := ( ( ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLIT") )
									AND ( pComponent <> legGetMainComponent( pLeg ) ) ),
					bEligibleUDF := bInternalLeg AND bOutrightNonMain,
					IF ( bEligibleUDF ) THEN
						udfSetString( pUdfbloc,"EXT_CTP",sCounterparty1 )
				},
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			}
		}
	},
	
	// Update regulatory information: if eligible for Clearing, the checkbox "Clearing eligibility" will be checked
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility" ) ) THEN
		sPfClearingeligibility := legGetString ( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility" )
	ELSE
		sPfClearingeligibility := "",
	
	IF ( ( sPfClearingeligibility == "Eligible" ) 
	AND ( ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ) == "1. SwapClear" ) OR ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ) == "2. CME" ) ) ) THEN
		legSetClearingEligibility( pComponent,TRUE ),
	
	// Update the Multi parties pop up with the CCP selected
	IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ) ) THEN
		sPfCCPs := legGetString ( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" )
	ELSE
		sPfCCPs := "",
	
	IF ( ( sPfCCPs <> "" ) 
	AND ( sPfCCPs <> "3. None" )
	AND ( sPfClearingeligibility == "Eligible" ) ) THEN
		pNewParty := multipartyAddLine( pLeg ),
	
	iMultiCheck := multipartyGetLength( pLeg ),
	pNewParty := multipartyGetLineAt( pLeg,iMultiCheck-1 ),
	IF ( sPfCCPs == "1. SwapClear" ) THEN
	{
		sNewParty := "SWAPCLEAR",
		multipartySetParty( pNewParty,sNewParty ),
		multipartySetRoleBehavior( pNewParty,"Information" ),
		multipartySetRole( pNewParty,"CCP" )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sPfCCPs == "2. CME" ) THEN
	{
		sNewParty := "CME",
		multipartySetParty( pNewParty,sNewParty ),
		multipartySetRoleBehavior( pNewParty,"Information" ),
		multipartySetRole( pNewParty,"CCP" )
	},
	
	// Propagate the source module, if set in the "Source comment[2]" field
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) THEN
	{
		iContract := 0,
		iNumberOfContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
		pFirstComponent := legGetFirstComponent( pLeg ),
		sSourceModule := legGetString( pFirstComponent,"Source comment[2]" ),
		IF ( strStartsWith( strToUpperCase( sSourceModule ), "SOURCEMODULE:" ) ) THEN
		{
			sSourceLabel := strSubString( sSourceModule,13 ),
			WHILE ( iContract < iNumberOfContracts ) DO 
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
				legSetSourceModule( pContract,sSourceLabel ),
				iContract := iContract + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Booking.FCpl2

/*
MXpress
Field Completion rule

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialized and if the context is insertion
	Loop on all components
		If component is internal
			If "Destination trader" field is empty
				Fill "Destination trader" field with "Source trader" field value
			End if
		End if
	End loop
End if

Version 1.2
Loop on all components

Version 1.1
Fill the "Destination trader" field with "Source trader" field value for mono component products

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to fill fields for the products used by the FX & MM asset classes:
Fill the "Destination trader" field with "Trader" field value for mono component products

! Reminder: when removing this rule, check mx.mirroring.FXMM.Booking.Mirr
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.action"),
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) AND ( sAction =="INS" ) ) THEN
	{
		// Fields Initialization/Reset
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		sInternal := "",
		sDestinationTrader := "",
		sSourceTrader := "",
		
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sDestinationTrader := "",
			sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ),
			IF ( sInternal == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				sDestinationTrader := legGetString( pComponent,"Destination trader" ),
				IF ( sDestinationTrader == "" ) THEN
				{
					sSourceTrader := legGetString( pComponent,"Source trader" ),
					legSetString( pComponent,"Destination trader",sSourceTrader )
				}
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Closing.Fees

/*
MXpress
Default Brokerage fee for different brokers

Version 1.7
- If fee already exists and has not been customized, set the fee date to the deal settlement date if fee date type is settlement date (added lines 653 till 672)
- If fee already exists and has been customized, set the fee date to the deal settlement date if fee date type is settlement date (added lines 677 till 706)
- If fee already exists and has been customized, Update the source/destination of the fee in case the portfolio of the deal has been changed (added lines 677 till 706)
	?	Check if the last modified field is the Portfolio
	?	If yes, check if the fee type is ?Client Fee?
	?	If yes, set the fee destination to the new portfolio. Otherwise, set the fee source to the new portfolio
- If fee already exists and has been customized but the deal counterpart has been changed (only the conditions ( sCurrentFeeType == sFeeType ) AND ( sCurrentFeeCode == sFeeCode ) are met, since the condition ( sCurrentParty == sCounterparty ) cannot be met after ctp change), update the source/destination of the fee to match the new counterpart (added lines 714 till 737)


Version 1.6
- Addition of Value Date check on fee calculation rule

Version 1.5
- correction in case of fees with same type but different codes

Version 1.4
- Don't compute fees for internal trades
- Apply fee calculation on order execution
- Manage yearly based fees

Version 1.3
Amendments related:
- separation of ("MX.ALL.FeeCalculation","ALL") table into two new tables: ("MX.ALL.FeeCalcConditions","ALL") and ("MX.ALL.FeeCalcRules","ALL")
- addition of a new calculation type: perQuantity
- addition of a rounding method
- replacement of "premium" field by "settlement amount"
- addition of an exchange rate column and a new table ("MX.ALL.FX-Rate","ALL") to handle the foreign exchange rates different than the Spot

Version 1.2
Amendments related:
- the assignment of default fields name is done at the level of the (MX.ALL.FieldMapFee,ALL) lookup table.
- if there is an entry in the ("MX.ALL.Fees","ALL") lookup table and not one related in the ("MX.ALL.FeeCalculation","ALL") lookup table, remove the uncompleted fees.
- correction of the order of the parameters in the function cuGetFxRate
- addition of new parameters in the fee tables: Code
- setting the default date type to "SettlementDate"

Version 1.1
Amendments to handle:
- the fee rounding depending the currency
- the ability to sum up fees
- more input criteria for fees compution: instrument, trade direction and another criteria (to be define)

Version  1.0
*/

{
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ), //mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE, ...
	bIsInsertOrCancelReissue := ( sAction == "INS" ) 
						AND ( ( sSourceClass == "" ) OR ( sSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" ) OR ( sSourceClass == "mxOrderEventIEXECUTE_BOOK" ) ),
	
	// If it is not a deal insertion or a cancel and reissue or order execution, DO NOT APPLY THE BROKERAGEFEE COMPLETION FORMULA
	IF ( bIsInsertOrCancelReissue ) THEN
	{
		//static values - general
		dNullDate := "00000000",
		
		//static values - fee values
		sFeeCode := "",
		sFeeAPDefault := "Excluded",
		sFeeValueDateTypeDefault := "SettlementDate",
		
		//static values - fee types
		sBrokerFee := "BrokerFee",
		sBrokerTax := "BrokerTax",
		sClearerFee := "ClearerFee",
		sClearerTax := "ClearerTax",
		sInternalFee := "InternalFee",
		sClientFee := "ClientFee",
		
		//get deal information
		pLeg := This,
		// Get the number of contracts
		iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
		iContract := 0,
		
		// Loop on Contracts
		// apply the brokerage to the main component of each contract
		WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
		{
			//get main component
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iContract ),
			
			//get fees pointer and number of fees
			pFees := legGetBrokerFlows( pComponent ),
			
			// clean up all not automatic fees
			iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
			iFee := 0,
			WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
			{
				pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees,iFee ),
				bIsAutomatic := brkFlowIsFeeAutomatic( pFee ),
				sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
				
				IF ( sCurrentFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( bIsAutomatic ) THEN
					{
						brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee ),
						iNbFees := iNbFees - 1,
						iFee := iFee - 1
					}
				},
				iFee := iFee + 1
			},
			
			//get generic trade values
			sTradePortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
			sEntity := ptfGetEntity( sTradePortfolio ),
			sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
			sTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ),
            
            //BAB addition: Master logic to decide whether broker fee should be generated or not for Spots
            sRegistrationLeg := legGetRegistration(pLeg), //get registration at leg level
            
            bIsGenerateFeeSpot :=  ( ( ( sRegistrationLeg == "Spot-Forward"AND sTypology == "Spot")  AND legGetString(pComponent,"BROKER_FEE") == "Yes") //Spot
            						OR (( sRegistrationLeg == "Split Package"AND sTypology == "Spot") AND legGetString(pComponent,"cross.BROKER_FEE") == "Yes" ) ), //Spot Split
            
        	//End of BAB addition

             //BAB addition
            IF sTypology == "Banknotes" OR sTypology == "Banknotes Credit" OR sTypology == "SAMA Purchase" OR sTypology == "Spot" THEN
            {
            sFeeValueDateTypeDefault := "TransactionDate"
            },
			
			// get the direction
			sDirection := "",
			// get the instrument 
			sInstrument := "",
			// Get Day count basis for annualized fees
			sDayCountBasis := "",
			// another criteria to define
			sCriteria := "",
			
			//specific values initialization
			fNotional := 0.0,
			sNotionalUnit := "",
			fQuantity := 0.0,
			sMarket := "",
			fTradeValue := 0.0,
			fSettlement := 0.0,
			
			//first test the fee party and fee type table to verify if a rule has been defined for the current product typology
			//this avoids annoying warning messages appearing for product typologies that have not been set up in the mapping table
			
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.Fees","ALL",
								"Closing Entity",sEntity,
								"Typology",sTypology,
								"Portfolio",sTradePortfolio,
								"Market","", //value not retrieved from field mapping yet
								"Counterpart",sCounterparty,
								"Currency","", //value not retrieved from field mapping yet
								"Instrument","", //value not retrieved from field mapping yet
								"Trade Direction","", //value not retrieved from field mapping yet
								"Criteria","" ), //value not retrieved from field mapping yet
			
			iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
			// Test that this is not an internal trade, in that case no fee are added
			IF ( ( iNbResults > 0 ) AND ( sInternal == "No" ) ) THEN
			{
				//get specific trade values
				//this section will retreive the trade values used for rule calculation from the lookup table
				//this is required because different trade types can have different trade information
				pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapFee","ALL",
										"Registration",sRegistration ),
				iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
				iResult := 0,
				
				//use boolean values to check whether or not the default field label should be used
				bNotional := FALSE,
				bNotionalUnit := FALSE,
				bQuantity := FALSE,
				bValueDate := FALSE,
				bMarket := FALSE,
				bTradeValue := FALSE,
				bStartDate := FALSE,
				bMaturityDate := FALSE,
				bSettlement := FALSE,
				bDirection := FALSE,
				bInstrument := FALSE,
				bDayCountBasis := FALSE,
				bCriteria := FALSE,
				//bManualBooking := FALSE,
                
				WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults ) DO
				{
					sFeeField := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,0 ),
					sTrnField := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,1 ),
					IF ( sFeeField == "Notional" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							fNotional := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnField ) ),
						bNotional := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Notional Unit" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sNotionalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bNotionalUnit := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Quantity" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
						{
							fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnField ),
							sQuantityField := sTrnField
						},
						bQuantity := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Value Date" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							dValueDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bValueDate := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Market" ) THEN
					{
                    
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sMarket := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bMarket := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Trade Value" ) THEN
					{
                    
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent, sTrnField ) ) THEN
							fTradeValue := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnField ) ),
						bTradeValue := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Start Date" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA"  ) THEN
							dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bStartDate := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Maturity Date" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bMaturityDate := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Settlement Amount" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							fSettlement := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnField ) ),
						bSettlement := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Instrument" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bInstrument := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Direction" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sDirection := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bDirection := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Criteria" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sCriteria := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bCriteria := TRUE
					}
					ELSE IF ( sFeeField == "Day Count Basis" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTrnField <> "NA" ) THEN
							sDayCountBasis := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnField ),
						bDayCountBasis := TRUE
					},
					iResult := iResult + 1
				},
				
				pResultsDefault := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapFee","ALL",
											"Registration","" ),
				iNbResultsDefault := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResultsDefault ),
				iResultDefault := 0,
				WHILE ( iResultDefault < iNbResultsDefault ) DO
				{
					sFeeFieldDefault := lookupResultsGetString( pResultsDefault,iResultDefault,0 ),
					sTrnFieldDefault := lookupResultsGetString( pResultsDefault,iResultDefault,1 ),
					IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Notional" AND sTrnFieldDefault <> "NA") THEN
						sTrnFieldNotional := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Notional Unit" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldNotionalUnit := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Quantity" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldQuantity := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Value Date" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldValueDate := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Market" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldMarket := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Trade Value" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldTradeValue := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Start Date" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldStartDate := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Maturity Date" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldMaturityDate := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Settlement Amount" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldSettlement := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Instrument" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldInstrument := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Direction" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldDirection := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Criteria" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldCriteria := sTrnFieldDefault
					ELSE IF ( sFeeFieldDefault == "Day Count Basis" ) THEN
						sTrnFieldDayCountBasis := sTrnFieldDefault,
					
					iResultDefault := iResultDefault + 1
				},
				
				//if specific values are not available - set default ones
				//not required for product specific fields, like Market, Day Count Basis 
				IF ( NOT bNotional ) THEN
					fNotional := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnFieldNotional ) ),
				IF ( NOT bNotionalUnit ) THEN
					sNotionalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnFieldNotionalUnit ),
				 IF ( NOT bQuantity ) THEN
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnFieldQuantity ),
				IF ( NOT bValueDate ) THEN
					dValueDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnFieldValueDate ),
				IF ( NOT bTradeValue ) THEN
					fTradeValue := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnFieldTradeValue ) ),
				IF ( NOT bStartDate ) THEN
					dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnFieldStartDate ),
				IF ( NOT bMaturityDate ) THEN
					dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,sTrnFieldMaturityDate ),
				IF ( NOT bSettlement ) THEN
					fSettlement := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sTrnFieldSettlement ) ),
				IF ( NOT bInstrument ) THEN
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnFieldInstrument ),
				IF ( NOT bDirection ) THEN
					sDirection := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnFieldDirection ),
				/* Uncomment this line in order to use additional user defined field: criteria*/    
				/*IF ( NOT bCriteria ) THEN
					sCriteria := legGetString( pComponent,sTrnFieldCriteria),*/
				
				//get the fee from the fee type and fee destination lookup table
				//possible to create multiple fee types for multiple destination types
				pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.Fees","ALL",
									"Closing Entity",sEntity,
									"Typology",sTypology,
									"Portfolio",sTradePortfolio,
									"Market",sMarket,
									"Counterpart",sCounterparty,
									"Currency",sNotionalUnit,
									"Instrument",sInstrument,
									"Trade Direction",sDirection,
									"Criteria",sCriteria ), 
				iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
				iResult := 0,  
				
				//get the number of days between trade start date and trade end date for maturity date calculation
				fNumberOfDays := dMaturityDate - dStartDate,
                
                 //BAB addition to check for the manual booking of Murabaha Commodities
                 IF sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" THEN
                 {
                     sManualBooking := legGetString(pComponent,"MAN_BOOK"),
                     dPhysicalDeliverydate := legGetDate(pComponent, "Physical_Delivery")
                 },

 
                 /*  dSysdate := sysGetFODeskDate(),
                IF sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" THEN
                {
                    dPhysicalDeliverydate := legGetDate(pComponent, "Physical_Delivery"),
                    IF (dSysdate > dPhysicalDeliverydate) AND (sysGetGroup() == "FO") THEN
                        bManualBooking := TRUE
                }, */
				
                
                 IF legGetString(pComponent,"Usage") <> ""  /*AND bManualBooking == FALSE*/ AND sManualBooking <> "Yes"  THEN
                 {
                    	sUsage:=legGetString(pComponent,"Usage"),
                        IF sUsage == "Murabaha Plc BA" OR  sUsage == "Murabaha Brw DI" OR sUsage == "RR Murabaha" OR sUsage == "RR SAMA" OR  sUsage == "Repo Murabaha" OR sUsage == "Repo SAMA" 
                        OR sUsage == "SAMA Bill" OR sUsage == "LTM BA" OR sUsage == "LTM Callable BA" OR sUsage == "LTM CapFloorCollarBA" OR sUsage == "LTM Range BA" OR sUsage == "LTM Range CallableBA" 
                        OR sUsage == "SFRM" OR sUsage == "Sukuk Issuance" OR sUsage == "PRS" OR sUsage == "PRS Range" OR sUsage == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sUsage == "PRS Inverse Floater"
                        OR sUsage == "Depo Callable" OR sUsage == "Depo Range" OR sUsage == "Depo CapFloorCollar" OR sUsage == "Depo Range Callable" THEN
                        {
                        	sCriteria:="BrkFee",
                            fNumberOfDays:= legGetNumeric(pComponent,"IS_BRTENOR"),
              			    fNotional:=legGetNumeric(pComponent,"IS_ORIGAMT")
                    },
                    
                    
                   		IF sUsage == "FX Murabaha" THEN
                        {
                        	sCriteria:="BrkFee",
              			    fNotional:=legGetNumeric(pComponent,"IS_ORIFLOW")
                    }

                    },
                
                
				//boolean values to check if the broker tax or clear tax still needs to be generated because 
				//the broker fee or clearer fee has not been generated yet
				//the calculation sequence will be executed a second time if the calculation has been done for broker tax / clearer tax
				bCalculatedPercentageOfBrokerFee := FALSE,
				bCalculatedPercentageOfClearerFee := FALSE, 
				bReExecuted := FALSE,
				
				WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults ) DO
				{
					//retrieve the fee type and fee destination
					sFeeType := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,0 ),
					sFeeParty := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,1 ),
					sFeeCode := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,2 ),
					
					// If broker was explicitly specified in the trade ticket, get default broker provided
					// This broker is used, only if no default party was provided in the table
					IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"pf_broker" ) AND sFeeParty == "" ) THEN // This field makes sense & exists for few products
                    
					{	IF legIsElementValid(pComponent,"BROKER") THEN 	
                    		legOverwrite(pComponent,"pf_broker",legGetString(pComponent,"BROKER")),// BAB 
                            
						IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_broker") <> "") THEN
							sFeeParty := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_broker" ),
                            
                             //If murabaha process, Fee party is broker 1    
                        IF  sCriteria =="BrkFee" THEN
                        	sFeeParty:= strTrim(legGetString(pComponent,"IS_BROKER1"))
					},

					
					//fee values initialization
					fFeeValue := 0.0,
					
					//get the fee calculation information from the fee calculation lookup table
					pCalcRule := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FeeCalcConditions","ALL",
										"Fee Type",sFeeType,
										"Fee Party",sFeeParty,
										"Fee Code",sFeeCode,
										"Closing Entity",sEntity,
										"Typology",sTypology,
										"Portfolio",sTradePortfolio,
										"Market",sMarket,
										"Counterpart",sCounterparty,
										"Currency",sNotionalUnit,
										"Instrument",sInstrument,
										"Trade Direction",sDirection,
										"Criteria",sCriteria ),
					
					iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcRule ),
					bCalcRuleIsSet := FALSE,
					sCalcRule := "",
					WHILE ( iCalcRules < iNbCalcResults ) DO
					{
						// Get the minimum and maximum dates defined in lookup table
						dRangeMinDate := lookupResultsGetDate( pCalcRule,iCalcRules,1 ),
						dRangeMaxDate := lookupResultsGetDate( pCalcRule,iCalcRules,2 ),
						//Set calculation rule based on different conditions
						IF ( ( dValueDate >= dRangeMinDate AND dValueDate <= dRangeMaxDate )
						OR ( dRangeMinDate == dNullDate AND dRangeMaxDate == dNullDate )
						OR ( dValueDate >= dRangeMinDate AND dRangeMaxDate == dNullDate )
						OR ( dRangeMinDate == dNullDate AND dValueDate <= dRangeMaxDate ) ) THEN
						{
							//Throw warning in case more than 1 line in looup table MX.ALL.FeeCalcConditions match the if condition
							IF ( bCalcRuleIsSet == TRUE ) THEN
								ThrowWarning( "Warning","Inconsistencies found in table MX.ALL.FeeCalcConditions" )
							ELSE
							{
								sCalcRule := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcRule,iCalcRules,0 ),
								bCalcRuleIsSet := TRUE
							}
						},
						iCalcRules := iCalcRules + 1
					},
					
					pCalcResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FeeCalcRules","ALL","Rule ID",sCalcRule ),
					iCalcResult := 0,
					iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcResults ),
					WHILE ( iCalcResult < iNbCalcResults ) DO
					{
						fFeeValue := 0.0,
						
						//fee calculation information
						sFeeCalculationType := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,0 ),
						sFeeCalculationCurrency := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,1 ),
						fFeeCalculationValue := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,2 ),
						fFeeMinFixedFee := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,3 ),
						fFeeMaxFixedFee := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,4 ),
						fFeeRangeMinNotional := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,5 ),
						fFeeRangeMaxNotional := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,6 ),
						fFeeRangeMinMaturity := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,7 ),
						fFeeRangeMaxMaturity := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,8 ),
						sFeeTaxParty := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,9 ),
						sFeeRoundingMethod := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,10 ),
						fFeeRoundingDecimals := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,11 ),
						sFeeExchangeRate := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,12 ),
						sFeeYearlyRate := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,13 ),
						
						//***************************Exchange rate calculation****************************
						//Note that a Broker Tax based on the calculation of a Broker or Clearer fee is
						//considered to be of the same currency as the fee
						IF ( sFeeCalculationCurrency == "" ) THEN
						{
							sFeeCalculationCurrency := sNotionalUnit,
							fFxRate := 1.0
						}
						ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationCurrency == sNotionalUnit ) THEN
							fFxRate := 1.0
						ELSE
						{
							//By default, use the spot fx rate
							IF ( ( sFeeExchangeRate == "Spot" ) OR ( sFeeExchangeRate == "" ) ) THEN
								fFxRate := cuGetFxRate( sFeeCalculationCurrency,sNotionalUnit )
							ELSE
							{
								pFxRateResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FX-Rate","ALL","FX Rate",sFeeExchangeRate ),
								sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pFxRateResults,0,0 ),
								sShifter := lookupResultsGetString( pFxRateResults,0,1 ),
								
								sFxInstrument := sFeeCalculationCurrency + "/" + sNotionalUnit,
								sCalendar := fxCntGetDateToValueDateCalendar( sFxInstrument ),
								IF ( sCalendar == "" ) THEN
								{
									sFxInstrument := sNotionalUnit + "/" + sFeeCalculationCurrency,
									sCalendar := fxCntGetDateToValueDateCalendar( sFxInstrument ),
									IF ( sCalendar == "" ) THEN
										sCalendar := "TGT"
								},
								
								dFxValueDate:= shiftschedule( dValueDate,2,1,sShifter,sCalendar ),
								fFxRate := fxGetHisSpot( sArchivingGroup,"Fixing",sFeeCalculationCurrency,sNotionalUnit,dFxValueDate ),
								IF ( fFxRate == 0.0 ) THEN
									ThrowError( "Fee Calculation","Historical value of exchange rate is null." )
							}
						},
						//**********************************************************************************   // 
						
						//***************************** Compute yearly interest **************************** //
						IF ( sFeeYearlyRate == "Yes" ) THEN
						{
							// Applicable only for percentageOfNotional, percentageOfSettlementAmount, percentageOfTradeValue
							fProrataInterest := mthComputeInterest( dStartDate, dMaturityDate, 100., sDayCountBasis )
						}
						ELSE
							fProrataInterest := 1.0,
						//**********************************************************************************   //
						
						
						//first check nominal range
						IF (
						//case 1: the trade notional is within the range
						( fNotional >= fFeeRangeMinNotional AND fNotional <= fFeeRangeMaxNotional )
						//case 2: no range defined
						OR ( fFeeRangeMinNotional == 0.0 AND fFeeRangeMaxNotional == 0.0 )
						//case 3: within range because min not defined but max defined
						OR ( fFeeRangeMinNotional == 0.0 AND fNotional <= fFeeRangeMaxNotional )
						//case 4: within range because max not defined but min defined
						OR ( fNotional >= fFeeRangeMinNotional AND fFeeRangeMaxNotional == 0.0 ) ) THEN
						{
							//then check maturity date range
							IF (
							//case 1: the number of days  is within the range
							( fNumberOfDays >= fFeeRangeMinMaturity AND fNumberOfDays <= fFeeRangeMaxMaturity )
							//case 2: no range defined
							OR ( fFeeRangeMinMaturity == 0.0 AND fFeeRangeMaxMaturity == 0.0 )
							//case 3: within range because min not defined but max defined
							OR ( fFeeRangeMinMaturity == 0.0 AND fNumberOfDays <= fFeeRangeMaxMaturity )
							//case 4: within range because max not defined but min defined
							OR ( fNumberOfDays >= fFeeRangeMinMaturity AND fFeeRangeMaxMaturity == 0.0 ) ) THEN
							{
								//get currency
								IF ( sFeeCalculationCurrency == "" ) THEN
									sFeeCalculationCurrency := sNotionalUnit,
								
								//calculate fee
								IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "" ) THEN
									fFeeValue := 0.0
								//the next section looks for the calculation type and calculates the fee amount
								//calculate percentage of notional
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfNotional" ) THEN
								{
									fFeeValue := ( fFeeCalculationValue/100.0 ) * fNotional,
									fFeeValue := fFeeValue * fFxRate * fProrataInterest
								}
								//calculate percentage of Settlement Amount
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfSettlementAmount" ) THEN
								{
									fFeeValue := ( fFeeCalculationValue/100.0 ) * fSettlement,
									fFeeValue := fFeeValue * fFxRate * fProrataInterest,
                                                                        
                                // BAB addition for Equity fees     
                                    IF sTypology == "Equity" THEN
                                    {
                                    	 pResultsBrokerFee := lookupResults("BAB.ALL.BrokerDiscountFee","ALL","Broker",sCounterparty),
                                         IF ( NOT isNull( pResultsBrokerFee ) ) THEN
                                         {
            	                     	 	fBrokerFee := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pResultsBrokerFee,0,0)
                                         },
                                         fFeeValue := ( (100.0 - fBrokerFee) / 100.0 ) * fFeeValue
                                    }
								//end of BAB addition
								}
								//calculate percentage of trade value, for example Bpv for IRS trades
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfTradeValue" ) THEN
								{
									fFeeValue := ( fFeeCalculationValue/100.0 ) * fTradeValue,                                    
									fFeeValue := fFeeValue * fFxRate * fProrataInterest
								}
								//calculate fee based on a fixed amount for every million of notional
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "perMillionOfNotional" ) THEN
								{
									fFeeValue := ( fNotional / 1000000.0 ) * fFeeCalculationValue,
									fFeeValue := fFeeValue * fFxRate 
								}
								//calculate fixed fee amount per transaction
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "fixedPerTransaction" ) THEN
									fFeeValue := fFeeCalculationValue
								//calculate the fee based on a fixed amount per unit of quantity   
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "perQuantity" ) THEN
								{
									fFeeValue := fQuantity * fFeeCalculationValue,
									fFeeValue := fFeeValue * fFxRate
								}
								//calculate percentage of broker fee or clearer fee
								//this is required when a clearer tax or broker tax is based
								//on the clearer fee or broker fee amount
								//the value will only be calculated correctly if the 
								//broker fee or clearer fee has been calculated already
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfBrokerFee" ) THEN
								{
									bCalculatedPercentageOfBrokerFee := TRUE,
									
									//loop on existing fields to find broker fee
									iFee := 0,
									iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
									WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
									{
										pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees, iFee ),
										sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
										sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetDestination( pFee ),
										
										IF ( sFeeTaxParty == "" ) THEN
											sFeeTaxParty := sCounterparty,
										
										IF ( ( sCurrentFeeType == sBrokerFee ) AND ( sCurrentParty == sFeeTaxParty ) ) THEN
										{
											//calculate the broker tax based on broker fee
											fFeeAmount := brkFlowGetFee( pFee ), 
											fFeeValue := ( fFeeCalculationValue / 100.0 ) * fFeeAmount
										},
										iFee := iFee + 1
									}
								}
								ELSE IF ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfClearerFee" ) THEN
								{
									bCalculatedPercentageOfClearerFee := TRUE,
									//loop on existing fields to find clearer fee
									
									iFee := 0,
									iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
									WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
									{
										pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees, iFee ),
										sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
										sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetDestination( pFee ),
										
										IF ( sFeeTaxParty == "" ) THEN
											sFeeTaxParty := sCounterparty,
										
										IF ( ( sCurrentFeeType == sClearerFee ) 
										AND ( sFeeCalculationType == "percentageOfClearerFee" )
										AND ( sCurrentParty == sFeeTaxParty ) ) THEN
										{
											//calculate the clearer tax based on clearer fee
											fFeeAmount := brkFlowGetFee( pFee ), 
											fFeeValue := ( fFeeCalculationValue / 100.0 ) * fFeeAmount
										},
										iFee := iFee + 1
									}
								}
								ELSE
									fFeeValue := 0.0,
								
								//set minimum fee
								IF ( ( fFeeValue < fFeeMinFixedFee ) AND ( fFeeMinFixedFee <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
									fFeeValue := fFeeMinFixedFee,
								
								//set maximum fee
								IF ( ( fFeeValue > fFeeMaxFixedFee ) AND ( fFeeMaxFixedFee <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
									fFeeValue := fFeeMaxFixedFee,
								
								//round the fee 
								IF ( sFeeRoundingMethod == "Round Nearest" ) THEN
									fFeeValue := roundnearest( fFeeValue,toInt( fFeeRoundingDecimals ) )
								ELSE IF ( sFeeRoundingMethod == "Round Up" ) THEN
									fFeeValue:= roundexcess( fFeeValue,toInt( fFeeRoundingDecimals ) )
								ELSE IF ( sFeeRoundingMethod == "Round Down" ) THEN
									fFeeValue:= rounddefault( fFeeValue,toInt( fFeeRoundingDecimals ) )
							}
						},
						fTotalFeeValue := fTotalFeeValue + fFeeValue,
						iCalcResult := iCalcResult + 1
					},
					
					//default rounding of fee amount
					fFeeRoundingDecimal := lookupNumeric( "MX.ALL.FeeRounding","ALL","Currency",sFeeCalculationCurrency ),
					
					//round fee value
					fTotalFeeValue := roundnearest( fTotalFeeValue,toInt( fFeeRoundingDecimal ) ),
					IF ( ( fTotalFeeValue > 0.0 ) AND ( sFeeType <> "" ) AND ( iNbCalcResults > 0 ) OR ( sCalcRule == "SUKISS" )OR (sCalcRule == "BN_FEE") OR (sCalcRule == "SP_FEE")OR (sCalcRule == "EQ_FEE")) THEN
					{
						//boolean to flag when fee has been set 
						bFeeExists := FALSE,
						iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
						iFee := 0,
						
						//Update brokerages
						//The brokerage fee and brokerage tax (if applicable) will be automatically added to the deal
						//If the user unchecks the automatic fee field in the view, they can update the fee or tax manually and the system will
						//not overwrite it.
						WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
						{
							pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees, iFee ),
							bIsAutomatic := brkFlowIsFeeAutomatic( pFee ),
							sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
							sCurrentFeeCode := brkFlowGetCode( pFee ),
							IF ( sCurrentFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
								sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetSource( pFee )
							ELSE
								sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetDestination( pFee ),
							
							//update fee if fee already exists
							IF ( ( sCurrentFeeType == sFeeType ) AND ( sCurrentFeeCode == sFeeCode ) AND ( ( sCurrentParty ==  sFeeParty ) OR ( sCurrentParty == sCounterparty ) ) AND ( NOT bFeeExists ) ) THEN
							{
								//update fee only if the fee has not been customised manually
								IF ( bIsAutomatic ) THEN
								{
									IF ( sFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
									{
										brkFlowOverwriteSource( pFee,sFeeParty ),
										brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pFee, sTradePortfolio)
									}
									ELSE
									{
										brkFlowOverwriteSource( pFee,sTradePortfolio ),
										IF ( sFeeParty <> "" ) THEN
											brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pFee,sFeeParty )
										ELSE
											brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pFee,sCounterparty )
									},
									
									brkFlowOverwriteCode( pFee,sFeeCode ),
									brkFlowOverwriteCurrency( pFee,sFeeCalculationCurrency ),
									brkFlowOverwriteValueDateType( pFee,sFeeValueDateTypeDefault ),
									IF ( sFeeValueDateTypeDefault == "NoSelection" ) THEN
										brkFlowOverwriteValueDate( pFee,dValueDate ),
									brkFlowOverwriteAveragePrice( pFee,sFeeAPDefault ),
									brkFlowOverwriteFee( pFee,fTotalFeeValue ),
                                    
                                    // Set the fee date to the deal settlement date if fee date type is settlement date 
                                    IF ( brkFlowGetValueDateType (pFee)== "Settlement date" OR sFeeValueDateTypeDefault== "SettlementDate" ) THEN
                                    {
                                        IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN 
                                        { 	 
                                            dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Settl_Payment_date"),
                                            brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                        },
                                        IF ( sRegistration == "Equities" ) THEN 
                                        {
                                        	dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Payment_date"),
                                        	brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                        },
                                        IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R asset" ) THEN 
                                        {
                                        	dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Settlement_date"),
                                        	brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                        }
                                     }
								}
                                //update fee if fee already exists but has been customized 
                                //Mainly update the date and/or source/destination fields of the fee, in case the settlement date and/or portfolio
                                //of the deal have been changed
                                ELSE {
                                
                                      //For Bank note transportation cost-BAB addition
                                      IF ( brkFlowGetCode (pFee)== "BN CLFee") THEN
                                      {
                                      	brkFlowSetDestination(pFee,sCounterparty)
                                        
                                      },
                                
                                      // Set the fee date to the deal settlement date if fee date type is settlement date 
                                      IF ( brkFlowGetValueDateType (pFee)== "Settlement date" OR sFeeValueDateTypeDefault== "SettlementDate" ) THEN
                                      {
                                            IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN 
                                            { 	 
                                                dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Settl_Payment_date"),
                                                brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                            },
                                            IF ( sRegistration == "Equities" ) THEN 
                                            {
                                                dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Payment_date"),
                                                brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                            },
                                            IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R asset" ) THEN 
                                            {
                                                dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pComponent,"Settlement_date"),
                                                brkFlowOverwriteValueDate(pFee,dSettlementDate)
                                            }
                                         },
                                     // Set the fee source/destination to the deal portfolio if the deal portfolio has been changed
                                      sModifiedField := legGetLastInputField(pComponent), //added to initialze
                                      IF (sModifiedField =="Portfolio") THEN
                                      {
                                       IF ( sFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
                                        brkFlowSetDestination( pFee,sTradePortfolio )
									   ELSE								
									    brkFlowSetSource( pFee,sTradePortfolio )
                                      },
                                      
                                      //BAB addition to update the counterpart
                                      IF (sModifiedField == "Counterpart") THEN
                                      {
                                      sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
                                      brkFlowSetDestination( pFee,sCounterparty )
                                      }
                                },
                                
								bFeeExists := TRUE
							}
                            //update fee if fee already exists and has been customized but the deal counterpart has been changed 
                            //meaning the previous condition cannot be met because of the sub-condition ( sCurrentParty == sCounterparty ) 
                            //Mainly update the source/destionation field of the fee in case the deal counterpart was modified
                            
                             ELSE IF ( ( sCurrentFeeType == sFeeType ) AND ( sCurrentFeeCode == sFeeCode ) AND ( sModifiedField == "Counterpart" ) AND ( NOT bFeeExists ) AND (NOT bIsAutomatic )) THEN
                            
                            {
                                  
                                  IF ( sFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
									{
                                        IF ( sFeeParty <> "" ) THEN
                                        brkFlowOverwriteSource( pFee,sFeeParty )
                                        ELSE
										brkFlowSetSource( pFee,sCounterparty )
									}
									ELSE
									{
								
										IF ( sFeeParty <> "" ) THEN
											brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pFee,sFeeParty )
										ELSE
											brkFlowSetDestination( pFee,sCounterparty )
									},
                                     
                                      bFeeExists := TRUE
                                    
                                    
                               },
							iFee := iFee + 1
						},
						
						//add brokerage fee if missing
						IF ( NOT bFeeExists AND sTypology <> "Spot" ) OR (NOT bFeeExists AND sTypology == "Spot" AND legGetString(pComponent, "BROKER_FEE") == "Yes") THEN
						{
							//in some random cases the add function fails
							//the following check highlights this
							//to be fixed in future releases (a bug fix is required)
							
							brkFlowsAdd( pFees ),
							pNewFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees, iNbFees ),
							
							IF ( pNewFee <> pNull ) THEN
							{
								brkFlowSetType( pNewFee,sFeeType ),
								
								IF ( sFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
								{
									IF ( sFeeParty <> "" ) THEN
										brkFlowOverwriteSource( pNewFee,sFeeParty )
									ELSE
										brkFlowOverwriteSource( pNewFee,sCounterparty ),
									
									brkFlowSetDestination( pNewFee, sTradePortfolio )
								}
								ELSE
								{
									brkFlowSetSource( pNewFee,sTradePortfolio ),
									IF ( sFeeParty <> "" ) THEN
										brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pNewFee,sFeeParty )
									ELSE
										brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pNewFee,sCounterparty )
								},
								
								brkFlowSetCode( pNewFee,sFeeCode ),
								brkFlowSetCurrency( pNewFee,sFeeCalculationCurrency ),
								brkFlowSetValueDateType( pNewFee,sFeeValueDateTypeDefault ),
								IF ( sFeeValueDateTypeDefault == "NoSelection" OR sFeeValueDateTypeDefault == "SettlementDate" ) THEN
									brkFlowSetValueDate( pNewFee,dValueDate ),
                                    
                                    //BAB addition for the Murabaha COM deals to set the value date = to the delivery date
                                    IF sManualBooking == "Yes" THEN
                                        brkFlowSetValueDate( pNewFee,dPhysicalDeliverydate),

                                    
                               /* IF bManualBooking == TRUE THEN
                                    brkFlowSetValueDate( pNewFee,dPhysicalDeliverydate),*/
                                    
                                //BAB addition for Murabaha Commodity: Set Broker fee value date = the commodity start date
                                IF ( sTypology == "Murabaha Commodity"
                                    AND ( sUsage == "RR SAMA" 
                                    	OR sUsage == "Repo SAMA"
                                        OR sUsage == "Murabaha Brw DI"
                                        OR sUsage == "Murabaha Plc BA"
                                        OR sUsage == "LTM"
                                        OR sUsage == "LTM Range"
                                        OR sUsage == "SAMA Bill") ) THEN
                                    {
                                        dValueDate := legGetDate(pComponent, "Physical_Delivery"),
                                        brkFlowSetValueDate( pNewFee, dValueDate)
                               		}, 
                                    
								brkFlowSetAveragePrice( pNewFee,sFeeAPDefault ),
								brkFlowSetFee( pNewFee,fTotalFeeValue ),
								
								bFeeExists := TRUE
							}
							ELSE
								ThrowWarning( "Fees","New fee not added" )
						}
					}
					ELSE
					{
						//otherwise clear automatic fees related to current fee type
						//i.e. if a fee has been calculated but is no longer valid because of a change of trade information
						//reset brokerage fee flag
						bFeeExists := FALSE,
						iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
						iFee := 0,
						WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
						{
							pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees,iFee ),
							bIsAutomatic := brkFlowIsFeeAutomatic( pFee ),
							sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
							sCurrentFeeCode := brkFlowGetCode( pFee ),
							IF ( ( sCurrentFeeType == sFeeType ) AND ( sCurrentFeeCode == sFeeCode ) AND ( ( sCurrentParty == sFeeParty ) OR ( sCurrentParty == sCounterparty ) ) ) THEN
							{
								//allow the insertion of new flows
								IF ( sCurrentFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
								{
									IF ( bIsAutomatic ) THEN
									{
										brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee ),
										iNbFees := iNbFees - 1,
										iFee := iFee - 1
									}
								}
							},
							iFee := iFee + 1
						}
					},
					
					fTotalFeeValue := 0.0,
					iResult := iResult + 1,
					
					//re-execute the sequence ONCE if the broker tax or clearer tax based on broker fee / clearer fee has not been calculated yet
					IF ( ( NOT bReExecuted ) 
					AND ( ( bCalculatedPercentageOfBrokerFee ) OR ( bCalculatedPercentageOfClearerFee ) )
					AND ( iNbResults == iResult ) ) THEN
					{
						iResult := 0,
						//flag that the sequence has already been re-executed
						bReExecuted := TRUE
					}
				},
				
				//if no matching fee destination or fee type, remove all fees
				IF ( iNbResults == 0 ) THEN
				{
					iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
					iFee := 0,
					WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
					{
						pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees,iFee ),
						bIsAutomatic := brkFlowIsFeeAutomatic( pFee ),
						sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
						
						IF ( sCurrentFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( bIsAutomatic ) THEN
							{
								brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee ),
								iNbFees := iNbFees - 1,
								iFee := iFee - 1
							}
						},
						iFee := iFee + 1
					}
				},
				
				//if has results but different flows are generated, clean up other flows types
				//scan the fees and remove any other fee types that are no longer valid
				iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ),
				iFee := 0,
				WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
				{
					pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees,iFee ),
					sCurrentFeeType := brkFlowGetType( pFee ),
					IF ( sCurrentFeeType == sClientFee ) THEN
						sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetSource( pFee )
					ELSE
						sCurrentParty := brkFlowGetDestination( pFee ),
					
					bIsAutomatic := brkFlowIsFeeAutomatic( pFee ),
					bIsValid := FALSE,
					
					iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
					iResult := 0,
					
					WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults ) DO
					{
						//retrieve the fee type and fee destination
						sFeeType := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,0 ),
						sFeeParty := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,1 ),
						
						IF ( sFeeType == sCurrentFeeType ) AND ( ( sFeeParty == sCurrentParty ) OR ( sFeeParty == "" ) ) THEN
							bIsValid := TRUE,
						
						iResult := iResult + 1 
					},
					
					IF ( sCurrentFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( NOT bIsValid ) AND ( bIsAutomatic ) THEN
						{
							brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee ),
							iNbFees := iNbFees - 1,
							iFee := iFee - 1
						},
                        //Bab Addition for spot-forward, in case of manual addition of fee amount and re-selection of broker --> only 1 fee should be created with the selected broker
                       //In case a fee was manually updated, i.e. non-automatic, and BROKER_FEE toggle is set to "No", remove broker flows
                      		bBrokerFlow := FALSE,
                            IF legIsElementValid(pComponent,"BROKER_FEE" ) THEN
                                   bBrokerFlow := legGetString(pComponent, "BROKER_FEE") == "No",
                                   
                       //bab ADDITION TO GENERATE BROKER FLOW FOR SAMA PURCHASE
                         IF sTypology == "SAMA Purchase" THEN
                         bBrokerFlow := FALSE,
                                   
                         IF bIsGenerateFeeSpot OR bBrokerFlow THEN
                         {                 			
                                //Remove fees if broker was changed or if BROKER_FEE is "No"
                                IF brkFlowGetDestination(pFee)<> legGetString(pComponent,"BROKER") OR legGetString(pComponent, "BROKER_FEE") == "No" THEN
                                {
                                    brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee ),
                                    iNbFees := iNbFees - 1,
                                    iFee := iFee - 1
                                }      
                          }
                        //End
					},
					iFee := iFee + 1
				},
                // BAB addition - Total Settlemetent amount for Equities
                IF sRegistration == "Equities" THEN
                {
                    fSettlementAmount := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Nominal"),
                    fFees := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Fee_amount"),
                    IF legGetString(pComponent,"Buy_Sell") == "Buy" THEN
                        fTotal := fSettlementAmount + fFees
                    ELSE
                        fTotal := fSettlementAmount - fFees,
                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"TOTAL_AMNT",fTotal)
                }
			},
			iContract := iContract + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Closing.LayA-ALL

/* MXpress
Layout assignment

Version 1.19
- Amend FDI context to be LINE context
- Remove the addition of suffix "HVA" in FX packages cases (when Independant margins = yes), as this layouts are not relevant anymore

Version 1.18
- To remove the multi leg swap references

Version 1.17
- Handles Funding Outright Packages

Version 1.16
- Updated to handle layout assignment in "curve" context

Version 1.15
- Correction to handle properly the context for orders sepcifically for fxd

Version 1.14
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","LayA") lookup table

Version 1.13
In case the leg is transposed, use the FDI context

Version 1.12
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.11
To handle the layout assignment for what-if trades or what-if orders conversion

Version 1.10
To handle the layout assignment for FX Swap Split Spot Hedge from FDI context

Version 1.9
To handle :
- the layout assignment for Orders and Trades appearing in the order Execution screen
- the availability to distinct the Processing / Trade / Insert trade context, then push the Booking layout

Version 1.8
To handle the layout assignment for new FXMM products from FDI context

Version 1.7
Correction on layout assignment for Strips in Capture context

Version 1.6
Amendment to be able assign different layouts for components of strategies

Version 1.5
- To handle a new context: CAPTURE and use the mx group profile instead the label of the mx group
- Correction on layout assignment for Strips

Version 1.4
To handle Basket Equity return swap

Version 1.3
To handle the layout assignment for FXMM products from FDI context

Version 1.2
Context can be FDI and enhancement of BOOKING (if ticket is displayed from simulation screen).

Version 1.1
Context can be one of BOOKING and PRICING. It is assigned using the action (INS, MOD?), the BOSource (event or not?) and the evaluation status (active or not?)

Version  1.0

Notes:
	1. This formula will make the adequate layout(s) available for different objects: Contract Components, STB Contracts, Strips.
	2. The layouts can be propagated:
			-- from the first son of a package to its siblings
			-- from an ancestor to descendants
	3. Look-Up Tables used: 
			-- ( MX.ALL.LayA-ALL, ALL ) returns the layout assignment
			-- ( MX.ALL.FieldMap, LayA ) returns the criteria used for layout assignment
			-- ( MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile, ALL ) is a utility LUT used to map the mx user group to user grpup profile (Sales or Trader)
*/

{
	//Get the pointer for source object. Source object can be a package, a stb contract or a contract component
	pSourceObject := This,
	
	//Field Initialization/Reset
	sContext := "",//Get the context of the action: from where is this formula excecuted
	sUserGroup := sysGetGroup( ),//Get user group. The default layout can be based on user group
	sUserProfile := "",
	bIsInFXDSequence := FALSE,
	iSonCounter := 0, 
	iNumOfObjectSons := 0,//number of sons of the source object
	bHasLayoutForAll := FALSE,
	sBORegistration := "",//Get BO Class registration label of source object
	sPropagateView := "",//In case the 1st son of source object is customized, fill the variable by the layout name of 1st son
	sFieldDefault := "Default",
	sDefaultView := "",//Default layout for all products & users
	sGroupDefaultView := "",//Specific default layout for the current user group
	sSourceSonBORegistre := "",
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sType := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	sPattern :="",
	sFieldName := "",
	sFieldValue := "",
	sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 := "",
	sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 := "",
	sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 := "",
	sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 := "",
	iLeg := 0,
	iResult := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	sView := "",
	sDefault := "",
	sQueryGroup := "",
	bPropagateFatherView := FALSE,
	iGrandSonCounter := 0,
	iNumCurrentGrandSons := 0,
	sFinalSonView := "",
	sCurrentGrandSonBORegistre := "",
	iFinalSonCounter := 0,
	iNumFinalSons := 0,
	
    //RFQ 
    sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pSourceObject),
    sRegistration := legGetRegistration(pSourceObject),
    
    IF sRegistration == "FX swap" THEN
    	sTypology := "FX Swap" 
    ELSE IF sPattern == "Depo CapFloorCollar" THEN
    	sTypology := legGetString(pSourceObject,"Typology")
    ELSE
    	sTypology := legGetTypology(pSourceObject),
    // End of BAB RFQ addition

    
	sPricingContext := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.pricing.context" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ), // possible values are INS, MOD and CNL
	sPricingSource := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.pricing.source"),
	sBOSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ),
	sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sIsInGenerateTradeScreen := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.insertTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sTradePurpose := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Trade purpose" ),
	sIsConversion := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.whatif.convert.mode"),
	bIsTransposed := legIsTransposed( pSourceObject ),
	
    //BAB addition: Check event class, to be used for assigning Requester restricted Layout, to prevent updating RFQ-impacting financial data during events on the generated contract
    bEventRFQ :=   sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXERCISE"
    			OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE"
                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_OFFSETTING"
                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_OFFSETTING"
                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_TERMINATE",

	legClearViews( pSourceObject ),
	
	IF ( sPricingContext == "FDI" ) OR ( bIsTransposed ) THEN
		sContext := "LINE"
