	ELSE IF (sPricingSource == "CURVE") THEN
		sContext := "CURVE"
    ELSE IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
	{
		sContext := "ORDER",
		IF (sIsConversion == "YES") THEN
			sContext := "ORDER_CONV"
	}
	ELSE IF (sIsConversion == "YES") THEN 
		sContext := "TRADE_CONV"        
	ELSE IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
		sContext := "ORDER"
	ELSE IF ( sBOClass == "mxOrderEventIEXECUTE_BOOK" ) THEN
		sContext := "EXECUTION"
        // RFQ ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

    // Split req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) AND ((sTypology == "Split Spot") OR (sTypology == "Split Outright")) THEN
                    sContext := "SPLT_RFQ_R" 
// Split pvd
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) AND ((sTypology == "Split Spot") OR (sTypology == "Split Outright"))  THEN
                    sContext := "SPLT_RFQ_P"   
// Time Option Split req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) AND (sTypology == "Split Time Opt") THEN
                    sContext := "TMOS_RFQ_R" 
// Time Option Split pvd
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) AND (sTypology == "Split Time Opt")  THEN
                    sContext := "TMOS_RFQ_P"        
//Spot req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL"OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Spot") THEN
                    sContext := "SPOT_RFQ_R"      
                    
//Bank note req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL"OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Banknotes" OR sTypology == "Banknotes Credit") THEN
                    sContext := "BN_RFQ_R"
 //Bank note pvd            
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Banknotes" OR sTypology == "Banknotes Credit") THEN
                    sContext := "BN_RFQ_P"   

//Spot pvd            
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Spot") THEN
sContext := "SPOT_RFQ_P" 
//Time Option req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL"OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Time Option") THEN
                    sContext := "TMEO_RFQ_R"             
//Time Option pvd            
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "Time Option") THEN
                    sContext := "TMEO_RFQ_P"                    
// Forward req           
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "FX Waad") THEN
                    sContext := "FWD_RFQ_R"             
//Forward pvd           
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "FX Waad") THEN
                    sContext := "FWD_RFQ_P"                       
//Sukuk req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) AND (sTypology == "Sukuk")  THEN
                    sContext := "SKUK_RFQ_R"   
//Sukuk pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) AND (sTypology == "Sukuk")  THEN
                    sContext := "SKUK_RFQ_P"      
// Wakala req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Wakala Borrowing")  THEN
                    sContext := "WKLA_RFQ_R"  
// Wakala pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Wakala Borrowing")  THEN
                    sContext := "WKLA_RFQ_P"
// CD Issuance req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "CD Issuance")  THEN
                    sContext := "CD_RFQ_R"  
// CD Issuance pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "CD Issuance")  THEN
                    sContext := "CD_RFQ_P"
// Split Forex Swap Package req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Forex Swap Package" ) AND (sTypology == "Split FX Swap")  THEN
                    sContext := "SWPS_RFQ_R"  
// Split Forex Swap Package pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Split Forex Swap Package" ) AND (sTypology == "Split FX Swap")  THEN
                    sContext := "SWPS_RFQ_P"    
// FX Swap req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "FX swap" ) AND (sTypology == "FX Swap") THEN
                    sContext := "SWP_RFQ_R"  
// FX Swap pvd
ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "FX swap" )AND (sTypology == "FX Swap") THEN
                    sContext := "SWP_RFQ_P"       
// MM Murabaha req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Murabaha Borrowing") THEN
                    sContext := "MRBH_RFQ_R"  
// MM Murabaha pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Murabaha Borrowing")THEN
                    sContext := "MRBH_RFQ_P"  
//FX Murabaha req
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "FX Murabaha") THEN
                    sContext := "FXMB_RFQ_R"             
//FX Murabaha pvd            
 ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) AND (sTypology == "FX Murabaha") THEN
                    sContext := "FXMB_RFQ_P"  
//Dep Cap Floor Collar req
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL" OR bEventRFQ) AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="REQUESTER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Depo CapFloorCollar") THEN
                    sContext := "CPFC_RFQ_R"  
// Depo Cap Floor Collar pvd
  ELSE IF (sPricingContext == "MAIL") AND (sysGetRFQRole ()=="PROVIDER") AND ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) AND (sTypology == "Depo CapFloorCollar")THEN
                    sContext := "CPFC_RFQ_P"

                          
   // End -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

        
	ELSE IF ( ( ( sPricingContext == "" ) AND ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen == "YES" ) ) 
	OR ( sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay == "YES" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING"
	ELSE IF ( ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource <> "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) ) 
	OR ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "PRICING"
	ELSE IF ( ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource == "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) )
	OR ( sAction <> "INS" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING"
	//For FX events, the booking views should be used
	ELSE IF ( ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIALLOCATION" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxICLOSE_OUT" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_MODIFY" ) 
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_OFFSETTING")
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_TERMINATE" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXERCISE" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_MODIFY" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_OFFSETTING" ) 
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPARTIAL_CANCEL")
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPOSITION_CLOSE_OUT" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPRORATA_UTILIZATION" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING",
	
	sUserProfile := lookupString( "MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
	bIsInFXDSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "C_FXD" ),
	//Get user group. The default layout can be based on user group.
	IF ((sTradePurpose <> "Order")  AND ( sUserProfile <> "" ) AND ( bIsInFXDSequence ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( sAction == "MOD" ) THEN
			sContext := "BOOKING"
		ELSE IF ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen == "YES" ) THEN
			sContext := "CAPTURE"
	},
	
	//Initialize variable: iNumOfObjectSons -- number of sons of the source object.
	iSonCounter := 0, 
	iNumOfObjectSons := legGetNumberOfSons( pSourceObject ),
	
	bHasLayoutForAll := FALSE,
	
	//Get BO Class registration label of source object. 
	//In case it's a Strip/STB contract/Contract component, the layouts can be pushed to source object.
	sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pSourceObject ),
    sContractRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel ( legGetFatherContract( legGetMainComponent(pSourceObject) ) ),
	sProductLabel := legGetProductLabel( pSourceObject ),
	
	bIsFXMMProduct := FALSE,
	IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) 
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAPPACKAGE" ) 
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" )
  	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGOUTRIGHT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractITRADE" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD_CONTRACT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFORWARD_AUTOSPOT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP_AUTOSPOT" ) ) THEN
		bIsFXMMProduct := TRUE,
	
	IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN
		bIsSTBContract := TRUE,
		
	IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" )
	OR ( bIsFXMMProduct ) ) THEN
	{
		bHasLayoutForAll := TRUE,
		iNumOfObjectSons := 1
	},
	
	//Initialize variable. sPropagateView -- In case the 1st son of source object is customized, fill the variable by the layout name of 1st son.
	sPropagateView := "",
	sFieldDefault := "Default",
	WHILE ( iSonCounter < iNumOfObjectSons ) DO
	{
		pCurrentSon := legGetSonAt( pSourceObject,iSonCounter ),
		IF ( bHasLayoutForAll ) THEN
		{
			pCurrentSon := pSourceObject,
			iSonCounter := iNumOfObjectSons
		},
		
		sDefaultView := "",//sDefaultView -- default layout for all products & users
		sGroupDefaultView := "",//sGroupDefaultView -- specific default layout for the current user group.
		sSourceSonBORegistre := legGetRegistrationLabel( pCurrentSon ),
		
		//Get the registration name of current object. It can be replaced by function legGetRegistration( pLeg )
		IF ( sSourceSonBORegistre == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentSon )
		ELSE IF ( bIsSTBContract ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pSourceObject )
		ELSE IF ( bIsFXMMProduct ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentSon )
		ELSE
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pCurrentSon ),
		
		IF ( bIsSTBContract ) THEN
			sPattern := sRegistration
		ELSE
			sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentSon ),
		
		//Get the specific fields which may have impact on the layouts 
		//To simplify the management, only one field can be used for each registration.
		sFieldName := "FieldName",
		sFieldValue := "FieldValue",
		pFieldResult := pNULL,
		sField := "LayA",
		pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
						"Registration",sRegistration,
						"Criteria 1",sFieldDefault ),
       
                        
                        //Bank Note addition BAB                
        IF (sRegistration == "Spot-Forward") THEN
        {
            sBankNote := legGetString( pCurrentSon, "BANK_NOTE"),
        	IF (sBankNote <> "") THEN 
        	legSetString (pCurrentSon, "Quantity_currency", sBankNote),
            
            
             IF(sPattern=="FX Forward" OR sPattern=="FX Forward Split") THEN
            {
             legSetIsCustomizedUsage(pCurrentSon,TRUE),
             sUsage := legGetUsage(legGetMainComponent(pSourceObject)),
             
             IF sUsage == "FX Murabaha" THEN
             sPattern := sUsage
             
                    }             
            
        },
		
		IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
		{
			//iLeg is the position of the concerned field. 0 -- current object, i -- ith son of current object.
			iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldResult,0,0 ) ),
			sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ),
			
			//Get field value
			IF ( iLeg == 0 ) THEN
				sFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentSon,sFieldName )
			ELSE
			{
				pCurrentSonComponent := legGetSonAt( pCurrentSon,iLeg - 1 ),
				sFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentSonComponent,sFieldName )
			}
		},
		
		IF ( sPattern == "Basket Swap Leg" ) THEN
		{
			sFieldName := "InBasket",
			pPackage := legGetFatherPackage(pCurrentSon),
			IF ( NOT ( isNull( pPackage ) ) ) THEN
				sFieldValue := "Yes"
			ELSE
				sFieldValue := ""
		},
		
		// To handle Split Package specificities
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
		{
			sFieldName := "Split method",
			sFieldValue := legGetString( pSourceObject,sFieldName ),
			IF ( sFieldValue == "2spots+2swaps" ) THEN
			{
				dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pSourceObject,"Pri swp maturity leg1" ),
				dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pSourceObject,"Pri swp maturity leg2" ),
				dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pSourceObject,"Sec swp maturity leg1" ),
				dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pSourceObject,"Sec swp maturity leg2" ),
				IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 )
				AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
					sFieldValue := "2spots+1secswap"
				ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 )
				AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
					sFieldValue := "2spots+1primswap"
				ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 )
				AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
				{
					sFieldValue := "2spots",
					sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Prim swp Scnd delivery1" ),
					sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Prim swp Scnd delivery2" ),
					sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Sec swp Scnd delivery1"),
					sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Sec swp Scnd delivery2" ),
					IF ( ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" )
					OR ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
						sFieldValue := "2spots+1primswap"
					ELSE IF ( ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" )
					OR ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
						sFieldValue := "2spots+1secswap"
				}
			}
			ELSE IF  ( sFieldValue == "1spot+2swaps" ) THEN
			{ 
				sHedge := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Hedge" ),
				IF ( sHedge == "Swap hedge" ) THEN
					sFieldValue := "2swaps"
			}
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) THEN
		{
			sFieldName := "Hedge",
			sFieldValue := legGetString( pSourceObject,sFieldName )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN
		{
			sFieldName := "HedgePrimSec",
			sFieldValue := legGetString( pSourceObject,"Spot hedge primary" ) + legGetString( pSourceObject,"Spot hedge secondary" )
		},
		
		sCurrentComponentRegistration := legGetRegistration(pCurrentSon),
		
		//Get possible layouts
		pViewResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.LayA-ALL","ALL",
								"Context",sContext,
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Pattern",sPattern,
								"Field Name",sFieldName,
								"Field Value",sFieldValue ),
		IF ( toString( pViewResults ) <> "0" ) THEN 
		{
			pArrayView := arrayNew( ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pArrayView,"View",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pArrayView,"Registration",FALSE,FALSE ),
			
			iResult := 0,
			iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pViewResults ),
			WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults )  DO 
			{
				sView := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,iResult,0 ),
				sDefault := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,iResult,1 ),
				sQueryGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,iResult,2 ),
				sComponentRegistration := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,iResult,3 ),
				
				pElement := arrayAddElement( pArrayView ),
				arrayElementSetString( pElement,"View",sView ),
				arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Registration",sComponentRegistration ),
				
				//Check if the current object is the first son of source object and it's customized.
				IF ( iSonCounter == 0 ) AND ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pCurrentSon,"View" ) ) THEN
					sPropagateView := legGetString( pCurrentSon,"View" ),
				
				IF ( bIsSTBContract ) THEN
				{
					IF ( iNbResults > 1 ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sComponentRegistration == sCurrentComponentRegistration ) THEN
						{
							sDefaultView := sView,
							sPropagateView := sView,
							legAddView( pCurrentSon,sView ),
							legOverwrite( pCurrentSon,"View",sView ),
							iResult := iNbResults
						}
					}
					ELSE IF ( iNbResults == 1 ) THEN
					{
						sDefaultView := sView,
						sPropagateView := sView,
						legAddView( pCurrentSon,sView )
					}
				}
				ELSE 
				{
					//only the layouts for user group or for all users will be added to view list.
					IF ( sQueryGroup == "" ) OR ( sQueryGroup == sUserProfile ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sDefaultView == "" ) THEN
							sDefaultView := sView,
						
						IF ( sDefault == "Yes" ) THEN
						{
							sDefaultView := sView,
							IF ( sQueryGroup == sUserProfile ) THEN
								sGroupDefaultView := sView
						},
						
						legAddView( pCurrentSon,sView )
					}
				},
				iResult := iResult + 1
			}
		},
		
		//Propagate the layout of the first son of source object if its view is customized.
		IF ( strLength( sPropagateView ) > 0 )
		AND ( iSonCounter > 0 )
		AND ( NOT legIsAttributeCustomized( pCurrentSon,"View" ) ) THEN
		{
			legAddView( pCurrentSon,sPropagateView ),
			legOverwrite( pCurrentSon,"View",sPropagateView )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sDefaultView <> "" ) THEN
		{
			//push proper default layout for user
			IF ( strLength( sGroupDefaultView ) > 0 ) THEN
				sDefaultView := sGroupDefaultView,
			
			IF ( legGetString( pCurrentSon,"View" ) == "" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pCurrentSon,"View",sDefaultView )
			ELSE
				legSetString( pCurrentSon,"View",sDefaultView )
		},
		
		iSonCounter := iSonCounter + 1
	},
	
	iContract := 0,
	iNbContracts :=  legGetNumberOfContracts( pSourceObject ),
	WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
	{
		pContract := legGetContractAt( pSourceObject,iContract ),
		sContRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
		
		iArray := 0,
		iNbArrayElements := arrayGetLenght( pArrayView ),
		WHILE ( iArray < iNbArrayElements ) DO
		{
			pElementI := arrayGetElement( pArrayView,iArray ),
			sTmpView := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"View" ),
			sTmpRegistration := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"Registration" ),
			
			IF ( sTmpRegistration == sContRegistration ) 
			OR ( sProductLabel == "Strip" )
			OR ( strStartsWith( sProductLabel, "On The Fly" ) ) THEN
			{
				legAddView( pContract,sTmpView ),
				legOverwrite( pContract,"View",sTmpView )
			},
			iArray := iArray + 1 
		},
		iContract := iContract + 1
	},
	
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents :=  legGetNumberOfComponents( pSourceObject ),
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pSourceObject,iComponent ),
		sCompRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		
	   iArray := 0,
		iNbArrayElements := arrayGetLenght( pArrayView ),
		WHILE ( iArray < iNbArrayElements ) DO
		{
			pElementI := arrayGetElement( pArrayView,iArray ),
			sTmpView := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"View" ),
			sTmpRegistration := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"Registration" ),
			
		IF ( sTmpRegistration == sCompRegistration ) 
		OR ( sProductLabel == "Strip" )
		OR ( strStartsWith( sProductLabel, "On The Fly" ) ) THEN
			{
				legAddView( pComponent,sTmpView ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"View",sTmpView )
			},
			iArray := iArray + 1 
		},
		
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
	
	sSourceObjectRegistration := legGetRegistration( pSourceObject ),
	sSourceObjectRegistrationLabel :=  legGetRegistrationLabel( pSourceObject ),
	IF ( sSourceObjectRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractStbIREGISTERED_PACKAGE" ) THEN
	{
		iArray := 0,
		iNbArrayElements := arrayGetLenght( pArrayView ),
		
		WHILE ( iArray < iNbArrayElements ) DO
		{
			pElementI := arrayGetElement( pArrayView,iArray ),
			sTmpView := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"View" ),
			sTmpRegistration := arrayElementGetString( pElementI,"Registration" ),
			
			IF ( ( iNbArrayElements == 1 ) OR ( sTmpRegistration == sSourceObjectRegistration ) ) THEN
			{
				legAddView( pSourceObject,sTmpView ),
				legOverwrite( pSourceObject,"View",sTmpView ),
				iArray := iNbArrayElements
			},
			
			iArray := iArray + 1 
		}
	},
	
	arrayFree( pArrayView )
};

//mx.preTrade.completion.COM.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
COM short text description rule

Used algorithm
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty then
		Build each part of the description separately 
		Retrieve for all COM products
		If registration belongs to commodities options then
			Retrieve Premium, premium unit, payout and option expiry accordingly
		Else 
			retrieve relevant maturity value according to each registration
		End if
		Retrieve the price and strike depending on commodities options and other registrations
		Retrieve the relevant quotation and quotation label for each registration
		If registration has a floating second leg then
			retrieve the margin and quotation lbel of the second leg
		End if
		Retrieve the delivery flag for registration having physical delivery feature
		If registration is capacity or transport then
			Retrieve the route to build the location description accordingly
		Else if physical delivery is enabled then
			Retrieve the location and build the location description accordingly
		End if
		Build the blotter description as concatenation of 
			Buy/Sell, nominal , nominal unit, payout , instrument, strike or price and quotation label
		If registration belongs to commodities options then
			Append the description of premium and option expiry
		Else
			Append the location and maturity descriptions
		End if
		Retrieve the total quantity value and delivery quantity for all registrations
		Build the total quantity decription accordingly
		Then concatenate the total quantity description to the blotter description
		Store built short description in the DIST_DESC UDF
	End if
End if

Version 1.8
- for options : display the absolute value of the premium
- enhancement on the maturity message


Version 1.7
- Applied MSL best practices
- Deletion of Compound Option

Version 1.6
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Payout"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Strike"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Quotation") lookup tables

Version 1.5
Amended to take into account COM Cleared asian registration

Version 1.4
Update registration of COM Option on future - Listed
Adapt formula to double index spot/forward (gold vs. silver)

Version 1.3
Amended to take into account COM Physical Forward registration

Version 1.2
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.1
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version  1.0
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter and in the mail communication
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			// Header of the text description
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
			
			iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
			iComponent := 0,
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
				
				// Field Initialization/Reset
				sRegistration := "",
				sSellOrBuy := "",
				sInstrumentField := "",
				sInstrument := "",
				fNominal := 0.0,
				sNominal := "",
				sNominalUnit := "",
				sMaturityLabel:= "",
				sInstrument := "",
				sIsComOption := "",
				fTotalPremium := 0.0,
				sTotalPremium := "",
				sPremiumUnit := "",
				sPayout := "",
				sOptionExpiry := "",
				sMaturity := "",
				sStrikeLabel := "",
				sStrikeField := "",
				fStrikeField := 0.0,
				sStrikeField := "",
				sCurrency := "",
				sQuotationLabel1 := "",
				sQuotation2Field := "",
				sLegType2 := "",
				sQuotationLabel2 := "",
				fPrice_Margin2 := 0.0,
				sMargin2Desc := "",
				sCashDelivery := "",
				sCashOrPhysical := "",
				sExercise1 := "",
				sRouteSource := "",
				sRouteDest := "",
				sLocationDesc := "",
				sBlotterDescription := "",
				fQuantity := 0.0,
				sTotalQuantity := "",
				sDeliveryQty := "",
				sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := "",
				
				// Build the text
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
				sSellOrBuy := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy_Sell" ) + " ",
                
                pFieldResult := pNULL,
                sField := "Nominal",
                pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                "Registration",sRegistration,
                                "Criteria 1","",
                                "Criteria 2","",
                                "Criteria 3","" ),
                IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
                {
                    sNominalField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
                },
                fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sNominalField ),                
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,0,TRUE,0 ) + " ",
                pFieldResult := pNULL,
                sField := "NominalUnit",
                pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                "Registration",sRegistration,
                                "Criteria 1","",
                                "Criteria 2","",
                                "Criteria 3","" ),
                IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
                {
                    sNominalUnitField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
                },
                sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent, sNominalUnitField ),
				pFieldResult := pNULL,
				sField := "Instrument",
				pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria 1","",
								"Criteria 2","",
								"Criteria 3","" ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
				{
					sInstrumentField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
				},
				
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sInstrumentField ),
				IF ( sNominalUnit == "LOTS" ) THEN
				{
					sMaturityLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sInstrument := sMaturityLabel + " on " + sInstrument
				},
				sNominalUnit := sNominalUnit + " ",
				sInstrument := sInstrument + " ",
				
				// Maturity description
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Asian" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared asian" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - Listed" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - OTC" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swaption" ) ) THEN
				{
					sIsComOption := "Yes",
					fTotalPremium := abs(legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Flat_settlement" ) ),
					sTotalPremium := toString( fTotalPremium,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
					sPremiumUnit := legGetString ( pComponent,"Flat_settl_unit" ),
					pFieldResult := pNULL,
					sField := "Payout",
					pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Criteria 1","",
									"Criteria 2","",
									"Criteria 3","" ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
					{
						sPayoutField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
					},
					
					sPayout := legGetString ( pComponent,sPayoutField ) + " ",
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - Listed" ) OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared asian" ) ) THEN
						sPayout := sPayout + "on "
				},
				
				// To retrieve the maturity
				pFieldResult := pNULL,
				sField := "Maturity",
				pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria 1","",
								"Criteria 2","",
								"Criteria 3","" ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
				{
					sFieldDate := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ),
					sFieldType := legGetFieldType( pComponent,sFieldDate ),
					IF ( sFieldType == "date" ) THEN
						dOptionExpiry := legGetDate( pComponent,sFieldDate )
					ELSE
						sMaturity := legGetString( pComponent,sFieldDate )
				},
				sOptionExpiry := " Expiry on " + toString1( dOptionExpiry ) + ".",
				//to handle Start and End period if needed
				IF ( ( sMaturity == "" ) OR ( sMaturity == " " ) ) THEN
				{
					pFieldResultStart := pNULL,
					sField := "Maturity",
					pFieldResultStart := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria 1","Start" ,
										"Criteria 2","",
										"Criteria 3","" ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResultStart ) ) THEN
						dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResultStart,0,1 ) ),
					pFieldResultLast := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria 1","Last" ,
										"Criteria 2","",
										"Criteria 3","" ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResultLast ) ) THEN
						dEndDate := legGetDate( pComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResultLast,0,1 ) ),
					IF ( dStartDate <> dNULL ) AND ( dEndDate <> dNULL ) THEN
						sMaturity := " Period from " + toString1( dStartDate ) + " to " + toString1( dEndDate ) + "."
				}
				ELSE
					sMaturity := " Period " + sMaturity + ".",
				
				// Strike or price field description
				IF ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) THEN
					sCommodityVs := legGetString( pComponent,"Commodity vs." ),
				
				pFieldResult := pNULL,
				sField := "Strike",
				pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria 1",sCommodityVs,
								"Criteria 2","",
								"Criteria 3","" ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
				{
					sStrikeField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ),
					IF ( sStrikeField <> "" ) THEN
					{
						fStrikeField := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sStrikeField ),
						sStrikeField := toString( fStrikeField,8,2,TRUE,0 )
					}
				},
				IF ( sIsComOption == "Yes" ) THEN
					sStrikeLabel := "Strike "
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) THEN
					sStrikeLabel := " at a price of "
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration <> "COM transport" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "COM Capacity" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "COM Buy and Sell Back" )) THEN
					sStrikeLabel := "Price "
                ELSE
                {
                	sStrikeLabel := "Rate ",
                    sStrikeField := "Net_financing_rate",
                    fStrikeField := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sStrikeField ),
					sStrikeField := toString( fStrikeField,8,2,TRUE,0 )
                },                   				
				// Cash or physical description
				IF ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option") THEN
				{
					sCashDelivery := legGetString( pComponent,"Option_exercise" ),
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sCashDelivery,"elivery" ) ) THEN
						sCashOrPhysical := "Delivery"
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Forward" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) ) THEN
				{
					sExercise1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Exercise1" ),
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sExercise1,"elivery" ) ) THEN
						sCashOrPhysical := "Delivery"
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Physical forward" ) THEN
					sCashOrPhysical := "Delivery",
				
				// Quotation and margin description
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) OR ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" ) ) THEN
				{
					sPhysical := legGetString( pComponent,"Deliverable" ),
					sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
					sQuotationUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation_unit" ),
					IF ( sCommodityVs == "Commodity" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sCashOrPhysical == "Delivery" ) THEN
						{
							sQuotationLabel1 := " " + sQuotationUnit + " of " + sCurrency + " per " + sQuotationUnit + " of " + sPhysical
						}
						ELSE
						{
							sFirstIndex := strSubString( legGetString( pComponent,"Index" ), 0, 2),
							sSecondIndex := strSubString( legGetString( pComponent,"Second index" ), 0, 2),
							sQuotationLabel1 := " " + sQuotationUnit + " of " + sSecondIndex + " per " + sQuotationUnit + " of " + sFirstIndex
						}
					}
					ELSE
						sQuotationLabel1 := " " + sCurrency + "/" + sQuotationUnit
			 	}
				ELSE
				{
					pFieldResult := pNULL,
					sField := "Quotation",
					pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Criteria 1","",
									"Criteria 2","",
									"Criteria 3","" ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
					{
						sQuotationLabel1Field := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ),
						sQuotationLabel1 := legGetString( pComponent,sQuotationLabel1Field ),
						sQuotation2Field := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,2 ),
						IF sQuotation2Field <> "" THEN
							legGetString( pComponent,sQuotation2Field ),
						IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
						OR ( sRegistration == "COM Capacity" )
						OR ( sRegistration == "COM transport" )
						OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swaption" )
						OR ( sRegistration == "COM Physical forward" ) ) THEN
						{
							sLegType2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg_type2" ),
							IF ( sLegType2 == "Floating" ) THEN
							{
								sStrikeField := "",
								sStrikeLabel := "",
								sQuotationLabel2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation_label2" ),
								fPrice_Margin2 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price_Margin2" ),
								IF (  fPrice_Margin2 > 0.0 ) THEN
									sMargin2Desc := " plus a margin " + toString( fPrice_Margin2,8,2,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sQuotationLabel2
								ELSE IF (  fPrice_Margin2 < 0.0 ) THEN
									sMargin2Desc := " minus a margin " + toString( ABS( fPrice_Margin2 ),8,2,TRUE,0 ) + " "+ sQuotationLabel2
								ELSE
									sMargin2Desc := " without margin"
							}
						}
					}
				},
				
				// Location description
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Capacity" ) OR ( sRegistration == "COM transport" ) ) THEN 
				{
					// route handling
					sRouteSource := legGetString( pComponent,"Route_Source" ),
					sRouteDest := legGetString( pComponent,"Route_Destination" ),
					IF ( ( sRouteSource <> "" ) AND ( sRouteDest <> "" ) ) THEN
					{
						sRouteSource := " on route from " + sRouteSource,
						sRouteDest := " to " + sRouteDest,
						sLocationDesc := sRouteSource + sRouteDest
					}
					ELSE
						sLocationDesc := " on route " + legGetString( pComponent,"Route" )
				}
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sCashOrPhysical == "Delivery" ) THEN
						sLocationDesc := " at location " + legGetString( pComponent,"Location" )
				},
				sLocationDesc := sLocationDesc + " ",
				
				// Blotter description
				sBlotterDescription := sSellOrBuy + sNominal + sNominalUnit + sPayout + sInstrument + sStrikeLabel + sStrikeField + " " + sQuotationLabel1,
				IF ( sIsComOption == "Yes" ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + ". Premium of " + sTotalPremium + " " + sPremiumUnit + ".",
					IF ( NOT strContain( strToUpperCase( sRegistration ),"ASIAN" ) ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sOptionExpiry
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sMaturity
				}
				ELSE
					sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + sLocationDesc + sMaturity,
				
				// Total quantity of trade
                pFieldResult := pNULL,
                sField := "Nominal",
                pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                "Registration",sRegistration,
                                "Criteria 1","",
                                "Criteria 2","",
                                "Criteria 3","" ),
                IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
                {
                    sNominalField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
                },
                fQuantity := legGetNumeric ( pComponent, sNominalField ),                
				sTotalQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
                pFieldResult := pNULL,
                sField := "NominalUnit",
                pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                "Registration",sRegistration,
                                "Criteria 1","",
                                "Criteria 2","",
                                "Criteria 3","" ),
                IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
                {
                    sNominalUnitField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
                },
                sDeliveryQty := legGetString( pComponent, sNominalUnitField ),               
				sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " Total quantity " + sTotalQuantity + " " + sDeliveryQty,
				
				// Blotter and communication
				IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 250 ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
				ELSE
				{
					sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription, 0, 249 ),
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
					ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc COM rule )","DIST_DESC" )
				},
				
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

		Add property accordingly
	End if
	Add properties for fees as a function of their types
End loop

- Add a miniscule update for barrier handling to test for both NO (COM Simple Option) and None (COM Asian)
- Add forward start feature for COM Simple Option
- Add handling of time series for swap-based products
- Improve basket underlyings
- Adding fee handling

Version 1.5
- If the Communication or the Tradability check are active, the tradability check property is added
- Minor changes to be inline with barrier management

Version 1.4
- Update volume profile detection method due to MX.3 update (detect Volume profile_type1 instead of Volume profile1 (and similar for -2)
- Add a property detection to show/hide either Volume_profile1 or Volume_details1 as a function of Volume profile_type1 (and similar for -2)
- Update all variable declarations to reflect the actual variables names (remove "Leg0")
- Add detection of Product Assignment flag, for future use
- Improve the nominal unit versus quotation unit verification
- Replace the temporary lookup table with a call to legGetRegistration function

Version 1.3
- Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.2
- Update exercise mode with modificiations due to MX.3 update (remove streamsFutGetExercizeMode, harmonize fields "Exercise1" and "Option exercise" for all Registrations)

Version 1.1
- Add a loop on components in order to handle new STB contracts
- Add COM Swaption registration
- Amendments performed to resolve a few inconsistencies related to the handling of the cleared swap, transport and simple option

Version 1.0
Notes:
LUT used:
( MX.ALL.FCCLabel, ALL) is a utility LUT used to map Family/Group/Type to registration
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),//Number of components
	iComponent := 0,//Initialization of the component index
	sExercise := "",
	sVolumeProfileType := "",
	sStandard := "Standard",
	sCustom := "OTC",
	sUnderlying := "",
	sQuotation :=  "",
	sCurrencyIndex1 := "",
	sNominalUnit := "",
	sQuotationUnit := "",
	fPriceConversion := 0.0,
	sCustomizedFlows := "",
	sPhysFin := "",
	bIsDelivered := FALSE,
	sPayout := "",
	sNature := "",
	sBarrierType := "",
	sForwardStart := "",
	
	// loop on all components
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		
		// Reset the Field Properties for the component
		legResetProperties( pComponent ),
		
		// SWAP  - except Cleared Swap, handle with Future - Dynamic layout
		IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM Capacity" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM transport" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swaption" ) ) THEN
		{
			sLeg1Nature := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
			sLeg2Nature := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			pStreamsGenerator := streamsGetGenerator( pStreams ),
			// product assignment: if this is the case the behaviour changes profoundly, because the trade is physically driven, index is assigned via product/location/quality.
			// bProductAssigment := streamsGeneratorGetProperty( pStreamsGenerator,"useProductAssignment" ),
			sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
			pNominalUnit := mx.system.object.PushByLabel( "mx.Statics.Commodities.Unit",sNominalUnit ),
			pNominalStockUnit := mx.statics.commodities.Unit.GetStockUnit( pNominalUnit ),
			IF ( isNull( pNominalStockUnit ) ) THEN
				sNominalStockUnit := sNominalUnit
			ELSE
				sNominalStockUnit := mx.statics.commodities.Unit.GetLabel( pNominalStockUnit ),
			
			IF ( sLeg1Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				// Delivery exercise
				sExercise := legGetString( pComponent, "Exercise1" ),
				IF ( sExercise == "Physical delivery" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" ),
				
				// Delivery profile
				sVolumeProfileType := legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile_type1" ),
				IF ( sVolumeProfileType <> "" ) THEN
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.2_dlvProfile" ),
					IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sStandard ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.4_dlvProfileStandard" )
					ELSE IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sCustom ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.5_dlvProfileCustom" )
					ELSE
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.6_dlvProfileTimeSerie" )
				},
				
				// Underlying
				pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex1 ) 
					AND ( sRegistration <> "COM transport" )
					AND ( sRegistration <> "COM Capacity" ) ) THEN	// for capa/transport, no interest to show the index and details
					{
						sIndexResetMode := indexGetResetMode( pIndex1 ),
						iIndexNumCmp := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex1 ),
						sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent,"Underlying1" ),
						IF ( sUnderlying <> "" ) THEN
						{
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" ),
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.3_obsSampling" )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" ),
							IF ( sIndexResetMode == "Basket" ) THEN
							{
								legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.6_obsHasDetails" ),
								IF ( iIndexNumCmp <= 2 ) THEN
									legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.7_obsBasketDetails" )
							}
						},
						// Indexation
						sQuotation :=  legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation1" ),
						sCurrencyIndex1 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
						IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex1 ) THEN
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" )
					}
				},
				
				// Nominal unit
				sQuotationUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"QuotationUnit1" ),
				IF ( sNominalStockUnit <> sQuotationUnit ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.5_obsUnit" ),
				
				// Price conversion
				fPriceConversion := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price conversion1" ),
				IF ( fPriceConversion <> 0.00 ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.3_dlvUnit" ),
				
				// Flows
				sCustomizedFlows := legGetString( pComponent,"Customized Flows" ),
				IF ( sCustomizedFlows == "Yes" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.3.1_flowCustomized" ),
				
				// Depending on type of second leg
				IF ( sLeg2Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
				{
					// Underlying
					sLeg2Underlying := legGetString( pComponent, "Underlying2" ),
					IF ( sLeg2Underlying <> "" ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.3_obsSampling" )
					ELSE
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" )
				}
			},
			
			IF ( sLeg2Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				// Delivery exercise
				sExercise := legGetString( pComponent, "Exercise2" ),
				IF ( sExercise == "Physical delivery" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" ),
				
				// Delivery profile
				sVolumeProfileType := legGetString( pComponent, "Volume profile_type2" ),
				IF ( sVolumeProfileType <> "" ) THEN
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent, "com_4.1.2_dlvProfile" ),
					
					IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sStandard ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.1.4_dlvProfileStandard" )
					ELSE IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sCustom ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.1.5_dlvProfileCustom" )
					ELSE
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.1.6_dlvProfileTimeSerie" )
				},
				
				// Underlying
				pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,1 ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream2 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex2 := streamGetIndex( pStream2 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexResetMode:=indexGetResetMode(pIndex2),
						iIndexNumCmp:=indexGetNumberOfComponents(pIndex2),
						sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent, "Underlying2" ),
						IF ( sUnderlying <> "" ) THEN
						{
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" ),
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.3_obsSampling" )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" ),
							IF ( sIndexResetMode == "Basket" ) THEN
							{
								legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.6_obsHasDetails" ),
								IF ( iIndexNumCmp <= 2 ) THEN
									legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.2.7_obsBasketDetails" )
							}
						},
						
						// Indexation
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation2" ),
						sCurrencyIndex2 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex2 ),
						IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex2 ) THEN
							legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" )
					}
				},
				
				// Nominal unit
				sQuotationUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"QuotationUnit2" ),
				IF ( sNominalStockUnit <> sQuotationUnit ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.5_obsUnit" ),
				
				// Price conversion
				fPriceConversion := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price conversion2" ),
				IF ( fPriceConversion <> 0.00 ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.3_dlvUnit" ),
				
				// Flows
				sCustomizedFlows := legGetString( pComponent,"Customized Flows" ),
				IF ( sCustomizedFlows == "Yes" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.3.1_flowCustomized" )
			}
			ELSE // fixed price leg
			{
				// fixed price type (only when we have a profiled delivery
				sVolumeProfileType := legGetString( pComponent,"Volume profile_type1" ),
				IF sVolumeProfileType <> "" THEN
				{
					sFixedPriceType:=legGetString( pComponent,"Fixed price type" ),
					IF ( sFixedPriceType == sCustom ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.1.9.1_PriceProfileCustom" )
					ELSE IF ( sFixedPriceType == "Time series" ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_4.1.9.2_PriceProfileTimeSerie" )
				}
			}
		}
		
		// ASIAN Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Asian" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared Asian" ) ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.1_optStyle" ),
			
			IF ( sRegistration <> "COM Cleared Asian" ) THEN
			{
				sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier type" ),
				IF ( sBarrierType <> "" ) AND  ( sBarrierType <> "None" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.2_optExoticity" ),
				
				sForwardStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
				IF ( sForwardStart == "Yes" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.4_optFwdStart" ),
					
				sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
				IF ( ( sPayout <> "Cap" ) AND ( sPayout <> "Floor" ) ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.2_optExoticity" ),
					
				// Delivery profile (not yet implemented for Asian but coming soon)
				sVolumeProfileType := "",
				IF ( sVolumeProfileType <> "" ) THEN
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.2_dlvProfile" ),
					IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sStandard ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.4_dlvProfileStandard" )
					ELSE IF ( sVolumeProfileType == sCustom ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.5_dlvProfileCustom" )
					ELSE
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.6_dlvProfileTimeSerie" )
				}
					
			},
			sLeg1Nature := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
			IF ( sLeg1Nature == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				// Underlying
				sUnderlying := legGetString( pComponent,"Underlying" ),
				IF ( sUnderlying <> "" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.3_obsSampling" )
				ELSE
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.2_obsMarkerTypeBasket" ),
				
				// Indexation
				pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
				pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
				pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
				sCurrencyIndex1 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
				sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation" ),
				IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex1 ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" ),
				
				// Flows
				sCustomizedFlows := legGetString( pComponent,"Customized Flows" ),
				IF ( sCustomizedFlows == "Yes" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.3.1_flowCustomized" )
			}
		}
		
		// Future, Forward and  Cleared swap Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Future" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM Forward" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared swap" ) ) THEN
		{
			sPhysFin := legGetString( pComponent,"Exercise1" ),
			bIsDelivered := sPhysFin == "Physical delivery" ,
			IF ( bIsDelivered ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" ),
			// Future lookalikes in Forwards
			IF ( sRegistration == "COM Forward" ) THEN
			{
				sSinglePeriod := legGetString( pComponent,"Single period" ),
				IF ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.8_lookAlike" ),
               	
               	// Indexation
                pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
                pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
                    sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation_currency" ),
                    sCurrencyIndex1 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
                    IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex1 ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" ),
                        sCurrencyType := legGetString( pComponent,"Multi_currency_type1" ),
                        IF ( sCurrencyType == "Quanto" ) THEN
                        	legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.9_quanto" )
                     } 
                 }
			}
		}
		
		// Physical Forward Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Physical Forward" ) THEN
		{
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,1 ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pStream2 ) ) THEN
			{
				pIndex2 := streamGetIndex( pStream2 ),    
				IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
				{
					// Indexation
					sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation2" ),
					sCurrencyIndex2 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex2 ),
					IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex2 ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_7.1_PhysFwdInd" )
				}
			},
			
			sSchedulesLink := legGetString( pComponent,"Schedules_link" ),
			IF ( sSchedulesLink == "Independent sets across legs" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_7.2_PhysFwdSched" ),
			
			// Number of items
			sForm := legGetString( pComponent, "Form1" ),
			IF ( sForm <> "" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.8_dlvPhysicalDetails" )
		}
		
		//  Option on Future Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - Listed"
		OR sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - OTC" ) ) THEN
		{
			sNature := legGetString( pComponent,"Nature" ),
			IF ( sNature == "Spread" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.2_optExoticity" ),
			
			sPhysFin := legGetString( pComponent,"Exercise1" ),
			bIsDelivered := sPhysFin == "Physical delivery" ,
			IF ( bIsDelivered ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" ),
           	
           	// Future lookalikes in Option on Future - OTC
			IF ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - OTC" ) THEN
			{                
            	// Indexation
                pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
                pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
                    sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Quotation_currency" ),
                    sCurrencyIndex1 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
                    IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex1 ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" ),
                        sCurrencyType := legGetString( pComponent,"Multi_currency_type1" ),
                        IF ( sCurrencyType == "Quanto" ) THEN
                        	legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.9_quanto" )
                     } 
                 }
			}
		}
		
		// Simple Option Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" ) THEN
		{
			// Physical delivery vs. cash settlement
			sExercise := legGetString( pComponent, "Option exercise" ),
			IF ( sExercise == "Physical Delivery" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" )
			ELSE
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__11.1_SimpleOptionCash" ),
			// Display additional fields in case a form is selected (number of items)
			sForm := legGetString( pComponent,"Form1" ),
			IF ( sForm <> "" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.8_dlvPhysicalDetails"),
			// Precious metals vs. other assets
			sAsset := legGetString( pComponent,"COM_Asset" ),
			// For precious metals, change the layout depending on spot or forward maturity
			IF ( sAsset == "PMT" ) THEN
			{
				sMaturity := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Option_expiration_period" ) ),
				dDeliveryDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start_date" ),
				dSpotDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Settl flow date" ),
				bIsSpot := ( strCONTAIN( sMaturity,"spot" ) OR ( dDeliveryDate <= dSpotDate ) ),
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.1_PreciousSpot" ),
				IF ( NOT bIsSpot ) THEN
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__11.2_SimpleOptionFwdMaturity" ),
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.2_PreciousForward" )
				}
			}
			// For non precious metals, display only the forward price
			ELSE
			{
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__11.2_SimpleOptionFwdMaturity" )
			},
			
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
			pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
			sCurrencyIndex1 := indexGetCurrency( pIndex1 ),
			sQuotation :=  legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
			IF ( sQuotation <> sCurrencyIndex1 ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.2.4_obsIndexation" ),
			
			sBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Barriers Type" ),
			IF ( sBarrierType <> "" ) AND ( sBarrierType <> "None" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.2_optExoticity" ),
			
			sFwdStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
			IF ( sFwdStart  == "Yes" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_2.4_optFwdStart" )
		}
		
		// Spot Forward Dynamic layout
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" ) THEN
		{
			// Physical delivery vs. cash settlement
			sExercise := legGetString( pComponent, "Exercise1" ),
			IF ( sExercise == "Physical delivery" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.1_dlvExercise" )
			ELSE
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_8.1_SpotFwdCash" ),
			// Display additional fields in case a form is selected (number of items)
			sForm := legGetString( pComponent, "Form1" ),
			IF ( sForm <> "" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_3.1.8_dlvPhysicalDetails" ),
			// Precious metals vs. other assets
			sAsset := legGetString( pComponent,"COM_Asset" ),
			// For precious metals, change the layout depending on spot or forward maturity
			IF ( sAsset == "PMT" ) THEN
			{
				sMaturity := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Swap_start_delay" ) ),
				dDeliveryDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Physical_Delivery" ),
				dSpotDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Settl flow date" ),
				sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
				bIsSpot := ( strCONTAIN( sMaturity,"spot" ) OR ( dDeliveryDate<=dSpotDate ) ),
				// Paper trading layout follows specific rules
				IF ( sPattern == "Spot Forward Paper" ) THEN
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_8.2_FwdMaturity" ),
					IF ( NOT bIsSpot ) THEN
					{
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.1_PreciousSpot" ),
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.2_PreciousForward" )
					}
				}
				// For all other precious metal cases
				ELSE
				{
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.1_PreciousSpot" ),
					IF ( NOT bIsSpot ) THEN
					{
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_8.2_FwdMaturity" ),
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"com__10.2_PreciousForward" )
					}
				}
			}
			// For non precious metals, display only the forward price
			ELSE
			{
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_8.2_FwdMaturity" )
			},
			// Sales margin
			fSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Sales_margin2" ),
			IF ( fSalesMargin <> 0.0 ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_9_SalesMargin" )
		},
		
		// Brokerage fees handling
		// Fee 1 - 4
		sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Fee type" ),
		IF ( sFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_6.1.1.1_fee1" ),
		sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Fee type 2" ),
		IF ( sFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_6.1.1.2_fee2" ),
		sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Fee type 3" ),
		IF ( sFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_6.1.1.3_fee3" ),
		sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Fee type 4" ),
		IF ( sFeeType <> "None" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pComponent,"com_6.1.1.4_fee4" ),

		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "COM") 	
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Closing.FCpl

/*
MXpress
EQD Closing completion

Used algorithm
If leg is initialized and deal insert then
	Fields initialization/Reset
	Retrieve registration
	If current leg is Equity futures then
		Set values for basis, gap and percent gap UDFs
	Else if current leg is Cond Var Swap EQD or Corr Var Swap EQD then
		Set values for for past, future ans total number of returns
	End if
End if

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.3
Technical correction on EQD exotics products registration

Version 1.2
Technical update related to handling of EQD exotics products

Version1.1
For Conditional variance swap options and Corridor variance swap options: completion for past, future ans total number of returns

Version  1.0
For Equity future product: completion for basis, gap and percent gap UDFs
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
	sRegistration := "",
	fBasis := 0.0,
	fSpread := 0.0,
	fSpreadPourcent := 0.0,
	fPastNbReturns := 0.0,
	fPNbReturns := 0.0,
	fFutNbReturns := 0.0,
	fTotalNbReturns := 0.0,
	
	sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
	IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent )
	ELSE
		sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
	
	// For EQD CndVarSwap Options and EQD CrrVarSwap Options
	IF ( ( sRegistration == "Cond Var Swap EQD" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Corr Var Swap EQD" ) ) THEN
	{
		//Past,Future & Total number of returns
		fPastNbReturns := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Past_nb_returns" ),
		IF ( fPastNbReturns > 1.0 ) THEN
			fPNbReturns := fPastNbReturns - 1.0,
		legSetNumeric( pLeg,"PNbRtrns",fPNbReturns ),
		
		fFutNbReturns := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Fut_nb_returns" ),
		fTotalNbReturns := fFutNbReturns + fPNbReturns,
		legSetNumeric( pLeg,"TNbRtrns",fTotalNbReturns )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
EQD Dynamic Layout rule (Management of Patterns Field Properties)

Used algorithm:
Retrieve the registration
Reset all properties
Depending the registration and few criteria, add properties accordingly
If Communication  or tradability checks are active, add properties accordingly
If BlockTrade checks are active, add properties accordingly

Version 1.17
Amendments to handle EQD exotics as single registrations
- EQD Accumulator Options
- EQD Altiplano Options
- EQD Bermuda Options
- EQD cliquet Options
- EQD MultiBarr Options
- EQD Multiperf Options
- EQD Rainbow Options

Version 1.16
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.15
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.14
Amendments to:
- remove references to Napoleon, Turbo and Swing products
- remove references to FUTIMPLIED

version 1.13
Amendments to:
- handle strategies made of EQD products
- use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.12
Add shadow barrier fields for Barrier

Version 1.11
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.10
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.9
Amendments applied on Basket Autocall EQD pattern
Add new exotic products: Variance Swap, Call Rge Accr

Version 1.8
Add new exotic products: Turbo, Volatility Swap

Version 1.7
Changes in fields properties management related the Custom settlement currency

Version 1.6
When communication or tradability check is active, the following field property is now added: exo_2.22.1_tradabilityStatus. 
	This will enable the display of the DIST_STAT field which is used to store the Tradability status of the transaction.

Version 1.5
- Add new exotic product: Booster
- If the BlockTrade check is active, the portfolio/allocation matrix field is added depending on blocktrade field value
A new Look-Up Table is used:
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the BlockTrade check

Version 1.4
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.3
If the Communication or the Tradability check are active, the tradability check property is added

Version 1.2
- Used input criteria is registration instead of typology
- Splitting parameter sListOfOptions is obsolete
- Correct field property for Settlement currency for some Vanilla products (options)
- Add new EQD exotics produtcts: Accumulator, Altiplano, Bermuda, BestOf Cliquet, Corridor, Himalaya, Multiple Performance, Napoleon, Swing

Version 1.1
Due of limit size, split the parameter sListOfOptions

Version 1.0
Note:
Dynamic layout handling for 
- EQD Options: OTC, ETO (Listed options), Ratchet, Barrier, Asian and Lookback
- Securities: Warrants and Convertible bonds
- Exotics: Reverse Podium, Cliquet, Cond Var Swap, Corr Var Swap, Rainbow, Multiple Barrier, Basket Autocall and Simple Autocall
This formula is merged from mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Closing.LayDyn_Opt and mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Closing.LayDyn_Sec formulae which have been deleted since

Look-Up Table used:
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the communication and the tradability checks
*/

					legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.05_rebate" )
				ELSE
				{
					legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.06_rebateDown" ),
					legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.07_rebateUp" )
				}
			}
		}
		
		// Lookback ( options )
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Lookback Options" ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.12_settlType" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.10_style" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.8_volatility" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.04_viewType" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.02_ratio" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.10_fixVol" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.01_generator" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.11_exoticStyle" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.12_detail" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.7.03_fromTo" ),
			// Advanced view
			IF ( sViewType == "Advanced" ) THEN 
			{	
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.05_detailedView" ),
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.3.1_model" ),
				IF ( sModel <> "Black Fwd" ) THEN 
					legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.3.2_iterations" ),//no iterations needed for Black Forward model
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.3.2_futureFieldsYN" ),
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.5.1_fwdStart" ),

			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.8_volatility" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.09_contract" ),
			// Advanced view
			IF ( sViewType == "Advanced" ) THEN

			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.8_volatility" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.04_viewType" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.02_ratio" ),
			// Advanced view

		pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ) ),

		IF ( sSecurityGroup == "Basket" ) THEN

			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.6_fxVol" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.4.1_zeta" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.15_payoutType" ),
			IF ( sSecurityGroup == "Basket" ) THEN

				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.7_fxEqCorr" ),
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.4_fxCorrel" ) 
			}
		},
		
		sPayoutType := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout type" ),
		IF ( strStartsWith( sPayoutType,"Quanto" ) ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.2_fixedFx" ),
			IF ( sSecurityGroup <> "Basket" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.2.3_fxCor" )
		},
		
		sFlatAmountUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Flat amount unit" ),
		IF ( sFlatAmountUnit <> sUnderlyingCurrency ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.08_undCurrency" ),
		
		// Total return
		sTotalReturn := legGetString( pComponent,"Total return" ),
		IF ( sTotalReturn <> "No" ) THEN 
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.02_ratio" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.2.3_totalReturnYN" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.2.1_totalReturn" ),

			ELSE

		},
		
		// Customize settlement currency
		sCustomizeSettlementCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Customize Settl Ccy" ),
		IF ( sCustomizeSettlementCurrency == "Yes" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.5.1_custPremCurr" ),
		
		// Digital
		sDigital := legGetString( pComponent,"Digital" ),
		IF ( sDigital == "Yes" ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.1.1_digital" ),

			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.11_settlDig" ),

				legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.1.3_volHighLowStrike" )
		},
		
		// Compound
		sCompound := legGetString( pComponent,"Compound" ),
		IF ( sCompound == "Yes" ) THEN

		// Volspread
		sVolatilitySpread := legGetString( pComponent,"VOLSPDYN" ),
		IF ( sVolatilitySpread == "Yes" ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.4.1_volSpread" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.4.2_volSpreadV" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.6.4.3_volSpreadYN" )
		},
		
		// In quantity / In nominal
		sRatio := legGetString( pComponent,"Ratio" ),
		IF ( sRatio == "Yes" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.03_nominal" )
		ELSE
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.1.01_quantity" )
	}
	
	 // For Accumulator 
	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Accm Options" ) THEN
	{
		bStrip := legGetBoolean( pLeg, "Fixings#0.Strip" ),
		IF ( bStrip  == TRUE ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.01_strip" ),

			IF ( bCommonQty  == TRUE ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.32_commonQty" )
            ELSE
                legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.18.3_quantity" )
		},
		
		bNote := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Note Payments" ),
		IF ( bNote  == TRUE ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.31_notePayment" ),
		
		bBarrierByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Multi Barr." ),
		IF ( bBarrierByDate  == FALSE ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.34_barrierByDate" ),
		
		bStrikeByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Multi Strike" ),
		IF ( bStrikeByDate  == FALSE ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.33_strikeByDate" )
        
	}
	
	// For Altiplano
	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Altiplano Options" ) THEN
	{
		bDigital := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Digital" ),
		bStrip := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Strip" ),
		IF ( ( bDigital == TRUE ) AND ( bStrip == TRUE ) ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.06_digitalC" ),
			
			bTargetCoupons := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Cp Links#2.Catch Up" ),
			IF ( bTargetCoupons == TRUE ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.08.2_target" )
		},
		
		IF ( bDigital == FALSE ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.02_asianC" ),

			IF ( bAsian  == TRUE ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.09.17_asian" )
		},
		
		sFixedCoupons := legGetString( pLeg,"pf_Coupons" ),
		IF ( sFixedCoupons == "Yes" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.06.2_coupons" ),
		
		IF ( bStrip  == TRUE ) THEN
