           IF (sCouponType == "Range Accrual") THEN
           {
               legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.15_eqaDigitalorRange" ),
               legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.11_eqaPeriodicCouponCS" ),
               IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Guaranteed coupon") == "Yes") THEN
                   legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.12_eqaGuaranteedCoupon" )
           },
                         
           IF (sCouponType == "Custom") THEN
           {
               legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.10_eqaCustomPeriodicCoupon" ),
               legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.11_eqaPeriodicCouponCS" )
           }
       },
      
       IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Autocall Settlement currency") <> legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit")) THEN
           legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.8_eqaFxIndex" ),
       
       sFinalPayoff := legGetString( pComponent,"Final payoff"),  
       IF (sFinalPayoff <> "At par") THEN 
       {
       	   sKIBarrierType := legGetString( pComponent,"Knock-In barrier type"),
           legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.3_eqaKnockInBarrier" ),
           IF (sKIBarrierType <> "None") THEN
           {
           	   legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.4_eqaKnockInBarrierDetails" ),
               IF (sKIBarrierType == "Discrete DI" OR sKIBarrierType == "Discrete UI") THEN
                   legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.7_eqaKnockInSchedule" )
           },
               
           IF (sFinalPayoff == "Put" OR sFinalPayoff == "Call") THEN 
           	   legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.2_eqaFinalPayoff" ),
               
           IF (sFinalPayoff == "Custom") THEN
               legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.6_eqaCustomFinalPayoff" )      
        },
               
		IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Settl.Premium Sign") <> "None") THEN 
            legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.5_eqaUpfrontPayment" ),
            
        sPattern := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_AutocallPattern"),
        IF ( sPattern <> "StandardNote" AND sPattern <> "PeriodicNote" ) THEN            
			 legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.13_eqaSwap" ),
             
        IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Lizard")=="Yes") THEN
        {
			 legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.16_eqaLizard" ),
             IF (convertDToNumeric(legGetDate( pComponent,"Single lizard obs. end date")) <> 0.0) THEN
             	 legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.18_eqaSingleLizard" )
        },

        IF (legGetNumeric(pComponent, "pf_StrikeNoKIPayoff") <> 0.0 ) THEN
             legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.19_eqaTwinWin" )
        ELSE
        	legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.20_eqaFinalPayoff"),
        

        IF ( sPattern <> "StandardNote" AND sPattern <> "StandardSwap" AND sPattern <> "Lizard" ) THEN           
			 legAddProperty( pComponent,"exo_2.23.17_eqaMemoryWO" )
    }
	
	// For Variance Swap
	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Variance Swap EQD" ) THEN
	{
		iPeriodCap := legGetInteger( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Cap" ),
		IF ( iPeriodCap == 1 ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.04.7_periodCap" )
	}
	
	// For Volatility Swap
	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Volatility Swap EQD" ) THEN
	{
		bPeriodCap := legGetBoolean( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Cap" ),
		IF ( bPeriodCap == TRUE ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"exo_2.04.7_periodCap" )
	}
	
	// For Warrants ( securities )
	ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Warrants" ) THEN
	{
		sOptionStyle := legGetString( pLeg,"Style" ),
		IF ( sOptionStyle == "American" ) THEN
		{
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.3.1_model" ),
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"van_1.3.2_iterations" )
		}
	},	
	
    
    //BAB addition for the broker fee taxonomie for the Equities
    sTypology := legGetString(pLeg,"Typology"),
	IF sTypology == "Equity" OR sTypology == "ETF" OR sTypology == "Mutual Fund" THEN
    {
    legAddProperty( pLeg,"common_0.1.4.5_brokerfee" )
    },
    //end of BAB addition
    
    //BAB Addition Breach Reason LayDyn
    pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pContract ),
    iMsg:=0,
    iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),

    WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
    {
    pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
    IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
    legAddProperty( pContract,"common_0.1.4.6_preDealReason" ),
    
    iMsg:=iMsg+1
    },//End of BAB Addition Breach Reason LayDyn   
    
    
    //BAB addition for the agent taxonomy
    IF sTypology == "Equity DPM" THEN
    {
    legAddProperty( pLeg,"common_0.1.4.7_agent" )
    },
    //end of BAB addition
   
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "EQD") 			
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress EQD Specific completion

Version 2.3
Check null nominal on OTC options

Version 2.2
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.1
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	For Listed registrations:
		- Instrument is blacklisted						: "BIs"
		- Issuer is blacklisted							: "BIn"
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","EQD" ),	

	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	pAllMessages := pNULL,
	sPortfolio := "",

	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform sanity checks      
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
		
		IF ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pComponent ) == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent )
		ELSE
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( legGetFatherContract( pComponent ) ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
		bIsBacktoBack := legGetFOPIsBackToBack( pComponent ),
		sBackToBackPortfolio := legGetFOPInternalPortfolio( pComponent ),
		sCounterpart := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
		
		// Fund blacklist applied on listed products:  Bonds, Short futures, Long futures
		IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Warrants" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equities" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity futures" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Listed Options" ) THEN
		{
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sInstrument ),
			sIssuer := securityGetIssuerLabel( pSecurity ),
			pFund := ptfGetFundCompartment( sPortfolio ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pFund ) ) THEN
			{
				sFund := mx.statics.am.FundCompartmentInternal.GetDisplayedLabel( pFund ),
				IF ( issuerFundBlacklisted( sIssuer,sFund ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-BIs-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Issuer " + sIssuer + " is blacklisted in fund " + sFund ,"Instrument","Sane-BIs-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				},
				IF ( instrumentFundBlacklisted( sInstrument,sFund ) ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-BIn-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Instrument " + sInstrument + " is blacklisted in fund " + sFund ,"Instrument","Sane-BIn-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				}
			} 
		},
        
        IF ( sRegistration == "EQD OTC Options" ) THEN
        {
             IF ( legIsElementValid(pComponent, "Equiv_Qty_Nom_Lbl") ) THEN
            {
                IF ( legGetString(pComponent, "Equiv_Qty_Nom_Lbl") == "Equivalent quantity" ) THEN
                    sNominalField := "Nominal"
                ELSE
                    sNominalField := "Quantity",
                fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent, sNominalField ),
                IF ( fNominal == 0.0 ) THEN
                    IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-NullNom-" ) == 0 ) THEN
                            legAddMessage( pComponent,  sNominalField + " is null" , sNominalField,"Sane-NullNom-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
            }
        
        
        },
        
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}
};

//mx.preTrade.completion.EQD.Pricing.FInit

/*
MXpress
EQD field initialization rule

Used algorithm
If leg is initialized and deal insert then
	Fields initialization/Reset
	Retrieve registration
	If current leg is an EQD option then
		Set default values accordingly
		If current leg registration is Asian Options EQD then
			Set default values accordingly
		Else if current leg registration is Barrier Options EQD then
			Set default values accordingly
		Else if current leg registration is Lookback Options EQD then
			Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Accumulator EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Altiplano EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Basket Autocall EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Bermuda EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Call Rge Accr EQD then
		Set default values accordingly 
	Else if current leg registration is Cliquet EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Conditional Variance Swap EQD or Corridor Variance Swap EQD or Variance Swap EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Himalaya EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Multiple Barrier EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Multiple Performance EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Rainbow EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	Else if current leg registration is Simple Autocall EQD then
    	Set default values accordingly    
	Else if current leg registration is Volatility Swap EQD or Variance Opt EQD or Volatility Opt EQD then
		Set default values accordingly
	End if
End if

Version 1.13
Amendments to handle EQD exotics as single registrations
- EQD accumulator Options
- EQD Altiplano Options
- EQD Bermuda Options
- EQD Cliquet Options
- EQD MultiBarr Options
- EQD Multiperf Options
- EQD Rainbow Options

Version 1.12
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.11
Amendments to:
- remove references to Napoleon, Turbo and Swing products

Version 1.10
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.9
Correction applied on Asian and Lookback options for the Fixings generation

Version 1.8
- Update for Asian equity option and Barriers equity option
- Split of Basket Autocall and Simple Autocall, and update of Basket Autocall
- Add new exotic products
	* Call Rge Accr
	* CBBC

Version 1.7
For all EQD Options, force the computation of the following EQD optimized fields which are not computed by default when generating graphs:
- Delta percentage
- Gamma quotation
- Vega  quotation
- Volga quotation
- Vanna quotation

Version 1.6
Add new EQD exotics products:
- Turbo
- Variance Option
- Volatility Swap
- Volatility Option

Version 1.5
According binary upgrade, change of label for Payment lag: " + 2 BUSINESS DAY" -> "+02 BD"

Version 1.4
Add new EQD exotic product:
- Booster

Version 1.3
Add new EQD exotics produtcts:
- Accumulator
- Altiplano
- Bermuda
- BestOf Cliquet
- Corridor
- Himalaya 
- Multiple Performance
- Napoleon
- Swing

Version 1.2
Technical correction on EQD exotics products registration

Version 1.1
Technical update related to handling of EQD exotics products

Version 1.0

This rule is used to set default values under certain conditions
*/
{
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		
		sListOfOptions := "EQD OTC Options$"
			+ "EQD Listed Options$"
			+ "EQD Ratchet Options$"
			+ "EQD Barrier Options$"
			+ "EQD Asian Options$"
			+ "EQD Lookback Options$",
		sBORegistration := "",
		sRegistration := "",
		bIsOption := FALSE,
		sDigital := "",
		sSETTLDIG := "",
		sSettlementType := "",
		sCustomizeSettlementCurrency := "",
		sCustomizeSettlementFxQuoLabel := "",
		fFxRate := 0.0,
		iTo := 0,
		iOptionExpiration := 0,
		iFromNeg := 0,
		sA1FROMTO := "",
		sA1Span := "",
		iLength := 0,
		iCursor := 0,
		iStart := 0,
		sDescription1 := "",
		sA2FROMTO := "",
		sA2Span := "",
		sStrip := "",
		sStrikeByDate := "",
		sBarrierByDate := "",
		sCommonQuantity := "",
		sDeAccumulator := "",
		sNotePayment := "",
		sAsianEnd := "",
		sDigital := "",
		sTargetCoupons := "",
		sMultiBarr := "",
		sMultiCoupon := "",
		sResetPerf := "",
		sERCpbydate := "",
		sERBrbydate := "",
		sFixedCpbydate := "",
		sCpLinks := "",
		sSinglePayment := "",
		sSwapPayoff := "",
		sRelativePerf := "",
		sDrivingSchedule := "",
		sInstrument := "",
		bIsBasket := FALSE,
		sTriggPerfKO := "",
		sCapFloor:= "",
		bStrip := FALSE,
		bAverageReturn := FALSE,
		sStartAverage := "",
		sStrikeByDate := "",
		sPerfRelat := "",
		sAsian := "",
		sAsianForwardSchedule := "",
		fAdjustment := 0.0,
		fDftNbSD := 0.0,
		sFixingSchedule := "",
		sPaymentLag := "",
		sMBarDown := "",
		sMBarUp := "",
		sMRebIn := "",
		sMRebOut := "",
		sAsianFS := "",
		sForwardStart := "",
		sAsianForwardGen := "",
		sUseStartAverage := "",
		sLockIn := "",
		sTarget := "",
		sDigitStepper := "",
		sStartAverage := "",
		sA2ForwardSchedule := "",
		
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
		IF ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract )
		ELSE
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		
		bIsOption := strContain( sListOfOptions,sRegistration+"$" ),
		IF ( bIsOption ) THEN
		{
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"MTM premium" ),// compute "MTM premium" field
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Delta percentage" ), // compute "Delta percentage" field
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Gamma quotation" ), // compute "Gamma quotation" field
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Vega  quotation" ), // compute "Vega  quotation" field
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Volga quotation" ), // compute "Volga quotation" field
			legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Vanna quotation" ), // compute "Vanna quotation" field
			
			// To handle the switch from the "Digital = Yes" mode to the "Digital = No" mode ( and vice - versa ),the empty state of UDF "SETTLDIG" is used
			sDigital := legGetString( pLeg,"Digital" ),
			IF ( sDigital == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				legSetString( pLeg,"Digital as CS","Yes" ),
				sSETTLDIG := legGetString( pLeg,"SETTLDIG" ),
				IF ( sSETTLDIG == "" ) THEN
				{
					sSettlementType := legGetString( pLeg,"Settlement type" ),
					IF ( sSettlementType == "Cash" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pLeg,"SETTLDIG","Cash or Nothing" )
					ELSE
						legOverwrite( pLeg,"SETTLDIG","Asset or Nothing" )
				}
				ELSE IF ( sSETTLDIG == "Cash or Nothing" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"Settlement type","Cash" )
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"Settlement type","Delivery" )
			}
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pLeg,"SETTLDIG","" ),
			
			// To customize settlement currency
			sCustomizeSettlementCurrency := legGetString( pLeg,"Custom Settlement Ccy" ),
			IF ( sCustomizeSettlementCurrency <> "" ) THEN
			{
				sCustomizeSettlementFxQuoLabel := legGetString( pLeg,"Custom Settl Fx Quo Lbl" ),
				fFxRate := cuGetFxRate( strSubString( sCustomizeSettlementFxQuoLabel,0,3 ),strSubString( sCustomizeSettlementFxQuoLabel,4,7 ) ),
				legSetNumeric( pLeg,"Custom Settlement Fx",fFxRate )
			},
			
			// For Asian equity option
			IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Asian Options" ) THEN
			{
				dTo := legGetDate( pLeg,"To" ),
				iTo := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dTo ) ),
				dOptionExpiration := legGetDate( pLeg,"Option expiration" ),
				iOptionExpiration := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dOptionExpiration ) ),
				IF ( ( iTo == 0 ) AND ( iOptionExpiration <> 0 ) ) THEN
					legSetDate( pLeg,"To",dOptionExpiration ),
				
				dFromNeg := legGetDate( pLeg,"From neg" ),
				iFromNeg := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dFromNeg ) ),
				IF ( iFromNeg == 0 ) THEN
				{
					dEvaluationDate := legGetDate( pLeg,"Evaluation date" ),
					legSetDate( pLeg,"From neg",dEvaluationDate )
				},
				
				// UDFs A1FROMTO and A2FROMTO used to ease the Asian Fixings generation
				sA1FROMTO := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pLeg,"A1FROMTO" ) ),
				dA1From := legGetDate( pLeg,"To" ),
				iLength := strLength( sA1FROMTO ),
				iCursor := 0,
				iStart := 0,
				WHILE ( iCursor < iLength ) DO
				{
					IF ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "y" )
					OR ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "m" )
					OR ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "d" ) THEN
					{
						sA1Span := "-" + strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iStart,iCursor+1 ),
						dA1From := dA1From + sA1Span,
						iStart := iCursor + 1
					},
					iCursor := iCursor + 1
				},
				IF ( strLength( sA1FROMTO ) > 0 ) THEN 
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"From",dA1From ),
				
				sDescription1 := legGetString( pLeg,"Description1" ),
				IF ( strContain( sDescription1,"A2" ) ) THEN
				{
					sA2FROMTO := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pLeg,"A2FROMTO" ) ),
					dA2To := legGetDate( pLeg,"From neg" ),
					iLength := strLength( sA2FROMTO ),
					iCursor := 0,
					iStart := 0,
					WHILE ( iCursor < iLength ) DO
					{
						IF ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "y" )
						OR ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "m" )
						OR ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "d" ) THEN
						{
							sA2Span := "+" + strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iStart,iCursor+1 ),
							dA2To := dA2To + sA2Span,
							iStart := iCursor + 1
						},
						iCursor := iCursor + 1
					},
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"To neg",dA2To )
				}
			}
			
			// For Barriers equity option
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Barrier Options" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pLeg,"Style","European" )
			
			// For Lookback equity option
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Lookback Options" ) THEN
			{
				dTo := legGetDate( pLeg,"To" ),
				iTo := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dTo ) ),
				dOptionExpiration := legGetDate( pLeg,"Option expiration" ),
				iOptionExpiration := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dOptionExpiration ) ),
				IF ( ( iTo == 0 ) AND ( iOptionExpiration <> 0 ) ) THEN
					legSetDate( pLeg,"To",dOptionExpiration ),
				
				dFromNeg := legGetDate( pLeg,"From neg" ),
				iFromNeg := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dFromNeg ) ),
				IF ( iFromNeg == 0 ) THEN
				{
					dEvaluationDate := legGetDate( pLeg,"Evaluation date" ),
					legSetDate( pLeg,"From neg",dEvaluationDate )
				},
				
				// UDFs A1FROMTO and A2FROMTO used to ease the Lookback Fixings generation
				sA1FROMTO := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pLeg,"A1FROMTO" ) ),
				dA1From := legGetDate( pLeg,"To" ),
				iLength := strLength( sA1FROMTO ),
				iCursor := 0,
				iStart := 0,
				WHILE ( iCursor < iLength ) DO
				{
					IF ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "y" )
					OR ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "m" )
					OR ( strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "d" ) THEN
					{
						sA1Span := "-" + strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iStart,iCursor+1 ),
						dA1From := dA1From + sA1Span,
						iStart := iCursor + 1
					},
					iCursor := iCursor + 1
				},
				IF ( strLength( sA1FROMTO ) > 0 ) THEN 
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"From",dA1From ),
				
				sDescription1 := legGetString( pLeg,"Description1" ),
				IF ( strContain( sDescription1,"A2" ) ) THEN
				{
					sA2FROMTO := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pLeg,"A2FROMTO" ) ),
					dA2From := legGetDate( pLeg,"To neg" ),
					iLength := strLength( sA2FROMTO ),
					iCursor := 0,
					iStart := 0,
					WHILE ( iCursor < iLength ) DO
					{
						IF ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "y" )
						OR ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "m" )
						OR ( strSubString( sA2FROMTO,iCursor,iCursor+1 ) == "d" ) THEN
						{
							sA2Span := "+" + strSubString( sA1FROMTO,iStart,iCursor+1 ),
							dA2From := dA2From + sA2Span,
							iStart := iCursor + 1
						},
						iCursor := iCursor + 1
					},
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"To neg",dA2From )
				}
			}
		}
		
		// For Exotics products
		// For Accumulator
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Accm Options" ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate ),
            
            fNominal := legGetNumeric (pComponent, "Fixings#0.Notional"),
            legOverwrite(pComponent, "Nominal", fNominal),
            
            bDeAccumulator := legGetBoolean (pComponent, "Fixings#0.De-Accumulator"),
            IF ( bDeAccumulator == TRUE ) THEN
                legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Note Payments",FALSE )
		}
		
		// For Altiplano
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Altiplano Options") THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate )

		}
		
		// For Basket autocall 
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Autocall EQD" ) THEN
		{
			sERCpbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"ERCpbydate" ),
			sFRType := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.FR type" ),
			sFRTypeNoKI := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.FR Type if noKI" ),
			fFRguaranteed := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"FR Guaranteed" ),
			
			IF ( strCONTAIN( sFRType,"Guaranteed" ) ) OR ( strCONTAIN ( sFRTypeNoKI,"Guaranteed" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.FR Cap Guarant", fFRguaranteed),
			
			IF ( sERCpbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER_Coupon_M",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER_Coupon_M",0 ),
			
			sERBrbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"ERBrbydate" ),
			IF ( sERBrbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER_Barrier_M",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER_Barrier_M",0 ),
			
			sFixedCpbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"FixedCpbydate" ),
			IF ( sFixedCpbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon_Down_M",1 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon_Up_M",1 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Add_Cpn_Barr_M",1 )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon_Down_M",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon_Up_M",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Add_Cpn_Barr_M",0 )
			},
			
			sCpLinks := legGetString( pLeg,"CpLinks" ),
			IF ( sCpLinks == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp_Links#2.Multi_Barr._Lvl",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp_Links#2.Multi_Barr._Lvl",0 ),
						
			sSinglePayment := legGetString( pLeg,"SinglePayment" ),
			IF ( sSinglePayment == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single_Payment",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single_Payment",0 ),
						
			sSwapPayoff := legGetString( pLeg,"SwapPayoff" ),
			IF ( sSwapPayoff == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Swap_Payoff",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Swap_Payoff",0 ),
						
			sRelativePerf := legGetString( pLeg,"RelativePerf" ),
			IF ( sRelativePerf == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Relative_perf",1 )
			ELSE
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Relative_perf",0 ),
						
			dFixingStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start_date" ),
			IF ( toString( dFixingStartDate ) == "00000000" ) THEN
			{
				dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start_date",dStartDate )
			},
			
			sDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Driving_Sched" ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option_expiration" ),
			IF ( sDrivingSchedule == "Payments" ) THEN
			{
				dPayEndDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End_date_Paymen" ),
				IF ( toString( dPayEndDate ) == "00000000" ) THEN
					legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End_date_Paymen",dMaturityDate )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				dFixEndDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End_date_Fixing" ),
				IF ( toString( dPayEndDate ) == "00000000" ) THEN
					legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End_date_Fixing",dMaturityDate )
			},
			
			// To know whether the underlying is a basket
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sInstrument ),
			bIsBasket := securityGetGroup( pSecurity ) == "Basket",
			IF ( bIsBasket ) THEN
			{
				sTriggPerfKO := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Trigg_Perf_KO" ),
				IF ( sTriggPerfKO == "Nb Assets depdt Barr" ) THEN 
				{
					legOverwrite( pLeg,"CpLinks","Yes" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp_Links#2.Multi_Barr._Lvl",1 )
				}
			}
		}
		
        //FOR EQA
        ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Equity autocalls" ) THEN
    	{
        	sPattern := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_AutocallPattern" ),

            IF ( sPattern == "StandardNote" OR sPattern == "StandardSwap") THEN
            {
      			IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Coupon type") <> "None") THEN
          			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Coupon type","None" ),
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Autocall memory on KO") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Autocall memory on KO", "No" ),
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Lizard") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Lizard", "No" )  
            },
                    
            IF ( sPattern == "PeriodicSwap" OR sPattern == "PeriodicNote") THEN    
            {
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Lizard") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Lizard", "No" ),                   
      			IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Coupon type") == "Range Accrual") THEN
          			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Coupon type","Fixed" )                
            },
         
            IF ( sPattern == "RangeAccrual" ) THEN
            {
      			IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Coupon type") <> "Range Accrual") THEN
          			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Coupon type","Range Accrual" ),
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Lizard") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Lizard", "No" )                      
            },
                    
			IF ( sPattern == "Lizard" ) THEN   
            {
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Autocall memory on KO") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Autocall memory on KO", "No" ) 
            }, 

            IF ( sPattern == "TwinWin") THEN
            {	
                IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Lizard") == "Yes") THEN
                	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Lizard", "No" ),  
      			IF (legGetString( pComponent,"Coupon type") == "Range Accrual") THEN
          			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Coupon type","Fixed" ),
            	pStreams:=legGetStreams(pComponent),
            	pNoKI:=streamsGetAutocallNoKIPayoff(pStreams), 
                pFinalPayoff:=streamsGetAutocallFinalPayoff(pStreams),
                fStrike:=legGetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_StrikeNoKIPayoff"),                
				IF (payoffBuilderGetCount(pFinalPayoff)==1) THEN
                {
                payoffBuilderInsertStrike(pFinalPayoff,fStrike,TRUE),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pFinalPayoff,0,1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pFinalPayoff,0,100.-fStrike),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pFinalPayoff,1,1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pFinalPayoff,1,100.-fStrike)
                }
                ELSE
                {
                payoffBuilderSetUpperBound(pFinalPayoff,0,fStrike),
                iLoop:=0,
                WHILE(iLoop<payoffBuilderGetCount(pFinalPayoff)) DO
                	{
               		payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pFinalPayoff,iLoop,1.),
                	payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pFinalPayoff,iLoop,100.-fStrike),
                	iLoop:=iLoop+1
                	}
                },
                IF (payoffBuilderGetCount(pNoKI)==1) THEN
                {
                payoffBuilderInsertStrike(pNoKI,fStrike,TRUE),
                payoffBuilderInsertStrike(pNoKI,200.,TRUE),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pNoKI,0,-1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pNoKI,0,100.+fStrike),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pNoKI,1,1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pNoKI,1,100.-fStrike),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pNoKI,2,1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pNoKI,2,100.-fStrike)
                }
                ELSE
                {
                payoffBuilderSetUpperBound(pNoKI,0,fStrike),
                payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pNoKI,0,-1.),
                payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pNoKI,0,100.+fStrike),
                iLoop:=1,
                WHILE(iLoop<payoffBuilderGetCount(pNoKI)) DO
                	{
               		payoffBuilderSetRateFactor(pNoKI,iLoop,1.),
                	payoffBuilderSetRateSpread(pNoKI,iLoop,100.-fStrike),
                	iLoop:=iLoop+1
                	}
                }
            } 
        }
        
		// For Bermuda
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Bermuda Options" ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixing#0.From",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixing#0.To",dMaturityDate ),
			
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Settlement type","Cash" )
		}
		
		//For Callable Range Accrual EQD
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Call Rge Accr EQD" ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start_Date",dStartDate ),
			dMatDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option_expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End_Date",dMatDate ),
			
			//Setting nb of assets
			sMarket := legGetString( pComponent,"Market" ),
			sInstrument:=legGetString(pComponent,"Instrument"),
			fBasketNbComponents := eqGetBasketNumberOfComponents( sInstrument,sMarket ),
			IF ( fBasketNbComponents == 0.0 ) THEN
				fBasketNbComponents := 1.0,
			legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Nb_Asset",fBasketNbComponents )
		}

		// For Cliquet option
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Cliquet Options" ) THEN
		{
		    legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Strip",1 ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Forward Start",1 ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Nominal",1 ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Strike quotation","%" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Payout","Call" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Ratio","Yes" ),
            
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate ),
            
            sRatio := legGetString (pComponent,"Ratio"),
            IF (sRatio == "Yes") THEN
               legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Nominal",TRUE )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Nominal",FALSE ),
			
			bPerfRelat:= legGetBoolean( pLeg,"Fixings#0.Relative_perf" ),
			IF ( bPerfRelat == FALSE ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Cliquet",FALSE )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Cliquet",TRUE ),
			
			sCapFloor := legGetString( pLeg,"pf_CapFloor" ),
			IF ( sCapFloor == "No" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Period Cap",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Period Floor",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Cap",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Floor",0 )
			}
		}
		
		// For Conditional variance swap,Corridor variance swap and Variance swap
		ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Cond Var Swap EQD" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Corr Var Swap EQD" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Variance Swap EQD" ) ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate ),
			
			fAdjustment := 252.0,
			legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Adjustment",fAdjustment ),
			
			fDftNbSD := 5.0,
			legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Nb Of Std Varia",fDftNbSD ),
			
			sFixingSchedule := "DAILY",
			legSetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Fixing Schedule",sFixingSchedule ),
			
			sPaymentLag := "+02 BD",
			legSetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Paymt Lag",sPaymentLag )
		}

		// For Himalaya
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Himalaya EQD" ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate ),
			
			sCapFloor := legGetString( pLeg,"Cap floors" ),
			IF ( sCapFloor == "No" ) THEN 
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Cap", 0),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Global Floor", 0),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Period Cap", 0),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Period Floor", 0),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Fixing Cap", 0),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"CapFloor#1.F Fixing Floor", 0)
			},
			
			sStrip := legGetString( pLeg,"Strip" ),
			IF ( sStrip == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Strip",1 ),
				sSinglePayment := legGetString( pLeg,"Single Payment"),
				IF ( sSinglePayment == "Yes" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single Payment",1 )
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single Payment",0 )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Strip",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pLeg,"Single Payment","No" )
			},
			
			sAsian := legGetString( pLeg,"Asian" ),
			IF ( sAsian == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Asian 2",1 ),
				sAsianFS := legGetString( pLeg,"Asian Fwd Sch" ),
				IF ( sAsianFS == "Yes" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.A2 Fwd Sched.",1 )
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.A2 Fwd Sched.",0 )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Asian 2",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pLeg,"Asian Fwd Sch","No" )
			}
		}
		
		// For Multiple barrier option
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD MultiBarr Options" ) THEN
		{
			sForwardStart := legGetString( pComponent,"Fwd start" ),
			IF ( sForwardStart == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Ratio","Yes" )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Ratio","No" )
		}
		
		// For Multiple performance
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD MultiPer2 Options" ) THEN
		{			
			dFixingStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent, "Fixings#0.Start Date"),
			IF ( toString( dFixingStartDate ) == "00000000" ) THEN
			{
				dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate )
			},
			
			dFixEndDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date" ),
			IF ( toString( dFixEndDate ) == "00000000" ) THEN
			{
				dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate )
			}
		}
				
		// For Rainbow option
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "EQD Rainbow Options" ) THEN
		{
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Strike quotation","%" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Ratio","Yes" ),
			
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			
			sDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Driving Sched" ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			IF ( sDrivingSchedule == "Payments" ) THEN
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End date P",dMaturityDate )
			ELSE
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End date F",dMaturityDate )
		}
		
		// For Simple autocall
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Simple Autocall EQD" ) THEN
		{
			sERCpbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"ERCpbydate" ),
			IF ( sERCpbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER Coupon M",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER Coupon M",0 ),
			
			sERBrbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"ERBrbydate" ),
			IF ( sERBrbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER Barrier M",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.ER Barrier M",0 ),
			
			sFixedCpbydate := legGetString( pLeg,"FixedCpbydate" ),
			IF ( sFixedCpbydate == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon Down M",1 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon Up M",1 )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon Down M",0 ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Coupon Up M",0 )
			},
			
			sCpLinks := legGetString( pLeg,"CpLinks" ),
			IF ( sCpLinks == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp Links#2.Multi Barr. Lvl",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp Links#2.Multi Barr. Lvl",0 ),
			
			sSinglePayment := legGetString( pLeg,"SinglePayment" ),
			IF ( sSinglePayment == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single Payment",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Single Payment",0 ),
			
			sSwapPayoff := legGetString( pLeg,"SwapPayoff" ),
			IF ( sSwapPayoff == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Swap Payoff",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Swap Payoff",0 ),
			
			sRelativePerf := legGetString( pLeg,"RelativePerf" ),
			IF ( sRelativePerf == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Relative perf",1 )
			ELSE
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Relative perf",0 ),
			
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start date",dStartDate ),
			
			sDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Driving Sched" ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			IF ( sDrivingSchedule == "Payments" ) THEN
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End date Paymen",dMaturityDate )
			ELSE
				legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End date Fixing",dMaturityDate ),
			
			// To know whether the underlying is a basket
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sInstrument ),
			bIsBasket := securityGetGroup( pSecurity ) == "Basket",
			IF ( bIsBasket ) THEN
			{
				sTriggPerfKO := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Trigg Perf KO" ),
				IF ( sTriggPerfKO == "Nb Assets depdt Barr" ) THEN 
				{
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"CpLinks","Yes" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cp Links#2.Multi Barr. Lvl",1 )
				}
			}
		}
		
		// For volatility swaps, variance options and volatility options
		ELSE IF ( (  sRegistration == "Volatility Swap EQD" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Variance Opt EQD" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Volatility Opt EQD" ) ) THEN
		{
			//Start & End dates
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.Start Date",dStartDate ),
			dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
			legSetDate( pComponent,"Fixings#0.End Date",dMaturityDate )
		},
        
        //BAB addition for the Total Settlement Amount and Cancel and Reissue rule
        IF sRegistration == "Equities" THEN
        {
        sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
        
        IF sBOClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" THEN
        {
        fPrice := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Price"),
        fSettlement := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Flat_settlement"),
        fQuantity := fSettlement/fPrice,
        legSetNumeric(pComponent,"Quantity",fQuantity),
        legSetNumeric(pComponent,"Settlement",fPrice)
        },
        
        fSettlementAmount := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Nominal"),
        fFees := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Fee_amount"),
        IF legGetString(pComponent,"Buy_Sell") == "Buy" THEN
                 fTotal := fSettlementAmount + fFees
        ELSE
                 fTotal := fSettlementAmount - fFees,
        fTotal := fSettlementAmount + fFees,
        legSetNumeric(pComponent,"TOTAL_AMNT",fTotal)
        }
        //End of BAB addition
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FUND.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
FUND short text description rule

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifiying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty then
		Retrieve few fields shared between all FUND products
		If the registration is Fund S/R liability then
			Initialized fields
		Else if the registration is Fund subscription liability switch then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Fund S/R asset then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Fund S/R mandate then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Fund fee then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Fund share fee then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Fund S/R mandate then
			Initialized fields
		Else if registration is Private equity then
			Initialized fields
		End if
		Build text description accordingly
		Store built short description in the DIST_DESC UDF
	End if
End if

Version 1.6
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.5
Amended to handle private equity funds

Version 1.4
Amended to handle Fund fee and Fund share fee

Version 1.3
Amended to handle the Fund subscription liability switch registration too

Version 1.2
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.1
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.0
The description is used in the eTradepad Text Area
This description is a general description of the product

*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sRegistration := "",
	sPositionSide := "",
	sInputMode := "",
	sPayout := "",
	fAmount := 0.0,
	sAmount := "",
	sAmountCurrency := "",
	sShare := "",
	sBlotterDescription := "",
	
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			sFund := legGetString( pComponent, "Entity" ),
			bIsFee := FALSE,
			
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "Fund fee" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Fund share fee" ) ) THEN
				bIsFee := TRUE
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration <> "Private equity") THEN
			{
				sPositionSide := legGetString( pComponent,"Position side" ),
				sInputMode := legGetString( pComponent,"Input mode" )
			},
			
			//For Fund S/R liability registration
			IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R liability" ) THEN
			{
				sPayout := " receives",
				IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Gross amount" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
					sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency" ) + " "
				}
				ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
				},
				sShare := "on " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share" )
			}
			// For Fund subscription liability switch
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund subscription liability switch" ) THEN
			{
				sPayout := " receives",
				sInputMode := legGetString( pComponent, "Input mode2" ),
				IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Gross amount2" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
					sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency2" ) + " "
				}
				ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares2" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
				},
				sShare := "transfer from " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share2" ) + " to " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund_share" )
			}
			// For Fund S/R asset registration
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R asset" ) THEN
			{
				sPayout := " sends",
				IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Net amount" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
					sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Settlement currency" ) + " "
				}
				ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
				{
					fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares" ),
					sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
				},
				sShare := "on " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share" )
			}
			// For Fund S/R mandate registration
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R mandate" ) THEN
			{
				sPayout := " receives",
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Net amount" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency" ) + " "
			}
			// For Private equity
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Private equity" ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Commitment amount" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference currency" ),
				sShare := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" )
			}
			// For fees registrations
			ELSE IF ( bIsFee ) THEN
			{
				sFeebase := legGetString( pComponent,"Fee_base" ),
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference_currency" ),
				
				// For Fund fee registration
				IF ( sRegistration == "Fund fee" ) THEN
					sWhoFee := legGetString( pComponent, "Fund" )
				// For Fund share fee registration
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund share fee" ) THEN
					sWhoFee := legGetString( pComponent, "Fund_share" )
			},
			
			IF ( sRegistration == "Private equity" ) THEN 
				sBlotterDescription := sFund + " agrees a commitment of " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCurrency + " with private equity fund " + sShare
			ELSE IF ( NOT( bIsFee ) ) THEN
				sBlotterDescription := sFund + " " + sPositionSide + " order of " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCurrency + sShare
			ELSE
				sBlotterDescription := sWhoFee + " pays a fee of " + sAmount + " on " + sFeebase + " in " + sAmountCurrency,
			
			// Blotter and communication
			IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 245 ) THEN
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
			ELSE
			{
				sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription, 0, 244 ),
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
				ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc FUND rule )","DIST_DESC" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FUND.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
FUND Dynamic Layout rule ( Management of Patterns Field Properties )

Used algorithm:
Retrieve first component of the current leg
Retrieve the registration
Reset all properties
If the current registration is "Fund S/R liability" or "Fund S/T asset" then
	Add properties accordingly
End if

Version 1.3
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.2
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.1
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
        
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
	sNetAmountCurrency := "",
	sPriceCurrency := "",
	
	// Reset the Field Properties for the leg
	legResetProperties( pLeg ),
	
	IF ( ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R liability" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R asset" ) ) THEN // Product registration: Fund S/R liability and Fund S/R asset
	{
		sNetAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Settlement currency" ),
		sPriceCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Price quotation" ),
		IF ( sNetAmountCurrency <> sPriceCurrency ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"fund_1.1_multiCurrency" ),
		
		sComplexPayment := legGetString( pComponent,"Complex payment" ),
		IF ( sComplexPayment == "Yes" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pLeg,"fund_1.2_complex" )
	},
	
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "FUND")   	
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FUND.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress
FUND Specific completion

Version 2.2
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.1
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","FUND" )
    
    /*
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	
	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform sanity checks        
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}*/
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FUND.Closing.TxtDesc.Generic

/*
MXpress
FUND Generic Text Description

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting and the generate trade or Processing/Inser trade has not been used then
	Empty text area
	Retrieve few fields shared between all FUND products
	If the registration is Fund S/R liability then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if the registration is Fund subscription liability switch then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Fund S/R asset then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Fund S/R mandate then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Fund fee then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Fund share fee then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Fund S/R mandate then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	Else if registration is Private equity then
		Initialized fields
		Build text description accordingly
	End if
	Append built text description
End if

Version 1.6
Adapt description for private equities

Version 1.5
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.4
Amended to prevent the display of the text area in case of using generate trade or Processing/Inser trade 

Version 1.3
Amended to handle for Fund fee and Fund share fee

Version 1.2
Amended to handle the Fund subscription liability switch registration too

Version 1.1
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.0
The description is used in the eTradepad Text Area
This description is a general description of the product

*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sIsInGenerateTradeScreen := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.insertTradeTicketDisplay" ),   
	sRegistration := "",
	sWho := "",
	sPositionSide := "",
	sInputMode := "",
	sPayout := "",
	fAmount := 0.0,
	sAmount := "",
	sAmountCurrency := "",
	sShare := "",
	sTextDescription := "",
	sGenerator := "",
	sCounterparty := "",
	sFeebase := "",
	sWhoFee := "", 
	
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) 
	AND ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay <> "YES" ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sWho := "Fund " + legGetString( pComponent, "Entity" ),
		bIsFee := FALSE,
		sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent, "Counterpart" ),
		
		// Text
		sTextDescription := "",
		pText := npLegGetTextField( pLeg ),
		npTextFieldClear( pText ),
		sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent,"Trade purpose" ),
		
		IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
		{
			sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),  
			sWho :=  sTemplate + " Order: " + sWho,
			IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
				sheaderOrder := " @ Market price"
			ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
				sheaderOrder := " @ Limit price"
		},
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Fund fee" OR sRegistration == "Fund share fee" ) THEN
			bIsFee := TRUE
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration <> "Private equity") THEN
		{
			sInputMode := legGetString( pComponent, "Input mode" ),
			sPositionSide := legGetString( pComponent, "Position side" )
		},
		
		// For Fund S/R liability registration
		IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R liability" ) THEN
		{
			sPayout := "receives",
			IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Gross amount" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
			},
			
			sShare := " on share " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share" )
		}
		// For Fund subscription liability switch
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund subscription liability switch" ) THEN
		{
			sPayout := "receives",
			sInputMode := legGetString( pComponent, "Input mode2" ),
			IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Gross amount2" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency2" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares2" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
			},
			
			sShare := " transfer from " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share2" ) + " to " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund_share" )
		}
		// For and Fund S/R asset
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R asset" ) THEN
		{
			sPayout := "sends",
			IF ( ( sInputMode == "Net amount" ) OR ( sInputMode == "Gross amount" ) ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Net amount" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Settlement currency" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sInputMode == "Shares" ) THEN
			{
				fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Number of shares" ),
				sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + " shares"
			},
			sShare := " on share " + legGetString( pComponent, "Fund share" )
		}
		// For  Fund S/R mandate
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R mandate" ) THEN
		{
			sPayout := "receives",
			fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Net amount" ),
			sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
			sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent, "Reference currency" )
		}
		// For  Private equity
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Private equity" ) THEN
		{
			fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Commitment amount" ),
			sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
			sAmountCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Reference currency" ),
			sShare := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" )
		}
		// For fees registrations
		ELSE IF ( bIsFee ) THEN
		{
			sGenerator := legGetString( pComponent, "Generator" ),
			sFeebase := legGetString( pComponent, "Fee_base" ),
			fAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate" ),
			sAmount := toString( fAmount,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
			
			// For Fund fee registration
			IF ( sRegistration == "Fund fee" ) THEN
				sWhoFee := legGetString( pComponent, "Fund" )
			// For Fund share fee registration
			ELSE IF (sRegistration == "Fund share fee") THEN
				sWhoFee := legGetString( pComponent, "Fund_share" )
		},
		IF ( sRegistration == "Private equity" ) THEN 
			sTextDescription := sWho + " agrees a commitment of " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCurrency + " with private equity fund " + sShare + "."
		ELSE IF ( NOT( bIsFee ) ) THEN
			sTextDescription := sWho + sPayout + " a " + sPositionSide + " order of " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCurrency + sShare + "."
		ELSE
			sTextDescription := "Product " + sWhoFee + " pays a fee of " + sAmount + " on " + sFeebase + " in " + sGenerator + " to " + sCounterparty + ".",
		
		npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sTextDescription )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress 
FXD short text description rule

Version 1.5
Multiple enhancements: add Buy/Sell, use Pattern label minus FXD (so that Flex deals are more explicitely managed),
add nominal and expiration when missing.

Version 1.4
Amended to handle the Flexible deal registration
The date format is homogeneous with other asset classes

Version 1.3
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.2
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rule conventions

Version 1.0

Notes:
1. The short description is used in blotter or  mail communication
2. The description value is stored in udf DIST_DESC
3. If a leg is in a contract/package,then the description will be on the package. 
*/
{
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sDescription := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	sPayoutType := "",
	sStrikeInfo := "",
	sBuySell := "",
	sBuySell2 := "",
	sSpecific := "",
	bDescriptionSet := FALSE,
	iCurrentLeg := 0,
	iNumLegs := 0,
	sSubLegDescription := "",
	bOutOfScopeLeg := FALSE, 
	sProductLabel := "",
	iCurrentSon := 0,
	iNumSons := 0,
	sLegProductLabel := "",
	iArrayElement := 0,
	iNumArrayElement := 0,
	sADeal := "",
	sDescriptionLegs := "",
	fNumber := 0.0,
	
	bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
	IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,0 ),
		bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
	},
	
	IF ( ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) AND ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) ) THEN
	{
		// Description rule for single products
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) THEN 
		{
			pCurrentLeg := NPD_HDL_THIS,
			sDescription := "",
			
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg ),
			
			IF ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"B_S" ),
				IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
					sBuySell2 := "Sell"
				ELSE
					sBuySell2 := "Buy",
				
				sDescription := "Bank " + sBuySell + "s " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Nominal" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " 
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Nominal_unit" ) + ", " + sBuySell2 + "s " 
								+ toString(legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Other_nominal" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " 
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Other_nominal_unit" )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Buy_Sell" ),
				
				sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentLeg ),
				iFXDSuffix := strIndexOf( sPatternLabel, " FXD"),
				IF ( iFXDSuffix > 0 ) THEN
					sPatternLabel := strSubString( sPatternLabel , 0, iFXDSuffix ),
				
				sInstrument := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Instrument" ),
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "Simple Option" ) THEN
				{
					sPayoutType := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout_type" ),
					
					//description for Standard Simple Option
					IF ( sPayoutType == "Standard" ) THEN
						sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ) + " "
										+ "@" + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Strike" ),8,4,FALSE,0 )
					//description for Digital Option
					ELSE IF ( sPayoutType == "Digital" ) THEN
						sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ) + " "
   										+ "@" + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Strike" ),8,4,FALSE,0 )
					//description for Quanto Option  
					ELSE IF ( sPayoutType == "Quanto" OR sPayoutType == "Digital Quanto" ) THEN
						sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ) + " Quanto "
										+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Quanto currency" )
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Double Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Asian Option" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "Asian Option" ) AND ( legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Exotic style" ) == "Floating strike" ) ) THEN
						sStrikeInfo := "Floating strike"
					ELSE
						sStrikeInfo := toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Strike" ),8,4,FALSE,0 ),
					
					sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ) + " " + "@" + sStrikeInfo
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Touch rebate" ) THEN
					sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Exotic style" )
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Strip of Simple Options" ) THEN
					sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout style" )
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Option" OR sRegistration == "Best Of Option" ) THEN
				{
					sSpecific := " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Ref_currency_unit" ) + " vs ",
					iCurrentCur := 0,
					iNumCur := fxBskGetNumberOfCurrencies( pCurrentLeg ),
					WHILE ( iCurrentCur < iNumCur ) DO
					{
						sSpecific := sSpecific + fxBskGetCurrency( pCurrentLeg, iCurrentCur ),
						iCurrentCur := iCurrentCur + 1,
						IF ( iCurrentCur < iNumCur ) THEN
							sSpecific := sSpecific + ", "
					}
				},
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Option" OR sRegistration == "Best Of Option" ) THEN
					sNominal := " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Ref_currency" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " "
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Ref_currency_unit")
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Listed Option" ) THEN
					sNominal := " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Nominal" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " "
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Nominal unit")                             
				ELSE
					sNominal := " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " "
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal unit"),
				
				IF ( sRegistration == "Listed Option" ) THEN
					sExpiry := " Expiry " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Maturity_period" )
				ELSE
					sExpiry := " Expiry " + toString1( legGetDate( pCurrentLeg,"Option_expiration" ) ),
				
				sDescription := sBuySell + " " + sPatternLabel + " " + sInstrument + sSpecific + sNominal + sExpiry
			},
			legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"DIST_DESC",sDescription )
		},
		
		// Description rule for known structures
		bDescriptionSet := FALSE,
		
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN 
		{
			pCurrentContract := NPD_HDL_THIS,
			iCurrentLeg := 0,
			iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pCurrentContract ),
			
			//Desciption for Flex deals
			IF ( iNumLegs == 1 AND legGetRegistration( legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract, 0 ) ) == "Flexible Deal" ) THEN
			{
				pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg ),
				
				sBuySell := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Buy_Sell" ),
				
				sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentContract ),
				iFXDSuffix := strIndexOf( sPatternLabel, " FXD"),
				IF (iFXDSuffix > 0) THEN sPatternLabel := strSubString( sPatternLabel , 0, iFXDSuffix ),
				
				sInstrument := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Instrument" ),
				
				sNominal := " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal" ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " "
								+ legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal unit"),
				
				sExpiry := " Expiry " + toString1( legGetDate( pCurrentLeg,"Option_expiration" ) ),
				
				sDescription := sBuySell + " " + sPatternLabel + " " + sInstrument + sNominal + sExpiry,
				
				legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"DIST_DESC",sDescription ),
				bDescriptionSet := TRUE
			}
			ELSE
			{
				bOutOfScopeLeg := FALSE,
				bMultipleNominal := FALSE,
				bMultipleExpiry := FALSE,
				sSubLegDescription := " ", 
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
				{
					pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg ),
					
					sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg ),
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Option" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Double Barrier" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Asian Option" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( iCurrentLeg > 0 ) THEN
						{
							IF ( legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Instrument" ) <> legGetString( legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg-1 ),"Instrument" ) ) THEN
							{
								bOutOfScopeLeg := TRUE,
								iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs
							}
							ELSE
							{
								IF ( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal" ) <> legGetNumeric( legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg-1 ),"Traded nominal" ) )
								OR ( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal unit" ) <> legGetNumeric( legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg-1 ),"Traded nominal unit" ) ) THEN
									bMultipleNominal := TRUE,
								IF ( legGetDate( pCurrentLeg,"Option_expiration" ) <> legGetDate( legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg-1 ),"Option_expiration" ) ) THEN
									bMultipleExpiry := TRUE
							}
						}
					}
					ELSE
					{
						bOutOfScopeLeg := TRUE,
						iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs
					},
					
					IF ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs - 1 ) THEN
						sSubLegDescription := sSubLegDescription + ", ",
					
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				},
				
				IF ( NOT bOutOfScopeLeg ) THEN
				{
					sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentContract ),
					iFXDSuffix := strIndexOf( sPatternLabel, " FXD"),
					IF ( iFXDSuffix > 0 ) THEN
						sPatternLabel := strSubString( sPatternLabel , 0, iFXDSuffix ),
					
					iCurrentLeg := 0,
					sDescription := sPatternLabel + " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Instrument" ) + ":",
					WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
					{
						pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg ),
						
						sDescription := sDescription + " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Buy_Sell" ) + " "
											+ strToken( legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ) ,"/",0 ) + "@"
											+ toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Strike" ),8,4,FALSE,0 ),
						
						IF ( bMultipleNominal ) THEN
							sDescription := sDescription + " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal" ),16,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal unit" ),
						
						IF ( bMultipleExpiry ) THEN
							sDescription := sDescription + " " + toString1( legGetDate( pCurrentLeg,"Option_expiration" ) ),
						
						IF ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs - 1 ) THEN
							sDescription := sDescription + ",",
						
						iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
					},
					
					IF ( NOT bMultipleNominal ) THEN
						sDescription := sDescription + " " + toString( legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal" ),16,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Traded nominal unit" ),
					
					IF ( NOT bMultipleExpiry ) THEN
						sDescription := sDescription + " " + toString1( legGetDate( pCurrentLeg,"Option_expiration" ) ),
					
					iCurrentLeg := 0,
					WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
					{
						pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pCurrentContract,iCurrentLeg ),
						
						IF ( iCurrentLeg == 0 ) THEN
						{
							IF ( strLEN( sDescription ) > 249 ) THEN
								sDescription := strSubString( sDescription,249 ),
							
							legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"DIST_DESC",sDescription )
						}
						ELSE
							legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"DIST_DESC",sDescription ),
						iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
					},
					bDescriptionSet := TRUE
				}
			}
			
		},
		
		//Description for unknown general structures
		IF ( ( bDescriptionSet == FALSE ) AND ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractISINGLE" ) ) THEN 
		{
			sSubLegDescription := " ",
			sProductLabel := legGetProductLabel( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
			
			pArray := arrayNew( ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Deal",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"Number",TRUE,TRUE ),
			
			iCurrentSon := 0,
			iNumSons := legGetNumberOfSons( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
			WHILE ( iCurrentSon < iNumSons ) DO
			{
				pCurrentSon := legGetSonAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,iCurrentSon ),
				
				sLegProductLabel := legGetString ( legGetFirstComponent( pCurrentSon), "Instrument" ) + " " + legGetProductLabel( pCurrentSon ),
				IF ( strStartsWith( strToLowerCase( sLegProductLabel ),"strip" ) ) THEN
				{
					pFirstStripSon := legGetSonAt( pCurrentSon,0 ),
					sLegProductLabel := "Strip of " +  legGetProductLabel( pFirstStripSon )
				},
				
				iArrayElement := 0,
				iNumArrayElement := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
				pFoundElement := pNull,
				WHILE ( iArrayElement < iNumArrayElement ) DO
				{
					pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iArrayElement ),
					sADeal := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Deal" ),
					
					IF ( sADeal == sLegProductLabel ) THEN
						pFoundElement := pElement,
					
					iArrayElement := iArrayElement + 1 
				},
				
				IF ( pFoundElement == pNull ) THEN 
				{
					pFoundElement := arrayAddElement( pArray ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Deal",sLegProductLabel ),//modif
					arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Number",1.0 )
				}
				ELSE
					arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Number",arrayElementGetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Number" ) + 1.0 ),
				
				iCurrentSon := iCurrentSon + 1
			},
			
			sDescriptionLegs := "",
			iArrayElement := 0,
			iNumArrayElement := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
			pFoundElement := pNull,
			WHILE ( iArrayElement < iNumArrayElement ) DO
			{
				pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iArrayElement ),
				sADeal := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Deal" ),
				fNumber := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Number" ),
				
				IF ( fNumber > 1.0 ) THEN
					sADeal := sADeal + "s ",//modif
				
				sDescriptionLegs := sDescriptionLegs + toString( toInt( fNumber ) ) + " " + sADeal,//modif
				
				IF ( iArrayElement < iNumArrayElement - 1 ) THEN //modif
					sDescriptionLegs := sDescriptionLegs + ", ",
				
				iArrayElement := iArrayElement + 1
			},
			
			iCurrentLeg := 0,
			iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
			WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
			{
				pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,iCurrentLeg ),
				
				IF ( strStartsWith( strToLowerCase( sProductLabel ),"on the fly" ) ) THEN 
					sDescription := "On The Fly: " + sDescriptionLegs
				ELSE IF ( strStartsWith( strToLowerCase( sProductLabel ),"strip" ) ) THEN
					sDescription := "Strip of " + sDescriptionLegs
				ELSE
					sDescription := sProductLabel + ": " + sDescriptionLegs,
				
				IF ( strLEN( sDescription ) > 240 ) THEN
					sDescription := strSubString( sDescription,240 ),
				
				sDescription := sDescription + toString( iCurrentLeg + 1 ) + "/" + toString( iNumLegs ),
				
				legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"DIST_DESC",sDescription ),
				
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
			},
			arrayFree( pArray )
		}
	}
};
