/*
MXpress
FXD Hedge deal computation

Version 1.8
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Quotation"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Delivery") lookup tables

Version 1.7
Prevent the hedge computation in the deal ticket

Version 1.6
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.5
Replace usage of UDF HEDGE_DATE, HEDGE_PRICE and HEDGE_BS
by native fields Hedge_date,  Hedge_price and pre-trade field pf_hedge_BS

Version 1.4
Replace usage of UDF HEDGE_AMT and HEDGE_CUR by native fields Hedge_amt and Hedge_currency

Version 1.3
Now the end user can set the Hedge Price at the Capture layout level

Version 1.2
Remove the "HEDGE_TYPE" UDF filling
Use the Criteria column in MX.FXD.FieldMap Lookup table instead of Context
Correct the Buy/Sell field value depending the Hedge type value

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.0

Notes:
1. The hedge parameters (amout, rate, expiry are kept in udfs 
2. These parameters are used in description & booking
3. The rules are as follows:
	1) Scan whole structure to see if all legs have same expiry
	2) Legs don't have same expiry date and the hedge type is internal/exchange forward
		==> the hedge parameters are calculated leg by leg
		Else
		==> put the hedge amout of the whole structure in first leg
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvalActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	bSameExpiry := FALSE,
	bSameInstrument := FALSE,
	bAggregateHedge := FALSE,
	iCurrentLeg := 0,
	iNumLegs := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sFirstInstrument := "",
	bForwardHedge := FALSE,
	sInstrument := "",
	sHedgeType := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	bIsCurrOpt := FALSE,
	fHedgePrice := 0.0,
	sBuySell := "",
	sDeltaCcy := "",
	sHedging := "",
	sDefaultSpotQuotMode := "",
	iLeg := 0,
	sFieldName := "",
	sQuotation := "",
	fDelta := 0.0,
	xPrice := "0.0/0.0",
	sCcy2 := "",
	sCcy1 := "",
	fFwdPriceAsk := 0.0,
	fFwdPriceBid := 0.0,
	sHedging := "",
	fPrice := 0.0,
	fHedgeAmount := 0.0,
	fRoundFactor := 0.0,
	fHedgeAmountRounded := 0.0,
	
	IF ( ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS") ) THEN 
	{
		bSameExpiry := TRUE,  // Check if all FX Option legs have the same expiry date
		bSameInstrument :=TRUE,  // Check if all FX Option legs have same instrument, if not, the delta cannot be aggregated.
		bAggregateHedge := TRUE,    // If it's true, then the delta can be aggregated, so the 
		
		iCurrentLeg := 0,
		iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		//Get the pointer of first currency option
		WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
			
			IF ( ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) ) THEN
			{
				pFirstCurrOptLeg := pComponent,
				iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs  // Once the pointer is found, get out of the loop
			},
			iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
		},
		
		IF ( NOT ( isNull( pFirstCurrOptLeg ) ) ) THEN
		{
			dFirstExpiry := legGetDate( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Option expiration" ),
			sFirstInstrument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
			
			iCurrentLeg := 0,
			bForwardHedge := FALSE,  // If "Hedge type" of one leg is of type 'Forward', bForwardHedge:=TRUE
			WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
				sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
				sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
				IF ( ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) ) THEN 
				{
					dOptionExpiry := legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ),
					IF ( dFirstExpiry <> dOptionExpiry ) THEN
						bSameExpiry := FALSE,
					
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					IF ( sFirstInstrument <> sInstrument ) THEN
						bSameInstrument := FALSE,
					
					sHedgeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Forward" ) ) THEN
						bForwardHedge := TRUE
				},
				
				IF ( ( ( NOT bSameExpiry) AND ( bForwardHedge ) )
				OR ( NOT ( bSameInstrument ) ) ) THEN
				{
					bAggregateHedge := FALSE,
					iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs
				},
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
			},
			
			IF ( bAggregateHedge ) THEN
			{
				iCurrentLeg := 0,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
					sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
					sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
					
					bIsCurrOpt := ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ),
					IF ( ( bIsCurrOpt ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Basket Option" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" ) ) THEN 
					{
						fHedgePrice := 0.0,
						sBuySell := "",
						sDeltaCcy := "",
						
						sHedging := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
						sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
						sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
						
						pHedgeFields := pNULL,
						sField := "Quotation",
						pHedgeFields := lookupResults("MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
												"Registration",sRegistration,
												"Criteria 1","" ),
						IF ( NOT ( isNull( pHedgeFields ) ) ) THEN
						{
							iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pHedgeFields,0,0 ) ),
							IF ( iLeg > 0 ) THEN
								pSourceLeg := legGetComponentAt( pComponent,iLeg - 1 )
							ELSE
								pSourceLeg := pComponent,
							
							sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pHedgeFields,0,1 ),
							sQuotation := legGetString( pSourceLeg,sFieldName )
						},
						
						IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Spot" ) ) THEN
						{
		   					dMaturity := fxGetSpotDate( sInstrument ),
							IF ( sHedging == "Internal Spot" ) THEN 
							{
								sDeltaCcy := fxGetTotalDeltaCurrency( sInstrument ),
								fDelta := fxGetTotalSpotDeltaWithUnit( sInstrument,sDeltaCcy ),
								IF ( sRegistration == "Flexible Deal" ) THEN
									xPrice := legGetBidAsk( pComponent,"Ref_spot" )
								ELSE
									xPrice := legGetBidAsk( pComponent,"Spot" )
							}
							ELSE IF ( sHedging == "Exchange Spot" ) THEN 
							{
								sDeltaCcy := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ),
								fDelta := fxGetTotalSpotExchangeDelta( sInstrument,sDeltaCcy ),
								xPrice := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Ref_spot" )
							}
						}
						ELSE IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Forward" ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sRegistration <> "Flexible Deal" ) THEN
								dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent, "Delivery" )
							ELSE
							{
								// Get the father contract of flexible deal
								// Should be replaced by legGetRegistration once the function is validated
								pFatherContract := legGetFather( pComponent ),
								sRegistration := legGetProductLabel( pFatherContract ), 
								
								pHedgeFields := pNULL,
								sField := "Delivery",
								pHedgeFields := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
														"Registration",sRegistration,
														"Criteria 1","" ),
								IF ( NOT ( isNull( pHedgeFields ) ) ) THEN
								{
									iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pHedgeFields,0,0 ) ),
									IF ( iLeg > 0 ) THEN
										pSourceLeg := legGetComponentAt( pFatherContract,iLeg - 1 )
									ELSE
										pSourceLeg := pFatherContract,
									
									sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pHedgeFields,0,1 ),
									dMaturity := legGetDate( pSourceLeg,sFieldName )
								}
								ELSE
									ThrowError( pComponent,"Forward hedging not enabled for " + sRegistration,"Type" )
							},
							IF (sHedging == "Exchange Forward") THEN 
							{
								sDeltaCcy := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ),
								fDelta := fxGetTotalForwardExchangeDelta( sInstrument,sDeltaCcy  ),
								xPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent, "Forward" )
							}
							ELSE IF ( sHedging == "Internal Forward" ) THEN 
							{
								sDeltaCcy := fxGetTotalDeltaCurrency( sInstrument ),
								fDelta := fxGetTotalForwardDeltaWithUnit( sInstrument,sDeltaCcy ),
								IF ( sRegistration == "Flexible Deal" ) THEN
									xPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Forward" )
								ELSE
								{
									sCcy2 := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ),
									sCcy1 := fxQuotationGetNumerator( sQuotation ),
									fFwdPriceAsk := cuGetFxAskForwardRate( sCcy1,sCcy2,dMaturity ),
									fFwdPriceBid := cuGetFxBidForwardRate( sCcy1,sCcy2,dMaturity ),
									setBID( xPrice, fFwdPriceBid ),
									setASK( xPrice, fFwdPriceAsk )
								}
							}
						}
						ELSE IF ( sHedging <> "No Hedge" ) THEN
						{
							sHedging := "No Hedge",
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_amt", 0.0 )
						},
						
						IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Exchange") OR strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Internal" ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( ( ( fDelta > 0.0 ) AND ( sDeltaCcy == fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ) ) )
							OR ( ( fDelta < 0.0 ) AND ( sDeltaCcy <> fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ) ) ) ) THEN
								fPrice := getBID( xPrice )
							ELSE
								fPrice := getASK( xPrice ),
							
							fHedgePrice := roundnearest( fPrice,fxQuotationGetDisplayDecimals( sQuotation ),1.0 ),
							
							// Setting up the type of transaction (buy/sell) for the spot/forward hedge
							IF ( fDelta < 0.0 ) THEN
								sBuySell := "Buy"
							ELSE
								sBuySell := "Sell",
							
							fHedgeAmount := ABS( fDelta ),
							//Round Hedge Amt to the nearest 10,000
							fRoundFactor := 10000.0,
							fHedgeAmountRounded := fRoundFactor * ( roundnearest( fHedgeAmount / fRoundFactor,0 ) ),
							
							IF properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ) <> "YES" THEN
							{
								legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_price",fHedgePrice ),
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_date",dMaturity ),
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_hedge_BS",sBuySell ),
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_currency",sDeltaCcy )
							},
							
							IF ( iCurrentLeg == 0 ) THEN 
							{
								fHedgeAmount := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ),
								IF ( fHedgeAmount < 0.0 ) THEN 
								{
									ThrowWarning( pComponent,"The sign of the hedge nominal cannot be changed","Hedge_amt" ),
									legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_amt",fHedgeAmountRounded )
								}
								ELSE
									legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt",fHedgeAmountRounded )
							}
							ELSE
								legOverwrite ( pComponent,"Hedge_amt",0.0 ),
							
							IF ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ) ) THEN
								legSetCellColorAsWarning( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ),
							
							IF ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ) ) THEN
								legSetCellColorAsWarning( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" )
						}
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

{

	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sRegistration := "",

	fHedgePrice := 0.0,
	sBuySell := "",
	sDeltaCcy :="",
	sHedging := "",
	sInstrument := "",
	sDefaultSpotQuotMode := "",
	iLeg := 0,
	sFieldName := "",
	sQuotation := "",
	sDeltaCcy := "",
	fDelta := 0.0,
	xPrice := "0.0/0.0",
	sCcy2 := "",
	sCcy1 := "",
	fFwdPriceAsk := 0.0,
	fFwdPriceBid := 0.0,

	IF ( ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN

			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
			
			bIsCurrOpt := ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ),
			
			// Check if the component is FX Option and is not a Multi-instrument Option
			IF ( ( bIsCurrOpt ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Basket Option" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" ) ) THEN 
			{
				fHedgePrice := 0.0,
				sBuySell := "",
				sDeltaCcy := "",
				
				sHedging := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
				
				pHedgeFields := pNULL,
				sField := "Quotation",
				pHedgeFields := lookupResults("MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria 1","" ),
				IF ( NOT ( isNull( pHedgeFields ) ) ) THEN
				{
					iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pHedgeFields,0,0 ) ),
					IF ( iLeg > 0 ) THEN
						pSourceLeg := legGetComponentAt( pComponent,iLeg - 1 )
					ELSE
						pSourceLeg := pComponent,
					
					sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pHedgeFields,0,1 ),
					sQuotation := legGetString( pSourceLeg,sFieldName )
				},
				
				IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Spot" ) ) THEN
				{

				}
				ELSE IF ( sHedging <> "No Hedge" ) THEN
				{
					sHedging := "No Hedge",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_amt", 0.0 )
				},
				
				IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Exchange" ) OR strCONTAIN( sHedging,"Internal" ) ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( ( ( fDelta > 0.0 ) AND ( sDeltaCcy == fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ) ) ) 
					OR ( ( fDelta < 0.0 ) AND ( sDeltaCcy <> fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ) ) ) ) THEN
						fPrice := getBID( xPrice )
					ELSE
						fPrice := getASK( xPrice ),
					
					fHedgePrice := roundnearest( fPrice,fxQuotationGetDisplayDecimals( sQuotation ),1.0 ),
					
					// Setting up the type of transaction (buy/sell) for the spot/forward hedge
					IF ( fDelta < 0.0 ) THEN
						sBuySell := "Buy"
					ELSE
						sBuySell := "Sell",
					
					fHedgeAmount := ABS( fDelta ),
					//Round Hedge Amt to the nearest 10,000
					fRoundFactor := 10000.0,
					fHedgeAmountRounded := fRoundFactor * ( roundnearest( fHedgeAmount / fRoundFactor,0 ) ),
					
					IF ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ) <> "YES" ) THEN
					{
						legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_price",fHedgePrice ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_date",dMaturity ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_hedge_BS",sBuySell ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_currency",sDeltaCcy )
					},
					
					IF ( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ) < 0.0 ) THEN 
					{
						ThrowWarning( pComponent,"The sign of the hedge nominal cannot be changed","Hedge_amt" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"Hedge_amt",fHedgeAmountRounded )
					}
					ELSE
						legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt",fHedgeAmountRounded ),
					
					IF ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ) ) THEN
						legSetCellColorAsWarning( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ),
					
					IF ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ) ) THEN
						legSetCellColorAsWarning( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" )
				}
			},
			iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.LayDyn-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Dynamic Layouts

Used algorithm:
Retrieve the registration
Reset all properties
Depending the registration and few criteria, add properties accordingly
If Communication or tradibility checks are active then
	Add properties accordingly
End if
If BlockTrade checks are active, add properties accordingly

Version 1.18
Remove TARN specifics to be put in dedicated formula

Version 1.17
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.16
Removed handling hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad, as it is natively embedded

Version 1.15
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.14
- Updated to handle the TARN as flexible contract instead an stb contract
- Removal of Pivot Target Fwd FXD, as it is handle as TARN
- Handle hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad

Version 1.13
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.12
- Addition of Tremor fields
- Correction on macs settings
- Addition of Pivot Target Fwd FXD

Version 1.11
- Updates on Target Forward: switched to nb fixing mode
- Macs Model additional rules: settings and sensis

Version 1.10
Correction on property addition on portfolio in case of strategy

Version 1.9
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.8
Amendments to handle:
- back to back fields using the (MX.ALL.GParam, ALL) Lookup Table
- the display of tradability status field applied on first component

Version 1.7
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.6
Amendments to handle the Target Forward FXD

Version 1.5
Amendments to handle the new taxonomy leaf labels

Version 1.4
Amendments to handle properly cross asset structures

Version 1.3
If the Communication or the Tradability check are active, the tradability check property is added

Version 1.2
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.1

Notes:
1. Field properties are used to handle dynamic display
2. The displayed  fields wil depend on fields value in the leg
3. The field properties will be added in this way:
-- Get the field name and its location in MX.FXD.FieldMap.ALL
-- Get the field value and look for entries in MX.FXD.LayDynFC
-- If any entries found in step 2, add the corresponding properties
-- Add extra codes for components in strip.

Look-Up Tables used:
( MX.FXD.AddCrit,LayDyn ) contains additional criterion per registration
( MX.FXD.LayDynA,ALL ) contains the fields properties to add depending the registration
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the communication and the tradability checks
*/

{
	pPackage := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pPackage ) ) THEN
	{
		// Scans all Contracts and their components , reset the field properties. 
		// Fields Initialization/Reset
		iContract := 0,
		iNumContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pPackage ),
		bIsTradeOnly := ( legGetRegistrationLabel( This ) == "mxContractITRADE" ),
		iComponent := 0,
		iNumComponent := 0,
		bIsInStrip := FALSE,
		sRegistration := "",
		iFieldPropertyCounter := 0,
		iFoundFieldProperties := 0,
		bFieldPropertyFit := FALSE,
		iLegId := 0,
		sFieldName := "",
		sOperator := "",
		sFieldCriteria := "",
		sAdditionaCriteria := "",
		sFieldProperty := "",
		bFitPricipalCriteria := FALSE,
		sFieldValue := "",
		bFitAdditionalCriteria := FALSE,
		iAdditionalCriteria := 0,
		iFoundAdditionalCriteria := 0,
		iAddLegId := 0,
		sAddFieldName := "",
		sAddOperator := "",
		sAddFieldCriteria := "",
		sAddFieldValue := "",
		
		WHILE ( iContract < iNumContracts ) DO
		{
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,iContract ),
			legResetProperties( pContract ),
			
			iComponent := 0,
			iNumComponent := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponent ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
				legResetProperties( pComponent ),
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			},
			iContract := iContract + 1
		},
		
		IF ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN 
		{
			legResetProperties( pPackage ),
			iContract := -1
		}
		ELSE
			iContract := 0,
		
		WHILE ( iContract < iNumContracts ) DO
		{
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,iContract ),
			
			//Check if the current object is a strip component.
			//Remove some fields from the components if they are sons of a strip
			bIsInStrip := FALSE,
			pFather := legGetFather( pContract ),
			IF ( ( NOT ( isNull( pFather ) ) ) AND ( strContain( legGetTitle( pFather ),"Strip" ) ) ) THEN
				bIsInStrip := TRUE,
			
			// *** generic code for the management of field properties 
			IF ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN
				pCurrentLeg := pPackage
			ELSE
				pCurrentLeg := pContract,
			
			IF ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pCurrentLeg ) == "mxContractISINGLE" ) OR ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg )
			ELSE
				sRegistration := legGetTitle( pCurrentLeg ),
			
			pFieldProperties := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.LayDynA","ALL",
										"Registration",sRegistration ),
			IF ( NOT ( isNull( pFieldProperties ) ) ) THEN
			{
				iFieldPropertyCounter := 0,
				iFoundFieldProperties := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pFieldProperties ),
				
				WHILE ( iFieldPropertyCounter < iFoundFieldProperties ) DO
				{
					bFieldPropertyFit := FALSE,
					
					iLegId := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,0 ) ),
					sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,1 ),
					sOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,2 ) ),
					sFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,3 ),
					sAdditionaCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,4 ),
					sFieldProperty := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,5 ),
					
					IF ( strLen( sFieldName ) ) > 0 THEN
					{
						bFitPricipalCriteria := FALSE,
						IF ( iLegId == 0 ) THEN
							sFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldName )
						ELSE
						{
							pSonCurrentLeg := legGetSonAt( pCurrentLeg,iLegId - 1 ),
							sFieldValue := legGetString( pSonCurrentLeg,sFieldName )
						},
						
						IF ( sOperator == "==" ) THEN
							bFitPricipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue == sFieldCriteria )
						ELSE IF ( sOperator == "<>" ) THEN
							bFitPricipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue <> sFieldCriteria )
						ELSE IF ( sOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
							bFitPricipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ) )
						ELSE IF ( sOperator == "IN" ) THEN
							bFitPricipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ) ),
						
						IF ( bFitPricipalCriteria ) THEN
						{
							IF ( strLen( sAdditionaCriteria ) > 0 ) THEN
							{
								pAdditionalCriteria := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.AddCrit","LayDyn",
															"Registration",sRegistration,
															"Add Criteria",sAdditionaCriteria ),
								IF ( NOT ( isNull( pAdditionalCriteria ) ) ) THEN
								{
									bFitAdditionalCriteria := TRUE,
									
									iAdditionalCriteria := 0,
									iFoundAdditionalCriteria := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pAdditionalCriteria ),
									
									WHILE ( ( iAdditionalCriteria < iFoundAdditionalCriteria ) AND ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) ) DO
									{
										iAddLegId := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,0 ) ),
										sAddFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,1 ),
										sAddOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,2 ) ),
										sAddFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,3 ),
										
										IF ( iAddLegId == 0 ) THEN
											sAddFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sAddFieldName )
										ELSE
										{
											pSonCurrentLeg := legGetSonAt( pCurrentLeg,iAddLegId - 1 ),
											sAddFieldValue := legGetString( pSonCurrentLeg,sAddFieldName )
										},
										
										IF ( sAddOperator == "==" ) THEN
											bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue == sAddFieldCriteria )
										ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "<>" ) THEN
											bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue <> sAddFieldCriteria )
										ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
											bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ) )
										ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "IN" ) THEN
											bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ) ),
										
										iAdditionalCriteria := iAdditionalCriteria + 1
									},
									
									IF ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) THEN
										bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE
								}
								ELSE
								{
									bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE,
									ThrowWarning( "Field properties","No additional criteria are found for field properties " + sFieldProperty )
								}
							}
							ELSE
								bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE
						}
					}
					ELSE
						bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE,
					
					IF ( bFieldPropertyFit ) THEN
					{
						IF ( ( sFieldProperty <> "" ) 
						AND ( ( bIsInStrip == FALSE ) OR ( NOT ( strContain( sFieldProperty,"STRIP" ) ) ) ) ) THEN
							legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,sFieldProperty )
					},
					iFieldPropertyCounter := iFieldPropertyCounter + 1
				}
			},//end of generic code for field properties in contract level.
			
			IF ( ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ) <> "mxContractISINGLE" ) AND ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ) <> "mxContractITRADE" ) ) THEN
			{
				iComponent := 0,
				iNumComponent := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
				
				WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponent ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
					
					// *** generic code for the management of field properties -- component level
					pCurrentLeg := pComponent,
					sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg ),
					
					pFieldProperties := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.LayDynA","ALL",
												"Registration",sRegistration ),
					IF ( NOT ( isNull( pFieldProperties ) ) ) THEN
					{
						iFieldPropertyCounter := 0,
						iFoundFieldProperties := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pFieldProperties ),
						
						WHILE ( iFieldPropertyCounter < iFoundFieldProperties ) DO
						{
							bFieldPropertyFit := FALSE,
							
							iLegId := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,0 ) ),
							sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,1 ),
							sOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString(pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,2 ) ),
							sFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,3 ),
							sAdditionaCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,4 ),
							sFieldProperty := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,5 ),
							IF ( strLen( sFieldName ) > 0 ) THEN
							{
								bFitPricipalCriteria := FALSE,
								IF ( iLegId == 0 ) THEN
									sFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldName )
								ELSE
								{
									pSonCurrentLeg := legGetSonAt( pCurrentLeg,iLegId - 1 ),
									sFieldValue := legGetString( pSonCurrentLeg,sFieldName )
								},
								
								IF ( sOperator == "==" ) THEN
									bFitPricipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue == sFieldCriteria )
								ELSE IF ( sOperator == "<>" ) THEN
									bFitPricipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue <> sFieldCriteria )
								ELSE IF ( sOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
									bFitPricipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ) )
								ELSE IF ( sOperator == "IN" ) THEN
									bFitPricipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ) ),
								
								IF ( bFitPricipalCriteria ) THEN
								{
									IF ( strLen( sAdditionaCriteria ) > 0 ) THEN
									{
										pAdditionalCriteria := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.AddCrit","LayDyn",
																	"Registration",sRegistration,
																	"Add Criteria",sAdditionaCriteria ),
										IF ( NOT ( isNull( pAdditionalCriteria ) ) ) THEN
										{
											bFitAdditionalCriteria := TRUE,
											
											iAdditionalCriteria := 0,
											iFoundAdditionalCriteria := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pAdditionalCriteria ),
											
											WHILE ( ( iAdditionalCriteria < iFoundAdditionalCriteria ) AND ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) ) DO
											{
												iAddLegId := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,0 ) ),
												sAddFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,1 ),
												sAddOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,2 ) ),
												sAddFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,3 ),
												
												IF ( iAddLegId == 0 ) THEN
													sAddFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sAddFieldName )
												ELSE
												{
													pSonCurrentLeg := legGetSonAt( pCurrentLeg,iAddLegId - 1 ),
													sAddFieldValue := legGetString( pSonCurrentLeg,sAddFieldName )
												},
												
												IF ( sAddOperator == "==" ) THEN
													bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue == sAddFieldCriteria )
												ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "<>" ) THEN
													bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue <> sAddFieldCriteria )
												ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
													bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ) )
												ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "IN" ) THEN
													bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ) ),
												
												iAdditionalCriteria := iAdditionalCriteria + 1
											},
											
											IF ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) THEN
												bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE
										}
										ELSE
										{
											bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE,
											ThrowWarning( "Field properties","No additional criteria are found for field properties " + sFieldProperty )
										}
									}
									ELSE
										bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE
								}
							}
							ELSE
								bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE,
							
							IF ( bFieldPropertyFit ) THEN
							{
								IF ( ( sFieldProperty <> "" )
								AND ( ( bIsInStrip == FALSE ) OR ( NOT ( strContain( sFieldProperty,"STRIP" ) ) ) ) ) THEN
									legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,sFieldProperty )
							},
							iFieldPropertyCounter := iFieldPropertyCounter + 1
						}
					},// ***End of generic code for the field properties -- component Level
					
					iComponent := iComponent + 1
				}
			},
			 //addtion for BAB
            IF sRegistration == "Flexible Deal" THEN
        	pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pContract ),
            
			iMsg:=0,
			iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
			
       		WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
        	{
            	pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
            	IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
            	legAddProperty( pContract,"common_0.1.4.3_preDealReason" ),
                
            	iMsg:=iMsg+1
        	}, 
			//Macs Model Additional Rules
			pLeg := legGetFirstComponent( This ),
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pLeg,"stg.fx.SensiPr" ) ) THEN
			{
				sGreeks := legGetString( pLeg,"stg.fx.SensiPr" ),
				IF strContain( sGreeks,"S" ) OR ( sGreeks == "ALL" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.3.1_S" ),
				IF strContain( sGreeks,"V" ) OR ( sGreeks == "ALL" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.3.2_SV" ),
				IF strContain( sGreeks,"+" ) OR ( sGreeks == "ALL" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.3.2_SVSmile" ),
				IF ( sGreeks == "ALL" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.3.4_ALL" )
			},
			
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pLeg,"stg.fx.model" ) ) THEN
			{
				sModel := legGetString( pLeg,"stg.fx.model" ),
				bMacs := strContain( sModel,"PDE" ) OR strContain( sModel,"MC" ),
				IF bMacs THEN
					legAddProperty(This,"fxd_15.0_model"),
				IF strContain( sModel,"PDE" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.1_PDE" ),
				IF strContain( sModel,"MC" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.2_MC" ),
				IF strContain( sModel,"Tremor" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( This,"fxd_15.4_Tremor" )
			},
			
			iContract := iContract + 1
		}
	},
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "FXD")   
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.SalesMg-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Sales Margin calculation & conversion

Version 1.5
Remove VAAMT and VAAMTCY management which are now managed by rule mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Closing.SalesMg

Version 1.4
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.3
Use pre-trade fields pf_Sales_margin_Book and pf_Sales_margin_amt_Book instead of LCL_MARGIN, MARGN_AMNT, MARGN_RATE UDFs.
Populate VAAMT and VAAMTCCY fields and related initial data

Version 1.2
Remove unused fields

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.0

Notes: 
- Sales margin storage to use again at booking
- Sales margin storage for information for Sales user
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	fSalesMargin := 0.0,
	fSalesMarginAmt := 0.0,
	
	IF ( ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS") ) THEN
	{
		iCount := 0,
		iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		
		WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO //Loop on the FCC
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
			IF ( ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) ) THEN
			{
				fSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Total_sales_margin" ),
				fSalesMarginAmt := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Total_sales_margin_amt" ),
				
				// Store margin information to use again at booking time (because the native fields are reset to zero)
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_Sales_margin_Book",fSalesMargin ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_Sales_margin_amt_Book",fSalesMarginAmt )
				
			},
			iCount := iCount + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress FXD Specific completion

Version 2.2
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.1
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	For barriers, check the sanity of the barrier level(s):
		- If the 1st barrier is already knocked								: "K1"
		- If the 2nd barrier is already knocked								: "K2"
		- For an up and out call, if the strike is greater than the barrier	: "SKOUp"
		- For a down and out put, if the strike is smaller than the barrier	: "SKOLow"
	For basket with only calls or only puts 								: "Bsk"
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)
        
If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","FXD" ),
    
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	pAllMessages := pNULL,
	bKnocked := FALSE,
	sBarrierDepth := "",
	sBarrierDepthTwo := "",
	sPayout := "",
	sExoticStyle := "",
	fBarrier := 0.0,
	fStrike := 0.0,
	
	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform sanity checks
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
		
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		// Barrier level checks
		IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Double Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Touch rebate" ) ) THEN
		{
			IF ( legIsInitialized( pComponent ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sAction == "INS" ) THEN 
				{
					bKnocked := FALSE,
					sBarrierDepth := legGetString( pComponent,"Barr_depth" ),
					IF ( sBarrierDepth == "Knocked" ) THEN 
					{
						IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-K1-" ) == 0 ) THEN
							legAddMessage( pComponent,"Barrier 1 is knocked at current spot","Exotic_style","Sane-K1-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) ),
						
						npResetGlobalImplied( ),
						bKnocked := TRUE
					},
					
					IF ( sRegistration <> "Simple Barrier" ) THEN
					{
						sBarrierDepthTwo := legGetString( pComponent,"Barr_depth_two" ),
						IF ( sBarrierDepthTwo == "Knocked" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-K2-" ) == 0 ) THEN
								legAddMessage( pComponent,"Barrier 2 is knocked at current spot","Exotic_style","Sane-K2-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) ),
							
							npResetGlobalImplied( ),
							bKnocked := TRUE
						}
					},
					
					IF ( ( bKnocked == FALSE ) AND ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" ) ) THEN
					{
						sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
						sExoticStyle := legGetString( pComponent,"Exotic_style" ),
						fBarrier := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Barrier" ),
						fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Strike" ),
						IF ( ( strStartsWith( sPayout,"Call" ) ) AND ( sExoticStyle == "Up Out" ) AND ( fBarrier < fStrike ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-SKOUp-" ) == 0 ) THEN
								legAddMessage( pComponent,"Barrier is lower than strike, payoff is null","Exotic_style","Sane-SKOUp-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
						}
						ELSE IF ( ( strStartsWith( sPayout,"Put" ) ) AND ( sExoticStyle == "Down Out" ) AND ( fBarrier > fStrike ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-SKOLow-" ) == 0 ) THEN
								legAddMessage( pComponent,"Barrier is greater than strike, payoff is null","Exotic_style","Sane-SKOLow-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
						}
					}
				}
			}
		},
		// Call/Put Basket check
		IF ( sRegistration == "Basket Option" ) THEN
		{
			iCurrency := 0,
			iNumCurrencies := fxBskGetNumberOfCurrencies( pComponent ), 
			sRefcallput := legGetString( pComponent,"Bsk payout" ),
			iTmp := 0,
			WHILE ( iCurrency < iNumCurrencies )  DO
			{
				sCallPut := fxBskGetCallPut( pComponent,iCurrency ),
				IF ( sCallPut == sRefcallput ) THEN
				{
					iTmp := iTmp + 1
				},
				iCurrency := iCurrency + 1
			},
			IF ( iTmp == iNumCurrencies ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Bsk-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"The reference component and the basket components are all " + sRefcallput + "s","","Sane-Bsk-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
			}
		},
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.Spec-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Specific completion

Version 1.3
Include the cell protection for the TARN flexible contract

Version 1.2
Protect cells "Conv amount" and "Hedge type" in Capture screen

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rule conventions

Version 1.0

Set specific flags for specific products
*/
{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvalActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	iSon := 0,
	iMaxSonCount := 0,
	sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
	sRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( This ),
	
	IF ( ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN 
	{
		// Fill the strategy field for Strip
		IF ( legGetProductLabel( This ) == "Strip" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( This,"Strategy","Strip of " + legGetProductLabel( legGetSonAt( This,0 ) ) ),
		
		iSon := 0,
		iMaxSonCount := legGetNumberOfSons( This ),
		WHILE ( iSon < iMaxSonCount ) DO
		{
			pSon := legGetSonAt( This,iSon ),
			IF ( legGetProductLabel( pSon ) == "Strip" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pSon,"Strategy","Strip of " + legGetProductLabel( legGetSonAt( pSon,0 ) ) ),
			
			iSon := iSon + 1
		}
	},
	
	IF ( ( sSourceClass == "" ) AND ( sRegistrationLabel == "mxContractStbIPACKAGE" ) ) THEN
		legSetRegistration( This,"mxContractStbIFREE_PACKAGE",0.0 ),
	
	//Protect cells "Conv amount" and "Hedge type" in Capture screen
	sIsInGenerateTradeScreen := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	IF ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen == "YES" ) THEN
	{
		pSourceObject := This,
		
		iComponent := 0,
		iNumComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pSourceObject ),
		
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pSourceObject,iComponent ),
			IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pComponent ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
			{
				legProtectCell( pComponent,"Conv amount",TRUE ),
				legProtectCell( pComponent,"Hedge type",TRUE )
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	},
	
	//Protect cells for TARN flexilble contract
	pContract := legGetContractAt( This,0 ),
    pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
	sRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
	IF ( sRegistration == "Flexible" ) THEN
		sFlexType := legGetString( pContract,"Flex type" ),
	IF ( sFlexType == "TARN" ) THEN
	{
		//In case values by date are set to Multiple values all the payoff construction cells should be blocked since these must be customised manually
		bMultipleValues := legGetString( pContract,"TARN#0.Schedule_Values" ) == "Multiple Values",
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_R",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_ByRange",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge", bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge", bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_Strike",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Digital_quot_1",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Digital_quot_2",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Digital_quot_3",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike1",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike2",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike3",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_L",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_Slope1",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_Slope2",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike_Slope3",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike1_ByDate",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike2_ByDate",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Strike3_ByDate",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.LowRge_by_date",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.HighRge_by_date",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_Pivot",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.PivotK_is_in",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Com_Buy_Strike",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Com_Sell_Strike",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Com_Buy_OTM%",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Com_Sell_OTM%",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.BuySellK_Bound",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Low_%",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Mid_%",bMultipleValues ),
		legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Up_%",bMultipleValues ),
		IF ( legGetBoolean( pContract,"TARN#0.Nominal_by_date" ) ) THEN
			legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_Nominal", TRUE)
		ELSE 
			legProtectCell( pContract,"TARN#0.Common_Nominal", FALSE)
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.TradabilityCheck

/*
MXpress FXD Specific completion

Version 2.4
- Move maturity and nominal checks into generic checks: TradabilityCheckCommon
- Use MX.ALL.Tradability.Sensitivity and MX.ALL.Tradability.HedgeAmount rather than MX.FXD.LiqOutN.DeltaLimit and MX.FXD.LiqOutN.HedgeLimit

Version 2.3
Call TradabilityCheckCommon function for Common Tradability Checks

Version 2.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 2.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

Version 2.0

Notes:
If the tradability is active, the goal of this rule is to analyze every component of a transaction and check if they are tradable.
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
		- traded nominal is to high : "N"
		- Hedge amount is too high	: "H"
		- Delta is too high			: "D"
		- Expiry is before minimal	: "EMin"
		- Expiry is beyond maximal	: "EMax"
	Generic Common Tradability Checks (See TradabilityCheckCommon for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
	For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/
{
	pLeg := This,
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		sEvalActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
		sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
		
		sIsTradabilityCheckActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","TradabilityCheck.FXD" ) ),
		IF ( ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN 
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = TradabilityCheck.FXD ( should be YES or NO )" ),
		
		IF ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive == "YES" )  THEN 
		{
   	        callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon","FXD" ),
			// For each of the component of the transaction, perform tradability checks      
			sUserGroup := sysGetGroup(),
			iCount := 0,
			iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
			WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg, iCount ),
				pAllMessages := legGetMessages(pComponent),
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ) ,
				IF ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) THEN
				{
					// Retrieves the dynamic values that will be used to check the tradability of the transaction
					pFieldResult := pNULL,
					sField := "Instrument",
					pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Criteria 1","" ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
					{
						iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldResult,0,0 ) ),
						sInstrumentField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
					},
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sInstrumentField ),
					dTradingDate := sysGetTradingDate( ),
					sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
					sRefCCY := ptfGetEntityCurrency( sPortfolio ),

					sLiquidity := lookupString( "MX.FXD.Liquid","ALL","Currency Pair",sInstrument ),
					
					// CHECK: FXD Hedge amount
					fHedgeAmtLimit := lookupString( "MX.ALL.Tradability","HedgeAmount","Registration", sRegistration,"Criteria",sLiquidity, "Instrument", "" ),
					sHedgeField := "Hedge type",
					fHedgeAmt := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ),
					sHedgeCCY := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge_currency" ),
					sHedging := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
					fEquivHedgeNom := fHedgeAmt*cuGetFxRate( sRefCCY ,sHedgeCCY ),
					fHedgeRate := cuGetFxRate( sRefCCY,sHedgeCCY ),
					IF ( ( sHedging  <> "No Hedge" ) AND ( sHedging  <> "" ) AND ( fEquivHedgeNom > fHedgeAmtLimit ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"TradabilityToConfirm-H-" ) == 0 ) THEN
							legAddMessage( pComponent,"Hedge Amount > " + toString( fHedgeAmtLimit / fHedgeRate, 20, 0, TRUE, 0 ) + " " + sHedgeCCY + " ( " + toString( fHedgeAmtLimit,20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sRefCCY + " or equivalent )",sHedgeField,"TradabilityToConfirm-H-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
					},
					
					// CHECK: FXD Delta amount
                    fSpotDeltaLimit := lookupString( "MX.ALL.Tradability","Sensitivity","Registration", sRegistration,"Criteria",sLiquidity, "Instrument", "" ),
					bDeltaCheck := ( sRegistration == "Simple Option" AND ( NOT( strStartsWith( legGetString( pComponent, "Payout_type" ), "Digital" ) ) ) )
								OR sRegistration == "Simple Barrier"
								OR sRegistration == "Double Barrier",
					IF ( bDeltaCheck ) THEN
					{
						sDeltaField := "Spot_exchange_delta",
						fSpotDelta := ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,sDeltaField ) )
					}
					ELSE
						fSpotDelta := 0.0,
					IF ( ( bDeltaCheck ) AND ( ( ABS( fSpotDelta ) > 50.0 + fSpotDeltaLimit ) OR ( ABS( fSpotDelta ) < 50.0 - fSpotDeltaLimit ) ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"TradabilityToConfirm-D-" ) == 0 ) THEN
							legAddMessage( pComponent,"Delta is outside range " + toString( 50.0 - fSpotDeltaLimit, 20, 0, TRUE, 0 ) + "% - " + toString( 50.0 + fSpotDeltaLimit, 20, 0, TRUE, 0 ) + "%",sDeltaField,"TradabilityToConfirm-D-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
					}					
				},
				iCount := iCount + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.TxtDesc.Hedge_Info

/*
MXpress 
FXD Text description for hedges

Version 1.9
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.8
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.7
Updated to display the legal entity instead the financial institution label

Version 1.6
Replace usage of HEDGE_PRICE and HEDGE_BS
by native field Hedge_price and pre-trade field pf_hedge_BS

Version 1.5
Amended to prevent the display of the text area in case of using generate trade or Processing/Inser trade 

Version 1.4
Replace usage of UDF HEDGE_AMT and HEDGE_CUR by native fields Hedge_amt and Hedge_currency

Version 1.3
Correct Buy/Sell values

Version 1.2
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.1
Use of ( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) lookup table to set sBank parameter

Version  1.0
Notes:
1. The hedge information will be appended to text-area
2. The hedging legs are aggregated by ( Price,Counterpart )
3. Array is used to keep the hedge info
*/

{
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sEvalActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sIsInGenerateTradeScreen := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.insertTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sPortfolio := "",
	sEntity := "",
	sWho := "",
	fHedgeAmt := 0.0,
	sHedgeCcy := "",
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	bIsCurrOpt := FALSE,
	sInstrument := "",
	sDefaultSpotQuotMode := "",
	sHedgeType := "",
	sHedgeCcy := "",
	sHedgeBuySell := "",
	sBuySell := "",
	fPrice := 0.0,
	sCounterpart := "",
	iArrayIndex := 0,
	iArrayCount := 0,
	fAPrice := 0.0,
	sACounterpart := "",
	sHedgeText := "",
	iAIndex := 0,
	iACount := 0,
	fTotalHedgeAmt := 0.0,
	fAHedgeAmt := 0.0,
	sFromTo := "",
	sPriceText := "",
	
	IF ( ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) 
	AND ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay <> "YES" ) ) THEN
	{
		sPortfolio := legGetString( legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),"Portfolio" ),
		sEntity := ptfGetLegalEntity( sPortfolio ),
		IF ( sEntity == "" ) THEN
			sWho := "Entity "
		ELSE
			sWho := sEntity + " ",
		
		fHedgeAmt := 0.,
		sHedgeCcy := "",
		
		// Define an Array so that the hedge info can be kept in this array.
		pArray := arrayNew( ),
		arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"Price",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"Amount",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Counterpart",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"BuySell",FALSE,FALSE ),
		
		iCurrentLeg := 0,
		iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
			
			//Get the registration,should be replaced by legGetRegistration( pComponent ) once the function is validated.
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			bIsCurrOpt := ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ),
			
			IF ( ( bIsCurrOpt ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Basket Option" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" ) ) THEN 
			{
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
				
				sHedgeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge_type" ),
				IF ( ( sHedgeType <> "No Hedge" ) AND ( sHedgeType <> "" ) AND ( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ) > 0.01 ) ) THEN 
				{
					//Gather the hedge information for the currenct leg 
					IF ( strLen( sHedgeCcy ) == 0 ) THEN
						sHedgeCcy := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge_currency" ),
					
					fPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ),
					sHedgeBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_hedge_BS" ),
					
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Internal" ) ) THEN
						sCounterpart := "Spot desk"
					ELSE IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Exchange" ) ) THEN 
					{
						IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ) == "" ) THEN
							sCounterpart := "Counterparty" 
						ELSE
							sCounterpart := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" )
					},
					
					//Check if a matching element can be found in the array --  ( Price,Counterpart )  are the same.
					// if so,add the current hedge amout to that element
					// if no,create a new array element for the current hedge.
					iArrayIndex := 0,
					iArrayCount := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
					pFoundElement := pNull,
					WHILE ( iArrayIndex<iArrayCount ) DO
					{
						pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iArrayIndex ),
						fAPrice := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Price" ),
						sACounterpart := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Counterpart" ),
						sAHedgeBuySell := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"BuySell" ),
						IF ( ( fAPrice == fPrice ) AND ( sACounterpart == sCounterpart ) AND sAHedgeBuySell == sHedgeBuySell ) THEN 
						{
							pFoundElement := pElement,
							iArrayIndex := iArrayCount  // if the matching element is found,exit the searching process.
						},
						iArrayIndex := iArrayIndex+1
					},
					
					// if pFoundElement is null,create a new element in the array.
					IF ( pFoundElement == pNull ) THEN
					{
						pFoundElement := arrayAddElement( pArray ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Price",fPrice ),
						arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Counterpart",sCounterpart ),
						arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"BuySell",sHedgeBuySell ),
						fHedgeAmt := 0.
					}
					ELSE
						fHedgeAmt := arrayElementGetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Amount" ),
					
					fHedgeAmt := fHedgeAmt + legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ),
					arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Amount",fHedgeAmt )
				}
			},
			iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
		},
		
		//Check if array is not empty ( need at least one hedge leg ).
		IF ( arrayGetLenght( pArray ) > 0 ) THEN 
		{
			sHedgeText := endline( ) + endline( ) + sWho + "hedges this product by ",
			
			iAIndex := 0,
			iACount := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
			fTotalHedgeAmt := 0.0,
			
			//pop the hedge information
			WHILE ( iAIndex < iACount ) DO
			{
				pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iAIndex ),
				fAPrice := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Price" ),
				fAHedgeAmt := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Amount" ),
				
				IF ( fAHedgeAmt <> 0.0 ) THEN 
				{
					sACounterpart := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Counterpart" ),
					sBuySell := strToLowerCase( arrayElementGetString( pElement,"BuySell" ) ),
					IF ( sBuySell == "sell" ) THEN
						sFromTo := "to"
					ELSE
						sFromTo := "from",
					
					sPriceText := "at " + toString( fAPrice,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
					sHedgeText := sHedgeText + sBuySell + "ing " + toString( ABS( fAHedgeAmt ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sHedgeCcy + " " + sPriceText,
					sHedgeText := sHedgeText + " " + sFromTo + " " + sACounterpart,
					
					IF ( iAIndex + 2 < iACount ) THEN
						sHedgeText := sHedgeText + ", "
					ELSE IF ( iAIndex + 1 < iACount ) THEN
						sHedgeText := sHedgeText + " and "
					
				},
				
				fTotalHedgeAmt := fTotalHedgeAmt + fAHedgeAmt,
				iAIndex := iAIndex + 1
			},
			
			IF ( strLen( sHedgeText ) > 253 ) THEN
				sHedgeText := strSubString( sHedgeText,0,249 ) + "...",
			
			IF ( fTotalHedgeAmt == 0.0 ) THEN
				sHedgeText := endline( ) + endline( ) + "No need to hedge a 0 delta structure.",
			
			//write hedge information into text-area.
			sHedgeText := sHedgeText + endline( ) + endline( ),
			
			pText := npLegGetTextField( This ),
			npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sHedgeText ),
			
			//push the desciption for the sons in a package.
			IF ( strContain( legGetRegistrationLabel( This ),"PACKAGE" ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( legGetNumberOfSons( This ) == 1 ) THEN
				{
					pFirstSon := legGetSonAt( This,0 ),
					pText := npLegGetTextField( pFirstSon ),
					npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sHedgeText )
				}
			}
		},
		arrayFree( pArray )
	}
};

/*
MXpress
FXD Bid/Ask calibration

Version 1.8
Correction for the forward value computation with "on line spot" swap point mode.

Version 1.7
Use the mxBAspreadingOTF msl function instead the CalcStructureSpread msl function

Version 1.6
Correction for Butterfly

Version 1.5
Replace VOL_CHOICE UDF by pf_vol_choice pre-trade field

Version 1.4
Take into account the calibration for Broker Strangle strategy

Version 1.3
Clean-up of references to broker strangle and virtual straddle

Version 1.2
When "Swap points mode" is set to "Constant", fix the forward value in case lambda in bid/ask configuration does not equal to 0.5.

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted rules conventions

Version  1.0

Notes: 
- This formula will call the function in dll library libfrmdll.so/libfrmba.so
- The market data recalibrated: spot, rate, vol
- The excluded legs in a structure will not be taken into account for the calibration.
- The formula is organized in three parts:
	1. Gather the input parameters for dll function
	2. Call the function and feed the legs by the outputs
	3. Write the vol choice to udf VOL_CHOICE

{

			IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pFirstCurrOptLeg ) == "CURR" ) 
			AND ( legGetProductGroup( pFirstCurrOptLeg ) == "OPT" )
			AND ( legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
			{
				bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg := TRUE, // When the first currency option leg is found, exit the loop
				iFirstCurrOptLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg - 1 //To get the correct position for the first currency option leg. 
			},
			
			iFirstCurrOptLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg + 1
		},
		
		// Check if FXD option does exist in the structure
		IF ( iFirstCurrOptLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) THEN
		{
			sInstument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
			IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pFirstCurrOptLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
				sStrikeQ := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"B/A strike quot" ),
			
			// Get the first not-empty.strike quotation
			iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg,
			
			//once a not-empty strike quotation is found, exit the loop.
			WHILE ( ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) AND ( strCMP( sStrikeQ,"",7 ) ) ) DO
			{
				pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
				
				//make sure it's a currency option and the leg is not excluded from the structure.
				IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
				AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
				AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
						sStrikeQ := legGetString( pLeg,"B/A strike quot" )
				},
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1 
			},
			
			//Check if all legs share instrument and strike quotation. If the calibration rules will not be applied. 
			iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg,
			
			//Once a leg is found to have a different instrument/strike quotation, or the expiry date is today, exit the loop.
			WHILE ( ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) AND ( bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation ) AND ( bExpiryDefined ) ) DO
			{
				pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
				IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
				AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
				AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
				{
					sLegInstument := legGetString( pLeg,"Instrument" ),
					IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
						sLegStrikeQ := legGetString( pLeg,"B/A strike quot" ),
					
					fExpiry := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Expiry days" ),
					IF ( ABS( fExpiry ) < 0.000001 ) THEN
						bExpiryDefined := FALSE,
					
					//sStrikeQ is the first not-empty strike quotation.
					IF ( ( strCMP( sLegInstument,sInstument,7 ) )
					AND ( ( strCMP( sStrikeQ,sLegStrikeQ,7 ) ) OR ( strCMP( "",sLegStrikeQ,7 ) ) ) ) THEN
						bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := TRUE
					ELSE
						bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := FALSE
				},
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
			},
			
			// Check if the calibration should be applied.
			IF ( ( bExpiryDefined == FALSE ) OR ( npIsBidAsk( ) == FALSE ) ) THEN
			{
				bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := FALSE,
				bApplyAlgorithmError := FALSE
			}
			ELSE
			{
				IF ( bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation == FALSE ) THEN
				{
					bApplyAlgorithmError := TRUE,
					bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := FALSE
				}
				ELSE
				{
					bApplyAlgorithmError := FALSE,
					bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := TRUE
				}
			},
			
			IF ( ( bApplyAlgorithmNeeded == TRUE ) OR ( strStartsWith( legGetProductLabel( This ),"Broker Strangle" ) ) ) THEN
			{
				// Sorted array of option definition 
				pOptionArray := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"TYPE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"NOTIONAL",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"CALL",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCDENBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCDENASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCNUMBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCNUMASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"EXPIRY",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"DELIVERY",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BIDSTRIKE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ASKSTRIKE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"AVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"AVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"DELTA",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"VEGA",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"RHO",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"WINDOW_TYPE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				// Array of structure spreaded prices and pricing params 
				pStructSpread := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pStructSpread,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"ONEWAYPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"OTHERWAYPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"ONEWAYVOLPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"OTHERWAYVOLPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				// This array will only hold one leg
				pElement := arrayAddElement( pStructSpread ),
				
				// Array of individual prices 
				pLegSpread := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pLegSpread,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CSPOTBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CSPOTASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CBIDZDEN",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CASKZDEN",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CBIDZNUM",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CASKZNUM",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CPBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CPASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pLegSpread,"VOLCHOICING",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				//Default Settings for no Exchange of Delta
				// iDeltaHedgedPrice := 0,
				// iFwdDeltaHedge := 0, 
				
				// Exchange of Delta impact on Calibrated data 
				sExchange := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge_type" ),
				IF ( ( sExchange == "No Hedge" ) OR ( sExchange == "Internal Spot" ) OR ( sExchange == "Internal Forward" ) ) THEN
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 0,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 0
				}
				ELSE IF ( sExchange == "Exchange Spot" ) THEN
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 0 
				}
				ELSE
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 1
				},
                
                
                // Special case of the Broker Strangle
                IF ( strStartsWith( legGetProductLabel( This ), "Broker Strangle" ) ) THEN
                {
                    iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
                    iFwdDeltaHedge := 1
                },
				
				iTwoWays := 1, //leg is in bid/ask mode
				iNumeraire := 0, // Notional is always expressed in strike denominator
				
				// Get the Common information from first currency option leg.
				sInstrument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
				xSpot := legGetBidAsk( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Local spot" ), 
				fSpotBid := getBID( xSpot ),
				fSpotAsk := getASK( xSpot ),
				
				IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pFirstCurrOptLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
					sStrikeQ := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"B/A strike quot" ), 
				sNum := fxGetQuotationNumerator( sStrikeQ ),
				sDen := fxGetQuotationDenominator( sStrikeQ ),
				sBase := fxCntGetBase( sInstrument ),
				
				sQuot := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Quotation" ),
				sQuotNum := fxPremiumQuotationGetNumerator( sQuot ),
				sQuotDen := fxPremiumQuotationGetDenominator( sQuot ),
				IF ( strCMP( sNum,sQuotNum,3 ) ) THEN
					iPremiumInAsset := 0
				ELSE
					iPremiumInAsset := 1,
				
				bStatus := FALSE,
				sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
				IF ( sDefaultSpotQuotMode == sStrikeQ ) THEN
					iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode := 1
				ELSE
					iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode := 0,
				
				dEvalDate := npGetEvaluationDate( ),
				dSpotDate := fxCntGetSpotDate( sInstrument,dEvalDate ),
				sCalendar := fxCntGetSpotToDeliveryCalendar( sInstrument ),
				
				//Pricing Both Ways
				//Loop on all the components and get the Leg information
				iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg, 
				iNumCurrOptLegs := 0,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) DO
				{
					pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
					AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
					AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
					{
						iNumCurrOptLegs := iNumCurrOptLegs + 1,
						sBuy := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy/Sell" ),
						IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
							xStrike := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Bid/Ask strike" ), 
						
						IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
							sPayout := legGetString( pLeg,"Payout" ),
						
						fNotional := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Nominal" ),
						sType := legGetProductLabel( pLeg ),
						IF ( ( sType =="One Barr" ) OR ( sType == "Two Barr" ) OR ( strCMP( sType,"Touch",5 ) ) ) THEN
						{
							fBarrier := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Barrier" ),
							sBarType := legGetString( pLeg,"Exotic_style" )
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sType,"Touch",5 ) ) THEN
						{
							fBidStrike := 1.0,
							fAskStrike := 1.0
						}
						ELSE
						{
							fBidStrike := getBID( xStrike ), // Bid Strike 
							fAskStrike := getASK( xStrike ) // Ask Strike 
						},

                        sNominalUnit := legGetString( pLeg,"Nominal_unit" ),
                        fNominal := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Nominal" ),
                        IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN 
                            fOtherNominal := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Other_nominal" ),
                        
                        fDelta := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Spot_calibrated_delta" ),
                        sDeltaCcy := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_exch_delta_unit" ),
                        IF ( sDeltaCcy == sNum ) THEN
                        {
                            IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                                fDelta := - fDelta / ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            ELSE
                                fDelta := - fDelta * ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5
                        },
                        
                        IF ( sDeltaCcy == sNominalUnit ) THEN
                            fDelta := fDelta * fNominal * 0.01
                        ELSE
                            fDelta := fDelta * fOtherNominal * 0.01,
                        
                        fVega := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_vega" ),
                        IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                            fRho := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_rho_ccy" )
                        ELSE
                            fRho := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_rhoF_ccy" ),
                        
                        IF ( sQuotNum == sDen ) THEN
                        {
                            IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                            {
                                fVega := fVega * ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 ),
                                fRho := fRho * ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            }
                            ELSE
                            {
                                fVega := fVega / ( ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 ),
                                fRho := fRho / ( ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            }
                        },
                        
                        fFF := fxGetPremiumQuotationFormFactor( sQuot ),
                        IF ( sQuotDen == sNominalUnit ) THEN
                        {
                            fVega := fVega * fNominal / fFF,
                            fRho := fRho * fNominal / fFF
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                            fVega := fVega * fOtherNominal / fFF,
                            fRho := fRho * fOtherNominal / fFF
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sPayout,"Call",4 ) ) THEN
							iCall := 1 
						ELSE
							iCall := -1, 
						
						IF ( strCMP( sBuy,"Sell",4 ) ) THEN
						{
							fNotional := - 1.0 * fNotional,
							fDelta := - 1.0 * fDelta,
							fVega := - 1.0 * fVega,
							fRho := - 1.0 * fRho
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sType,"Vanilla",7 ) ) THEN
						{
							xBidStrikeVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local b.strike vol" ),  // Bid Strike Local vol
							fBidBidStrikeVol := getBID( xBidStrikeVol ) / 100., 
							fAskBidStrikeVol := getASK( xBidStrikeVol ) / 100., 
							xAskStrikeVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local a.strike vol" ), // Ask Strike Local vol 
							fBidAskStrikeVol := getBID( xAskStrikeVol ) / 100.0,
							fAskAskStrikeVol := getASK( xAskStrikeVol ) / 100.0
						}
						ELSE
						{
							xVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local volatility" ),  // Local vol
							fBidBidStrikeVol := getBID( xVol ) / 100.0,
							fAskBidStrikeVol := getASK( xVol ) / 100.0, 
							fBidAskStrikeVol := getBID( xVol ) / 100.0, 
							fAskAskStrikeVol := getASK( xVol ) / 100.
						},
						
						fExpiry := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Expiry days" ) / 365.0, 
						fDelivery := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Delivery days" ) / 365.0,
						
						xNumZero := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local_ZC_rate" ),
						xDenZero := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local_ZC_rate_F" ),
						fNumBid := getBID( xNumZero ) / 100.0, 
						fNumAsk := getASK( xNumZero ) / 100.0, 
						fDenBid := getBID( xDenZero ) / 100.0,
						fDenAsk := getASK( xDenZero ) / 100.0, 
						
						dDelivery := legGetDate(pLeg,"Delivery"),
						IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1W",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 0
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1W",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 1
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1M",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 2
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1M",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 3
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"3M",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 4
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"3M",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 5
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1Y",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 6
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1Y",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 7
						ELSE
							iWindowType := 8,
						
						pElement2 := arrayAddElement( pOptionArray ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"INDEX",iCurrentLeg ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"TYPE",iType ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"NOTIONAL",fNotional ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"CALL",iCall ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCDENBID",fDenBid ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCDENASK",fDenAsk ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCNUMBID",fNumBid ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCNUMASK",fNumAsk ), 
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"EXPIRY",fExpiry ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"DELIVERY",fDelivery ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BIDSTRIKE",fBidStrike ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ASKSTRIKE",fAskStrike ), 
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BVOLBID",fBidBidStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BVOLASK",fAskBidStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"AVOLBID",fBidAskStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"AVOLASK",fAskAskStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"DELTA",fDelta ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"VEGA",fVega ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"RHO",fRho ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"WINDOW_TYPE",iWindowType ),
						
						pElement3 := arrayAddElement( pLegSpread )
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1 
				}, 
				
				// Apply DLL 
				bStatus := mxBAspreadingOTF(iTwoWays,				//  1  fTwoWays 
										iNumCurrOptLegs,		//  2  uNumOptions
										iPremiumInAsset,		//  3  iPremiumInAsset
										iDeltaHedgedPrice,		//  4  iDeltaHedgedPrice
										iFwdDeltaHedge,		//  5  iFwdDeltaHedge
										iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode,	//  6  iIsDefaultSpotQuotationMode 
										fClientSpecificSpread,		// 7  dClientSpecificSpread 
										fSpotBid,				//  8  dBidLMDSpot
										fSpotAsk,				//  9  dAskLMDSpot
										pOptionArray,			// 10  Vector of option definitions
										"TYPE",				// 11  Label for piTypes
										"NOTIONAL",			// 12  Label for pdNotionals
										"CALL",				// 13  Label for pfAssetCallPutParities
										"ZCDENBID",			// 14  Label for pdBidAssetLMDZeroRate
										"ZCDENASK",			// 15  Label for pdAskAssetLMDZeroRate
										"ZCNUMBID",			// 16  Label for pdBidNumerLMDZeroRate
										"ZCNUMASK",			// 17  Label for pdAskNumerLMDZeroRate
										"EXPIRY",			// 18  Label for pdExpYears 
										"DELIVERY",			// 19  Label for pdDelYears 
										"BIDSTRIKE",			// 20  Label for pdBidStrikes 
										"ASKSTRIKE",			// 21  Label for pdAskStrikes
										"BVOLBID",			// 22  Label for pdBidStrikeBidVols
										"BVOLASK",			// 23  Label for pdBidStrikeAskVols  
										"AVOLBID",			// 24  Label for pdAskStrikeBidVols
										"AVOLASK",			// 25  Label for pdAskStrikeAskVols
										"DELTA",				// 26  Label for pdDeltas
										"VEGA",				// 27  Label for pdVegas
										"RHO",				// 28  Label for pdRhos
										"WINDOW_TYPE",		// 29  Label for piWindowTypes
										pLegSpread,			// 30  Vector of individual leg results
										"CSPOTBID",			// 31  Label for leg bid CMD spot rate
										"CSPOTASK",			// 32  Label for leg Ask CMD spot rate
										"CBIDZDEN",			// 33  Label for leg bid asset CMD zzero rate
										"CASKZDEN",			// 34  Label for leg Ask asset CMD zzero rate
										"CBIDZNUM",			// 35  Label for leg bid num CMD zero rate
										"CASKZNUM",			// 36  Label for leg Ask num CMD zero rate
										"CVOLBID",			// 37  Label for leg bid CMD vol        
										"CVOLASK",			// 38  Label for leg Ask CMD vol
										"CPBID",				// 39  Label for leg bid price
										"CPASK",				// 40  Label for leg Ask price
										"VOLCHOICING",		// 41  Label for Vol choicing type
										pStructSpread,			// 42  Vector of global structure results 
										"ONEWAYPRICE",		// 43  Label for Structure One Way Net price
										"OTHERWAYPRICE",		// 44  Label for Structure Other Way Net price    
										"ONEWAYVOLPRICE",	// 45  Label for Structure One Way VolSpreadOnly price (used in INPV calculation)
										"OTHERWAYVOLPRICE",	// 46  Label for Structure Other Way VolSpreadOnly price (used in INPV calculation)
										sError ),				// 47  pStrErrorMessage      
				
				IF ( bStatus == TRUE ) THEN
					trcPushWarning( sSpreadingErrorName,sError ),
				
				// Setting Results
				
				// Set results for each FX Option leg
				sSwapPointMode := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Swap_points_mode" ),
				iCurrentLeg := 0,
				iIndex2 := 0,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) DO
				{
					pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) THEN
						{
							//Pop hte calibration results from the array., 
							// iIndex2  -- Current array element.
							pElement := arrayGetElement( pLegSpread,iIndex2 ),
							
							fCSpotBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CSPOTBID" ),
							fCSpotAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CSPOTASK" ),
