							fCZDenBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CBIDZDEN" ) * 100.0,
							fCZDenAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CASKZDEN" ) * 100.0,
							fCZNumBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CBIDZNUM" ) * 100.0,
							fCZNumAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CASKZNUM" ) * 100.0,
							fCVolBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CVOLBID" ) * 100.0,
							fCVolAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CVOLASK" ) * 100.0,
							fDelivery := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Delivery_days" ) / 365.0,
							
							fLambada := fxGetBidAskNumericSetting( "Lambda" ),
							fZC_Conv_Days := 365,
							fRate_Conv_Days := 360,
							fDeliveryDays := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Delivery_days" ),
							fCFDenBid := EXP( fCZDenBid/100.0*fDeliveryDays/fZC_Conv_Days ),
							fCFDenAsk := EXP( fCZDenAsk/100.0*fDeliveryDays/fZC_Conv_Days ),
							fCFNumBid := EXP( fCZNumBid/100.0*fDeliveryDays/fZC_Conv_Days ),
							fCFNumAsk := EXP( fCZNumAsk/100.0*fDeliveryDays/fZC_Conv_Days ),
							
							fCBidFwd := fCSpotBid
											* ( pow( fCFNumBid,0.5 + fLambada ) * pow( fCFNumAsk,0.5 - fLambada ) ) 
											/ ( pow( fCFDenBid,0.5 - fLambada ) * pow( fCFDenAsk,0.5 + fLambada) ),
							fCAskFwd := fCSpotAsk
											* ( pow( fCFNumBid,0.5 - fLambada ) * pow( fCFNumAsk,0.5 + fLambada ) ) 
											/ ( pow( fCFDenBid,0.5 + fLambada ) * pow( fCFDenAsk,0.5 - fLambada ) ),
							
							setBID( xCSpot,fCSpotBid ),
							setASK( xCSpot,fCSpotAsk ),
							setBID( xCZCDen,fCZDenBid ),
							setASK( xCZCDen,fCZDenAsk ),
							setBID( xCZCNum,fCZNumBid ), 
							setASK( xCZCNum,fCZNumAsk ),
							setBID( xCVol,fCVolBid ),
							setASK( xCVol,fCVolAsk ),
							setBID( xCFwd,fCBidFwd ),
							setASK( xCFwd,fCAskFwd ),
							
							legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_spot",xCSpot ),
							legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_ZC_rate",xCZCNum ),
							
							IF ( sSwapPointMode == "Constant" ) THEN
								legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_forward",xCFwd )
							ELSE
								legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_ZC_rate_F",xCZCDen ),
							
							legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_volatility",xCVol ),
							
							// DEBUG Choicing
							/*
							FRMBA_BA_NETTING		= 0,
							FRMBA_BA_SYNTHETIC_FWD	= 1,
							FRMBA_BA_FLEX_FWD		= 2,
							FRMBA_BA_NON_VANILLA	= 3,
							FRMBA_BA_CALENDAR_SPREAD= 4,
							FRMBA_BA_DEFAULT		= 5*/
							iVolChoicingType:=arrayElementGetInteger(pElement,"VOLCHOICING"),
							IF ( iVolChoicingType == 0 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Netting"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 1 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Synthetic Fwd"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 2 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Flex Fwd"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 3 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Non Vanilla"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 4 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Calendar Spread"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 5 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Usual"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 6 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Butterfly",
							legSetString( pLeg,"pf_vol_choice",sVolChoicing ),
							iIndex2 := iIndex2 + 1
						}
						ELSE
							legSetString( pLeg,"pf_vol_choice","" )
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				},
				
				// Free pointers
				arrayFree( pOptionArray ),
				arrayFree( pStructSpread ),
				arrayFree( pLegSpread )
			}
			ELSE IF ( bApplyAlgorithmError == TRUE ) THEN
				trcPushWarning( sSpreadingErrorName,"Inconsistent structure definition" )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.FInit-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Pre-Pricing completion

Version 1.15
Updated to handle the hedge type

Version 1.14
Updated to handle Call/Put side: keep the same Call/Put side when changing the nominal currency

Version 1.13
Updated to handle touch, touch discrete and barrier discrete options

Version 1.12
- Updated to handle the TARN as flexible contract instead an stb contract
- Removal of Pivot Target Fwd FXD, as it is handle as TARN

Version 1.11
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.10
Handle the Accumulator FXD and Pivot Target Fwd FXD patterns too

Version 1.9
Change the Target Forward FXD pattern into nb fixing mode

Version 1.8
Use MX.FX.Archive LUT

Version 1.7
Handle the Target Forward FXD pattern too

Version 1.6
Add morphing management: force the payout type depending on the pattern

Version 1.5
Amend the default archiving

Version 1.4
The default solving mode for FLEX deals is Brent instead Newton.
For the Dual Flex product: set the Maturity with the Option expiration field value

Version 1.3
Cleanup: remove useless code and variables

Version 1.2
Add new FXD product: Listed Option FXD

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version  1.0

Notes: 
1. Synchronize the 'Digital currency' & 'Payout currency' with 'Traded unit'
2. Set the 'Brent' as the solving method for barrier option
3. Setting the default Cutoff ( LUT,MX.FXD.Cutoff ALL )
4. Setting the default Hedge type ( LUT,MX.FXD.Hedging ALL )
5. Setting the default Archiving groups and generators for ASN
	( LUT  MX.FXD.Archive ALL ).
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	iNumLegs := 0,
	sRegistration := "",
	sBOSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
	sEvalActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	sCutoff := "",
	sOverwrite := "",
	sPreviousInstrument := "",
	sInstrument := "",
	sFirstCcy := "",
	sSecondCcy := "",
	sPreviousInstrument := "",
	bIsSonOfStripNotFirst := FALSE,
	bIsFirstStripSon := FALSE,
	iCurrentLeg := 0,
	iFirstCurrOptLeg := 0,
	sHedgeType := "",
	sCurrentHedge := "",
	sDefaultHedgeType := "",
	iMax := 0,
	sQuery := "",
	iResult := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	sCalendar := "",
	sCalendar2 := "",
	iClosest := 0,
	iExpiry := 0,
	sExpiryRange := "",
	sOperator := "",
	bInclusive := FALSE,
	sExpiryLabel := "",
	sDefaultHedgeType2 := "",
	
	// Set default Cutoff based on LUT 'Cutoff'
	IF ( ( sBOSource == "" ) AND ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN 
	{
		// Initialize the parameters for the scanning of structure
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		//Declare and initialize the variables used in the loop 
		sCutoff := "",
		sOverwrite := "",
		sPreviousInstrument := "",
		
		// run through all components in the current structure.
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO 
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iComponent ),
			IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pComponent ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN// Family Group is used here
			{
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				
				//If the current component has the same instrument as the previous leg,use the cutoff of the previous leg. 
				IF ( sInstrument <> sPreviousInstrument ) THEN
				{
					pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.Cutoff","ALL",
										"Currency Pair",sInstrument ),
					
					IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN 
					{
						sFirstCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 ),
						sSecondCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,4 ),
						pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.Cutoff","ALL",
												"Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*" ),
						
						IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.Cutoff","ALL",
													"Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy ),
						
						IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.Cutoff","ALL",
													"Currency Pair","*/*" )
					},
					
					sCutoff := "",
					sOverwrite := "",
					IF ( NOT ( isNull( pResults ) ) ) THEN 
					{
						sCutoff := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
						sOverwrite := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
						IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cutoff full",sCutoff )
						ELSE
							legSetString( pComponent,"Cutoff full",sCutoff )
					},
					sPreviousInstrument := sInstrument
				}
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sCutoff <> "" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"Cutoff full",sCutoff )
						ELSE
							legSetString( pComponent,"Cutoff full",sCutoff )
					}
				}
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	},
	
	/********************************    Set Default Hedge type    ****************************************
	The default 'Hedge type' depends on 
		1. Currency Pair
		2. Expiry Range  ( customizable )
	The overwrite rule is:
		1. 'Hedge type'  is not customized   ---> sets the default hedge and propagates it 
		2. Hedge type'  is customized ---> propagate the customized value
	*******************************************************************************************************/
	// Formula for default hedge type assignment
	// Stop the default hedge type assignment,add codes for propagation of hedge type among components in strip.
	// Check if the the current leg is actually a son of a strip.
	// In case it's a son of a strip and it's not the first son,escap the execution.
	IF ( legIsInitialized( This ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( ( sBOSource == "" ) AND ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN 
		{
			pFatherLeg := legGetFather( This ),
			bIsSonOfStripNotFirst := FALSE,
			bIsFirstStripSon := FALSE,
			
			IF ( NOT isNull( pFatherLeg ) ) THEN
			{
				pFirstStripSon := legGetSonAt( pFatherLeg,0 ),
				
				IF ( strContain( legGetTitle( pFatherLeg ),"Strip" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( pFirstStripSon == This ) THEN
						bIsFirstStripSon := TRUE
					ELSE
						bIsSonOfStripNotFirst := TRUE
				}
			},
			
			IF ( bIsSonOfStripNotFirst ) THEN
			{
				pFirstStripSon := legGetSonAt( pFatherLeg,0 ),
				
				iCurrentLeg := 0,
				iFirstCurrOptLeg := -1,
				iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pFirstStripSon ),
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
				{ 
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pFirstStripSon,0 ),
					
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pComponent ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
					{
						iFirstCurrOptLeg := iCurrentLeg,
						pFirstCurrOptLeg := pComponent,
						iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				},
				
				IF ( ( iFirstCurrOptLeg > -1 ) AND ( iFirstCurrOptLeg < iNumLegs ) ) THEN
					sHedgeType := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge type" ),
				
				iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
				{
					pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pCurrentLeg ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pCurrentLeg ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"Hedge type",sHedgeType ),
					
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				}
			}
			ELSE 
			{
				iCurrentLeg := 0,
				iFirstCurrOptLeg := -1,
				iNumLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
				
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumLegs ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pComponent ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
					{
						iFirstCurrOptLeg := iCurrentLeg,
						pFirstCurrOptLeg := pComponent,
						iCurrentLeg := iNumLegs
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				},
				
				IF ( ( iFirstCurrOptLeg > -1 ) AND ( iFirstCurrOptLeg < iNumLegs ) ) THEN
				{
					sCurrentHedge := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge_type" ),
					IF ( ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge_type" ) ) AND ( strLen( sCurrentHedge ) > 0 ) ) THEN
						sDefaultHedgeType := sCurrentHedge
					ELSE 
					{
						sInstrument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
						sFirstCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 ),
						sSecondCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,4 ),
						sDefaultHedgeType := "",
						iCount := 0,
						iMax := 4,
						WHILE ( iCount < iMax ) DO
						{
							IF ( iCount == 0 ) THEN
								sQuery := sInstrument
							ELSE IF ( iCount == 1 ) THEN
								sQuery := sFirstCcy + "/*"
							ELSE IF ( iCount == 2 ) THEN
								sQuery := "*/" + sSecondCcy
							ELSE
								sQuery := "*/*",
							
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.Hedging","ALL",
												"Currency Pair",sQuery ),
							IF ( NOT ( isNull( pResults ) ) ) THEN
							{
								iResult := 0,
								iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
								dSpot := fxCntGetSpotDate( sInstrument,sysGetTradingDate( ) ),
								sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pFirstCurrOptLeg ),
								IF ( sRegistration == "Listed Option" ) THEN
									dOptionExpiry := legGetDate( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Maturity" )
								ELSE
									dOptionExpiry := legGetDate( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Option_expiration" ),
								sCalendar := fxCntGetSpotToDeliveryCalendar( sInstrument ),
								sCalendar2 := fxCntGetDateToValueDateCalendar( sInstrument ),
								iClosest := 9999999,
								iExpiry := toInt( convertDToNumeric( dOptionExpiry ) ),
								WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults ) DO
								{
									sExpiryRange := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,0 ),
									sHedgeType := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,1 ),
									
									// check if any matching entries can be found in the LUT
									//           If so,get the hedge type and assign it to "sDefaultHedgeType"
									IF ( strStartsWith( sExpiryRange,"More Than" ) ) THEN
									{
										IF ( strStartsWith( sExpiryRange,"More Than Or Equal To" ) ) THEN
											sOperator := "More Than Or Equal To" 
										ELSE
											sOperator := "More Than",
										
										bInclusive := ( sOperator == "More Than Or Equal To" ),
										sExpiryLabel := strTrim( strSubString( sExpiryRange,strLEN( sOperator ) ) ),
										dEnd := dSpot + shift( dSpot,sExpiryLabel,sCalendar ),
										dExpiry := dEnd + shift( dEnd,"-2OD",sCalendar2 ),
										IF ( ( iClosest > ABS( iExpiry - toInt( convertDToNumeric( dExpiry ) ) ) )
										AND ( ( ( dOptionExpiry > dExpiry ) AND ( NOT bInclusive ) )
												OR ( ( dOptionExpiry >= dExpiry ) AND ( bInclusive ) ) ) ) THEN
										{
											iClosest := ABS( iExpiry - toInt( convertDToNumeric( dExpiry ) ) ),
											sDefaultHedgeType := sHedgeType
										}
									}
									ELSE IF ( strStartsWith( sExpiryRange,"Less Than" ) ) THEN 
									{
										IF ( strStartsWith( sExpiryRange,"Less Than Or Equal To" ) ) THEN 
											sOperator := "Less Than Or Equal To"
										ELSE
											sOperator := "Less Than",
										
										bInclusive := ( sOperator == "Less Than Or Equal To" ),
										sExpiryLabel := strTrim( strSubString( sExpiryRange,strLEN( sOperator ) ) ),
										dEnd := dSpot + shift( dSpot,sExpiryLabel,sCalendar ),
										dExpiry := dEnd + shift( dEnd,"-2OD",sCalendar2 ),
										IF ( ( iClosest > ABS( iExpiry - toInt( convertDToNumeric( dExpiry ) ) ) )
										AND ( ( ( dOptionExpiry < dExpiry ) AND ( NOT bInclusive ) )
												OR ( ( dOptionExpiry <= dExpiry ) AND ( bInclusive ) ) ) ) THEN 
										{
											iClosest := ABS( iExpiry - toInt( convertDToNumeric( dExpiry ) ) ),
											sDefaultHedgeType := sHedgeType
										}
									}
									ELSE IF ( strTrim( sExpiryRange ) == "*" ) THEN
										sDefaultHedgeType2 := sHedgeType,
									
									iResult := iResult + 1
								}
							},
							//If a default hedge type is found,stop the searching process
							IF ( strLEN( sDefaultHedgeType ) > 2 OR strLEN( sDefaultHedgeType2 ) > 2 ) THEN
								iCount := iMax,
							
							iCount := iCount + 1
						},
						
						IF ( strLEN( sDefaultHedgeType ) == 0 ) THEN
							sDefaultHedgeType := sDefaultHedgeType2,
						// Set  the default hedge type to the current leg ( first FX Option Leg ). 
						legSetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge_type",sDefaultHedgeType )
					},
					
					// propagate the hedge type for the rest FX Options
					IF ( bIsFirstStripSon ) THEN
						pStructure := legGetFather( This )
					ELSE
						pStructure := This,
					
					iComponent := 0,
					iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pStructure ),
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pStructure,iComponent ),
						IF ( pCurrentLeg <> pFirstCurrOptLeg ) THEN
						{
							IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pCurrentLeg ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pCurrentLeg ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg,"Hedge type",sDefaultHedgeType )
						},
						iComponent := iComponent+1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	
	/**********************  Set the default Archiving Group & Column  ******************************
	Archiving Rules:
	-- Based on the Currency Pair
	-- If Overwrite is 'YES',then force this value
	****************************************************************************************************/
	IF ( ( sBOSource == "" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN
	{
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iComponent ),
			
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			//Set Archiving group for Tarns
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Flex type" ) ) THEN
			{
				sFlexType := legGetString( pComponent,"Flex type" ),
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Flexible Deal" ) AND ( sFlexType == "TARN" ) ) THEN
				{
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					
					IF ( sInstrument <> "" ) THEN
					{
						pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Fixing","Currency Pair",sInstrument ),
					
						IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Fixing","Currency Pair","*/*" ),
						
						sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
						sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
						legSetString( pComponent, "TARN#0.Archiving", sArchivingGroup + ":" + sArchivingColumn )
					}
				}
			},
			
			IF ( ( sRegistration <> "Basket Option" )
				AND ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" )
				AND ( ( ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Non deliverable" ) AND legGetString( pComponent,"Non deliverable" ) == "Yes" ) OR ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Discrete" ) AND legGetString( pComponent,"Discrete" ) == "Yes" )  )
						OR ( sRegistration == "Asian Option" ) 
						OR ( sRegistration == "Look-Back Option" ) 
						OR ( sRegistration == "Strip of Simple Options" ) ) ) THEN
			{
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				IF ( strLen( sInstrument ) > 0 ) THEN
				{
					sArchivingGroup := "",
					sArchivingColumn := "",
					sOverwrite := "NO",
					pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Non Deliverable",
										"Currency Pair",sInstrument ),
					
					IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
					{
						sFirstCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 ),
						sSecondCcy := strSubString( sInstrument,4 ),
						pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Non Deliverable", "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*" ),
						IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Non Deliverable", "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy ),
						IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
							pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive","Non Deliverable", "Currency Pair","*/*" )
					},
					
					IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
					{
						sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
						sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
						sOverwrite := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ) ),
						IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN 
						{
							IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Archiving_group" ) ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"Archiving_group",sArchivingGroup ),
							IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Archiving_column" ) ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"Archiving_column",sArchivingColumn ),
							IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Fixing_source" ) ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"Fixing_source",sArchivingGroup+":"+sArchivingColumn )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Archiving_group" ) ) THEN
								legSetString( pComponent,"Archiving_group",sArchivingGroup ),
							IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Archiving_column" ) ) THEN
								legSetString( pComponent,"Archiving_column",sArchivingColumn ),
							IF ( sArchivingGroup <> ""  AND legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Fixing_source" ) ) THEN
								legSetString( pComponent,"Fixing_source",sArchivingGroup+":"+sArchivingColumn )
						}
					}
				}
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	},
	
	/**********************  Set Brent for FLEX contracts, Newton for others  *******************************/
	IF ( sAction == "INS" ) THEN
	{
		bFlexInStrategy := FALSE,
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iComponent ),
			sProduct := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			sType := legGetProductType( pComponent ),
			IF ( ( sProduct == "CURR" ) AND ( sType == "FLEX" ) ) THEN
			{
				bFlexInStrategy := TRUE,
				iComponent := iNbComponents
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		
		IF ( bFlexInStrategy ) THEN 
			legSolverSetMethod( This,"Brent" )
		ELSE
			legSolverSetMethod( This,"Newton" )
	},
	
	/**********************  Set Maturity for Dual FXD product  *******************************/
	IF ( sAction == "INS" ) THEN
	{
		pContract := This,
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt(pContract,0),
		sContractRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
		IF ( sContractRegistration == "Dual FXD" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"DUAL#0.Expiry",legGetDate( pComponent,"Option expiration" ) )
	},
	
	/**********************  Morphing management: force the payout type depending on the pattern  *******************************/
	IF ( ( sBOSource == "" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN
	{
		pContract := This,
		
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
			IF ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) THEN
			{
				sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
				IF strContain( sPatternLabel,"Digital" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Payout type","Digital" )
				ELSE IF strContain( sPatternLabel,"Quanto" ) THEN
					legOverwrite(pComponent,"Payout type","Quanto")
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Payout type" ) ) THEN
						legSetString( pComponent,"Payout type","Standard" )
				}
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	},
	
	/*************************** Kiko FXD product ***********************/
	IF ( ( legGetRegistration( pComponent ) == "Kiko Barrier" ) AND ( legGetLastInputField( pComponent ) == "Traded_nominal_unit" ) AND ( sEvalActive == "YES" ) ) THEN
	{
		sKOCallPut := legGetString( pComponent, "KO_Call_Put" ),
		IF ( sKOCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"KO_Call_Put","Put" )
		ELSE IF ( sKOCallPut == "Put" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"KO_Call_Put","Call" ),
		
		sKOLowCallPut := legGetString(pComponent, "KOLow_Call_Put"),
		IF ( sKOLowCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"KOLow_Call_Put","Put" )
		ELSE IF ( sKOLowCallPut == "Put" ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"KOLow_Call_Put","Call" )
	},
	
	/*************************** Kiko FXD product Transatlantic mode ***********************/
	IF ( legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ) == "Kiko Transatlantic FXD" ) THEN
	{
		legOverwrite( pComponent,"Transatlantic","Yes")
	},
	
	/*************************** Accumulator FXD product ***********************/
	pContract := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
	sContractRegistration := legGetTitle( pContract ),
	IF ( sContractRegistration == "Accumulator FXD" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponent,"ACCUM#0.High range" ) == FALSE ) THEN
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"ACCUM#0.High range",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"ACCUM#0.Strike" ) )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.ReqOut-Gen1

/*
MXpress
FXD Requested outputs

Version 1.4
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.3
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.2
Reset the bIsCurrOpt boolean for each component

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.0

Notes:
1. Only called when b/a calibration is applied
2. Right before the first pricing task 
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	iIndex := 0,
	iCount := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	bIsCurrOpt := FALSE,
	
	IF ( sEvaluationActive =="YES" ) THEN
	{ 
		iIndex := 0,
		iCount := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		WHILE ( iIndex < iCount ) DO
		{
			pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iIndex ),
			bIsCurrOpt := FALSE,
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pLeg ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pLeg ),
			IF ( ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) ) THEN
				bIsCurrOpt := TRUE,
			
			IF ( ( bIsCurrOpt ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" ) ) THEN 
			{
				legForceOutputs( pLeg ),
				legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Spot_calibrated_delta" ),
				legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_vega" ),
				legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_rho" ),
				legSelectOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_rhoF" )
			},
			iIndex := iIndex + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.ReqOut-Gen2

/*
MXpress
FXD Requested outputs

Version 1.2
Update on rho fields

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version  1.0

Notes:
1. Only called when b/a calibration is applied
2. Right before the first pricing task 
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	iIndex := 0,
	iCount := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	
	IF ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) THEN
	{
		iIndex := 0,
		iCount := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		WHILE ( iIndex < iCount ) DO
		{
			pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iIndex ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pLeg ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pLeg ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
			
			IF ( ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) ) THEN 
			{
				legSelectAllOutputs( pLeg ),
				IF ( ( sRegistration <> "Best Of Option" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Basket Option" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "Flexible Deal" ) ) THEN
				{
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Spot_calibrated_delta" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Fwd_calibrated_delta" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_gamma" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_vega" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_rho_ccy" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_rhoF_ccy" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_theta" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_vanna" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Calibrated_volga" )
				},
				
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Double Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Touch rebate" ) ) THEN
				{
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Premium_calibrated" ),
					legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Delta_gap" ),
					
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Barrier" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Double Barrier" ) ) THEN
						legRemoveOutput( pLeg,"Hit_probability" )
				}
			},
			iIndex := iIndex + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.RestCal-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Reset the Calibration for "Simple Option"

Version 1.4
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.3
Replace VOL_CHOICE UDF by pf_vol_choice pre-trade field

Version 1.2
Amended to prevent reset to ATM of the smile volatility for a strategy of vanillas toggled from bid/ask to mid.

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.0

Note:
In the presence of exotic products in a package, the legs calibrated should be restored
*/

{
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	iIndex := 0,
	iCount := 0,
	sRegistration := "",
	
	IF ( ( sEvaluationActive =="YES" ) AND ( legGetNumberOfComponents( This ) > 0 ) ) THEN 
	{
		iIndex := 0,
		iCount := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		WHILE ( iIndex < iCount ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This,iIndex ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "Simple Option" ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_vol_choice" ) <> "" ) ) THEN 
			{
				legSetString( pComponent, "pf_vol_choice","" ),
				IF ( legGetBidAsk( pComponent,"Local volatility" ) <> legGetBidAsk( pComponent,"Calibrated volatility" ) ) THEN
					legRestoreMarketData( pComponent,"Calibrated volatility" ),
				legRestoreMarketData( pComponent,"Calibrated spot" ),
				legRestoreMarketData( pComponent,"Calibrated forward" ),
				legRestoreMarketData( pComponent,"Calibrated ZC rate" ),
				legRestoreMarketData( pComponent,"Calibrated ZC rate F" )
			},
			
			iIndex := iIndex + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXMM.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
FXMM short text description rule

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	Determine the kind of event to know if it is requested to rebuild the short description
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty or it is one of the needed events then
	Loop on all components
		Initialized fields accordingly
		Build short description accordingly
	End loop on components
End if

Version 1.13
To remove the multi leg swap references

Version 1.12
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.11
Updated to display the "Price" instead the "Net Forward" field

Version 1.10
Correction on way to retrieve the event

Version 1.9
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.8
Amended to handle DR1

Version 1.7
Amanded to handle Islamic deals

Version 1.6
Adding Prorata Short Description

Version 1.5
Adding Credit Line and Forward notice Short Description
Fixes on retrieved fields name: Nominal unit

Version 1.4
Amended to ensure the Short description is rebuild is relevant cases such as in case of these events:
Money market roll over, Money market roll over one into many andMoney market roll over many into one

Version 1.3
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.2
Fixes on retrieved fields name

Version 1.1
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.0
The description is used in the eTradepad Text Area
This description is a general description of the product
Handled registrations are: Spot-Forward, FX swap, Futures, Loans/Deposits, Simple cash flow, Call deposits, CP/CD and native FXMM packages
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		sEvent := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
		bEventBlotterDescriptionToRebuild := ( sEvent == "mxContractEventRatesIROLL_OVER" )
								OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventRatesIMULTIPLE_ROLL_OVER" )
								OR ( sEvent == "mxContractEventRatesIROLLOVER_MANY_ONE" ),
		
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pLeg ),
		// These variables are used to lookup up the maturity as retrieved from the internal typology
		// And map it to a  more explicit sring. Both strings are stored in "priority" order 
		// The most "important" priority is passed to the contract ( in case of swap )
		sMATURITY_FROM := "???/TDY/TOM/SPT",
		sMATURITY_TO := " /today/tomorrow/spot",
		iNbDecimalAmount := 0,
		iNbDecimalRate := 4,
		sRegistration := "",
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),//Number of components in the main contract
		iComponent := 0,//Initialization of the component index
		// For each contract,loop on all the components within the contract
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			sDenBuySell := "",
			sNumBuySell := "",
			sQuotation := "",
			sDenCurrency := "",
			sNumCurrency := "",
			sTradedCurrency := "",
			sBuySell := "",
			fNominal := 0.0,
			sNominal := "",
			sCur1 := "",
			sCur2 := "",
			fRate := 0.0,
			fRate2 := 0.0,
			sRate := "",
			sInternalTypology := "",
			iMaturity := 0,
			sMaturity := "",
			sMaturityDate := "",
			sCallable := "",
			sExotic := "",
			sCallableStart := "",
			sCallableInfo := "",
			sNonDeliverable := "",
			sFixingDate := "",
			sFixingInfo := "",
			sFixingSource :="",
			sSecondDelivery := "",
			sSecondDeliveryDateStart := "",
			sSecondDeliveryDate := "",
			sSecondDeliveryDateEnd := "",
			sProrata := "",
			sBlotterDescription := "",
			fQuantity := 0.0,
			sQuantity := "",
			sInstrument := "",
			sPayout := "",
			sNominalUnit := "",
			sAmortizing := "",
			sPayer := "",
			fPSR := 0.0,
			fExpRate := 0.0,
			sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent,"Trade purpose" ),

			IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
			{
				sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),  
				IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "Market price"
				ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "Limit price"
			},
			
			IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) OR ( bEventBlotterDescriptionToRebuild ) ) THEN
			{
				//  Spot/Forwards
				// For Spot/Forwards,flags are stored for the contract in case the contract is a swap
				// E.g. if any Spot/Forward within a swap ( Fx swap ... ) is callable,the swap is callable
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" ) ) THEN
				{
					sDenBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Den Buy/Sell" ),
					sNumBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Num Buy/Sell" ),
					sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Price quotation" ),
					sDenCurrency := strSubString( sQuotation,0,3 ),
					sNumCurrency := strSubString( sQuotation,4,7 ),
					sTradedCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ), 
					IF ( sDenCurrency == sTradedCurrency ) THEN
						sBuySell := sDenBuySell
					ELSE
						sBuySell := sNumBuySell,
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sCur1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Quantity currency" ),
					sCur2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Other quantity currency" ),
					fRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price" ),
					dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					
					//Exotics
					//Callable
					sCallable := legGetString( pComponent,"Callable" ),
					IF ( sCallable == "Yes" ) THEN 
						dCallableStart := toDate( legGetString( pComponent,"Callable window" ) ),
					
					//Non deliverable
					sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pComponent,"Non deliverable" ),
					IF ( sNonDeliverable == "Yes" ) THEN
					{
						dFixingDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Ndf fixing date" ),
						sFixingSource := legGetString( pComponent,"Archiving group" )
					},
					
					//Fixing deals
					sFixing := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing" ),
					IF ( sFixing == "Fix Price" ) THEN
						dFixingDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixing date" ),
					
					//2nd delivery
					//Exception for far leg of FX swap 
					IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP" ) AND ( pComponent == fxLegGetComponent( pComponent,"Self","farleg" ) ) ) THEN
					{
						sSecondDelivery := legGetString( pComponent,"Second delivery 2" ),
						sSecondDeliveryCurr := legGetString( pComponent,"Second del currency 2" ),
						dSecondDeliveryDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Second del date 2" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						sSecondDelivery := legGetString( pComponent,"Second delivery" ),
						sSecondDeliveryCurr := legGetString( pComponent,"Second del currency" ),
						dSecondDeliveryDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Second del date" )
					},
					
					//Prorata
					sProrata := legGetString( pComponent,"Prorata" ),
					
					// Description prefix 
					IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( pComponent == legGetMainComponent( pLeg ) ) THEN
							sPrefix := ""
						ELSE
							sPrefix := "Hedge"
					}
					ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP" ) THEN
						sPrefix := ""
					ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( pComponent == legGetMainComponent( pLeg ) ) THEN
							sPrefix := ""
						ELSE
							sPrefix := "Hedge"
					}
					ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( pComponent == fxLegGetComponent( pLeg,"crossswp","nearleg" ) ) THEN
							sPrefix:=""
						ELSE IF ( pComponent == fxLegGetComponent( pLeg,"crossswp","farleg" ) ) THEN
							sPrefix := ""
						ELSE
							sPrefix := "Hedge"
					}
					ELSE
						sPrefix := "",
					
					// The Internal typology for Spot/Forwads has the form:
					// MAT[FXG|CAL][NDF] where MAT is the maturity: TDY/TOM/SPT/FWD
					//
					// It is used rather than ( complex ) date computations because date computation involves retrieving calendar/shifter
					// Note: maturity ( spot,tdy... ) is computed wrt the trade date ( not the system date )
					// It may change during a Cancel&Reissue / Restructure.
					
					//This is the internal typology
					sInternalTypology := legGetInternalTypology( pComponent ),
					
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sRate := toString( fRate,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
					
                    IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                        sRate := sheaderOrder,
                        
					// Look-Up to get a  more expressive names for the maturity
					//Gets the maturity index in sMATURITY_FROM
					iMaturity := strIndexOf( sMATURITY_FROM,strSubString( sInternalTypology,0,3 ) )/4,
					//Determines the intelligible maturity label
					dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sMaturity := strToken( sMATURITY_TO,"/",iMaturity ),
					sMaturityDate := " on " + toString1( dMaturityDate ),
					IF ( strTrim( sMaturity ) <> "" ) THEN
						sMaturityDate := sMaturityDate + " (" + sMaturity + ")",
					
					// Callable
					IF ( sCallable == "Yes" ) THEN
					{
						sCallableStart := toString1( dCallableStart ),
						IF ( strStartsWith( sMaturityDate, " on" ) ) THEN
							sCallableInfo := " callable from " + sCallableStart + " to" + strSubString( sMaturityDate,3, strLen( sMaturityDate ) )
						ELSE
							sCallableInfo := " callable from " + sCallableStart + " to" + sMaturityDate,
						sMaturity := "",
						sMaturityDate := ""
					},
					
					// Non deliverable
					IF ( sNonDeliverable == "Yes" ) THEN
					{
						sExotic := "NDF ",
						sFixingDate := toString1( dFixingDate ),
						sFixingInfo := " fixing date " + sFixingDate + " (" + sFixingSource + ") "
					},
					
					// 2nd delivery
					IF ( ( sSecondDelivery == "Yes" ) AND ( dMaturityDate <> dSecondDeliveryDate ) ) THEN
					{
						sSecondDeliveryDateStart := " on " + toString1( dMaturityDate ),
						sSecondDeliveryDate := toString1( dSecondDeliveryDate ),
						sSecondDeliveryDateEnd := " on " + sSecondDeliveryDate,
						IF ( sSecondDeliveryCurr == sCur1 ) THEN
						{
							sTmp := sSecondDeliveryDateStart,
							sSecondDeliveryDateStart := sSecondDeliveryDateEnd,
							sSecondDeliveryDateEnd := sTmp
						},
						sMaturity := "",
						sMaturityDate := ""
					},
					
					// Prorata
					IF ( sProrata == "Yes" ) THEN
						sExotic := "Prorata ",
					
					IF ( sPrefix <> "Hedge" ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := sPrefix + sBuySell + " " + sExotic + sNominal + " " + sCur1 + sSecondDeliveryDateStart + " against " + sCur2 + sSecondDeliveryDateEnd + sMaturityDate + sCallableInfo + sFixingInfo + " @ " + sRate
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sPrefix
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Futures" ) THEN
				{
					sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy/Sell" ),
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
					sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
					fPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Price" ),
					sPrice := " " + toString( fPrice,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
					IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
						sPrice := sheaderOrder,
					sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " " + sInstrument + " Expiry " + sMaturity + " @" + sPrice
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
				{
					sTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
					sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
					dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Last Calculation Date" ),
					sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
					sStartDate := toString1( dStartDate ),
					sPayer := legGetString( pComponent,"IS_PAYER" ),
					fPSR := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"IS_PSR" ),
					
					// Islamic products
					IF ( sPayer <> "" ) THEN 
					{
						// Mudarabah or Musharaka
						IF ( fPSR <> 0.0 ) THEN 
						{
							IF  ( sTypology == "Mudarabah" ) THEN 
							{
								IF (sPayout == "Borrow") THEN
									sPayout := "Mudarib on"
								ELSE
									sPayout := "Rabb al mal on",
								sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " with a PSR of " + toString( fPSR,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
							}
							ELSE IF ( sTypology == "Musharaka" ) THEN
							{
								sPayout := "Musharaka of",
								sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " with a PSR of " + toString( fPSR,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
							}
						}
						// Wakala
						ELSE IF  ( sTypology == "Wakala" OR sTypology == "CD Issuance" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sPayout == "Borrow" ) THEN
								sPayout := "Deposit of"
							ELSE
								sPayout := "Placement of",
							fExpRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"First Fixing" ),
							sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " with an expected rate of return of " + toString( fExpRate,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
						}
					}
					ELSE 
					{
						sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
						sGenerator := legGetString( pComponent,"Generator" ),
						IF ( sGenerator == "Template" ) THEN
							sCustomized := ""
						ELSE
							sCustomized := "*",
						sIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Index" ),
						pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
						pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
						pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream ),
						IF ( pIndex == pNull ) THEN
							sNature := "Fixed rate"
						ELSE
							sNature := "Floating rate",
						fRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin" ),
						dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
						dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Last Calculation Date" ),
						sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
						sStartDate := toString1( dStartDate ),
						IF ( strToUpperCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Amortizing" ) ) <> "NONE" ) THEN
							sAmortizing := " amortized",
						IF( sNature == "Fixed rate" ) THEN
                        {
							sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + toString( fRate,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "% (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing,
                            IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                        		sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sheaderOrder + " (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing
                    }
						ELSE
                        {
							sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sIndex + " +" + toString( fRate * 100. ,12,iNbDecimalRate-2,TRUE,0 ) + "bp (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing,
                            IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                        		sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sIndex + " +"  +  sheaderOrder + " (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing
                        }
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Credit Line" ) THEN
				{
					sPayout := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) ),
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
					fRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"NetRate" ),
					fRate2 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"NetRate2" ),
					dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
					sStartDate := toString1( dStartDate ),
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Last Calculation Date" ),
					sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
					
					sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " rate of "  + toString( fRate,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "% on commitment leg, " 
								+ sPayout + " rate of " + toString( fRate2,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "% on utilisation leg, " 
								+ "Nominal " + sNominal + ", "
								+ "Expiry " + sMaturity
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Forward notice" ) THEN
				{
					sDenBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Den Buy/Sell" ),
					sNumBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Num Buy/Sell" ),
					sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Price quotation" ),
					sDenCurrency := strSubString( sQuotation,0,3 ),
					sNumCurrency := strSubString( sQuotation,4,7 ),
					sTradedCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Den_unit" ), 
					IF ( sDenCurrency == sTradedCurrency ) THEN
						sBuySell := sDenBuySell
					ELSE
						sBuySell := sNumBuySell,
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Den_nominal" ),
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,15,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sCur1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Den_unit" ),
					sCur2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Num_unit" ),
					fRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Ref_spot" ),
					sRate := toString( fRate,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
					dMaturityDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sMaturityDate := "Expiry " + toString1( dMaturityDate ),
					sFixingSource := legGetString( pComponent,"Archiving group" ),
					
					sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sNominal + " " + sCur1 + " against " + sCur2 + " on " + sMaturityDate + " @ " + sRate 
								+ " fixing source " + sFixingSource
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) THEN
				{
					sPayout := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Flow date" ),
					sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
					
					sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sInstrument + " on " + sMaturity
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Call deposits" ) THEN
				{
					sPayout := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) ),
					IF ( sPayout == "borrow" ) THEN
						sPayout := "Initial deposit of"
					ELSE
						sPayout := "Initial loan of",
					fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
					sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					sGenerator := legGetString( pComponent,"Generator" ),
					IF ( sGenerator == "Template" ) THEN
						sCustomized := ""
					ELSE
						sCustomized:="*",
					fRate := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"NetRate" ),
					pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
					pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
					pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream ),
					IF ( pIndex == pNull ) THEN
						sNature := "Fixed rate"
					ELSE
						sNature := "Floating rate",
					IF ( strToUpperCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Amortizing" ) ) <> "NONE" ) THEN
					sAmortizing := " amortized",
					IF ( sNature == "Fixed rate" ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " @ " + toString( fRate,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "% (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ")" + sAmortizing
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " @ " + sInstrument + " +" + toString( fRate * 100.,15,iNbDecimalRate-2,TRUE,0 ) + "bp (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ")" + sAmortizing
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "CP/CD" ) THEN
				{
					sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Buy/Sell" ),
					fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
					sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
					sIssuer := legGetString(pComponent,"Issuer"),
					fCoupon := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Coupon" ),
					sCoupon := toString( fCoupon,15,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
					sGenerator := legGetString( pComponent,"Generator" ),
					
					IF ( fCoupon <> 0.0 ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " '" + sInstrument + "' issued by " + sIssuer + " @" + sCoupon +"%, Maturity " + sMaturity + " (" + sGenerator + ")"
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sBuySell + " " + sQuantity + " '" + sInstrument + "' issued by " + sIssuer + ", Maturity " + sMaturity + " (" + sGenerator + ")"
				},
				
				// Blotter and communication
				IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 245 ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
				ELSE
				{
					sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription,0,244 ),
					legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
					ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc FXMM rule )","DIST_DESC" )
				},
				
				sBlotterDescription := ""
				
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
FXMM Dynamic Layout rule (Management of Patterns Field Properties)

Used algorithm:
Retrieve the context
If the context is BOOKING or ( the registration is Loans/Deposits and context is PRICING) then
	Add properties accordingly depending each registration
Else if the context is FDI then
	Add properties accordingly
Else
	Add properties accordingly
End if
If Communication  or tradibility checks are active, add properties accordingly
If BlockTrade checks are active, add properties accordingly

Version 1.31
- Handling the display of internal legs margin fields based on the VAMode for LINE & PRICING context
- Removed specific entries for LINE context, so that PRICING context also inherits the behavior

Version 1.30
Option book & option spread are not dipslayed when the FTP loan does not have the optionality

Version 1.29
Add Single period maturity adjustement and Calculation driving schedule properties which depend on Single period field value 

Version 1.28
Amend FDI context to be LINE context

Version 1.27
Add the node one-off fee

Version 1.26
Amendment for FTP to set the UDFs

Version 1.25
Amendment to handle display of Live quantities

Version 1.24
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.23
Removed handling hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad, as it is natively embedded

Version 1.22
- To handle the FTP package
- To handle callable loan

Version 1.21
Amendments to handle 2spots+1swap structure

Version 1.20
- Amendment to handle Contractual rates on FX products
- Applied MSL best practices

version 1.19
Amendment to handle COM lease product

Version 1.18
- Bug fix on Split package
- Handle hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad

Version 1.17
Amendment to protect logical split in case it has not be granted in licence

Version 1.16
Amendment to handle logical split for spot-forward, FX swap and Outright Full Hedge

Version 1.15
Amendment to add the value "Yes - Round cross rate" to the list of available values of the index split mode field so that the NDF fields will still be displayed if this value is selected.

Version 1.14
Amendment to add Primary linked currency and secondary linked currency when Swap hedge is linked nominals for Split outrights(2spots+2swaps)

Version 1.13
Amendment to handle Split Packages(2spots+2swaps), in case split spot currency is different from split currency 

Version 1.12
Amendments to handle:
- FX Swap Split Spot Hedge
- NDF Settlement conversion in third currency

Version 1.11
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.10
Amendments to handle back to back fields using the (MX.ALL.GParam, ALL) Lookup Table

Version 1.9
To handle Swap auto spot Package, Forward auto spot Package, Time Option FX

Version 1.8
For FX product make sure exotics appear if selected 

Version 1.7
Amendments to apply on FDI and to be in line with the new FXMM taxonomy tree structure

Version 1.6
Amendments to 
- handle properly cross asset structures
- exclude Funding swap pakage registration when addition of properties in case of Second delivery, Callable, Non Deliverable and Fixing
- for Loans/Deposits registration display the amortizing fields accordingly

Version 1.5
- To handle Spot-Forward, FX swap and related FXMM packages.
- If the BlockTrade check is active, the portfolio/allocation matrix field is added depending on blocktrade field value

Version 1.4
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.3
If the Communication or the Tradability check are active, the tradability check property is added

Version 1.2
legResetProperties and legAddProperties functions have to be called on pLeg instead of pComponent

Version 1.1
- for Loans/Deposits registration, add the test If the coupon payment frequency is set to "zero coupon"

Version 1.0
Notes:
Look-Up Tables used:
( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) is a utility LUT used to map Family/Group/Type to registration
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the communication, the tradability  and the BlockTrade checks
( MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation ) contains all criteria needed to create the FTP package considering the Risk Allocation
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	bIsTradeOnly := ( legGetRegistrationLabel( This ) == "mxContractITRADE" ),
	sContext := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	iNbContracts := 0,
	iContract := 0,
	sContractRegistration := "",
	sCallable := "",
	sNDF := "",
	sFixing := "",
	sNDF2 := "",
	sLegType := "",
	fFinalPayment := 0.0,
	sCouponFrequency := "",
	iFreqRatio := 0,
	sAmortization := "",
	sCallableLoan := "",
	sIsBackToBackActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BackToBack.FXMM" ) ),
	sBackToBack := "",
	sSplitSpotCurrency := "",
	sSplitCurrency := "",
	sView := "",
	sLogicalSplit := "",
    sVAMODE := "",

    //BAB addition - set backtoback to active only if Sales group
    sGroup := sysGetGroup(),
    pGroupResults := lookupResults("MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sGroup),
    sGroupType := lookupResultsGetString(pGroupResults,0,0),
	IF ( sIsBackToBackActive == "YES" AND sGroupType == "Sales" ) THEN
    sIsBackToBackActive := "YES"
    ELSE
    sIsBackToBackActive := "NO",
    //End of BAB addition
	
	sPricingContext := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.pricing.context"),
	sTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ), // possible values are INS, MOD and CNL
	sBOSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ),
	sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.evaluation.active"),
	bIsTransposed := legIsTransposed( pLeg ),
    
    // Retrieving the VAMode set on the main trade
    pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent(pLeg),
	IF ( legIsElementValid(pMainComponent,"VAMODE") ) THEN
    	sVAMODE := legGetString(pMainComponent,"VAMODE"),
    
	IF (( sPricingContext == "FDI" ) OR ( bIsTransposed )) THEN
		sContext := "LINE"
	ELSE IF ( ( sPricingContext == "" ) AND ( sTicketDisplay == "YES" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING"
	ELSE IF ( ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource <> "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) ) 
	OR ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "PRICING"
	ELSE IF ( ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource == "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) )
	OR ( sAction <> "INS" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING",
	
	//For FX events, the booking views should be used
	IF ( ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIALLOCATION" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxICLOSE_OUT" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_MODIFY" ) 
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_OFFSETTING")
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_TERMINATE" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXERCISE" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_MODIFY" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_OFFSETTING" ) 
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPARTIAL_CANCEL")
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPOSITION_CLOSE_OUT" )
	OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIPRORATA_UTILIZATION" ) ) THEN
		sContext := "BOOKING",
	
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),

	sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pLeg ),
	IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractISINGLE" ) OR ( bIsTradeOnly ) ) THEN
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent )
	ELSE IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGOUTRIGHT" )    
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFORWARD_AUTOSPOT" )
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP_AUTOSPOT" ) ) THEN
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
	
	IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGOUTRIGHT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD_CONTRACT" ) 
	OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFORWARD_AUTOSPOT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP_AUTOSPOT" ) ) THEN
		legResetProperties( pLeg ),
   
        
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	iContract := iNbContracts - 1,
	IF ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN 
		iContract := iNbContracts,
        
	//BAB Addition for FX Split deals distinction
    pMainContract := legGetContractAt( This,0 ),
    pMainPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainContract ),
     IF ( NOT isNull( pMainPackage ) ) THEN 
        sMainRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel(pMainPackage)
    ELSE
        sMainRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel(pMainContract),
    // End of BAB Addition

        
	WHILE ( iContract >= 0 ) DO
	{
		IF ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN
			pContract := pLeg
		ELSE
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
		
        sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
        legResetProperties( pContract ),
    //RFR_FXMM
sRegistration := legGetRegistration(pContract),
sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pContract),

sRFRCheck := lookupString ("BAB.ALL.RFRCHECK","ALL","Registration",sRegistration,"Pattern",sPattern),


IF (sRFRCheck == "LB_LTM" OR sRFRCheck == "LB_Murabaha") THEN
{

sRFRIndex := legGetString(pContract,"Index"),
fFirstFixing := legGetNumeric (pContract,"First Fixing"),
pRFRIndex :=  indexGetIndexByLabel(sRFRIndex),
sInstrument := legGetString (pContract, "Instrument"),

IF ( NOT isNull( pRFRIndex ) ) THEN
{
sIndexResetMode := indexGetResetMode(pRFRIndex),
bRFR := (strContain (sInstrument, "SOFR") OR strContain (sInstrument, "SONIA")) AND sIndexResetMode == "Compounded",

IF bRFR THEN
{
legAddProperty(pContract,"rfr_1.1_structure"),
pSTRUCT := legGetUserFields (pContract),
udfSetString(pSTRUCT,"STRUCTURE","Single Murabaha")
}
}
},
//end of rfr  
	//BAB addition: get pointer to messages for breach reason field property
        
        //Case: FX swap OR FX Split deals
        IF ( sRegistration == "FX swap" OR sMainRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLIT" OR sMainRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP") THEN
        {
            //get message of first component (Spot leg)
            //pAllMessages := legGetMessages(pComponent),
            //Get messages of all components
            iNumberOfComponentFxSwap := legGetNumberOfComponents(pContract),
            iComponentFxSwap := 0,
            
            //Loop on FX Swap components to retrieve every components' messages
            WHILE iComponentFxSwap < iNumberOfComponentFxSwap DO
	                {
	                	pComponentFxSwap := legGetComponentAt(pContract,iComponentFxSwap), //get pointer to current component
	                    pAllMessages := legGetMessages(pComponentFxSwap), //get pointer to messages
	                    
	                    iMsg:=0,
	                	iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
            //Loop on messages
                WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
                {
                    pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
                    IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
                    {
                    	legAddProperty(pComponentFxSwap ,"common_0.1.4.3_preDealReason" )
                    },
                    
                    iMsg:=iMsg+1
                },
			iComponentFxSwap := iComponentFxSwap +1
            }
        }        
        //All other cases
        ELSE
        {
            pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pContract ),
            iMsg:=0,
            iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
        //}, this is commented out and added below after the while loop so it only passes in the ELSE condition, it already passed for FX Swaps

        //Lopp on messages
        WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
        {
            pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
            IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
            legAddProperty( pContract,"common_0.1.4.3_preDealReason" ),
            
            iMsg:=iMsg+1
        }
        },
        //End of BAB addition - Breach Reason LayDyn
        
        // Product registration:  Spot-Forward
        sTypology := legGetString(pContract,"Typology"),
        IF ( sContractRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) THEN
        {
            legAddProperty(pContract,"common_0.1.4.5_OtherQtyCurr"), // addition for BAB
            dMaturity := legGetDate( pContract,"Maturity" ),
             sTypology := legGetString(pContract,"Typology"),
            
            IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
            {
                //Determine the split hedge structure
                sHedgeStructure := legGetString( pContract,"Split method" ),
                IF ( sHedgeStructure == "2spots+2swaps" ) THEN
                {
                    dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pContract,"Pri swp maturity leg1" ),
                    dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pContract,"Pri swp maturity leg2" ),
                    dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pContract,"Sec swp maturity leg1" ),
                    dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pContract,"Sec swp maturity leg2" ),
                    IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
                        sHedgeStructure := "2spots+1secswap"
                    ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
                        sHedgeStructure := "2spots+1primswap"
                    ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
                    {
                        sHedgeStructure := "2spots",
                        sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pContract,"Prim swp Scnd delivery1" ),
                        sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pContract,"Prim swp Scnd delivery2" ),
                        sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pContract,"Sec swp Scnd delivery1"),
                        sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pContract,"Sec swp Scnd delivery2" ),
                        IF ( ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" )
                        OR ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
                            sHedgeStructure := "2spots+1primswap"
                        ELSE IF ( ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" ) OR ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
                            sHedgeStructure := "2spots+1secswap"
                    },
                    
                    //Add Primary linked currency and secondary linked currency when Swap hedge is linked nominals
                    sSwapHedge := legGetString( pContract,"Swap type" ),
                    IF ( sSwapHedge == "Linked nominals" ) THEN
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.11_linkedCurrency" )
                },
                
                //Per split hedge structure and context, determine if the internal spots, swap points and forward rates should be displayed
                //For all contexts: LINE (FDI or Horizontal), PRICING & BOOKING, if method is 2spots/fwds, then depending on primary & secondary maturities, show/hide spot & swap points
                IF ( sHedgeStructure == "2spots/fwds" ) THEN
                {
                    //Primary hedge
                    dPrimSpot := legGetDate( pContract,"Primary spot date" ),
                    dMaturity := legGetDate( pContract,"Maturity" ),
                    sPrimForwardScndDelivery := legGetString( pContract,"Prim fwd Scnd delivery" ),
                    IF ( ( dPrimSpot <> dMaturity ) 
                    OR ( sPrimForwardScndDelivery == "Yes" ) ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.01.01_spotPrimGross" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.02.01_swapPointsPrimGross" ),
                        // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio 
                        IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.01.02_spotPrimMrgNet" ),
                            legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.02.02_swapPointsPrimMrgNet" )
                        }
                        
                    },

                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.03.01_fwdPrimGross" ),
                    // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio
                    IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.03.02_fwdPrimMrgNet" ),
                                            
                    //Secondary hedge
                    dSecondSpot := legGetDate( pContract,"Secondary spot date" ),
                    sSecondForwardScndDelivery := legGetString( pContract,"Sec fwd Scnd delivery" ),
                    IF ( ( dSecondSpot <> dMaturity )
                    OR ( sSecondForwardScndDelivery == "Yes") ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.04.01_spotSecGross" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.05.01_swapPointsSecGross" ),
                        // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio
                        IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.04.02_spotSecMrgNet" ),
                            legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.05.02_swapPointsSecMrgNet" )
                        }
                    },

                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.06.01_fwdSecGross" ),
                    // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio
                    IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.06.02_fwdSecMrgNet" )
                    }
                //For the 2spots+1swap structure
                ELSE IF ( sHedgeStructure == "2spots+1swap" ) THEN
                {
                    sInternalTypology := legGetInternalTypology( pContract ),
                    dMaturity := legGetDate( pContract,"Maturity" ),
                    dPrimSpotDate := legGetDate( pContract,"Primary spot date" ), //For 2s1s Primary spot date = Secondary Spot date
                    
                    //Check if it's a leading contract with a mismatch of spot date
                    IF ( ( sInternalTypology == "FWD" ) AND ( dMaturity == dPrimSpotDate ) ) THEN
                    {
                        sInstrument := legGetString( pContract,"Instrument" ),
                        sPrimaryContract := legGetString( pContract,"Primary spot contract" ),
                        sSecondaryContract := legGetString( pContract,"Secondary spot contract" ),
                        IF ( sInstrument == sPrimaryContract ) THEN
                            bPrimaryMismatch2s1s := TRUE
                        ELSE IF ( sInstrument == sSecondaryContract ) THEN
                            bSecondaryMismatch2s1s := TRUE
                    },
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.10.01_spotSplitGross" ),
                    // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio
                    IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.10.02_spotSplitMrgNet" )
                }
                
                //For the 1spot+2swaps structure
                ELSE IF ( sHedgeStructure == "1spot+2swaps" ) THEN
                {
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.10.01_spotSplitGross" ),
               		legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.02.01_swapPointsPrimGross" ),
	                legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.03.01_fwdPrimGross" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.05.01_swapPointsSecGross" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.06.01_fwdSecGross" ),   

                    // Display the internal trades' margin/net fields when in BOOKING context or if VAMode <> Keep in Sales portfolio
                    IF (( sContext == "BOOKING" ) OR sVAMODE <> "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.10.02_spotSplitMrgNet" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.02.02_swapPointsPrimMrgNet" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.03.02_fwdPrimMrgNet" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.05.02_swapPointsSecMrgNet" ),
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.06.02_fwdSecMrgNet" )     
					}
                }                 
                //For the LINE (FDI or Horizontal) context only, if method is 2spots+2swaps (2spots+1secswap), hide primary spot & swap points
                ELSE IF ( sHedgeStructure == "2spots+1secswap" ) THEN 
                {
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.01.01_spotPrimGross" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.04.01_spotSecGross" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_05.05.01_swapPointsSecGross" ),

            IF ( ( sNDF == "Yes" ) OR ( sNDF2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN

            sCallable2 := legGetString( pContract,"Callable" ),

             //Show fields relative to contractual rate(s)

                {

                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_02.04.01_timeOption" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_02.05.01_splitValue" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_02.06.01_fixing" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_02.07.01_prorata" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_03.01.01_NDF" ),
                    legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_03.02.01_timeOption" ),

		            legSetCellAsMainPrice(pContract, "Swap_points_fwd_fwd"),

        {

            IF ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" AND sBORegistration <> "mxContractFxIFUNDINGOUTRIGHT" ) THEN

            sLegType := legGetString( pContract,"Leg_type" ),
            IF ( sLegType == "Floating" ) THEN

            // If the user prices a Zero Coupon loan/depo, the repayment field will be non null, then display the repayment field. This field correspond to the final amount on the pricing screen. 
            fFinalPayment := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Repayment" ),

             //BAB addition for CD Issuance repayment field

             	legRemoveProperty ( pContract,"fxmm_04.02_repay") 
            ELSE
            	legAddProperty ( pContract,"fxmm_04.02_repay" ),
                
             //BAB addition for USD currency Payment calendar
              sCurrency:= legGetString(pContract, "Settl.Currency"),

            // Hide Murabaha commodity fields for CD Issuance when usage is set to Wakala 
       
           IF sPattern == "CD Issuance" THEN

                {
                    legRemoveProperty(pContract,"common_0.1.4.5_OtherQtyCurr")

            // If the coupon payment frequency is set to "zero coupon" or frequency ratio greater than 1, then displays Compounding method field.
            sCouponFrequency := legGetString( pContract,"Coupons" ),
            iFreqRatio := legGetInteger( pContract, "Frequency Ratio"),
            IF ( sCouponFrequency == "Zero coupon" OR iFreqRatio > 1) THEN

            // If the amortization is different from "None", then displays Amortization details.
            sAmortization := legGetString( pContract,"Amortizing" ),

            // If the amortization is different from "None", then displays Amortization details.
            sCustomizedFlows := legGetString( pContract,"Customized Flows" ),

            // If the callable flag is differnet from "No", then displays callable schedule details.
            sCallableLoan := legGetString(pComponent, "Callable"),

            // To handle single period loan/deposits

            sSinglePeriod := legGetString(pComponent, "Single_period"),

                legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_04.12_calcDrivingSchedule"),
            // To handle COM lease products

            sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),

                    sOptionPortfolio := legGetString( pContract,"XTP_OPT" ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"pf_OptionBook",sOptionPortfolio ),

                    sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal_unit" ),
                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","ALL","Currency",sCurrency,"Period","","Term","","Frequency","","Nature","" ),

                    iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
                    iResult := 0,
                    sSplitCurrency := "",
                    fSplitSpotRate := 0.0,
                    WHILE (iResult < iNbResults) DO

                        sSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pResults, iResult, 0),

                    IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
                        legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_04.18_ftp_splitCurrency" )
                    ELSE

                ELSE
                {
                    legRemoveProperty( pContract,"fxmm_04.10_ftp" ),
                    legRemoveProperty( pContract,"fxmm_04.19_ftp_option" ),
                    legRemoveProperty( pContract,"fxmm_04.18_ftp_splitCurrency" )
                }

        ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) THEN

             legAddProperty( pContract, "fxmm_02.01.03_brokerfee")

            	legProtectCell(pContract,"Fee_amount", FALSE)
         	}

        	{

        sEligible := legGetString(pContract,"PROFIT_WHT"),
        
        IF sEligible == "Yes" THEN
        legAddProperty( pContract, "common_0.1.4.6_WHT")
        
        },

        legAddProperty( pContract, "fxmm_02.11.01_WhoPrmSell")

        	sGroup := sysGetGroup(),
            pGroupResults := lookupResults("MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sGroup),
			sGroupType := lookupResultsGetString(pGroupResults,0,0),

               		legProtectCell(pContract,"Sales_margin_pips",bProtect),
                    legProtectCell(pContract,"Primary_fwd_mrg_pips",bProtect),
                    legProtectCell(pContract,"Secondary_spot_mrg_pips",bProtect),
                    legProtectCell(pContract,"Secondary_swp_trd_mrg",bProtect),

            legProtectCell(pContract,"Sec_mrg_pips_leg1",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pContract,"Sec_mrg_pips_leg2",bProtect)

            bProtectSplit := FALSE,
