            bProtect := FALSE,
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Sales_margin_pips",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Forward",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Net_Forward",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Ref_spot",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Spot_sales_margin_pips",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Net_spot",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Swap_points",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Swap_sales_margin",bProtect),
            legProtectCell(pComponent,"Net_swap_points",bProtect),

            sIsBackToBackActive := "YES"
            }
            },
            
            //BAB addition for Repo and Reverse Repo SAMA Price mode switch
            bProtect2 := FALSE,
            IF ( sTypology == "RR SAMA" OR sTypology == "Repo SAMA" OR sTypology == "SAMA Bill" ) THEN
            {
        	   sSAMAUDF :=legGetString(pComponent,"IS_RSAMA"),
               IF sSAMAUDF == "Price" THEN
               {
               		bProtect := TRUE,
                    legAddProperty(pComponent,"common_0.1.4.8_RSAMA"),
               		legProtectCell(pComponent, "Rate_Margin",bProtect),
                    legProtectCell(pComponent,"RSAMAPRICE",bProtect2),
                    legProtectCell(pComponent,"S_REPO_RT",bProtect)
               }
               ELSE
               {
               		bProtect := TRUE,
                    legProtectCell(pComponent,"RSAMAPRICE",bProtect),
                    legProtectCell(pComponent,"Rate_Margin",bProtect2),
                    legProtectCell(pComponent,"S_REPO_RT",bProtect2)
                    
               }
            },
            // End of BAB addition

  
//End of BAB Addition for Sales Dynamic layout
        
          //commented out, done above
        /*sBackToBack := legGetString( pComponent,"Back to back" ),
        IF ( sBackToBack == "Yes" ) THEN
            legAddProperty( pContract,"fxmm_01.01.02_backToBackDetails" ),
        */
        iContract := iContract - 1
		
	},
    
    // Removing Broker Fees field from forward products 
	IF legGetPatternLabel(pLeg) == "Spot Split" THEN
        legAddProperty(pLeg,"common_0.1.1.1_limit0"),
	// End

	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "FXMM")
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress FXMM Specific completion

version 2.2
Exclude pre-funding procedure from the rule

Version 2.1
Remove specific checks for Funding swaps as Funding packages (swaps & outrights) are now handled in the Common Sanity Checks

Version 2.0
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 1.4
- Addition of portfolio checks on Outright split 2spots+1swap package

Version 1.3
- Getting the system date when the booking user is not an FO user

Version 1.2
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 1.1
- Updated to raise error on portfolio only when needed
- Updated to prevent booking trades with a future trading date: "BF"

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	FXMM Package Portfolios
		- FXMM Packages Portfolios						: "PSpot", "PSwap", "PPrimSpot", "PPrimSwap", "PSecSpot", "PSecSwap", "PCur1", "PCur2"
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)
        
If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented    
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pLeg ),
	bSanityCheck := ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
				AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.futureFlowSellDow" )
				AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
                AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.prefunding" ),                 
	IF ( bSanityCheck ) THEN
	{
		callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","FXMM" ),
        
		// Fields Initialization/Reset
		sPattern := "",
		sRegistration := "",
		pAllMessages := pNULL,

		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pLeg ),
		iCount := 0,
		iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
		sBOSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
		WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
			sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
			
			//Prevent booking with a future trading date
			dFODeskDate := sysGetFODeskDate(),
			IF ( sysGetFODesk()=="" ) THEN
				dFODeskDate := sysGetTradingDate(),
			IF ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sBOSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Call deposits" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) ) THEN
				{
					dTradingDate :=  legGetDate( pComponent,"Trading Date" ),
					IF ( dTradingDate  >  dFODeskDate ) THEN
					{
						IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Intrusive-BF-" ) == 0 ) THEN
							legAddMessage( pComponent,"Trading date is in Future: it is not allowed","Trading_Date","Sane-Intrusive-BF-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
					}
				}
			},
			
			iCount := iCount + 1
		},
		
		IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) THEN
		{
			sHedge := legGetString( pLeg,"Hedge" ),
			sSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_other_party" ),
			IF ( sHedge == "Full hedge" AND sSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Spot portfolio is required","Spot_other_party","Sane-PSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Swap_other_party" ),
			IF ( sSwapPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Swap portfolio is required","Swap_other_party","Sane-PSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
		{
		
			sSplitMethod := legGetString( pLeg,"Split_method" ),
			
            /* Checking what the actual booked structure will be, in order to only check the actually needed portfolios have been filled */ 
			IF ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+2swaps" ) THEN
			{
                dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pContract,"Pri swp maturity leg1" ),
                dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pContract,"Pri swp maturity leg2" ),
				dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 := legGetDate( pContract,"Sec swp maturity leg1" ),
                dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 := legGetDate( pContract,"Sec swp maturity leg2" ),
                IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
                	sSplitMethod := "2spots+1secswap"
                ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 <> dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
	                sSplitMethod := "2spots+1primswap"
                ELSE IF ( ( dPrimSwapMaturityLeg1 == dPrimSwapMaturityLeg2 ) AND ( dSecSwapMaturityLeg1 == dSecSwapMaturityLeg2 ) ) THEN
				{
                    sSplitMethod := "2spots",
                    sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pContract,"Prim swp Scnd delivery1" ),
                    sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pContract,"Prim swp Scnd delivery2" ),
                    sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 := legGetString( pContract,"Sec swp Scnd delivery1"),
                    sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 := legGetString( pContract,"Sec swp Scnd delivery2" ),
                    IF ( ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" ) OR ( sPrimSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
						sSplitMethod := "2spots+1primswap"
                    ELSE IF ( ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery1 == "Yes" ) OR ( sSecSwapSecondDelivery2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
						sSplitMethod := "2spots+1secswap"
                }
			},

            
			sPrimSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Prm_other_party" ),
			IF ( sSplitMethod <> "1spot+2swaps" AND sPrimSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PPrimSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Primary spot portfolio is required","Prm_other_party","Sane-PPrimSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Prm_swp_other_party" ),
			IF ( ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+2swaps" OR sSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) AND sSwapPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PPrimSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Primary swap portfolio is required","Prm_swp_other_party","Sane-PPrimSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSecSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Secother_party" ),
			IF ( sSplitMethod <> "1spot+2swaps" AND sSecSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSecSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Secondary spot portfolio is required","Secother_party","Sane-PSecSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSecSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Sec_swp_other_party" ),
			IF ( ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+2swaps" OR sSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) AND sSecSwapPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSecSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Secondary swap portfolio is required","Sec_swp_other_party","Sane-PSecSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_other_party" ),
			IF ( sSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" AND sSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN															   
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Spot portfolio is required","Spot_other_party","Sane-PSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sCrossSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Cross_swp_other_party" ),
			IF ( sCrossSwapPortfolio == "" AND sSplitMethod == "2spots+1swap" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PCrossSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Swap Portfolio is required","Cross_swp_other_party","Sane-PCrossSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN
		{
			sSpotHedgePrim := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_hedge_primary"),
			sSpotHedgeSec := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_hedge_secondary"),
			
			sPrimSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_hedge_primary_portfolio" ),
			IF ( sSpotHedgePrim == "Yes" AND sPrimSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PPrimSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Primary spot portfolio is required","Spot_hedge_primary_portfolio","Sane-PPrimSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Prm_swp_other_party" ),
			IF ( sSwapPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PPrimSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Primary swap portfolio is required","Prm_swp_other_party","Sane-PPrimSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSecSpotPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_hedge_secondary_portfolio" ),
			IF ( sSpotHedgeSec == "Yes" AND sSecSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSecSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Secondary spot portfolio is required","Spot_hedge_secondary_portfolio","Sane-PSecSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			},
			sSecSwapPortfolio := legGetString( pLeg,"Sec_swp_other_party" ),
			IF ( sSecSwapPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSecSwap-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Secondary swap portfolio is required","Sec_swp_other_party","Sane-PSecSwap-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFORWARD_AUTOSPOT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISWAP_AUTOSPOT" ) THEN
		{
			sSpotPortfolio := legGetString( legGetComponentAt( pLeg,1 ),"Counterpart" ),
			IF ( sSpotPortfolio == "" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-PSpot-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent,"Spot portfolio is required","Spot-Fwd#2.Counterpart","Sane-PSpot-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Pricing.FInit

/*
MXpress
FXMM Field Initialization rule

Used algorithm:
If leg is initialized
	If the fixing fields initialization has to be considered (depening on the contract source)
		Loop on all components
			If Registration is Spot-Forward or Forex-Swap leg  or Forward notice and not Funding Swap then
				If the fixing fields initialization is requested and if the corresponding fields are empty
					If NDF
                    	Retrieve from MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE if NDF index split should be set to "Yes" or "Yes - round cross rate"
                    	If necessary, NDF index split and NDF index split currency are updated
                    	If NDF index split is TRUE
							Assign the primary and secondary Archiving Group and Archiving Column from the right lookup table
						End if
					End if
					Retrieve Archiving Group and Archiving Column from the right lookup table
					Set fixing fields accordingly
				End if
			Else if Registration is Loan-Deposits then
				If pattern is Lease
					Set default values
				Else if 
					Set default values
			End if
		End loop 
	End if
End if

Version 1.14
Use of MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCE to default the NDF index split and NFDF index split currency

Version 1.13
Initialize the UDF FEE_TYPE

Version 1.12
To ease capture of same-day loans/deposits

Version 1.11
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.10
Amendment to handle precious metal leases

Version 1.9
Addition of conversion rate for Lease pattern

Version 1.8
Addition of conversion mode for NDF

Version 1.7
Use MX.FX.Archive LUT

Version 1.6
- The defaulting of the fixing source will always apply except if manually changed by the end user

Version 1.5
- To include the Forward notice in Archiving Group and Archiving Column Initializations

version 1.4
- To support the allocation of the indices in case of split of NDF indices (cross NDF). It also defaults the split of NDF indices if the instrument does not contains USD

Version 1.3
- To exclude the Funding swap of Archiving Column and Archiving Group Initializations

Version 1.2
- Remove the initialization of the nominal to 0 for components with the trade purpose "MMDA"

Version 1.1
- Archiving Group and Archiving Column: in order to distinguish fixing deals from non delivrable deals, use a set of two lookup tables 
to set Archiving Group and Archiving Column initialization

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to initialize fields for FX/MM products:
- Archiving Group and Archiving Column initialization for FX products
- Initialization of the nominal to 0 for components with the trade purpose "MMDA"

Nota:
This rule uses a set of lookup tables ( LUT ):
( MX.FXMM.Archive,Fixing ) contains the archiving group and archiving column used for fixing deals
( MX.FXMM.Archive,NDF ) contains the archiving group and archiving column for some currency pairs
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		sPublishingSystem := "",
		sSourceModule := "",
		bIsFixingReset := FALSE,
		iNbComponents := 0,
		iComponent := 0,
		sRegistration := "",
		sNonDeliverable := "",
		bNonDeliverable := FALSE,
		sFixing := "",
		bFixing := FALSE,
		bForwardNotice := FALSE,
		sCcyPair := "",
		sArchivingGroup := "",
		sArchivingColumn := "",
		bSplittingMode := FALSE,
		sPattern := "",
		sIndexation := "",
		sDealUnit := "",
		fSpot := 0.0,
		
		// The Archiving Column and Archiving Group is required under specific conditions:
		// - Newly inserted contracts have to be processed by the rule,
		// - Contracts generated by a Cancel & Reissue event should not be processed,
		// - Contracts generated by a sell-down procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a rollover procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a fixing procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a duplication should not be processed
		
		pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
		sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
		sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
		sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pLeg ),
		bIsFundingSwap := sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP",
		bIsFixingReset := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
							AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
							AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
							AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
							AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.futureFlowSellDow" )
							AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.fixing" )
							AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" )
							AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
		

		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
            
                         //Bank Note addition BAB                
            IF (sRegistration == "Spot-Forward") THEN
        {
            sBankNote := legGetString( pComponent, "BANK_NOTE"),
        	IF (sBankNote <> "") THEN 
        	legSetString (pComponent, "Quantity_currency", sBankNote)
		}, 
             
        //BAB addition for Product Code of DCD
        pStrip:= legGetFatherPackage(This),
        sTitle := legGetTitle(pStrip),
        IF sTitle == "Dual Currency Depo" THEN
        legOverwrite(pComponent,"STRTG_LBL",sTitle),
        //end of BAB addition
        
        
        //BAB addition related to the FX Swap product code
        sTypology := legGetString(pComponent,"Typology"),
        sPatternLabel := legGetPatternLabel(pComponent),
        IF sPatternLabel == "FX Swap" THEN
        {
        IF sTypology == "Spot" OR sTypology == "FX Waad" THEN
        {
        legSetString(pComponent,"Usage","FX Swap")
        }
        },
        //end of BAB addition
        
			//Archiving Column and Archiving Group Initialization
			IF ( bIsFixingReset ) THEN
			{
        
                IF ( ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Forward notice" ) ) 
                AND ( bIsFundingSwap <> TRUE ) THEN
                {
                    IF ( ( sRegistration == "Forward notice") ) THEN
                        bForwardNotice := TRUE
                    ELSE
                    {
                        sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pComponent,"Non deliverable" ),//Non-Deliverable products
                        bNonDeliverable := ( sNonDeliverable == "Yes" ),
                        sFixing := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing" ),//Products that need to be fixed
                        bFixing := ( sFixing == "Fix Price" OR  sFixing == "Fix Spot")
                    },
                    
                    // Defaulting for cross NDF
                    // The algorithm will look in MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE to default the proper fixing source method (No, Yes, Yes - round cross rate)
                    // It is possible to use the special character * to have generic rules (like */USD, */* ...)
                    // If the algorithm retrieves that the trade should be cross NDF, but the split currency is part of the external contract, then it will treat the trade as non-cross
                    
                    IF ( bNonDeliverable ) THEN
                    {
                    	sCcyPair := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
                        //dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ), Can be removed if we don't integrate the "cross fixing date" behavior of CBR-3858
                        sFirstCcy := strSubString( sCcyPair,0,3 ),
                        sSecondCcy := strSubString( sCcyPair,4 ),                           
						pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE","NDF","Currency Pair",sCcyPair ),
                        IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
                        {
                            pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE","NDF", "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*" ),
                            IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE","NDF", "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy ),
                            IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FIXSOURCEMODE","NDF", "Currency Pair","*/*" )
                        },
						IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
                        {
							sFixingSourceMethod := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
							sSplittingCurrency := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
                            IF (sSplittingCurrency == sFirstCcy OR sSplittingCurrency == sSecondCcy) THEN
                            {
                            	sFixingSourceMethod := "No",
                             	sSplittingCurrency := ""
                            },
							legSetString ( pComponent,"Ndf_fixing_splitting_currency_mode",sFixingSourceMethod ),
							IF ( sFixingSourceMethod <> "No" AND sSplittingCurrency <> "") THEN
								legSetString ( pComponent,"Ndf_fixing_splitting_currency",sSplittingCurrency )
						}
                        
                    },
                    
                    IF ( ( bNonDeliverable ) OR ( bFixing ) OR ( bForwardNotice ) ) THEN
                    {
                        sArchivingGroup := "",
                        sArchivingColumn := "",
                        sOverwrite := "NO",
                        sGroup := "",
                        bConversionMode := FALSE,
                        IF ( bNonDeliverable ) THEN
                            sGroup := "Non Deliverable"
                        ELSE IF ( bFixing ) THEN
                            sGroup := "Fixing"
                        ELSE IF ( bForwardNotice ) THEN
                            sGroup := "Forward Notice",
                        
                        IF ( bNonDeliverable ) THEN
                        {
                            sSplittingMode := legGetString( pComponent,"Ndf fixing splitting currency mode" ),
                            bSplittingMode := ( ( sSplittingMode == "Yes" ) OR ( sSplittingMode == "Yes - Round cross rate") ),
                            sConversionMode:=legGetString( pComponent,"NDF conversion mode" ),
                            bConversionMode := ( sConversionMode == "Yes" )
                        },
                        
                        IF ( bSplittingMode ) THEN
                        {
                            //Find the primary index
                            sCcyPair := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
							sCcyPairPrimary := legGetString( pComponent,"Ndf fixing primary contract" ),    
                            pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup,"Currency Pair",sCcyPairPrimary,"Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sFirstCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairPrimary,0,3 ),
                                sSecondCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairPrimary,4 ),
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*","Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy,"Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/*","Cross currency pair",sCcyPair )
                            }, 
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
                                sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
                                sOverwrite := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ) ),
                                IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN 
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Pri archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Pri archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Pri archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Pri archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                            },
                            //Find the secondary index
                            sCcyPairSecondary := legGetString( pComponent,"Ndf fixing secondary contract" ), 
                            pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup,"Currency Pair",sCcyPairSecondary,"Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sFirstCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairSecondary,0,3 ),
                                sSecondCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairSecondary,4 ),
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*","Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy,"Cross currency pair",sCcyPair ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/*","Cross currency pair",sCcyPair )
                            }, 
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
                                sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
                                sOverwrite := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ) ),
                                IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN 
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Sec archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Sec archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Sec archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Sec archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                            sCcyPair := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
                            
                            pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup,"Currency Pair",sCcyPair ),
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sFirstCcy := strSubString( sCcyPair,0,3 ),
                                sSecondCcy := strSubString( sCcyPair,4 ),
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*" ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/*" )
                            }, 
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
                                sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
                                sOverwrite := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ) ),
                                IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN 
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"Archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        IF ( bConversionMode ) THEN
                        {
                            sCcyPairConversion := legGetString( pComponent,"NDF conversion contract" ),
                            
                            pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup,"Currency Pair",sCcyPairConversion ),
                            IF ( toString( pResults ) == "0" ) THEN
                            {
                                sFirstCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairConversion,0,3 ),
                                sSecondCcy := strSubString( sCcyPairConversion,4 ),
                                pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair",sFirstCcy + "/*" ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/" + sSecondCcy ),
                                IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.FX.Archive",sGroup, "Currency Pair","*/*" )
                            },
                            IF ( NOT isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
                            {
                                sArchivingGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
                                sArchivingColumn := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
                                sOverwrite := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ) ),
                                IF ( sOverwrite == "YES" ) THEN 
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"NDF conversion archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"NDF conversion archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    IF ( sArchivingGroup <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"NDF conversion archiving group",sArchivingGroup ),
                                    IF ( sArchivingColumn <> "" ) THEN
                                        legSetString( pComponent,"NDF conversion archiving column",sArchivingColumn )
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
                {
                    // Piece of code for commodity precious metal leases
                    // Defaulting of physical attributes for allocated bullion
                    sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
                    IF ( sPattern == "Lease" ) THEN
                    {
                        sProduct := legGetString( pComponent,"Physical" ),
                        pDefaultResults := lookupResults( "MX.COM.PM.Form","ALL","Metal",sProduct ),
                        // Note that the case where native quotation unit is KG is not covered (Asian markets) . It can be added easily by adding a location column in MX.COM.PM.Form table
                        sDefaultUnit := lookupResultsGetString( pDefaultResults,0,1 ),
                        sForm := legGetString( pComponent,"Form1" ),
                        pFormResults := lookupResults( "MX.COM.PM.Form","ALL","Metal",sProduct,"PM Physical Form", sForm ),
                        sQuality := lookupResultsGetString( pFormResults,0,0 ),
                        sUnit := lookupResultsGetString( pFormResults,0,1 ),
                        legSetString( pComponent,"Nominal_unit",sUnit ),
                        legSetString( pComponent,"Quality",sQuality ),
                        // Defaulting of fixed conversion price
                        sIndexation := legGetString( pComponent,"Indexation status" ),
                        IF ( sIndexation == "Yes" ) THEN
                        {
                            sDealUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
                            fSpot := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Ref spot" ),
                            legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Interest Conversion Rate",comConvertUnit( sDealUnit,sDefaultUnit ) * fSpot )
                        }
                    },
                    
                    // Easing capture of same-day loans/deposits
                    bIsIntradayDeposit := legIsElementValid( pComponent,"pf_Intraday" ),
                    IF ( bIsIntradayDeposit ) THEN
                    {
                        sIsIntradayDeposit := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_Intraday" ),
                        IF ( sIsIntradayDeposit == "Yes" ) THEN
                        {
                            dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent, "Start" ),
                            sRateConvention := legGetString( pComponent,"Rate convention" ),
                            
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Start_period", "td" ),
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Maturity", dStartDate ),
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Single_period", "Yes" ),
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Rate convention",sRateConvention + " INC" ),
                            
                            sNewRateConvention := legGetString( pComponent,"Rate convention" ),
                            IF NOT strCONTAIN( sNewRateConvention,"INC" ) THEN
                                ThrowInformation( "Rate convention: ","For intraday loan/deposit, please make sure the basis convention is in Inclusive mode")
                        }
                    }
                }
                       
    		},
            
            IF ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) THEN
            {
            	sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
            	IF ( sPattern == "One-off Fee" ) THEN
            	{
                    sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_OneOffFee" ),
                    legSetString( pComponent,"FEE_TYPE",sFeeType ),
                    
                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.OneOff-Fee","ALL","Fee Type",sFeeType ),
                    sFlowTypology0 := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ),
                    sFlowTypology1 := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,3 ),
                    sFlowTypology2 := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,4 ),
                    sFlowTypology3 := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,5 ),
                    sFlowTypology4 := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,6 ),
                    
                    pSCF := scfGetFlows(pComponent),
                    iNbLine := scfGetNumberOfLines( pSCF ),
                    iNb := 0,
                    
                    WHILE ( iNb < iNbLine ) DO
                    {
                        pFlow := scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,iNb ),
                        scfFlowSetType (pFlow,"R" ),
                        scfFlowSetTypology( pFlow,0,sFlowTypology0 ),
                        scfFlowSetTypology( pFlow,1,sFlowTypology1 ),
                        scfFlowSetTypology( pFlow,2,sFlowTypology2 ),
                        scfFlowSetTypology( pFlow,3,sFlowTypology3 ),
                        scfFlowSetTypology( pFlow,4,sFlowTypology4 ),
                        iNb := iNb + 1
                    }
            	}
            },     
            
           iComponent := iComponent + 1 
		}
        
	}

};

// mx.preTrade.completion.HYBRID.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
Short description for cross asset strategies

Version 1.5
Amended to handle Equity Linked Note

Version 1.4
Amended to handle Equity swaps

Version 1.3
Amended to handle ETF

Version 1.2
Amended to handle the Range Cur Deposit 

Version 1.1
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to build a short description of current Dual Curr Deposit

Notes:
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter and in the mail communication
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
*/

{
	pContract := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	iNbDecimalAmount := 0,
	iNbDecimalRate := 4,
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pContract ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
			IF ( sRegistration == "Dual Cur Deposit" ) THEN
			{
				sRepaymentCurrency := legGetString( pContract,"CCY Opt" ),
				
				pLoanDeposit := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pLoanDeposit,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
				sInitialCCY := legGetString( pLoanDeposit,"Instrument" ),
				fRepaymentLoanDeposit := legGetNumeric( pLoanDeposit,"Repayment" ),
				sRepaymentLoanDeposit := toString( fRepaymentLoanDeposit,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
				sInitialCurrency := legGetString( pLoanDeposit,"Instrument" ),
				
				pOption := legGetComponentAt( pContract,1 ),
				dDelivery := legGetDate( pOption,"Delivery" ),
				fRepaymentOption := legGetNumeric( pOption,"Other nominal" ),
				sRepaymentOption := toString( fRepaymentOption,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
				
				fRate := toString( legGetNumeric( pLoanDeposit,"Rate/Margin" ) ),
				sRate := " @ rate " + toString( fRate,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				
				fStrike := toString( legGetNumeric( pOption,"Strike" ) ),
				sStrike := " @ strike " + toString( fStrike,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := "DCD: " + sNominal + " " + sInitialCCY + " => " 
						+ sRepaymentLoanDeposit + " " + sInitialCurrency + "/"
						+ sRepaymentOption + " " + sRepaymentCurrency 
						+ sRate 
						+ sStrike
						+ " on " + toString1( dDelivery )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Exchange Traded Funds" ) THEN
			{
				sSellOrBuy := legGetString( pContract,"Buy Sell" ),
				sInstrument := legGetString( pContract,"Instrument" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,15,0,TRUE,0 ),
				fPrice := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Price" ),
				sPrice := toString( fPrice,8,4,TRUE,0 ),
				sCcy := legGetString( pContract,"Flat_settl_unit" ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := sSellOrBuy + "s " + sQuantity + " on " + sInstrument + " at " + sPrice + " " + sCcy
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Equity swaps" ) THEN
			{
				sPayReceive := legGetString( pContract,"Pay/Receive1" ),    
				sPayReceive2 := legGetString( pContract,"Pay/Receive2" ),
				sIndex2 := legGetString( pContract,"Index2" ),
				sIndex1 := legGetString( pContract,"Index1" ),
				sBarriersType := legGetString( pContract,"Barriers Type" ),
				fBarriersStrike := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Barriers Strike" ),
				sBarriersStrike := toString( fBarriersStrike,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
				fBarriersRebate := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Barriers Rebate" ),
				sBarriersRebate := toString( fBarriersRebate,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( fBarriersRebate == 0.0 ) THEN
					sBarriersRebate := "",
				fBarriersRebateStep := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Barriers Rebate Step" ),
				sBarriersRebateStep := toString( fBarriersRebateStep,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( fBarriersRebateStep == 0.0 ) THEN
					sBarriersRebateStep := "",
				fRateMargin2 := legGetNumeric( pContract,"Rate Margin2" ),
				sRateMargin2 := toString( fRateMargin2 ),
				IF ( fRateMargin2 == 0.0 ) THEN
					sRateMargin2 := "",
				dMaturity := legGetDate( pContract,"Maturity" ),
				sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
				
				sBarrierInfo1 := " with early redemption barrier " + sBarriersType,
				sBarrierInfo2 := " with strike " + sBarriersStrike + ", barrier rebate " + sBarriersRebate + " and rebate step " + sBarriersRebateStep,
				
				IF (sBarriersType == "None" ) THEN
				{
					sBarrierInfo1 := " with no early redemption barrier ",
					sBarrierInfo2 := ""
				},
				
				sBlotterDescription := sPayReceive2 + " " + sIndex2 + " " + sRateMargin2 + " on Funding leg and " +
										sPayReceive + " coupon on " + sIndex1 + sBarrierInfo1 + sBarrierInfo2 + " with expiry " + sMaturity
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Range Cur Deposit" ) THEN
			{
				fCapGuaranteed := legGetNumeric( pContract, "MinCap" ),
				sCapGuaranteed := " cap guaranteed " + toString( fCapGuaranteed,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				
				fEnhancRate := legGetNumeric( pContract, "RCD_EnhancRate" ),
				sEnhancRate := "enhanced rate " + toString( fEnhancRate,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				
				pLoanDeposit := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pLoanDeposit,"Nominal" ),
				sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
				sInitialCCY := legGetString( pLoanDeposit,"Instrument" ),
				
				pOption := legGetComponentAt( pContract,1 ),
				sBarrierStyle := legGetString ( pOption,"Barrier_style" ),
				dWindowStart := legGetDate( pOption,"Window_start_date" ),
				dWindowEnd := legGetDate( pOption,"Window_end_date" ),
				sExoticStyle := legGetString( pOption,"Exotic_style" ),
				fBarrier1 := legGetNumeric( pOption,"Barrier" ),
			
				IF ( sExoticStyle == "Double no touch" ) THEN
				{
					fBarrier2 := legGetNumeric( pOption,"Barrier2" ),
					sBarrier := " @ low barrier " + toString( fBarrier1,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 )
								+ " and high barrier " + toString( fBarrier2,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 )
				}
				ELSE IF ( sExoticStyle == "No touch up" ) THEN
					sBarrier := " @ high barrier " + toString( fBarrier1,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 )
				ELSE IF ( sExoticStyle == "No touch down" ) THEN
					sBarrier := " @ low barrier " + toString( fBarrier1,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ),
				
				IF ( ( sBarrierStyle == "American" ) OR ( sBarrierStyle == "Partial" ) ) THEN
					sWindowDate := " between " + toString1( dWindowStart ) + " and " + toString1( dWindowEnd ) 
				ELSE IF ( sBarrierStyle == "European" ) THEN
					sWindowDate := " on " + toString1( dWindowStart ),
				
				sBlotterDescription := "RCD: " + sNominal + " " + sInitialCCY + " =>" 
						+ sCapGuaranteed + " / "
						+ sEnhancRate
						+ sBarrier
						+ sWindowDate
			}
			
            // For Equity linked note
            ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "ELN" ) THEN
            {
                pELNComponent0 := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
                pELNComponent1 := legGetComponentAt( pContract,1 ),
                  
                 
                sBuySell := legGetString( pELNComponent0,"Buy Sell" ) + " ",
                fNominal := legGetNumeric( pELNComponent0,"Nominal" ),
                sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
                fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pELNComponent0,"Quantity" ),
                sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,12,0,TRUE,0 ),
                sPayout := legGetString( pELNComponent0,"Payout" ) + " ",
                
                dMaturity := legGetDate( pELNComponent0,"Option expiration" ),
                sMaturity := " Expiry " + toString1( dMaturity ),
            
                // Exotic blotter text
                sBlotterDescription0 := sBuySell+ sQuantity + " " + sPayout + "Option"+ " " + sMaturity + " on " + sInstrument,
   
                           
                sTypology := legGetTypology( pELNComponent1 ),
                sPayout := legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Payout" ),
                fNominal := legGetNumeric( pELNComponent1,"Nominal" ),
                sNominal := toString( fNominal,12,iNbDecimalAmount,TRUE,0 ),
                sNominalUnit := legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Nominal unit" ),
                dStartDate := legGetDate( pELNComponent1,"Start" ),
                dMaturity := legGetDate( pELNComponent1,"Last Calculation Date" ),
                sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
                sStartDate := toString1( dStartDate ),
                sInstrument := legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Instrument" ),
                sGenerator := legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Generator" ),
            
                IF ( sGenerator == "Template" ) THEN
                    sCustomized := ""
                ELSE
                    sCustomized := "*",
                sIndex := legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Index" ),
                pStreams := legGetStreams( pELNComponent1 ),
                pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
                pIndex := streamGetIndex( pStream ),
                IF ( pIndex == pNull ) THEN
                    sNature := "Fixed rate"
                ELSE
                    sNature := "Floating rate",
                fRate := legGetNumeric( pELNComponent1,"Rate/Margin" ),
                dStartDate := legGetDate( pELNComponent1,"Start" ),
                dMaturity := legGetDate( pELNComponent1,"Last Calculation Date" ),
                sMaturity := toString1( dMaturity ),
                sStartDate := toString1( dStartDate ),
                IF ( strToUpperCase( legGetString( pELNComponent1,"Amortizing" ) ) <> "NONE" ) THEN
                    sAmortizing := " amortized",
                IF( sNature == "Fixed rate" ) THEN
                {
                    sBlotterDescription1 := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + toString( fRate,12,iNbDecimalRate,TRUE,0 ) + "% (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing,
                    IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                        sBlotterDescription1 := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sheaderOrder + " (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing
                }
                ELSE
                {
                    sBlotterDescription1 := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sIndex + " +" + toString( fRate * 100. ,12,iNbDecimalRate-2,TRUE,0 ) + "bp (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing,
                    IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                        sBlotterDescription1 := sPayout + " " + sNominal + " " + sNominalUnit + " from " + sStartDate + " to " + sMaturity + " @ " + sIndex + " +"  +  sheaderOrder + " (" + sInstrument + sCustomized + ") " + sAmortizing
                },
                
                sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription0 + "/" + sBlotterDescription1
            },
            
			// Blotter and communication
			IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) > 245 ) THEN
			{
				sBlotterDescription := strSubString( sBlotterDescription,0,244 ),
				ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc HYB rule )","DIST_DESC" )
			},
			iComponent := 0,
			iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription ),
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.HYBRID.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
Dynamic Layout rule ( Management of Patterns Field Properties ) for cross asset strategies

Used algorithm:
Retrieve the registration of current contract
Reset all properties
If the current registration is "Dual Cur Deposit" then
	Add properties accordingly
If the current registration is "Range Cur Deposit" then
	Add properties accordingly
If the current registration is "Exchange Traded Funds" then
	Add properties accordingly to handle block trades
If the current registration is "Equity swaps" then
	Add properties accordingly to handle payment
End if

Version 1.6
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Amendments to handle Equity swaps

Version 1.3
Amendments to handle ETF

Version 1.2
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.1
Amendment to handle the Range Cur Deposit 

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	pContract := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
	
	// Reset the Field Properties for the leg
	legResetProperties( pContract ),
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Dual Cur Deposit" ) THEN
	{
		sSolvingMode := legGetString( pContract,"Solving mode" ),
		IF ( sSolvingMode <> "Find strike" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pContract,"dcd_1.1_strike" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Range Cur Deposit" ) THEN
	{
		sSolvingMode := legGetString( pContract,"RCD_RangeType" ),
		IF ( sSolvingMode == "Inside" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pContract,"rcd_2.01_paysInside" )
		ELSE IF ( sSolvingMode == "Above" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pContract,"rcd_2.02_paysAbove" )
		ELSE IF ( sSolvingMode == "Below" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pContract,"rcd_2.03_paysBelow" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Equity swaps" ) THEN
	{
		sCheck := legGetString( pContract,"pf_Autocall" ),
		IF ( sCheck == "Put" ) THEN
			legAddProperty( pContract,"as_3.01_finalPayment" )
	},
    
    //BAB addition for Commodity details UDF
    IF ( sRegistration == "Dual Cur Deposit" ) THEN
    {
    pLoan := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
    sUDF := legGetString(pLoan,"ISLAMIC_LN"),
    IF sUDF == "Yes" THEN
    {
    legAddProperty(pContract,"dcd_1.2_commoditydetails")
    }
    },
    //end of BAB addition
	
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "HYBRID")   	
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.HYBRID.Closing.TradabilityCheck

/*
MXpress HYBRID Specific completion

Version 2.3
Call TradabilityCheckCommon function for Common Tradability Checks

Version 2.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 2.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

Version 2.0

Notes:
If the tradability is active, the goal of this rule is to analyze every component of a transaction and check if they are tradable.
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	Generic Common Tradability Checks (See TradabilityCheckCommon for codes)
    
If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
	For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,    
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		sIsTradabilityCheckActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","TradabilityCheck.HYBRID" ) ),
		IF ( ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = TradabilityCheck.HYBRID ( should be YES or NO )" ),
		
		IF ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive == "YES" ) THEN
	        callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon","HYBRID" )
	}
};
