// mx.preTrade.completion.HYBRID.Pricing.FInit

/*
MXpress
Field initialization rule for cross asset strategies

Used algorithm:
Retrieve the registration of current contract
If the current registration is "Dual Cur Deposit" then
	Set the Nature of Loan/Deposit as "Fixed rate"
Else If the current registration is "Range Cur Deposit" then
	Set the Nature of Loan/Deposit as "Fixed rate"
Else If the current registration is "Equity swaps" then
	If rate margin is implied then
		force the NPV to be implied
	End if
End if

Version 1.3
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.2
Amendment to handle the Equity swaps

Version 1.1
Amendment to handle the Range Cur Deposit 

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	pContract := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Dual Cur Deposit" ) THEN
	{
		pLoanDeposit := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
		legOverwrite( pLoanDeposit,"Nature","Fixed rate" )
	},

	IF ( sRegistration == "Range Cur Deposit" ) THEN
	{
		pLoanDeposit := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
		legOverwrite( pLoanDeposit,"Nature","Fixed rate" )
	},
	
	IF ( sRegistration == "Equity swaps" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( legIsImplied( pContract,"Rate_Margin" ) ) THEN
			legSetLocalImplied( pContract,"Npv" )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.mirroring.ALL.Booking.Mirr

/*
MXpress
Mirroring rule

Used algorithm
Fields initialization
Loop on all contracts
	If Back to back is requested
		If there is no Back to back portfolio
			Throw an error
		Else
			Clone the current contract
			Loop on all components
				Overwrite few fields accordingly
			End loop
		End if
	End if
End loop
If Back to back has been performed
	Update package registration accordingly
End if

Version 1.8
Transfer fees from original contract to clone component

Version 1.7
- Take Sales margin mode (VAMODE) 'Keep in Sales portfolio' into account
- Remove BTB Inter-Entity logic, it is handled in a separate sequence branch after BTB Router (IE task and not Mirr task)

Version 1.6
- Correction in case of inter-entity for FX Swap

Version 1.5
- Switch buy-sell applied to ease display on portfolio and counterparty for the internal trade
- Correction in case of inter-entity
- For the cloned contract, set the "Back to back" field to No 

Version 1.4
- Remove the fees for internal contracts
- In case of inter-entity, loop on contracts instead of components

Version 1.3
Correction on the way to retrieve the counterparty

Version 1.2
Ensure EXT_CTP and VAAMT UDF are defined for current trade before copy

Version 1.1
Fill UDF EXT_CTP with external counterparty
Set the VA Amount to 0 for internal deals of back to back packages

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to generate Back-To-Back contracts and include them in a Package Single with the original contracts
FX Products covered : NDF HVA,FX Swap HVA,FX Fwd/Fwd HVA
MM Products covered: Loan HVA,Depo HVA

Deals involving portfolios within different legal entities would become interentity deals

Assumption: The "Back To Back Portfolio" field was set in the Portfolio Allocation rule
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( legGetMainComponent( pLeg ) ),
	
	//Field Initialization/Reset
	iContract := 0,
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	bToBTB := FALSE,
	pFees := pNULL,
	iNbFees := 0,
	iFee := 0,
	bBTBDone := FALSE,
	sDestinationTrader := "",
	sSourceTrader := "",
	sPortfolio := "",
	sBTBPortfolio := "",
	iCloneComponent := 0,
	iNbCloneComponents := 0,
	sBTBType := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	iResults := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	bFloating := FALSE,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	iComponent := 0,
	bInternal := FALSE,
	sSourcePortfolio := "",
	sDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sField := "",
	iBTBEntity := 0,
	bInternalDone := FALSE,
	sCounterparty := "",
	
	WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO //Looping on the contracts
	{
		pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
		bToBTB := legGetFOPIsBackToBack( pContract ),// Checks whether a Back-To-Back contract needs to be generated
		IF ( bToBTB ) THEN
		{
			// If a B2B user is provided,use it the as Source Trader
			// If not,use the Source Trader of the initial deal instead
			// In any case,use the Source Trader of the initial deal as Destination Trader
			sDestinationTrader := legGetString( legGetMainComponent( pContract ),"Source trader" ),
			sSourceTrader := legGetFOPInternalTrader( pContract ),
			IF ( sSourceTrader == "" ) THEN
			{
				sSourceTrader := sDestinationTrader,
				legSetFOPInternalTrader( pContract,sSourceTrader )
			},
			
			sCounterparty := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Counterpart" ),
			sPortfolio := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Portfolio" ),
			sBTBPortfolio := legGetFOPInternalPortfolio( pContract ),//B2B Portfolio
			
			IF ( sBTBPortfolio == "" ) THEN
				ThrowError( legGetMainComponent( pContract ),"Back-To-Back Portfolio not allocated. Please uncheck the Back-To-Back flag or provide a Back-To-Back Portfolio ( Mirroring rule )","Back to back portfolio" )
			ELSE
			{
				// Cloning the contract
				pClone := legClone( pContract ),
				legSetFOPIsBackToBack( pClone,FALSE ),
				iCloneComponent := 0,
				iNbCloneComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pClone ),
				WHILE ( iCloneComponent < iNbCloneComponents ) DO 
				{
					pCloneComponent := legGetComponentAt( pClone,iCloneComponent ),
					legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Internal","Yes" ),
					
					// Portfolio allocation
					legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Counterpart",sPortfolio ),
					legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Portfolio",sBTBPortfolio ),
					// Set Source and Destination Traders
					legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Source trader",sSourceTrader ),
					legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Destination trader",sDestinationTrader ),
					
					// All margins are set to 0. This is done at the component level
					// A LUT table contains the name of the margin field based on the product registration
					
					sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCloneComponent ),
                    
                    sSalesMarginMode := "None",
                    IF ( legIsElementValid( pCloneComponent, "VAMODE" ) ) THEN
					{
                    	sSalesMarginMode := legGetString(pCloneComponent, "VAMODE")
                    },
                    IF (sSalesMarginMode == "Keep in Sales portfolio") THEN
                    {
                        //Getting the list of Margin Fields for this registration
                        pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","MirrMarg","Registration",sRegistration ),
                        iResults := 0,//Variable Initialization
                        iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),//Number of sales margin fields for this registration
                        WHILE ( iResults < iNbResults ) DO //Looping on the different margin fields for the component
                        {
                           //BAB addition for customized flows
                        sTypology := legGetTypology(pCloneComponent),
                        IF sTypology == "Murabaha Borrowing" OR sTypology == "Murabaha Placement" OR sTypology == "PRS" 
                        OR sTypology == "PRS Range" OR sTypology == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sTypology == "PRS Inverse Floater" OR sTypology == "Depo Callable" THEN
                        {
                        IF strCONTAIN (legGetString( pCloneComponent, "Customized Flows" ), "Y") THEN
                        {
                        	pStreams := legGetStreams(pCloneComponent),
                        	iPhase := 0,
                        	iNumberOfPhases := streamsGetNumberOfPhases(pStreams),
                        	WHILE ( iPhase < iNumberOfPhases ) DO
                            {
                    			pFirstLegStream := streamsGetStream(pStreams,iPhase,0),
                        		bFloating := streamIsFloating( pFirstLegStream ),
                       			IF NOT ( bFloating ) THEN
			           			{
                                	iPeriod := 0,
                                	pListCusto := streamsGetCustomizations(pStreams),
                                    iNumberofCustos := customizationsGetNumberOfCustomizations(pListCusto),
                                    iNumberofCusto := 0,
                                    	WHILE iNumberofCusto < iNumberofCustos DO
                                        {
                                            pCusto := customizationsGetCustomization(pListCusto, iNumberofCusto),
                                            fCustomization:= customizationGetNumericValue(pCusto),
                                            fFirstLegPeriodRate := streamGetPeriodRate(pFirstLegStream,iPeriod),
                                            fsalesmargin := legGetNumeric(pCloneComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResults,1)),
                                            sPayout := legGetString(pCloneComponent,"Payout"),
                                            IF fFirstLegPeriodRate == fCustomization THEN
                                            {
                                                IF sPayout == "Borrow" OR sPayout == "Pay fixed" THEN
                                                {
                                                    fNewRate := fFirstLegPeriodRate + fsalesmargin,
                                                    streamSetPeriodRate(pStreams, pFirstLegStream, iPeriod, fNewRate)
                                                }
                                                ELSE IF sPayout == "Lend" OR sPayout == "Receive fixed" THEN
                                                {
                                                    fNewRate := fFirstLegPeriodRate - fsalesmargin,
                                                    streamSetPeriodRate(pStreams, pFirstLegStream, iPeriod, fNewRate)
                                                },
                                                iNumberofCusto := iNumberofCusto +1
                                            
                                            },
                                         	iPeriod := iPeriod + 1
                                        }
                                },
                               
                                iPhase := iPhase +1
                            }
                        }
                        },
                        
                        //end of BAB addition
                        legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResults,1 ),0.0 ),//Sets the sales margin to 0.0
                            iResults := iResults + 1
                        },
                        IF ( ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Call deposits" ) ) THEN
                        {
                            // For floating rate => zero margin
                            pStream := streamsGetStream( legGetStreams( pCloneComponent ),0,0 ),
                            bFloating := streamIsFloating( pStream ),
                            IF ( bFloating ) THEN
                                streamSetCommonRate( pStream,TRUE )
                        }
                    },
					
					// Fill UDF EXT_CTP with external counterparty 
					IF ( legIsElementValid( pCloneComponent,"EXT_CTP" ) ) THEN
					{
						//sCounterparty := legGetString( pContract,"Counterpart" ),
						legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"EXT_CTP",sCounterparty )
					},
					// Set the VA Amount to 0
					IF ( legIsElementValid( pCloneComponent,"VAAMT" ) ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"VAAMT",0.0 ),
										
                    //To remove all fees on clone component, except if they are Sales income fees in which case they are deleted from the original contract
					pOriginalFees := legGetBrokerFlows( legGetComponentAt(pContract, iCloneComponent ) ),
                    pFees := legGetBrokerFlows( pCloneComponent ),
                    iFee := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFees ) - 1,
                    WHILE ( iFee >= 0 ) DO
                    {
                        pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFees,iFee ),
						IF ( (sSalesMarginMode == "Transfer to Sales portfolio") AND ( brkFlowGetType( pFee ) == "InternalFee" ) AND ( brkFlowGetCode( pFee ) == "SALES_FEE" ) AND ( brkFlowGetSource( pFee ) == sBTBPortfolio ) ) THEN
                        {
                        	pOriginalFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pOriginalFees,iFee ),
                            brkFlowsRemove( pOriginalFees,pOriginalFee )
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
	                        brkFlowsRemove( pFees,pFee )
                        },
                        iFee := iFee - 1
                    }, 
					
					iCloneComponent := iCloneComponent + 1
				}
			},
			bBTBDone := TRUE
		},
		
		iContract := iContract + 1
	},
	
	IF ( bBTBDone ) THEN
	{
		// Set the registration of the Package to Package Single
		legSetRegistration( pPackage,"mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE",0.0 ) //Sets the package registration
	},
    
    
    // Murabaha Process
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	iContract := 0,
	WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO //Looping on the contracts
    
    {
		pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
		
		bInternal := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Internal" ) == "Yes",
        
        sRegistration := legGetRegistration(pContract),
        IF sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" THEN
        {
            sManualBooking := legGetString(pContract,"MAN_BOOK")
        },

		
		//Murabaha COM generation 
        IF /* sysGetGroup()<>"FO" AND */ sManualBooking <> "Yes" AND legGetTypology(legGetMainComponent( pLeg ))=="Murabaha Commodity" AND (iNbContracts == 1) /*AND sSourceModule <> "trasset" */ AND sSourceClass <> "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE"  THEN 
        {
        	sUsage:= legGetUsage(legGetMainComponent( pLeg )),
            sIslamicSukuks:=legGetString(legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),"ISLAMIC_SK"),
            sPRS:=strToken(legGetString(legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),"IS_ORILINK"),"-",0),
            sMainPortfolio := legGetString(legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),"Portfolio"),
            sTypology := legGetTypology(legGetMainComponent( pLeg )),        
          
            //BAB are handling full commodity process, set of 3 coms generated
            IF sUsage == "Murabaha Plc BA" OR  sUsage == "Murabaha Brw DI"
            OR sUsage == "RR Murabaha" OR sUsage == "RR SAMA" OR  sUsage == "Repo Murabaha" OR sUsage == "Repo SAMA"
            OR sUsage == "LTM BA" OR sUsage == "LTM Callable BA" OR sUsage == "LTM CapFloorCollarBA" OR sUsage == "LTM Range BA" OR sUsage == "LTM Range CallableBA"
            OR sUsage == "FX Murabaha" OR sUsage == "PRS" OR sUsage == "PRS Range" OR sUsage == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sUsage == "PRS Inverse Floater" 
            OR sUsage == "Depo Callable" OR sUsage == "Depo Range" OR sUsage == "Depo CapFloorCollar" OR sUsage == "Depo Range Callable"
            OR sUsage == "SAMA Bill" OR sUsage == "SFRM" OR sUsage == "Sukuk Issuance" THEN
            {     
                // Clone
                pBrokerSellerContract := pContract, // Broker Seller
                pClientContract := legClone( pContract ), // Client
                pBrokerBuyerContract := legClone( pContract ), // Broker Buyer 
                
                
                //Remove cloned Broker flows
                pBroker1Fees := legGetBrokerFlows( pBrokerSellerContract ),
                        iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pBroker1Fees ),
                        iFee := 0,
                        WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
                        {
                            pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pBroker1Fees,iFee ),
                            sCode:=brkFlowGetCode(pFee),
                            brkFlowOverwriteSource( pFee,"OTH_MURCOM" ),     // Overwrite source portfolio for fees
                            iFee := iFee + 1
                        },
                 pFeesClient := legGetBrokerFlows( pClientContract ),
                        iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFeesClient ),
                        iFee := 0,
                        WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
                        {
                            pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFeesClient,iFee ),
                            brkFlowsRemove( pFeesClient,pFee ),
                            iFee := iFee + 1
                        },
                  pFeesBrk2 := legGetBrokerFlows( pBrokerBuyerContract ),
                        iNbFees := brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pFeesBrk2 ),
                        iFee := 0,
                        WHILE ( iFee < iNbFees ) DO
                        {
                            pFee := brkFlowsGetAt( pFeesBrk2,iFee ),
                            brkFlowsRemove( pFeesBrk2,pFee ),
                            iFee := iFee + 1
                        },
                 // End      
                        
                // Identification
                pBrokerSellerComponent := legGetComponentAt(pBrokerSellerContract,0), // Broker Seller
                pClientComponent := legGetComponentAt(pClientContract,0), // Client
                pBrokerBuyerComponent := legGetComponentAt(pBrokerBuyerContract,0), // Broker Buyer
                               
				// Set portfolio to OTH_MURCOM
                legSetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Portfolio","OTH_MURCOM"),
                legSetString(pClientComponent,"Portfolio","OTH_MURCOM"),
				legSetString(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Portfolio","OTH_MURCOM"),  
                
                //set DOC_TYPE on client deal only
                sDocType:=legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"DOC_TYPE"),
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"DOC_TYPE",sDocType),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"DOC_TYPE",""),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"DOC_TYPE",""),  
                
                sCounterparty := legGetString(pContract,"Counterpart"),
                
    
                sBuySell := legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent, "Buy_Sell"),
    
                //If the trade being imported is a buy
                IF sBuySell == "Buy" THEN
                    //It means we are paying an interest flow, therefore going for a buy buy sell murabahah structure
                    sFlowDirection := "WePay"
                ELSE
                    //It means we are receiving an interest flow, therefore going for a buy sell sell murabahah structure
                    sFlowDirection := "WeReceive",
                
                // Buy / Sell
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Buy_Sell","Buy"),
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Buy_Sell","Sell"),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Buy_Sell","Sell"),                
                IF sFlowDirection == "WeReceive" 
                    THEN legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Buy_Sell","Sell")
                    ELSE legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Buy_Sell","Buy"),
                
                // Freeze buy/Sell
                legProtectCell(pBrokerSellerContract,"Buy_Sell",TRUE),
                legProtectCell(pClientContract,"Buy_Sell",TRUE),
                legProtectCell(pBrokerBuyerContract,"Buy_Sell",TRUE),                                  
                
                
                // Set currency for FX Murebaha
                sTheoSellCurr := legGetString(pContract,"IS_THEOCUR"),
                IF sUsage == "FX Murabaha" THEN
                {
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Currency",sTheoSellCurr),
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Currency",sTheoSellCurr)     
                    },
                
                
               // Get broker price (manual input)
                sCommodity := legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical"),
                sCurrency := legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Currency"),
                sBroker:= legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"IS_BROKER1"),
                dStartDate:= legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery"),
                fBrokerPrice := legGetNumeric(pContract,"Price_Margin2"),

                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Price_Margin2",fBrokerPrice),          
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Price_Margin2",fBrokerPrice),
                
                
                
                //Set broker 1 code in COM3 for Acc
                sBrkCode := ctpGetUdfString(sBroker,"CTP_CODE"),
                IF sBrkCode <> "" THEN
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"BRK_CODE",sBrkCode),    
                // End broker code
                
                
                //Set Product code for accounting
                sProductCode := legGetString(pContract,"PROD_CODE"),
                IF sProductCode <> "" THEN
                {
                	legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"PROD_CODE",sProductCode),
					legOverwrite(pClientContract,"PROD_CODE",sProductCode)	
                    },
                //End of product code for accounting
                
               //Set period nb in COM3 for Acc
                sPeriodNb := ctpGetUdfString(sBroker,"PERIOD_NB"),
                IF sPeriodNbkCode <> "" THEN
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"PERIOD_NB",sPeriodNb),    
                // End period nb
                
                //Set rate type in COM3 for Acc
                sRateType := ctpGetUdfString(sBroker,"RATE_TYPE"),
                IF sRateType <> "" THEN
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"RATE_TYPE",sRateType),    
                // End rate type
                
                
                //Set master trade ctp code on COM3 for accounting
                sMstCode := legGetString(pContract,"MST_CODE"),
                IF sMstCode <> "" THEN
               	legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"MST_CODE",sMstCode),
                //End of master trade ctp code for accounting
                
                
                //Set Seg code for accounting
                sSegCode := legGetString(pContract,"SEG_CODE"),
                IF sSegCode <> "" THEN
                {
                	legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"SEG_CODE",sSegCode),
					legOverwrite(pClientContract,"SEG_CODE",sSegCode)	
                    },
                //End of seg code for accounting
                
                
                // Quantity
                //fOriginalAmount := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORIGAMT"),
                fOriginalAmount := legGetNumeric(pBrokerSellerComponent,"IS_ORIGAMT"),
                fQuantity := fOriginalAmount/fBrokerPrice,
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerContract,"Nominal",fQuantity),
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Nominal",fQuantity),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerContract,"Nominal",fQuantity),
               
                                        
                // Client price
                fFlowAmount := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORIFLOW"),
               
                IF sUsage == "Murabaha Plc BA" THEN
                IF fFlowAmount > fOriginalAmount THEN
                fFlowAmount:=fFlowAmount - fOriginalAmount ,
               
                IF sUsage == "FX Murabaha" THEN
                fClientPrice := fFlowAmount / fQuantity
                ELSE
                fClientPrice := ( fOriginalAmount + fFlowAmount) / fQuantity,            
                
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Price_Margin2",fClientPrice),

                            
                //Save broker price
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"IS_BRPRICE",fBrokerPrice),           
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"IS_BRPRICE",fBrokerPrice),                      
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"IS_BRPRICE",fBrokerPrice),            
                legProtectCell(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Price_Margin2",TRUE),            
                    
                //Typology assignment
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerContract,"Typology","Murabaha Commodity"),
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Typology","Murabaha Com Paper"),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerContract,"Typology","Murabaha Commodity"),
     
                //Set the On behalf tag on one of the two broker deals
                IF sFlowDirection == "WeReceive" THEN
                {
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"ISONBEHALF","N"),    
                    legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"ISONBEHALF","N"),                    
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"ISONBEHALF","Y")   
    
                }            
                ELSE
                {
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"ISONBEHALF","Y"),    
                    legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"ISONBEHALF","N"),    
                    legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"ISONBEHALF","N")
                },
                                   
                //Dates adjustment
				sStructure := legGetString (pBrokerSellerComponent,"STRUCTURE"),
                sTypology := legGetString (pBrokerSellerComponent,"IS_ORIGTYP"),
                    IF (sStructure <> "" OR sTypology == "PRS Range") THEN
                    {
						dTradeDate := legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Trading Date"),
                		dValueDate := legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery"),  

                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dValueDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dValueDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dValueDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dValueDate)
                    }
                	ELSE
                    {
                        dTradeDate := legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Trading Date"),
                        dValueDate := legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery"),  
                        
                        sCalendar := fxCurrencyGetCalendar(sCurrency),
                        dSpotDate := shiftschedule( dTradeDate,2,2,"+2 BUSINESS DAY",sCalendar),
                        IF dSpotDate > dValueDate THEN dSpotDate := dValueDate,
                        
                        dCashDate := legGetDate(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Cash_Settlement"),
                        IF (toString(dCashDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                        dCashDate:= dCashDate
                        ELSE
                        dCashDate:= dSpotDate,
                        
                        IF sUsage == "FX Murabaha" THEN 
                        {
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dSpotDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dSpotDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dSpotDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dSpotDate)
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dCashDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dCashDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dCashDate),
                        legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dCashDate)
                        },
                        // depo capfloor CR 
                        IF  sUsage == "Depo CapFloorCollar"  THEN
                        {
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dCashDate),
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dValueDate)
                        }
                        ELSE 
                        {
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dCashDate),
                        IF sIslamicSukuks == "Yes" THEN
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dValueDate)
                        ELSE
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dValueDate)
                        }
                        },


                //addition to packages
                flogicalPackageID := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORI_REF"),
                sLogicalLink:= legGetString(pContract,"IS_ORILINK"),
                legSetLogicalPackageId(pBrokerSellerComponent, flogicalPackageID),
                legSetLogicalPackageId(pBrokerBuyerContract, flogicalPackageID),
                legSetLogicalPackageId(pClientContract, flogicalPackageID),
                
                //Set counterparties as AGENT on Client Com 2, Murabaha Com Paper
                //AGENT will always be sent from Back Office on pContract
                IF ( sUsage =="SAMA Bill" ) OR ( sUsage == "RR SAMA" ) OR ( sUsage == "Repo SAMA" ) THEN
                {
                	IF legIsElementValid(pContract,"AGENT") THEN
                    {
                    	sAgent := legGetString(pContract,"AGENT"),
                        IF sAgent <> "" THEN
                        legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Counterpart",sAgent)
                    }
                    
                },             
                
                legOverwrite(pBrokerSellerComponent,"Counterpart",legGetString(pBrokerSellerComponent,"IS_BROKER1")),
                legOverwrite(pBrokerBuyerComponent,"Counterpart",legGetString(pBrokerBuyerContract,"IS_BROKER2")),
                legSetRegistration( pPackage,"mxContractStbIFREE_PACKAGE",0.0 ), //Sets the package registration
                legSetTypology(pPackage,"Murabaha COM")
                //legSetRegistration( pPackage,"mxContractStbIPACKAGE",3635.00 ) //Sets the package registration

            }

             ELSE IF sUsage == "Murabaha Brw BA" OR sUsage == "Murabaha Plc DI" OR sUsage == "LTM DI"
             OR sUsage == "LTM Callable DI" OR sUsage == "LTM CapFloorCollarDI" OR sUsage == "LTM Range CallableDI" OR sUsage == "LTM Range DI" THEN            // client is handling COM -- Only need COM2             // client is handling COM -- Only need COM2   
			{     
                // Clone
                pClientContract := pContract, // Broker Seller          
    
                // Identification
                pClientComponent := legGetComponentAt(pClientContract,0), // Client
                
                legSetString(pClientComponent,"Portfolio","OTH_MURCOM"),   
                 
                sCounterparty := legGetString(pContract,"Counterpart"),
                
                sBuySell := legGetString(pClientComponent, "Buy_Sell"),   
                
                // Freeze buy/Sell
                legProtectCell(pClientContract,"Buy_Sell",TRUE),
                
                // Get broker price (manual input)
                sCommodity := legGetString(pClientComponent,"Physical"),
                sCurrency := legGetString(pClientComponent,"Currency"),     
                fBrokerPrice := legGetNumeric(pContract,"Price_Margin2"),
        
                         
                // Quantity
                fOriginalAmount := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORIGAMT"),
                fQuantity := fOriginalAmount/fBrokerPrice,
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Nominal",fQuantity),
                                        
                // Client price
                fFlowAmount := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORIFLOW"),
                fClientPrice := ( fOriginalAmount + fFlowAmount) / fQuantity,            
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Price_Margin2",fClientPrice),
                            
                //Save broker price
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"IS_BRPRICE",fBrokerPrice),                      
                    
                //Typology assignment
                legOverwrite(pClientContract,"Typology","Murabaha Com Paper"),
     
                //Set the On behalf tag on one of the two broker deals
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"ISONBEHALF","N"),  
                
				//Dates adjustment
                dTradeDate := legGetDate(pClientComponent,"Trading Date"),
                dValueDate := legGetDate(pClientComponent,"Physical_Delivery"),      
                                   
                //Dates adjustment          
                sCalendar := fxCurrencyGetCalendar(sCurrency),
                dSpotDate := shiftschedule( dTradeDate,2,2,"+2 BUSINESS DAY",sCalendar),
                IF dSpotDate > dValueDate THEN dSpotDate := dValueDate,         
                dCashDate :=  legGetDate(pClientComponent,"Cash_Settlement"),
                
 				IF (toString(dCashDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                dCashDate:= dCashDate
                ELSE
                dCashDate:= dSpotDate,                
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Physical_Delivery",dCashDate),
                legOverwrite(pClientComponent,"Cash_Settlement",dValueDate),
                             
                //addition to packages
                flogicalPackageID := legGetNumeric(pContract,"IS_ORI_REF"),
                sLogicalLink:= legGetString(pContract,"IS_ORILINK"),
    
                legSetLogicalPackageId(pClientContract, flogicalPackageID)
            }            
        },       
			//End of Murbahah          
		iContract := iContract + 1
	}
    
    
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.Broker-OneVol

/*
MXpress
FXD Broker Strategies - One Vol calculation

Version 1.0

Notes: 
This task handles:
- the retrieval of all inputs required for the fxGetOneVolStrangle() function
- the call to the fxGetOneVolStrangle() function, to get the One Vol of the strategy
- the copy of this One Vol into the calibrated vols of the two options
- the initialization of the customized input fields with the One Vol
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.evaluation.active" ),
	sRegistration := "",
	sVolInput := "",
	xForwardCall := "0.0/0.0",
	xForwardPut := "0.0/0.0",
	xStrikeCall := "0.0/0.0",
	xStrikePut := "0.0/0.0",
	xVATM := "0.0/0.0",
	xPremiumCall := "0.0/0.0",
	xPremiumPut := "0.0/0.0",
	xSpot := "0.0/0.0",
	sStrikeQuot := "",
	sNumStrike := "",
	sDenStrike := "",
	sQuotStrike := "",
	sQuot := "",
	sNumPremium := "",
	sDenPremium := "",
	sQuotPremium := "",
	sTraded := "",
	xLocCapitCall := "0.0/0.0",
	xLocCapitPut := "0.0/0.0",
	fSpotDelta := 0.0,
	fFwdDelta := 0.0,
	sDeltaUnit := "",
	fDiscFactor := 0.0,
	fFwd := 0.0,
	fSpt := 0.0,
	fPremiumCallBid := 0.0,
	fPremiumCallAsk := 0.0,
	fPremiumPutBid := 0.0,
	fPremiumPutAsk := 0.0,
	xOneVol := "0.0/0.0",
	
	IF ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( legIsInitialized( NPD_HDL_THIS ) == TRUE ) THEN
		{
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( NPD_HDL_THIS ),
			IF ( sRegistration == "Broker Strangle FXD" ) THEN
			{
				sVolInput := legGetString( NPD_HDL_THIS,"Vol_input" ),
				IF ( sVolInput == "Vol surface" ) THEN
				{
					//Retrieve all inputs required for the fxGetOneVolStrangle() function
					
					pVanillaPut := legGetComponentAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,0 ),
					pVanillaCall := legGetComponentAt( NPD_HDL_THIS,1 ),
					
					//Forward
					xForwardCall := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_forward" ),
					xForwardPut := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_forward" ),
					//Strike
					xStrikeCall := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Bid_Ask_strike" ),
					xStrikePut := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaPut,"Bid_Ask_strike" ),
					//VATM
					xVATM := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_ATM_vol" ),
					//Premium
					xPremiumCall := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Premium" ),
					xPremiumPut := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaPut,"Premium" ),
					//Spot
					xSpot := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_spot" ),
					//Quotation
					sStrikeQuot := legGetString( pVanillaCall,"B_A_strike_quot" ),
					sNumStrike := fxQuotationGetNumerator( sStrikeQuot ),
					sDenStrike := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sStrikeQuot ),
					sQuotStrike := fxQuotationGet( sNumStrike,sDenStrike ),
					sQuot := legGetString( pVanillaCall,"Quotation" ),
					sNumPremium := fxPremiumQuotationGetNumerator( sQuot ),
					sDenPremium := fxPremiumQuotationGetDenominator( sQuot ),
					sQuotPremium := fxPremiumQuotationGet( sNumPremium,sDenPremium ),
					
					sTraded := legGetString( pVanillaPut,"Traded_nominal_unit" ),
					
					//ZC rates
					IF ( sDenStrike == sTraded ) THEN
					{
						xLocCapitCall := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_ZC_rate" ),
						xLocCapitPut := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_ZC_rate" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						xLocCapitCall := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_ZC_rate_F" ),
						xLocCapitPut := legGetBidAsk( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_ZC_rate_F" )
					},
					
					//Time to expiry
					dOptionExpiration := legGetDate(pVanillaCall,"Option_expiration"),
					
					//Case of forward premium:
					//  Find the discount factor by comparing spot and forward deltas
					//  then discount the premiums before passing to fxGetOneVolStrangle() function
					IF ( legGetString( pVanillaPut,"Premium_date_type" ) == "Forward" ) THEN
					{
					
						fSpotDelta := legGetBidAskOneSide( pVanillaPut,"B_A_Spot_exch_delta_amt" ),
						fFwdDelta := legGetBidAskOneSide( pVanillaPut,"B_A_Fwd_exch_delta_amt" ),
						sDeltaUnit := legGetString( pVanillaPut,"Delta_unit" ),
						IF ( sDeltaUnit == sNumPremium ) THEN
							fDiscFactor := fFwdDelta / fSpotDelta
						ELSE
						{
							fFwd := legGetBidAskOneSide( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_forward" ),
							fSpt := legGetBidAskOneSide( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_spot" ),
							IF ( sNumStrike == sNumPremium ) THEN
								fDiscFactor := fFwdDelta / fSpotDelta * fFwd / fSpt
							ELSE
								fDiscFactor := fFwdDelta / fSpotDelta * fSpt / fFwd
						},
						
						fPremiumCallBid := getBID( xPremiumCall ),
						fPremiumCallAsk := getASK( xPremiumCall ),
						fPremiumPutBid := getBID( xPremiumPut ),
						fPremiumPutAsk := getASK( xPremiumPut ),
						
						fPremiumCallBid := fPremiumCallBid / fDiscFactor,
						fPremiumCallAsk := fPremiumCallAsk / fDiscFactor,
						fPremiumPutBid := fPremiumPutBid / fDiscFactor,
						fPremiumPutAsk := fPremiumPutAsk / fDiscFactor,
						
						setBID( xPremiumCall,fPremiumCallBid ),
						setASK( xPremiumCall,fPremiumCallAsk ),
						setBID( xPremiumPut,fPremiumPutBid ),
						setASK( xPremiumPut,fPremiumPutAsk )
					},
					//End forward premium
					
					//Get the One Vol for the strategy
					xOneVol := fxGetOneVolStrangle( xForwardCall,xLocCapitCall,xForwardPut,xLocCapitPut,xStrikeCall,xStrikePut,sQuotStrike,xVATM,dOptionExpiration,xPremiumCall,xPremiumPut,sQuotPremium,xSpot,sTraded ),
					
					IF ( ( getBID( xOneVol ) <> 0.0 ) AND ( getASK( xOneVol ) <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
					{
						//Copy the One Vol into the calibrated vols of the two options
						legOverwrite( pVanillaCall,"Calibrated_volatility",xOneVol ),
						legOverwrite( pVanillaPut,"Calibrated_volatility",xOneVol ),
						
						//Initialize the customized input fields with the One Vol
						legOverwrite( NPD_HDL_THIS,"One Vol 2sides",xOneVol ),
						IF ( legGetString( pVanillaPut,"Buy_Sell" ) == "Buy") THEN
							legOverwrite( NPD_HDL_THIS,"One Vol 1side",getBID( xOneVol ) ),
						IF ( legGetString( pVanillaPut,"Buy_Sell" ) == "Sell") THEN
							legOverwrite( NPD_HDL_THIS,"One Vol 1side",getASK( xOneVol ) )
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Booking.AccrDec

/*
MXpress
Field Completion rule, to apply the logical deccomposition if required

Version 1.2
For internal transactions, also check if the counterparty a banking book portfolio

Version 1.1
Use the ptfIsBankingBook function instead the Accrual Portfolio criteria in the ( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL") Look-Up Table 

Version 1.0
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization
	pLeg := NPD_HDL_THIS,
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		sSourcePortfolio := "",
		bIsBankingBook := FALSE,
		sInternal := "",
		sDestinationPortfolio := "",
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
		
		sSourcePortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
		bIsBankingBook := ptfIsBankingBook( sSourcePortfolio ),
		
		sInternal := legGetString( pComponent, "Internal") ,
		IF ( sInternal == "Yes" ) THEN
		{
			sDestinationPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
			bIsBankingBook := bIsBankingBook OR ( ptfIsBankingBook( sDestinationPortfolio ) )
		},
		
		IF ( bIsBankingBook ) THEN
			legGenerateForwardStartDecomposition( pComponent ),
		
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	}
};

// mx.Order event.completion.Closing.LimitCheck

/*
MXpress OMS requirements for handling the Limit and Stop Loss order limits on execution

Version 1.2
Enrich to handle Limit stop loss order executions
Deduce direction from order direction

Version 1.1
Amendments to handle strategies

Version  1.0
Step 1: If Limit order, throw a warning if:
	- the execution price exceeds the limit for Buy orders
	- the execution price is less than the limit for Sell orders

Step 2: If Stop Loss order, throw a warning if:
	- the execution price is less than the limit for Buy orders
	- the execution price exceeds the limit for Sell orders
*/

{
	pEvent := This,
	
	pContract := mx.order.event.Event.GetTargetOrderUnderlyingBO( pEvent ),
	pFirstContract := legGetContractAt( pContract,0 ),
	sOrderTemplate := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order template" ),
	
	IF ( ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit" ) OR ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss" ) OR ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit stop loss" ) ) THEN
	{
		pUDFCnt := legGetUserFields( pFirstContract ),
		
		fLimit := udfGetNumeric( pUDFCnt,"O_PRICE" ),
		sLimit := toString( fLimit ),
		
		fStopLoss := udfGetNumeric( pUDFCnt,"O_PRICE1" ),
		sStopLoss := toString(fStopLoss),
		
		pOrder := mx.order.event.Event.GetTargetOrderComponent( pEvent ),
		sBuySell := legGetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder ),
		IF ( sBuySell == "" ) THEN
			ThrowError( "ERROR", "Could not determine direction" ),
		
		pCntVOB := mx.order.event.Event.GetVersionBOAt( pEvent,0 ),
		pCntBlock := evtVersionedBOGetNew( pCntVOB ),
		iContract := 0,
		iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pCntBlock ),
		fExecutionPrice := mx.order.event.Event.GetExecutedPrice( pEvent ),
		sPriceField := legGetContractOrderConfigPriceField( pFirstContract ),
		WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
		{
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pCntBlock,iContract ),
			IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice > fLimit ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be less than the order limit "+ sLimit, sPriceField ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell") AND ( fExecutionPrice < fLimit ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be greater than the order limit "+ sLimit, sPriceField )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be greater than the order stop loss price " + sStopLoss, sPriceField ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be less than the order stop loss price " + sStopLoss, sPriceField )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit stop loss" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be greater than the order stop loss price " + sStopLoss, sPriceField ),
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice > fLimit ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be less than the order limit " + sLimit, sPriceField ),
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be less than the order stop loss price " + sStopLoss, sPriceField ),
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fExecutionPrice < fLimit ) ) THEN
					ThrowWarning( pContract, "Order execution price should be greater than the order limit " + sLimit, sPriceField )
			},
			iContract := iContract + 1
		 }
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.Orders.Closing.FCpl


/*
MXpress OMS requirements for handling the orders

Version 1.7
- Adding LegSetComponent functions for each Order Type to enrich info in XML of orders
- Use MX.ALL.FieldMapping.Direction lookup table instead of MX.ALL.Direction.ALL

Version 1.6
- Use native order fields instead of UDFs

Version 1.5
- Use sysGetTradingDate instead sysGetFODeskDate
- Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Correction to take into account block orders for Fx Swaps
Amendments to handle new order templates:
	- Limit stop loss
	- OCO for Buy Side implementations

Version 1.3
Amendments to handle strategies

Version 1.2
Remove the default assignment for Order template to Market

Version 1.1
Amendments to handle new order templates:
	- Limit then Stop loss
	- Stop loss then Limit
	- OCO

Version 1.0
Rule that fields the order extension from the trade for all Order 

The order template that will be available for this are for the moment:
	- Market
	- Limit
	- Stop Loss
In case there are specific checks to be done, a specific formula will have to be written.

	Step 1: Get the right pointers for the components and the leg
		Two special cases are taken into account: 
			- The package allocation in case of a Block trade/order, the Leg is the first contract of the Block
			- The STB Contract, the Component is the first leg of the contract
	
	Step 2: Default order fields such as:
		- Order template to Market
		- Order Expiry hour to 23:59:59 when duration is Day
		- Order expiry date to FO Date when duration is good until date or Day
		- Add order expiry period to the expiry date when period is specified 
	
	Step 3: Get the Order field values:
		- Nominal (including a special case for Block orders)
		- Order price
		- Order template
	
		The order template that will be available for the moment are:
		- Market order
		- Limit
		- Stop Loss
	
	Step 4: Set the Order component fields regarding: 
		- The side of the order 
		- The Quantity
		- The Limit type (1 for Market, 0 for Limit or Stop loss)
		- For the Limit and Stop loss orders, the Price limit

In case there are specific checks to be done, a specific formula will have to be written
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pFirstContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,0 ),
	pFirstComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	
	sPriceField := legGetContractOrderConfigPriceField( pFirstContract ),
	fMarketPrice := legGetNumeric( pFirstContract,sPriceField ),
	sOrderTemplate := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order template" ),
	dExpiry := legGetDate( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_date" ),
	sDuration := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order_duration" ),
	sExpiryPeriod := legGetString( pFirstContract,"pf_odr_period" ),
	fLimit := legGetNumeric(pFirstComponent,"Order_limit_price"),
	fStopLoss := legGetNumeric( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price" ),
	hHour := "23:59:59",
	hInitialHour := "00:00:00",
	
	//Set the default order template to "Market"
	//When using contingent (e.g. OTO) orders, please manage order template default value via pricing template only, as pre-trade resets order template of triggered ordered
	IF ( sOrderTemplate == "" ) THEN
		legSetString( pFirstContract,"Order template","Market" ),
	
	// Setting default expiry dates and times
	IF ( sDuration == "Good until date" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( toString( dExpiry ) == "00000000" ) THEN
			legSetDate( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_date",sysGetTradingDate( ) ),
		
		IF ( sExpiryPeriod <> "" ) THEN
			legSetDate( pFirstContract, "Order_expiry_date",sysGetTradingDate() + sExpiryPeriod ),
		
		hOrderHour := legGetHour( pFirstContract, "Order_expiry_hour" ),
		IF ( hOrderHour == hInitialHour ) THEN
			legSetHour( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_hour",hHour )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sDuration == "Day" ) THEN
	{
		legOverwrite( pFirstContract,"pf_odr_period","" ),
		legOverwrite( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_date",sysGetTradingDate() ),
		hOrderHour := legGetHour( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_hour" ),
		IF ( hOrderHour == hInitialHour ) THEN
			legSetHour( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_hour",hHour )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sDuration == "Immediate or cancel" ) THEN
		legOverwrite( pFirstContract,"Order_duration","Good until cancelled" )
	ELSE IF ( sDuration <> "Day" ) THEN
	{
		dExpiry := "00000000",
		legOverwrite( pFirstContract,"pf_odr_period","" )
	},
	
	// Use look up table to deduce if buy or sell
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pFirstContract ),
	pViewResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Direction","Registration",sRegistration ),
	IF ( toString( pViewResults ) <> "0" ) THEN
	{
		sBuySellField := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,0,1 ),
		sBuyValue := lookupResultsGetString( pViewResults,0,2 )
	},
	
	sBuyValueOrder := legGetString( pFirstContract,sBuySellField ),
	IF ( sBuyValueOrder == sBuyValue ) THEN 
		sBuySell := "Buy"
	ELSE IF ( sBuyValueOrder <> sBuyValue ) THEN 
		sBuySell := "Sell",
	
	IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
	{
		pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, "Market" ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentPriceType( pOrder,1 ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder,sBuySell )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit" ) THEN
	{
		pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract,"Limit" ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentPriceType( pOrder,0 ),
		
		// Case where user did not specify a limit, set it to market price by default
		IF ( fLimit == 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fLimit := fMarketPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_limit_price",fLimit ),
			legSetContractOrderComponentPrice( pOrder,fLimit )
		},
        IF ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) THEN
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMin( pOrder,fLimit )
		ELSE IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMax( pOrder,fLimit ),
			
		legSetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder,sBuySell )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit stop loss" ) THEN
	{
		pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, sOrderTemplate ),
		
		legSetContractOrderComponentPriceType( pOrder,0 ),
		
		IF ( fStopLoss == 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fStopLoss := fMarketPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price",fStopLoss )
		},
		IF ( fLimit == 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fLimit := fMarketPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_limit_price",fLimit )
		},
		
		IF ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) THEN
        {
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMax( pOrder,fStopLoss ),
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMin( pOrder,fLimit )
        }
		ELSE IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
        {
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMax( pOrder,fLimit ),
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMin( pOrder,fStopLoss )
		},
		legSetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder,sBuySell ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentQuantity( pOrder,fNominal )
		
	}
	ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
	{
		pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, sOrderTemplate ),
		
		fStopLossPrice := legGetContractOrderComponentPrice( pOrder ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentPriceType( pOrder,0 ),
		
		
		IF ( fStopLoss == 0.0 AND fStopLossPrice == 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fStopLoss := fMarketPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price",fStopLoss )
		}
		ELSE IF ( fStopLoss == 0.0 AND fStopLossPrice <> 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fStopLoss := fStopLossPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price",fStopLossPrice )
		},
		
		IF ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) THEN
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMax( pOrder,fStopLoss )
		ELSE IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
			legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMin( pOrder,fStopLoss ),
		
		legSetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder,sBuySell ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentQuantity( pOrder,fNominal )
	}
	ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "OCO" )  THEN
	{
		pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract,"OCO" ),
		legSetContractOrderComponentPriceType( pOrder,0 ),
		fLimitPrice := legGetContractOrderComponentPrice( pOrder ),
		
		// Case where user did not specify a limit, set it to market price by default
		IF ( fLimit == 0.0 AND fLimitPrice == 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			fLimit := fMarketPrice,
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponnt,"Order_limit_price",fLimit ),
			legOverwrite( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price",fLimit ),
			legSetContractOrderComponentPrice( pOrder,fLimit )
		}
		// Specific case for roll over, the limit value is directly stored in the legGetContractOrderComponentPrice
		// So need to set the UDF so user can see it when opening the order
		ELSE IF ( fLimit == 0.0 AND fLimitPrice <> 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			legSetNumeric( pFirstComponent,"Order_limit_price",fLimitPrice ),
			legSetNumeric( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price",fLimitPrice ),
			
			IF ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) THEN
				legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMin( pOrder,fLimitPrice )
			ELSE IF ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
				legSetContractOrderComponentPriceMax( pOrder,fLimitPrice )
		}
		// Normal case where the user specified a value for the limit
		ELSE IF ( fLimit <> 0.0 ) THEN
			legSetContractOrderComponentPrice( pOrder,fLimit ),
		
		legSetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder,sBuySell )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.Orders.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress OMS requirements for handling the display of Order Dynamic fields

Version 1.6
Remove green for buy, red for sell - as it is to be handled natively

Version 1.5
Amendment to handle program trade ID
Amendment to complete termination order info display
(Modifcation added in step 4)

Version 1.4
Use native fields instead of UDF.
Green / Red Color to highlight Buy / Sell.

Version 1.3
Amendment to handle Limit stop loss order type.

Version 1.2
Amendments to handle strategies

Version 1.1
Amendments to handle OTO and OCO orders types.

Version 1.0
 
Notes:  
	Step 1: Get the right pointers for the components and the leg
		Two special cases are taken into account: 
			- The package allocation in case of a Block trade/order, the Leg is the first contract of the Block
			- The STB Contract, the Component is the first leg of the contract
	Step 2: Handle field properties for starting and expiry option 
		Depending on the order Duration field value, the right fields (Date, Hour) need to be shown
		Immediate or cancel is not an authorized value. When selected, the order duration field is reset to Good until cancelled.
		The same happens for the Starting value, and the corresponding fields
	Step 3: Handle specific field properties according to the order template
		Order type : For now, if the template is Limit or Stop loss, display the Order price field
        Termination order : If the order is generated from a termination order event, display the contract ID of the terminated contract on the order layout
        Program Trade order : If the order belongs to a program Trade, then show the list Id of this program. 
	Step 4: Handle field properties for Post-Trade management
		The condition to detect the Post-Trade context is Order ID <> 0
	Step 5: Set the right number of decimals for the order price display for the Spot-Forward
		The number of decimals is retrieved from the information on the currency pair used as Price Quotation
*/

{
	/* Step 1: Get the right pointers for the components and the leg
		Two special cases are taken into account: 
		- The package allocation in case of a Block trade/order, the Leg is the first contract of the Block
		- The STB Contract, the Component is the first leg of the contract */
	pLeg := This,
	pFirstContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,0 ),
	
	sOrderTemplate := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order template" ), 
	sDuration := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order_duration" ),
	sStarting := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order starting" ),
    sListID := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order list Id"),
    fTerminatedContractID := legGetNumeric(pFirstContract,"Terminated contract id"),
    
	
	/*  Step 2: Handle field properties for starting and expiry option 
		Depending on the order Duration field value, the right fields (Date, Hour) need to be shown
		Immediate or cancel is not an authorized value. When selected, the order duration field is reset to Good until cancelled.
		The same happens for the Starting value, and the corresponding fields */
	IF ( sDuration == "Good until date" ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.2_expiry" )
	ELSE IF ( sDuration == "Day" ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.2.1_hour" ),
	
	IF ( sStarting == "Day" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.3.1_hour" )
	ELSE IF ( sStarting == "Good from date" ) THEN 
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.3_start" ),
	
	/*  Step 3: Handle specifif field properties according to the order template
		For now, if the template is Limit or Stop loss, display the Order price field */
	IF ( ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit" ) ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.1.1_limit0" ),
	
	IF ( ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss" ) ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.1.2_limit1" ),
	
	IF ( ( sOrderTemplate == "OCO" ) 
	OR ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit then Stop loss" )
	OR ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss then Limit" )
	OR ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit stop loss" ) ) THEN
	{
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"common_0.1.1.1_limit0" ),
		legAddProperty( pLeg,"common_0.1.1.2_limit1" )
	},
    
    /*  If the order is generated from a termination order event, display the contract ID of the terminated contract on the order layout */
    IF ( (fTerminatedContractID <> 0.00)) THEN
    	legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.4.4_terminatedContract" ),

	 /* Program Trade order : If the order belongs to a program Trade, then show the list Id of this program.  
     Default (before post-trade management) */
    IF ( legGetNumeric( pFirstContract,"Order id" ) == 0.0 ) THEN
    	legAddProperty( pFirstContract, "common_0.1.4.3_programTrade")
    ELSE IF (sListID <> "") THEN
    	legAddProperty(pFirstContract,"common_0.1.4.3_programTrade"),
    
	/*  Step 4: Handle field properties for Post-Trade management
			The condition to detect the Post-Trade context is Order ID <> 0 */
	IF ( legGetNumeric( pFirstContract,"Order id" ) <> 0.0 ) THEN
		legAddProperty( pFirstContract,"common_0.1.4.1_postTrade" ),
        
	/*  Step 5: Set the right number of decimals for the order price display for the Spot-Forward
		The number of decimals is retrieved from the information on the currency pair used as Price Quotation */
	IF ( legGetRegistration( pFirstContract ) == "Spot-Forward" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( legIsInitialized( pFirstContract ) ) THEN
		{
			sQuotation := legGetString( pFirstContract, "Price quotation" ),
			legSetCellDecimals( pFirstContract, "Ref spot",fxQuotationGetDisplayDecimals( sQuotation ) ),
			legSetCellDecimals( pFirstContract, "Order_limit_price",fxQuotationGetDisplayDecimals( sQuotation ) ),
			legSetCellDecimals( pFirstContract, "Order_stop_price",fxQuotationGetDisplayDecimals( sQuotation ) )
		}
	}
	
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.Orders.Closing.Reprice

/*
MXpress OMS requirements for handling the reprice of orders on Cancel and Reissue

Version 1.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.1
Amendments to handle strategies

Version  1.0
Step 1: For all products other than the Fx Products: 
		Clone the leg and set the order price as an implied parameter
		Perform a Compute to recalculate the new order price in the clone
		Retrieve the new order price from the clone and use it as the new order execution price

Step 2: For the Fx products, specific handling:
	Step 2.A: Reprice of execution price for Spots
	Step 2.B: Reprice of execution price for Fx Forwards  
	Step 2.C: Reprice of execution price for Fx Swaps  
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pFirstContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,0 ),
	
	sContext := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ),
	sPriceField := legGetContractOrderConfigPriceField( pFirstContract ),
	fMarketPrice := legGetNumeric( pFirstContract,sPriceField ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pFirstContract ),
	sRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pFirstContract ),
	sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pFirstContract ),
	sMaturity := "",
	sNonDeliverable := "",
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	iContract := 0,
	sMaturity := "",
	sNonDeliverable := "",
	IF ( sContext == "DUP" ) THEN
	{
		WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
		{
			pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
			sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
			
			iNbTrades := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
			iTrade := 0,
			WHILE ( iTrade < iNbTrades ) DO
			{
				pTrade := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iTrade ),
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pTrade ),
				sRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pTrade ),
				sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pTrade ),
				
				// Step 1: Reprice of execution price for all products other than FX Products
				IF ( sContractRegistration <> "FX swap" AND sContractRegistration <> "Spot-Forward" ) THEN
				{
					pContainer := npOpen(),
					IF ( ( sContractRegistration <> "Bonds" ) 
					AND ( sContractRegistration <> "Equities" ) AND ( sContractRegistration <> "Equity futures" )
					AND ( sContractRegistration <> "Futures") ) THEN
					{
						pClone := legAddComponent( pContainer,sRegistrationLabel,sRegistration,sPattern ),
						legCopy( pClone,pTrade ),
						legSetLocalImplied( pClone,sPriceField ),
						legCompute( pClone,"noWorflow" ),
						fMarketPrice := legGetNumeric( pClone,sPriceField ),
						IF ( fMarketPrice <> 0.0 ) THEN
							legSetNumeric( pTrade,sPriceField,fMarketPrice )
					}
					ELSE IF ( ( sContractRegistration == "Bonds" ) 
					OR ( sContractRegistration == "Equities" ) OR ( sContractRegistration == "Equity futures" )
					OR ( sContractRegistration == "Futures" ) ) THEN
					{
						pClone := legAddComponent( pContainer,sRegistrationLabel,sRegistration,sPattern ), 
						pClone := legClone( pContainer,pTrade ),
						legOverwrite( pClone,"Market_Data_Private_Mode","ON" ),
						legCompute( pClone,"noWorflow" ),
						
						IF ( sContractRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN
							fPrice := legGetNumeric( pClone,"EvalPrice" )
						ELSE IF ( sContractRegistration == "Equities" OR sContractRegistration == "Equity futures" OR sContractRegistration == "Futures" ) THEN
							fPrice := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Price" ),
						
						IF ( fPrice <> 0.0 ) THEN
							legSetNumeric( pTrade,sPriceField,fPrice )
					},
					npClose( pContainer )
				},
				
				// Step 2: Reprice of execution price for all FX products       
				// Make sure that the reprice is not applied on the spot leg of the FxSwap
				IF ( ( sContractRegistration == "Spot-Forward" ) 
				OR ( iTrade == 1 AND sContractRegistration == "FX swap" ) ) THEN
				{
					sInternalTypology := legGetInternalTypology( pTrade ),
					sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pTrade,"Non deliverable" ),
					sMATURITY_FROM := "???/FWD/TDY/TOM/SPT",
					sMATURITY_TO := "???/FORWARD/TODAY/TOMORROW/SPOT",
					iMaturity := strIndexOf( sMATURITY_FROM,strSubString( sInternalTypology,0,3 ) )/4,
					sMaturity := strToken( sMATURITY_TO,"/",iMaturity ),
					
					pContainer := npOpen(),
					
					IF ( sContractRegistration <> "FX swap" )  THEN       // Clone leg if not FXSwap
					{
						pClone := legAddComponent( pContainer,sRegistrationLabel,sRegistration,sPattern ),
						pClone:=legClone( pContainer,pTrade ),
						
						// Step 2.A: Reprice of execution price for Spots  
						IF ( sMaturity == "SPOT" AND sNonDeliverable <> "Yes" ) THEN
						{
							fSpot := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Spot" ),
							IF ( fSpot <> 0.0 ) THEN
								legSetNumeric( pTrade,"Forward",fSpot )
						}
						// Step 2.B: Reprice of execution price for Fx Forwards  
						ELSE IF ( sMaturity == "FORWARD"  OR  sNonDeliverable == "Yes" ) THEN    
						{
							fSpot := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Spot" ),
							fFwd := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Mkt_forward" ),
							
							// Calculate swap points
							sInstrument := legGetString( pTrade,"Instrument" ),
							fFormFactor := fxGetPremiumQuotationFormFactor( sInstrument ),
							fSwapPoint := ( fFwd-fSpot )*fFormFactor,
							
							// Set refreshed prices
							IF ( fSpot <> 0.0 AND fFwd <> 0.0 ) THEN
							{
								legSetNumeric( pTrade,"Ref_spot",fSpot ),
								legSetNumeric( pTrade,"Forward",fFwd ),
								legSetNumeric( pTrade,"Swap_points",fSwapPoint )
							}
						}
					}
					// Step 2.C: Reprice of execution price for Fx Swaps  
					ELSE IF ( sContractRegistration == "FX swap" ) THEN
					{
						// Clone only forward if FX Swap
						pClone := legAddComponent( pContainer,"mxContractISINGLE", "Spot-Forward", "Spot/Forward" ),
						sInstrument := legGetString( pTrade,"Instrument" ),
						fTradedNominal := legGetNumeric( pTrade,"Traded_nominal" ),
						sTradedCcy := legGetString( pTrade,"Traded_nominal_unit" ),
						sTradedBS := legGetString( pTrade,"Traded_buy_sell" ),
						dExpiryDate := legGetDate( pTrade,"Maturity" ),
						
						legSetString( pClone,"Instrument",sInstrument ),
						legSetNumeric( pClone,"Traded_nominal",fTradedNominal ),
						legSetString( pClone,"Traded_nominal_unit",sTradedCcy ),
						legSetString( pClone,"Traded_buy_sell",sTradedBS ),
						legSetDate( pClone,"Maturity",dExpiryDate ),
						
						fSpot := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Spot" ),
						fFwd := legGetNumeric( pClone,"Mkt_forward" ),
						
						// Calculate swap points
						fFormFactor := fxGetPremiumQuotationFormFactor( sInstrument ),
						fSwapPoint := ( fFwd - fSpot )*fFormFactor,
						
						// Set refreshed prices
						IF ( fSpot <> 0.0 AND fFwd <> 0.0 ) THEN
						{
							legSetNumeric( pContract,"Forward",fSpot ),
							legSetNumeric( pContract,"Forward__leg2_",fFwd ),
							legSetNumeric( pContract,"Swap_points_fwd_fwd",fSwapPoint )
						}
					},
					npClose( pContainer )
				},
				iTrade := iTrade + 1
			},
			iContract := iContract + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.Orders.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress OMS requirements for performing checks on the sanity of the orders

Version 1.6
- Applied MSL best practices
- Use native fields instead of UDF

Version 1.5
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.4
Extend sanity checks to cover the "Limit stop loss"
Deduce direction from order direction

Version 1.3
Amendments to handle strategies

Version 1.2
To include OTO and OCO orders

Version 1.1
- Remove the DIST_MSG UDF and use legAddMessage(pointer ,message text ,message field, error code, error level) to attach warning messages to legs.
- Amended to handle counterparty check on orders only if counterparty is required

Version  1.0
This rule is to perform different checks on the order:
	1- Check that the order template is assigned
	2- Check that the date is assigned when the duration is "Good until date"
	3- Check that the price limit is respected for limit and stop-loss orders 
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pFirstContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg, 0 ),
	pFirstComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg, 0 ),
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pFirstContract ) ) THEN
	{
		sOrderTemplate := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order_template" ),
		sDuration := legGetString( pFirstContract,"Order_duration" ),
		dExpiry := legGetDate( pFirstContract,"Order_expiry_date" ),
		sExpiry := toString( dExpiry ),
		fLimit := legGetNumeric( pFirstComponent,"Order_limit_price" ),
		fStopLoss := legGetNumeric( pFirstComponent,"Order_stop_price" ),
		sPriceField := legGetContractOrderConfigPriceField( pFirstContract ),
		fMarketPrice := legGetNumeric( pFirstContract,sPriceField ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pFirstContract ),
		
		IF ( sOrderTemplate == "" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-Tmp-" ) == 0 ) THEN
				legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Order template should be specified","Order template", "Sane-Tmp-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
		},
		
		IF ( sDuration == "Good until date" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( sExpiry == "00000000" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-EOrd-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pFirstContract,"Order expiry date should be specified", "Order expiry date", "Sane-EOrd-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( dExpiry < sysGetTradingDate() ) THEN
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SOrdD-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Order expiry date should be greater than Trading Date", "Order expiry date", "Sane-SOrdD-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		},
		
		IF ( sOrderTemplate <> "Limit then Stop loss" AND sOrderTemplate <> "Stop loss then Limit" ) THEN
			pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, sOrderTemplate )
		ELSE IF sOrderTemplate == "Limit then Stop loss" THEN
			pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, "Limit" )
		ELSE IF sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss then Limit" THEN
			pOrder := legGetContractOrderComponentFromLabel( pFirstContract, "Stop loss" ),
		
		sBuySell := legGetContractOrderComponentAction( pOrder ),
		IF ( sBuySell == "" ) THEN
			ThrowError( "ERROR", "Could not determine direction" ),
		
		sOPrice := "Order_limit_price",
		sOPrice1 := "Order_stop_price",
		IF ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pFirstContract ) == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN
		{
			sOPrice := legGetProductLabel( pFirstComponent ) + "#1." + "Order_limit_price",
			sOPrice1 := legGetProductLabel( pFirstComponent ) + "#1." + "Order_stop_price"
		},
		
		IF ( fMarketPrice <> 0.0 ) THEN
		{
			IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be smaller than market price",sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be greater than market price", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be smaller than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit stop loss" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be smaller than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				 
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fLimit > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than limit", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fLimit < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be less than limit", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "OCO" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be smaller than market price",sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be greater than market price", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be smaller than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Limit then Stop loss" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price for should be smaller than market price",sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fLimit < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be smaller than Limit price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be greater than market price", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fLimit > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than Limit price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sOrderTemplate == "Stop loss then Limit" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fMarketPrice > fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be greater than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Buy" ) AND ( fStopLoss > fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-GPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be greater than Stop loss price", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-GPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fMarketPrice < fStopLoss ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Stop loss price should be smaller than market price", sOPrice1, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ),
				
				IF ( ( sBuySell == "Sell" ) AND ( fStopLoss < fLimit ) ) THEN
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-Odr-SPrc-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pFirstContract, "Limit price should be smaller than Stop loss price", sOPrice, "Sane-Odr-SPrc-", messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.FixCR

/*
MXpress
Sanity block C&Reissue on NDF that has been fixed

Used algorithm
Fields initialization
If event is a Cancel and reissue
	Loop on all versions
		If there is a fixing 
			If the fixing was inserted
				Increase a variable Insert 
			Else
				Increase a variable Cancel 
			End if
		End if
	End loop
	If number of insert > cancel
		Throw the error
	End if
End if

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to block C&Reissue on NDF that has been fixed
FX Products covered : NDF, FX Swap NDF, Split Package NDF, BTB NDF, BTB FX Swap NDF, Split FX Swap NDF
*/

{
	pEvent := NPD_HDL_THIS,
	pVB0 := evtGetVersionedBOAt( pEvent,0 ),
	pLeg := evtVersionedBOGetOld( pVB0 ),
	pOldMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pContract := legGetFatherContract( pOldMainComponent ),
	iNbVersion := evtVersionedBOGetContractVersion( pVB0,pContract ),
	sNonDeliverable := "",
	iVersion := 1,
	sEvent := "",
	iInsert := 0,
	iCancel := 0,
	
	IF ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ) == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( legIsElementValid( pContract,"Non deliverable" ) ) THEN
		{
			sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pContract,"Non deliverable" ),
			IF ( sNonDeliverable == "Yes" ) THEN 
			{
				WHILE ( iVersion <= iNbVersion ) DO
				{
					sEvent := evtVersionedBOGetContractLastEventClass( pVB0,pContract,iVersion ) ,
					IF ( sEvent == "mxContractEventIFIXING" ) THEN
					{
						sAction := evtVersionedBOGetContractLastEventAction( pVB0,pContract,iVersion ),
						IF ( sAction <> "CANCEL" ) THEN 
							iInsert := iInsert + 1
						ELSE
							iCancel := iCancel + 1
					},
					iVersion := iVersion + 1
				},
				IF ( iInsert > iCancel ) THEN 
					trcPushError( "Error","You are not allowed to perform a Cancel & Reissue on a deal which has been fixed" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.FXAlloc

/*
MXpress
Formula designed to throw an error and block the event in case of under or over allocation.

Used algorithm
If FX allocation event
	If allocated amount is smaller or bigger than the allowed window
		Throw an error
	End if
End if

Version 1.0
*/
{
	pEvent := NPD_HDL_THIS,
	sEvent := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ),
	fNominal := 0,
	fAllocatedNominal := 0.,
	fMinPct := 0.,
	fMaxPct := 0.,
	fMinNominal := 0.,
	fMaxNominal := 0.,
	fNonAllocatedRatio := 0.,
	
	IF ( sEvent == "mxContractEventFxIALLOCATION" ) THEN
	{
		fNominal := evtGetNumeric( pEvent,"InitialAmount" ),
		fAllocatedNominal := evtGetNumeric( pEvent,"MktOpAmount" ),
		pResultsMin := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FXAllocation","ALL","Min/Max","Min" ),
		pResultsMax := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.FXAllocation","ALL","Min/Max","Max" ),
		fMinPct := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pResultsMin,0,0 ),
		fMaxPct := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pResultsMax,0,0 ),
		fMinNominal := fNominal*( ( fMinPct/100. ) + 1. ),
		fMaxNominal := fNominal*( (  fMaxPct/100. ) + 1. ),
		
		IF ( ( fAllocatedNominal < fMinNominal ) OR ( fAllocatedNominal > fMaxNominal ) ) THEN
		{
			fNonAllocatedRatio := ( fNominal - fAllocatedNominal ) / fNominal,
			ThrowError( "Error","Please make sure you allocate between "+ toString ( 100.0 + fMinPct ) + "%" + " and " + toString ( 100.0 + fMaxPct ) + " % " +  "of the initial amount: (" + toString( ( 1. - fNonAllocatedRatio )*100.,15,2,TRUE,0 ) + "% allocated)" )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.PAlloc

/*
MXpress
