Portfolio allocation rule

Version 2.0
- To remove the multi leg swap references

Version 1.9
- To allow portfolio allocation for procedures like Cash rollover, Pre-funding and PL selldown
- To allow portfolio allocation relying on 3 new criteria: Entity, Legal entity, Main portfolio
- To allow portfolio allocation on FTP packages

Version 1.8
- correction on blocktrade

Version 1.7
Retrieve user from Source trader and group from MX.ALL.UserProfile in case of trade import

Version 1.6
- Applied MSL best practices
- Removed two of three customizable criteria

Version 1.5
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument") lookup table
Updated to ensure portfolio is kept in case of reloaded trade

Version 1.4
To remove throwErrors on back to back portfolio field as empty value will be detected later in the sanity check scripted rule

Version 1.3
To assign Criteria1 for COM products

Version 1.2
To remove throwErrors on portfolio and counterparty fields as empty value will be detected later in the sanity check scripted rule

Version 1.1
To exclude deals generated from future flow sell down procedure

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to allocate a portfolio to each financial contract component during the Closing and Booking sequences.
During the booking sequence: the portfolio is filled only if it remains empty
This rule is generic, its first point of customization is a set of Look-Up Tables:
( MX.ALL.PAlloc, ALL ) contains the portfolio assignment logic itself
( MX.ALL.FCCLabel, ALL ) is a utility LUT used to map Family/Group/Type to registration
( MX.ALL.FieldMapping, Instrument ) is a utility LUT used to determine the field that represents the reference instrument for different registrations

This rule handles standard external contracts, internal contracts and also contracts that will be mirrored in the mirroring task
For external contracts, the rule sets the unique portfolio
For internal contracts, including the contracts that are part of an FX or MM Package, the rules sets both portfolios (source and destination)
For contracts that will be mirrored, the rule fills in the variable that will be used in the mirroring task
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
		sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
        sTradePurpose := legGetString(pMainContract,"Trade_purpose"),
        
        //Rolled portfolio in case of a cashrollover
        IF ( sSourceModule == "mx.rollover" OR sSourceModule == "mx.prefunding" ) THEN
        {
        	sMainCounterpart := legGetString( pMainContract,"Counterpart" )
        },        
        
		sIsBlockTradeActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","BlockTrade" ) ),
		//IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
		//{
			sUser := sysGetUser(),
			sUserGroup := sysGetGroup(),
            pGroupResults := lookupResults("MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup),
            sUserGroupProfile := lookupResultsGetString(pGroupResults,0,0),
	/*	}
		ELSE
		{
			sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Source trader" ),
			sUserGroup := "",
			pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser ),
			IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
				sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString( pUserProfile,0,1 )
		}, */
		sMainPortfolioLUTName := "ALL",
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		
		// The portfolio allocation is required under specific conditions:
		// - Newly inserted contracts have to be processed by the rule,
		// - Contracts generated by a Cancel & Reissue event should not be processed,
		// - Contracts generated by a sellown procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a rollover procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a fixing procedured should not br processed
		// - Contracts generated by a duplication should not be processed
		// - Trade reloaded
		// - Since in all 5 previous cases, a portfolio had aleady been allocated
		// For imported trades, there is a check just before the assignment to ensure portfolio is empty and should be filled
		bPAlloc := ( ( properties.Get("mx.preTrade.BO.source") == "" )
						//AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
						AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.futureFlowSellDow" )
						//AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
						AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
						AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action")<>"MOD" )
						AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context") <> "DUP" )
						AND ( properties.Get( pLeg,"mx.preTrade.pricing.source" ) <> "TRADE" )
                        AND ( sTradePurpose <> "Corporate action execution" )
						AND ( sIsBlockTradeActive <> "YES" ) ),
		
		IF ( bPAlloc ) THEN
		{
			sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pLeg ),
			
			//For the main contract, determine which LUT to use. Either the main one or the technical LUT
			IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" )
			OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" )
			OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) ) THEN 
			{
				IF ( legGetString( pLeg,"Independent margins" ) == "No" ) THEN
					sMainPortfolioLUTName := "Technical"
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" )
			OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD" ) ) THEN
				sMainPortfolioLUTName := "Technical",
			
			iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
			iContract := 0,
			// This loops on all contracts when the higher-level object is a Package
			WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
				
				sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
				pComponent := legGetMainComponent( pContract ), //Required for the utility  MX.ALL.FCLabel, LUT. See details below
				
				sContractTypology := legGetTypology( pContract ) ,
				sPackageTypology := legGetTypology( pLeg ) , //Only meaningful in case of Package otherwise blank
				
				sPortfolio := "",
				sInternalPortfolio := "", //Destination portfolio for internal contracts
				sBTBPortfolio := "", //Destination portfolio for mirrored contracts generated in the mirroring task
				bIsContractBTB := legGetFOPIsBackToBack( pContract ), //Tells whether the current contract will be mirrored in the mirroring task
                
                //Tells whether the current contract is a FTP loan
                bIsContractFTP:=FALSE,
                IF ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
                {
               		callPreTradeFormula(sOutput, pContract, "mx.routing.FXMM.Pricing.Rout-FTP"),
                	bIsContractFTP := sOutput == "FTP"
                },                
				
				bIsMainContract := ( pContract == legGetFatherContract( legGetMainComponent( This ) ) ),
				IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbRatesIFRADECUPOM" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbIFLEXIBLE_CONTRACT" ) ) THEN
					sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ) //If the current contract is STB contract, get the internal information from main component.
				ELSE IF ( sBORegistration <> "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD_CONTRACT" ) THEN
					sInternal := legGetString( pContract,"Internal" ), //Checks whether the current contract is internal or not
				
				bIsContractInternal := ( sInternal == "Yes" ), //Tells whether the current contract is internal or not
				// The following block will be looped through twice 
				// The first loop is used to handle the unique portfolio (external contract), the destination portfolio (internal contract) ...
				// ... and the mirror portfolio (mirrored contract)
				// The second loop is used to handle the source portfolio (internal contract and mirrored contract)
				
				// This initializes the criteria used in the Look-Up Table
				IF ( bIsContractInternal ) THEN
					sContext := "Internal"
				ELSE IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
					sContext := "Mirror",
				
				//Another LUT is used to determine the Instrument field for each registration (product type)
				pFieldResult := pNULL,
				sField := "Instrument",
				pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument",
								"Registration",sRegistration,
								"Criteria 1","" ),
				sInstrumentField := "",
				IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
				{
					iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldResult,0,0 ) ),
					sInstrumentField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 )
				},
				
				IF ( ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbRatesIFRADECUPOM" ) OR ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbIFLEXIBLE_CONTRACT" ) ) THEN
					sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sInstrumentField )
				ELSE
					sInstrument := legGetString( pContract,sInstrumentField ),
				
				sCriteria1 := "", //Initialization of the first customizable criteria
				
				// The three customizable criteria can themselves be determined from one LUT each
				// Each customizable criteria can depend on up to three variables
				// The following section should be uncommented and customized to get the first customizable criteria
				/*
				sUndef11 := "",
				sUndef12 := "",
				sUndef13 := "",
				sCriteria1 := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAllocC1","ALL",
											"Undef 1 crit 1",sUndef11,
											"Undef 2 crit 1",sUndef12,
											"Undef 3 crit 1",sUndef13 ),
				*/
                
                
                // BAB Addition for loan/depo instrument field
                IF ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
                {
               		sInstrument := legGetString( pContract,"Nominal_unit" )
                },         
                
                // End instrument field
                
                
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "COM Asian" ) 
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Cleared swap" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Forward" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Future" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Simple option" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Spot/Forward" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Swap" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Option on Future - Listed" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "COM Physical Forward" ) ) THEN
					sCriteria1 := legGetString( pComponent,"COM Asset" ),
                    
               IF ( sSourceModule == "mx.rollover" OR sSourceModule == "mx.prefunding") THEN
               {
               		//Retrieve the closing entity of the internal counterparty
                    sClosingEntityCtp := ptfGetEntity(sMainCounterpart),
                    	
                    //Retrieve the legal entity of the internal counterparty
                    sLegalEntityCtp := ptfGetLegalEntity(sMainCounterpart),

                    //Retrieve the main Portfolio on the right LUT
                    sPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc",sMainPortfolioLUTName,
                                        "Source Module",sSourceModule,
                                        "Context","",
                                        "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
                                        "USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
                                        "Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
                                        "Registration",sRegistration,
                                        "Typology",sContractTypology,
                                        "Instrument",sInstrument,
                                        "Criteria 1",sCriteria1,
                                        "Closing Entity",sClosingEntityCtp,
										"Legal Entity",sLegalEntityCtp,
										"Main portfolio",sMainCounterpart),
                    IF (sPackageTypology == "Funding Swap") THEN
                    {
                    legOverwrite (pComponent,"Portfolio",sPortfolio)
                    }
                    ELSE
                    legSetString( pComponent,"Portfolio",sPortfolio )                                
               }
               ELSE                    
			  {	
              
               //BAB-Addition for the Bank Note
               IF sContractTypology == "Banknotes" OR sContractTypology == "Banknotes Credit" THEN
               {
               sDenCurrency := legGetString(pComponent,"Den_unit"),
               sNumCurrency := legGetString(pComponent,"Num_unit"),
               IF (sDenCurrency == "SAR") OR (sNumCurrency == "SAR") THEN
                {
                sCriteria1 := "YES"
                }
                ELSE 
                {
                sCriteria1 := "NO"
                }
                },
                //end of addition
               //BAB Addition
               IF sContractTypology == "Spot" THEN
               {
               sCounterparty := legGetString(pComponent,"Counterpart"),
               IF sCounterparty == "10000030" THEN
               {
               sCriteria1 := "SAMA"
               }
               },
               //end of addition
               
                //BAB-Addition for the Murabaha Placement and Borrowing
               sPattern:=legGetPatternLabel(pComponent),
                
               IF (sPattern == "Murabaha Borrowing" OR sPattern == "Murabaha Placement")  THEN
               {
               sCurrency := legGetString(pComponent,"Settl.Currency"),

               IF (sCurrency == "SAR") THEN
                {
                sCriteria1 := "YES"
                }
                ELSE 
                {
                sCriteria1 := "NO"
                }
                },
                //end of addition
                
                //BAB addition for Sukuk HVA related to foreign and Local currency
                IF sPattern == "Sukuk HVA" THEN
                {
               	 	sCurrency := legGetString(pComponent,"Currency"),
                    
                    IF (sCurrency == "SAR") THEN
                    {
                    sCriteria1 := "YES"
                    }
                    ELSE 
                    {
                    sCriteria1 := "NO"
                    }
                },
                //end of addition
                
                //BAB Addition to retrieve Holder type, Deal purpose, and Zakat exempt fields, and populate them in the LUT
                
                IF (sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" OR sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps") THEN
                {
                
                	sHolderType := legGetString(pContract, "HOLDERCLAS"),
                
                	sDealPurpose := legGetString(pContract, "PURPOSE"),
                
                	sZakatExempt := legGetString(pContract, "ZAKAT")
        
                },
				//Retrieve the main Portfolio on the right LUT
				sPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc",sMainPortfolioLUTName,
									"Source Module",sSourceModule,
									"Context","",
                                    "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
									"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
									"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Typology",sContractTypology,
									"Instrument",sInstrument,
									"Criteria 1",sCriteria1, "Deal Purpose", sDealPurpose, "Holder Classification", sHolderType, "ZAKAT EXEMPT", sZakatExempt )
               },    
               
                //Main portfolio - by default the portfolio captured by the user
                sMainPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent, "Portfolio" ),
                IF (sMainPortfolio == "" ) THEN
                	sMainPortfolio := sPortfolio,
                
                //Retrieve the closing entity of the main portfolio
                sClosingEntity := ptfGetEntity(sMainPortfolio),
                
                //Retrieve the legal entity of the main portfolio
                sLegalEntity := ptfGetLegalEntity(sMainPortfolio),                
				
				//Looks for the hedge Portfolio
				IF ( bIsContractInternal ) THEN 
				{
					sInternalPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
											"Source Module",sSourceModule,
											"Context","Internal",
                                            "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
											"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
											"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Typology",sContractTypology,
											"Instrument",sInstrument,
											"Criteria 1",sCriteria1,
                                            "Closing Entity",sClosingEntity,
											"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity,
											"Main portfolio",sMainPortfolio)                                            
				},
				
				//Looks for the hedge Portfolio
				IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
				{
					sBTBPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
											"Source Module",sSourceModule,
											"Context","Mirror",
                                            "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
											"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
											"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Typology",sContractTypology,
											"Instrument",sInstrument,
											"Criteria 1",sCriteria1,
                                            "Closing Entity",sClosingEntity,
											"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity,
											"Main portfolio",sMainPortfolio)                                            
				},
                
                //Looks for the FTP portfolios
				IF ( bIsContractFTP ) THEN
                {                    
					sLiqPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
											"Source Module",sSourceModule,
											"Context","Mirror",
                                            "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
											"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
											"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Typology",sContractTypology,
											"Instrument",sInstrument,
											"Criteria 1","LIQ",
                                            "Closing Entity",sClosingEntity,
											"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity,
											"Main portfolio",sMainPortfolio),
					sIrrPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
											"Source Module",sSourceModule,
											"Context","Mirror",
                                            "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
											"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
											"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Typology",sContractTypology,
											"Instrument",sInstrument,
											"Criteria 1","IRR",
                                            "Closing Entity",sClosingEntity,
											"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity,
											"Main portfolio",sMainPortfolio),
					sOptionPortfolio := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
											"Source Module",sSourceModule,
											"Context","Mirror",
                                            "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
											"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
											"Package Typology",sPackageTypology,
											"Registration",sRegistration,
											"Typology",sContractTypology,
											"Instrument",sInstrument,
											"Criteria 1","OPT",
                                            "Closing Entity",sClosingEntity,
											"Legal Entity",sLegalEntity,
											"Main portfolio",sMainPortfolio)
                },
				
				// Loop on components: propagate the contract portfolio to all components
				iComponent := 0,
				iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
				WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
				{
					pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract, iComponent ),
					// This sets the unique portfolio for external components and the source portfolio for internal components
					sCurrentPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent, "Portfolio" ),
					IF (
                    	(( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) 
							OR (( bIsInBookingSequence ) AND ( sCurrentPortfolio == "")))
                            AND ( sPortfolio <> "" ) ) THEN
						legSetString( pComponent, "Portfolio", sPortfolio ),
                        
                        //BAB addition - Throw a warning if MainPortfolio is different than the assigned portfolio in LUT
                    sCheckPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent, "Portfolio" ),
                    IF sCheckPortfolio <> "" AND sPortfolio <> "" THEN
                    {
                        IF sCheckPortfolio <> sPortfolio THEN
                        {
                        	IF legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Portfolio" THEN
                            {
                            	ThrowWarning("Portfolio","The Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                            	legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Portfolio")
                            }
                            ELSE
                            {
                            	ThrowLowPriorityWarning("Portfolio","The Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                            	legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Portfolio")
                            }

                        }
                    },
                    //end of BAB addition
					
					// This sets the destination portfolio for internal components
					sCurrentCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent, "Counterpart" ),
                    
                                        //BAB addition for internal portfolio checking
                    IF sInternalPortfolio <> "" AND sCurrentCounterparty <> "" THEN
                    {
                    	IF sInternalPortfolio <> sCurrentCounterparty THEN
                        {
                        IF legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Prm_other_party" OR  legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Secother_party" 
                        OR legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Sec_swp_other_party" OR legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Prm_swp_other_party"THEN
                            {
                            	ThrowWarning("Portfolio","The internal Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                            	legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Counterpart")
                            }
                            ELSE
                            {
								ThrowLowPriorityWarning("Portfolio","The internal Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                           		legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Counterpart")
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    // end of BAB addition

					IF ( ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) 
						OR ( ( bIsInBookingSequence ) AND ( sCurrentCounterparty == "" ) ) )
					AND ( sInternalPortfolio <> "" ) ) THEN
						legSetString( pComponent, "Counterpart", sInternalPortfolio ),
					
					iComponent := iComponent + 1
				},
				// This sets the mirror portfolio for contracts that will be mirrored
				// This will be used in the mirroring task
				sCurrentBTBPortfolio := legGetFOPInternalPortfolio( pContract ),
                
                //BAB addition for BTb portfolio checking
                IF sCurrentBTBPortfolio <> "" AND sBTBPortfolio <> "" THEN
                {
                    IF sCurrentBTBPortfolio <> sBTBPortfolio THEN
                    {
                    	IF legGetLastInputField(pComponent) == "Back_to_back_portfolio" THEN
                        {
                            ThrowWarning("Portfolio","The Back to back Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                            legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Back_to_back_portfolio")
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                        	ThrowLowPriorityWarning("Portfolio","The Back to back Portfolio selected is different from the assigned portfolio"),
                        	legSetCellColorAsWarning(pComponent,"Back_to_back_portfolio")
                        }
                    }
                },
                //end of BAB addition

				IF ( ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) 
						OR ( ( bIsInBookingSequence ) AND ( sCurrentBTBPortfolio == "" ) ) )
				AND ( bIsContractBTB ) ) THEN 
					legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pContract, sBTBPortfolio ),
                    
               	// This sets the FTP risk portfolios
				IF ( bIsContractFTP ) THEN
                {
                    legSetString( pContract,"pf_LiquidityBook",sLiqPortfolio ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"XTP_LIQ",sLiqPortfolio ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"pf_IRRBook",sIrrPortfolio ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"XTP_IRR",sIrrPortfolio ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"pf_OptionBook",sOptionPortfolio ),
                    legSetString( pContract,"XTP_OPT",sOptionPortfolio )
                },
				
				iContract := iContract + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// public.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Pricing.SetSpread

/*
MXpress

Version 1.2
Replaced ccy pair with Currency Pair in DEMO.FXMM.FactorCalcRulesFwd and DEMO.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesSpot

Version 1.1
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.0

Spreading rules for Spots:
The values are specified in the lookup table called MX.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesSpot.ALL
- If the nominal is between 0 and the first maximal nominal then
	the sales margin spread should be equal to the spread defined
- If the nominal is between the minimal nominal and the maximal nominal defined then
	the sales margin spread will be an interpolation
- If the nominal is greater than the maximal nominal defined then
	the sales margin spread will be equal to the spread defined
 The maximum nominal can be identified in the lookup table when the Minimum and the Maximum nominal in the range are equal. 

Spreading rules for Forwards:
- Using the Fwd Factor look up table, get the lower nominal bound (min nominal), upper nominal bound (max nominal), the min factor, and the max factor
- Based on these results, read the look up for spot spreads on forwards:
	- values related to the min mat, max mat, min spread, max spread based on the ccy, ctp, min nominal,
	- interpolate on the dates based on current date, min mat, max mat, min spread, max spread for these values to get mins spread
	- values related to the min mat, max mat, min spread, max spread based on the ccy, ctp, max nominal,
	- interpolate on the dates based on current date, min mat, max mat, min spread, max spread for these values to get max spread
	- interpolate on the nominal based on current nominal, min nominal, max nominal, min spread, max spread
  The maximum maturity condition can be identified in the lookup table when the Minimum and the Maximum maturity are equal. 

Please note that the nominal unit is 1M. Meaning, in the lookup table, 1 represents 1 Million. And 0.7 represents 700 Thousand.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	iCalcResult := 0,
	sRegistration := "",
	sCcyPair := "",
	sTradePurpose := "",
	sCounterParty := "",
	fPipsUnit := 0.0001,
	fNominalUnit := 1000000,
	pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg, iComponent ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent, "Trade purpose" ),
		sActive := lookupString( "DEMO.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesProd","ALL",
							"Registration", sRegistration,
							"Trade purpose", sTradePurpose ),
		IF ( sActive == "Yes" ) THEN
		{
			sInternalTypology := legGetInternalTypology( pComponent ),
			sMATURITY_FROM := "???/FWD/TDY/TOM/SPT",
			sMATURITY_TO := "???/FORWARD/TODAY/TOMORROW/SPOT",
			iMaturity := strIndexOf( sMATURITY_FROM,strSubString( sInternalTypology,0,3 ) )/4,
			sMaturity := strToken( sMATURITY_TO,"/",iMaturity ),
			sCounterParty := legGetString( pComponent, "Counterpart" ),
			sCcyPair := legGetString( pComponent, "Instrument" ),
			sCalendar := fxCntGetSpotToDeliveryCalendar( sCcyPair ),
			sBaseCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Den_unit" ),
			sUnderCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Num_unit" ),
			
			// Take into account the JPY PIP quotation
			IF ( sBaseCur == "JPY" ) OR ( sUnderCur == "JPY" ) THEN
				fPipsUnit := 0.01,
			
			fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent, "Nominal" ) / fNominalUnit,
			fNominalSpot := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Den_nominal" ) / fNominalUnit,
			fNominalFwd := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Den_nominal" ) / fNominalUnit,
			dSystemDate := sysGetTradingDate( ),
			dSpotDate := fxCntGetSpotDate( sCcyPair, dSystemDate ),
			dExpiry := legGetDate( pComponent, "Maturity" ),
			fExpiry := convertDToNumeric( dExpiry ),
			iExpiry := toInt( fExpiry ),
			// Spread Calc for Spots
			IF ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" OR sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" ) THEN
			{
				// Get the spread information from the spread calculation lookup table
				pCalcResults := lookupResults( "DEMO.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesSpot","ALL",
										"Currency Pair",sCcyPair,
										"Counterpart",sCounterParty ),
				iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcResults ),
				WHILE ( iCalcResult < iNbCalcResults ) DO
				{
					// Spread calculation information
					fMinNominal := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,0 ),
					fMaxNominal := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,1 ),
					fMinSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,2 ),
					fMaxSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,3 ),
					IF ( fNominalSpot >= fMinNominal AND fNominalSpot < fMaxNominal ) THEN
					{	
						IF ( fMinNominal == 0.0 ) THEN
							fTargetSpread := fMaxSpread
						// Perform an interpolation if nominal is between two values
						ELSE 
							fTargetSpread := linearInterpolation( fNominalSpot, fMinNominal, fMaxNominal, fMinSpread, fMaxSpread )
					}
					ELSE IF ( fNominal >= fMaxNominal AND fMinNominal == fMaxNominal ) THEN
						fTargetSpread := fMaxSpread,
					
					iCalcResult := iCalcResult + 1
				},
				
				fTargetSpread:= fTargetSpread * fPipsUnit,
				
				IF ( sMaturity == "FORWARD" ) THEN
					legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Spot_sales_margin", fTargetSpread )
				ELSE
					legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Sales_margin", fTargetSpread ),
				
				// Spread Calc for Forwards
				IF ( sMaturity == "FORWARD" OR sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" ) THEN
				{
					// To point to the forward leg of the Fx Swap contract
					IF ( sRegistration == "Fx swap" ) THEN
						pComponent:= legGetComponentAt( pLeg,1 ),
					
					pCalcResults := lookupResults( "DEMO.FXMM.FactorCalcRulesFwd","ALL",
											"Currency Pair",sCcyPair ),
					iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcResults ),
					iCalcResult := 0,
					WHILE ( iCalcResult < iNbCalcResults ) DO
					{
						fMinNominal := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,0 ),
						fMaxNominal := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,1 ),
						fMinFactor := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,2 ),
						fMaxFactor := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResults,iCalcResult,3 ),
						IF ( ( fNominalFwd >= fMinNominal AND fNominalFwd <= fMaxNominal ) OR ( fMinNominal == fMaxNominal AND fNominalFwd >= fMaxNominal ) ) THEN
						{
							fMinNominalFactor := fMinNominal,
							fMaxNominalFactor := fMaxNominal,
							fMinFactor := fMinFactor,
							fMaxFactor := fMaxFactor
						},
						iCalcResult := iCalcResult + 1
					},
					
					// Perform interpolation on dates based on Min Nominal
					IF ( fMinNominalFactor <> 0.0 AND fMinNominalFactor < fMaxNominalFactor) THEN
					{
						pCalcResultsMin := lookupResults( "DEMO.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesFwd","ALL",
													"Currency Pair", sCcyPair,
													"Nominal", fMinNominalFactor,
													"Counterpart", sCounterParty ),
						iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcResultsMin ),
						iCalcResult := 0,
						WHILE ( iCalcResult < iNbCalcResults ) DO
						{
							sMinMat := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResultsMin,iCalcResult,0 ),
							dMinMatDate := dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate, sMinMat, sCalendar ),
							fMinMatDate := convertDToNumeric( dMinMatDate ),
							iMinMatDate := toInt( fMinMatDate ),
							sMaxMat := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResultsMin,iCalcResult,1 ),
							dMaxMatDate := dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate, sMaxMat, sCalendar ),
							fMaxMatDate := convertDToNumeric( dMaxMatDate ),
							iMaxMatDate := toInt( fMaxMatDate ),
							fMinSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResultsMin,iCalcResult,2 ),
							fMaxSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResultsMin,iCalcResult,3 ),
							
							// Perform an interpolation if maturity between two values based on the min nominal value
							IF ( ( dExpiry >= dMinMatDate) AND ( dExpiry <= dMaxMatDate ) ) THEN
								fTargetSpreadMin := linearInterpolation ( convertIToNumeric( iExpiry ), convertIToNumeric( iMinMatDate ), convertIToNumeric( iMaxMatDate ), fMinSpread, fMaxSpread ),
							
							iCalcResult := iCalcResult + 1
						}
					},
					// Perform interpolation on dates based on Max Nominal
					pCalcResultsMax := lookupResults( "DEMO.FXMM.SpreadCalcRulesFwd","ALL",
												"Currency Pair", sCcyPair,
												"Nominal", fMaxNominalFactor,
												"Counterpart", sCounterParty ),
					iNbCalcResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pCalcResultsMax ),
					iCalcResult := 0,  
					WHILE ( iCalcResult < iNbCalcResults ) DO
					{
						sMinMat := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResultsMax,iCalcResult,0 ),
						dMinMatDate := dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate, sMinMat, sCalendar ),
						fMinMatDate := convertDToNumeric( dMinMatDate ),
						iMinMatDate := toInt( fMinMatDate ),
						sMaxMat := lookupResultsGetString( pCalcResultsMax,iCalcResult,1 ),
						dMaxMatDate := dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate, sMaxMat, sCalendar),
						fMaxMatDate := convertDToNumeric( dMaxMatDate ),
						iMaxMatDate := toInt( fMaxMatDate ),
						fMinSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResultsMax,iCalcResult,2 ),
						fMaxSpread := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pCalcResultsMax,iCalcResult,3 ),
						
						// perform an interpolation if maturity between two values based on the max nominal value    
						IF ( dExpiry > dMaxMatDate AND dMaxMatDate == dMinMatDate ) THEN
							fTargetSpreadMax := fMaxSpread
						ELSE IF ( ( dExpiry >= dMinMatDate ) AND ( dExpiry <= dMaxMatDate ) ) THEN
							fTargetSpreadMax := linearInterpolation ( convertIToNumeric( iExpiry ), convertIToNumeric( iMinMatDate ), convertIToNumeric( iMaxMatDate ), fMinSpread, fMaxSpread ),
						
						iCalcResult := iCalcResult + 1
					},
					
					// Perform interpolation based on Nominal
					fTargetSpreadMax := fTargetSpreadMax * fMaxFactor / 2.0,
					IF ( fMinNominalFactor <> 0.0 AND fMinNominalFactor < fMaxNominalFactor) THEN
					{
						fTargetSpreadMin := fTargetSpreadMin * fMinFactor / 2.0,
						// Calculating the target spread after multiplying by the relevant factors
						fTargetSpread := roundexcess( linearInterpolation( fNominalFwd,fMinNominalFactor,fMaxNominalFactor,fTargetSpreadMin,fTargetSpreadMax ),4 )
					}
					ELSE
					// Case where forward nominal is greater than the max amount in lookup
						fTargetSpread := fTargetSpreadMax,
					
					IF ( sMaturity == "FORWARD" ) THEN
						legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Swap_sales_margin",abs( fTargetSpread ) )
					ELSE
						legSetNumeric( pComponent,"Swap_sales_mrg_fwd_fwd",abs( fTargetSpread ) )
				}
			}
		},
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.ALL.CollA

/*
MXpress
IRD Specific completion

Version 1.4
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.3
Update the exercise mode field label for the swaptions

Version 1.2
Set the Underlying CSA

Version 1.1
Replace legSetCollateralAgreementCategory(,) function with legSetString(,)

Version 1.0
The purpose of this scripted rule is to set a Collateral Agreement Category
This rule is designed for IRD products, it uses one Look-Up Tables ( LUT ):
( MX.IRD.CollA,ALL ) contains the collateral agreement category from registration, counterparty and one criterion ( undefined )
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	IF ( legIsInitialized( This ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		sRegistration := "",
		sListOfCollateralElligible := "Interest rate swaps$" + 
					"Currency swaps$" +
					"FRA's$" +
					"Swaptions$" + 
					"Caps/floors$",
		bCollateralElligible := FALSE,
		sCounterpart := "",
		
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			bCollateralElligible := strContain( sListOfCollateralElligible,sRegistration+"$" ),
			// To set the collateral agreement category
			
			// To set the "Underlying CSA" initial value
			IF ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" ) THEN
			{
				sExerciseMode := legGetString( pComponent,"Exercise Mode" ),
				IF ( sExerciseMode == "Cash" ) THEN
					legSetString( pComponent,"Underlying CSA","" )
				ELSE IF ( ( sExerciseMode == "Delivery" ) OR ( sExerciseMode == "Cash ZC" ) ) THEN
				{
					sCSAType := legGetString( pComponent,"Collat._agreement_categ" ),
					legSetString( pComponent,"Underlying CSA",sCSAType )
				}
			},
			
			// Record ineligibility message for the Warning pop-up
			IF ((sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) OR (sRegistration == "FRA's" )) THEN
			{
				spf_CCPs := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ),
				spf_Eligibility := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility"),
				sCounterpart := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart"),
				
				IF ( spf_CCPs == "1. SwapClear" ) AND (spf_Eligibility == "Eligible") THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Pricing_counterpart", "SWAPCLEAR")
				ELSE IF ( spf_CCPs == "2. CME" ) AND (spf_Eligibility == "Eligible") THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Pricing_counterpart", "CME")
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Pricing_counterpart", sCounterpart)   
			},
			
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
IRD Dynamic Layout rule ( Management of Patterns Field Properties )

USED ALGORITHM

For each component in the contract:

1) Determine the Registration and Subregistration
	--> based on (MX.IRD.Subregs, ALL) lookup table

2) Reset all field properties

3) If Communication, tradability and/or BlockTrade checks are active, add properties accordingly
If current pattern is Credit Linked IRS, add properties accordingly

4) Add (or remove) field properties dynamically
	For each result returned by MX.IRD.LayDynA:
	 Check if the condition expressed by (FieldName, Operator, FieldCriterion, AddCriteria) is fulfilled
	  --> based on (MX.IRD.LayDynA, ALL) and (MX.IRD.AddCrit) lookup tables, see appendix A and B for details
	If the condition is fulfilled, add (or remove) the corresponding field property to the component


APPENDIX A - explanation of table MX.IRD.LayDynA

The results are filtered as explained below:

	First the lines are filtered based on the Registration.

	Then the lines are filtered based on the SubRegistration. Concerning <common> and <common - POST> lines, the priority is as below:
	- First the <common> lines are considered
	- Then the lines corresponding specifically to the component's SubRegistration are considered
	- Finally the <common - POST> lines are considered

	Then, within each SubRegistration, the results are further filtered based on the Pattern name, with again the same priority logic:
	- First the <common> lines are considered
	- Then the lines corresponding specifically to the component's Pattern are considered
	- Finally the <common - POST> lines are considered

	If several lines remain, they are executed in a random order (the order is not important).

Each result line is then interpreted as explained below:

		FieldProperty:
	This refers to the field property to add or remove, setup in Pricing template / Field Properties.
	However the the field property will be added/removed only if a certain main condition (+ additional conditions) is fulfilled.

		Add/Remove:
	To decide whether the field property should be added or removed.
	Important note: it is not possible to remove a property which was not added previously.
	Therefore, "Remove" should be used only to handle exception cases, such as a field property added in the <common> part and removed in the subregistration specific part or <common - POST> part.

		FieldName:
	Name of the field on which to perform the check for the main condition.
	If left blank, in which case Operator and FieldCriterion will also be blank, then the main condition is considered automatically fulfilled.

		FieldCriterion:
	Value against which to check the value of the field FieldName for the main condition.

		Operator:
	==: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is equal to FieldCriterion.
	<>: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is different from FieldCriterion.
	IN: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is a substring of FieldCriterion.
	CONTAINS: the main condition is fulfilled iif FieldCriterion is a substring of the value of FieldName.

		AddCriteria:
	This refers to one or several additional conditions described in MX.IRD.AddCrit.
	If left blank, then there is no additional condition.
	Note: for practical reasons, it is possible to have FieldName blank and yet AddCriteria non blank.


APPENDIX B - explanation of table MX.IRD.AddCrit

The results are filtered as explained below:

	First the lines are filtered based on the AddCriteria.

	Then, if needed, the results may be further filtered depnding on the Registration.

	If several lines remain, they are evaluated in a random order (the order is not important).
	Note: all conditions described in these lines must return TRUE for the AddCriteria to be considered fulfilled.
	In other words, this table allows to define a logical AND over multiple conditions.

Each result line is then interpreted as explained below:

		FieldName:
	Name of the field on which to perform the check for the main condition.

		FieldCriterion:
	Value against which to check the value of the field FieldName for the main condition.

		Operator:
	==: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is equal to FieldCriterion.
	<>: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is different from FieldCriterion.
	IN: the main condition is fulfilled if the value of FieldName is a substring of FieldCriterion.
	CONTAINS: the main condition is fulfilled if FieldCriterion is a substring of the value of FieldName.    

Version 1.21
- Populate the payout pretrade field for European swaptions when not in pricing context (example: ticket opening from trade query) 
- Dynamically highlight Main price for Interest rate swaps and Currency swaps
    
Version 1.20
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.19
- Removed handling hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad, as it is natively embedded

Version 1.18
- Renamed leafs of irs credit linked properties for leg 2, to be consistent with the naming on the leg 1.

Version 1.17
- Included Asset swaps registration field properties where Converted upfront Amount should be displayed only in cross-currency trades
And Hide fields Par-price fx rate and Converted upfront Amount when the nominal currency is different than the std payment currency
- Included Bond registration field properties where the field Settlement FX Spot is removed if both fields "Settlement Currency" and "Flat Settlement Currency" are matching.

Version 1.16
- Exclude Swap futures from (MX.IRD.LAyDynA, ALL) Lookup table calling
- Handle hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad

Version 1.15
To handle clearing eligibility fields
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT

Version 1.14
- To exclude Long futures and Short futures from (MX.IRD.LAyDynA, ALL) Lookup table calling
- Correction on property adding portfolio in case of strategy

Version 1.13
Do not use EXOTIC and FEATURES UDF anymore. In layouts, they were replaced by Groups.

Version 1.12
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders  

Version 1.11
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.10
To handle the Return for IRS Vanilla

Version 1.9
To handle the Asset swaps registration too

Version 1.8
Small amendments on Credit Linked IRS pattern

Version 1.7
Refactoring for Credit Linked IRS pattern

Version 1.6
If the BlockTrade check is active, the portfolio/allocation matrix field is added depending on blocktrade field value
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the BlockTrade check

Version 1.5
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.4
If the Communication or the Tradability check are active, the tradability check property is added
A new Look-Up Table is used:
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the communication and the tradability checks

Version 1.3
Handle IRD exotic products
Full update of used algorithm in order to set fields initialisation through Look-Up Table tables.
Look-Up Tables used are:
( MX.IRD.Subregs,ALL ) is a utility LUT used to map Registration/Pattern to subregistration
( MX.IRD.LayDynA,ALL ) contains field properties to add or remove requested for each registration/subregistration/pattern
( MX.IRD.AddCrit,LayDyn ) is a utility LUT used to add another criteria to add or remove a field properties

Version 1.2
legResetProperties and legAddProperties functions have to be called on pLeg instead of pComponent ( DEF0112958 )

Version  1.1
Add dynamic layout rules for IRD products used by CRD asset
*/

{
	pContract := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	iComponent := 0,
	iNumComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
	sRegistration := "",
	sPattern := "",
	sSubRegistration := "",
	sIsClearingEligibilityActive := "",
	fContractNb := 0.0,
	sPricingContext := "",
	sTicketDisplay := "",
	sAction := "",
	sBOSource := "",
	sContext := "",
	iSubRegIteration := 0,
	sCurrentSubReg := "",
	iPatternIteration := 0,
	sCurrentPattern := "",
	iFieldPropertyCounter := 0,
	iFoundFieldProperties := 0,
	bFieldPropertyFit := FALSE,
	sFieldName := "",
	sOperator := "",
	sFieldCriteria := "",
	sAdditionaCriteria := "",
	sFieldProperty := "",
	sAddRemove := "",
	sError := "",
	bFitPrincipalCriteria := FALSE,
	bFitAdditionalCriteria := FALSE,
	sFieldValue := "",
	iAdditionalCriteria := 0,
	iFoundAdditionalCriteria := 0,
	sAddFieldName := "",
	sAddOperator := "",
	sAddFieldCriteria := "",
	sAddFieldValue := "",
	sIndexType1 := "",
	sIndexType2 := "",
	sNominalUnit := "",
	sOtherNominalUnit := "", 
	sStdPaymentCurrency := "",
	sSettlementCur := "",
	sFlatSettlementCur := "",
	
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponents ) DO
	{
		pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
		
		// ***   1) Determine the Registration and Subregistration   *** //
		
		IF ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pCurrentLeg ) <> "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg )
		ELSE
		{
			pFatherContract := legGetFatherContract( pCurrentLeg ),
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pFatherContract )
		},
		
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentLeg ),
		sSubRegistration := lookupString( "MX.IRD.Subregs","ALL",
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Pattern",sPattern ),
		
		
		// ***   2) Reset all field properties   *** //
		
		legResetProperties( pCurrentLeg ),
		
		//If the block trade is active is active, we need to activate the block trade properties
		sPricingContext := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.pricing.context" ), // possible values are FDI, MAIL, ARCHIVE or empty string
		sTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
		sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ), // possible values are INS, MOD and CNL
		sBOSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ),
		
		IF ( ( ( sPricingContext == "" ) AND ( sTicketDisplay == "YES" ) ) 
		OR ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource == "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) )
		OR ( sAction <> "INS" ) ) THEN
			sContext := "BOOKING"
		ELSE IF ( ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sBOSource <> "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) ) THEN
			sContext := "PRICING",
		
		// If the clearing eligibility is active
		sIsClearingEligibilityActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","OTCClearing" ) ),
		IF ( sIsClearingEligibilityActive == "YES" ) THEN
		{
			IF NOT ( ( sContext == "BOOKING" ) AND ( sTicketDisplay == "NO" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"common_0.5.1_eligilibity" )
		},
		
		// Field Settlement FX Spot removed if Settlement Currency and Flat settlement currency are matching for Bonds registration
		IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN
		{
			sSettlementCur := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Flat amount unit" ),
			sFlatSettlementCur := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Flat settl unit" ),
			IF ( sSettlementCur <> sFlatSettlementCur ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"crd_1_settlementFXSpot" )
			}
		},
		//RFR_IR
            sRegistration := legGetRegistration(pCurrentLeg),
            sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pCurrentLeg),
	
            sRFRCheck := lookupString ("BAB.ALL.RFRCHECK","ALL","Registration",sRegistration,"Pattern",sPattern),
            IF (sRFRCheck == "IR_PRS") THEN
            {
         	 sRFRIndex := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Index2"),
			 pRFRIndex :=  indexGetIndexByLabel(sRFRIndex),
           
            
            	IF ( NOT isNull( pRFRIndex ) ) THEN
            	{
                  sIndexResetMode := indexGetResetMode(pRFRIndex),
                  sInstrument := legGetString (pCurrentLeg, "Instrument"),
                  bRFR := (strContain (sInstrument, "SOFR") OR strContain (sInstrument, "SONIA")) AND sIndexResetMode <> "Published",
                
                     IF bRFR THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty(pCurrentLeg,"rfr_1.1_structure"),
                            pSTRUCT := legGetUserFields (pContract),
                            udfSetString(pSTRUCT,"STRUCTURE","Single Murabaha")
                            
                        } 
                  }
			  },

            //end of rfr
		//Converted upfront Amount should be displayed only in cross-currency trades
		//Hide fields Par-price fx rate and Converted upfront Amount when the nominal currency is different than the std payment currency
		IF ( sRegistration == "Asset swaps" ) THEN
		{
			sNominalUnit := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Nominal unit" ),
			sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Other nominal unit" ),
			sStdPaymentCurrency := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Std payment currency" ),
			IF ( sNominalUnit <> sStdPaymentCurrency ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "as_10.01_convertedFeeAmount" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "as_10.02_parPriceFXRate" )
			},
			
			IF ( sNominalUnit <> sOtherNominalUnit ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "as_10.01_ConvertedFeeAmount" )
			}
		},
        
        
		IF ( sRegistration == "Treasury locks" ) THEN
           {
             sSettlementMode := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Settlement dP/dY mode" ),
             sLockedValue:=  legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Locked value"),
                                                  
             IF ( sSettlementMode == "Specific" ) THEN
                {
                 legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "TlockSettlementSpecific" )            
                }
             ELSE
             	{
                 legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "TlockSettlementForward" )
                 },
              
              
             IF ( sLockedValue == "Price" ) THEN
                {
                 legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "TlockLockedPrice" )            
                }
             ELSE
             	{
                 legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "TlockLockedYield" )
                 }
                                          
                                          
         },
         
         
         
         
          //BAB addition for WHT charge related to the Sukuk Issuance
        sTypology := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Typology"),
        IF sTypology == "Sukuk Issuance" THEN
        {
        sEligible := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"PROFIT_WHT"),
        
        IF sEligible == "Yes" THEN
        legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg, "common_0.1.4.6_WHT")
        
        },
        // End of BAB addition for WHT charge related to the Sukuk Issuance
         
        //addtion for BAB
        pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pContract ),
        iMsg:=0,
        iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
    
        WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
        {
        pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
        IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
        legAddProperty( pContract,"common_0.1.4.6_preDealReason" ),
        
        iMsg:=iMsg+1
        },//End of BAB addition
        
        //addtion for BAB Bonds
        pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pContract ),
        iMsg:=0,
        iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
    
        WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
        {
        pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
        IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
        legAddProperty( pContract,"common_0.1.4.3_preDealReason" ),
        
        iMsg:=iMsg+1
        },//End of BAB Bonds addition 
        
        
		// Fields properties to add for the Credit Linked IRS pattern
		IF ( sSubRegistration == "Credit Linked IRS" ) THEN
		{
			sAmortizing := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Amortizing" ),
			
			sLegtype := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Leg type" ),
			sCrLinked := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Credit linked" ),
			sReference := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference" ),
			sBasketNature := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket nature" ),
			sBasketComputationType := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket computation type" ),
			sBespoke := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bespoke" ),
			sRecoveryMode := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode" ),
			
			sLegtype2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Leg type2" ),
			sCrLinked2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Credit linked2" ),
			sReference2:= legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference2" ),
			sBasketNature2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket nature2" ),
			sBasketComputationType2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket computation type2" ),
			sBespoke2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bespoke2" ),
			sRecoveryMode2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode2" ),
			
			legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.7_rateMargin" ),
			
			//leg1
			IF ( sLegtype == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.3.1.1_index" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.3.1.0_floatSimple" )
			},
			IF ( sLegtype == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.1.1_disCurve" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.1.2_estCurve" )
			},
			
			IF ( sLegtype == "Fixed" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.1.1_disCurve" ),
			
			IF ( sCrLinked == "Yes" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.15_reference" ),
			
			IF ( sReference == "Issuer" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.13_issuer" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.18_seniority" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference == "Bond" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.07_bond" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.18_seniority" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference == "Basket" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.01_basket" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.04_basketNature" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.03_basketDetails" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.02_basketComputationType" )
			},
			
			IF ( sRecoveryMode <> "None" ) THEN 
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.20_expectedLoss" ),
			
			IF ( sBasketComputationType == "Nth default" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.14_nth" ),
			
			IF ( sBasketComputationType == "Synth. CDO" ) THEN 
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.16_scdo"),
			
			IF ( ( sBasketComputationType == "Synth. CDO" ) AND ( sBespoke == "Yes" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.06_bespokeDetails" ),
			
			//leg2 
			IF ( sLegtype2 == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.3.1.1_index" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.3.1.0_floatSimple" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.1.1_disCurve" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.1.2_estCurve" )
			},
			
			IF ( sLegtype2 == "Fixed" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.1.1_disCurve" ), 
			
			IF ( sCrLinked2 == "Yes" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.15_reference" ),
			
			IF ( sReference2 == "Issuer" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.13_issuer" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.18_seniority" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference2 == "Bond" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.07_bond" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.18_seniority" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference2 == "Basket" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.01_basket" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.04_basketNature" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.06_basketDetails" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.02_basketComputationType" )
			},
			
			IF ( sRecoveryMode2 <> "None" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.20_expectedLoss" ),
			
			IF ( sBasketComputationType2 == "Nth default" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.14_nth" ),
			
			IF ( sBasketComputationType2 == "Synth. CDO" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.16_scdo" ),
			
			IF ( ( sBasketComputationType2 == "Synth. CDO" ) AND ( sBespoke2 == "Yes" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.06_bespokeDetails" ),
			
			IF ( ( sReference == "Issuer" ) OR ( sReference == "Bond" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.09_creditCurve" ),
			IF ( ( sReference2 == "Issuer" ) OR ( sReference2 == "Bond" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.09_creditCurve" ),
				
			IF ( ( sBasketNature == "Index" ) AND ( sBasketComputationType == "Index" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.09_creditCurve" ),                
			IF ( ( sBasketNature2 == "Index" ) AND ( sBasketComputationType2 == "Index" ) ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.09_creditCurve" ),
				
			IF ( sBasketComputationType == "Synth. CDO" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.17_scdoDetails" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.8.19_basecorrel" )
			},
			IF ( sBasketComputationType2 == "Synth. CDO" ) THEN
			{
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.17_scdoDetails" ),
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.8.19_basecorrel" )
			},
			
			IF ( sAmortizing <> "None" ) THEN
				legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.1.1_amort" )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sRegistration <> "Long futures" AND  sRegistration <> "Short futures" AND sRegistration <> "Swap futures" ) THEN
		{
			// ***   4) Add (or remove) field properties dynamically   *** //
			
			IF ( sSubRegistration == "IRS Vanilla" ) THEN
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
				pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
				pStream1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,0 ),
				pStream2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,0,1 ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream1 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pStream1 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex1 ) ) THEN
						sIndexType1 := indexGetCategory( pIndex1 ),
					
					IF ( sIndexType1 == "Inflation" ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.3.1.2_floatInflation1" )
				},
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream2 ) ) THEN
				{
					pIndex2 := streamGetIndex( pStream2 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
						sIndexType2 := indexGetCategory( pIndex2 ),
					
					IF ( sIndexType2 == "Inflation" ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.3.1.2_floatInflation2" )
				}
			},
			
			iSubRegIteration := 0,
			WHILE ( iSubRegIteration < 3 ) DO
			{
				IF ( iSubRegIteration == 0 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := "<common>"
				ELSE IF ( iSubRegIteration == 1 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := sSubRegistration
				ELSE IF ( iSubRegIteration == 2 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := "<common - POST>",
				
				iPatternIteration := 0,
				WHILE ( iPatternIteration < 3 ) DO
				{
					IF ( iPatternIteration == 0 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := "<common>"
					ELSE IF ( iPatternIteration == 1 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := sPattern
					ELSE IF ( iPatternIteration == 2 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := "<common - POST>",
					
					pFieldProperties := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.LayDynA","ALL",
												"Registration",sRegistration,
												"SubRegistration",sCurrentSubReg,
												"Pattern",sCurrentPattern ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldProperties ) ) THEN
					{
						iFieldPropertyCounter := 0,
						iFoundFieldProperties := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pFieldProperties ),
						
						WHILE ( iFieldPropertyCounter < iFoundFieldProperties ) DO
						{
							bFieldPropertyFit := FALSE,
							
							sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,0 ),
							sOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,1 ) ),
							sFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,2 ),
							sAdditionaCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,3 ),
							sFieldProperty := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,4 ),
							sAddRemove := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldProperties,iFieldPropertyCounter,5 ),
							
							sError := "",
							IF ( ( sFieldName == "" ) AND ( ( sOperator <> "" ) OR ( sFieldCriteria <> "" ) ) ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Field Name missing. "
							ELSE IF ( ( sFieldName <> "" ) AND ( sOperator <> "==" ) AND ( sOperator <> "<>" ) AND ( sOperator <> "CONTAINS" ) AND ( sOperator <> "IN" ) ) THEN
									sError := sError + "Operator wrong or missing. ",
							IF ( sFieldProperty == "" ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Field Property missing. ",
							IF ( ( sAddRemove <> "Add" ) AND ( sAddRemove <> "Remove" ) ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Add/Remove wrong or missing. ",
							
							bFitPrincipalCriteria := TRUE,
							bFitAdditionalCriteria := TRUE,
							
							IF ( sError == "" ) THEN
							{
								IF ( strLen( sFieldName ) > 0) THEN
								{
									sFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldName ),
									
									IF ( sOperator == "==" ) THEN
										bFitPrincipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue == sFieldCriteria )
									ELSE IF ( sOperator == "<>" ) THEN
										bFitPrincipalCriteria := ( sFieldValue <> sFieldCriteria )
									ELSE IF ( sOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
										bFitPrincipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ) )
									ELSE IF ( sOperator == "IN" ) THEN
										bFitPrincipalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sFieldValue ) )
								},
								
								IF ( ( bFitPrincipalCriteria ) AND ( strLen( sAdditionaCriteria ) > 0 ) ) THEN
								{
									pAdditionalCriteria := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.AddCrit","LayDyn",
																"Registration",sRegistration,
																"Add Criteria",sAdditionaCriteria ),
									IF ( NOT isNull( pAdditionalCriteria ) ) THEN
									{
										iAdditionalCriteria := 0,
										iFoundAdditionalCriteria := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pAdditionalCriteria ),
										
										WHILE ( ( iAdditionalCriteria < iFoundAdditionalCriteria ) AND ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) ) DO
										{
											sAddFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,0 ),
											sAddOperator := strToUpperCase( lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,1 ) ),
											sAddFieldCriteria := lookupResultsGetString( pAdditionalCriteria,iAdditionalCriteria,2 ),
											
											IF ( ( sAddFieldName == "" )
											OR ( ( sAddOperator <> "==" ) AND ( sAddOperator <> "<>" ) AND ( sAddOperator <> "CONTAINS" ) AND ( sAddOperator <> "IN" ) ) ) THEN
												sError := sError + "Error in MX.IRD.AddCrit. ",
											
											sAddFieldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sAddFieldName ),
											
											IF ( sAddOperator == "==" ) THEN
												bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue == sAddFieldCriteria )
											ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "<>" ) THEN
												bFitAdditionalCriteria := ( sAddFieldValue <> sAddFieldCriteria )
											ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "CONTAINS" ) THEN
												bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ) )
											ELSE IF ( sAddOperator == "IN" ) THEN
												bFitAdditionalCriteria := strContain( strToUpperCase( sAddFieldCriteria ),strToUpperCase( sAddFieldValue ) ),
											
											iAdditionalCriteria := iAdditionalCriteria + 1
										}
									}
									ELSE
										sError := sError + "Wrong Field Property. "
								},
								
								IF ( ( bFitPrincipalCriteria ) AND ( bFitAdditionalCriteria ) AND sError == "") THEN
									bFieldPropertyFit := TRUE
							},
							
							IF ( bFieldPropertyFit ) THEN
							{
								IF ( sAddRemove == "Add" ) THEN
									legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,sFieldProperty )
								ELSE
									legRemoveProperty( pCurrentLeg,sFieldProperty )
							},
							
							IF ( sError <> "" ) THEN
								ThrowWarning( "","('MX.IRD.LayDynA,'ALL')" + endline( ) + sError + " ( Registration = " + sRegistration + ", SubRegistration = " + sCurrentSubReg + ", Pattern = " + sCurrentPattern + ", Field Name = " + sFieldName + ", Operator = " + sOperator + ", Field Criterion = " + sFieldCriteria + ", Add Criteria = " + sAdditionaCriteria + ", Field Property = " + sFieldProperty + ", Add/Remove = " + sAddRemove + ")"),
							
							iFieldPropertyCounter := iFieldPropertyCounter + 1
						}
					},
					iPatternIteration := iPatternIteration + 1
				},
				iSubRegIteration := iSubRegIteration + 1
			}
		},
        
        //Populate the payout field for European swaptions when not in pricing context (example: ticket opening from trade query)
        IF ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" ) THEN
		{
			sStyle := legGetString (pCurrentLeg, "Option_style"),
        	IF ( sStyle == "European" AND sSubRegistration == "Swaption European" ) THEN //Else the Payout pretrade field is not in the pattern
            {
            	sPayout := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "pf_EuroSwaptionPayout" ),
                sPayReceive := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Payout"),
                sPayout_Type := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type"),
                
            	IF ( sPayout == "" ) THEN
            	{
                	IF ( sPayout_Type == "Straddle") THEN
                    	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"pf_EuroSwaptionPayout","Straddle"),
                	IF ( sPayReceive == "Receive" AND sPayout_Type == "Standard" ) THEN
                    	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"pf_EuroSwaptionPayout","Receiver"),
                	IF ( sPayReceive == "Pay" AND sPayout_Type == "Standard" ) THEN
                    	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"pf_EuroSwaptionPayout","Payer")
            	}
            }
		},
        
        // Dynamically highlight Main price - either Trader rate (if no margin) or client rate (if margin)
        IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" OR sRegistration == "Currency swaps" ) THEN
        {
        	IF ( legGetNumeric(pCurrentLeg , "Sales margin") == 0.0 ) THEN
            	legSetCellAsMainPrice(pCurrentLeg, "Rate_Margin")
            ELSE
	            legSetCellAsMainPrice(pCurrentLeg, "NetRate")
        },
        
        // BAB addition Dynamic layout for the exotic PRS 
        IF sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" THEN
        {
        	IF sPattern == "PRS CapFloorCollar" THEN
            {
            	legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.2.4.3.4_embedOptLabel"),
                legAddProperty( pCurrentLeg,"irs_5.3.4.3.4_embedOptLabel")     
            },
            
            IF sPattern == "PRS Range" THEN
            {
            	legAddProperty(pCurrentLeg,"cs_2.2.4.5.2_renage1ID1S"),
                legAddProperty(pCurrentLeg,"cs_2.2.4.5.4_range1ID2S")
                
            }
        },
        //end of BAB addition
        
        //BAB addition to take into consideration the customized flows in the sales margin amount
        IF sTypology == "PRS" OR sTypology == "PRS Range" OR sTypology == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sTypology == "PRS Inverse Floater"  THEN
            {
            	 IF strCONTAIN (legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Customized Flows" ), "Y") THEN
                 {
                 	legAddProperty(pCurrentLeg,"common_0.1.4.7_salesmargin"),
                    legRemoveProperty( pCurrentLeg,"common_0.1.4.8_salesmgnative")
                 }
            },

        //BAB addition dynamic layout for the PRS related to Waad/COM
        IF sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" THEN
        {
            IF sPattern == "PRS" OR sPattern == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sPattern == "PRS Range" OR sPattern == "PRS Inverse Floater" THEN
            {
                sUsage :=legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Usage"),
            
                IF sUsage == "COM" THEN
                {
                    legAddProperty(pCurrentLeg,"common_0.1.4.5_CommodityDetails")
                }
            }
        }, 
        // end of BAB addition
        
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "IRD")
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress IRD Specific completion

Version 2.3
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.2
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.1
Applied MSL best practices

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	For every IRD registration:
		- SwapClear Eligibility							: "SCCClearing"
		- CME Eligibility								: "CMEClearing"
	For Bonds registration:
		- Nominal check (Min piece, Min increment)		: "MI", "MP"
	For Listed registrations:
		- Instrument is blacklisted						: "BIs"
		- Issuer is blacklisted							: "BIn"
	For IRS:
		- Non null nominal check						: "NullNom"
	Generic Common Sanity Checks (See SanityCheckCommon function for codes)
        
If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon","IRD" ),

	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	sPortfolio := "",
	
	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform sanity checks      
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iCount ),
		
		IF legGetRegistrationLabel( pComponent ) == "mxContractISINGLE" THEN
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent )
		ELSE 
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( legGetFatherContract( pComponent ) ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
		
		// SwapClear Eligibility check
		IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) ) THEN
			spf_NotEligibleReasonSC := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ),
		
		IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_CCPs" ) ) THEN
			spf_CCPs := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ),
		IF ( ( ( spf_CCPs == "1. SwapClear" ) OR ( spf_CCPs == "" ) ) AND ( spf_NotEligibleReasonSC <> "" ) ) THEN
		{
			IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-SCClearing-" ) == 0 ) THEN
				legAddMessage( pComponent,spf_NotEligibleReasonSC,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","Sane-SCClearing-", messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
		},
		
		// CME Eligibility check        
		IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) ) THEN
			spf_NotEligibleReasonCME :=  legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ),
		IF ( ( ( spf_CCPs == "2. CME" ) OR ( spf_CCPs == "" ) ) AND ( spf_NotEligibleReasonCME <> "" ) ) THEN
			legAddMessage( pComponent,spf_NotEligibleReasonCME,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Sane-CMEClearing-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) ), 
		
		/// Bonds Nominal checkStep
		IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN
		{
			fTradeNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
			fMinPiece := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Minimum piece" ),
			fMinIncrement := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Minimum increment" ),
			IF ( fTradeNominal < fMinPiece ) THEN 
			{
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-MP-" ) == 0 ) THEN
					legAddMessage( pComponent, "Trade nominal " + toString( fTradeNominal,20,0,FALSE,0 ) + " is below the bond minimum piece " + toString( fMinPiece,20,0,FALSE,0 ),"Nominal","Sane-MP-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
			}
			ELSE IF ( fMinIncrement <> 0.0 ) THEN
			{
				IF ( round( ( fTradeNominal - fMinPiece ) / fMinIncrement,0 ) - ( fTradeNominal - fMinPiece ) / fMinIncrement <> 0.0 ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-MI-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Trade nominal above minimum piece is not an increment of " + toString( fMinPiece,20,0,FALSE,0 ) + "+n*" + toString( fMinIncrement,20,0,FALSE,0 ),"Nominal","Sane-MI-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				}
			}
		},
		
		// Fund blacklist applied on listed products:  Bonds, Short futures, Long futures
		IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Short futures" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Long futures" ) THEN
		{
			sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			pSecurity := secGetSecurityData( sInstrument ),
			sIssuer := securityGetIssuerLabel( pSecurity ),
			pFund := ptfGetFundCompartment( sPortfolio ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pFund ) ) THEN
			{
				sFund := mx.statics.am.FundCompartmentInternal.GetDisplayedLabel( pFund ),
				IF ( issuerFundBlacklisted( sIssuer,sFund ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-BIs-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Issuer " + sIssuer + " is blacklisted in fund " + sFund ,"Instrument","Sane-BIs-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				},
				IF ( instrumentFundBlacklisted( sInstrument,sFund ) ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-BIn-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Instrument " + sInstrument + " is blacklisted in fund " + sFund ,"Instrument","Sane-BIn-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
				}
			} 
		},
		
		IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) OR ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) THEN
		{
			fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent, "Nominal"),
			IF ( fNominal == 0.0 ) THEN
				IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Sane-NullNom-" ) == 0 ) THEN
						legAddMessage( pComponent, "Nominal is null" ,"Nominal","Sane-NullNom-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
		},
		
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.Closing.TxtDesc.Generic /* MXpress IRD Generic Text Description Used algorithm: If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting and the generate trade or Processing/Inser trade has not been used then Empty text area Retrieve few fields shared between all IRD products Check if it is a single contract or a strategy If registration is Bonds then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Interest rate swaps or Caps/floors or Currency swaps If registration is Currency swaps then Retrieve fields to build the header Build header accordingly Append header text description End if Loop twice If registration is Interest rate swaps then Initialized fields shared between the two legs If first loop then Retrieve fields belong to first leg Else if second loop then Retrieve fields belong to second leg End if Else if registration is Caps/floors then Loop counter equals 2 Retrieve fields Else if registration is Currency swaps then Initialized fields shared between the two legs If first loop then Retrieve fields belong to first leg Else if second loop then Retrieve fields belong to second leg End if End if Initialized parameters used later If it is PRDC then Build text description accordingly Else Build text description accordingly End if End loop Append built text description Build and append text description for shared characteristics if requested Else if registration is Swaptions then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Short futures then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Long futures then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Interest rate future options then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is FRA's then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Bond options then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Asset swaps then Initialized fields Build text description accordingly Append built text description Else if registration is Asset // mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.Pricing.FInit

/*
MXpress
IRD Fields initialisation rule

USED ALGORITHM

For each component in the contract:

1) Determine the native Registration and the Sub-Registration (The Sub-Registration being a concept specific to this rule)
	--> based on (MX.IRD.Subregs, ALL) Look-Up Table

2) Filter the list of subtypes appearing in the field SW_SUBTYPE
	--> based on (MX.IRD.Subtypes, ALL) lookup table

3) Initialize / set field values dynamically
	For each result returned by MX.IRD.FInit-1:

	  Check if the condition expressed by (SetCondition, FieldName, ValueFrom, ValueTo) is fulfilled
	  --> based on (MX.IRD.FInit-1, ALL) Look-Up Table, see appendix A for details
	
	If the condition is fulfilled, retrieve from MX.IRD.FInit-2 the list of automatic sets to perform
