	  --> based on (MX.IRD.FInit-2, ALL) and (MX.IRD.OldField, ALL) Look-Up Table, see appendix B for details


APPENDIX A - explanation of table MX.IRD.FInit-1

The results are filtered as explained below:
		First the lines are filtered based on the Registration.
		
		Then the lines are filtered based on the Sub-Registration. Concerning <common> and <common - POST> lines, the priority is as below:
		- First the <common> lines are considered
		- Then the lines corresponding specifically to the component's SubRegistration are considered
		- Finally the <common - POST> lines are considered

		Then, within each Sub-Registration, the results are further filtered based on the Pattern name, with again the same priority logic:
		- First the <common> lines are considered
		- Then the lines corresponding specifically to the component's Pattern are considered
		- Finally the <common - POST> lines are considered

	Finally, within each Pattern, the results are read ordered ascendingly by the Order field.
	Note: the Order field is a string representing a double-digit number.
	In case of single-digit numbers, "0" must be added before the number.

Each result line is then interpreted as explained below:
		Block:
	This refers to the block of automatic sets to perform, described in MX.IRD.FInit-2.
	However the automatic sets will be performed only if a certain condition is fulfilled.

		FieldName:
	Name of the field on which to perform the check.
	If left blank, in which case ValueFrom and ValueTo will also be blank, then the condition is considered automatically fulfilled.
	Note: the FieldName can be left blank only when SetCondition = Overwrite.

		SetCondition:
	Can be "Upon change only" or "Overwrite" or "Initialize"
	"Upon change only" means that part of the condition is that the field value has just changed.
	"Overwrite" means that we don't care whether the field value has changed or not.
    "Initialize" means that we set a field based on some condition using legSet*. The user has the ability to override this initialization.

	ValueFrom and ValueTo:
	Can be "(any)" or a specific value.
	The condition is fulfilled if the previous value of the field was ValueFrom and its current value is ValueTo.
		Note: it is not possible to directly check the previous value of the field, so this value needs to be stored into another field and refreshed at each execution of the pricing sequence.
	Which field it has been stored into is determined by the assignment in MX.IRD.Oldfield.


APPENDIX B - explanation of table MX.IRD.FInit-2

The results are filtered as explained below:

		First the lines are filtered based on the Block.
	
	Then, within each Block, the results are read ordered ascendingly by the Order field.
		Note: the Order field is a string representing a double-digit number.
	In case of single-digit numbers, "0" must be added before the number.

Each result line is then interpreted as explained below:

		FieldName:
	Name of the field on which to perform the automatic set.

		FieldValue:
	Value to set (if FieldType = "S", "F", "I" or "D") or name of another field (if FieldType = "X").

	FieldType:
	S: used for String fields. The field FieldName will be set to FieldValue.
	F: used for Numeric fields. The field FieldName will be set to FieldValue.
	I: used for Integer fields. The field FieldName will be set with FieldValue.
	D: used for Date fields. Tthe field FieldName will be set with FieldValue.
	X: used only for String fields. The field FieldName will be set with the value of field FieldValue.

    
Version 1.9
Defaulting of Range index for fixed range accruals,
Initialization of swaption CSA depending on settlement type,
Handling of NLR pricing matrices
    
Version 1.8
Remove column Field Type from look up table MX.IRD.Finit-2 and use function legGetFieldType instead
    
Version 1.7
Add logic for IRS Pricing Matrix to force NPV to 0.

Version 1.6
Handling of Payout pretrade field pf_EuroSwaptionPayout for European swaptions
    
Version 1.5
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.4
Modified to give the possibility to "Initialize" a field based on a condition. The specific
case inserted is "If the currency of a Swaption changes to EUR then set the Settlement Type to Forward".
The Settlement Type will then remain Forward until the user modifies the Swaption currency or
overrides the intialization of the field Settlement Type with their own value.
    
Version 1.3
The Additional flows is enabled by default for Credit Linked IRS

Version 1.2
Amended to handle Credit Linked IRS

Version 1.1
Handle IRD exotic products.
Full update of used algorithm in order to set fields initialisation through lookup tables.
Lookup tables used are:
( "MX.IRD.Subregs", "ALL" ) is a utility LUT used to map Registration/Pattern to subregistration
( "MX.IRD.Subtypes", "ALL" ) is a utility LUT used to allow user to select subtype depending subregistration
( "MX.IRD.FInit-1", "ALL" ) contains diffrents initializations requested for each registration/subregistration/pattern
( "MX.IRD.OldField", "ALL" ) is a utility LUT used to get the name of UDF, which contain previous value of input field
( "MX.IRD.FInit-2","ALL" ) is a utility LUT used to execute a requested block

Version 1.0
This formule enables to open directly the additional flow screen on interest rate swap and currency swap patterns. 
*/

{
	pContract := This,
	
	// Field Initialization/Reset
	iComponent := 0,
	iNumComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
	sRegistration := "",
	sPattern := "",
    sPayout := "",
	sSubRegistration := "",
	sFilter := "",
	iSubtypeCounter := 0,
	iNbSubtypes := 0,
	sSubtype := "",
	iSubRegIteration := 0,
	sCurrentSubReg := "",
	iPatternIteration := 0,
	sCurrentPattern := "",
	iOrder := 0,
	bFinished := FALSE,
	bAutosetFit := FALSE,
	sOrder := "",
	sSetCondition := "",
	sFieldName := "",
	sValueFrom := "",
	sValueTo := "",
	sBlock := "",
	sOldFieldName := "",
	sError := "",
	bFitCurrentCriteria := FALSE,
	bFitOldCriteria := FALSE,
	sCurrentValue := "",
	sOldValue := "",
	iBlockOrder := 0,
	bBlockFinished := FALSE,
	bError2 := FALSE,
	sBlockOrder := "",
	sFieldValue := "",
	sFieldType := "",
	fFieldValue := 0.0,
	iFieldValue := 0,
    sCSA := "",
    sExerciseMode := "",
    sCashPhysical := "",
    sRangeStatus1 := "",
    sIndex2 := "",
	
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponents ) DO
	{
		pCurrentLeg := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
		
		// ***   1) Determine the Registration and Subregistration   *** //
        
        
    //BAB Addition - Tag deals eligible for WHT on profit
    sTypology := legGetString(pCurrentLeg,"Typology"),
    IF sTypology == "Sukuk Issuance" THEN 
    {
        dTradeDate := legGetDate(pCurrentLeg,"Trading_Date"), 
        dMaturityDate:=legGetDate(pCurrentLeg,"Maturity"),
        fNbOfDays := dMaturityDate - dTradeDate,
        fLimitDays := 90.0,
                
        sCounterparty := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Counterpart" ),
        sCtpCountry := ctpGetCountry(sCounterparty),
                
        IF ( fNbOfDays > fLimitDays AND sCtpCountry <> "SA" ) THEN
		legSetString(pCurrentLeg, "PROFIT_WHT","Yes")
        ELSE
        legSetString(pCurrentLeg, "PROFIT_WHT","No")
    },
    
      //BAB addition for blocking the booking of a sukuk issuance in Sales
      sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentLeg ),
      IF sPattern == "Sukuk HVA" OR sPattern == "Sukuk" THEN
      {
    	IF sTypology <> "Sukuk"  AND sTypology <> "Sukuk Fund" THEN
        {
        	ThrowError("Error","A wrong instrument was selected.")
        }
      },
      IF sPattern == "Sukuk Issuance" THEN
      {
      	IF sTypology <> "Sukuk Issuance" THEN
        {
        	ThrowError("Error","A wrong instrument was selected.")
        }
      },
      //end of BAB addition
      
        
		
		IF ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pCurrentLeg ) <> "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN	
		{
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pCurrentLeg )
		}
		ELSE
		{
			pFatherContract := legGetFatherContract( pCurrentLeg ),
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( pFatherContract )
		},
		
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pCurrentLeg ),
		sSubRegistration := lookupString( "MX.IRD.Subregs","ALL",
									"Registration",sRegistration,
									"Pattern",sPattern ),
		
        //Payout field for European swaptions and underlying CSA defaulting for physical swaptions
        IF ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" ) THEN
		{
			sStyle := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Option_style" ),
        	IF ( sStyle == "European" AND sSubRegistration == "Swaption European" ) THEN //Else the Payout pretrade field is not in the pattern
            {
            	sPayout := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "pf_EuroSwaptionPayout" ),
                sPayReceive := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout" ),
                sPayout_Type := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type" ),
                
            	
            	IF ( sPayout == "Payer" ) THEN
            	{
            		legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type","Standard"),
            	    legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout","Pay")
            	}
            	ELSE IF ( sPayout == "Receiver" ) THEN
            	{
                	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type","Standard"),
                	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout","Receive")
            	}
            	ELSE IF ( sPayout == "Straddle" ) THEN 
            	{
            		legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type","Straddle"),
            		legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout","Pay")
            	}
            },
            
            sCSA := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Collat. agreement categ"),
        	sExerciseMode := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Exercise Mode"),
        	sCashPhysical := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Exercise Settlement"),
        	IF ( ( sCashPhysical == "Physical" ) AND ( sExerciseMode == "Standard" ) ) THEN
        	{
            	legSetString(pCurrentLeg,"Underlying CSA",sCSA)
            }
            ELSE
            {
            	legSetString(pCurrentLeg,"Underlying CSA","CSA Swapclear")
            }
            
		}
        //Defaulting of underlying index for fixed ranges
        ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) THEN
		{
			sRangeStatus1 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Range_status1" ),
        	IF ( sRangeStatus1 == "Yes" ) THEN
            {
            	sIndex2 := legGetString( pCurrentLeg, "Index2" ),
            	legSetString( pCurrentLeg, "Range_Idx1", sIndex2 )
            }
        },
        
        
        
		IF ( sSubRegistration == "Credit Linked IRS" ) THEN
		{
			sCrLinked := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Credit linked" ),
			sReference := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference" ),
			sIssuer := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Issuer" ),
			sBond := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bond" ),
			sSeniority := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Seniority" ),
			sBasket := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket" ),
			sBasketNature := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket nature" ),
			sBasketComputationType := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket computation type" ),
			sBespoke := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bespoke" ),
			iNth := legGetInteger (pCurrentLeg,"Nth default" ),
			sDD := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Default details label" ),
			sRecoveryMode := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode" ),
			fAP := legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Init. tranche down" ),
			fDP := legGetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Init. tranche up" ),
			sBespoke := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bespoke" ),
			
			legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Credit linked2",sCrLinked ),
			legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Additional flows enable","Yes"),
			
			IF ( sReference == "Issuer" ) THEN
			{
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference2",sReference ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Issuer2",sIssuer ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Seniority2", sSeniority ), 
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Default details label2",sDD ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode2",sRecoveryMode )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference == "Bond" ) THEN 
			{
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference2",sReference ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bond2",sBond ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Default details label2",sDD ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode2",sRecoveryMode )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sReference == "Basket" ) THEN 
			{
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Reference2",sReference ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket nature2",sBasketNature ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket computation type2",sBasketComputationType ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Basket2",sBasket ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Default details label2",sDD ),
				legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Recovery mode2",sRecoveryMode ),
				IF ( sBasketComputationType == "Nth default" ) THEN
					legSetInteger( pCurrentLeg,"Nth default2",iNth )
				ELSE IF ( sBasketComputationType == "Synth. CDO" ) THEN 
				{
					legSetNumeric (pCurrentLeg,"Init. tranche down2",fAP ),
					legSetNumeric( pCurrentLeg,"Init. tranche up2",fDP ),
					legSetString( pCurrentLeg,"Bespoke2",sBespoke )
				}
			}
		}
		ELSE
		{
			// ***   2) Filter the list of subtypes appearing in the field SW_SUBTYPE  *** //
			
			sFilter := "SWP_TYPE==''",
			pSubtypes := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.Subtypes","ALL",
									"SubRegistration",sSubRegistration ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pSubtypes ) ) THEN
			{
				iSubtypeCounter := 0,
				iNbSubtypes := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pSubtypes ),
				sFilter := "",
				WHILE ( iSubtypeCounter < iNbSubtypes ) DO
				{
					sSubtype := lookupResultsGetString(pSubtypes,iSubtypeCounter, 0) ,
					sFilter := sFilter + "SWP_TYPE=='" + sSubtype + "'",
					IF ( ( iSubtypeCounter + 1 ) < iNbSubtypes ) THEN
						sFilter := sFilter + ".OR.",
					
					iSubtypeCounter := iSubtypeCounter + 1
				}
			},
			udfListSetFilter( pCurrentLeg,"SW_SUBTYPE",sFilter ),
			
			// ***   3) Initialize / set field values dynamically  *** //
			
			iSubRegIteration := 0,
			WHILE ( iSubRegIteration < 3 ) DO
			{
				IF ( iSubRegIteration == 0 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := "<common>"
				ELSE IF ( iSubRegIteration == 1 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := sSubRegistration
				ELSE IF ( iSubRegIteration == 2 ) THEN
					sCurrentSubReg := "<common - POST>",
				
				iPatternIteration := 0,
				WHILE ( iPatternIteration < 3 ) DO
				{
					IF ( iPatternIteration == 0 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := "<common>"
					ELSE IF ( iPatternIteration == 1 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := sPattern
					ELSE IF ( iPatternIteration == 2 ) THEN
						sCurrentPattern := "<common - POST>",
					
					iOrder := 0,
					bFinished := FALSE,
					WHILE ( NOT bFinished ) DO
					{
						bAutosetFit := FALSE,
						iOrder := iOrder + 1,
						sOrder := toString( iOrder ),
						IF ( strLen( sOrder ) == 1 ) THEN
							sOrder := "0" + sOrder,
						
						pAutosets := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.FInit-1","ALL",
												"Registration",sRegistration,
												"SubRegistration",sCurrentSubReg,
												"Pattern",sCurrentPattern,
												"Order",sOrder ),
						
						IF ( toString( pAutosets ) == "0" ) THEN
							bFinished := TRUE
						ELSE
						{
							sSetCondition := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosets,0,0 ),
							sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosets,0,1 ),
							sValueFrom := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosets,0,2 ),
							sValueTo := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosets,0,3 ),
							sBlock := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosets,0,4 ),
							IF ( strLen( sFieldName ) > 0 ) THEN
								sOldFieldName := lookupString( "MX.IRD.OldField","ALL",
														"Field Name",sFieldName ),
							
							sError := "",
							IF ( ( sSetCondition <> "Upon change only" ) AND ( sSetCondition <> "Overwrite" ) AND ( sSetCondition <> "Initialize" )) THEN 
								sError := sError + "Set Condition wrong or missing. "
							ELSE IF ( ( sFieldName == "" ) AND ( ( sSetCondition <> "Overwrite" ) OR ( sValueFrom <> "" ) OR ( sValueTo <> "" ) ) ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Field Name missing. ",
							IF ( ( strLen( sFieldName ) > 0 ) AND ( strLen( sOldFieldName ) == 0 ) ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Entry missing in ('MX.IRD.OldField','ALL') lookup table. ",
							IF ( sBlock == "" ) THEN
								sError := sError + "Block missing. ",
							
							bFitCurrentCriteria := FALSE,
							bFitOldCriteria := FALSE,
							
							IF ( sError == "" ) THEN
							{
								IF ( sSetCondition == "Overwrite" ) THEN
								{
									bFitCurrentCriteria := TRUE,
									bFitOldCriteria := TRUE
								},
								
								IF ( strLen( sFieldName ) > 0 ) THEN
								{
									sCurrentValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldName ),
									sOldValue := legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sOldFieldName ),
									
									IF ( sSetCondition == "Upon change only" ) THEN
									{
										bFitCurrentCriteria := ( ( sCurrentValue == sValueTo ) OR ( ( sValueTo == "(any)" ) AND ( sCurrentValue <> sOldValue ) ) ),
										bFitOldCriteria := ( ( sOldValue == sValueFrom ) OR ( ( sValueFrom == "(any)" ) AND ( sCurrentValue <> sOldValue ) ) )
									}
									ELSE
									{
										bFitCurrentCriteria := ( ( sCurrentValue == sValueTo ) OR ( ( sValueTo == "(any)" ) ) ),
										bFitOldCriteria := ( ( sOldValue == sValueFrom ) OR ( ( sValueFrom == "(any)" ) ) )
									}
								},
								
								IF ( ( bFitCurrentCriteria ) AND ( bFitOldCriteria ) ) THEN
								{
									iBlockOrder := 0,
									bBlockFinished := FALSE,
									bError2 := FALSE,
									
									WHILE ( NOT ( bBlockFinished ) ) DO
									{
										iBlockOrder := iBlockOrder + 1,
										sBlockOrder := toString( iBlockOrder ),
										
										IF ( strLen( sBlockOrder ) == 1 ) THEN
											sBlockOrder := "0" + sBlockOrder,
										
										pAutosetBlocksResults := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.FInit-2","ALL",
																		"Block",sBlock,
																		"Order",sBlockOrder ),
										
										IF ( lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines(pAutosetBlocksResults) > 1 ) THEN
											sError := sError + "Duplicate entries found in ('MX.IRD.FInit-2','ALL') lookup table. ",
										IF ( toString( pAutosetBlocksResults ) == "0" ) THEN
										{
											bBlockFinished := TRUE,
											IF ( iBlockOrder == 0 ) THEN
												sError:= sError + "No entry found in ('MX.IRD.FInit-2','ALL') lookup table. "
										}
										ELSE
										{
											sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosetBlocksResults,0,0 ),
											sFieldValue := lookupResultsGetString( pAutosetBlocksResults,0,1 ),
                                            sFieldType := legGetFieldType(pCurrentLeg, sFieldName),
											IF ( sFieldType == "invalid" ) THEN
												bError2 := TRUE,									
                                            
                                            IF ( NOT ( strStartsWith(sFieldValue, "VALUEOF:") ) ) THEN
                                            {
                                                IF ( sFieldType == "string" ) THEN
                                                {
                                                    IF ( sSetCondition == "Initialize" ) THEN 
                                                        legSetString( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, sFieldValue )
                                                    ELSE
                                                        legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, sFieldValue )
                                                }
                                                ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "numeric" ) THEN
                                                {
                                                    fFieldValue := convertSToNumeric( sFieldValue ),
                                                    IF ( sSetCondition == "Initialize" ) THEN 
                                                        legSetNumeric( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, fFieldValue )
                                                    ELSE
                                                        legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, fFieldValue )
                                                }
                                                ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "integer" ) THEN
                                                {
                                                    iFieldValue := toInt( convertSToNumeric( sFieldValue ) ),
                                                    IF ( sSetCondition == "Initialize" ) THEN 
                                                        legSetInteger( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, iFieldValue )
                                                    ELSE 
                                                        legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, iFieldValue )
                                                }
                                                ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "date" ) THEN
                                                {
                                                    dFieldValue := toDate( sFieldValue ),
                                                    IF ( sSetCondition == "Initialize" ) THEN 
                                                        legSetDate( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, dFieldValue )
                                                    ELSE
                                                        legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, dFieldValue )
                                                }
                                            }
                                            ELSE
                                            {
                                            	sFieldValue := strSubString(sFieldValue, strLength("VALUEOF:")),
                                            	IF ( sSetCondition == "Initialize" ) THEN 
													legSetString( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldValue ) )
												ELSE
													legOverwrite( pCurrentLeg, sFieldName, legGetString( pCurrentLeg,sFieldValue ) )
                                            }
										}
									},
									
									IF ( bError2 ) THEN
										sError := sError + "Error while parsing ('MX.IRD.FInit-2','ALL') lookup table. "
								}
							},
							
							IF ( sError <> "" ) THEN
								ThrowWarning( "","('MX.IRD.FInit-1','ALL') lookup table" + endline() + sError + " ( Registration = " + sRegistration + ", SubRegistration = " + sCurrentSubReg + ", Pattern = " + sCurrentPattern + ", Order = " + sOrder + ", Set Condition = " + sSetCondition + ", Field Name = " + sFieldName + ", Value From = " + sValueFrom + ", Value To = " + sValueTo + ", Block = " + sBlock + ")")
						}
					},
					iPatternIteration := iPatternIteration + 1
				},
				iSubRegIteration := iSubRegIteration + 1
			}
		},
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
        
    // For IRS Pricing Matrices only, force the Npv to 0 and force a fixed nominal value (avoid a reset to 0)
    pFather := legGetFather(pContract),
    IF ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "IRS" ) THEN
    {
    	//pContract is an IRS Vanilla in that case
        legSetLocalImplied(pContract,"Rate_Margin"),
        legOverwrite(pContract,"Npv",0.0),
        IF ( legGetNumeric(pContract,"Nominal") == 0.0 ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pContract,"Nominal",1000000.0)
    }
    ELSE IF ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "IRS Butterfly" ) THEN
    {
    	//pContract is an IRS Butterfly in that case
        legOverwrite(pContract,"pf_ButterflySolver","Equal Nominal"),
		IF ( legGetNumeric(legGetFirstComponent(pContract),"Nominal") == 0.0 ) THEN
    		legOverwrite(legGetFirstComponent(pContract),"Nominal",1000000.0)    
    }
    ELSE IF ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "IRS Tenor Spread" ) THEN
    {
		IF ( legGetNumeric(legGetFirstComponent(pContract),"Nominal") == 0.0 ) THEN
    		legOverwrite(legGetFirstComponent(pContract),"Nominal",1000000.0)    
    } 
    // Same for Inflation pricing matrices
    ELSE IF ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "Inflation Swaps" ) THEN
    {
        legSetLocalImplied(pContract,"Rate_Margin"),
        legOverwrite(pContract,"Npv",0.0),
        IF ( legGetNumeric(pContract,"Nominal") == 0.0 ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pContract,"Nominal",1000000.0)  
    }
    // For Non Linear IRD Pricing Matrices only, force a fixed nominal value (avoid a reset to 0) and an ATM strike     
    ELSE IF ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "ATM Straddles" OR legGetTitle(pFather) == "Mid curve swaptions" ) THEN
    {
        IF ( legGetNumeric(pCurrentLeg,"Nominal") == 0.0 ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Nominal",1000000.0),      
        IF ( legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Strike_delta") <> "ATMF" ) THEN
        {    
        	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg, "Strike", 0.0),	
        	legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg, "Strike_delta", "F")
        },
        IF ( legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Settlement_date_type") <> "Spot" ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg, "Settlement_date_type", "Spot"),
        IF ( ( legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Payout_Type") <> "Straddle" ) AND ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "ATM Straddles" ) ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type","Straddle"),
        IF ( ( legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Payout_Type") <> "Standard" ) AND ( legGetTitle(pFather) == "Mid curve swaptions" ) ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout_Type","Standard"),
        IF ( legGetString(pCurrentLeg, "Payout") <> "Pay" ) THEN
            legOverwrite(pCurrentLeg,"Payout","Pay")
    }            
    
};

//mx.preTrade.completion.SF.ALL.ShortDesc

/*
MXpress
Security Finance short text description rule

Used algorithm
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting or modifiying then
	If this scripted rule is executed at the booking sequence level then
		Retrieve the DIST_DESC value
	End if
	If this scripted rule is not executed at the booking sequence level or the DIST_DESC is empty then
		Retrieve few fields shared between all SF products
		If the registration is Equity retrun swaps then
			Build short text description accordingly
		Else if registration is Bond Repos, Basket Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, EQD Lending Borrowing and IRD Lending Borrowing then
			Build short text description accordingly
		End if
		Store built short description in the DIST_DESC UDF
	End if
End if

Version 1.8
Rounding of displayed quantity

Version 1.7
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.6
Amended to handle Bond return swaps
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.5
Amended to handle Basket Repos deals

Version 1.4
Amended to set the short description at the booking sequence level if required 

Version 1.3
Amended to handle EQD Lending Borrowing and IRD Lending Borrowing deals

Version 1.2
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.1
Adapt to handled the Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back registrations

Version 1.0
Initialization with Equity return swaps

Notes:
1. The short description is used in the eTradepad blotter, in the mail communication and worflows ( OSP ).
2. This value is stored in the DIST_DESC UDF
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( ( sAction == "INS" ) OR ( sAction == "MOD" ) ) ) THEN
	{
		bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
		IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			bBlotterDescriptionEmpty := legGetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC" ) == ""
		},
		
		IF ( ( NOT bIsInBookingSequence ) OR ( bBlotterDescriptionEmpty ) ) THEN
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent,"Trade purpose" ),
			
			IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
			{
				sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),  
				IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "Market price"       
				ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
					sheaderOrder := "Limit price"
			},
			
			// Text
			sBlotterDescription := "",
			sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := "",
			
			// For Equity return swaps and Bond return swaps
			IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" 
			OR sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
			{
				//Initialization
				sPerfPR := "",
				sFixingCur := "",
				sSecLabel := "",
				fQuantity := 0.0,
				sQuantity := "",
				fDivRetro := 0.0,
				sDivRetro := "",
				fRateFactor1 := 1.0,
				sRateFactor1 := "",
				sPayType1 := "",
				sFinancingPR := "",
				sFinancingLegType := "",
				sFinancingIndex := "",
				sPayType2 := "",
				fRateMargin := 0.0,
				sRateMargin := "",
				sNominal := "",
				sFinancingCur := "",
				
				//Performances leg
				sPerfPR := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive1" ),
				sFixingCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing currency0" ),
				sSecLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Security_Label" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,20,0,TRUE,0 ),
				
				fDivRetro := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ) * 100.00,
				sDivRetro := toString( fDivRetro,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
				fRateFactor1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate_factor" ) * 100.00,
				sRateFactor1 := toString( fRateFactor1,20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				IF ( fDivRetro == 0.0 ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance"
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of bond price performance"
				}
				ELSE IF ( fRateFactor1 == 0.0 ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sDivRetro + "% of dividends"
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of coupons"
				}    
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance and " + sDivRetro + "% of dividends"
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of bond price performance and " + sDivRetro + "% of coupons"
				},
				
				//Financing leg
				sFinancingPR := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive2" ),
				
				sFinancingLegType := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				IF ( sFinancingLegType == "Floating" ) THEN 
				{
					sFinancingIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Floating Rate" ),
					sPayType2 := sFinancingIndex + " + "
				},
				
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin" ),
				sRateMargin := toString( fRateMargin,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sRateMargin := sheaderOrder,
				sPayType2 := sPayType2 + sRateMargin + "%",
				
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"nominal (leg2)" ),
				sNominal := toString( ABS( fNominal ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sFinancingCur := legGetString(pComponent,"Perf Ccy 2" ),
				
				//Text
				IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sPerfPR + " " + sPayType1 + " in " + sFixingCur + " on " + sQuantity + " shares of " + sSecLabel + ". " + sFinancingPR + " " + sPayType2 + " on " + sNominal + " " + sFinancingCur + " nominal."
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sPerfPR + " " + sPayType1 + " in " + sFixingCur + " on " + sQuantity + " bonds of " + sSecLabel + ". " + sFinancingPR + " " + sPayType2 + " on " + sNominal + " " + sFinancingCur + " nominal."
				}
			}
			
			// For Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, IRD Lending Borrowing and EQD Lending Borrowing
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
			{
				//Initialization
				sSecPayout := "",
				sBSBSpotPayout := "",
				sBSBFwdPayout := "",
				sQuantity := "",
				sUnderlyingType := "",
				sSecurityLabel := "",
				sPriceType := "",
				sPrice := "",
				sSecCur := "",
				sFinancingPayout := "",
				sAmount := "",
				sAmountCur := "",
				sInterestPayout := "",
				sRate_Mrg := "",
				sTradingDate := "",
				sStartDate := "",
				sMaturityDate := "",
				sLotSize := "",
				sLotSizeText := "",
				sFeesPayout :="",
				
				 //Basket Repo initialization
				sCollateralMV := "",
				sCashPayout := "",
				sCollateralPayout := "",
				
				//Payout type
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) == "Borrow" ) THEN
				{
					sSecPayout := "Borrow",
					sBSBSpotPayout := "Buy",
					sBSBFwdPayout := "Sell",
					sFinancingPayout := "Lend",
					sInterestPayout := "Receive",
					sFeesPayout := "Pays"
				}
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) == "Lend" ) THEN
				{
					sSecPayout := "Lend",
					sBSBSpotPayout := "Sell",
					sBSBFwdPayout := "Buy",
					sFinancingPayout := "Borrow",
					sInterestPayout := "Pay",
					sFeesPayout := "Borrows"
				},
				
				//Convert Quantity to string
				sQuantity := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				//Get underlying type
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Bond" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType:="bonds"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Equity" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType:="equities"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Equity basket" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "equity baskets"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Warrant" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "warrants",
				
				//security label
				sSecurityLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Security Label" ),
				
				//get price display label
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sPriceType := "dirty price"
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) )THEN
					sPriceType := "price",
				
				//convert price to string
				sPrice := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Dirty price" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sPrice := sheaderOrder,
					
				//get security currency
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" )) THEN
					sSecCur := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Security Currency" ),
				
				//convert start amount to string 
				sAmount := toString( ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ) ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sAmount := "@" + sheaderOrder,
					
				//get financing leg currency
				sAmountCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
				
				//convert rate/margin to string
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ) == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sRate_Mrg := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
				ELSE
					sRate_Mrg := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency Index Label" ) + " + " + toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				
				//convert dates to string
				dTradingDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ),
				sTradingDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Trading Date" ) ),
				sStartDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ) ),
				
				IF ( strToUpperCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity period" ) ) == "OPEN" ) THEN
					sMaturityDate := "undefined"
				ELSE
					sMaturityDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ) ),
				
				//Get security lotsize
				sLotSize := toString( securityGetLotSize( secGetSecurityData( sSecurityLabel ) ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sLotSize <> "1.00" ) THEN
					sLotSizeText := " (lotsize:" + sLotSize + ")"
				ELSE
					sLotSizeText := "",
				
				//Text
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sSecPayout + " " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " at " + sPrice + sSecCur + ". "
							+ sFinancingPayout + " " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + " and " + sInterestPayout + " " + sRate_Mrg + " on this amount.",
					sTextDates := "Expiry " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" ) ) THEN
				{
				
				  //Payout type (Basket Repo)
					IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Cash_payout" ) == "Cash lend" ) THEN
					{
						sCashPayout := "Lend",
						sCollateralPayout := "Hold"
					}
					ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Cash_payout" ) == "Cash borrow" ) THEN
					{
						sCashPayout := "Borrow",
						sCollateralPayout := "Provide"
					},
					
					//Convert Collateral MV (for Basket Repo) to string
					sCollateralMV := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Basket_market_value" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
					
					sBlotterDescription := sCollateralPayout + " " + sCollateralMV +  " " + sAmountCur + " of collateral securities."
							+ " " +sCashPayout + " " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + " and " + sInterestPayout + " " + sRate_Mrg + " on this amount.",
					sTextDates := "Expiry " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sBSBSpotPayout + " " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " on " + sStartDate + " at " + sPrice + sSecCur + ", and " + sBSBFwdPayout + " them back on " + sMaturityDate,
					IF ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) THEN
						sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " at " + sPrice + sSecCur + "."
					ELSE
						sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + ".",
					
					sTextDates := "Expiry " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					sBlotterDescription := sSecPayout + " " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " at " + sPrice + sSecCur + ". "
							+ sFeesPayout + " a " + sRate_Mrg + " fee, amount equal to "  + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + ".",
					sTextDates := "Expiry " + sMaturityDate + "."
				},
				
				//Text
				sBlotterDescription := sBlotterDescription + " " + sTextDates
			},
			
			// Blotter and communication
			IF ( strLength( sBlotterDescription ) < 250 ) THEN
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescription )
			ELSE
			{
				sBlotterDescriptionTruncated := strSubString( sBlotterDescription, 0, 249 ),
				legSetString( pComponent,"DIST_DESC",sBlotterDescriptionTruncated ),
				ThrowLowPriorityWarning( pComponent,"The short description field DIST_DESC has to be truncated ( ShortDesc SF rule )","DIST_DESC" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.SF.Closing.LayDyn

/*
MXpress
Security Finance Dynamic Layout rule (Management of Patterns Field Properties)

Used algorithm:
If leg is initialized then
	Loop on all components
		Retrieve the registration
		Reset all properties
		If Communication or Tradability checks are active then
			Add properties accordingly
		End if
		If BlockTrade check is active then
			Add properties accordingly
		End if
		If the registration is Equity return swaps then
			Add properties accordingly
		Else if the registration is Bond Repos, Basket Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back or Equity buy/sell back then
			Add properties accordingly
		Else if registration is EQD Lending Borrowing or IRD Lending Borrowing then
			Add properties accordingly
		End if
	End loop
End if

Version 1.13
Use LayDynCommon generic rule

Version 1.12
- Removed handling hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad, as it is natively embedded

Version 1.11
Addition of the field properties related to maturity structure (Standard, Evergreen, Extendable) 

Version 1.10
- Handle hardcoded fields when repricing a booked trade in the e-Tradepad

Version 1.9
Addition of Bond return swaps
Amendments to handle:
- use the common block taxonomies
- trade origin order id for trades issued from orders

Version 1.8
Amendments to handle back to back fields

Version 1.7
- Amended to handle Basket Repos

Version 1.6
- Amended to handle EQD Lending Borrowing and IRD Lending Borrowing deals

Version 1.5
- When communication or tradability check is active, the following field property is now added: ers_1.5_tradabilityStatus and phys_2.5_tradabilityStatus
	This will enable the display of the DIST_STAT field which is used to store the Tradability status of the transaction.

Version 1.4
Add a loop on components, to handle dynamic layouts fields for Strategies
Correct a wrong behaviour on Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back

Version 1.3
If the BlockTrade check is active, the portfolio/allocation matrix field is added depending on blocktrade field value
A new Look-Up Table is used:
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains informations on availability for the BlockTrade check

Version 1.2
Adapt this scripted rule to handled the Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, IRD Lending Borrowing and EQD Lending Borrowing products

Version 1.1
Changes in the field properties labels, following the refactoring of the taxonomy trees

Version 1.0
Initialization with Equity return swaps products

*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field initialization/reset
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		sRegistration := "",
		fDivPayFraction := 0.0,
		sLeg2Type := "",
		sLeg3Type := "",
		sSecurityCur := "",
		sLeg1FixingCur := "",
		sTreatCollateral:="",
		
		// loop on all components
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			
			// Reset the Field Properties for the component
			legResetProperties( pComponent ),
            
			//addtion for BAB for PreDealChecks on Bond Repo deals, to display Breach Reason when a beach is detected
                pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
			    iMsg:=0,
				iNbMsgSanity := messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages, "Sane-" ),
			
                WHILE ( iMsg < iNbMsgSanity ) DO
                {
                pMessage := messagesGetMessageFromCodeAt( pAllMessages,"Sane-",iMsg ),
                IF strCONTAIN(messageGetCode(pMessage),"Breach") THEN
                legAddProperty( pComponent,"common_0.1.4.3_preDealReason" ),
                
                iMsg:=iMsg+1
                },//End of BAB addition
                
			IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" 
				OR sRegistration == "Bond return swaps"	) THEN
			{
				sSecurityCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Security Currency" ),
				sLeg1FixingCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing currency0" ),
				IF ( sSecurityCur <> sLeg1FixingCur ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"ers_1.1_crossCurrency" ),
				
				fDivPayFraction := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ),
				IF ( fDivPayFraction <> 0.0 ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"ers_1.2_dividendSpecific" ),
				
				sLeg2Type := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				IF ( sLeg2Type == "Floating" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"ers_1.3_floatingLeg" )
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) ) THEN
			{
				sSecurityCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Security Currency" ),
				sFinancingCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
				IF ( sSecurityCurrency <> sFinancingCurrency ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.1_crossCurrency" ),
				
				sLeg2Type := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				IF ( sLeg2Type == "Floating" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.3_floatingLeg" ),
				
				sMaturityPeriod := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity period" ),
				IF ( ( strToUpperCase( sMaturityPeriod ) <> "OPEN" ) AND ( sLeg2Type <> "Floating" ) ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.2_maturitySpecific" ),
				
				sMaturityStructure := legGetString(pComponent, "Maturity structure"),
				
				IF ( sMaturityStructure <> "Standard") THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.10_maturityPeriod")
			}
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
			{
				sSecurityCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Security Currency" ),
				sFinancingCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
				IF ( sSecurityCurrency <> sFinancingCurrency ) THEN
				{
					IF ( legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Fx Rate") <> 1.0 ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.9_xccyNonNdxedFees" ) 
					ELSE IF ( legGetNumeric(pComponent,"First FX rate") <> 1.0 ) THEN
						legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.7_xccyNdxedFees" )
				},
				sLeg2Type := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				sLeg3Type := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type3" ),
				IF ( sLeg2Type == "Floating" ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.3_floatingLeg" ),
				
				sTreatCollateral := legGetString( pComponent,"Treat collateral" ),
				IF ( ( sLeg3Type == "Floating" ) AND (sTreatCollateral  == "On deal level") ) THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.6_floatingCollat" ),
				
				IF ( sTreatCollateral  == "On deal level" )  THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.8_collateralActivated" ),
				
				sMaturityStructure := legGetString(pComponent, "Maturity structure"),
				
				IF ( sMaturityStructure <> "Standard") THEN
					legAddProperty( pComponent,"phys_2.10_maturityPeriod")
			},
			//RFR_SF
sPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pComponent),
sRFRCheck := lookupString ("BAB.ALL.RFRCHECK","ALL","Registration",sRegistration,"Pattern",sPattern),

IF (sRFRCheck == "BR_Murabaha") THEN
{
sInstrument := legGetString (pComponent, "Instrument"),
IF (sInstrument == "FLOATING REPO") THEN
{
sIndex := legGetString (pComponent ,"Currency_Index_Label"),
pRFRIndex :=  indexGetIndexByLabel(sIndex),

IF ( NOT isNull( pRFRIndex ) ) THEN
{
sIndexResetMode := indexGetResetMode(pRFRIndex),
IF sIndexResetMode <> "Published" THEN
{
legAddProperty(pComponent,"rfr_1.1_structure"),
pSTRUCT := legGetUserFields (pComponent),
udfSetString(pSTRUCT,"STRUCTURE","Single Murabaha")
}
}

}
},
///end of RFR
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	},
	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "SF")	
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.SF.Closing.SanityCheck

/*
MXpress SF Specific completion

Version 2.2
Call SanityCheckCommon function for Common Santity Checks

Version 2.1
- Counterparty is optional for what if (draft trades)

Version 2.0

Notes:
The goal of this rule is to analyze every leg/component of a transaction and check if they are sane.
When a sanity check is not fulfilled, a warning or error code is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	None

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Sanity warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
For Sanity error
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	Booking is prevented
For Sanity error Intrusive
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Sane-Intrusive-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message pops up systematically. Very intrusive for the user.
	Booking is prevented
*/

{
	callPreTradeFormula(This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.SanityCheckCommon", "SF")
	/*
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sPattern := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	pAllMessages := pNULL,

	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg ,iCount ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
		
		iCount := iCount + 1
	}*/
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.SF.Closing.TradabilityCheck

/*
MXpress SF Specific completion

Version 2.3
Call TradabilityCheckCommon function for Common Tradability Checks

Version 2.2
Applied MSL best practices

Version 2.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

Version 2.0

Notes:
If the tradability is active, the goal of this rule is to analyse every component of a transaction and check if they are tradable.
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
	Generic Common Tradability Checks (See TradabilityCheckCommon for codes)

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accessible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accessible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	->  legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accessible by clicking on exclamation mark
	For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
	For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		sIsTradabilityCheckActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","TradabilityCheck.SF" ) ),
		IF ( ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = TradabilityCheck.SF ( should be YES or NO )" ),
		
		IF ( sIsTradabilityCheckActive == "YES" ) THEN
			callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon","SF" )
	}
};

//mx.preTrade.completion.SF.Closing.TxtDesc.Generic

/*
MXpress
Security Finance Generic Text Description

Used algorithm
If the leg is initialised and deal is inserting and the generate trade or Processing/Inser trade has not been used then
If the registration is Equity return swaps then
	Initialized fields
	Build text description accordingly
Else if registration is Bond Repos,Basket Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, EQD Lending Borrowing and IRD Lending Borrowing then
	Initialized fields
	Build text description accordingly
End if
Append built text description
End

Version 1.9
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.8
Updated to display the legal entity instead the financial institution label

Version 1.7
Amended to handle Bond return swaps
Adapt description for case of orders

Version 1.6
Amended to prevent the display of the text area in case of using generate trade or Processing/Inser trade

Version 1.5
Amended to handle Basket Repos

Version 1.4
Amended to handle Basket Equity return swap

Version 1.3
Amended to handle EQD Lending Borrowing and IRD Lending Borrowing deals

Version 1.2
The description is build when the current deal is modified too

Version 1.1
Adapt this scripted rule to handled the Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back products

Version 1.0
The description is used in the eTradepad Text Area
This description is a general description of the product
Handled products are: Equity return swaps

This rule is designed for SF products, it uses a Look-Up Table (LUT):
( MX.ALL.GParam,ALL ) contains global parameters ( especially the financial institution )
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sIsInGenerateTradeScreen := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.preTradeTicketDisplay" ),
	sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.insertTradeTicketDisplay" ),

	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) 
	AND ( sIsInGenerateTradeScreen <> "YES" ) AND ( sIsInsertTradeTicketDisplay <> "YES" ) ) THEN
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
		pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
		pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pContract ),
		
		// Field initialization/reset
		sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
		sEntity := ptfGetLegalEntity( sPortfolio ),
		IF ( sEntity == "" ) THEN
			sWho := "Entity "
		ELSE
			sWho := sEntity + " ",
		
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		sTradePurpose := legGetString( pComponent,"Trade purpose" ),
		
		IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
		{
			sTemplate := legGetString( pComponent, "Order_template" ),  
			sWho :=  sTemplate + " Order: " + sWho,
			IF ( sTemplate == "Market" ) THEN
				sheaderOrder := " @ Market price"
			ELSE IF ( sTemplate == "Limit" OR sTemplate == "Stop loss" ) THEN
				sheaderOrder := " @ Limit price"
		},
		
		// Text
		sTextDescriptionGeneric := "",
		pText := npLegGetTextField( pLeg ),
		npTextFieldClear( pText ),
		
		IF ( isNull( pPackage ) ) THEN //If there is a package
		{
			// For Equity return swaps and Bond return swaps
			IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" 
				OR sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
			{
				//Initialization
				sPerfPR := "",
				sFixingCur := "",
				sSecLabel := "",
				fQuantity := 0.0,
				sQuantity := "",
				fDivRetro := 0.0,
				sDivRetro := "",
				fRateFactor1 := 1.0,
				sRateFactor1 := "",
				sPayType1 := "",
				sFinancingLegType := "",
				sFinancingPR := "",
				sFinancingIndex := "",
				sPayType2 := "",
				sRateMargin := "",
				fNominal := 0.0,
				sNominal := "",
				sFinancingCur := "",
				sTradingDate := "",
				sEffectiveDate := "",
				sMaturity := "",
				sSecurityMarket := "",
				iNbDiv := 0,
				sPayDate := "",
				sExdivDate := "",
				sDivCur := "",
				sDivValue := "",
				sNextDivFall := "",
				sTextDates := "",
				sTextError := "",
				
				//Performances leg
				sPerfPR := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive1" ) ),
				
				sFixingCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing currency0" ),
				sSecLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Security_Label" ),
				fQuantity := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),
				sQuantity := toString( fQuantity,20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				fDivRetro := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ) * 100.00,
				sDivRetro := toString( fDivRetro,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
				fRateFactor1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate_factor" ) * 100.00,
				sRateFactor1 := toString( fRateFactor1,20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				IF ( fDivRetro == 0.0 ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance"

					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of bond price performance"
				}
				ELSE IF ( fRateFactor1 == 0.0 ) THEN
				{

					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sDivRetro + "% of dividends"

					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of coupons"
				}    
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance and " + sDivRetro + "% of dividends"

					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
						sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of bond price performance and " + sDivRetro + "% of coupons"
				},

				//Financing leg
				sFinancingPR := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive2" ) ),
				
				sFinancingLegType := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				IF ( sFinancingLegType == "Floating" ) THEN 
				{
					sFinancingIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Floating Rate" ),
					sPayType2 := sFinancingIndex + " + "
				},
				
				fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin" ),
				sRateMargin := toString( fRateMargin,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sRateMargin := sheaderOrder,
				sPayType2 := sPayType2 + sRateMargin + "%",
				
				fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"nominal (leg2)" ),
				sNominal := toString( ABS( fNominal ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				sFinancingCur := legGetString(pComponent,"Perf Ccy 2" ),
				
				//Dates
				dTradingDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ),
				sTradingDate := toString1( dTradingDate ),
				sEffectiveDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Effective Date" ) ),
				sMaturity := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ) ),
				
				//Text
				IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" ) THEN
				{
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sPerfPR + "s " + sPayType1 + " in " + sFixingCur + " on " + sQuantity + " shares of " + sSecLabel + "."
								+ endline( ) + endline( )
								+ sWho + sFinancingPR + "s " + sPayType2 + " on " + sNominal + " " + sFinancingCur + " nominal."
				}
				ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" ) THEN
				{
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sPerfPR + "s " + sPayType1 + " in " + sFixingCur + " on " + sQuantity + " bonds of " + sSecLabel + "."
								+ endline( ) + endline( )
								+ sWho + sFinancingPR + "s " + sPayType2 + " on " + sNominal + " " + sFinancingCur + " nominal."
				},
				sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( )+ "The trading date is "+ sTradingDate + ", the effective date is " + sEffectiveDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturity + ".",
				
				//Next dividend fall
				sSecurityMarket := legGetString( pComponent,"Market" ),
				pDivs := eqOpenDividends( sSecLabel,sSecurityMarket,dTradingDate,dTradingDate + 368,0 ),
				iNbDiv := eqGetDividendsNumber( pDivs ),
				IF ( iNbDiv > 0 ) THEN
				{
					pDiv := eqGetDividend( pDivs,0 ),
					sPayDate := toString1( eqGetDividendPaymentDate( pDiv ) ),
					sExdivDate := toString1( eqGetDividendExDivDate( pDiv ) ),
					sDivValue := toString( eqGetDividendValue( pDiv ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
					sDivCur := eqGetDividendCurrency( pDiv ),
					
					IF ( sRegistration == "Equity return swaps" )  THEN
					{
						sNextDivFall := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The next dividend falls on " + sPayDate + ", the ex-dividend date is " + sExdivDate + ", and the dividend value is " + sDivValue + " " +  sDivCur + "."
					}
					ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Bond return swaps" )  THEN
					{
						sNextDivFall := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The next coupon falls on " + sPayDate + ", the ex-dividend date is " + sExdivDate + ", and the coupon value is " + sDivValue + " " +  sDivCur + "."
					}
				},
				eqCloseDividends( pDivs )
			}
			// For Bond Repos, Equity Repos, Bond buy/sell back, Equity buy/sell back, IRD Lending Borrowing and EQD Lending Borrowing
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) 
				OR ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) 
				OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
			{
				//Initialization
				sSecPayout := "",
				sBSBSpotPayout := "",
				sBSBFwdPayout := "",
				sFinancingPayout := "",
				sInterestPayout := "",
				sFeesPayout := "",
				sQuantity := "",
				sUnderlyingType := "",
				sSecurityLabel := "",
				sPriceType := "",
				sPrice := "",
				sSecCur := "",
				sAmount := "",
				sAmountCur := "",
				sCollateral := "",
				sCollateralCur := "",
				sRateMrg := "",
				sCollateralRateMrg := "",
				sTradingDate := "",
				sStartDate := "",
				sMaturityDate := "",
				sIncomeType := "",
				sLotSize := "",
				sTextDescriptionGeneric := "",
				sTextDates := "",
				sSecurityMarket := "",
				iNbDiv := 0,
				sPayDate := "",
				sExdivDate := "",
				sDivCur := "",
				sDivValue := "",
				sNextDivFall := "",
				sSecurity := "",
				iStartPeriod := 0,
				sCouponDates := "",
				sBondNextCallDate := "",
				bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull := FALSE,
				sBondNextPutDate := "",
				bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull := FALSE,
				sCallPutGlobalMessage := "",
				sCallPutMessage := "",
				sCallPutDates := "",
				sTextError := "",
				sFeeMode := "",
				sCollateralLegActivated := "",
				sSecColPayout := "",
				
				//Basket Repo: initialization 
				sCollateralMV := "",
				sCashPayout := "",
				sCollateralPayout := "",
				
				//Payout type
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) == "Borrow" ) THEN
				{
					sSecPayout := "borrows",
					sSecColPayout:="borrow",
					sBSBSpotPayout := "buys",
					sBSBFwdPayout := "sell",
					sFinancingPayout := "lends",
					sInterestPayout := "receives",
					sFeesPayout := "pays"
				}
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ) == "Lend" ) THEN
				{
					sSecPayout := "lends",
					sSecColPayout:="lend",
					sBSBSpotPayout := "sells",
					sBSBFwdPayout := "buy",
					sFinancingPayout := "borrows",
					sInterestPayout := "pays",
					sFeesPayout := "receives"
				},
				   
				//Convert Quantity to string
				sQuantity := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Quantity" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				//Get underlying type
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Bond" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "bonds"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Equity" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "equities"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Equity basket" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "equity baskets"
				ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Security" ) == "Warrant" ) THEN
					sUnderlyingType := "warrants",
				
				//security label
				sSecurityLabel := legGetString( pComponent,"Security Label" ),
				
				//get price display label
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sPriceType := "dirty price"
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sPriceType := "price",
				
				//convert price to string
				sPrice := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Dirty price" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
                
                IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
					sPrice := sheaderOrder,
                    
				IF ( ( sRegistration <> "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) AND ( sRegistration <> "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sEndDirtyPrice := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"End dirty price" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				
				//get security currency
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sSecCur := " " + legGetString( pComponent,"Security Currency" ),
				
				//convert start amount and collateral to string 
				sAmount := toString( ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ) ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sCollateral := toString( ABS( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"nominal (leg3)" ) ),20,2,TRUE,0 ), 
				
				//get financing leg and collateral currency
				sAmountCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sCollateralCur := legGetString( pComponent,"nom.(leg3) unit" ), 
				
				//convert rate/margin to string
				IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ) == "Fixed" ) THEN
					sRateMrg := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
				ELSE
					sRateMrg := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency Index Label" ) + " + " + toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%",
				
				//convert rate/margin to string
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type3" ) == "Fixed" ) THEN
						sCollateralRateMrg := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Collateral Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
					ELSE
						sCollateralRateMrg := legGetString( pComponent,"Collateral index" ) + " + " + toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Collateral Rate Margin" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ) + "%"
				},
				
				//Computing the fee mode of LB deal
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Indexation2 status" ) =="Yes" ) THEN
						sFeeMode:="an indexed"
					ELSE
						sFeeMode := "a fixed"
				},
				
				//convert dates to string
				dTradingDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ),
				sTradingDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent, "Trading Date" ) ),
				sStartDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent, "Start date" ) ),
				
				IF ( strToUpperCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity period" ) ) == "OPEN" ) THEN
					sMaturityDate := "undefined"
				ELSE
					sMaturityDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent, "Maturity" ) ),
				
				//Get income display label
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sIncomeType := "coupon"
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
					sIncomeType := "dividend",
				
				//CollateralLegActivated
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Treat collateral" ) == "On deal level" ) THEN
						sCollateralLegActivated := endline( ) + endline( ) + "Security " + sSecColPayout + " is collateralized by a cash delivery."
				},
				
				//Get security lotsize
				sLotSize := toString( securityGetLotSize( secGetSecurityData( sSecurityLabel ) ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
				IF ( sLotSize <> "1.00" ) THEN
					sLotSizeText := " (lotsize:" + sLotSize + ")",
				
				//Text
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) ) THEN
				{
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sSecPayout + " a quantity of " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " at a unitary " + sPriceType + " of " + sPrice + sSecCur + "."
							+ endline( ) + endline( )
							+ sWho + sFinancingPayout + " " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + " and " + sInterestPayout + " " + sRateMrg + " on this amount.",
                    IF ( sTradePurpose == "Order" ) THEN
                    {
						sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sSecPayout + " a quantity of " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " at a unitary " + sPriceType + sPrice + sSecCur + "."
											+ endline( ) + endline( )
											+ sWho + sFinancingPayout + " " + sAmountCur + sheaderOrder + " and " + sInterestPayout + " " + sRateMrg + " on this amount."
                    },

					sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The trading date is " + sTradingDate + ", the start date is " + sStartDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
                ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Basket Repos" ) ) THEN
				{
					//Convert Collateral MV (for Basket Repo) to string (should be included under this condition)
					sCollateralMV := toString( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Basket_market_value" ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
										   
					//Basket Repo: Payout type (should be included under this condition)
					IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Cash_payout" ) == "Cash lend" ) THEN
					{
						sCashPayout := "lends",     
						sCollateralPayout := "holds"                 
					}
					ELSE IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"Cash_payout" ) == "Cash borrow" ) THEN
					{
						sCashPayout := "borrows",
						sCollateralPayout := "provides"
					},               
					
					//Basket Repo: text content
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sCollateralPayout + " " + sCollateralMV + " " + sAmountCur + " of collateral securities."
											+ endline( ) + endline( )
											+ sWho + sCashPayout + " " + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + " and " + sInterestPayout + " " + sRateMrg + " on this amount.",
					sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The trading date is " + sTradingDate + ", the start date is " + sStartDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) ) THEN
				{
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sBSBSpotPayout + " a quantity of " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " on " + sStartDate + " at a unitary " + sPriceType + " of " + sPrice + sSecCur + ", and agrees to " + sBSBFwdPayout + " them back on " + sMaturityDate,
					IF ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) THEN
						sTextDescriptionGeneric := sTextDescriptionGeneric + " at a forward unitary " + sPriceType + " of " + sEndDirtyPrice + sSecCur + "."
					ELSE
						sTextDescriptionGeneric := sTextDescriptionGeneric + ".",
					
					sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The trading date is " + sTradingDate + ", the settlement date is " + sStartDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturityDate + "."
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sSecPayout + " a quantity of " + sQuantity + " " + sSecurityLabel + " " + sUnderlyingType + sLotSizeText + " at a unitary " + sPriceType + " of " + sPrice + sSecCur + "."
							+ endline( ) + endline( )
							+ sWho + sFeesPayout + " a " + sRateMrg + " fee based on " + sFeeMode + " amount equal to "  + sAmount + " " + sAmountCur + ".",
					
					sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The trading date is " + sTradingDate + ", the start date is " + sStartDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturityDate + "."
				},
				
				//Get Next dividend fall
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					sSecurityMarket := legGetString( pComponent,"Market" ),
					pDivs := eqOpenDividends( sSecurityLabel,sSecurityMarket,dTradingDate,dTradingDate + 368,0 ),
					iNbDiv := eqGetDividendsNumber( pDivs ),
					IF ( iNbDiv > 0 ) THEN
					{
						pDiv := eqGetDividend( pDivs,0 ),
						sPayDate := toString1( eqGetDividendPaymentDate( pDiv ) ),
						sExdivDate := toString1( eqGetDividendExDivDate( pDiv ) ),
						sDivValue := toString( eqGetDividendValue( pDiv ),20,2,TRUE,0 ),
						sDivCur := eqGetDividendCurrency( pDiv ),
						
						sNextDivFall := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The next " + sIncomeType + " falls on " + sPayDate + ", the ex-dividend date is " + sExdivDate + ", and the dividend value is " + sDivValue + " " + sDivCur + "."
					},
					eqCloseDividends( pDivs )
				}
				//Get Next coupon fall
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" ) OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" ) OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" ) ) THEN
				{
					sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent, "Security Label" ) ,
					IF ( sSecurity <> "" ) THEN
					{
						pContainer := npOpen( ),
						pSecurity := npAddLeg( pContainer,"Bond" ) ,
						legOverwrite( pSecurity,"Instrument",sSecurity ) ,
						
						pBStreams := legGetStreams( pSecurity ) ,
						pBStream := streamsGetStream( pBStreams,0,0 ),
						
						dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start date" ),
						
						iStartPeriod := streamGetNumberOfPeriodsBetween( pBStream,streamGetStartDate( pBStream ),dStartDate ),
						sCouponDates := toString1( streamGetPeriodPaymentDate( pBStream,iStartPeriod ) ),
						
						// get Next Bond Call/Put dates
						pSecurity2 := secGetSecurityData( sSecurity ),
						dBondNextCallDate := bondGetNextCallDate( pSecurity2,dStartDate ),
						sBondNextCallDate := toString1( dBondNextCallDate ),
						bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull := sBondNextCallDate <> "",
						dBondNextPutDate := bondGetNextPutDate( pSecurity2,dStartDate ),
						sBondNextPutDate := toString1( dBondNextPutDate ),
						bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull := sBondNextPutDate <> "",
						sCallPutGlobalMessage := "",
						
						npClose( pContainer )
					},
					
					IF ( bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull ) OR ( bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull ) THEN
					{
						IF ( ( NOT ( bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull ) ) AND ( bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull ) ) THEN
						{
							sCallPutMessage := "The next call date is: ",
							sCallPutDates := sBondNextCallDate
						}
						ELSE IF ( ( bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull ) AND ( NOT ( bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull ) ) ) THEN
						{
							sCallPutMessage := "The next put date is: ",
							sCallPutDates := sBondNextPutDate
						}
						ELSE IF ( ( bBondNextCallDateIsNotNull ) AND ( bBondNextPutDateIsNotNull ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sBondNextCallDate < sBondNextPutDate ) THEN
							{
								sCallPutMessage := "The next call date is: ",
								sCallPutDates := sBondNextCallDate
							}
							ELSE
							{
								sCallPutMessage := "The next put date is: ",
								sCallPutDates := sBondNextPutDate
							}
						},
						sCallPutGlobalMessage := endline( ) + endline( ) + sCallPutMessage + sCallPutDates + "."
					},
					
					sNextDivFall := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The next " + sIncomeType + " falls on " + sCouponDates + "." + sCallPutGlobalMessage
				}
			}
		}
		ELSE
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
			
			//Initialization
			sPerfPR := "",
			sFixingCur := "",
			fDivRetro := 0.0,
			sDivRetro := "",
			fRateFactor1 := 1.0,
			sRateFactor1 := "",
			sPayType1 := "",
			sFinancingLegType := "",
			sFinancingPR := "",
			sFinancingIndex := "",
			sPayType2 := "",
			sRateMargin := "",
			sTradingDate := "",
			sEffectiveDate := "",
			sMaturity := "",
			sTextDates := "",
			sTextError := "",
			
			//Performances leg
			sPerfPR := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive1" ) ),
			
			sFixingCur := legGetString( pComponent,"Fixing currency0" ),
			
			fDivRetro := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Divs payment fraction" ) * 100.00,
			sDivRetro := toString( fDivRetro,15,2,TRUE,0 ),
			fRateFactor1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate_factor" ) * 100.00,
			sRateFactor1 := toString( fRateFactor1,20,2,TRUE,0 ),
			
			IF ( fDivRetro == 0.0 ) THEN
				sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance"
			ELSE IF ( fRateFactor1 == 0.0 ) THEN
				sPayType1 := sDivRetro + "% of dividends"
			ELSE
				sPayType1 := sRateFactor1 + "% of stock price performance and " + sDivRetro + "% of dividends",
			
			//Financing leg
			sFinancingPR := strToLowerCase( legGetString( pComponent,"Pay/Receive2" ) ),
			
			sFinancingLegType := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
			IF ( sFinancingLegType == "Floating" ) THEN 
			{
				sFinancingIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Floating Rate" ),
				sPayType2 := sFinancingIndex + " + "
			},
			
			fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Rate/Margin" ),
			sRateMargin := toString( fRateMargin,20,4,TRUE,0 ),
			sPayType2 := sPayType2 + sRateMargin + "%",
			
			//Dates
			dTradingDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ),
			sTradingDate := toString1( dTradingDate ),
			sEffectiveDate := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Effective Date" ) ),
			sMaturity := toString1( legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ) ),
			
			//Text
			sTextDescriptionGeneric := sWho + sPerfPR + "s " + sPayType1 + " in " + sFixingCur + " on a basket of equities."
						+ endline( ) + endline( )
						+ sWho + sFinancingPR + "s " + sPayType2 + ".",
			sTextDates := endline( ) + endline( ) + "The trading date is "+ sTradingDate + ", the effective date is " + sEffectiveDate + ", and the end date is " + sMaturity + "."
		},
		
		//Text
		pText := npLegGetTextField( pLeg ),
		npTextFieldClear( pText ),
		npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sTextDescriptionGeneric ),
		npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sCollateralLegActivated ),
		npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sTextDates ),
		npTextFieldAppendString( pText,sNextDivFall )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.hedge.FXD.Booking.Hedge-ALL

/*
MXpress
FXD Delta Hedge

Version 1.10
If the option is non deliverable, then the hedge is also non deliverable with same archiving group

Version 1.9
Remove check on Tradability status

Version 1.8
Replacement of DIST_USER1 by pf_RFQ_Requester, DIST_USER2 by pf_RFQ_Provider, DIST_STAT by pf_TradabilityStatus

Version 1.7
Prevent the hedge creation in case the trade is not tradable

Version 1.6
Use the legGetRegistration function instead the ( MX.ALL.FCCLabel,ALL ) LUT 

Version 1.5
Replace usage of UDF HEDGE_DATE, HEDGE_PRICE and HEDGE_BS
by native fields Hedge_date,  Hedge_price and pre-trade field pf_hedge_BS

Version 1.4
Replace usage of UDF HEDGE_AMT and HEDGE_CUR by native fields Hedge_amt and Hedge_currency

Version 1.3
Propagate the Trade purpose value

Version 1.2
Protect the formula when applied on a strategy

Version 1.1.bis
Correct the sHedgeType value

Version 1.1
Applied MXpress scripted-rules conventions

Version 1.0

Notes:
1. The hedging Input parameters are computed in closing rules. 
2. It's only for fx delta hedge for the moment.
3. Hedging rules :
	1)  For a simple deal, the hedge for the deal being booked according to the hedge type
	2)  For structured deals, the hedge is combined using the following rules:
		- if the price and the counterpart are the same, aggregate the hedging (total delta)
		- otherwise, multiple hedges are booked
4. An array is used to regroup the hedging.
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	fHedgeAmt := 0.0,
	sHedgeCcy := "",
	sPtfContext := "",
	iIndex := 0,
	iCount := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sInstrument := "",
	sDefaultSpotQuotMode := "",
	sArchivingGroup := "",
	sArchivingColumn := "",
	sHedgeType := "",
	sHedgeCcy := "",
	sHedgeBS := "",
	sQuotationDenominator := "",
	sBuySell := "",
	fPrice := 0.0,
	sCounterpart := "",
	iAIndex := 0,
	iACount := 0,
	fAPrice := 0.0,
	sACounterpart := "",
	fHedgeAmt := 0.0,
	sType := "",
	sQuotation := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	sContext := "",
	sCriteria1 := "",
	sCriteria2 := "",
	sCriteria3 := "",
	sInternalPortfolio := "",
	sHedgeTypology := "",
	fHedgePrice := 0.0,
	sPortfolio := "",
	sUnderlyingCcy := "",
	sDenCcy := "",
	sSalesUser := "",
	sUserGroup := "",
	sNonDeliverable := "",
	sPayoutCurrency := "",
	sArchivingGroup := "",
	sArchivingColumn := "",
	sANonDeliverable := "",
	sAPayoutCurrency := "",
	sAArchivingGroup := "",
	sAArchivingColumn := "",
	
	IF ( ( sSourceClass == "" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) ) THEN
	{
		fHedgeAmt := 0.0,
		sHedgeCcy := "",
