		sPtfContext := "Hedge",
		pFirstLeg := legGetFirstComponent( This ),
		
		// This array is used to keep the hedge parameters and aggregate them if possible
		pArray := arrayNew( ),
		arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"Price",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"Amount",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Counterpart",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"HedgeType",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetDate( pArray,"Maturity",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Instrument",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Portfolio",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"HedgeCurrency",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"Quotation",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"NonDeliverable",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"PayoutCurrency",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"ArchivingGroup",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"ArchivingColumn",FALSE,FALSE ),
		arrayDefinitionSetString( pArray,"InternalPortfolio",FALSE,FALSE ),
		//using absolute amount for sorting purposes
		arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pArray,"AbsAmount",TRUE,FALSE ),
		
		iIndex := 0,
		iCount := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		WHILE ( iIndex < iCount ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( This, iIndex ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			IF ( sFamily == "CURR" ) THEN
			{
				sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
				
				sHedgeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
				IF ( ( sHedgeType <> "No Hedge" ) AND ( sHedgeType <> "" ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( strLen( sHedgeCcy ) == 0 ) THEN
						sHedgeCcy := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge_currency" ),
					
					sHedgeBS := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_hedge_BS" ),
					sQuotationDenominator := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sDefaultSpotQuotMode ),
					IF ( ( ( sHedgeBS =="Buy" ) AND ( sHedgeCcy == sQuotationDenominator ) )
					OR ( ( sHedgeBS == "Sell" ) AND ( sHedgeCcy <> sQuotationDenominator ) ) ) THEN
						sBuySell := "buy"
					ELSE
						sBuySell := "sell",
					
					fPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_price" ),
					sHedgeType := legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge type" ),
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Internal" ) ) THEN
						sCounterpart := "internal"
					ELSE IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Exchange" ) ) THEN 
					{
						sCounterpart := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
						IF ( sCounterpart == "" ) THEN
							sCounterpart := "Counterpart"
					},
					
					sType := legGetProductType( pComponent ),
					IF ( ( sType <> "RBT" ) AND ( sType <> "SMPS" ) AND ( sType <> "FLEX" ) AND ( sType <> "CMP" ) AND ( sType <> "LST" ) ) THEN
					{
						sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pComponent,"Non_deliverable" ),
						IF sNonDeliverable == "Yes" THEN
						{
							sPayoutCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout_currency" ),
							sArchivingGroup := legGetString( pComponent,"Archiving_group" ),
							sArchivingColumn := legGetString( pComponent,"Archiving_column" )
						}
					},
					
					// Look for matching element in the array, 
					//  If an element has the same price, counterpart and maturity date as the current hedging leg, they can be merged into one.
					iAIndex := 0,
					iACount := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
					pFoundElement := pNull,
					WHILE ( iAIndex < iACount ) DO
					{
						pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iAIndex ),
						fAPrice := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Price" ),
						sACounterpart := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Counterpart" ),
						dAHedgeDate := arrayElementGetDate( pElement,"Maturity" ),
						dHedgeDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Hedge_date" ),
						sANonDeliverable := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Non_deliverable" ),
						sAPayoutCurrency := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Payout_currency" ),
						sAArchivingGroup := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Archiving_group" ),
						sAArchivingColumn := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Archiving_column" ),
						
						IF ( ( fAPrice == fPrice ) AND ( sACounterpart == sCounterpart ) AND ( dAHedgeDate == dHedgeDate ) AND (sANonDeliverable == sNonDeliverable) AND (sAPayoutCurrency == sPayoutCurrency) AND (sAArchivingGroup == sArchivingGroup) AND (sAArchivingColumn == sArchivingColumn)) THEN 
						{
							pFoundElement := pElement,
							iAIndex := iACount
						},
						iAIndex := iAIndex + 1
					},
					
					// If no matching element is found in array, add a new element. Else, get the hedging amout.
					IF ( pFoundElement == pNull ) THEN
					{
						pFoundElement := arrayAddElement( pArray ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Price",fPrice ),
						arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Counterpart",sCounterpart ),
						fHedgeAmt := 0.0
					}
					ELSE
						fHedgeAmt := arrayElementGetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Amount" ),
					
					IF ( sBuySell == "buy" ) THEN
						fHedgeAmt := fHedgeAmt - legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" )
					ELSE
						fHedgeAmt := fHedgeAmt + legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Hedge_amt" ),
					
					//Push the hedge parameters into array
					arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"Amount",fHedgeAmt ),
					arrayElementSetNumeric( pFoundElement,"AbsAmount",ABS( fHedgeAmt ) ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"HedgeType",sHedgeType ),
					arrayElementSetDate( pFoundElement,"Maturity",legGetDate( pComponent,"Hedge_date" ) ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Instrument",legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ) ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Portfolio",legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ) ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"HedgeCurrency",legGetString( pComponent,"Hedge_currency" ) ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"NonDeliverable", sNonDeliverable ),
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"PayoutCurrency", sPayoutCurrency),                    
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"ArchivingGroup", sArchivingGroup),                    
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"ArchivingColumn", sArchivingColumn),     
					
					sType := legGetProductType( pComponent ),
					IF ( sType == "FLEX" ) THEN
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Risk_instr_quot" )
					ELSE IF ( sType =="RBT" ) THEN
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier_quot" )
					ELSE IF ( sType =="KIKO" ) THEN
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Barrier_quotation" )
					ELSE IF ( ( sType =="BOF" ) OR ( sType =="BSK" ) ) THEN
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg_quotation" )
					ELSE
						sQuotation := legGetString( pComponent,"B_A_strike_quot" ),
					
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"Quotation",sQuotation ),
					
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Internal" ) ) THEN
					{
						sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
						
						sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
						sContext := "Internal",
						sCriteria1 := "",
						sCriteria2 := "",
						sCriteria3 := "",
						pPtfResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.PAlloc","ALL",
												"Registration",sRegistration,
												"Instrument",sInstrument,
												"Context",sContext,
												"Criteria 1",sCriteria1,
												"Criteria 2",sCriteria2,
												"Criteria 3",sCriteria3 ),
						IF ( NOT isNull( pPtfResults ) ) THEN
							sInternalPortfolio := lookupResultsGetString( pPtfResults,0,0 )
					},
					
					arrayElementSetString( pFoundElement,"InternalPortfolio",sInternalPortfolio )
				}
			},
			iIndex := iIndex + 1
		},
		
		//Push the hedge info from the array and book hedging legs 
		IF ( arrayGetLenght( pArray ) > 0 ) THEN 
		{
			iAIndex := 0,
			iACount := arrayGetLenght( pArray ),
			sHedgeTypology := "",
			
			//Run through the array, each element in array corresponds to a possible hedging leg.
			WHILE ( iAIndex < iACount ) DO
			{
				pElement := arrayGetElement( pArray,iAIndex ),
				fHedgePrice := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Price" ),
				fHedgeAmt := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"Amount" ),
				sCounterpart := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Counterpart" ),
				
				IF ( fHedgeAmt > 0.0 ) THEN
					sBuySell := "Sell"
				ELSE
					sBuySell := "Buy",
				
				sHedgeType := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"HedgeType" ),
				sHedgeCcy := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"HedgeCurrency" ),
				dMaturity := arrayElementGetDate( pElement,"Maturity" ),
				sInstrument := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Instrument" ),
				sPortfolio := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Portfolio" ),
				sCounterpart := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Counterpart" ),
				sQuotation := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Quotation" ),
				sInternalPortfolio := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"InternalPortfolio" ),
				sHedgeNonDeliverable :=  arrayElementGetString( pElement,"NonDeliverable" ),
				sHedgeSettlementCurrency := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"PayoutCurrency" ),
				sHedgeArchivingGroup := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"ArchivingGroup" ),
				sHedgeArchivingColumn := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"ArchivingColumn" ),
				sUnderlyingCcy := fxCntGetUnderlying( sInstrument ),
				sDenCcy := fxQuotationGetDenominator( sQuotation ),
				sSalesUser := sysGetUser( ),
				sUserGroup := sysGetGroup( ),
				IF ( ( ABS( fHedgeAmt ) > 1.0 ) AND ( NOT ( sHedgeType == "No Hedge" ) ) ) THEN
				{
					pHedge := tskHedgeLegAdd( "Spot-Fwd" ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"Instrument",sInstrument ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"B_S",sBuySell ),
					legSetDate( pHedge,"Maturity",dMaturity ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"Price_quotation",sQuotation ),
					legSetNumeric( pHedge,"Price",fHedgePrice ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"Portfolio",sPortfolio ),
					IF ( sHedgeCcy == sDenCcy ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Nominal",ABS( fHedgeAmt ) )
					ELSE
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Other_nominal",ABS( fHedgeAmt ) ),
					
					IF ( strCONTAIN( sHedgeType,"Internal" ) ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Internal","Yes" ),
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Counterpart",sInternalPortfolio ),
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Trader",sSalesUser )
					}
					ELSE
						legOverwrite ( pHedge,"Counterpart",sCounterpart ),
					
					// short description for blotter
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"DIST_DESC","Hedge: " + sHedgeType + " " 
					+ toString( ABS( fHedgeAmt ),20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sHedgeCcy 
					+ " between " + sPortfolio + " and " + sCounterpart ),
					
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"pf_RFQ_Requester",legGetString( pFirstLeg,"pf_RFQ_Requester" ) ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"pf_RFQ_Provider",legGetString( pFirstLeg,"pf_RFQ_Provider" ) ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"Trade purpose",legGetString( pFirstLeg,"Trade purpose" ) ),
					legOverwrite( pHedge,"Non_deliverable",sHedgeNonDeliverable ),
					
					IF ( sHedgeNonDeliverable == "Yes" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pHedge, "Settlement_currency" ,sHedgeSettlementCurrency),
						legOverwrite( pHedge, "Archiving_group", sHedgeArchivingGroup),
						legOverwrite( pHedge,"Archiving_column",sHedgeArchivingColumn )
					},
					
					//Typology Allocation for Hedges
					IF ( sHedgeType <> "" ) THEN
						IF ( legGetString( pHedge,"Non deliverable" ) == "Yes" ) THEN
							sHedgeTypology := "NDF"
						ELSE IF ( strContain( sHedgeType,"Spot" ) ) THEN
							sHedgeTypology := "Spot"
						ELSE
							sHedgeTypology := "Outright"
				},
					
				IF ( strLength( sHedgeTypology ) > 0 ) THEN
						legSetTypology( pHedge,sHedgeTypology ),

                iAIndex := iAIndex + 1
			}
		}
	},
	arrayFree( pArray )
};

// public.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Closing.PAlloc-Demo

/*
MXpress-Demo
Portfolio allocation rule

Warning: This is not the standard MXpress-Foundation portfolio allocation rule but rather a demo portfolio allocation rule. Assumptions are made related to the 
existence of the MXpress-Demo Global Operating Model. This MXpress-Demo Global Operating Model is not part of the standard MXpress-Foundation environment.

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialised
	If a portfolio is requested
		Loop on all contracts
			Depending on the registration: determine the trader portfolio
			If the contract is back to back
				Determine the sale portfolio
			If the contract is internal or not and/or is back to back or not
				Determine the portfolio, counterpart and btbportfolio parameters accordingly
			Loop on all components
				Determine portfolio, counterpart and BTB porfolio fields accordingly
			End loop
		End loop
	End if
End if

Version 1.5
To remove the multi leg swap references

Version 1.4
Retrieve user from Source trader and group from MX.ALL.UserProfile in case of trade import

Version 1.3
Set Independent margins to No for the forward autospot and the swap autospot products

Version 1.2
Add Credit Line registration

Version 1.1
Remove portfolio allocation assignment for trades with typology=Cash Transfer or IB Account

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to allocate a portfolio to each financial contract component
This rule is specific for FXMM according to the best practices
The lead currency is US dollar
Nota: IB account are not handled

This rules handles standard external contracts,internal contracts and also contracts that will be mirrored in the mirroring task
For external contracts,the rule sets the unique portfolio
For internal contracts,including the contracts that are part of an FX or MM Package,the rules sets both portfolios ( source and destination )
For contracts that will be mirrored, the rule fills in the variable that will be used in the mirroring task
For Simple cash flow products: nothing is done

This rule uses a set of Look-Up Tables (LUT):
( MX.ALL.PAllocIn, ALL ) contains the name of instrument for each registration
( DEMO.FXMM.Entit, ALL ) contains the entity of user group
( DEMO.FXMM.PtfHV, ALL ) contains the portfolio assignment for HVA packages
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset
		pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
		sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
		sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
		bPAlloc := FALSE,
		sEntity := "",
		sPackageRegistrationLabel := "",
        sBORegistration := "",
		iNbContracts := 0,
		iContract := 0,
		sTraderPortfolio := "",
		sSalePortfolio := "",
		sPortfolio := "",
		sCounterpart := "",
		sBTBPortfolio := "",
		sRegistration := "",
		bIsContractBTB := FALSE,
		sInternal := "",
		bIsContractInternal := FALSE,
		sNominalUnit := "",
		sOtherNominalUnit := "",
		sInstrument := "",
		sInstrumentField := "",
		sLeadingCurrency := "USD",
		bLeadingCurrency := FALSE,
		sTypology := "",
		sPrefix := "",
		sCore := "",
		sUser := "",
		sUserGroup := "",
		sIndependentMargins := "",
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := 0,
		
		// The portfolio allocation is required under specific conditions:
		// - Newly inserted contracts have to be processed by the rule,
		// - Contracts generated by a Cancel & Reissue event should not be processed,
		// - Contracts generated by a sellown procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a rollover procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a fixing procedured should not br processed
		// - Contracts generated by a duplication should not be processed
		// - Since in all 5 previous cases,a portfolio had aleady been allocated
		bPAlloc := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
                    AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.futureFlowSellDow" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" )
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
		
		IF ( bPAlloc ) THEN
		{
			// Assumption: there is equivalence between group and entity.
			// So thanks to lookup table( DEMO.FXMM.Entit,ALL ), it is possible to obtain entity
            IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
            {
                sUser := sysGetUser(),
                sUserGroup := sysGetGroup()
            }
            ELSE
            {
                sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent, "Source trader"),
                sUserGroup := "",
                pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser),
                IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
                    sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString(pUserProfile,0,1)
            },
			sEntity := lookupString( "DEMO.FXMM.Entit","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
			sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( This ),
			
			pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainComponent ),
			IF ( NOT( isNull( pPackage ) ) ) THEN
				sPackageRegistrationLabel := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
			
			iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
			iContract := 0,
			// This loops on all contracts when the higher-level object is a Package
			WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO 
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
				//pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pContract ),
				pMainComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),// Required to obtain Registration and few others informations
				
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pMainComponent ),
				
				// For Simple cash flow, no portfolio is allocated
				IF ( sRegistration <> "Simple cash flow" ) THEN
				{
					sTraderPortfolio := "",// Local parameter
					sSalePortfolio := "",// Local parameter
					
					// To define sTraderPortfolio
					IF ( ( sRegistration == "Spot-Forward" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Forex_Swap" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Futures" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sRegistration == "Futures" ) THEN
						{
							sNominalUnit := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
							sOtherNominalUnit := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Other nominal unit" ),
							sInstrument := fxCurrencyGetCnt( sNominalUnit,sOtherNominalUnit )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							// Another LUT is used to determine the Instrument field for each registration ( product type )
							sInstrumentField := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAllocIn","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration ),
							IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD_CONTRACT")  THEN
								sInstrument := legGetString( legGetComponentAt(pContract,0),sInstrumentField )
							ELSE
								sInstrument := legGetString( pContract,sInstrumentField )
						},
						bLeadingCurrency := strContain( sInstrument,sLeadingCurrency ),
						
						sTypology := legGetTypology( pContract ),
						// To set portfolio prefix
						// For Spot deals
						IF ( strContain( sTypology,"Spot" ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( bLeadingCurrency ) THEN
								sPrefix := "SPT"
							ELSE
								sPrefix := "SPX"
						}
						// For Non delivrables deals
						ELSE IF ( strContain( sTypology,"NDF" ) ) THEN
						{
							IF ( bLeadingCurrency ) THEN
								sPrefix := "NDF"
							ELSE
								sPrefix := "NDX"
						}
						// For all others deals
						ELSE
						{
							IF ( bLeadingCurrency ) THEN
								sPrefix := "FWD"
							ELSE
								sPrefix := "FWX"
						},
						
						// To set portfolio core
						IF NOT ( bLeadingCurrency ) THEN
							sCore := strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 ) + strSubString( sInstrument,4,7 )
						ELSE IF ( strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 ) == sLeadingCurrency ) THEN
							sCore := strSubString( sInstrument,4,7 )
						ELSE
							sCore := strSubString( sInstrument,0,3 )
					}
					ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" )
					OR ( sRegistration == "CP/CD" ) 
					OR ( sRegistration == "Credit Line" ) 
					OR ( sRegistration == "Call deposits" ) ) THEN
					{
						sPrefix := "MMA",
						IF ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" ) THEN
							sCore := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Instrument" )
						ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" )
						OR ( sRegistration == "Call deposits" ) ) THEN
 							sCore := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Flat amount unit" )
						ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Credit Line" ) THEN
							sCore := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Nominal unit" )
						ELSE
							sCore := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Currency" )
					},
					sTraderPortfolio := sPrefix + "_" + sCore + "_" + sEntity,
					
					// To define sSalePortfolio
					bIsContractBTB := legGetFOPIsBackToBack( pContract ),// Tells whether the current contract will be mirrored in the mirroring task
					IF ( ( bIsContractBTB ) OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel <> "" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
						{
							// A LUT is used to determine the portfolio depending user name and/or user group
							sSalePortfolio := lookupString( "DEMO.FXMM.PtfHV","ALL",
															"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
															"User",sUser )
						}
						ELSE // For package
						{
							IF ( ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIFUNDINGSWAP" ) OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISWAPPACKAGE" ) ) THEN
								sSalePortfolio := "ARBI_WASH_" + sEntity
							ELSE
							{
								IF ( ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIFORWARD_AUTOSPOT" ) OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISWAP_AUTOSPOT" )  ) THEN 
									sIndependentMargins := "No"
								ELSE 
									sIndependentMargins := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Independent margins" ),
								// If independent margins = Yes, we are in HVA ( hard value added ) mode
								// if not in SVA ( soft value added ) mode
								IF ( sIndependentMargins == "Yes" ) THEN
								{
									// Another LUT is used to determine the portfolio depending user name and/or user group
									sSalePortfolio := lookupString( "DEMO.FXMM.PtfHV","ALL",
																	"USER_GROUP",sUserGroup,
																	"User",sUser )
								}
								ELSE
								{
									// For Split package and Split FX Swap
									IF ( ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLIT" )
									OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) ) THEN
										sSalePortfolio := "FX_SPLWASH_" + sEntity
									// For Outright Package and Back to Back
									ELSE IF ( ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" )
									OR ( sPackageRegistrationLabel == "mxContractFxIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) ) THEN
										sSalePortfolio := "FX_HDGWASH_" + sEntity
								}
							}
						}
					},
					
					// Checks whether the current contract is internal or not
					IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractFxIPARFORWARD_CONTRACT")  THEN
						sInternal := "No"
					ELSE
						sInternal := legGetString( pContract,"Internal" ),
					
					bIsContractInternal := ( sInternal == "Yes" ),// Tells whether the current contract is internal or not
					sPortfolio := "",// Unique porfolio for external contracts and the source portfolio for internal contracts
					sCounterpart := "",// Destination portfolio for internal contracts
					sBTBPortfolio := "",// Destination portfolio for mirrored contracts generated in the mirroring task
					IF ( bIsContractInternal ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTraderPortfolio <> "" ) THEN
							sCounterpart := sTraderPortfolio,
						
						IF ( sSalePortfolio <> "" ) THEN
							sPortfolio := sSalePortfolio
					}
					ELSE IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sTraderPortfolio <> "" ) THEN
							sBTBPortfolio := sTraderPortfolio,
						
						IF ( sSalePortfolio <> "" ) THEN
							sPortfolio := sSalePortfolio
					}
					ELSE
					{
						IF ( sSalePortfolio <> "" ) THEN
						{
							sPortfolio := sTraderPortfolio,
							sCounterpart := sSalePortfolio
						}
						ELSE
							sPortfolio := sTraderPortfolio
					},
					
					// Loop on components: propagate the contract portfolio to all components
					iComponent := 0,
					iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
						// This sets the unique portfolio for external components and the source portfolio for internal components
						legSetString( pComponent,"Portfolio",sPortfolio ),
						// This sets the destination portfolio for internal components
						IF ( bIsContractInternal ) THEN
							legSetString( pComponent,"Counterpart",sCounterpart ),
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					},
					
					// This sets the mirror portfolio for contracts that will be mirrored
					// This will be used in the mirroring task
					IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
						legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pContract,sBTBPortfolio )
				},
				
				iContract := iContract + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

		Loop on all components to set portfolio, counterpart and BTB porfolio fields accordingly
End if

This rule uses a Look-Up Table (LUT):
( MX.ALL.PAllocIn, ALL ) contains the name of instrument for each registration
( DEMO.FXMM.Entit, ALL ) contains the entity of user group
( DEMO.FXMM.PtfHV, ALL ) contains the portfolio assignment for HVA packages

{

	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		// Field Initialization/Reset

		pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
		sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
		sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
		bPAlloc := FALSE,
		sEntity := "",
		iNbContracts := 0,
		iContract := 0,

		iComponent := 0,

		// The portfolio allocation is required under specific conditions:
		// - Newly inserted contracts have to be processed by the rule,
		// - Contracts generated by a Cancel & Reissue event should not be processed,
		// - Contracts generated by a sellown procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a rollover procedure should not be processed
		// - Contracts generated by a fixing procedured should not br processed
		// - Contracts generated by a duplication should not be processed
		// - Since in all 5 previous cases,a portfolio had aleady been allocated
		bPAlloc := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
					AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" )<>"MOD" )
					AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
		
		IF ( bPAlloc ) THEN
		{
			// Assumption: there is equivalence between group and entity.
			// So thanks to lookup table( DEMO.FXMM.Entit,ALL ), it is possible to obtain entity
            IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
            {
                sUser := sysGetUser(),
                sUserGroup := sysGetGroup()
            }
            ELSE
            {
                sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent, "Source trader"),
                sUserGroup := "",
                pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser),
                IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
                    sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString(pUserProfile,0,1)
            },
			sEntity := lookupString( "DEMO.FXMM.Entit","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
			
			iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
			iContract := 0,
			
			// This loops on all contracts when the higher-level object is a Package
			WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO 
			{
				pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
				pComponent := legGetMainComponent( pContract ),//Required for the utility  MX.ALL.FCCLabel,LUT. See details below
				
				sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
				
				// To define sTraderPortfolio
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Long futures" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Short futures" ) ) THEN
					sPrefix := "MMT"
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) 
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) ) THEN
					sPrefix := "MMA",

				sInstrumentField := lookupString( "MX.ALL.PAllocIn","ALL",
										"Registration",sRegistration ),

				IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN

				},
				
				sBORegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pContract ),
				IF ( sBORegistration == "mxContractStbICONTRACT" ) THEN
					sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" )//If the current contract is STB contract, get the internal information from main component.
				ELSE

					}

				iComponent := 0,

				// This will be used in the mirroring task
				IF ( bIsContractBTB ) THEN
					legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pContract,sBTBPortfolio ),
				
				iContract := iContract + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.routing.ALL.Booking.Rout-BTB

/*
MXpress
Routing back to back rule

Used alogrithm
Default output: Regular
If main contract is back to back then
	Output is BackToBack
Else
	Loop on all components
		If current component is internal
			If closing entities are differents then
				Output is Simple
                   If FTP package then
                      Output is FTP 
              End if        
			End if
		End if
	End loop
End if


Version 1.2 
To handle the FTP Package

Version 1.1
amend the priority assignment between inter-entity and back-to-back trades

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to route all deals to the branches of the sequence that contain Mirroring and
Internal-Split (Inter-Entity) tasks. Inter-Entity trades are routed to the branche that contain the Internal Split task whereas 
Back-to-Back trades are routed to the branch that contains a mirroring task. This branch also handles Inter-Entity Back-To-Backs.
Deals involving portfolios within different legal entities would become interentity deals
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	
	//Field Initialization/Reset
	bToBTB := FALSE,
	bIsInterEntity := FALSE,
	bCurrentComponentInternal := FALSE,
	bInternal := FALSE,
	sSourcePortfolio := "",
	sDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := "",
	bIsInterEntity := FALSE,
	sOutput := "Regular",
	
	pComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pContract := legGetFatherContract( pComponent ),
	
	// To know if it is a Back-To-Back
	bToBTB := legGetFOPIsBackToBack( pContract ),
	
	// To know if it is internal and inter-entity
	// The following check is requested because the Internal-Split task doesn't check whether the portfolios are in the same
	//entity or not and therefore, by default, duplicates all deals.
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	iComponent := 0,
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
		bCurrentComponentInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ) == "Yes",
		bInternal := bInternal OR bCurrentComponentInternal,
		
		IF ( bCurrentComponentInternal ) THEN
		{
			sSourcePortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
			sDestinationPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
			
			sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sSourcePortfolio ),
			sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
			
			sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sSourcePortfolio ),
			sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
			
			// An Inter-Entity deal
			IF ( sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio <> sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio 
			OR sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio <> sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio ) THEN
				bIsInterEntity := bIsInterEntity OR TRUE
		},
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
	
	IF ( bIsInterEntity ) THEN
		sOutput := "Simple"
	ELSE IF ( bToBTB ) OR legGetTypology(pComponent) == "Murabaha Commodity" THEN
		sOutput := "BackToBack",
        
 // To handle FTP Mirroring 
 sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
 IF ( sContractRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
 {
     sPortfolio:= legGetString( pContract,"Portfolio" ),
        IF (sPortfolio <> "") THEN
        {
         pPortfolioUdf:= ptfGetUserFields( sPortfolio ),
         sFtpPortal := udfGetString( pPortfolioUdf,"FTP_PORTAL" ),
            IF ( sFtpPortal == "Yes" ) THEN
             sOutput := "FTP"
        }
 }              
};

//mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.IPISPaymentDeletion

/*
MXpress
Suppress deliverable for Simple Cash flow having a contract typology set to IPIS (IPIS is an initial CLS statement)

Used algorithm:
Initialize variables
If Contract Registration "Simple cash flow"
	Then Loop on all components
		IF Element typlogy is "IPIS"
		Then remove flow
		End IF
	End Loop
End if
*/

{
	//Variables initialization
	pPackage := pNull,
	pFlows := pNull,
	pFlow := pNull,
	pComponent := pNull,
	sRegistration := "",
	sTypology := "",
	iNbFlows := 0,
	
	pPackage := This,
	pFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,0 ),
	pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent( pFlow ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
    sSource := legGetSourceModule( pComponent),
    
    IF ( ( sSource == "T24.FX" ) OR  (sSource == "T24.MM" ) ) THEN
	{
		iFlow := 0,
		iNbFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
		WHILE ( iFlow < iNbFlows ) DO
		{
			pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,iFlow ),

				mx.system.collection.RemoveElement( pFlows,pFlow ),

			iFlow := iFlow + 1
		}
	},
    
	IF ( ( sRegistration =="Simple cash flow" ) ) THEN
	{
		sTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
		iFlow := 0,
		iNbFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
		WHILE ( iFlow < iNbFlows ) DO
		{
			pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,iFlow ),
			IF ( ( sTypology == "IPIS_IN" ) OR ( sTypology == "IPIS_OUT" ) ) THEN
			{
				mx.system.collection.RemoveElement( pFlows,pFlow )
			},
			iFlow := iFlow + 1
		}
	}
   
    
   

};

// mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.EventLink

/*
MXpress
MMRollOverEventId ODR completion

Used algorithm:
Loop on all flows
	MMRollOverEventId ODR is the ROEVT UDF event value
End loop

Version 1.0
First version of the algorithm
*/
{
	// Initialisation
	pPackage := This,
	pFlow := pNull,
	pComponent := pNull,
	pUserField := pNull,
	pFlows := pNull,
	fROEvtId := 0.0,
	iFlow := 0,
	iFlows := 0,
	
	//Get the list of flows
	pFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	iFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
	//Sets the ODR to the Event ID that creates the trade producing the flows
	WHILE( iFlow < iFlows ) DO
	{
		pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows,iFlow ),
		pComponent := mx.deliverable.Cash.GetComponent( pFlow ),
		pUserField := legGetUserFields( pComponent ),
		fROEvtId := udfGetNumeric( pUserField,"ROEVT" ),
		mx.deliverable.Cash.SetMMRollOverEventID( pFlow,fROEvtId ),
		iFlow := iFlow + 1
	}
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.RollOverLinking

/*
MXpress
ROEVT UDF completion

Used algorithm:
For each component
	if any ROEVT <> 0 then
		ROEVT = ROEVT
	Else
		ROEVT = Event ID
	End if
End 

Version 1.0
First version of the algorithm
*/

{
	// Initialisation
	pLeg := This,
	fEvtId := 0.0,
	iNbVBO := 0,
	iVBO := 0,
	fFirstRoEVT := 0.0,
	pVBO := pNull,
	pOld := pNull,
	pUserFieldO := pNull,
	fUserFieldRoEVT := 0.0,
	pNew := pNull,
	pUserFieldN := pNull,
	
	//gets the event reference
	fEvtId := evtGetNumeric( pLeg,"Reference" ),
	iNbVBO := evtGetNumberOfVersionedBOs( pLeg ),
	//Looks at the first RollOver Event, if any 
	WHILE ( iVBO < iNbVBO ) DO
	{
		pVBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( pLeg,iVBO ),
		pOld := evtVersionedBOGetOld( pVBO ),
		pUserFieldO := legGetUserFields( pOld ),
		fUserFieldRoEVT := udfGetNumeric( pUserFieldO,"ROEVT" ),
		IF ( fUserFieldRoEVT <> 0.0 ) THEN
			fFirstRoEVT := fUserFieldRoEVT,
		iVBO := iVBO + 1
	},
	
	//Fill Trade UDFs
	iVBO := 0,
	WHILE ( iVBO < iNbVBO ) DO
	{
		pVBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( pLeg,iVBO ),
	 	// Created Version of trades
		pNew := evtVersionedBOGetNew( pVBO ),
		pUserFieldN := legGetUserFields( pNew ), 
		IF ( fFirstRoEVT > 0.0 ) THEN 
			udfOverwriteNumeric( pUserFieldN,"ROEVT",fFirstRoEVT )
		ELSE 
			udfOverwriteNumeric( pUserFieldN,"ROEVT",fEvtId ),
		iVBO := iVBO + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.IRD.ALL.ClearingEligibility

/*
MXpress

Version 1.6
Code clean up and use callPreTradeFormula function

Version 1.5
Fixed to retrieve the instrument name properly after retrieving the instrument field from the lookup table.
Fixed to browse correctly through all lookup tables according to the criteria ID.
Updated to handle ZC inflation swaps with the new "ZC Inflation Swaps" typology.

Version 1.4
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.3
Updated to retrieve the instrument field from the (MX.ALL.FieldMapping, Instrument) lookup table

Version 1.2
Updated to retrieve the instrument field from the (MX.ALL.Instrument, ALL) lookup table

Version 1.1
Fix the leg day count check

Version 1.0
The aim of this formula is to define if the IRD trade is eligible to be cleared in CCP before booking. The CME eligibility check is included too.
CCP publishes regularly an eligibility matrix where all the characteristic of the eligible deal are defined.
This formula goes through the matrix verifying if all trade's characteristics are in the CCP's scope.

The output, in case of eligibility is "Eligible", in case of ineligibility is "Not Eligible" and a pf_ field next will list the reason(s) why the trade is not eligible.
Each CCP has its own fields, and the final decision whether to clear, will be in a separate pf_ field where the user can chose the CCP or to remain bilateral.

The formula first format the index and the currency according to the CCP standards.
Then check which product has been inserted (basis, VNS, OIS, etc...).

After that, the formula checks if the trade is in line with the matrix in the below order:
1.  Notional and Maturity
2.  ISDA Fixed leg day count
3.  Additional payments
4.  Payment frequency
5.  Floating Tenor and fixing lag
6.  Floating leg basis count
7.  Payment and reset frequency
8.  Business day convention
9.  Stub interpolation
10. Financial Center
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	sActiveClearingEligibility := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","OTCClearing" ),
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ), // possible values are INS, MOD and CNL
	sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ), //Check if it is an Internal Trade
	sRegistration := "",
	sNotEligibleReason := "",
	sTypology := "",
	sNotEligibleSpread1 := "",
	sLeg1 := "",
	fSpread1 := 0.0,
	sNotEligibleSpread2 := "",
	sLeg2 := "",
	fSpread2 := 0.0,
	sNotEligibleReasonAmort := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonOthers := "",
	sEligibilityCheckSC := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonTmp := "",
	sEligibilityCheckCME := "",
	sCurrency := "",
	sCounterparty := "",
	pDefaultCCP := pNULL,
	sDefaultCCP := "",
	spf_CCPs := "",
	
	IF ( ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) AND ( sActiveClearingEligibility == "YES" ) AND ( sAction == "INS" ) AND ( sInternal <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
	{
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
		IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) OR ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) ) THEN
		{
			sNotEligibleReason := "",
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_ClearingEligibility" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility","" ),
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","" ),
			
			//SwapClear eligilibity checks
			sTypology := legGetString( pComponent,"Typology" ),
			// Inflation Swap Eligibility Check
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) AND ( sTypology == "ZC Inflation Swap" ) ) THEN
			{
				sNotEligibleReason := "",
				
				// Spread check: CCP do not accept trades with spread
				sNotEligibleSpread1 := "",
				sLeg1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
				fSpread1 := legGetNumeric ( pComponent,"Rate Margin" ),
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleSpread1,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingSpreadPerLeg",sLeg1,fSpread1 ),
				
				sNotEligibleSpread2 := "",
				sLeg2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
				fSpread2 := legGetNumeric ( pComponent,"Rate Margin2" ),
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleSpread2,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingSpreadPerLeg",sLeg2,fSpread2 ),
				
				// Amortizing check
				IF ( legGetString ( pComponent,"Amortizing" ) <> "None" ) THEN
					sNotEligibleReasonAmort := "#Amortizing ",
				
				sNotEligibleReasonOthers := "",
				// Index, CCY, Maturity, Additional payments and Floating Day Count checks
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonOthers,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingEligibility","SwapClear" ),
				
				sNotEligibleReason := sNotEligibleSpread1 + sNotEligibleSpread2 + sNotEligibleReasonAmort + sNotEligibleReasonOthers,
				IF ( sNotEligibleReason == "" ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Eligible"
				ELSE IF ( ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) == "Not Clearing Eligible Product" ) ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible"
				ELSE
				{
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC", "Trade is not eligible for clearing: " + sNotEligibleReason )
				}
			}
			// IRS Vanilla, Basis Swap, OIS and VNS Eligibility check
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) AND ( ( sTypology == "IRS" ) OR ( sTypology == "OIS" ) ) )THEN
			{
				sNotEligibleReason := "",
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReason,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingEligibility","SwapClear" ),
				
				IF ( sNotEligibleReason == "" ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Eligible"
				ELSE IF ( ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) == "Not Clearing Eligible Product" ) ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible"
				ELSE
				{
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","Trade is not eligible for clearing: " + sNotEligibleReason )
				}
			}
			// FRA Eligibility Check
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sTypology == "FRA" ) ) THEN
			{
				sNotEligibleReasonTmp := "",
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonTmp,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.FRAClearingEligibility","SwapClear" ),
				
				 IF (  strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",1 ) <> "" ) THEN
				{
					sEligibilityCheckSC := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",0 ),
					sNotEligibleReason := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",1 )
				}
				ELSE
					sNotEligibleReason := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",0 ),
				
				IF ( ( sNotEligibleReason == "" ) AND ( sEligibilityCheckSC <> "Not Eligible" ) ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Eligible"
				ELSE
				{
					sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","Trade is not eligible for clearing: " + sNotEligibleReason )
				}
			},
			
			// CME eligibility checks
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_ClearingEligibilityCME" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibilityCME","" ),
			IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","" ),
			
			// IRS Vanilla, Basis Swap, OIS and VNS Eligibility check
			IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" ) AND ( ( sTypology == "IRS" ) OR ( sTypology == "OIS" ) ) )THEN
			{
				sNotEligibleReason := "",
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReason,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingEligibility","CME" ),
				
				IF ( sNotEligibleReason == "" ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckCME := "Eligible"
				ELSE IF ( ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) == "Not Clearing Eligible Product" ) ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible"
				ELSE
				{
					sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Trade is not eligible for clearing: " + sNotEligibleReason )
				}
			}
			// FRA Eligibility Check
			ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "FRA's" ) AND ( sTypology == "FRA" ) ) THEN
			{
				sNotEligibleReason := "",
				callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonTmp,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.FRAClearingEligibility","CME" ),
				
				IF (  strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",1 ) <> "" ) THEN
				{
					sEligibilityCheckCME := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",0 ),
					sNotEligibleReason := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",1 )
				}
				ELSE
					sNotEligibleReason := strToken(sNotEligibleReasonTmp,"$",0 ),
					
				IF ( ( sNotEligibleReason == "" ) AND ( sEligibilityCheckCME <> "Not Eligible" ) ) THEN
					sEligibilityCheckCME := "Eligible"
				ELSE
				{
					sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible",
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Trade is not eligible for clearing: " + sNotEligibleReason )
				}
			},
			
			IF ( ( sActiveClearingEligibility == "YES" ) 
			AND ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_CCPs" ) )
			AND ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "pf_ClearingEligibility" ) ) ) THEN
			{
				// Default CCP
				sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
				sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
				pDefaultCCP := lookupResults ( "MX.IRD.ClearingDefaultCCP","ALL",
											"Currency",sCurrency,
											"Counterpart",sCounterparty ),
				IF ( ( NOT isNull ( pDefaultCCP ) ) 
				AND ( legGetString ( pComponent,"pf_CCPs" ) == "" ) 
				AND ( legGetString ( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ) <> "" ) ) THEN
				{
					sDefaultCCP := lookupResultsGetString( pDefaultCCP,0,0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_CCPs",sDefaultCCP )
				},
				
				// To display the Clearing eligibility
				spf_CCPs := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_CCPs"),
				IF ( spf_CCPs == "1. SwapClear" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility",sEligibilityCheckSC )
				ELSE IF ( spf_CCPs == "2. CME" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility",sEligibilityCheckCME )
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_ClearingEligibility","" )
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.msl.Deliverable.completion.ALL.LiquidFlw

/*
MXpress
Liquidation flows purge from products out of the liquidation module scope

Used algorithm:
Retrieve package's flows
Loop on all flows
	If mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf is "mx.deliverable.Position" then
		Retrieve the flow component
		If the component is a secfin or a future then
			Remove the Cash Flow from the collection
		End if
	End If
End loop

Version 1.0
Initialization
*/

{
	pPackage := This,
	pFlows := mx.deliverable.Package.GetFlows( pPackage ),
	pFlow := pNull,
	iNbOfFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows ),
	iFlow := 0,
	pComponentLiq := pNull,
	sComponentTypologyLiq := "",
	sComponentUsageLiq := "",
	sComponentIsInternalLiq := "",
	sComponentFamilyLiq := "",
	sComponentGroupLiq := "",
	sComponentTypeLiq := "",
	IF ( iNbOfFlows > 0 ) THEN
	{ 
		WHILE ( iFlow < iNbOfFlows ) DO
		{
			pFlow := mx.system.collection.GetElementAt( pFlows, iFlow ),
			IF ( mx.system.object.IsInstanceOf( pFlow,"mx.deliverable.Position" ) ) THEN
			{
				pComponentLiq := mx.deliverable.Position.GetComponent( pFlow ), 
				sComponentTypologyLiq := legGetTypology( pComponentLiq ), 
				sComponentUsageLiq := legGetUsage( pComponentLiq ),
				sComponentIsInternalLiq := legGetString( pComponentLiq,"Internal" ),
				sComponentFamilyLiq := legGetProductFamily( pComponentLiq ),
				sComponentGroupLiq := legGetProductGroup( pComponentLiq ),
				sComponentTypeLiq := legGetProductType( pComponentLiq ),
				IF ( ( sComponentFamilyLiq <> "EQD" OR sComponentGroupLiq <> "EQUIT" OR sComponentTypeLiq <> "" )
				AND ( sComponentFamilyLiq <> "IRD" OR sComponentGroupLiq <> "BOND" OR sComponentTypeLiq <> "" ) ) 
                 OR (( sComponentTypologyLiq == "SGDM" OR sComponentTypologyLiq == "SFRM"))
                
                THEN
				{
					mx.system.collection.RemoveElement( pFlows, pFlow ),
					mx.system.object.Destroy( pFlow ),
					iNbOfFlows := mx.system.collection.GetLength( pFlows )
				}
				ELSE
				{
					iFlow := iFlow + 1
				}
			}
			ELSE
			{
				iFlow := iFlow + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

The purpose is to build dynamically the instrument for CP CD

{

	sGenerator := "",
	sIssuer := "",

	sMaturity := "",

	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),

			sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Currency" ),

		iComponent := iComponent + 1

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingMaturity

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sCurrency := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	sBasisSwap := getArgAsString( 2 ),
	sTenor := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	
	sTypology := legGetString( pComponent,"Typology" ),
	sMaturityChkNull := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonMaturity := "",
	
	// Check in "MX.IRD.ClearingEligMaturities" the min and MAX number of days per each product and ccy
	pMaturityChk := lookupResults ( "MX.IRD.ClearingEligMaturities",sContext,
									"Typology",sTypology, 
									"Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
									"Check BasisSwap", sBasisSwap ),
	IF ( isNull( pMaturityChk ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","Not Clearing Eligible Product" )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Not Clearing Eligible Product" )
		},
		sMaturityChkNull := "Not Eligible"
	}
	ELSE
	{
		IF ( ( sTypology == "IRS" ) OR ( sTypology == "OIS" ) 
		OR ( ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) AND ( sTypology == "ZC Inflation Swap" ) ) ) THEN
		{
			// Number of days between Maturity and Start dates
			dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
			dStart := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
			iMat := toInt( dMaturity - dStart ),
			fMat := convertIToNumeric( iMat ),
			fMaturityMin := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pMaturityChk,0,0 ),
			fMaturityMax := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pMaturityChk,0,1 ),
			IF ( ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) AND ( fMaturityMin < fMat) AND ( fMat <= fMaturityMax ) ) THEN
				sClearingEligibilityMaturity := "Maturity"
			ELSE IF ( ( sContext == "CME" ) AND ( fMat <= fMaturityMax ) ) THEN
				sClearingEligibilityMaturity := "Maturity"
			ELSE
				sNotEligibleReasonMaturity := "#Maturity "
		}
		ELSE IF ( sTypology == "FRA" ) THEN
		{
			dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
			dSettlD := legGetDate( pComponent,"Settl.Date" ),
			dStart := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
			iMat := toInt( dMaturity - dStart ),
			fMat := convertIToNumeric( iMat ),
			iSettl := toInt( dMaturity - dSettlD ),
			fSettl := convertIToNumeric( iSettl ),
			IF ( fSettl < 30.0 ) THEN
				fSettlCheck := round( fSettl/7.0,0 )
			ELSE
				fSettlCheck := round( fSettl/30.0,0 ),
			
			IF ( strCONTAIN( sTenor,"Y" ) ) THEN
				fTenor := ( convertSToNumeric( sTenor ) ) * 12.0
			ELSE
				fTenor := convertSToNumeric( sTenor ),
			
			fMaturityMax := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pMaturityChk,0,1 ),
			IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
			{
				fSettlMin := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pMaturityChk,0,2 ),
				fSettlMax := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pMaturityChk,0,3 ),
				IF ( ( fMat <= fMaturityMax ) AND ( fSettlMin <= fSettl ) AND ( fSettl <= fSettlMax ) AND ( fSettlCheck == fTenor ) ) THEN
					sClearingEligibilityMaturity := "Maturity",
				
				IF ( sClearingEligibilityMaturity == "" ) THEN
					sNotEligibleReasonMaturity := "#Maturity "
			}
			ELSE IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
			{
				fSettlDate := ( fMat - fSettl ), // the settlement date eligible for CME is on effective date or at maturity
				IF ( ( fMat <= fMaturityMax ) AND ( ( fSettlDate == 0.0 ) OR ( fSettlDate == fMat ) ) AND ( fSettlCheck == fTenor ) ) THEN
					sClearingEligibilityMaturity := "Maturity",
				
				IF ( sClearingEligibilityMaturity == "" ) THEN
					sNotEligibleReasonMaturity := "#Maturity "
			}
		}
	},
	setReturnValue( sMaturityChkNull + "$" + sNotEligibleReasonMaturity )
};

// public.preTrade.mirroring.IRD.ALL.IRFutureAccrMngt

/*
MXpress

Version 1.1
Applied MSL best practices

Replication of IR Future by a FRA to allow the logical decomposition for FO accrual management
NB: The counterparty choice must be done by the client

*/

{
	pSfut := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pSfut ),
	sPortfolio := legGetString( pSfut,"Portfolio" ),
	bIsBankingBook := ptfIsBankingBook( sPortfolio ),
	IF ( sRegistration == "Short futures" AND ( bIsBankingBook ) ) THEN
	{
		sUnderlyingIndex := legGetString( pSfut,"Underlying_index" ),
		dMaturity := legGetDate(pSfut,"Maturity_period"),
		fNominal := legGetNumeric(pSfut,"Nominal"),
		sSfutBuySell := legGetString( pSfut,"Buy/Sell" ),
		IF ( sSfutBuySell == "Buy" ) THEN
			sFraBuySell := "Sell"
		ELSE
			sFraBuySell := "Buy",
		
		//Price virtual loan to determine maturity of equivalent FRA: 1 period of floating 
		//loan priced with underlying index of swap
		pContainer := npOpen(),
		pLoan := npAddLeg( pContainer,"Loan" ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Nature","Floating rate" ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Instrument",sUnderlyingIndex ),
		legGetString( pLoan,"Instrument" ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Nature","Floating rate" ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Start",dMaturity ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Maturity_label","1Y" ),
		legOverwrite( pLoan,"Nominal",1.0 ),
		legCompute( pLoan, "noWorkflow" ),
		pLoanStreams := legGetStreams( pLoan ),
		pLoanStream := streamsGetStream( pLoanStreams,0,0 ),
		dEndDate := streamGetPeriodEndDate( pLoanStream,0 ), 
		npClose( pContainer ),
		
		pFRA := legAddComponent( This,"mxContractISINGLE","FRA's","FRA" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Nature","Index" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Instrument",sUnderlyingIndex ),
		fPrice := 100.0 - legGetNumeric( pSfut,"Settlement Quotation" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Rate_Margin",fPrice ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Start",dMaturity ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Maturity",dEndDate ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Nominal",fNominal ),
		
		//Assign FRA to dummy counterpart and portfolio
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Portfolio",sPortfolio ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Counterpart",">OURSELVES" ), //The counterparty choice must be done by the client
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Usage","AccrualMngt" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Typology","IR Future" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Buy/Sell",sFraBuySell ),
		legCompute( pFRA, "noWorkflow" ),
		legOverwrite( pFRA,"Rate_Margin",fPrice ),
		
		pStreams := legGetStreams( pFRA ),
		iStreamsNbPhases := 1,
		iStreamsPhase := 0,
		WHILE ( iStreamsPhase < iStreamsNbPhases ) DO
		{
			// General case:
			iStreamsNbLegs := MIN( 2,streamsGetNumberOfLegsPerPhase( pStreams ) ),// According to the assumption
			iStreamsLeg := 0,
			WHILE ( iStreamsLeg < iStreamsNbLegs ) DO
			{
				pStream := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iStreamsPhase,iStreamsLeg ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pStream ) ) THEN
				{
					iPayout := streamGetPayoutSign( pStream ),
					IF ( iStreamsLeg == 0 ) THEN
					{
						IF ( sFraBuySell == "Sell" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
								legSetString( pFRA,"Asset liability","Liability" )
							ELSE
								legSetString( pFRA,"Asset liability","Asset" )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							IF ( iPayout == 1 ) THEN
								legSetString( pFRA,"Asset liability","Asset" )
							ELSE
								legSetString( pFRA,"Asset liability","Liability" )
						}
					}
				},
				iStreamsLeg := iStreamsLeg + 1
			},
			iStreamsPhase := iStreamsPhase + 1
		},
		legGenerateForwardStartDecomposition( pFRA )
	}
};

// mx.pretrade.completion.ALL.Closing.AccStatementCategory

/*
MXpress
Assign the accounting codes to the transactions

Version 1.1
Add the typology as input in the lookups

Version 1.0
Assigns the accounting codes in the accounting fields based on lookup tables for EQD, COM,CRD, IRD, FXD, IRD, SF
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization
	pLeg := This,
	iContract := 0,
	iNbContracts := 0,
	sRegistration := "",
	iComponent := 0,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	sFamily := "",
	sGroup := "",
	sPortfolio := "",
	sSecurity := "",
	sDenBuySell := "",
	sNumBuySell := "",
	sDenCurr := "",
	sNumCurr := "",
	sStatementCategory := "",
	sTypology := "",
	
	WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
	{
		pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
		sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContract ),
		sTypology := legGetTypology( pContract ),
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
			sFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
			sGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
			
			sStatementCategory:="",
			sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
			
			IF ( sFamily == "EQD" ) THEN
			{
				sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.EQD.AccStatement","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio,
													"Security",sSecurity )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "SCF" ) THEN
			{
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.SCF.AccStatement", "ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio
													 )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "OPT" ) THEN
			{
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.AccStatement", "ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio)
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "CURR" ) AND ( sGroup == "FXD" ) THEN
			{
				sDenBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Den_Buy_Sell" ),
				sNumBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Num_Buy_Sell" ),
				sDenCurr := legGetString( pComponent,"Den_unit" ),
				sNumCurr := legGetString( pComponent,"Num_unit" ),
				
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.AccStatement","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio,
													"FX leg 1 B/S",sDenBuySell,
													"FX leg 2 B/S",sNumBuySell,
													"FX Currency 1",sDenCurr,
													"FX Currency 2",sNumCurr)
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "CURR" ) THEN
			{
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.FXD.AccStatement", "ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio)
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "COM" ) THEN
			{
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.COM.AccStatement","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "CRD" ) THEN
			{
				sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent, "Instrument" ),
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.CRD.AccStatement","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio,
													"Security",sSecurity )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "IRD" ) AND ( sGroup <> "REPO" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sGroup == "IRS" ) THEN
					sSecurity := ""
				ELSE
					sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent, "Instrument"),
				
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.AccStatement","ALL", 
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio,
													"Security",sSecurity )
			}
			ELSE IF ( sFamily == "IRD" ) AND ( sGroup == "REPO" ) THEN
			{
				sSecurity := legGetString( pComponent, "Instrument"),
				pStatementCategoryResults := lookupResults( "MX.SF.AccStatement","ALL",
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Portfolio",sPortfolio,
													"Security",sSecurity )
			},
			
			IF ( NOT isNull( pStatementCategoryResults) ) THEN
				sStatementCategory := lookupResultsGetString( pStatementCategoryResults,0,0 ),
			
			legSetStatementCategory( pComponent,sStatementCategory ),
			
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		iContract := iContract + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Booking.FCplGID

/*
MXpress
Field Completion rule, to propagate the Global ID field to all components
Assumption: For imported deals, the "Global id" field has already been set 

Used algorithm:
If the context is insertion
	Loop on all components, to retrieve the "Global id" field
	If the "Global id" field is not empty then
		Loop on all components
			Set Global id
		End loop
	End if
End if

Version 1.1
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.0
*/

{
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	
	IF ( sAction == "INS" ) THEN
	{
		pLeg := This,
		sGlobalID := "",
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sGlobalID := legGetString( pComponent, "Global id" ),
			IF ( sGlobalID <> "" ) THEN
				iComponent := iNbComponents,
			
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		
		IF ( sGlobalID <> "" ) THEN
		{
			iComponent := 0,
			WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
			{
				pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"Global id",sGlobalID ),
				iComponent := iComponent + 1
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Pricing.Usage

/*
MXpress
Usage values assignment

Used algorithm:
If the leg is initialized then
	Get the number of phases
	Loop on all components
		Get the component registration
		If the registration is "Simple cash flow" or "Fund S/R liability" the set the Usage to "Inflow" or "Outflow"
		Create the array containing all the information
		Loop on the number of phase
			If registration is "Interest rate swaps" or "Currency swaps" or "Asset swaps" or "Swaptions" then
				Retrieve the indexes and store them in the array as well as their category and nature
				If one of the index comes from an indexation then
					store this information in the array
				End if
			Else if registration is "Caps/floors" then
				Retrieve the indexes and store them in the array as well as their category and nature
				If one of the index comes from an indexation then
					store this information in the array
				End if
			Else if registration is "Bonds" or "CP/CD" or "Bond Forwards" or "Callable Bonds" or "Short futures" or "Long futures" or "Bond options" or "Interest rate future options" then
				Set the Usage to ""
			End if
		End loop
	End loop
	Get the number of index in the array
	Loop on the number of index
		If the category is "FX rate" then
			If the index comes from the Indexation then
				set Usage to ""
			Else
				set Usage to "FX"
		Else if the category it "Equity" then
			set Usage to "Equity"
		Else if the category is "Inflation" then
			set Usage to "Inflation"
		Else if the category si "Rate" then
			If the nature is "Standard" then
				If the ResetMode is "Average then
					Set Usage to "Average"
				Else if the ResetMode is "Compounded" then
					Set Usage to "Compound"
				Else
					Set Usage to "Libor"
				End if
			Else if the nature is "Swap rate" then
				Set Usage to "CMS"
			End if
			If the ResetMode is "Basket" and there are 2 components and the product of the weights is -1 and the FormulaType is "Sum" and the two underlying indices nature are "Swap rate" then
				Set the Usage to "CMS Spread"
			Else if the ResetMode is "Basket" and there are 2 components and the product of the weights is -1 and the FormulaType is "Sum" then
				Set the Usage to "Spread"
			End if
		Else if the category is "Formula" then
			If the ResetMode is "Basket" and there are 2 components and the product of the weights is -1 and the FormulaType is "Sum" and the two underlying indices nature are "Swap rate" then
				Set the Usage to "CMS Spread"
			Else if the ResetMode is "Basket" and there are 2 components and the product of the weights is -1 and the FormulaType is "Sum" then
				Set the Usage to "Spread"
			Else
				Set the Usage to "Formula"
			End if
		Else
			Set Usage to "Other"
		End if
	End loop
	Check their priority in the LUT and rearrange the array with this priority
	Set the Usage for current component
End if

Version 1.2
Handle one-off fee usage One-off fee, Interest, Realized

Version 1.1
The purpose of this new version is to take into consideration the Usage for Fund Subscription/redemption and Simple Cash Flows

Version 1.0
The purpose of this rule is to allocate a Usage to a trade
*/


{
	pLeg := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) ) THEN
	{
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
            sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule(pComponent),
			
            //BAB addition to set Usage for Migrated LM and IB MM MURABAHA deals, Wakala's have no Usage
            sTypology := legGetTypology(pLeg),
            IF ( sSourceModule == "Migration" AND sTypology =="Murabaha Borrowing" ) THEN
            {
               sUsage := "DI"
            }
            ELSE IF ( sSourceModule == "Migration" AND sTypology == "Murabaha Placement" ) THEN
            {
               sUsage := "BA"
            },
            //End of BAB Usage Migration addition
            
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			IF ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) THEN
			{
				sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
				IF ( sPattern == "One-off Fee" ) THEN
                {
					sFeeType := legGetString( pComponent,"FEE_TYPE"),
                    pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.OneOff-Fee","ALL","Fee Type",sFeeType ),
                    sUsage := lookupResultsGetString(pResults, 0, 1)
                }
                ELSE
				{	//BAB Addition- If commented out for Nostro typology assignment
                	//This part is used to handle cash paid/received in the performance attribution calculation
					sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" )
					/*IF ( sBuySell == "Pay" ) THEN
						sUsage := "Outflow"
					ELSE
						sUsage := "Inflow"*/
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( sRegistration == "Fund S/R liability" ) THEN
			{
				sBuySell := legGetString( pComponent,"Position_side" ),
				IF ( sBuySell == "Redemption" ) THEN
					sUsage := "Outflow"
				ELSE
					sUsage := "Inflow"
			}
            //BAB addition - for rollover usage
            ELSE IF (sRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" AND sSourceModule == "mx.rollover") THEN
            {
           		sUsage := "MxRollover",
                legSetNumeric(pComponent, "Npv", 0.0)
                },
                
            //BAB addition - Usage of Dual Currency Deposit
            IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent, "STRTG_LBL" ) ) THEN
            sTitle := legGetString(pComponent,"STRTG_LBL"),
            IF sTitle == "Dual Currency Depo" THEN
            	legSetIsCustomizedUsage(pComponent,TRUE),
            //end of BAB addition

            //BAB Addition - For imported deals and by filtering on SourceModule, set Usage to Customized to avoid incorrectly overwriting it in the end of this pretrade rule
            IF ( sSourceModule == "FXT" ) THEN
            legSetIsCustomizedUsage(pComponent,TRUE),
            
            //BAB addition - For Cancel and Reissue event, set Usage to Customized to avoid incorrectly overwriting it in the end of this pretrade rule
            sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
            IF sBOClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" THEN
            legSetIsCustomizedUsage(pComponent,TRUE),
            //end of BAB addition
                
			//The indexes are stored in an array. The first column is the pointer to the index, the second column is the Category and the third is the Nature
			pIndexArray := arrayNew( ),
			arrayDefinitionSetPointer( pIndexArray,"Index",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pIndexArray,"Category",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pIndexArray,"Nature",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pIndexArray,"Usage",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetString( pIndexArray,"Indexation",FALSE,FALSE ),
			arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pIndexArray,"Priority",TRUE,TRUE ),
			
			iPhase := 0,
			iNbPhases := streamsGetNumberOfPhases( pStreams ),
			WHILE ( iPhase < iNbPhases ) DO
				{
				IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bonds" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "CP/CD" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bond Forwards" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Callable Bonds" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Short futures" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Long futures" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Bond options" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Interest rate future options" ) ) THEN
					sUsage := ""
				ELSE IF ( ( sRegistration == "Interest rate swaps" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Currency swaps" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Asset swaps")
				OR ( sRegistration == "Swaptions" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "FRA's" )
				OR ( sRegistration == "Caps/floors" ) ) THEN
				{
					//The first step is to get all the indexes
					pLeg1 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,0 ),
					pLeg2 := streamsGetStream( pStreams,iPhase,1 ),
					
					pIndex1 := streamGetIndex( pLeg1 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex1 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex1 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndex1 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pIndex1 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					pIndex2 := streamGetIndex( pLeg2 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pIndex2 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex2 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndex2 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pIndex2 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					//Check if there is a range condition on the legs and get the index used with their Nature and Category
					pLeg1RangeIndex1 := streamGetRangeIndex1( pLeg1 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pLeg1RangeIndex1 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pLeg1RangeIndex1 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pLeg1RangeIndex1 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pLeg1RangeIndex1 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					pLeg1RangeIndex2 := streamGetRangeIndex2( pLeg1 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pLeg1RangeIndex2 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pLeg1RangeIndex2 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pLeg1RangeIndex2 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pLeg1RangeIndex2 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					pLeg2RangeIndex1 := streamGetRangeIndex1( pLeg2 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pLeg2RangeIndex1 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pLeg2RangeIndex1 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pLeg2RangeIndex1 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pLeg2RangeIndex1 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					pLeg2RangeIndex2 := streamGetRangeIndex2( pLeg2 ),
					IF ( NOT isNull( pLeg2RangeIndex2 ) ) THEN
					{
						sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pLeg2RangeIndex2 ),
						sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pLeg2RangeIndex2 ),
						
						pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
						arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pLeg2RangeIndex2 ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
						arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature )
					},
					
					//Check if there is an indexation on the legs and gets the different index used in the indexation and their Nature and Category
					pIndexIndexationArray := arrayNew( ),
					arrayDefinitionSetPointer( pIndexIndexationArray,"IndexationIndex",FALSE,FALSE ),
					
					pIndexations1 := streamGetIndexations( pLeg1 ),
					
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List1 := indexationsGetDividendsIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List1 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List2 := indexationsGetFinalCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List2 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List3 := indexationsGetFixingIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List3 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List4 := indexationsGetInitialCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List4 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List5 := indexationsGetInterestFlowIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List5 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List6 := indexationsGetInterestRateIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List6 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List7 := indexationsGetIntermediateCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List7 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List8 := indexationsGetLegNpvIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List8 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List9 := indexationsGetMarginIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List9 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List10 := indexationsGetOutStandingCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List10 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List11 := indexationsGetRecoveryNominalIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List11 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List12 := indexationsGetSecondaryStrikeIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List12 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List13 := indexationsGetStrikeIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List13 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					pIndexation1List14 := indexationsGetTaxCreditIndexationList( pIndexations1 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation1List14 ),
					
					iCount2 := 0,
					iNbIndexationElements := arrayGetLenght( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					WHILE ( iCount2 < iNbIndexationElements ) DO
					{
						pElement := arrayGetElement( pIndexIndexationArray,iCount2 ),
						pIndexationList1 := arrayElementGetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex" ),
						IF ( NOT isNull( pIndexationList1 ) ) THEN
						{
							iCount := 0,
							iIndexations1 := indexationListCount( pIndexationList1 ),
							WHILE ( iCount < iIndexations1 ) DO
							{
								pIndexation1 := indexationListGoto( pIndexationList1,iCount ),
								pIndexationTemplate1 := indexationGetTemplate( pIndexation1 ),
								//The following line gives the pointer to the index used in the indexation
								pIndexationIndex1 := indexationTemplateGetIndex( pIndexationTemplate1 ),
								
								sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndexationIndex1 ),
								sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndexationIndex1 ),
								
								pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
								arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pIndexationIndex1 ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Indexation","Yes" ),
								
								iCount := iCount + 1
							}
						},
						iCount2 := iCount2 + 1
					},
					arrayFree( pIndexIndexationArray ),
					
					pIndexIndexationArray2 := arrayNew(),
					arrayDefinitionSetPointer( pIndexIndexationArray2,"IndexationIndex",FALSE,FALSE ),
					
					pIndexations2 := streamGetIndexations( pLeg2 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List1 := indexationsGetDividendsIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List1 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List2 := indexationsGetFinalCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List2 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List3 := indexationsGetFixingIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List3 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List4 := indexationsGetInitialCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List4 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List5 := indexationsGetInterestFlowIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List5 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List6 := indexationsGetInterestRateIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List6 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List7 := indexationsGetIntermediateCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List7 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List8 := indexationsGetLegNpvIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List8 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List9 := indexationsGetMarginIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List9 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List10 := indexationsGetOutStandingCapitalIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List10 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List11 := indexationsGetRecoveryNominalIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List11 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List12 := indexationsGetSecondaryStrikeIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
