					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List12 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List13 := indexationsGetStrikeIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List13 ),
					pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					pIndexation2List14 := indexationsGetTaxCreditIndexationList( pIndexations2 ),
					arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex",pIndexation2List14 ),
					
					iCount2 := 0,
					iNbIndexationElements := arrayGetLenght( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					WHILE ( iCount2 < iNbIndexationElements ) DO
					{
						pElement := arrayGetElement( pIndexIndexationArray2,iCount2 ),
						pIndexationList2 := arrayElementGetPointer( pElement,"IndexationIndex" ),
						IF ( NOT isNull( pIndexationList2 ) ) THEN
						{
							iCount := 0,
							iIndexations2 := indexationListCount( pIndexationList2 ),
							WHILE ( iCount < iIndexations2 ) DO
							{
								pIndexation2 := indexationListGoto( pIndexationList2,iCount ),
								pIndexationTemplate2 := indexationGetTemplate( pIndexation2 ),
								//The following line gives the pointer to the index used in the indexation
								pIndexationIndex2 := indexationTemplateGetIndex( pIndexationTemplate2 ),
								
								sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndexationIndex2 ),
								sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndexationIndex2 ),
								
								pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
								arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pIndexationIndex2 ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Indexation","Yes" ),
								
								iCount := iCount + 1
							}
						},
						iCount2 := iCount2 + 1
					},
					arrayFree( pIndexIndexationArray2 ),
					
					//Check if there is a barrier condition on the legs and get the index of the barrier
					sBarrier := legGetString( pComponent,"Barriers status" ),
					IF ( sBarrier == "Yes" ) THEN
					{
						pBarriers := streamsGetBarriers( pStreams ),
						
						IF ( NOT isNull( pBarriers ) ) THEN
						{
							iBarrCount := 0,
							iNbBarriers := barriersGetNumberOfBarriers( pBarriers ),
							WHILE ( iBarrCount < iNbBarriers ) DO
							{
								pBarrier := barriersGetBarrier( pBarriers,iBarrCount ),
								pIndex := barrierGetIndex( pBarrier ),
								
								sIndexCategory := indexGetCategory( pIndex ),
								sIndexNature := indexGetNature( pIndex ),
								
								pElement := arrayAddElement( pIndexArray ),
								arrayElementSetPointer( pElement,"Index",pIndex ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Category",sIndexCategory ),
								arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Nature",sIndexNature ),
								
								iBarrCount := iBarrCount + 1
							}
						}
					}
				},
				iPhase := iPhase + 1
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		
		//Algorithms which gives the Usage for each index
		iCount := 0,
		iNbElements := arrayGetLenght( pIndexArray ),
		WHILE ( iCount < iNbElements ) DO
		{
			pElement := arrayGetElement( pIndexArray,iCount ),
			pIndex := arrayElementGetPointer( pElement,"Index" ),
			sResetMode := indexGetResetMode( pIndex ),
			sSpread := "No",
			
			iNbComponents := indexGetNumberOfComponents( pIndex ),
			IF ( iNbComponents == 2 ) THEN
			{
				pUnderIndex1 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,0 ),
				pUnderIndex2 := indexGetIndex( pIndex,1 ),
				sUnderIndex1Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex1 ),
				sUnderIndex2Nature := indexGetNature( pUnderIndex2 ),
				fIndex1Weight := indexGetWeight(pIndex,0 ),
				fIndex2Weight := indexGetWeight(pIndex,1 ),
				iIndex1Weight := toInt( fIndex1Weight ),
				iIndex2Weight := toInt( fIndex2Weight ),
				
				IF ( ( iIndex1Weight == 1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == -1 ) ) THEN
					sIndexProduct := "Yes"
				ELSE IF ( ( iIndex1Weight == -1 ) AND ( iIndex2Weight == 1 ) ) THEN
					sIndexProduct := "Yes",
				
				sFormulatype := indexGetBasketFormula( pIndex ),
				IF ( sResetMode == "Basket" ) AND ( sIndexProduct == "Yes" ) AND ( sFormulatype == "Sum" ) THEN
					sSpread := "Yes"
			},
			
			sIndexation := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Indexation" ),
			sCategory := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Category" ),
			sNature := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Nature" ),
			IF ( sCategory == "FX rate" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sIndexation == "Yes" ) THEN
					sUsage := ""
				ELSE
					sUsage := "FX"
			}
			ELSE IF ( sCategory == "Equity" ) THEN
				sUsage := "Equity"
			ELSE IF ( sCategory == "Inflation" ) THEN
				sUsage := "Inflation"
			ELSE IF ( sCategory == "Rate" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sNature == "Standard" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sResetMode == "Average") THEN
						sUsage := "Average"
					ELSE IF ( sResetMode == "Compounded" ) THEN
						sUsage := "Compound"
					ELSE
						sUsage := "Libor"
				}
				ELSE IF ( sNature == "Swap rate" ) THEN
					sUsage := "CMS",
				
				IF ( sSpread == "Yes" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
						sUsage := "CMS Spread"
					ELSE
						sUsage := "Spread"
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( sCategory == "Formula" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sSpread == "Yes" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( sUnderIndex1Nature == "Swap rate") AND ( sUnderIndex2Nature == "Swap rate" ) ) THEN
						sUsage := "CMS Spread"
					ELSE
						sUsage := "Spread"
				}
				ELSE
					sUsage := "Formula"
			}
			ELSE
				sUsage := "Other",
			
			arrayElementSetString( pElement,"Usage",sUsage ),
			iCount := iCount + 1
		},
		
		//Check the priority in the look up table
		iCount := 0,
		WHILE ( iCount < iNbElements ) DO
		{
			pElement := arrayGetElement( pIndexArray,0 ),
			sUsage := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Usage" ),
			fPriority := lookupNumeric( "MX.ALL.UsagePriority","ALL",
								"Usage",sUsage ),
			arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement,"Priority",fPriority ),
			
			iCount := iCount + 1
		},
		
		IF ( iNbElements <> 0 ) THEN
		{
			pElement := arrayGetElement( pIndexArray,0 ),
			sUsage := arrayElementGetString( pElement,"Usage" )
		},
		
		legSetUsage( pLeg,sUsage ),
		arrayFree( pIndexArray )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Closing.InitialData

/*
MXpress
Initial data assignments rule

Version 1.1
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","InitialData") lookup table

Version 1.0
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sInitialDataActive := strToUpperCase( lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","InitialData" ) ),
	IF ( ( sInitialDataActive <> "YES" ) AND ( sInitialDataActive <> "NO" ) ) THEN 
		ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.GParam", "wrong returned value for Key 1 = InitialData ( should be YES or NO )" ),
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pLeg ) AND ( sInitialDataActive =="YES" ) ) THEN
	{
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
		iComponent := 0,
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
			pInitialData := legGetInitialDatas( pComponent ),
			pResults := pNULL,
			sField := "InitialData",
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,"Registration",sRegistration ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
			{
				iResult := 0,
				iNbResults := lookupResultsGetNumberOfLines( pResults ),
				WHILE ( iResult < iNbResults ) DO
				{
					iLegId := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pResults,iResult,0 ) ),
					IF ( iLegId == iComponent ) THEN
					{
						sFieldName := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,iResult,1 ),
						sFieldType := legGetFieldType( pComponent,sFieldName ),
						
						IF ( sFieldType == "string" ) THEN
							initialdatasSetString( pInitialData,sFieldName,legGetString( pComponent,sFieldName ) )
						ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "numeric" ) THEN
							initialdatasSetNumeric( pInitialData,sFieldName,legGetNumeric( pComponent,sFieldName ) )
						ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "integer" ) THEN
							initialdatasSetInteger( pInitialData,sFieldName,legGetInteger( pComponent,sFieldName ) )
						ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "date" ) THEN
							initialdatasSetDate( pInitialData,sFieldName,legGetDate( pComponent,sFieldName ) )
						ELSE IF ( sFieldType == "bid/ask" ) THEN
							initialdatasSetBidAsk( pInitialData,sFieldName,legGetBidAsk( pComponent,sFieldName ) )
					},
					iResult := iResult + 1
				}
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.FCplStlMt

/*
MXpress
Set the Settlement Method for 
- Security deals (plain , BSB, LB or Repos) : Settlement Method = Security Clearing House
- FX Vanilla Deals (Spots, Outrights, FX Swaps) : Settlement Method = CLS if CLS eligible

Used algorithm:
Initialize variables
Retrieve Father Contract of Component 0
Retrieve Contract Registration
Retrieve Contract Typology
Loop on all components
	If Contract Registration is "Bonds" or "Equities"
	or "Bond Repos" or "Repo EQ"
	or "Bond buy/sell back" or "Equity buy/sell back
	or "IRD Lending Borrowing" or "EQD Lending Borrowing"
	or "EQD Warrants" then
		If Contract registration is "Bonds" then 
			Retrieve Clearing Center field
		Else If Contract registration is "Equities" then 
			Retrieve Clearing field 
		Else
			Retrieve Clearing center field
		End If
		Set the Settlement method to retrieved clearing
	Else
		If Contract typology is Spot, Outright, FX Swap, Split Value, Time Option, Prorata or FX Fixing then
			Set CLS eligibility date for the Entity with value date date
			Set CLS eligibility date for the Counterparty with value date
			Set CLS eligibility date for the first currency with value date
			Set CLS eligibility date for the second currency with value date date
			Set CLS eligibility for the Counterparty and Currencies and Entity (MX.ALL.CLSeligibility)
			Check the date and hour
			Under conditions on date, set the settlement method with CLS or CLS-SDS as follow
				if the value date is in the past: not CLS eligible
				if the value date is today and if it is in the windows for CLS-SDS then CLS-SDS
				if the value date is today and if it is not in the windows for CLS-SDS then not CLS eligbile
				if the value date is tomorrow and if it is in the windows for CLS-SDS then CLS-SDS (EUR/CAD : between 23:00 and midnight GMT)
				if the value date is tomorrow and if it is not in the windows for CLS-SDS then CLS
				If the value date is after tomorrow then CLS
			
			Else set the settlement method with empty string
		Else
			Set the settlement method with empty string
		End if
	End If
End loop

Used look-up tables:
 - MX.ALL.GParam.ALL to know if CLS is activated
 - MX.ALL.CLSSDSeligibility.ALL to get the timeframe for settlements of the same day in CLS

Version 1.4
Update in order to use 
- Currency native fields instead of currency UDFs
- CLS agreement instead of Counterparty UDFs
 
Version 1.3
Updated to handle the centralized mapping field, using the 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","ClearingCenter") lookup table

Version 1.2
Update of the rule to manage Same Day Settlement Window

Version 1.1
Avoid using the "ctpGetUserFields" function when is an Internal Trade.

Version 1.0
Security deals
The purpose if this Rule is to Assign a settlement method according to the clearing house of the security
FX deals
The purpose of this rule is to assign a settlement method to each FCC
The assignment method is based on the CLS eligibility status and date of the entity, the counterpart and both currencies in the currency pair.

- CLS eligibility status of the entity and the counterpart check removed
- Included CLS eligibility by counterparty and currency defined in lookup table MX.ALL.CLSeligibility
- Bug fix on security deals on the Clearing center field label.
- Amendment to handle the EQD Warrants registration too
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sEmpty := "",    
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
	iComponent := 0,
	pFinContract := legGetFatherContract( legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ) ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pFinContract ),
	sTypology := legGetTypology( pFinContract ),
	sCLSactivated := "",
	pResults := pNull,
	pComponent := pNull,
	sClearing := "",
	sSourceClass := "",
	sCLSSettlementMethod := "CLS",
    sSDSCLSSettlementMethod := "SDS-CLS",
	sLegalEntity := "",
	sCounterpart := "",
	sCcy1 := "",
	pCcy1Udf := pNull,
	sCcy2 := "",
	pCcy2Udf := pNull,
	sCcyPair := "",
	sCtpCcyEligib := "",
	sInternal := "",
	fCurrentHour := 0.0,
	fCurrentMin := 0.0,
	sCurrentHTS := toString( tsGetHour( sysGetGMTimestamp( ) ) ),
	dCurrentDate := tsGetDate( sysGetGMTimestamp( ) ),
	fCurrentHour := convertSToNumeric( strSubString( sCurrentHTS,0,2 ) ),
	fCurrentMin := convertSToNumeric( strSubString( sCurrentHTS,3,5 ) ),
	dMaturity := toDate( "00000000" ),
	dTradeDate := toDate( "00000000" ), 
	sSDSStart := "",
	sSDSEnd := "",
	fSDSStartHour := 0.0,
	fSDSStartMin := 0.0,
	fSDSEndHour := 0.0,
	fSDSEndMin := 0.0,
	bCtpCLSMember := FALSE,
	bCtpTPSCLSMember := FALSE,
	bEntCLSMember := FALSE,
	bEntTPSCLSMember := FALSE,

	
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
        sComponentTypology := legGetTypology( pComponent ),
		// For Equities & Bonds (plain , BSB, LB or Repos)
		// Settlement Method = Clearing Center
		IF ( ( sRegistration == "Bonds" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Bond Repos" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Bond buy/sell back" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "IRD Lending Borrowing" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Equities" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Equity Repos" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "Equity buy/sell back" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Lending Borrowing" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "EQD Warrants" )
		OR ( sRegistration == "CP/CD" ) ) THEN
		{
			pResults := pNULL,
			sField := "ClearingCenter",
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","ClearingCenter","Registration",sRegistration ),
			IF ( NOT isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
			{
				sClearingField := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
				sClearing := legGetString( pComponent,sClearingField )
			},
			// Set the Settlement Method
			legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sClearing )
		}
		ELSE
		{
			/* CLS modification */
			sCLSactivated := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL",
										   "Key 1","CLS"),
			IF  ( sCLSactivated == "YES" ) THEN
			{
				sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ), //mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE, ...
				
				// Identification of near leag and far leg of FX Swap
				IF ( sTypology == "FX Swap" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( iComponent == 0 ) THEN 
						legSetString( pComponent,"FXSWAP_LEG","N" )
					ELSE 
						legSetString( pComponent,"FXSWAP_LEG","F" )
				},
				// For Spots, Outrights, FX Swaps, Split Value, Time Option, Prorata and FX Fixing
				// Settlement Method = CLS if CLS Eligible
				IF ( ( sTypology == "Spot" )
				OR ( sTypology == "Outright" )
				OR ( sTypology == "Split Value" )
				OR ( sTypology == "Time Option" )
				OR ( sTypology == "Prorata" )
				OR ( sTypology == "FX Fixing" )
				OR ( sTypology == "FX Swap" ) ) THEN
				{
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
					dTradeDate := legGetTradingDate( pComponent ),
					sLegalEntity := legGetString( pComponent,"Legal Entity" ),
					sCounterpart := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
					sPortfolio := legGetString(pComponent,"Portfolio"),
					pPortfolio := mx.system.object.PushByLabel("mx.statics.organization.portfolio", sPortfolio),
					pProcessingArea := mx.statics.organization.Portfolio.GetProcessingArea(pPortfolio),
					sProcessingArea:= ctpGetName(pProcessingArea),
					sComponentFamily := legGetProductFamily( pComponent ),
					sComponentGroup := legGetProductGroup( pComponent ),
					sComponentType := legGetProductType( pComponent ),
					sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule(pComponent), 
					
					sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ), //Check if it is an Internal Trade
					IF ( sInternal <> "Yes" ) THEN
					{

						bEntCLSMember := ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sLegalEntity,"CLS MEMBER" ),
						bEntTPSCLSMember := ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sLegalEntity,"CLS TPS MEMBER" ),
						bCtpCLSMember := ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sCounterpart,"CLS MEMBER" ),
						bCtpTPSCLSMember := ctpIsBusinessActivityChecked( sCounterpart,"CLS TPS MEMBER" )

					},
					
					sCcyPair := legGetString (pComponent,"Instrument"    ),
					sCcy1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Quantity currency" ),
					sCcy2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Other quantity currency" ),
                              
					pAgreementInput:=agreementInputCreate(),
					
					agreementInputSetEvaluationDate(pAgreementInput,dMaturity),
					agreementInputSetLegalEntity(pAgreementInput,sLegalEntity),
					agreementInputSetProcessingArea(pAgreementInput,sProcessingArea),
					agreementInputSetContractTypology(pAgreementInput,sTypology),
					agreementInputSetTypology(pAgreementInput,sComponentTypology),
					agreementInputSetFamily(pAgreementInput,sComponentFamily),
					agreementInputSetGroup(pAgreementInput,sComponentGroup),
					agreementInputSetType(pAgreementInput,sComponentType),					
					agreementInputSetSourceModule(pAgreementInput,sSourceModule),
                    
                    agreementInputSetCounterparty(pAgreementInput,sCounterpart),
                    agreementInputSetCurrency(pAgreementInput,sCcy1),
                    bCLSEligibCtpCcy1:=agreementEvaluate("CLS",pAgreementInput),
                    agreementInputSetCurrency(pAgreementInput,sCcy2),
                    bCLSEligibCtpCcy2:=agreementEvaluate("CLS",pAgreementInput),
                    
                    agreementInputSetCounterparty(pAgreementInput,sLegalEntity),
                    agreementInputSetCurrency(pAgreementInput,sCcy1),
                    bCLSEligibOurselvesCcy1:=agreementEvaluate("CLS",pAgreementInput),
                    agreementInputSetCurrency(pAgreementInput,sCcy2),
                    bCLSEligibOurselvesCcy2:=agreementEvaluate("CLS",pAgreementInput),
                                        
					bCLSEligib := bCLSEligibCtpCcy1 AND bCLSEligibCtpCcy2 AND bCLSEligibOurselvesCcy1 AND bCLSEligibOurselvesCcy2,
                                     
					pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.CLSSDSeligibility","ALL",
												"Currency",sCcy1,
												"Currency2",sCcy2 ),
					sSDSStart := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
					fSDSStartMin := convertSToNumeric( strSubString( sSDSStart,3,5 ) ),
					sSDSEnd := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
					fSDSEndHour := convertSToNumeric( strSubString( sSDSEnd,0,2 ) ),
					fSDSEndMin := convertSToNumeric( strSubString( sSDSEnd,3,5 ) ),
					
					IF (    ( bEntCLSMember OR bEntTPSCLSMember )
						AND	( bCtpCLSMember OR bCtpTPSCLSMember )  
						AND bCLSEligib 
						AND sSourceClass <> "mxContractEventICANCEL" 
                        ) THEN
					// All static data criteria are ok for CLS eligibility
					{
						IF ( dMaturity < dCurrentDate ) THEN                          	
							legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
						// Maturity date in the past
						ELSE IF ( dMaturity == dCurrentDate ) THEN
						{
							IF ( fSDSEndHour > 0.0 ) THEN
							{
								IF ( ( fCurrentHour > fSDSEndHour-1.0 )
								OR ( ( fCurrentHour == fSDSEndHour - 1.0 ) AND ( fCurrentMin > fSDSEndMin ) ) ) THEN
								//Maturity date today but after the SameDaySettlement window
									legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( ( ( fCurrentHour > MAX( 0.0,fSDSStartHour - 1.0 ) ) OR ( fCurrentHour == MAX( 0.0,fSDSStartHour - 1.0 ) AND fCurrentMin > fSDSStartMin ) )
									AND ( ( fCurrentHour < fSDSEndHour - 1.0 ) OR ( fCurrentHour == fSDSEndHour - 1.0 AND fCurrentMin > fSDSEndMin ) )
									AND ( sSDSStart <> sSDSEnd ) ) THEN
									//Maturity date today and in the SameDaySettlement window
										legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sSDSCLSSettlementMethod )
									ELSE
										legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
								}
							}
							ELSE
								legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )                       
						}
						ELSE IF ( dMaturity ==  dCurrentDate + shift( dCurrentDate, "+1od", fxCntGetDateToValueDateCalendar( "sCcyPair" ) ) ) THEN
						{
							//Maturity date tomorrow
							IF ( fSDSStartHour > 0.0 ) THEN
							{
								//CLS Eligibile
								legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sCLSSettlementMethod )
							}
							ELSE
							{
								IF ( ( fCurrentHour < 23.0 ) OR ( fCurrentHour == 23.0 AND fCurrentMin < fSDSStartMin ) ) THEN
									//CLS Eligible
									legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sCLSSettlementMethod )
								ELSE
								{
									IF ( sSDSStart <> sSDSEnd ) THEN
									// In Same Day Settlement window
										legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sSDSCLSSettlementMethod )
									ELSE
										legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
								}
							}
						}
						ELSE
							legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sCLSSettlementMethod )
					}
					ELSE
						legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
				}
				ELSE
					legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legSetSettlementMethod( pComponent,sEmpty )
			}
		},
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
		/* End of CLS modification */   
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.FCplBO

/*
MXpress
Processing fields completion

Purpose:
Assign information needed for Operations and Finance

Used algorithm:
For the master agreement, check the master agreement at counterparty level

Version 1.8
Add the legal entity in the MA assignment

Version 1.7
Add the typology in the MA assignment

Version 1.6
Remove UDF assignment

Version 1.5
Remove CIs completion

Version 1.4
Add CIs completion

Version 1.3
Add the unmatch value

Version 1.2
Assignment is dependant on the fact the counterparty has a valid SWIFT address (ie with a swift code)

Version 1.1
Manages the case of duplication of trades or events.
If the udf ISCUSTOM is checked then no modification is taken into account

Version 1.0
This formula set:
- the Fo and Bo Validation Mode, Fo and BO four eyes flag
- the Master Agreement and The Document Type of the Contract
*/

{
	//Field Initialization/Reset
	pLeg := This,
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	iContract := 0,
	pContract := pNull,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	iComponent := 0,
	pComponent := pNull,
	sCounterparty := "",
    sLegalEntity := "",
	sTypology := "",
	pMasterAgreement := pNull,
	pMasterConfirmationAgreement := pNull,   
	dDate := npGetTradingDate( ),
	sInternal := "",
    bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ), "B_" ),
	
	WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO
	{
		pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
        pMainPackage:=legGetFatherPackage(pContract),
        pMainContract:=legGetContractAt(pMainPackage,0),
		
		iComponent := 0,
		iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
		WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
		{
			pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
			sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
            sLegalEntity := legGetString( pComponent,"Legal Entity" ),
			sTypology := legGetString( pComponent,"Typology" ),
			sInternal := legGetString( pComponent,"Internal" ), //Check if it is an Internal Trade
			sMainContract := legGetRegistration (pContract), // BAB addition for the Dual Cur Deposit
            
           // BAB Addition
            
            sUsage:=legGetUsage(pComponent),
            
            IF legIsElementValid(pComponent,"ISLAMIC_SK") THEN
            	sIslamicSukuk:=legGetString(pComponent,"ISLAMIC_SK"),
          
                
            // to be rechecked and amended based on BAB scope
            //To retrieve Contract Number from Master deal and set it as Logical Package ID (LPID) on the contract
            IF (((sTypology == "Murabaha Borrowing") OR (sTypology == "Murabaha Placement")
            OR (sTypology == "RR Murabaha") OR (sTypology == "RR SAMA") 
            OR (sTypology == "Repo Murabaha") OR (sTypology == "Repo SAMA") OR (sTypology == "SAMA Bill") 
            OR (sTypology == "FX Murabaha") OR (sTypology == "LTM") OR sTypology == "LTM Callable" OR sTypology == "LTM CapFloorCollar" OR sTypology == "LTM Range" OR sTypology == "LTM Range Callable"
            OR (sTypology == "Sukuk Issuance" OR sTypology == "SFRM")
            OR ( sTypology == "PRS" OR sTypology == "PRS Range" OR sTypology == "PRS CapFloorCollar" OR sTypology == "PRS Inverse Floater")
            OR ( sTypology == "Depo Callable" OR sTypology == "Depo Range" OR sTypology == "Depo CapFloorCollar" OR sTypology == "Depo Range Callable") OR sTypology == "CD Issuance"
            OR ((sUsage == "PRS Waad COM") AND (sGroupType =="Trader") AND (sTypology <> "Murabaha Commodity") AND (sTypology <> "Murabaha Com Paper") ) /* OR (sUsage == "Deposit Collared COM")*/)
            AND (sInternal <> "Yes" AND bIsInBookingSequence))
            THEN
            {
 	        	
            
            	IF ( ((sTypology == "PRS")) AND (NOT(isNull(pMainPackage))) ) THEN
                fOriginalContractRef := legGetNumeric(pMainContract,"Origin Reference")
                ELSE IF sMainContract == "Dual Cur Deposit" THEN
                fOriginalContractRef := legGetNumeric(pComponent,"Origin Reference")
                ELSE
                fOriginalContractRef := legGetNumeric(pContract,"Origin Reference"),
                
                //Addition for DCD STB booking: Check if Logical package ID already defined - system natively assigns an LPID. LPID should be defined only when it's already not defined
                fCurrentLPID := legGetLogicalPackageId(pComponent),
                IF fCurrentLPID == 0.0 THEN
                //Set the logical package ID
            	legSetLogicalPackageId(pComponent, fOriginalContractRef),
                
                sISUsage:= legGetUsage(pComponent),
                IF sTypology == "PRS" THEN
                sISUsage:="PRS",
                sMurabahaTag:= sISUsage + "-" + toString(fOriginalContractRef),
                legOverwrite(pComponent,"IS_ORILINK",sMurabahaTag)
            },
            
            // End of BAB Addition
            
			// Get the counterparty master agreement and the counterparty confirmation master agreement and assign it to the component
			IF ( ( sCounterparty <> "" ) AND ( sInternal <> "Yes" ) AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" ) ) THEN
			{
				pMasterAgreement := agreementGetMA( dDate,"COUNTERPART",sCounterparty,"TYPOLOGY",sTypology,"LEGAL ENTITY",sLegalEntity ),
				legSetMA( pComponent,pMasterAgreement ),
				
				pMasterConfirmationAgreement := agreementGetMCA( dDate,"COUNTERPART",sCounterparty,"TYPOLOGY",sTypology,"LEGAL ENTITY",sLegalEntity ),
				legSetMCA( pComponent,pMasterConfirmationAgreement )
			},
			iComponent := iComponent + 1
		},
		iContract := iContract + 1
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Pricing.FTP_FxConversion

/*
MXpress

Pricing rule for Fund Transfer Pricing - Fx Conversion in case of CCS

Version 1.1
CCS case: Added the first component "Liquidity Component" to get the Instrument cross-currency

Version 1.0
*/

{
	// Retrieve the deal
	pLeg := This,
	pComponentFtp := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pContractFtp := legGetFatherContract( pComponentFtp ),
	//Get the Currency from the original deal
	sCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFtp, "Settl.Currency" ),
	
	//Get the Streams from the original deal
	pStreamsFtpLoan := legGetStreams( pContractFtp ),
	pStreamFtpLoan := streamsGetStream( pStreamsFtpLoan,0,0 ),
	
	//Get the Period from the original deal
	sPeriod := "",
	iNumberPeriod := streamGetNumberOfPeriods( pStreamFtpLoan ),
	IF ( ( iNumberPeriod == 0 ) OR ( iNumberPeriod == 1 ) ) THEN
		sPeriod := "Single"
	ELSE
		sPeriod := "Multi",
	
	//Get the Term from the original deal
	sTerm := "",
	
	//Get the Frequency from the original deal
	sPaymentFrequency := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Payment_Frequency" ),
	sFrequency := strToUpperCase( sPaymentFrequency ),
	
	//Get the Nature from the original deal
	sNature := "",
	IF ( streamIsFloating( pStreamFtpLoan ) ) THEN
		sNature := "Floating"
	ELSE
		sNature := "Fixed",
	
	IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
	{
		sIndex := legGetString( pComponentFtp, "Index" ),
		pIndex := indexGetIndexByLabel( sIndex ),
		pUnderlyingIndex := indexGetUnderlyingIndex( pIndex ),
		pScheduleDefinition := indexGetSchedulesDefinition( pUnderlyingIndex ),
		pSchedule := schedulesDefinitionGetDrivingSchedule( pScheduleDefinition ),
		sScheduleGenerator := scheduleGetGeneratorLabel( pSchedule ),
		IF ( strStartsWith( sScheduleGenerator, "1 DAY" ) ) THEN
			sFrequency:="1D"
		ELSE IF ( strStartsWith(sScheduleGenerator, "3M" ) ) THEN
			sFrequency:="3M"
	},
	
	//Get split spot
	pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","ALL","Currency",sCurrency,"Period",sPeriod,"Term",sTerm,"Frequency",sFrequency,"Nature",sNature ),
	sSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
	sFundingIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
	sIRRIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ),
	
	IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
	{
		// Add the first component: Liquidity Component
		pContainer := npOpen(),
		pFundingLoanLeg := legAddComponent( pContainer,"mxContractISINGLE","Loans/Deposits","Loan/Deposit" ),
		pComponentFundingLoan := legGetFatherContract( pFundingLoanLeg ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pComponentFundingLoan ) ) THEN
		{
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Nature","Generator driven" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Instrument",sFundingIndex )
		},
		sFundingCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Settl.Currency" ),
		npClose( pContainer ),
		
		sSplitCurrency := strSubString( sIRRIndex,0,3 ),
		fSplitSpotRate := cuGetFxRate( sFundingCurrency, sSplitCurrency ),
		legOverwrite( pComponentFtp,"pf_split_curr", sFundingCurrency + "-" + sCurrency ),
		legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"pf_spot_split_rate",fSplitSpotRate )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXMM.Closing.BrokerageFees

/*
MXpress
Brokerage fee typology management:
	- Creation of 2 offsetting fictious flows
    - Attachment of the brokerage fee (REV/BRK/BFEE/FEE) within the SCF.

Version  1.0
*/
{
	//get deal information
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
    sTypology := legGetString(pLeg,"Typology"),
	IF ( sRegistration == "Simple cash flow" ) THEN
	{
		sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ),
		sClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
		IF ( ( sPattern == "Brokerage Fee" ) AND ( sClass <> "mxContractEventIPORTFOLIO_ASSIGNMENT" ) ) THEN
		{
			sPortfolio:= legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
			sLegalEntity:= ptfGetLegalEntity( sPortfolio ),
			fNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ),
			sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
			sPayReceive := legGetString( pComponent,"Payout" ),
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponent,"Flow_date" ),
			
			sBroker := legGetString( pComponent,"Broker" ),
			sFlowsNature := "Revenue",
			sFlowsType0 := "BRK",
			sFlowsType1 := "BFEE",
			sFlowsType2 := "FEE",
			legOverwrite( pLeg,"Counterpart",sLegalEntity ),
			
			IF ( sPayReceive == "Receive" ) THEN
				fNominal := -1.0 * fNominal,
			
			pBrkFlows := legGetBrokerFlows( pComponent ),
			IF ( brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pBrkFlows ) == 0 ) THEN
			{
				//Checking existing additional flows
				IF ( ( legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Nominal" ) <> 0.0 )
				AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ) <> "" )
				AND ( legGetDate( pComponent,"Flow_date" ) <> toDate( "00000000" ) ) ) THEN
				{
					//Creating the two flows that offset themselves
					pSCF := scfGetFlows( pLeg ),
					//To make sure than when we reset, no SCF remains, we remove all eventual ones automatically created at resetting instrument (currency in this case)
					IF ( scfGetNumberOfLines( pSCF ) > 0 ) THEN
					{
						iNbLines := scfGetNumberOfLines( pSCF ),
						WHILE ( iNbLines > 0 ) DO
						{
							scfRemoveFlow( pSCF,scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,0 ) ),
							iNbLines := scfGetNumberOfLines( pSCF )
						}
					},
					//One for pInit
					scfAddFlow( pSCF ),
					//One for pOffSet
					scfAddFlow( pSCF ),
					
					pInitFlow := scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,0 ),
					pFlowOffset := scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),
					
					// parameters of new flow
					scfFlowSetAmount( pFlowOffset,fNominal ),
					
					IF ( scfFlowGetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,0 ) ) == 1 ) THEN
						scfFlowSetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),1 )
					ELSE
						scfFlowSetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),2 ),
					
					IF ( sFlowsNature == "Revenue" ) THEN
					{
						scfFlowSetType( pInitFlow,"R" ),
						scfFlowSetType( pFlowOffset,"R" )
					},
					
					scfFlowSetValueDate( pInitFlow,dStartDate ),
					scfFlowSetAmount( pInitFlow,fNominal ),
					scfFlowSetCurrency( pInitFlow,sCurrency ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pInitFlow,0,sFlowsType0 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pInitFlow,1,sFlowsType1 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pInitFlow,2,sFlowsType2 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pInitFlow,3,sFlowsType3 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pInitFlow,4,sFlowsType4 ),
					
					scfFlowSetValueDate( pFlowOffset,dStartDate ),
					scfFlowSetAmount( pFlowOffset,fNominal ),
					scfFlowSetCurrency( pFlowOffset,sCurrency ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,0,sFlowsType0 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,1,sFlowsType1 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,2,sFlowsType2 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,3,sFlowsType3 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,4,sFlowsType4 ),
					
					//Adding an broker flow to set the end date
					pBrkFlows := legGetBrokerFlows( pComponent ),
					brkFlowsAdd( pBrkFlows ),
					
					//Assigning the New Brokerage Flow
					pBrkFlowInit := brkFlowsGetAt( pBrkFlows,0 ),
					brkFlowSetFee( pBrkFlowInit,fNominal ),
					brkFlowSetCurrency( pBrkFlowInit,sCurrency ),
					brkFlowSetSource( pBrkFlowInit,sPortfolio ),
					brkFlowSetDestination( pBrkFlowInit,sBroker ),
					brkFlowSetType( pBrkFlowInit,"BrokerFee" ),
					brkFlowSetValueDate( pBrkFlowInit,dStartDate )
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( brkFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pBrkFlows ) == 1 ) THEN
			{
				//Adding an additional flow to set the end date
				pBrkFlows := legGetBrokerFlows( pComponent ),
				
				//Assigning the New Brokerage Flow
				pBrkFlowInit := brkFlowsGetAt( pBrkFlows,0 ),
				brkFlowOverwriteFee( pBrkFlowInit,fNominal ),
				brkFlowOverwriteCurrency( pBrkFlowInit,sCurrency ),
				brkFlowOverwriteSource( pBrkFlowInit, sPortfolio ),
				brkFlowOverwriteDestination( pBrkFlowInit, sBroker ),
				brkFlowOverwriteType( pBrkFlowInit,"BrokerFee" ),
				brkFlowOverwriteValueDate( pBrkFlowInit,dStartDate ),
				
				IF ( scfGetNumberOfLines( scfGetFlows( pLeg ) ) == 1 ) THEN
				{
					pSCF := scfGetFlows( pLeg ),
					scfAddFlow( pSCF )
				}
				ELSE IF ( scfGetNumberOfLines(scfGetFlows( pLeg ) ) == 2 ) THEN
				{
					pSCF := scfGetFlows( pLeg ),
					pFlowInit := scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,0 ),
					pFlowOffset := scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),
					IF ( scfFlowGetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,0 ) ) == 1 ) THEN
						scfFlowSetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),1 )
					ELSE
						scfFlowSetPayRec( scfGetFlowAt( pSCF,1 ),2 ),
					
					scfFlowSetAmount( pFlowOffset,scfFlowGetAmount( pFlowInit ) ),
					scfFlowSetCurrency( pFlowOffset,scfFlowGetCurrency( pFlowInit ) ),
					
					IF ( sFlowsNature=="Revenue" ) THEN
					{
						scfFlowSetType( pFlowInit,"R" ),
						scfFlowSetType( pFlowOffset,"R" )
					},
					
					scfFlowSetValueDate( pFlowInit,dStartDate ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowInit,0,sFlowsType0 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowInit,1,sFlowsType1 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowInit,2,sFlowsType2 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowInit,3,"FIC" ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowInit,4,sFlowsType4 ),
					
					scfFlowSetValueDate( pFlowOffset,dStartDate ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,0,sFlowsType0 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,1,sFlowsType1 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,2,sFlowsType2 ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,3,"FIC" ),
					scfFlowSetTypology( pFlowOffset,4,sFlowsType4 )
				}
			}
		}
	},
       //BAB addition for CD Issuance fees 	
			IF sTypology == "CD Issuance" THEN
            {
				pStreams := legGetStreams(pLeg),
				iNbLegs := streamsGetNumberOfLegsPerPhase(pStreams),

                        pAddFlows := streamsPushAdditionalFlows(pStreams),
                        iFlow := 0,
                        iNbAddFlows := additionalFlowsGetNumberOfFlows(pAddFlows),
                        
                        WHILE (iFlow < iNbAddFlows) DO
                        {
                        pFlow := additionalFlowsGetFlowAt(pAddFlows, iFlow),
                        sComment := flowGetComment(pFlow),
                        
                        IF sComment == "CDFEE"  THEN
                        {
                        additionalFlowsDeleteFlow(pAddFlows, iFlow),
                        iNbAddFlows := iNbAddFlows - 1
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                        iFlow := iFlow + 1
                        }
                        },
                        
				
						sCurrency := legGetString (pLeg, "Settl.Currency"),
                        fNominal := legGetNumeric (pLeg, "Nominal"),
                        sSingleperiod := legGetString(pLeg, "Single_period"),                       
                        IF  sSingleperiod == "Yes" THEN
                        {
                        fParvalue := legGetNumeric (pLeg, "Repayment")
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                        fParvalue := fNominal 
                        },
                        IF sCurrency == "USD" THEN
                        
                        {
                       
                            dStart := legGetDate (pLeg, "Start"),
                            dEnd := legGetDate (pLeg, "Maturity"),
                            iNewIndex := additionalFlowsAddFlow(pAddFlows),
                            pNewFlow := additionalFlowsGetFlowAt(pAddFlows, iNewIndex),                   
                            fFee := (6500.0 + fParvalue * 6.0/1000000.0 + 0.04/100.0 * fParvalue),
                            flowSetAmount(pNewFlow, -fFee),
                            flowSetCurrency(pNewFlow, sCurrency),
                            flowSetPaymentDate(pNewFlow, dStart),
                            flowSetAmortizingStartDate (pNewFlow, dStart),
                            flowSetAmortizingEndDate (pNewFlow, dEnd),
                            flowSetType(pNewFlow, "UDEF"),
                            flowSetTypology(pNewFlow, 0, "CAP"),
                            flowSetTypology(pNewFlow, 1, "IPAY"),
                            flowSetTypology(pNewFlow, 4, "ADD"),
                            flowSetComment(pNewFlow, "CDFEE"),
                            flowSetCounterpart(pNewFlow, legGetString(pLeg, "Counterpart"))
                            
                            
                    	}

               }
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.ALL.TradabilityCheckCommon

/*
MXpress Common Tradability Checks

Version 1.1
Integrate checks which used to be  FXD, EQD, IRD specific checks into generic checks

Version 1.0

Notes:
When a tradability check is not fulfilled, a warning/error code is is generated with legAddMessage function.
Those codes will then be analysed in mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.ALL.CheckMsg rule and error/warning messages will be pushed to user and tradability status computed accordingly.

Checks included by default and their code:
		- Generic minimum maturity	: "GMaxMat"
		- Generic maximum maturity	: "GMaxMat"
		- Generic nominal			: "GNom"

Centralized mapping field using
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Instrument"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","NominalUnit"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Maturity"), 
- ( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","Nominal") lookup tables

If customizations of the warning/error level are necessary, in order to get the required user notification level:
For Tradability warning
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Tradable
For Tradability error for all users
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","Tradability-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark - trade is Not tradable
	Booking is prevented    
For Tradability error requiring confirmation
	-> legAddMessage( pComponent,"<message>","<field>","TradabilityToConfirm-<code>-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
	Highlight the field and an explanatory message is accesible by clicking on exclamation mark
	For Trader: Trade is Tradable and can be booked.
	For Sales: Trade Requires confirmation if communication is activated. Otherwise it's Not tradable.
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	sAsset := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	// For each of the component of the transaction, perform tradability checks
	sUserGroup := sysGetGroup(),
	dTradingDate := sysGetTradingDate( ),    
	iCount := 0,
	iNbLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( pLeg ),
    //BAB addition - sales group
        sGroup := sysGetGroup(),
                    pGroupResults := lookupResults("MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sGroup),
                    sGroupType := lookupResultsGetString(pGroupResults,0,0),
	WHILE ( iCount < iNbLegs ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg, iCount ),
		pAllMessages := legGetMessages( pComponent ),
		IF ( ( ( sAsset <> "HYBRID" ) AND ( sAsset <> "SF" ) )
			OR ( legGetRegistrationLabel( pComponent ) == "mxContractISINGLE" ) ) THEN
       	{
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pComponent ),
            bCheckComponent := TRUE
        }
		ELSE 
        {
			sRegistration := legGetTitle( legGetFatherContract( pComponent ) ),
            bCheckComponent := FALSE
        },
		
		// Retrieves the dynamic values that will be used to check the tradability of the transaction
        // Retrieve Instrument
		pFieldMapInstrumentResult := pNULL,
		sField := "Instrument",
		pFieldMapInstrumentResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
													"Registration",sRegistration,
													"Criteria 1","",
													"Criteria 2","",
													"Criteria 3","" ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldMapInstrumentResult ) ) THEN
		{
			iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldMapInstrumentResult,0,0 ) ),
			sInstrumentField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldMapInstrumentResult,0,1 )
		},
		sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,sInstrumentField ),
        
        // Retrieve Nominal unit
        pFieldMapNominalUnitResult := pNULL,
        sField := "NominalUnit",
        pFieldMapNominalUnitResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                                        "Registration",sRegistration,
                                                        "Criteria 1","",
                                                        "Criteria 2","",
                                                        "Criteria 3","" ),
        sNominalUnitValue := "",
        IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldMapNominalUnitResult ) ) THEN
        {
            iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldMapNominalUnitResult,0,0 ) ),
            sNominalUnitField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldMapNominalUnitResult,0,1 ),
            IF ( bCheckComponent ) THEN
                sNominalUnitValue := legGetString( pComponent,sNominalUnitField )            
            ELSE IF ( iLeg == iCount ) THEN
                sNominalUnitValue := legGetString( pComponent,sNominalUnitField )
        },
		
        // Criteria column is asset specific
        sTradabilityCriteria := "",
        IF ( sAsset == "FXD" ) THEN
        {
        	// For FXD, liquidity is used as Criteria 1
			sLiquidity := lookupString( "MX.FXD.Liquid","ALL","Currency Pair",sInstrument),
            sTradabilityCriteria := sLiquidity
        }
        ELSE IF ( sAsset == "EQD" ) THEN
        {
        	// For EQD, cateogry (1/2/3) is used as Criteria 1
			sCategory := lookupString( "MX.EQD.Category","ALL","Instrument",sInstrument ),
            sTradabilityCriteria := sCategory
        }        
        ELSE
        {
        	// For other products, by default, we use 'Currency' aka Nominal unit as Criteria 1
            sTradabilityCriteria := sNominalUnitValue
        },		
        
        //BAB addition - Check for Broker A and Broker B in Murabaha Details
         IF  legIsElementValid( pComponent,"IS_BROKER1" ) THEN
            sBrokerA := legGetString(pComponent,"IS_BROKER1"),
         IF  legIsElementValid( pComponent,"IS_BROKER2" ) THEN
            sBrokerB := legGetString(pComponent,"IS_BROKER2"),
         IF sBrokerB <> "" AND sBrokerA <> "" THEN   
         {
            IF sBrokerA == sBrokerB THEN
            {
            	IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Tradability-IS_BROKER-" ) == 0 ) THEN
                legAddMessage(pComponent,"Cannot book Deal with Broker B Same as Broker A", "IS_BROKER2","Tradability-IS_BROKER-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
            }
         },
         //end of BAB addition
		
        // Check Maturity        
		sMinMaxMaturity := lookupString( "MX.ALL.Tradability","Maturity",
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria",sTradabilityCriteria,
										"Instrument",sInstrument),
		IF ( sMinMaxMaturity <> "" ) THEN
        {
            // Retrieve Maturity
            pFieldMapMaturityResult := pNULL,
            sField := "Maturity",
            pFieldMapMaturityResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                                        "Registration",sRegistration,
                                                        "Criteria 1","",
                                                        "Criteria 2","",
                                                        "Criteria 3","" ),
            dMaturityValue := dTradingDate,
            IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldMapMaturityResult ) ) THEN
            {
                iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldMapMaturityResult,0,0 ) ),
                sMaturityField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldMapMaturityResult,0,1 ),
                IF ( bCheckComponent ) THEN
					dMaturityValue := legGetDate( pComponent, sMaturityField )
                ELSE IF ( iLeg == iCount ) THEN
                    dMaturityValue := legGetDate( pComponent, sMaturityField ),
                    
                IF ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "CURR" ) THEN
                    sCalendar := fxCntGetDateToValueDateCalendar( sInstrument )
                ELSE IF ( legGetProductFamily( pComponent ) == "EQD" ) THEN
                {
                    pSecurity := secGetSecurityData(sInstrument),
                    sCalendar := securityGetCalendarLabel(pSecurity)
                }
                ELSE IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Payment calendar" ) ) THEN
                    sCalendar := legGetString( pComponent,"Payment calendar" )
                ELSE IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Pay calendar1" ) ) THEN
                    sCalendar := legGetString( pComponent,"Pay calendar1" )
                ELSE
                    sCalendar := "TGT",            
                sMinMaturity := "",
                sMaxMaturity := strToken( sMinMaxMaturity,"/",1 ),
                IF ( sMaxMaturity == "" ) THEN
                    sMaxMaturity := strToken( sMinMaxMaturity,"/",0 )
                ELSE
                    sMinMaturity := strToken( sMinMaxMaturity,"/",0 ),                                    
                IF ( sMinMaturity <> "" ) THEN
                {
                    dMinMaturity := dTradingDate + shift( dTradingDate,sMinMaturity,sCalendar ),
                    IF ( ( dMaturityValue < dMinMaturity ) AND ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Tradability-GMinMat-" ) == 0 ) ) THEN
                        legAddMessage( pComponent,"Maturity before " + toString1( dMinMaturity ) + " (" + sMinMaturity + ")",sMaturityField,"Tradability-GMinMat-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
                },            
                IF ( sMaxMaturity <> "" ) THEN
                {
                    dMaxMaturity := dTradingDate + shift( dTradingDate,sMaxMaturity,sCalendar ),
                    IF ( ( dMaturityValue > dMaxMaturity ) AND ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Tradability-GMaxMat-" ) == 0 ) ) THEN
                        legAddMessage( pComponent,"Maturity after " + toString1( dMaxMaturity ) + " (" + sMaxMaturity + ")",sMaturityField,"Tradability-GMaxMat-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
                }
            }
		},
        
        // Check Nominal        
		fMaxNominal := lookupString( "MX.ALL.Tradability","Nominal",
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria",sTradabilityCriteria,
										"Instrument",sInstrument),
		IF ( fMaxNominal <> 0.0 ) THEN
		{
            // Retrieve Nominal and Equivalent Nominal
            pFieldMapNominalResult := pNULL,
            sField := "Nominal",
            sCriteria1 := "",
            IF ( legIsElementValid(pComponent, "Equiv_Qty_Nom_Lbl") ) THEN
				sCriteria1 := legGetString(pComponent, "Equiv_Qty_Nom_Lbl"),
            pFieldMapNominalResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping",sField,
                                                        "Registration",sRegistration,
                                                        "Criteria 1",sCriteria1,
                                                        "Criteria 2","",
                                                        "Criteria 3","" ),
            fNominalValue := 0.0,
            IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldMapNominalResult ) ) THEN
            {
                iLeg := toInt( lookupResultsGetNumeric( pFieldMapNominalResult,0,0 ) ),
                sNominalField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldMapNominalResult,0,1 ),
                IF ( bCheckComponent ) THEN
                	fNominalValue := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sNominalField )
                ELSE IF ( iLeg == iCount ) THEN
                	fNominalValue := legGetNumeric( pComponent,sNominalField ),                

                sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
                sRefCCY := ptfGetEntityCurrency( sPortfolio ),
                IF ( sNominalUnitValue <> sRefCCY ) THEN
                    fRate := cuGetFxRate( sRefCCY,sNominalUnitValue )
                ELSE
                    fRate := 1.0,
                fEquivNominalValue := fNominalValue * fRate,  
                
                //BAB addition for RFQ: Only check the OTB Nominal tradability check for Sales user group profile.
                //Max Nominal is checked to decide whether the trade priced from Sales profile (RFQ Requester) should be sent for Trader price confirmation, status "Requires Confirmation"
                //BAB addition: RFQ eligibility check
                sFatherRegistration := legGetRegistration(pLeg),
    			sFatherPattern := legGetPatternLabel(pLeg),
                IF sFatherRegistration == "FX swap" THEN
                    sTypology := "FX Swap" 
                ELSE IF sFatherPattern == "Depo CapFloorCollar" THEN
                    sTypology := legGetString(pLeg,"Typology")
                ELSE
                    sTypology := legGetTypology(pLeg),
                    
                    pResult := lookupResults( "BAB.ALL.RFQEligibility","ALL","Registration",sFatherRegistration,"Typology",sTypology),
                    sRFQIsEligible := lookupResultsGetString(pResult,0,0),

				sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
                    
                    //BAB addition: Check event class, to be used for assigning Requester restricted Layout, to prevent updating RFQ-impacting financial data during events on the generated contract
                    bEventRFQ :=   sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXERCISE"
                                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE"
                                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEARLY_TAKEUP_OFFSETTING"
                                OR sBOClass == "mxContractEventFxIEXTENSION_OFFSETTING",

                
                IF sGroupType == "Sales" AND sRFQIsEligible =="Yes" AND ( NOT(bEventRFQ) ) THEN
                {
                IF ( fEquivNominalValue > fMaxNominal ) THEN
                    IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"TradabilityToConfirm-GNom-" ) == 0 ) THEN
                        legAddMessage( pComponent,"Nominal > " + toString( fMaxNominal / fRate, 20, 0, TRUE, 0 ) + " " + sNominalUnitValue + " (" + toString( fMaxNominal,20,0,TRUE,0 ) + " " + sRefCCY + " Equivalent)",sNominalField,"TradabilityToConfirm-GNom-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) )
                }
            }
		},
        
        // Check Price
        fMinMaxPrice := lookupString( "MX.ALL.Tradability","Price",
										"Registration",sRegistration,
										"Criteria",sTradabilityCriteria,
										"Instrument",sInstrument),
        IF ( fMinMaxPrice > 0.0 ) THEN
        {
            pContainer := npOpen(),
            pVirtualLeg := legAddComponent( pContainer,legGetRegistrationLabel( pComponent ),legGetRegistration( pComponent ),legGetPatternLabel( pComponent ) ),
            legOverwrite( pVirtualLeg,"Instrument",sInstrument ),
            legCompute( pVirtualLeg, "noWorkflow" ),
            fMarketPrice := 0.0,
            fDealPrice := 0.0,
            fCalcTolerance := 0.0,
            IF ( sRegistration == "Bonds" ) THEN
            {
                fMarketPrice := legGetNumeric( pVirtualLeg, "EvalCleanPrice" ),
                fDealPrice := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"Settlement price" )
            },
            npClose( pContainer ),
            IF ( fMarketPrice > 0.0 AND fDealPrice > 0.0 ) THEN
                fCalcTolerance := ABS( 100.0 * (fDealPrice - fMarketPrice) / fMarketPrice ),
            IF ( fCalcTolerance > fMinMaxPrice ) THEN
            {
                IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Tradability-PMax-" ) == 0 ) THEN
                    legAddMessage( pComponent,"Price = " + toString( fDealPrice ) + " > market = " + toString( fMarketPrice ) + " +/- " + toString( fMinMaxPrice,5,2,FALSE,0 ) + "%","Settlement price","Tradability-PMax-",messageSysGetWarningLabel( ) )
            }                            
        },        
        
        // BAB Addition, if IB Rate == 0 Throw Error
            pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
          	pFieldResult := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FieldMapping","SalesMargin","Registration",sRegistration,"Criteria 1","Currency","Criteria 2", sCriteria2 ),
            sNativeSalesMarginCurrencyField := lookupResultsGetString( pFieldResult,0,1 ),
                    IF ( NOT isNull( pFieldResult ) ) THEN
                    {
                        sNativeSalesMarginCurrency := legGetString( pMainComponent,sNativeSalesMarginCurrencyField )
                    },
        
        IF (sGroupType == "Sales" AND sNativeSalesMarginCurrency <> "SAR") THEN
        {
        	  IF sAsset <> "FXMM" THEN //The FXMM check is kept in FXMM tradability check
        	 {
             	IF legIsElementValid(pComponent, "MRG_FX_RT") THEN
                {
        		fIBRate:=legGetNumeric(pComponent,"MRG_FX_RT"),                
            	IF (fIBRate == 0.0) THEN
            	{
                 	IF ( messagesGetNbOfMessagesFromCode( pAllMessages,"Tradability-MRG_FX_RT-" ) == 0 ) THEN
                 	legAddMessage( pComponent,"Cannot book deal with IB Rate field empty", "MRG_FX_RT","Tradability-MRG_FX_RT-",messageSysGetErrorLabel( ) ) 
                }
                }
             } 
        },
        // End of BAB Addition, if IB Rate == 0 Throw Error
        
        // BAB CR EXT-Addition
        sRegistration := legGetRegistration(pComponent),
        IF (sRegistration == "Bonds") THEN
        {
            sCurrency := legGetString(pComponent,"Currency"),
            sAllowed := lookupString("BAB.ALL.Funds.Allowed.Ccy","ALL","CURRENCY",sCurrency),
            sInstrument := legGetString(pComponent,"Instrument"),
            pSecurityData := secGetSecurityData(sInstrument),
            sSecurityType := securityGetTypologyType(pSecurityData),
        
            //Block any fund trade booked with a currency different than USD, GBP, EUR, or GCC currencies
            IF sSecurityType == "Sukuk Fund" THEN
            {
                IF (sAllowed == "No") THEN
                {
                    ThrowError (pComponent,"Fund booked with a currency different than USD, EUR, GBP, or GCC curencies","Currency")
                }
            },       
        
            // BAB CR EXT-End 
    
            
            iCount := iCount + 1
        }
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.FInit-TARN

/*
MXpress
FXD Pre-Pricing completion for TARN

*/

//Version  1.0

{

// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sFlexType := "",
    iFixings := 0,
    fCommonNominal := 0.0,
    fStrike := 0.0,
    fTotalNominal := 0.0,
	iCountFixing := 0,
    sStrikeModeR := "",
    bPivotStyle := FALSE,
    sNominalUnit := "",
	sRebateQuot := "",
	sPattern := "",
	sCallPut := "",
	fTarnStrike := 0.0,
    sTarnStrikeBoundary := "",
    fDigitalSpread := 0.0, 
    fTarnLeverage := 0.0,
    fTarnLeverage := 0.0,
    fKILevel := 0.0,
    fStrike := 0.0,
    sTarnKIBoundary := "",
    fStrike1 := 0.0,
    fStrike3 := 0.0,
    sTarnKDownBoundary := "",
    sTarnKUpBoundary := "",

    
	pContract := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,0 ),
	IF ( legIsElementValid( pComponent,"Flex type" ) ) THEN
	{
		sFlexType := legGetString( pComponent,"Flex type" ),
		IF ( sFlexType == "TARN" ) THEN
		{
			pExtension := legGetFlexExtensionAt( pComponent,0 ),
			iFixings := flxUdGetListLength( pExtension ),
			dEndSchedSettlDate := flxUdGetDate( pExtension,"FXVDAT",iFixings - 1 ),
			dEndSchedPayDate := flxUdGetDate( pExtension,"FXPDAT",iFixings - 1 ),
			fCommonNominal := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Nominal" ),
			fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" ),
			
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"Option expiration",dEndSchedSettlDate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Expiry",dEndSchedSettlDate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Generator_end", dEndSchedSettlDate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Delivery",dEndSchedPayDate ),
			
			IF ( legGetBoolean( pComponent,"TARN#0.Input Nominals" ) ) THEN 
			{
				IF ( legGetBoolean( pComponent,"TARN#0.Nominal by date" ) ) THEN
				{
					fTotalNominal := 0.0,
					iCountFixing := 0,
					WHILE ( iCountFixing < iFixings ) DO
					{
						fTotalNominal := fTotalNominal + flxUdGetNumeric( pExtension,"FIXNOM",iCountFixing ),
						iCountFixing := iCountFixing + 1
					},
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Traded nominal",fTotalNominal )
				}
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"Traded nominal",convertIToNumeric( iFixings) * fCommonNominal )
			},
			IF NOT( legGetBoolean( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_ByRange" ) ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike1",fStrike ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2",fStrike ),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3",fStrike ),
				
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_L","Fixed"),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M","Fixed"),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U","Fixed")
			},
			
			sStrikeModeR := legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_R" ),
			IF ( sStrikeModeR <> "By Range" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_L","Fixed"),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M","Fixed"),
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U","Fixed")
			},
			IF ( ( sStrikeModeR == "ATM spread" ) OR ( sStrikeModeR == "Digital" ) OR ( sStrikeModeR == "Linear Function" ) ) THEN
			{
				IF ( legGetBoolean( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_ByRange" ) ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_R","By Range" )
				ELSE
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_R","Fixed" )
			},
			
			bPivotStyle := legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.Pivot_Style" ) <> "None",
			IF ( ( legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.Schedule_Values" ) == "Selection" ) AND ( bPivotStyle ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Schedule_Values","Multiple Values" ),
			
			//TARN autocompletion for barrier features
			IF ( bPivotStyle ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Type","None" ),
			
			dStartSched := legGetDate( pComponent,"TARN#0.Generator_start" ),
			IF ( legGetDate( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Generator_start" ) == toDate( "00000000" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Generator_start",dStartSched ),
			
			IF ( legGetDate( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Generator_end" ) == toDate( "00000000" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Generator_end",dEndSchedSettlDate ),
			
			sNominalUnit := legGetString( pComponent,"Traded_nominal_unit" ),
			sRebateQuot := legGetString( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Rebate_Quot" ),
			IF ( strCONTAIN( sRebateQuot,sNominalUnit + " pips") 
			OR ( strCONTAIN( sRebateQuot,"%" ) AND ( NOT strCONTAIN( sRebateQuot,sNominalUnit ) ) ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite(pComponent, "TARN_BAR#2.Rebate_Quot", "%" + sNominalUnit ),
			
			IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Type" ) == "Continuous" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Rebate_Type","Fixed" ),
			
			//Remove discrete target
			IF ( legGetString( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Type" ) == "Discrete Target" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Type","Discrete" ),
			
			IF ( legGetString( pComponent, "pf_TarnFlag" ) == "True" ) THEN
			{
				sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pContract ),
				sCallPut := strSubString( legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.Call_Put"),0,4 ),
				IF ( sPattern == "TARN Digital FXD" ) THEN
				{
					fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
					sTarnStrikeBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary" ),
					fDigitalSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnDigitalSpread" ),
					fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fTarnStrike ),
					
					IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2",fTarnStrike ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3",fDigitalSpread ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M","Fixed" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U","Digital" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
						ELSE IF (sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM") THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2",fDigitalSpread ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3",fTarnStrike ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M","Digital" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U","Fixed" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM") THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent, "TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM") THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent, "TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPattern == "TARN Vanilla FXD" ) THEN
				{
					fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
					fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
					sTarnStrikeBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge",0.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fTarnStrike ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike",fTarnStrike ),
					
					IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPattern == "TARN EKI FXD" ) THEN
				{
					fKILevel := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnKILevel" ),
					fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
					fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
					sTarnStrikeBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary" ),
					sTarnKIBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnKIBoundary" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",0.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike",fStrike ),
					
					IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",100.0 )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%",100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 )
					},
					
					IF ( fKILevel >= fStrike ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge",fStrike ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fKILevel ),
						IF ( sTarnKIBoundary == "Up" ) THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnKIBoundary == "Down" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" ),
						
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Mid" )
							ELSE
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Low" )
						}
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Low" )
							ELSE
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Mid" )
						}
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge",fKILevel ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fStrike ),
						IF ( sTarnKIBoundary == "Up" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Mid" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnKIBoundary == "Down" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Low" ),
						
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
							ELSE
								legOverwrite( pComponent, "TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
						}
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
							ELSE
								legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
						}
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPattern == "TARN Collar FXD" ) THEN
				{
					fStrike1 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike1" ),
					fStrike3 := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge",fStrike1 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fStrike3 ),
					fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
					sTarnKDownBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnKDownBoundary" ),
					sTarnKUpBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnKUpBoundary" ),
					
					IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",100.0 )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%",100.0 )
					},
					
					IF ( sTarnKUpBoundary == "Up" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
					ELSE IF ( sTarnKUpBoundary == "Down" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" ),
					
					IF ( sTarnKDownBoundary == "Up" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Mid" )
					ELSE IF ( sTarnKDownBoundary == "Down" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in","Low" )
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPattern == "TARN Reverse FXD" ) THEN
				{
					fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
					sTarnStrikeBoundary := legGetString( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary" ),
					fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
					
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge",0.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge",fTarnStrike ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike1",0.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike Slope2",2.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2",-1.0 * fTarnStrike ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike Slope3",2.0 ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3",-1.0 * fTarnStrike ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U","Linear Function" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M","Linear Function" ),
					
					IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%",fTarnLeverage * 100.0 ),
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%",100.0 ),
						IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "ITM" ) THEN 
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","Mid" )
						ELSE IF ( sTarnStrikeBoundary == "OTM" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in","High" )
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.FXD.Closing.LayDyn-TARN

/*
MXpress
FXD Dynamic Layouts for TARN

*/

{
	pPackage := This,
	
	IF ( legIsInitialized( pPackage ) ) THEN
	{
		// Scans all Contracts and their components , reset the field properties. 
		// Fields Initialization/Reset
		iContract := 0,
		iNumContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pPackage ),
		bIsTradeOnly := ( legGetRegistrationLabel( This ) == "mxContractITRADE" ),
		sFlexType := "",
        sProductPattern := "",  
        sCallPut := "",
        fTarnStrike := 0.0, 
        fDigitalSpread := 0.0, 
        fTarnLeverage := 0.0,
        fKILevel := 0.0, 
        fStrike := 0.0,
		
		pLeg := legGetFirstComponent( This ),
		IF ( legIsElementValid( pLeg,"Flex type" ) ) THEN
		{
			sFlexType := legGetString( pLeg,"Flex type" ),
			IF ( sFlexType == "TARN" ) THEN
			{
				WHILE ( iContract < iNumContracts ) DO
				{
                    pContract := legGetContractAt( pPackage,iContract ),
                    legResetProperties( pContract ),
                    
                    iComponent := 0,
                    iNumComponent := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
                    WHILE ( iComponent < iNumComponent ) DO
                    {
                        pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
                        legResetProperties( pComponent ),
                        iComponent := iComponent + 1
                    },
                    iContract := iContract + 1
				},
                
                IF ( bIsTradeOnly ) THEN 
                {
                    legResetProperties( pPackage ),
                    iContract := -1
                }
                ELSE
                    iContract := 0,
				
                WHILE ( iContract < iNumContracts ) DO
                {
                	sProductPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pLeg ),
                    
                    //***************************REVERSE LOGIC FOR PF WHEN RELOADING A TARN************************************************//
                    IF ( legGetString( pLeg,"pf_TarnFlag" ) <> "True" ) THEN
                    {
                        
                        sCallPut := strSubString( legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.Call_Put"),0,4 ),
                        IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Digital FXD" ) THEN
                        {
                            fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
                            fDigitalSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnDigitalSpread" ),
                            fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
                            IF fDigitalSpread == 0.0 AND fTarnLeverage == 0.0 AND fTarnStrike == 0.0 THEN
                            {
                                IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnDigitalSpread",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike3" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnDigitalSpread",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Strike2" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        ELSE IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Vanilla FXD" ) THEN
                        {
                            fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
                            fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
                            IF fTarnLeverage == 0.0 AND fTarnStrike == 0.0 THEN
                            {
                                IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        ELSE IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN EKI FXD" ) THEN
                        {
                            fKILevel := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnKILevel" ),
                            fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
                            fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
                            
                            IF fTarnLeverage == 0.0 AND fKILevel == 0.0 AND fStrike == 0.0  THEN
                            { 
                                IF legGetNumeric(pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge") <> legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" ) THEN
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnKILevel",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_LowRge" ))
                                ELSE
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnKILevel",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge" )),
                                
                                IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_Strike" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
