                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                },
                                
                                fKILevel := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnKILevel" ),
                                fStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
                                IF ( fKILevel >= fStrike ) THEN
                                {
                                    IF legGetString(pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in") == "High" THEN 
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKIBoundary","Up")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString(pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in") == "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKIBoundary","Down")
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    IF legGetString(pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in") == "Mid" THEN 
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKIBoundary","Up")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString(pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in") == "Low" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKIBoundary","Down")
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        ELSE IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Collar FXD" ) THEN
                        {
                            fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
                            
                            IF fTarnLeverage == 0.0 THEN
                            {
                                IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Low_%" )/100.0)
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%" )/100.0)
                                },
                                
                                IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                    legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKUpBoundary","Up")
                                ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                    legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKUpBoundary","Down"),
                                    
                                IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                    legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKDownBoundary","Up")
                                ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.LowBound_is_in")== "Low" THEN
                                    legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnKDownBoundary","Down")
                            }
                        }
                        ELSE IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Reverse FXD" ) THEN
                        {
                            fTarnStrike := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike" ),
                            fTarnLeverage := legGetNumeric( pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage" ),
                            IF fTarnLeverage == 0.0 AND fTarnStrike == 0.0 THEN
                            {
                                IF ( sCallPut == "Call" ) THEN
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Up_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                }
                                ELSE
                                {
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrike",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Common_HighRge" )),
                                    legSetNumeric(pComponent,"pf_TarnLeverage",legGetNumeric( pComponent,"TARN#0.Mid_%" )/100.0),
                                    
                                    IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "High" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","OTM")
                                    ELSE IF legGetString( pComponent,"TARN#0.HighBound_is_in")== "Mid" THEN
                                        legSetString(pComponent,"pf_TarnStrikeBoundary","ITM")
                                }
                            }
                    
                        },
                        legOverwrite(pLeg,"pf_TarnFlag","True")
                    },
                    //***************************REVERSE LOGIC FOR PF WHEN RELOADING A TARN************************************************//
                    
                    sSettlement := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Settlement" ),
                    sTargetStyle := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Target_Style" ),
                    sCapLoss := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Cap_Loss" ),
                    sPivotStyle := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Pivot_Style" ),
                    sStrikeModeR := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_R" ),
                    sScheduleValues := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Schedule_Values" ),
                    bLowRangeByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.LowRge_by_date" ),
                    bHighRangeByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.HighRge_by_date" ),
                    bStrikeByRange := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_ByRange" ),
                    sStrikeModeL := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_L" ),
                    sStrikeModeM := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_M" ),
                    sStrikeModeU := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_mode_U" ),
                    bStrikeByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike_ByDate" ),
                    bStrike1ByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike1_ByDate" ),
                    bStrike2ByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike2_ByDate" ),
                    bStrike3ByDate := legGetBoolean( pLeg,"TARN#0.Strike3_ByDate" ),
                    sBarrierType := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Type" ),
                    sBarrierStyle := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Barrier_Style" ),
                    s2BarrierStyle := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN_BAR#2.Barrier_Style" ),
                    sRebateType := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN_BAR#2.Rebate_Type" ),
                    sCallPut := legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Call_Put" ),
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Pivot FXD") OR ( sProductPattern == "TARN FXD" ) THEN
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.04_pivotStyle" ),
                    
                    IF ( sSettlement == "Cash" ) THEN
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.19_settlementCur" ),
                    
                    IF ( sTargetStyle <> "None") THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.15.01_target" ),
                        IF ( sTargetStyle <> "Discrete") THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.15.02_targetQuotat" )
                        ELSE
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.15.03_itmCriteria" ),
                        
                        //Cap Loss
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.16.02_capLoss" ),
                        IF ( sCapLoss <> "None" ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.16.01_cap" ),
                            IF ( sCapLoss == "Yes" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.16.03_capQuotation" )
                            ELSE IF ( sCapLoss == "Total Max Loss" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.16.04_capMaxLossCurr" )
                        }
                    },
                    
                    //The Pivot payoff is different from all the rest and in preTrade it is managed after the other cases. 
                    IF ( sPivotStyle == "None" ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.01_tarnBasicFeatures" ),
                        //Strike Mode R
                        IF ( sStrikeModeR == "By Range" ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.01_strikeMode" ),
                        
                        IF NOT( sScheduleValues == "Selection" ) THEN
                        { 
                            IF NOT( bLowRangeByDate ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.05_lowRange" ),
                            IF NOT( bHighRangeByDate ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.03_highRange" )
                        },
                        
                        IF ( bStrikeByRange ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.02_strike1" ),
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.04_strike2" ),
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.06_strike3" ),
                            
                            IF ( sStrikeModeL == "Linear Function" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.08_strikeLinearFunction1" )
                            ELSE IF ( sStrikeModeL == "Digital" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.11_strikeDigital1" ),
                            
                            IF ( sStrikeModeM == "Linear Function" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.09_strikeLinearFunction2" )
                            ELSE IF ( sStrikeModeM == "Digital" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.12_strikeDigital2" ),
                                
                            IF ( sStrikeModeU == "Linear Function" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.10_strikeLinearFunction3" )
                            ELSE IF ( sStrikeModeU == "Digital" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.13_strikeDigital3" )
                        }
                        ELSE
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.07_strike" ),
                        
                        //The values by date cases
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.14_scheduleValues" ),
                        IF ( sScheduleValues == "Selection"  ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.04_highRangeByDate" ),
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.06_lowRangeByDate" ),
                            IF ( bStrikeByRange ) THEN 
                            {
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.03_strike1ByDate" ),
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.05_strike2ByDate" ),
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.07_strike3ByDate" )
                            }
                            ELSE
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.08_strikeByDate" ),
                            
                            IF ( bStrikeByDate ) THEN
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.07_strike" ),
                            
                            IF ( bStrike1ByDate ) THEN
                            {
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.02_strike1" ),
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.08_strikeLinearFunction1" )
                            },
                            
                            IF ( bStrike2ByDate ) THEN
                            {
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.04_strike2" ),
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.09_strikeLinearFunction2" )
                            },
                            
                            IF ( bStrike3ByDate ) THEN
                            {
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.06_strike3" ),
                                legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.10_strikeLinearFunction3" )
                            }
                        },
                        
                        //Barrier
                        IF ( sBarrierType <> "None" ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.01_tarnBar" ),
                            
                            IF ( strCONTAIN( s2BarrierStyle , "Up" ) ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.02_tarnBarUp" )
                            ELSE
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.03_tarnBarDown" ),
                            
                            IF ( strCONTAIN ( s2BarrierStyle , "In" ) ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.04_tarnBarIn" )
                            ELSE
                            {
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.05_tarnBarOut" ),
                                IF ( sRebateType == "Fixed" ) THEN
                                    legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.18.06_tarnBarRebateFixed" )
                            },
                            
                            IF ( ( sBarrierType == "Discrete" )
                            AND ( sRebateType == "Top Up" )
                            AND ( sSettlement == "Delivery" ) )THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.02_adjusted")
                        },
                        
                        //Additional rules
                        IF ( sTargetStyle <> "None" ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.12_accStrike" ),
                            IF ( legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Acc_Strike" ) == "Specific" ) THEN
                                legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.13_accStrikeSpec" )
                        },
                        
                        IF ( ( sSettlement == "Delivery" )
                        AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"TARN#0.Cross_Target") == "Truncated coupon" ) ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.02_adjusted" )
                    }
                    ELSE
                    {
                        //Pivot 
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.01_pivot" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.14_scheduleValues" ),
                        
                        IF ( sBarrierStyle == "Up and In" ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.02_pivotBarUp" )
                        ELSE IF ( sBarrierStyle == "Down and In" ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.03_pivotBarDown" )
                        ELSE IF ( sBarrierStyle == "In" ) THEN
                        {
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.02_pivotBarUp" ),
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.03_pivotBarDown" )
                        },
                        IF ( sPivotStyle == "Digital" ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.10_strikeDigital" )
                        ELSE
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.17.05_pivotBoundary" )
                    },
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Vanilla FXD" ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.01_strike" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.04_OTMLeverage" )
                    },
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN EKI FXD" ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.01_strike" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.02_KILevel" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.04_OTMLeverage" )
                    },
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Digital FXD" ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.01_strike" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.03_digitalSpread" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.04_OTMLeverage" ),
                        legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.02_strike1" ),
                        legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.06_strike3" ),
                        
                        IF ( strSubString( sCallPut,0,4 ) == "Call" ) THEN
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.13_strikeDigital3" )
                        ELSE
                            legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.12_strikeDigital2" )
                    },
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Collar FXD" ) THEN
                    {
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.02_strike1" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.06_strike3" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.04_OTMLeverage" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.05_leverages" )
                    },
                    
                    IF ( sProductPattern == "TARN Reverse FXD" ) THEN
                    {
                        legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.02_strike1" ),
                        legRemoveProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.09.06_strike3" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.01_strike" ),
                        legAddProperty( pLeg,"fxd_13.20.04_OTMLeverage" )
                    },
                    iContract := iContract + 1
                },
            	callPreTradeFormula( This,"mx.completion._Functions.ALL.LayDynCommon", "FXD")
			}
        }
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.mirroring.ALL.Booking.MirrIE

/*
MXpress
Mirroring rule for inter-entity trades

Used algorithm
Loop on all contracts
	If it is an internal contract
		If source portfolio and destination portfolio have different entities
			Clone the current contract
			Overwrite few fields accordingly
		End if
	End if
End loop

Assumption: The internal trader, the source trader and the destination trader are correctly set by the BTB/FTP rule.

Version 1.1
Stores the source portfolio and the destination portfolio as internal portfolio 
in order to used in case of a Cancel&Reissue

Version 1.0
- Split the inter-entity logic from the mirroring task

*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( legGetMainComponent( pLeg ) ),
	
	//Field Initialization/Reset
	iContract := 0,
	iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
	bToBTB := FALSE,
	pFees := pNULL,
	iNbFees := 0,
	iFee := 0,
	bBTBDone := FALSE,
	sDestinationTrader := "",
	sSourceTrader := "",
	sPortfolio := "",
	sBTBPortfolio := "",
	iCloneComponent := 0,
	iNbCloneComponents := 0,
	sBTBType := "",
	sRegistration := "",
	iResults := 0,
	iNbResults := 0,
	bFloating := FALSE,
	iNbComponents := 0,
	iComponent := 0,
	bInternal := FALSE,
	sSourcePortfolio := "",
	sDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sField := "",
	iBTBEntity := 0,
	bInternalDone := FALSE,
	sCounterparty := "",
    
	// BTB Inter-Entity
    bPackageSingle := legGetRegistration(pLeg) == "Package single",// Checks wether if package single
    
    IF ( bPackageSingle ) THEN
    {
        iNbContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts( pLeg ),
        iContract := 0,
        WHILE ( iContract < iNbContracts ) DO //Looping on the contracts
        {
            pContract := legGetContractAt( pLeg,iContract ),
            
            bInternal := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Internal" ) == "Yes",
            IF ( bInternal ) THEN
            {
                sSourcePortfolio := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Portfolio" ),
                sDestinationPortfolio := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Counterpart" ),
                
                // Destination trade
                sDestinationTrader := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Destination trader" ),
                IF ( sDestinationTrader == "" ) THEN 
                    sDestinationTrader := legGetString( legGetFirstComponent( pContract ),"Trader" ),
                
                sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sSourcePortfolio ),
                sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
                
                sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sSourcePortfolio ),
                sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
                
                IF ( sClosingEntitySourcePortfolio <> sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio 
                	OR sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio <> sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio ) THEN
                {
                    iComponent := 0,
                    iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pContract ),
                    WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
                    {
                        pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pContract,iComponent ),
                        legOverwrite( pComponent,"Internal","No" ),
                            
                        sPortfolio := legGetString ( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),                        
                        IF ( sPortfolio == sDestinationPortfolio ) THEN
                        {
                        
                            IF ( NOT( sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" AND iComponent >= 1 ) ) THEN
                            	legSwitchBuySell( pComponent ),
                            
                        	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Counterpart",sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio ),
                            legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pComponent,sSourcePortfolio ),
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Portfolio",sDestinationPortfolio ),
                            
                            // Set Source Traders
                            legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Source trader",sDestinationTrader )
						}
                        ELSE
                        {
                        	legOverwrite( pComponent,"Counterpart",sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio ),
                            legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pComponent,sDestinationPortfolio ),
                            legOverwrite( pComponent,"Portfolio",sSourcePortfolio )
                        },
                        
                        iComponent := iComponent + 1
                    },
                    
                    // Clone trade and switch clone
                    pCloneContract := legClone( pContract ),
                    
                    iCloneComponent := 0,
                    iNbCloneComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pCloneContract ),
                    WHILE ( iCloneComponent < iNbCloneComponents ) DO 
                    {
                        pCloneComponent := legGetComponentAt( pCloneContract,iCloneComponent ),
                        legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Internal","No" ),
                        
                        //Switch buy sell from first inter-entity leg
                        IF ( NOT( sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg" AND iCloneComponent >= 1 ) ) THEN
                        	legSwitchBuySell( pCloneComponent ),
                        
                        sPortfolio := legGetString ( pCloneComponent,"Portfolio" ),                        
                        IF ( sPortfolio == sSourcePortfolio ) THEN
                        {
                        	legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Counterpart",sLegalEntitySourcePortfolio ),
                            legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pCloneComponent,sSourcePortfolio ),
                            legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Portfolio",sDestinationPortfolio )
						}
                        ELSE
                        {
                        	legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Counterpart",sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio ),
                            legSetFOPInternalPortfolio( pCloneComponent,sDestinationPortfolio ),
                            legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Portfolio",sSourcePortfolio ),

                            // Set Source Traders
                            legOverwrite( pCloneComponent,"Source trader",sDestinationTrader )
                        },
                        

                        
                        iCloneComponent := iCloneComponent + 1
                    }
                }
            },
            iContract := iContract + 1
        }
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.morphing.FX.Morphing

/*
MXpress
FX Morphing rules

!! IMPORTANT !!
There are 3 fully identical copies of this rule:
- mx.completion.FX.Pricing.Morphing
- mx.morphing.FX.Morphing
- mx.mirroring.FX.Booking.Morphing
Respectively called by tasks P_FX_Morphing (Completion, META_MX_FXMM_P sequence), M_FX_Morphing (Morphing, META_MX_FXMM sequence), B_FX_Morphing (Mirroring, META_MX_FXMM_B sequence).
As the tasks have different types, the triplication is currently required to enable rule assignment (filtered by task/rule type).
!! PLEASE KEEP THE 3 RULES SYNCED AT ALL TIMES !!

Version 1.3
- Updated introduction about triplication
- Remove mentions of HVA patterns as they are not relevant anymore
- For LUT MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern, Do not use User Group Profile (Sales vs Trader) anymore as Sales was only for HVA cases.

Version 1.2
Retrieve user from Source trader and group from MX.ALL.UserProfile in case of trade import

Version 1.1
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.0
The purpose of this version is to handle simple morphing rules for initial booking and cancel & reissue / restructure events.
Fx Allocation is not yet covered.
Morphing is activated if the parameter "Morphing" in MX.ALL.Gparam.ALL lookup is set to YES.

The different steps of the algorithm are:
1/ Determine the hedge desks (spot and swap) from current user profile in MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk.ALL
2/ Determine the Fx product (Spot, Swap, Outright, NDF, Spot Hedge Swap, Spot Hedge Outright) in FX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern.ALL
3/ Determine the target hedge structure (split or cross) from the hedge desks retrieved in first step in MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk
4/ From the Fx Product and target hedge structure, determine the target registration in MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration.ALL
5/ Finally determine the target pattern in FX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern.ALL

Once the target registration and patterns are determined, the trade is eventually morphed and split currency is assigned.

The following lookup tables should be customized in each implementation:
- MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk.ALL => for each user group and/or user, assign spot and swap hedge desks
- MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk => for each hedge desk and currency pair, indicate how the risk should be handled (Cross or Split + split currency)

The lookup table MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern should be customized if new patterns are used.
The lookup table MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration should not customized as it determines the target structures that will be used in the morphing

*/

{
	pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
	pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainComponent ),
	
	//Use of a GParam to know if Morphing is activated or not
	sMorphingActivated := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","Morphing" ),
	sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
	sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
	bMorphing := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
	
	IF ( ( sMorphingActivated == "YES" ) AND ( bMorphing ) ) THEN
	{
        IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
        {
        	sUser := sysGetUser(),
            sUserGroup := sysGetGroup()
        }
        ELSE
        {
        	sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent, "Source trader"),
            sUserGroup := "",
            pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser),
	        IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
	            sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString(pUserProfile,0,1)
        },
		sUserGroupProfile := lookupString( "MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
		pGetHedgeDesks := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk","ALL",
										"User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
										"User",sUser ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pGetHedgeDesks ) ) THEN
		{
			sSpotHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,0 ),
			sSwapHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,1 ),
			
			sPackageRegistration := legGetRegistration( pPackage ),
			sPackageTypology := legGetString( pPackage,"Typology" ),
			
			sCcyPair := legGetString( pLeg,"Instrument" ),
			sCcy1 := legGetString( pLeg,"Den unit" ),
			sCcy2 := legGetString( pLeg,"Num unit" ),
			sTypology := legGetString( pLeg,"Typology" ),
			sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pLeg,"Non deliverable" ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
			sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pLeg ),
			sOriginalLogicalSplit := legGetString( pLeg,"Logical_split"),
			
			IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg") THEN
			{
				fNearleg1 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg1 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal far leg" ),
				fNearleg2 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg2 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal far leg" ),
				IF ( ( fNearleg1 <> fFarleg1 ) AND ( fNearleg2 <> fFarleg2 ) ) THEN
					sDelta := "Yes"
			}
			ELSE IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Swap auto spot Package") THEN
			{
				fSpotHedge := legGetNumeric(legGetComponentAt(pLeg,2),"Den nominal"),
				IF ( fSpotHedge == 0.0 ) THEN
					sDelta := "No"
			}
			ELSE
				sDelta := "",
			
			IF ( sPackageRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
				sSplitMethod := legGetString( pLeg,"Split method" ),
			
			IF ( sPackageTypology <> "" ) THEN
			{
				sTypology := sPackageTypology,
				sRegistration := sPackageRegistration
			},
			
			pGetCurrentProduct := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern", "ALL",
												"Registration", sRegistration,
												"Typology", sTypology,
												"Non Deliverable", sNonDeliverable,
												"Split Method", sSplitMethod,
												"Delta",sDelta,
                                                "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile),
			
			sCurrentPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetCurrentProduct,0,1),
			
			pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair", sCcyPair , "Typology", sTypology),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*" , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2 , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/*", "Typology", sTypology )
			}, 
			
			pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcyPair , "Typology", sTypology),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*", "Typology", sTypology ),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2 , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/*", "Typology", sTypology )
			},
			
			IF ( ( sCurrentPattern <> "" )
			AND ( ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) ) OR ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) ) ) ) THEN
			{
				sSpotRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSpotRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSpotSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
				
				sSwapRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSwapRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSwapSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
                
                //BAB Addition to prevent FX Murabaha from splitting on crosses
				/*IF(sTypology=="FX Murabaha") THEN
                {
                    sSwapRiskHandling:="Cross",
                    sSpotRiskHandling:="Cross"
                },*/
                //End of BAB Addition
                
				pGetTargetRegistration := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration","ALL",
														"FX Product",sCurrentPattern,
														"Spot Risk Handling",sSpotRiskHandling,
														"Swap Risk Handling",sSwapRiskHandling ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pGetTargetRegistration ) ) THEN
				{
					sTargetRegistrationLabel := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,0 ),
					sTargetRegistration := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,1 ),
					sLogicalSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,2 ),
					sPhysicalSplitMethod := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,3 ),
					
					pGetTargetPattern := lookupResults("MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern","ALL",
													"Registration",sTargetRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Non Deliverable",sNonDeliverable,
													"Split Method",sPhysicalSplitMethod,
													"Delta",sDelta,
                                                    "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile ),//BAB addition user group profile
					sTargetPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetTargetPattern,0,0),
					IF ( sTargetPattern <> "" ) THEN
					{
						sNamespace := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ),
						bIsInMorphingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"M_" ),
						bIsInPricingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"P_" ),                        
						bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"B_" ), 
						IF ( bIsInMorphingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright" ) THEN
							{
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward","" ),
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							}
							ELSE IF ( sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							ELSE
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractFxISWAP","FX swap",sTargetPattern ),
							
							IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod <> "" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Swap_type","Linked nominals on traded currency" )
							}
						}
						ELSE IF ( bIsInPricingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sLogicalSplit == "Yes" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Logical_split","Yes" ),
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
							},
							
							IF ( strContain( sRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
							{
								IF ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								
								IF ( sPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
								{
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
									IF (sSpotSplitCcy <> "") THEN
										legSetString(pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
								}
								ELSE
									legSetString(pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
							}
						}                        
						ELSE IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
						{
							sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ),
							IF ( (sSourceClass == "") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventIRESTRUCTURE") ) THEN
							{
								IF (sOriginalLogicalSplit <> sLogicalSplit AND sOriginalLogicalSplit <> "" AND sLogicalSplit <> "") THEN
									ThrowError("The structure of the financial contract is not valid", "cannot change logical split value")
								ELSE
								{
									IF (sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg, "mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward",""),
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel)
									}
									ELSE IF (sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,"")
									}
									ELSE
										legMorph( pLeg,"FX swap" ),
									
									IF (strContain( sTargetRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
									{
										IF ( sTargetRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
										
										IF (sTargetPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
										{
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
											IF ( sSpotSplitCcy <> "" ) THEN
												legSetString( pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
										}
										ELSE
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Swap" ) THEN 
					{
						sMessage := " The product : FX Swap Spot Hedge is not supported in HVA mode",
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						IF ( sSpotRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskHandling + " Spot"
						ELSE
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskMethod + " " + sSpotRiskHandling + " " + "Spot against " + sSpotSplitCcy,
						
						IF ( sSwapRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskHandling + " Forward"
						ELSE
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskMethod + " " + sSwapRiskHandling + " " + "Forward against " + sSwapSplitCcy,
						
						sMessage := "The product " + sPattern + " does not support the following structure: " + sSpotRiskMessage + " and " + sSwapRiskMessage,
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.morphing.FX.Morphing

/*

FX Morphing rules

!! IMPORTANT !!
There are 3 fully identical copies of this rule:

Respectively called by tasks P_FX_Morphing (Completion, META_MX_FXMM_P sequence), M_FX_Morphing (Morphing, META_MX_FXMM sequence), B_FX_Morphing (Mirroring, META_MX_FXMM_B sequence).
As the tasks have different types, the triplication is currently required to enable rule assignment (filtered by task/rule type).
!! PLEASE KEEP THE 3 RULES SYNCED AT ALL TIMES !!

Applied MSL best practices

The purpose of this version is to handle simple morphing rules for initial booking and cancel & reissue / restructure events.
Fx Allocation is not yet covered.
Morphing is activated if the parameter "Morphing" in MX.ALL.Gparam.ALL lookup is set to YES.

The different steps of the algorithm are:

4/ From the Fx Product and target hedge structure, determine the target registration in MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration.ALL
5/ Finally determine the target pattern in FX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern.ALL

Once the target registration and patterns are determined, the trade is eventually morphed and split currency is assigned.

The following lookup tables should be customized in each implementation:

The lookup table MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern should be customized if new patterns are used.

*/

{
	pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
	pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainComponent ),
	
	//Use of a GParam to know if Morphing is activated or not
	sMorphingActivated := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","Morphing" ),
	sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
	sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
	bMorphing := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
	
	IF ( ( sMorphingActivated == "YES" ) AND ( bMorphing ) ) THEN
	{
        IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
        {
        	sUser := sysGetUser(),
            sUserGroup := sysGetGroup()
        }
        ELSE
        {
        	sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent, "Source trader"),
            sUserGroup := "",
            pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser),
	        IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
	            sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString(pUserProfile,0,1)
        },
		sUserGroupProfile := lookupString( "MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
		pGetHedgeDesks := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk","ALL",
										"User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
										"User",sUser ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pGetHedgeDesks ) ) THEN
		{
			sSpotHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,0 ),
			sSwapHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,1 ),
			
			sPackageRegistration := legGetRegistration( pPackage ),
			sPackageTypology := legGetString( pPackage,"Typology" ),
			
			sCcyPair := legGetString( pLeg,"Instrument" ),
			sCcy1 := legGetString( pLeg,"Den unit" ),
			sCcy2 := legGetString( pLeg,"Num unit" ),
			sTypology := legGetString( pLeg,"Typology" ),
			sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pLeg,"Non deliverable" ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
			sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pLeg ),
			sOriginalLogicalSplit := legGetString( pLeg,"Logical_split"),
			
			IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg") THEN
			{
				fNearleg1 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg1 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal far leg" ),
				fNearleg2 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg2 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal far leg" ),
				IF ( ( fNearleg1 <> fFarleg1 ) AND ( fNearleg2 <> fFarleg2 ) ) THEN
					sDelta := "Yes"
			}
			ELSE IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Swap auto spot Package") THEN
			{
				fSpotHedge := legGetNumeric(legGetComponentAt(pLeg,2),"Den nominal"),
				IF ( fSpotHedge == 0.0 ) THEN
					sDelta := "No"
			}
			ELSE
				sDelta := "",
			
			IF ( sPackageRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
				sSplitMethod := legGetString( pLeg,"Split method" ),
			
			IF ( sPackageTypology <> "" ) THEN
			{
				sTypology := sPackageTypology,
				sRegistration := sPackageRegistration
			},
			
			pGetCurrentProduct := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern", "ALL",
												"Registration", sRegistration,
												"Typology", sTypology,
												"Non Deliverable", sNonDeliverable,
												"Split Method", sSplitMethod,
												"Delta",sDelta,
                                                "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile), //BAB addition User group profile
			
			sCurrentPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetCurrentProduct,0,1),
			
			pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair", sCcyPair, "Typology", sTypology ),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*", "Typology", sTypology ),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2 , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/*" , "Typology", sTypology)
			}, 
			
			pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcyPair , "Typology", sTypology),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*" , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2 , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/*", "Typology", sTypology )
			},
			
			IF ( ( sCurrentPattern <> "" )
			AND ( ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) ) OR ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) ) ) ) THEN
			{
				sSpotRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSpotRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSpotSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
				
				sSwapRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSwapRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSwapSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
                
				//BAB Addition to prevent FX Murabaha from splitting on crosses
                /*IF(sTypology=="FX Murabaha") THEN
                {
                    sSwapRiskHandling:="Cross",
                    sSpotRiskHandling:="Cross"
                },*/
                //End of BAB Addition
                
				pGetTargetRegistration := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration","ALL",
														"FX Product",sCurrentPattern,
														"Spot Risk Handling",sSpotRiskHandling,
														"Swap Risk Handling",sSwapRiskHandling ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pGetTargetRegistration ) ) THEN
				{
					sTargetRegistrationLabel := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,0 ),
					sTargetRegistration := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,1 ),
					sLogicalSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,2 ),
					sPhysicalSplitMethod := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,3 ),
					
					pGetTargetPattern := lookupResults("MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern","ALL",
													"Registration",sTargetRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Non Deliverable",sNonDeliverable,
													"Split Method",sPhysicalSplitMethod,
													"Delta",sDelta,
                                                    "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile), //BAB addition user group profile
					sTargetPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetTargetPattern,0,0),
					IF ( sTargetPattern <> "" ) THEN
					{
						sNamespace := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ),
						bIsInMorphingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"M_" ),
						bIsInPricingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"P_" ),                        
						bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"B_" ), 
						IF ( bIsInMorphingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright" ) THEN
							{
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward","" ),
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							}
							ELSE IF ( sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							ELSE
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractFxISWAP","FX swap",sTargetPattern ),
							
							IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod <> "" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Swap_type","Linked nominals on traded currency" )
							}
						}
						ELSE IF ( bIsInPricingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sLogicalSplit == "Yes" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Logical_split","Yes" ),
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
							},
							
							IF ( strContain( sRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
							{
								IF ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								
								IF ( sPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
								{
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
									IF (sSpotSplitCcy <> "") THEN
										legSetString(pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
								}
								ELSE
									legSetString(pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
							}
						}                        
						ELSE IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
						{
							sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ),
							IF ( (sSourceClass == "") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventIRESTRUCTURE") ) THEN
							{
								IF (sOriginalLogicalSplit <> sLogicalSplit AND sOriginalLogicalSplit <> "" AND sLogicalSplit <> "") THEN
									ThrowError("The structure of the financial contract is not valid", "cannot change logical split value")
								ELSE
								{
									IF (sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg, "mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward",""),
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel)
									}
									ELSE IF (sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,"")
									}
									ELSE
										legMorph( pLeg,"FX swap" ),
									
									IF (strContain( sTargetRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
									{
										IF ( sTargetRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
										
										IF (sTargetPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
										{
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
											IF ( sSpotSplitCcy <> "" ) THEN
												legSetString( pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
										}
										ELSE
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Swap" ) THEN 
					{
						sMessage := " The product : FX Swap Spot Hedge is not supported in HVA mode",
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						IF ( sSpotRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskHandling + " Spot"
						ELSE
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskMethod + " " + sSpotRiskHandling + " " + "Spot against " + sSpotSplitCcy,
						
						IF ( sSwapRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskHandling + " Forward"
						ELSE
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskMethod + " " + sSwapRiskHandling + " " + "Forward against " + sSwapSplitCcy,
						
						sMessage := "The product " + sPattern + " does not support the following structure: " + sSpotRiskMessage + " and " + sSwapRiskMessage,
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.morphing.FX.Morphing

/*
MXpress
FX Morphing rules

!! IMPORTANT !!
There are 3 fully identical copies of this rule:
- mx.completion.FX.Pricing.Morphing
- mx.morphing.FX.Morphing
- mx.mirroring.FX.Booking.Morphing
Respectively called by tasks P_FX_Morphing (Completion, META_MX_FXMM_P sequence), M_FX_Morphing (Morphing, META_MX_FXMM sequence), B_FX_Morphing (Mirroring, META_MX_FXMM_B sequence).
As the tasks have different types, the triplication is currently required to enable rule assignment (filtered by task/rule type).
!! PLEASE KEEP THE 3 RULES SYNCED AT ALL TIMES !!

Version 1.3
- Updated introduction about triplication
- Remove mentions of HVA patterns as they are not relevant anymore
- For LUT MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern, Do not use User Group Profile (Sales vs Trader) anymore as Sales was only for HVA cases.

Version 1.2
Retrieve user from Source trader and group from MX.ALL.UserProfile in case of trade import

Version 1.1
Applied MSL best practices

Version 1.0
The purpose of this version is to handle simple morphing rules for initial booking and cancel & reissue / restructure events.
Fx Allocation is not yet covered.
Morphing is activated if the parameter "Morphing" in MX.ALL.Gparam.ALL lookup is set to YES.

The different steps of the algorithm are:
1/ Determine the hedge desks (spot and swap) from current user profile in MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk.ALL
2/ Determine the Fx product (Spot, Swap, Outright, NDF, Spot Hedge Swap, Spot Hedge Outright) in FX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern.ALL
3/ Determine the target hedge structure (split or cross) from the hedge desks retrieved in first step in MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk
4/ From the Fx Product and target hedge structure, determine the target registration in MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration.ALL
5/ Finally determine the target pattern in FX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern.ALL

Once the target registration and patterns are determined, the trade is eventually morphed and split currency is assigned.

The following lookup tables should be customized in each implementation:
- MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk.ALL => for each user group and/or user, assign spot and swap hedge desks
- MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk => for each hedge desk and currency pair, indicate how the risk should be handled (Cross or Split + split currency)

The lookup table MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern should be customized if new patterns are used.
The lookup table MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration should not customized as it determines the target structures that will be used in the morphing

*/

{
	pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,0 ),
	pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pMainContract := legGetFatherContract( pMainComponent ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainComponent ),
	
	//Use of a GParam to know if Morphing is activated or not
	sMorphingActivated := lookupString( "MX.ALL.GParam","ALL","Key 1","Morphing" ),
	sSourceModule := legGetSourceModule( pMainContract ),
	sPublishingSystem := legGetPublishingSystem( pMainContract ),
	bMorphing := ( ( sPublishingSystem == "MX" ) 
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ) == "" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.sellDown" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <> "mx.rollover" )
			AND ( sSourceModule <>"mx.fixing" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ) <> "MOD" )
			AND ( properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ) <> "DUP" ) ),
	
	IF ( ( sMorphingActivated == "YES" ) AND ( bMorphing ) ) THEN
	{
        IF ( strStartsWith(sSourceModule , "mx" ) ) THEN
        {
        	sUser := sysGetUser(),
            sUserGroup := sysGetGroup()
        }
        ELSE
        {
        	sUser := legGetString( pMainComponent, "Source trader"),
            sUserGroup := "",
            pUserProfile := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.UserProfile","ALL","User",sUser),
	        IF ( NOT ( isNull(pUserProfile) ) ) THEN
	            sUserGroup := lookupResultsGetString(pUserProfile,0,1)
        },
		sUserGroupProfile := lookupString( "MX.ALL.UserGroupProfile","ALL","USER_GROUP",sUserGroup ),
		pGetHedgeDesks := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-HedgeDesk","ALL",
										"User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile,
										"User",sUser ),
		IF ( NOT isNull( pGetHedgeDesks ) ) THEN
		{
			sSpotHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,0 ),
			sSwapHedgeDesk := lookupResultsGetString( pGetHedgeDesks,0,1 ),
			
			sPackageRegistration := legGetRegistration( pPackage ),
			sPackageTypology := legGetString( pPackage,"Typology" ),
			
			sCcyPair := legGetString( pLeg,"Instrument" ),
			sCcy1 := legGetString( pLeg,"Den unit" ),
			sCcy2 := legGetString( pLeg,"Num unit" ),
			sTypology := legGetString( pLeg,"Typology" ),
			sNonDeliverable := legGetString( pLeg,"Non deliverable" ),
			sRegistration := legGetRegistration( pLeg ),
			sPattern := legGetPatternLabel( pLeg ),
			sOriginalLogicalSplit := legGetString( pLeg,"Logical_split"),
			
			IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Forex-Swap Leg") THEN
			{
				fNearleg1 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg1 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Den nominal far leg" ),
				fNearleg2 := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal near leg" ),
				fFarleg2 :=legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Num nominal far leg" ),
				IF ( ( fNearleg1 <> fFarleg1 ) AND ( fNearleg2 <> fFarleg2 ) ) THEN
					sDelta := "Yes"
			}
			ELSE IF (sUserGroupProfile == "Sales" AND sRegistration == "Swap auto spot Package") THEN
			{
				fSpotHedge := legGetNumeric(legGetComponentAt(pLeg,2),"Den nominal"),
				IF ( fSpotHedge == 0.0 ) THEN
					sDelta := "No"
			}
			ELSE
				sDelta := "",
			
			IF ( sPackageRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
				sSplitMethod := legGetString( pLeg,"Split method" ),
			
			IF ( sPackageTypology <> "" ) THEN
			{
				sTypology := sPackageTypology,
				sRegistration := sPackageRegistration
			},
			
			pGetCurrentProduct := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern", "ALL",
												"Registration", sRegistration,
												"Typology", sTypology,
												"Non Deliverable", sNonDeliverable,
												"Split Method", sSplitMethod,
												"Delta",sDelta,
                                                "User Group Profile",sUserGroupProfile), //BAB addition user group profile
			
			sCurrentPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetCurrentProduct,0,1),
			
			pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair", sCcyPair, "Typology", sTypology ),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*", "Typology", sTypology ),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2, "Typology", sTypology ),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSpotHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair","*/*", "Typology", sTypology )
			}, 
			
			pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcyPair , "Typology", sTypology),
			IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
			{
				pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk,"Currency Pair",sCcy1 + "/*", "Typology", sTypology ),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/" + sCcy2 , "Typology", sTypology),
				IF ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) THEN
					pGetSwapHandlingDetails := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-StructureHedge",sSwapHedgeDesk, "Currency Pair","*/*", "Typology", sTypology )
			},
			
			IF ( ( sCurrentPattern <> "" )
			AND ( ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails ) ) ) OR ( NOT ( isNull( pGetSwapHandlingDetails ) ) ) ) ) THEN
			{
				sSpotRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSpotRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSpotSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSpotRiskHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
				
				sSwapRiskHandling := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,0 ),
				sSwapRiskMethod := "Physical",
				sSwapSplitCcy := lookupResultsGetString( pGetSwapHandlingDetails,0,1 ),
				//IF(sTypology=="FX Murabaha") THEN sSwapRiskHandling:="Cross",
				pGetTargetRegistration := lookupResults( "MX.FXMM.Morphing-Registration","ALL",
														"FX Product",sCurrentPattern,
														"Spot Risk Handling",sSpotRiskHandling,
														"Swap Risk Handling",sSwapRiskHandling ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pGetTargetRegistration ) ) THEN
				{
					sTargetRegistrationLabel := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,0 ),
					sTargetRegistration := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,1 ),
					sLogicalSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,2 ),
					sPhysicalSplitMethod := lookupResultsGetString( pGetTargetRegistration,0,3 ),
					
					pGetTargetPattern := lookupResults("MX.FXMM.Morphing-Pattern","ALL",
													"Registration",sTargetRegistration,
													"Typology",sTypology,
													"Non Deliverable",sNonDeliverable,
													"Split Method",sPhysicalSplitMethod,
													"Delta",sDelta,
                                                    "User Group Profile", sUserGroupProfile), //BAB addition user group profile
					sTargetPattern := lookupResultsGetString(pGetTargetPattern,0,0),
					IF ( sTargetPattern <> "" ) THEN
					{
						sNamespace := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.context.namespace" ),
						bIsInMorphingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"M_" ),
						bIsInPricingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"P_" ),                        
						bIsInBookingSequence := strStartsWith( sNamespace,"B_" ), 
						IF ( bIsInMorphingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright" ) THEN
							{
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward","" ),
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							}
							ELSE IF ( sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
								legMorph( pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,sTargetPattern )
							ELSE
								legMorph( pLeg,"mxContractFxISWAP","FX swap",sTargetPattern ),
							
							IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod <> "" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								IF ( sPhysicalSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Swap_type","Linked nominals on traded currency" )
							}
						}
						ELSE IF ( bIsInPricingSequence ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sLogicalSplit == "Yes" ) THEN
							{
								legSetString( pLeg,"Logical_split","Yes" ),
								legSetString( pLeg,"Split_currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
							},
							
							IF ( strContain( sRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
							{
								IF ( sRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split_method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
								
								IF ( sPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
								{
									legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
									IF (sSpotSplitCcy <> "") THEN
										legSetString(pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
								}
								ELSE
									legSetString(pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy)
							}
						}                        
						ELSE IF ( bIsInBookingSequence ) THEN
						{
//							sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ), --> Done as part of PIR610228 ticket
							sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source"),
							IF ( (sSourceClass == "") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE") OR (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventIRESTRUCTURE") ) THEN
							{
								IF (sOriginalLogicalSplit <> sLogicalSplit AND sOriginalLogicalSplit <> "" AND sLogicalSplit <> "") THEN
									ThrowError("The structure of the financial contract is not valid", "cannot change logical split value")
								ELSE
								{
									IF (sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Outright") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg, "mxContractISINGLE","Spot-Forward",""),
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel)
									}
									ELSE IF (sTargetRegistrationLabel <> "mxContractITRADE") THEN
									{
										legMorph(pLeg,sTargetRegistrationLabel,sTargetRegistration,"")
									}
									ELSE
										legMorph( pLeg,"FX swap" ),
									
									IF (strContain( sTargetRegistration,"Split" ) ) THEN
									{
										IF ( sTargetRegistration == "Split Package" ) THEN
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split method",sPhysicalSplitMethod ),
										
										IF (sTargetPattern == "Outright Split" ) THEN
										{
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSwapSplitCcy ),
											IF ( sSpotSplitCcy <> "" ) THEN
												legSetString( pLeg,"Spot split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
										}
										ELSE
											legSetString( pLeg,"Split currency",sSpotSplitCcy )
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				ELSE
				{
					IF ( sCurrentPattern == "Spot Hedge Swap" ) THEN 
					{
						sMessage := " The product : FX Swap Spot Hedge is not supported in HVA mode",
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						IF ( sSpotRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskHandling + " Spot"
						ELSE
							sSpotRiskMessage := sSpotRiskMethod + " " + sSpotRiskHandling + " " + "Spot against " + sSpotSplitCcy,
						
						IF ( sSwapRiskHandling == "Cross" ) THEN
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskHandling + " Forward"
						ELSE
							sSwapRiskMessage := sSwapRiskMethod + " " + sSwapRiskHandling + " " + "Forward against " + sSwapSplitCcy,
						
						sMessage := "The product " + sPattern + " does not support the following structure: " + sSpotRiskMessage + " and " + sSwapRiskMessage,
						ThrowLowPriorityError( pLeg,sMessage,"Type" )
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.routing.IRD.RunFullSequence

/*
MXpress

Version 2.0
Add check on legIsSolverOn in addition to Pricing matrix

Version 1.0

Notes:
This router formula is used to bypass a part of the Pricing or Closing sequences for IRD, when there is no need for layout asignment and dyn layout, ptf alloc, typology assign, etc...
The bypass happens for:
- legs in a Pricing matrix Pricing tab.
- for legs (e.g. Tenor Spread, IRS butterfly) with solving (legIsSolverOn). Note that legIsSolverOn returns FALSE for the initial pricing before solving and hence Pricing and Closing sequences are still run once.

*/

{
	sOutput := "Yes", //default output is set to Output1
	pLeg := This,
    bIsSolverOn := legIsSolverOn(pLeg),
    pFather := legGetFather(pLeg),
	sFatherTitle := legGetTitle(pFather),
    bPricingMatrix := sFatherTitle == "IRS"
    		OR sFatherTitle == "IRS Butterfly"
    		OR sFatherTitle == "IRS Tenor Spread"
    		OR sFatherTitle == "Breakeven Spread"
    		OR sFatherTitle == "Inflation Swaps"
    		OR sFatherTitle == "ATM Straddles"
			OR sFatherTitle == "Mid curve swaptions",
	IF ( bIsSolverOn OR bPricingMatrix) THEN
    	sOutput := "No"
};

//mx.completion.ALL.RestructureFtpFee

// Restructure fee in case of FTP Package 

/*
MXpress
Rule for handling fees in the case of events on a Fund Transfer Pricing package

v1.0

Used algorithm: 
*/

{         
    pEvent := This,
    sEvent := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.class" ),
    sSrcModule := evtGetSourceModule(pEvent),
    iNbOfBOs := evtGetNumberOfVersionedBOs(pEvent),
	pVBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( pEvent,0 ),
	pLeg := evtVersionedBOGetNew(pVBO),
	pLegOld :=evtVersionedBOGetOld(pVBO),
	pComponentFtp := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pComponentFtpOld := legGetMainComponent( pLegOld ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pComponentFtp ),
	pPackageOld := legGetFatherPackage( pComponentFtpOld ),
        
	IF (NOT (isNull(pPackage) AND isNull(pPackageOld))) THEN
	{
	 	sTypology := legGetTypology (pPackage),

       	IF (sTypology == "FTP Loan Deposit" AND sEvent == "mxContractEventIRESTRUCTURE") THEN   
       	{   
        	iNbOfFlow := evtGetNumberOfFlows(pEvent),
            iFlow := 0,
    
            WHILE (iFlow < iNbOfFlow) DO 
            {
                pFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,iFlow ),
                fTrnNumber:= evtFlowGetComponentReference(pFlow),
                fFlowAmount:=evtFlowGetAmount(pFlow),
                sFlowSource:= evtFlowGetSource(pFlow),
                sFlowDestination:= evtFlowGetDestination(pFlow),
                sFlowCurrency := evtFlowGetCurrency(pFlow),
                dValueDate := evtFlowGetValueDate(pFlow),
                sComment:=evtFlowGetComment(pFlow),
                sNature:=evtFlowGetNature(pFlow),
                sTypo0:=evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pFlow,0 ),
                sTypo1:=evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pFlow,1 ),
                sTypo2:=evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pFlow,2 ),
                sTypo3:=evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pFlow,3 ),
                sTypo4:=evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pFlow,4 ),
                                   
                iNb := 0,
                iNbSons := legGetNumberOfSons( pPackage ),
    
                WHILE (iNb < iNbSons) DO
                {
                    pSon := legGetSonAt( pPackage,iNb ),
                    pSonOld := legGetSonAt( pPackageOld,iNb ),
                    fCloneTrnNumber := legGetNumeric( pSon,"Trn Number" ),
                    
                    IF (fCloneTrnNumber <> fTrnNumber) THEN 
                    {
                        pCloneFlow := evtAddFlow( pEvent,fCloneTrnNumber ),
                        evtFlowSetValueDate( pCloneFlow,dValueDate ),
                        evtFlowSetCurrency( pCloneFlow,sFlowCurrency ),
                        evtFlowOverrideComment( pCloneFlow,sComment ),
                        evtFlowOverrideNature( pCloneFlow,sNature ),
                        evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pCloneFlow,0,sTypo0 ),
                        evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pCloneFlow,1,sTypo1 ),
                        evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pCloneFlow,2,sTypo2 ),
                        evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pCloneFlow,3,sTypo3 ),
                        evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pCloneFlow,4,sTypo4 ),                            
                        sCloneFlowSource:= evtFlowGetSource( pCloneFlow ), 
                        
                        //Container
                        pContainer := npOpen(),

                        //Virtual new
                        pVirtualNew := legClone( pContainer, pSon ),
                        legSetLocalImplied( pVirtualNew, "Npv" ),    
                        legCompute( pVirtualNew, "noWorkflow" ),
                        fNPVNew := legGetNumeric( pVirtualNew, "Npv" ),                             

                        //Virtual old  
                        pVirtualOld := legClone( pContainer, pSonOld ),
                        legSetLocalImplied( pVirtualOld, "Npv" ),    
                        legCompute( pVirtualOld, "noWorkflow" ),
                        fNPVOld := legGetNumeric( pVirtualOld, "Npv" ),    
                           
                        // Set Fee Amount
                        evtFlowSetAmount( pCloneFlow,fNPVOld - fNPVNew ),
                        
                        npClose(pContainer)
					},

                    iNb := iNb + 1
                 }, 
                 
                iFlow := iFlow + 1
            }
        }
    }
};

// public.preTrade.completion.FXD.Pricing.BACal-ALL_Forward

/*
MXpress
FXD Bid/Ask calibration. 

            ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
           //                                                                                   //
          //    Rule to be used when activating the new triangulated FX Forward development    //
         //                                                                                   //
        ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
        
Version  1.0
Differs from generic rule BACal-ALL as Rho calibration is directly applied on the Swap points (instead of the rates Num and Den).
In this rule we send the Swap points as Market parameter attached to the Rho, and the calibration is directly applied on it.

Notes: 
- This formula will call the function in dll library libfrmdll.so/libfrmba.so
- The market data recalibrated: spot, swap points, vol
- The excluded legs in a structure will not be taken into account for the calibration.
- The formula is organized in three parts:
	1. Gather the input parameters for dll function
	2. Call the function and feed the legs by the outputs
	3. Write the vol choice to udf VOL_CHOICE
*/

{
	// Fields Initialization/Reset
	sEvaluationActive := properties.Get("mx.preTrade.evaluation.active"),
	sSpreadingErrorName := "",
	bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := FALSE,
	bExpiryDefined := FALSE,
	iFirstCurrOptLeg := 0,
	iNumberOfLegs := 0,
	bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg := FALSE,
	bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg := FALSE,
	sInstument := "",
	sStrikeQ := "",
	iCurrentLeg := 0,
	sLegInstument := "",
	sLegStrikeQ := "",
	fExpiry := 0.0,
	bExpiryDefined := FALSE,
	bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := FALSE,
	bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := FALSE,
	bApplyAlgorithmError := FALSE,
	sExchange := "",
	iDeltaHedgedPrice := 0,
	iFwdDeltaHedge := 0,
	iTwoWays := 0,
	iNumeraire := 0,
	xSpot := "0.0/0.0",
	fSpotBid := 0.0,
	fSpotAsk := 0.0,
	sNum := "",
	sDen := "",
	sBase := "",
	sQuot := "",
	sQuotNum := "",
	sQuotDen := "",
	iPremiumInAsset := 0,
	bStatus := FALSE,
	sDefaultSpotQuotMode := "",
	iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode := 0,
	sCalendar := "",
	iNumCurrOptLegs := 0,
	sBuy := "",
	xStrike := "0.0/0.0",
	sPayout := "",
	fNotional := 0.0,
	sType := "",
	fBarrier := 0.0,
	sBarType := "",
	fBidStrike := 0.0,
	fAskStrike := 0.0,
	sNominalUnit := "",
	fNominal := 0.0,
	fOtherNominal := 0.0,
	fDelta := 0.0,
	sDeltaCcy := "",
	fVega := 0.0,
	fRho := 0.0,
	fFF := 0.0,
	iCall := 0,
	xBidStrikeVol := "0.0/0.0",
	fBidBidStrikeVol := 0.0,
	fAskBidStrikeVol := 0.0,
	xAskStrikeVol := "0.0/0.0",
	fBidAskStrikeVol := 0.0,
	fAskAskStrikeVol := 0.0,
	fExpiry := 0.0,
	fDelivery := 0.0,
	xNumZero := "0.0/0.0",
	xDenZero := "0.0/0.0",
	fNumBid := 0.0,
	fNumAsk := 0.0,
	fDenBid := 0.0,
	fDenAsk := 0.0,
	iWindowType := 0,
	bStatus := FALSE,
	sSwapPointMode := "",
	iCurrentLeg := 0,
	iIndex2 := 0,
	fCSpotBid := 0.0,
	fCSpotAsk := 0.0,
	fCZDenBid := 0.0,
	fCZDenAsk := 0.0,
	fCZNumBid := 0.0,
	fCZNumAsk := 0.0,
	fCVolBid := 0.0,
	fCVolAsk := 0.0,
	fDelivery := 0.0,
	fCBidFwd := 0.0,
	fCAskFwd := 0.0,
	sVolChoicing := "",
	
	IF ( ( sEvaluationActive == "YES" ) AND ( legGetNumberOfComponents( This ) > 0 ) ) THEN
	{
		sSpreadingErrorName := "Spreading rules",
		
		//the b/a calibration rule can only apply to the structure with indentical instrument and strike quotation. 
		bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := TRUE,
		bExpiryDefined := TRUE,
		
		// Get the pointer for first FX option leg
		// This leg will be used to get the instrument and strike quotation (if it's not an RBT).
		// If no FX option leg can be found, then exit the formula.
		iFirstCurrOptLeg := 0,
		iNumberOfLegs := legGetNumberOfComponents( This ),
		
		bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg := FALSE,
		pFirstCurrOptLeg := legGetFirstComponent( This ),
		WHILE ( ( NOT ( bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg ) ) AND ( iFirstCurrOptLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) ) DO
		{
			pFirstCurrOptLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iFirstCurrOptLeg ),
			IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pFirstCurrOptLeg ) == "CURR" ) 
			AND ( legGetProductGroup( pFirstCurrOptLeg ) == "OPT" )
			AND ( legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
			{
				bFoundFirstOptCurrLeg := TRUE, // When the first currency option leg is found, exit the loop
				iFirstCurrOptLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg - 1 //To get the correct position for the first currency option leg. 
			},
			
			iFirstCurrOptLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg + 1
		},
		
		// Check if FXD option does exist in the structure
		IF ( iFirstCurrOptLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) THEN
		{
			sInstument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
			IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pFirstCurrOptLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
				sStrikeQ := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"B/A strike quot" ),
			
			// Get the first not-empty.strike quotation
			iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg,
			
			//once a not-empty strike quotation is found, exit the loop.
			WHILE ( ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) AND ( strCMP( sStrikeQ,"",7 ) ) ) DO
			{
				pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
				
				//make sure it's a currency option and the leg is not excluded from the structure.
				IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
				AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
				AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN 
				{
					IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
						sStrikeQ := legGetString( pLeg,"B/A strike quot" )
				},
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1 
			},
			
			//Check if all legs share instrument and strike quotation. If the calibration rules will not be applied. 
			iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg,
			
			//Once a leg is found to have a different instrument/strike quotation, or the expiry date is today, exit the loop.
			WHILE ( ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) AND ( bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation ) AND ( bExpiryDefined ) ) DO
			{
				pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
				IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
				AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
				AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
				{
					sLegInstument := legGetString( pLeg,"Instrument" ),
					IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
						sLegStrikeQ := legGetString( pLeg,"B/A strike quot" ),
					
					fExpiry := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Expiry days" ),
					IF ( ABS( fExpiry ) < 0.000001 ) THEN
						bExpiryDefined := FALSE,
					
					//sStrikeQ is the first not-empty strike quotation.
					IF ( ( strCMP( sLegInstument,sInstument,7 ) )
					AND ( ( strCMP( sStrikeQ,sLegStrikeQ,7 ) ) OR ( strCMP( "",sLegStrikeQ,7 ) ) ) ) THEN
						bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := TRUE
					ELSE
						bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation := FALSE
				},
				iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
			},
			
			// Check if the calibration should be applied.
			IF ( ( bExpiryDefined == FALSE ) OR ( npIsBidAsk( ) == FALSE ) ) THEN
			{
				bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := FALSE,
				bApplyAlgorithmError := FALSE
			}
			ELSE
			{
				IF ( bIsSameInstrumentAndStrikeQuotation == FALSE ) THEN
				{
					bApplyAlgorithmError := TRUE,
					bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := FALSE
				}
				ELSE
				{
					bApplyAlgorithmError := FALSE,
					bApplyAlgorithmNeeded := TRUE
				}
			},
			
			IF ( ( bApplyAlgorithmNeeded == TRUE ) OR ( strStartsWith( legGetProductLabel( This ),"Broker Strangle" ) ) ) THEN
			{
				// Sorted array of option definition 
				pOptionArray := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
