				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"TYPE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"NOTIONAL",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"CALL",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCDENBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCDENASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCNUMBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ZCNUMASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"EXPIRY",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"DELIVERY",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BIDSTRIKE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"ASKSTRIKE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"BVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"AVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"AVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"DELTA",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"VEGA",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pOptionArray,"RHO",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pOptionArray,"WINDOW_TYPE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				// Array of structure spreaded prices and pricing params 
				pStructSpread := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pStructSpread,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"ONEWAYPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"OTHERWAYPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"ONEWAYVOLPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pStructSpread,"OTHERWAYVOLPRICE",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				// This array will only hold one leg
				pElement := arrayAddElement( pStructSpread ),
				
				// Array of individual prices 
				pLegSpread := arrayNew( ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pLegSpread,"INDEX",TRUE ,TRUE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CSPOTBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CSPOTASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CBIDZDEN",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CASKZDEN",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CBIDZNUM",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CASKZNUM",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CVOLBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CVOLASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CPBID",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetNumeric( pLegSpread,"CPASK",FALSE,FALSE ),
				arrayDefinitionSetInteger( pLegSpread,"VOLCHOICING",FALSE,FALSE ),
				
				//Default Settings for no Exchange of Delta
				// iDeltaHedgedPrice := 0,
				// iFwdDeltaHedge := 0, 
				
				// Exchange of Delta impact on Calibrated data 
				sExchange := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Hedge_type" ),
				IF ( ( sExchange == "No Hedge" ) OR ( sExchange == "Internal Spot" ) OR ( sExchange == "Internal Forward" ) ) THEN
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 0,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 0
				}
				ELSE IF ( sExchange == "Exchange Spot" ) THEN
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 0 
				}
				ELSE
				{
					iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
					iFwdDeltaHedge := 1
				},
                
                
                // Special case of the Broker Strangle
                IF ( strStartsWith( legGetProductLabel( This ), "Broker Strangle" ) ) THEN
                {
                    iDeltaHedgedPrice := 1,
                    iFwdDeltaHedge := 1
                },
				
				iTwoWays := 1, //leg is in bid/ask mode
				iNumeraire := 0, // Notional is always expressed in strike denominator
				
				// Get the Common information from first currency option leg.
				sInstrument := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Instrument" ),
				xSpot := legGetBidAsk( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Local spot" ), 
				fSpotBid := getBID( xSpot ),
				fSpotAsk := getASK( xSpot ),
				
				IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pFirstCurrOptLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
					sStrikeQ := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"B/A strike quot" ), 
				sNum := fxGetQuotationNumerator( sStrikeQ ),
				sDen := fxGetQuotationDenominator( sStrikeQ ),
				sBase := fxCntGetBase( sInstrument ),
				
				sQuot := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Quotation" ),
				sQuotNum := fxPremiumQuotationGetNumerator( sQuot ),
				sQuotDen := fxPremiumQuotationGetDenominator( sQuot ),
				IF ( strCMP( sNum,sQuotNum,3 ) ) THEN
					iPremiumInAsset := 0
				ELSE
					iPremiumInAsset := 1,
				
				bStatus := FALSE,
				sDefaultSpotQuotMode := fxCntGetDefaultSpotQuotationMode( sInstrument ),
				IF ( sDefaultSpotQuotMode == sStrikeQ ) THEN
					iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode := 1
				ELSE
					iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode := 0,
				
				dEvalDate := npGetEvaluationDate( ),
				dSpotDate := fxCntGetSpotDate( sInstrument,dEvalDate ),
				sCalendar := fxCntGetSpotToDeliveryCalendar( sInstrument ),
				
				//Pricing Both Ways
				//Loop on all the components and get the Leg information
				iCurrentLeg := iFirstCurrOptLeg, 
				iNumCurrOptLegs := 0,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) DO
				{
					pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" )
					AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" )
					AND ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) ) THEN
					{
						iNumCurrOptLegs := iNumCurrOptLegs + 1,
						sBuy := legGetString( pLeg,"Buy/Sell" ),
						IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
							xStrike := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Bid/Ask strike" ), 
						
						IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN
							sPayout := legGetString( pLeg,"Payout" ),
						
						fNotional := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Nominal" ),
						sType := legGetProductLabel( pLeg ),
						IF ( ( sType =="One Barr" ) OR ( sType == "Two Barr" ) OR ( strCMP( sType,"Touch",5 ) ) ) THEN
						{
							fBarrier := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Barrier" ),
							sBarType := legGetString( pLeg,"Exotic_style" )
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sType,"Touch",5 ) ) THEN
						{
							fBidStrike := 1.0,
							fAskStrike := 1.0
						}
						ELSE
						{
							fBidStrike := getBID( xStrike ), // Bid Strike 
							fAskStrike := getASK( xStrike ) // Ask Strike 
						},

                        sNominalUnit := legGetString( pLeg,"Nominal_unit" ),
                        fNominal := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Nominal" ),
                        IF ( strCMP( legGetProductType( pLeg ),"RBT",3 ) == FALSE ) THEN 
                            fOtherNominal := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Other_nominal" ),
                        
                        fDelta := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Spot_calibrated_delta" ),
                        sDeltaCcy := legGetString( pLeg,"Spot_exch_delta_unit" ),
                        IF ( sDeltaCcy == sNum ) THEN
                        {
                            IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                                fDelta := - fDelta / ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            ELSE
                                fDelta := - fDelta * ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5
                        },
                        
                        IF ( sDeltaCcy == sNominalUnit ) THEN
                            fDelta := fDelta * fNominal * 0.01
                        ELSE
                            fDelta := fDelta * fOtherNominal * 0.01,
                        
                        fVega := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_vega" ),
                        IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                            fRho := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_rho_ccy" )
                        ELSE
                            fRho := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Calibrated_rhoF_ccy" ),
                        
                        IF ( sQuotNum == sDen ) THEN
                        {
                            IF ( iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode == 1 ) THEN
                            {
                                fVega := fVega * ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 ),
                                fRho := fRho * ( ( fSpotBid + fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            }
                            ELSE
                            {
                                fVega := fVega / ( ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 ),
                                fRho := fRho / ( ( 1.0 / fSpotBid + 1.0 / fSpotAsk ) * 0.5 )
                            }
                        },
                        
                        fFF := fxGetPremiumQuotationFormFactor( sQuot ),
                        IF ( sQuotDen == sNominalUnit ) THEN
                        {
                            fVega := fVega * fNominal / fFF,
                            fRho := fRho * fNominal / fFF
                        }
                        ELSE
                        {
                            fVega := fVega * fOtherNominal / fFF,
                            fRho := fRho * fOtherNominal / fFF
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sPayout,"Call",4 ) ) THEN
							iCall := 1 
						ELSE
							iCall := -1, 
						
						IF ( strCMP( sBuy,"Sell",4 ) ) THEN
						{
							fNotional := - 1.0 * fNotional,
							fDelta := - 1.0 * fDelta,
							fVega := - 1.0 * fVega,
							fRho := - 1.0 * fRho
						},
						
						IF ( strCMP( sType,"Vanilla",7 ) ) THEN
						{
							xBidStrikeVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local b.strike vol" ),  // Bid Strike Local vol
							fBidBidStrikeVol := getBID( xBidStrikeVol ) / 100., 
							fAskBidStrikeVol := getASK( xBidStrikeVol ) / 100., 
							xAskStrikeVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local a.strike vol" ), // Ask Strike Local vol 
							fBidAskStrikeVol := getBID( xAskStrikeVol ) / 100.0,
							fAskAskStrikeVol := getASK( xAskStrikeVol ) / 100.0
						}
						ELSE
						{
							xVol := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local volatility" ),  // Local vol
							fBidBidStrikeVol := getBID( xVol ) / 100.0,
							fAskBidStrikeVol := getASK( xVol ) / 100.0, 
							fBidAskStrikeVol := getBID( xVol ) / 100.0, 
							fAskAskStrikeVol := getASK( xVol ) / 100.
						},
						
						fExpiry := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Expiry days" ) / 365.0, 
						fDelivery := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Delivery days" ) / 365.0,
						
						xNumZero := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local_ZC_rate" ),
						xDenZero := legGetBidAsk( pLeg,"Local_ZC_rate_F" ),
                        xSwapPoints := legGetBidAsk(pLeg,"Local swap points"),
						fNumBid := getBID( xNumZero ) / 100.0, 
						fNumAsk := getASK( xNumZero ) / 100.0, 
						fDenBid := getBID( xDenZero ) / 100.0,
						fDenAsk := getASK( xDenZero ) / 100.0, 
                        fSwapPointsBid := getBID(xSwapPoints),
                        fSwapPointsAsk := getASK(xSwapPoints),
						
						dDelivery := legGetDate(pLeg,"Delivery"),
						IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1W",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 0
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1W",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 1
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1M",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 2
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1M",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 3
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"3M",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 4
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"3M",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 5
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1Y",sCalendar ) ) > dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 6
						ELSE IF ( ( dSpotDate + shift( dSpotDate,"1Y",sCalendar ) ) == dDelivery ) THEN
							iWindowType := 7
						ELSE
							iWindowType := 8,
						
						pElement2 := arrayAddElement( pOptionArray ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"INDEX",iCurrentLeg ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"TYPE",iType ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"NOTIONAL",fNotional ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"CALL",iCall ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCDENBID",fSwapPointsBid ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCDENASK",fSwapPointsAsk ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCNUMBID",fNumBid ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ZCNUMASK",fNumAsk ), 
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"EXPIRY",fExpiry ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"DELIVERY",fDelivery ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BIDSTRIKE",fBidStrike ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"ASKSTRIKE",fAskStrike ), 
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BVOLBID",fBidBidStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"BVOLASK",fAskBidStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"AVOLBID",fBidAskStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"AVOLASK",fAskAskStrikeVol ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"DELTA",fDelta ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"VEGA",fVega ),
						arrayElementSetNumeric( pElement2,"RHO",fRho ),
						arrayElementSetInteger( pElement2,"WINDOW_TYPE",iWindowType ),
						
						pElement3 := arrayAddElement( pLegSpread )
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1 
				}, 
				
				// Apply DLL 
				bStatus := mxBAspreadingOTF(iTwoWays,				//  1  fTwoWays 
										iNumCurrOptLegs,		//  2  uNumOptions
										iPremiumInAsset,		//  3  iPremiumInAsset
										iDeltaHedgedPrice,		//  4  iDeltaHedgedPrice
										iFwdDeltaHedge,		//  5  iFwdDeltaHedge
										iIsDefaultSpotQuotMode,	//  6  iIsDefaultSpotQuotationMode 
										fClientSpecificSpread,		// 7  dClientSpecificSpread 
										fSpotBid,				//  8  dBidLMDSpot
										fSpotAsk,				//  9  dAskLMDSpot
										pOptionArray,			// 10  Vector of option definitions
										"TYPE",				// 11  Label for piTypes
										"NOTIONAL",			// 12  Label for pdNotionals
										"CALL",				// 13  Label for pfAssetCallPutParities
										"ZCDENBID",			// 14  Label for pdBidAssetLMDZeroRate
										"ZCDENASK",			// 15  Label for pdAskAssetLMDZeroRate
										"ZCNUMBID",			// 16  Label for pdBidNumerLMDZeroRate
										"ZCNUMASK",			// 17  Label for pdAskNumerLMDZeroRate
										"EXPIRY",			// 18  Label for pdExpYears 
										"DELIVERY",			// 19  Label for pdDelYears 
										"BIDSTRIKE",			// 20  Label for pdBidStrikes 
										"ASKSTRIKE",			// 21  Label for pdAskStrikes
										"BVOLBID",			// 22  Label for pdBidStrikeBidVols
										"BVOLASK",			// 23  Label for pdBidStrikeAskVols  
										"AVOLBID",			// 24  Label for pdAskStrikeBidVols
										"AVOLASK",			// 25  Label for pdAskStrikeAskVols
										"DELTA",				// 26  Label for pdDeltas
										"VEGA",				// 27  Label for pdVegas
										"RHO",				// 28  Label for pdRhos
										"WINDOW_TYPE",		// 29  Label for piWindowTypes
										pLegSpread,			// 30  Vector of individual leg results
										"CSPOTBID",			// 31  Label for leg bid CMD spot rate
										"CSPOTASK",			// 32  Label for leg Ask CMD spot rate
										"CBIDZDEN",			// 33  Label for leg bid asset CMD zzero rate
										"CASKZDEN",			// 34  Label for leg Ask asset CMD zzero rate
										"CBIDZNUM",			// 35  Label for leg bid num CMD zero rate
										"CASKZNUM",			// 36  Label for leg Ask num CMD zero rate
										"CVOLBID",			// 37  Label for leg bid CMD vol        
										"CVOLASK",			// 38  Label for leg Ask CMD vol
										"CPBID",				// 39  Label for leg bid price
										"CPASK",				// 40  Label for leg Ask price
										"VOLCHOICING",		// 41  Label for Vol choicing type
										pStructSpread,			// 42  Vector of global structure results 
										"ONEWAYPRICE",		// 43  Label for Structure One Way Net price
										"OTHERWAYPRICE",		// 44  Label for Structure Other Way Net price    
										"ONEWAYVOLPRICE",	// 45  Label for Structure One Way VolSpreadOnly price (used in INPV calculation)
										"OTHERWAYVOLPRICE",	// 46  Label for Structure Other Way VolSpreadOnly price (used in INPV calculation)
										sError ),				// 47  pStrErrorMessage      
				
				IF ( bStatus == TRUE ) THEN
					trcPushWarning( sSpreadingErrorName,sError ),
				
				// Setting Results
				
				// Set results for each FX Option leg
				sSwapPointMode := legGetString( pFirstCurrOptLeg,"Swap_points_mode" ),
				iCurrentLeg := 0,
				iIndex2 := 0,
				WHILE ( iCurrentLeg < iNumberOfLegs ) DO
				{
					pLeg := legGetComponentAt( This,iCurrentLeg ),
					
					IF ( ( legGetProductFamily( pLeg ) == "CURR" ) AND ( legGetProductGroup( pLeg ) == "OPT" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( legGetString( pLeg,"Exclude leg" ) <> "Yes" ) THEN
						{
							//Pop hte calibration results from the array., 
							// iIndex2  -- Current array element.
							pElement := arrayGetElement( pLegSpread,iIndex2 ),
							
							fCSpotBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CSPOTBID" ),
							fCSpotAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CSPOTASK" ),
							fCZNumBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CBIDZNUM" ) * 100.0,
							fCZNumAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CASKZNUM" ) * 100.0,
							fCVolBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CVOLBID" ) * 100.0,
							fCVolAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CVOLASK" ) * 100.0,
							fDelivery := legGetNumeric( pLeg,"Delivery_days" ) / 365.0,
                            fCSwapPointsBid := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CBIDZDEN" ),
							fCSwapPointsAsk := arrayElementGetNumeric( pElement,"CASKZDEN" ),
							
							setBID( xCSpot,fCSpotBid ),
							setASK( xCSpot,fCSpotAsk ),
							setBID( xCZCNum,fCZNumBid ), 
							setASK( xCZCNum,fCZNumAsk ),
							setBID( xCVol,fCVolBid ),
							setASK( xCVol,fCVolAsk ),
                            setBID( xCSwapPoints,fCSwapPointsBid ),
                            setASK( xCSwapPoints,fCSwapPointsAsk ),                            
							
							legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_spot",xCSpot ),				
                            legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_swap_points", xCSwapPoints ),
							legSetBidAsk( pLeg,"Calibrated_volatility",xCVol ),
							
							// DEBUG Choicing
							/*
							FRMBA_BA_NETTING		= 0,
							FRMBA_BA_SYNTHETIC_FWD	= 1,
							FRMBA_BA_FLEX_FWD		= 2,
							FRMBA_BA_NON_VANILLA	= 3,
							FRMBA_BA_CALENDAR_SPREAD= 4,
							FRMBA_BA_DEFAULT		= 5*/
							iVolChoicingType:=arrayElementGetInteger(pElement,"VOLCHOICING"),
							IF ( iVolChoicingType == 0 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Netting"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 1 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Synthetic Fwd"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 2 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Flex Fwd"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 3 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Non Vanilla"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 4 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Calendar Spread"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 5 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Usual"
							ELSE IF ( iVolChoicingType == 6 ) THEN
								sVolChoicing := "Butterfly",
							legSetString( pLeg,"pf_vol_choice",sVolChoicing ),
							iIndex2 := iIndex2 + 1
						}
						ELSE
							legSetString( pLeg,"pf_vol_choice","" )
					},
					iCurrentLeg := iCurrentLeg + 1
				},
				
				// Free pointers
				arrayFree( pOptionArray ),
				arrayFree( pStructSpread ),
				arrayFree( pLegSpread )
			}
			ELSE IF ( bApplyAlgorithmError == TRUE ) THEN
				trcPushWarning( sSpreadingErrorName,"Inconsistent structure definition" )
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingTenorResetPerLeg

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sBasisSwap := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	sCurrency := getArgAsString( 2 ),
	sIndex := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	sTypology := getArgAsString( 4 ),
	sUsage := getArgAsString( 5 ),
	sIndTen := getArgAsString( 6 ),
	sVNS := getArgAsString( 7 ),
	sCalcFreq := getArgAsString( 8 ),
	
	pIndTenor := pNULL,
	sLegCheck := "",
	sClearingEligibilityTenRes := "",
	iTenCount := 0,
	sTenCountNumb := "",
	iTen := 0,
	iIndTenor := 0,
	sTen := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonTenRes := "",
	
	IF ( ( sTypology <> "FRA" ) AND ( sBasisSwap == "Basis2" ) ) THEN
	{
		pIndTenor := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingFloatTenRes",sContext,
									"Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
									"CL_EL_INDEX",sIndex,
									"Typology","IRS" ),
		IF ( isNull( pIndTenor ) ) THEN
			sLegCheck := "OIS"
	},
	
	IF ( sTypology == "OIS" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( ( sBasisSwap == "" ) AND ( sLegCheck == "" )
		OR ( ( sBasisSwap == "Basis2" ) AND sLegCheck == "OIS" ) ) THEN
		{
			IF ( sUsage == "Compound" ) THEN
				sClearingEligibilityTenRes := "Tenor and Reset"
		}
	},
	
	IF ( sTypology <> "OIS" ) THEN
		pIndTenor := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingFloatTenRes",sContext,
									"Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
									"CL_EL_INDEX",sIndex,
									"Typology",sTypology ),
	IF ( ( ( sTypology == "OIS" ) AND ( sLegCheck <> "OIS" ) )
	OR ( sTypology <> "OIS" ) 
	OR ( sTypology == "FRA" ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( NOT isNull( pIndTenor ) ) THEN
		{
			iTenCount := 0,
			sTenCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pIndTenor,0,iTenCount ),
			WHILE ( sTenCountNumb <> "" ) DO
			{
				iTenCount := iTenCount + 1,
				sTenCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pIndTenor,0,iTenCount )
			},
			iTen := 0,
			iIndTenor := iTenCount,
			WHILE ( iTen < iIndTenor ) DO
			{
				sTen := lookupResultsGetString( pIndTenor,0,iTen ),
				IF ( sTypology == "FRA" ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sTen == sIndTen ) THEN
					{
						sClearingEligibilityTenRes := "Tenor and Reset",
						iTen := iIndTenor
					}
					ELSE
						iTen := iTen + 1
				}
				ELSE IF ( ( sTen == sIndTen )
				OR ( ( sContext == "CME" ) AND ( sCurrency == "MXN" ) AND ( strContain( sTen, sIndTen ) ) ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( sVNS == "VNS" ) 
					AND ( convertSToNumeric( sIndTen ) <= convertSToNumeric( sCalcFreq ) )
					AND ( sBasisSwap <> "Basis2" ) ) THEN
					{
						sClearingEligibilityTenRes := "Tenor and Reset",
						iTen := iIndTenor
					}
					ELSE IF ( ( convertSToNumeric( sIndTen ) <= convertSToNumeric( sCalcFreq ) )
					OR ( ( sContext == "CME" ) AND ( sCurrency == "MXN" ) AND ( ( convertSToNumeric( sIndTen )/7.0 ) <= convertSToNumeric( sCalcFreq ) ) ) ) THEN
					{
						sClearingEligibilityTenRes := "Tenor and Reset",
						iTen := iIndTenor
					}
					ELSE
						iTen := iTen + 1
				}
				ELSE
					iTen := iTen + 1
			}
		}
	},
	
	IF ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityTenRes,"Tenor and Reset" ) == FALSE ) THEN
		sNotEligibleReasonTenRes := "#Tenor and Reset ",
	
	setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReasonTenRes )
};

// mx.completion._Functions.IRD.FRAClearingEligibility

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	
	sInstrument := "",
	sCurrency := "",
	sIndex := "",
	sClearingEligibilityIndex := "",
	sClearingEligibilityCCY := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonIndex := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonCCY := "",
	sTenor1 := "",
	sTenor2 := "",
	sTenor := "",
	sEligibilityCheckSC := "",
	sEligibilityCheckCME := "",
	sTypology := "",
	sCounterparty := "",
	pMA := pNULL,
	pISDA := pNULL,
	sISDA := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonISDA := "",
	sPeriod := "",
	sClearingEligibilityCoupon := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonCoupon := "",
	sPayFlow1 := "",
	sPayFlow2 := "",
	pStreams := pNULL,
	sAdditional1 := "",
	pAddFlows := pNULL,
	iAddFlowsCount := 0,
	sNotEligibleReasonAddPayment := "",
	dStart := dNULL,
	dFixing := dNULL,
	sNotEligibleReasonFixing := "",
	sLeg1 := "",
	sLeg2 := "",
	sRateConv := "",
	sPayCalendar1 := "",
	sFixCalendar1 := "",
	sPayCalendar2 := "",
	sFixCalendar2 := "",
	sNotEligibleReason := "",
    
	// Index and Tenor formatting
	sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
	sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
	sIndex := legGetString( pComponent,"Index" ),
	callPreTradeFormula( sIndexEligibility,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingFormatIndex",sContext,sCurrency,sIndex ),
	IF ( sIndex <> sIndexEligibility ) THEN
	{
		sIndex := strToken(sIndexEligibility,"$",0 ),
		sClearingEligibilityIndex := strToken(sIndexEligibility,"$",1 )
	},
	
	callPreTradeFormula( sCurrencyEligibility,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingFormatCCY",sContext,sCurrency,sInstrument ),
	IF ( sCurrency <> sCurrencyEligibility ) THEN
	{
		sCurrency := strToken( sCurrencyEligibility,"$",0 ),
		sClearingEligibilityCCY := strToken( sCurrencyEligibility,"$",1 )
	},
	
	IF ( ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityIndex,"Index" ) == FALSE ) AND ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityCCY,"CCY" ) == FALSE ) ) THEN
	{
		sNotEligibleReasonIndex := "#Index ",
		sNotEligibleReasonCCY := "#CCY "
	},
	
	sTenor1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Index tenor" ),
	sTenor2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Index tenor2" ),
	IF ( sTenor1 <> "" ) THEN
		sTenor := sTenor1
	ELSE IF ( sTenor2 <> "" ) THEN
		sTenor := sTenor2
	ELSE IF ( sTenor1 <> "" AND sTenor2 <> "" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC","Not Clearing eligible product" )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Not Clearing eligible product" )
		}
	},
	
	//Trade is not eligible for SwapClear or CME
	//Below the ineligibility reason(s)
	IF ( ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC" ) == "" ) )
	OR ( ( sContext == "CME" ) AND ( legGetString( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME" ) == "" ) )THEN
	{
		// Tenor Check
		sTypology := legGetString( pComponent,"Typology" ),
		callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonTenRes,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingTenorResetPerLeg",sContext,"",sCurrency,sIndex,sTypology,"",sTenor,"",""),
		
		// Maturity and Settlement dates
		callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonMaturity,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingMaturity",sContext,sCurrency,"",sTenor ),
		
		// ISDA check: only FRA under ISDA 2006 are eligibile for clearing
		// Based on the Master Agreement signed witht the counterparty, the fixed leg basis count has to be checked
		sCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
		pMA := agreementGetMA( dStart,"COUNTERPART",sCounterparty,"TYPOLOGY",sTypology ),
		pISDA := legGetMA( pLeg ),
		IF ( ( NOT isNull( pMA ) ) AND ( NOT isNull( pISDA ) ) ) THEN
		{
			legSetMA( pLeg,pMA ),
			sISDA := mx.statics.organization.legal.Ma.GetLabel( pMA ),
			IF ( sISDA <> "ISDA 2006" ) THEN
				sNotEligibleReasonISDA := "#ISDA "
		},
		
		// Trade details check
		sPeriod := legGetString( pComponent,"Single period" ),
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			// Check if there is only one coupon
			IF ( sPeriod == "Yes" ) THEN
				sClearingEligibilityCoupon := "Coupon"
			ELSE
				sNotEligibleReasonCoupon := "#Coupon "
		}
		ELSE IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
		{
			// Check if there is only one coupon and if the payment is on effective or at maturity
			IF ( sPeriod == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				sPayFlow1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Payment1" ),
				sPayFlow2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Payment2" ),
				IF ( ( ( sPayFlow1 == "In arrears" ) OR ( sPayFlow1 == "Up front" ) OR ( sPayFlow1 == "Up front disc." ) )
				AND ( ( sPayFlow2 == "In arrears" ) OR ( sPayFlow2 == "Up front" ) OR ( sPayFlow2 == "Up front disc." ) ) ) THEN
					sClearingEligibilityCoupon := "Coupon"
				ELSE
					sNotEligibleReasonCoupon := "#Coupon "
			}
			ELSE
				sNotEligibleReasonCoupon := "#Coupon "
		},
		
		//Check if there are Additional Flows
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
			sAdditional1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Additional flows enable" ),
			IF ( sAdditional1 == "Yes" ) THEN
			{
				pAddFlows := streamsGetAdditionalFlows( pStreams ),
				iAddFlowsCount := additionalFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pAddFlows ),
				
				// CCP accepts maximum 1 additional flows
				IF NOT ( iAddFlowsCount <= 1 ) THEN
					sNotEligibleReasonAddPayment := "#Additional Payment "
			}
		},
		
		// The fixing cannot be in arrears
		dStart := legGetDate( pComponent,"Start" ),
		dFixing := legGetDate( pComponent,"Fixing date" ),
		IF ( dStart < dFixing ) THEN
			sNotEligibleReasonFixing := "#Fixing ",
		
		// Floating Leg Day Count Check
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			sLeg1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type" ),
			sLeg2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Leg type2" ),
			IF ( ( sLeg1 == "Floating" ) AND ( sLeg2 <> "Floating" ) ) THEN
				sRateConv := legGetString( pComponent,"Rate convention")
			ELSE IF ( ( sLeg1 <> "Floating" ) AND ( sLeg2 == "Floating" ) ) THEN
				sRateConv := legGetString( pComponent,"Rate convention2" ),
			
			callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonFlDC,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingFloatDayCountPerLeg",sContext,"",sCurrency,sTypology,sRateConv )
		},
		
		// Check Business day Convention
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
			callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonBDC,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingBusinessDayPerLeg",sContext,sTypology,sBDConvention0 ),
		
		// Financial Centre : holidays and payment eligible calendars
		IF ( sLeg1 == "Floating" ) THEN
		{
			sPayCalendar1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Union Pay Calendar" ),
			sFixCalendar1 := legGetString( pComponent,"Union Fxg Calendar" ),
			callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonCal1,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingCalendarPerLeg",sContext,sCurrency,sIndex,sPayCalendar1,sFixCalendar1 )
		},
		IF ( sLeg2 == "Floating" ) THEN
		{
			sPayCalendar2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Union Pay Calendar2" ),
			sFixCalendar2 := legGetString( pComponent,"Union Fxg Calendar2" ),
			callPreTradeFormula( sNotEligibleReasonCal2,pLeg,"mx.completion._Functions.IRD.ClearingCalendarPerLeg",sContext,sCurrency,sIndex,sPayCalendar2,sFixCalendar2 )
		},
		
		// Final check
		sNotEligibleReason := sEligibilityCheckSC + sEligibilityCheckCME + "$" + sNotEligibleReasonIndex + sNotEligibleReasonCCY + sNotEligibleReasonTenRes + sNotEligibleReasonMaturity 
							+ sNotEligibleReasonISDA + sNotEligibleReasonCoupon + sNotEligibleReasonAddPayment + sNotEligibleReasonFixing 
							+ sNotEligibleReasonFlDC + sNotEligibleReasonBDC + sNotEligibleReasonCal1 + sNotEligibleReasonCal2,
		setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReason )
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingAddPayments

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	dStart := getArgAsDate( 0 ),
	dMaturity := getArgAsDate( 1 ),
	iAddFlowsMax := getArgAsInteger( 2 ),
	sCurrency := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	pStreams := legGetStreams( pComponent ),
	pAddFlows := streamsGetAdditionalFlows( pStreams ),
	iAddFlowsCount := additionalFlowsGetNumberOfFlows( pAddFlows ),
	iCountFlows := 0,
	pAddFlow := pNULL,
	dPayment := dNULL,
	fPayment := 0.0,
	fStart := convertDToNumeric( dStart ),
	fFirstAddFlow := 0.0,
	iFirstAddFlow := 0,
	fMat := convertDToNumeric( dMaturity ),
	pSettlLag := pNULL,
	fSettlLag := 0.0,
	iSettlLag := 0,
	sNotEligibleReasonAddPayments := "",
	
	// CCP accepts maximum iAddFlowsMax additional flows
	IF ( iAddFlowsCount <= iAddFlowsMax ) THEN
	{
		iCountFlows := 0,
		WHILE ( iCountFlows < iAddFlowsCount ) DO
		{
			pAddFlow := additionalFlowsGetFlowAt( pAddFlows, iCountFlows ),
			dPayment := flowGetPaymentDate( pAddFlow ),
			fPayment := convertDToNumeric( dPayment ),
			fFirstAddFlow := fPayment - fStart,
			iFirstAddFlow := toInt( fFirstAddFlow ),
			// Check if each additional flow respects the min/max eligible value dates
			IF ( fPayment <= fMat ) THEN
			{
				pSettlLag := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingFirstSettlDate","SwapClear","Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pSettlLag ) ) THEN
				{
					fSettlLag := lookupResultsGetNumeric( pSettlLag,0,0 ),
					iSettlLag := toInt( fSettlLag ),
					IF ( iFirstAddFlow < iSettlLag ) THEN
						sNotEligibleReasonAddPayments := "#Additional Payments "
				}
			}
			ELSE
				sNotEligibleReasonAddPayments := "#Additional Payments ",
			iCountFlows := iCountFlows + 1
		}
	}
	ELSE
		sNotEligibleReasonAddPayments := "#Additional Payments ",
	
	setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReasonAddPayments )
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingStubPerLeg

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	sLeg := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sBroken := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	pStubTenor := getArgAsPointer( 2 ),
    sContext := getArgAsString( 2 ),
    sTypology := getArgAsString( 3 ),
    sCurrency := getArgAsString( 4 ),
    sIndex := getArgAsString( 5 ),
    sBasisSwap := getArgAsString( 6 ),
    sZeroCoupon := getArgAsString( 7 ),
	sStubPeriod := getArgAsString( 8 ),
	sStub11 := getArgAsString( 9 ),
	sStub12 := getArgAsString( 10 ),
	sStub13 := getArgAsString( 11 ),
	sStub14 := getArgAsString( 12 ),
	fStubDD := getArgAsNumeric ( 13 ),
    fStubPeriod := getArgAsNumeric ( 14 ),
    fCalcFreq2 := getArgAsNumeric ( 15 ),
	
	iCount := 0,
	sCountNumb := "",
	iNbTenor := 0,
	iTenor := 0,
	sViewTenor11 := "",
	iTenor2 := 0,
	sViewTenor12 := "",
	sStubTenors := "",
	fViewTenor11 := 0.0,
	fViewTenor12 := 0.0,
	sViewTenor13 := "",
	sViewTenor14 := "",
	fViewTenor13 := 0.0,
	fViewTenor14 := 0.0,
	iTenorMin := 0,
	sClearingEligibilityStub := "",
	
    // Different Eligible Tenors for Basis Swaps and the IRS, ZC and VNS
    IF ( sBasisSwap <> "" ) THEN
    {
        pStubTenor := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingEligStub",sContext,
                                    "Typology",sTypology,
                                    "Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
                                    "Index Name",sIndex,
                                    "Trade Info",sBasisSwap )
    }
    ELSE
    {
        pStubTenor := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingEligStub",sContext,
                                    "Typology",sTypology,
                                    "Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
                                    "Index Name",sIndex,
                                    "Trade Info",sZeroCoupon )
    },    
    
	IF ( sLeg == "Floating" ) THEN
	{
		IF ( sBroken == "Interpolated" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( NOT isNull( pStubTenor ) ) THEN
			{
				iCount := 0,
				sCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0,iCount ),
				WHILE ( sCountNumb <> "" ) DO
				{
					iCount := iCount + 1,
					sCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0,iCount )
				},
				
				iNbTenor := iCount - 1,
				IF ( ( sStubPeriod == "Up front" )
				OR ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (forward)" )
				OR ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (backward)" ) ) THEN
				{
					iTenor := 0,
					WHILE ( iTenor < iNbTenor ) DO
					{
						sViewTenor11 := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0, iTenor ),
						IF ( strContain( sStub11,sViewTenor11 ) == TRUE ) THEN
						{
							iTenor2 := iTenor + 1,
							iTenor := iNbTenor
						}
						ELSE
							iTenor := iTenor + 1
					},
					WHILE ( iTenor2 < iNbTenor ) DO
					{
						sViewTenor12 := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0, iTenor2 ),
						IF ( sViewTenor12 <> "0" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( strContain( sStub12,sViewTenor12 ) == TRUE ) THEN
								iTenor2 := iNbTenor
							ELSE
							{
								sStubTenors := "not the closest available",
								iTenor2 := iNbTenor
							}
						}
						ELSE
							iTenor2 := iTenor + 1
					},
					
					IF ( strContain( sViewTenor11,"W" ) == TRUE ) THEN
						fViewTenor11 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor11 ) / 4.0
					ELSE
						fViewTenor11 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor11 ),
					
					IF ( strContain(sViewTenor12,"W") == TRUE ) THEN
						fViewTenor12 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor12 ) / 4.0
					ELSE
						fViewTenor12 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor12 )
				},
				
				IF ( ( sStubPeriod == "In arrears" ) 
				OR ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (forward)" )
				OR ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (backward)" ) ) THEN
				{
					iTenor := 0,
					WHILE ( iTenor < iNbTenor ) DO
					{
						sViewTenor13 := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0, iTenor ),
						IF ( strContain( sStub13,sViewTenor13 ) == TRUE ) THEN
						{
							iTenor2 := iTenor + 1,
							iTenor := iNbTenor
						}
						ELSE
							iTenor := iTenor + 1
					},
					WHILE ( iTenor2 < iNbTenor ) DO
					{
						sViewTenor14 := lookupResultsGetString( pStubTenor,0,iTenor2 ),
						IF ( sViewTenor14 <> "0" ) THEN
						{
							IF ( strContain( sStub14,sViewTenor14 ) == TRUE ) THEN
								iTenor2 := iNbTenor
							ELSE
							{
								sStubTenors := "not the closest available",
								iTenor2 := iNbTenor
							}
						}
						ELSE
							iTenor2 := iTenor + 1
					},
					
					IF ( strContain( sViewTenor11,"W" ) == TRUE ) THEN
						fViewTenor13 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor13 ) / 4.0
					ELSE
						fViewTenor13 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor13 ),
					
					IF ( strContain( sViewTenor12,"W" ) == TRUE ) THEN
						fViewTenor14 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor14 ) / 4.0
					ELSE
						fViewTenor14 := convertSToNumeric( sViewTenor14 )
				},
				IF ( iTenor <= iTenor2 ) THEN
					iTenorMin := iTenor
				ELSE
					iTenorMin := iTenor2,
				
				IF ( fStubDD >= lookupResultsGetNumeric( pStubTenor,0,iTenorMin ) ) THEN
				{
					IF ( sStubPeriod == "Up front" ) THEN
					{
                    	fTmp := 0.0,
                        sTmp := "",
                    
                    	fTmp := fViewTenor11 + fCalcFreq2 + fViewTenor12 + fCalcFreq2 + fViewTenor11 + fStubPeriod + fStubPeriod + fViewTenor12,
                        sTmp := sStubTenors,
						IF ( ( fViewTenor11 <= fCalcFreq2 )
						AND ( fViewTenor12 <= fCalcFreq2 )
						AND ( fViewTenor11 <= fStubPeriod )
						AND ( fStubPeriod <= fViewTenor12 )
						AND ( sStubTenors == "" ) ) THEN
							sClearingEligibilityStub := "Stub"
					},
					
					IF ( sStubPeriod == "In arrears" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( ( fViewTenor13 <= fCalcFreq2 )
						AND ( fViewTenor14 <= fCalcFreq2 )
						AND ( fViewTenor13 <= fStubPeriod )
						AND ( fStubPeriod <= fViewTenor14 )
						AND ( sStubTenors == "" ) ) THEN
							sClearingEligibilityStub := "Stub"
					},
					
					IF ( ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (forward)" ) OR ( sStubPeriod == "Both ends (backward)" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( ( ( fViewTenor11 <= fCalcFreq2 ) AND ( fViewTenor12 <= fCalcFreq2 ) AND ( fViewTenor11 <= fStubPeriod ) AND ( fStubPeriod <= fViewTenor12 ) )
						OR ( ( fViewTenor13 <= fCalcFreq2 ) AND ( fViewTenor14 <= fCalcFreq2 ) AND ( fViewTenor13 <= fStubPeriod ) AND ( fStubPeriod <= fViewTenor14 ) )
						AND ( sStubTenors == "" ) ) THEN
							sClearingEligibilityStub := "Stub"
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBroken == "Closest" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( sTypology <> "OIS" ) THEN
				sClearingEligibilityStub := "Stub"
		}
		ELSE IF ( sBroken == "Current" ) THEN
			sClearingEligibilityStub := "Stub"
	},
	setReturnValue( sClearingEligibilityStub )
};

// mx.msl.event.completion.ALL.EarlyTerm

/*
MXpress
FX Early Termination for completion

Version 2.0
Revamping to merge mx.completion.ALL.EarlyTerm and mx.ompletion.ALL.EarlyTerm-2 event scripted rules
Determine if is Inter-entity
Step 1: deletion of flows
	If Registration Outright Package, Split Package, Package single with no iTrade
		deletion of needed flows
	If Package single with iTrade, Split Forex Swap Package
		If inter-entity
			deletion of needed flows
		Else (intra-entity)
			deletion of needed flows
Step 2: addition of flows
	If 3rd currency
		If inter-entity
			If Registration Outright Package, Split Package, Package single with no iTrade
				addition of needed flows
			If Package single with iTrade, Split Forex Swap Package
				addition of needed flows
		Else (intra-entity)
			If Registration Outright Package, Split Package, Package single with no iTrade
				addition of needed flows
			If Package single with iTrade, Split Forex Swap Package
				addition of needed flows

Version 1.0
Used algorithm:
Check if package is intra-entity
delete fee if hedge mode is offset/no
delete fee if settlment is null
warn the user when Early termination in 3rd currency 
*/

{
	//Fields initialization:
	pEvent := This,
	pVBO := evtGetVersionedBOAt( pEvent,0 ),
	pLeg := evtVersionedBOGetOld( pVBO ),
	pMainComponent := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pMainComponent ),
	sPackageRegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( pPackage ),
	iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pPackage ),
	sMainPortfolio := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Portfolio" ),
	sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sMainPortfolio ),
	sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sMainPortfolio ),
	iComponent := 1,
	pComponent := pNULL,
	sDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio := "",
	bIsInterEntity := FALSE,
	dEventDate := dNULL,
	dNearLegDate := dNULL,
	IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) THEN
		sLegRegistration := legGetRegistrationLabel( fxLegGetComponent( pMainComponent,"Self","farleg" ) )
	ELSE
		sLegRegistration := "",
	bScope := ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" )
				OR ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" )
				OR ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration <> "mxContractITRADE" ) ) ),
	bScope2 := ( ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) ) 
		OR ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) ),
	sHedged := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Hedged" ),
	fSettlement := evtFXMMGetNumeric( pEvent,"Settlement amount" ),
	sInstrument := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Instrument" ),
	sSettlementCcy := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Settlement currency" ),
	IF strCONTAIN( sInstrument,sSettlementCcy ) THEN
		bIsThirdCcy := FALSE
	ELSE
		bIsThirdCcy := TRUE,
	dSettlementDate := evtFXMMGetDate( pEvent,"Settlement date" ),
	sB2B := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Back_to_back" ),
	sBackToBackPortfolio := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Back_to_back_portfolio" ),
	iNbFlows := 0,
	fSettlement2 := evtFXMMGetNumeric( pEvent, "Settlement amount 2" ),
	iNativeFlow := 0,
	bBothSwapLegAlive := FALSE,
	iFlag := 0,
	sPrimaryContract := "",
	bPLccyInPrimContract := FALSE,
	iIerator := 0,
	fInternalTradeReference1 := 0.0,
	fInternalTradeReference2 := 0.0,
	sDestinationFeeBook := "",
	sDestFeeBookCE := "",
	sDestFeeBookLE := "",
	iFlowNumberToGenerate := 0,
	sComponentPortfolio := "",
	dComponentMaturity := dNULL,
	sClosingEntityComponentPortfolio := "",
	sLegalEntityComponentPortfolio := "",
	bProceed := FALSE,
	sSplitMethod := "",
	bIs2spot1swap := FALSE,
	dExternalMaturity := legGetDate( pMainComponent,"Maturity" ),
	sSecondContract := "",
	sPLccyInContract := "",
	sComponentContract := "",
	pOldFlow := pNULL,
	sProcessing := "",
	pNewFlow := pNULL,
	pNewFlow1 := pNULL,
	pNewFlow2 := pNULL,
	sPayReceive := "",
	sPortfolioFirstB2BSwap := "",
	iIterator1 := 1,
	pInternalSwap1 := pNULL,
	pLegAttachmentFar1 := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTradeFar1 := 0.0,
	sPortfolioSecondB2BSwap := "",
	iIterator2 := 1,
	pInternalSwap2 := pNULL,
	pLegAttachmentFar2 := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTradeFar2 := 0.0,
	pLegAttachmentNear1 := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTradeNear1 := 0.0,
	pLegAttachmentNear2 := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTradeNear2 := 0.0,
	sPortfolioContract := "",
	sIntrumentContract := "",
	sFarMaturity := "",
	sPortfolio := "",
	sInstrument := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Instrument" ),
	sMaturity := "",
	pOldFlow0 := pNULL,
	fFlowAmount0 := 0.0,
	sPayReceive0 := "",
	pOldFlow1 := pNULL,
	fFlowAmount1 := 0.0,
	sPayReceive1 := "",
	pNewFlow3 := pNULL,
	pNewFlow4 := pNULL,
	sFlowDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sComponentCounterparty := "",
	fInternalTradeReference := 0.0,
	sFlowDestinationPortfolio := "",
	sNewFlowPortfolio := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Portfolio" ),
	pInternalSwap := pNULL,
	pLegAttachment := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTrade := 0.0,
	pLegAttachment2 := pNULL,
	fAttachmentTrade2 := 0.0,
	sNewFlowDestination := "",
	sNewSourceDestination := "",
	fFlowAmount2 := 0.0,
	sPayReceive2 := "",
	
	//Get inter-entity or entra-entity
	iComponent := 1,
	WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
	{
		pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
		sDestinationPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
		sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
		sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationPortfolio ),
		IF ( ( sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sClosingEntityDestinationPortfolio ) 
		OR ( sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sLegalEntityDestinationPortfolio ) ) THEN
			bIsInterEntity := bIsInterEntity OR TRUE,
		iComponent := iComponent + 1
	},
	
	// Get information if both legs are live in specific case
	IF ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) ) THEN
	{
		dEventDate := evtGetEventDate( pEvent ),
		dNearLegDate := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Maturity_label" ),
		bBothSwapLegAlive := dEventDate < dNearLegDate
	},
	
	// Step 1: flows deletions
	// For first set of registrations
	IF ( bScope ) THEN
	{
		//Delete generated flow for hedge "yes(offset)" or "no"
		iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
		WHILE ( ( iNbFlows > 1 ) AND ( sHedged <> "Yes (Modify)" ) ) DO
		{
			evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
		},
		
		//Delete generated flow if the settlment is null
		iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
		WHILE ( ( iNbFlows > 0 ) AND ( fSettlement == 0.0 ) ) DO
		{
			evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
		},
		
		//Delete generated flow for Settlement in 3rd ccy
		IF ( bIsThirdCcy ) THEN
		{
			ThrowWarning( sSettlementCcy + " is not part of the traded currency pair " + sInstrument,"Termination fee transfer is not managed for this case" ),
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
			WHILE ( ( iNbFlows > 1 ) ) DO
			{
				evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
			}
		}
	}
	// For second set of registrations
	ELSE IF ( bScope2 ) THEN
	{
		IF ( bIsInterEntity ) THEN
		{
			fSettlement2 := evtFXMMGetNumeric( pEvent, "Settlement amount 2" ),
			iNativeFlow := 1,
			
			IF ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) THEN
			{
				IF ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) THEN
					iNativeFlow := 2
			},
			
			IF ( bIsThirdCcy ) THEN
				ThrowWarning( sSettlementCcy + " is not part of the traded currency pair " + sInstrument, "Termination fee transfer is not managed for this case" ),
			
			//delete added fee when 3rd ccy, off-set mode, null settlement
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
			iIerator := 0,
			WHILE ( iNbFlows > iNativeFlow ) DO
			{
				IF ( ( evtFlowGetDestination( evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,iIerator ) ) == evtFlowGetDestination( evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ) ) ) 
				AND ( ( fSettlement <> 0.0 ) OR ( fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) ) ) THEN
					iIerator := iIerator + 1
				ELSE
					evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent,iIerator ),
				
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
			}
		}
		ELSE
		{
			fSettlement2 := evtFXMMGetNumeric( pEvent, "Settlement amount 2" ),
			iNativeFlow := 1,
			
			IF ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) THEN
			{
				IF ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) THEN
					iNativeFlow := 2
			},
			
			//delete added fee when 3rd ccy, off-set mode, null settlement
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
			IF ( ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) AND ( iNbFlows == 3 ) ) THEN
				evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
			
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
			WHILE ( ( iNbFlows > iNativeFlow ) AND ( sHedged <> "Yes (Modify)" ) ) DO 
			{
				evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent, iNativeFlow ),
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
			},
			
			IF ( bIsThirdCcy ) THEN
			{
				ThrowWarning( sSettlementCcy + " is not part of the traded currency pair " + sInstrument, "Termination fee transfer is not managed for this case" ),
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
				WHILE( ( iNbFlows > iNativeFlow ) ) DO 
				{
					evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent, iNativeFlow ),
					iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
				}
			},
			
			iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
			WHILE ( ( iNbFlows > iNativeFlow ) AND ( ( fSettlement == 0.0 ) OR ( fSettlement2 == 0.0 ) ) ) DO
			{
				evtRemoveFlowAt( pEvent, iNativeFlow ),
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent )
			}
		}
	},
	// End of Step 1: flows deletions
	
	// Step 2: flows addition in case of eligibility (bProceed = TRUE)
	IF ( ( sHedged == "Yes (Modify)" ) AND ( NOT ( bIsThirdCcy ) ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( bIsInterEntity ) THEN
		{
			IF ( bScope ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) THEN
				{
					sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Internal swap portfolio" ),
					sDestFeeBookCE := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					sDestFeeBookLE := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					IF( ( sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookCE ) 
					OR ( sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookLE ) ) THEN
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 2
					ELSE
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 1,
					
					iComponent := 1,
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
						dComponentMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( dExternalMaturity == dComponentMaturity ) THEN
						{
							sComponentPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
							sClosingEntityComponentPortfolio := ptfGetEntity( sComponentPortfolio ),
							sLegalEntityComponentPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sComponentPortfolio ),
							IF ( ( sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sClosingEntityComponentPortfolio ) 
							OR ( sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sLegalEntityComponentPortfolio ) ) THEN
							{
								fInternalTradeReference1 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
								bProceed := TRUE
							}
							ELSE
							{
								fInternalTradeReference2 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
								bProceed := TRUE
							}
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
				{
					sSplitMethod := legGetString( pPackage,"Split_method" ),
					bPLccyInPrimContract := strCONTAIN( sPrimaryContract, fxCntGetBase( legGetString( pPackage, "Instrument" ) ) ),
					bIs2spot1swap := FALSE,
					IF ( ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+2swaps" ) OR ( sSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
							sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Primary swap portfolio" )
						ELSE
							sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Secondary swap portfolio" )
					}
					ELSE IF ( sSplitMethod == "2spots/fwds" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
							sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Primary spot portfolio" )
						ELSE
							sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Secondary spot portfolio" )
					}
					ELSE IF ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+1swap" ) THEN
					{
						sDestinationFeeBook := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent, "Internal swap portfolio" ),
						bIs2spot1swap := TRUE
					},
					sDestFeeBookCE := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					sDestFeeBookLE := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					IF( ( sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookCE ) 
					OR ( sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookLE ) ) THEN
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 2
					ELSE
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 1,
					
					iComponent := 1,
					sPrimaryContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Primary_contract" ),
					sSecondContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Secondary_contract" ),
					WHILE ( iComponent< iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,iComponent ),
						
						IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
							sPLccyInContract := sPrimaryContract
						ELSE
							sPLccyInContract := sSecondContract,
						
						sComponentContract := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
						dComponentMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( ( ( sComponentContract == sPLccyInContract ) OR bIs2spot1swap ) 
						AND ( dExternalMaturity == dComponentMaturity ) ) THEN 
						{
							sComponentPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),

							sLegalEntityComponentPortfolio := ptfGetLegalEntity( sComponentPortfolio ),

							{

								bProceed := TRUE
							}
							ELSE
							{
								fInternalTradeReference2 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
								bProceed := TRUE
							}
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration <> "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
				{
					sDestinationFeeBook := legGetString( pMainComponent,"Back_to_back_portfolio" ),
					sDestFeeBookCE := ptfGetEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					sDestFeeBookLE := ptfGetLegalEntity( sDestinationFeeBook ),
					IF( ( sClosingEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookCE ) 
					OR ( sLegalEntitySourceMainPortfolio <> sDestFeeBookLE ) ) THEN
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 2
					ELSE
						iFlowNumberToGenerate := 1,
					
					iComponent := 1,
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
						sComponentPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
						IF ( sComponentPortfolio == sDestinationFeeBook ) THEN
						{
							fInternalTradeReference1 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
							bProceed := TRUE
						}
						ELSE
						{
							fInternalTradeReference2 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
							bProceed := TRUE
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				},
				
				IF ( bProceed ) THEN
				{
					pOldFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
					iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
					IF ( iNbFlows == 1 ) THEN
					{
						sProcessing := "create",
						IF ( iFlowNumberToGenerate == 1 ) THEN
						{
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fInternalTradeReference2 ),
							pNewFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,4 ) )
						}
						ELSE IF ( iFlowNumberToGenerate == 2 ) THEN
						{
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fInternalTradeReference2 ),
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow1,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,4 ) ),
							
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fInternalTradeReference1 ),
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow2,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,4 ) )
						}
					}
					ELSE IF ( ( iNbFlows == 2 ) OR ( iNbFlows == 3 ) ) THEN
					{
						sProcessing := "modify",
						IF ( iFlowNumberToGenerate == 1 ) THEN
							pNewFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 )
						ELSE 
						{
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 )
						}
					},
					
					IF ( ( sProcessing == "create" ) OR ( sProcessing == "modify" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( iFlowNumberToGenerate == 1 ) THEN
						{
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow,abs( fSettlement ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( fSettlement > 0.0 ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow, "Pay" )
							ELSE IF ( fSettlement < 0.0 ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow,"Receive" ),
							evtFlowSetSource( pNewFlow,sMainPortfolio ),
							evtFlowSetDestinationPortfolio( pNewFlow,sDestinationFeeBook )
						}
						ELSE IF ( iFlowNumberToGenerate == 2 ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							sPayReceive := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow ),
							
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow1,abs( fSettlement ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow1,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow1,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Pay" )
							ELSE IF( sPayReceive == "Pay" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Receive" ),
							
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow2,abs( fSettlement ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow2,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow2,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Receive" )
							ELSE IF ( sPayReceive == "Pay" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Pay" )
						}
					}
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( bScope2 ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) ) THEN
				{

						iIterator1 := iIterator1 + 1

					pInternalSwap1 := legGetContractAt( pPackage,iIterator1 - 1 ),
					pLegAttachmentFar1 := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap1,"","farleg" ),
					fAttachmentTradeFar1 := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachmentFar1 ),
					
					sPortfolioSecondB2BSwap := "",
					iIterator2 := 1,
					WHILE ( sPortfolioSecondB2BSwap <> sBackToBackPortfolio ) DO
					{
						sPortfolioSecondB2BSwap := legGetString( legGetContractAt( pPackage,iIterator2 ),"Back_to_back_portfolio" ),
						iIterator2 := iIterator2 + 1
					},
					pInternalSwap2 := legGetContractAt( pPackage,iIterator2 - 1 ),
					pLegAttachmentFar2 := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap2,"","farleg" ),
					fAttachmentTradeFar2 := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachmentFar2 ),
					
					IF ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) THEN

						pLegAttachmentNear1 := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap1, "", "nearleg" ),
						fAttachmentTradeNear1 := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachmentNear1 ),
						
						pLegAttachmentNear2 := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap2, "", "nearleg" ),
						fAttachmentTradeNear2 := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachmentNear2 )

					bProceed := TRUE
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN 
				{
					sPrimaryContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Primary_contract" ),
					sSecondContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Secondary_contract" ),
					bPLccyInPrimContract := strCONTAIN( sPrimaryContract,fxCntGetBase( legGetString( pPackage,"Instrument" ) ) ),
					IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN

						sPortfolioContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Prm_swp_other_party" ),
						sIntrumentContract := sPrimaryContract
					}
					ELSE
					{
						sPortfolioContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Sec_swp_other_party" ),
						sIntrumentContract := sSecondContract
					},
					
					iComponent := 0,
					iNbComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents( pPackage ),
					sFarMaturity := legGetString( pPackage,"Maturity_label_leg2_" ),
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
						sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
						sInstrument := legGetString( pComponent,"Instrument" ),
						sMaturity := legGetString( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( sInstrument == sIntrumentContract ) AND ( sMaturity == sFarMaturity ) THEN
						{
							IF ( sPortfolio == sMainPortfolio ) THEN
								fAttachmentTradeFar1 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent )
							ELSE IF ( sPortfolio == sPortfolioContract ) THEN
								fAttachmentTradeFar2 := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent )
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					},
					bProceed := TRUE
				},
				
				//add the appropriate fee(s)
				iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
				IF ( bProceed ) THEN
				{
					IF ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							fFlowAmount0 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow0 ),
							sPayReceive0 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow0 ),
							
							pOldFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							fFlowAmount1 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow1 ),
							sPayReceive1 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow1 ),
							
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeNear1 ),
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeNear2 ),
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar1 ),
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar2 ),
							
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow1,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow1,abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow1,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow1, dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Receive" ),
							
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,3 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow2,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow2, abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow2, sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow2, dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Receive" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Pay" ),
							
							pNewFlow3 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,4 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow3,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow3,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow3,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow3,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow3,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow3,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow3,abs( fFlowAmount1 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow3,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow3,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive1 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow3,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow3,"Receive" ),
							
							pNewFlow4 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,5 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow4,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow4,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow4,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow4,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow4,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow4,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow4,abs( fFlowAmount1 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow4,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow4,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive1 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow4,"Receive" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow4,"Pay" )
						}
						ELSE IF ( ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 == 0.0 ) 
							OR ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement == 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 )
							OR ( NOT ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 ) ) ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							fFlowAmount0 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow0 ),
							sPayReceive0 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow0 ),
							IF ( ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 == 0.0 ) ) THEN
							{
								evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeNear1 ),
								evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeNear2 )
							}
							ELSE
							{
								evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar1 ),
								evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar2 )
							},
							
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow1,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow1,abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow1,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow1,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Receive" ),
							
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow2,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow2,abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow2,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow2,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Receive" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Pay" )
						}
					
					}
					ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN 
					{
						IF ( fSettlement <> 0.0 ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent, 0 ),
							fFlowAmount0 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow0 ),
							sPayReceive0 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow0 ),
							
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar1 ),
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTradeFar2 ),
							
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow1,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow1,abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow1,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow1,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Receive" ),
							
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow2,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow2,abs( fFlowAmount0 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow2,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow2,dSettlementDate ),
							IF ( sPayReceive0 == "Receive" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Receive" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Pay" )
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ELSE
		{
			IF ( bScope ) THEN
			{
				iComponent := 0,
				IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxIOUTRIGHT" ) THEN
				{
					sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Internal swap portfolio" ),
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
						sComponentCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
						dComponentMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( ( sComponentCounterparty == sFlowDestinationPortfolio )
						AND ( dComponentMaturity == dExternalMaturity ) ) THEN
						{
							fInternalTradeReference := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
							bProceed := TRUE
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLIT" ) THEN
				{
					sSplitMethod := legGetString( pPackage,"Split_method" ),
					sPrimaryContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Primary_contract" ),
					bPLccyInPrimContract := strCONTAIN( sPrimaryContract,fxCntGetBase( legGetString( pPackage,"Instrument" ) ) ),
					IF ( ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+2swaps" ) OR ( sSplitMethod == "1spot+2swaps" ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
							sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Primary swap portfolio" )
						ELSE
							sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Secondary swap portfolio" )
					}
					ELSE IF ( sSplitMethod == "2spots/fwds" ) THEN
					{
						IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
							sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Primary spot portfolio" )
						ELSE
							sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Secondary spot portfolio" )
					}
					ELSE IF ( sSplitMethod == "2spots+1swap" ) THEN
						sFlowDestinationPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Internal swap portfolio" ),
					
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
						sComponentCounterparty := legGetString( pComponent,"Counterpart" ),
						dComponentMaturity := legGetDate( pComponent,"Maturity" ),
						IF ( ( sComponentCounterparty == sFlowDestinationPortfolio )
						AND( dComponentMaturity == dExternalMaturity ) ) THEN
						{
							fInternalTradeReference := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
							bProceed := TRUE
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration <> "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
				{
					sFlowDestinationPortfolio := sMainPortfolio,
					sNewFlowPortfolio := evtFXMMGetString( pEvent,"Internal spot portfolio" ),
					WHILE ( iComponent < iNbComponents ) DO
					{
						pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pPackage,iComponent ),
						sComponentPortfolio := legGetString( pComponent,"Portfolio" ),
						IF ( sComponentPortfolio == sBackToBackPortfolio ) THEN
						{
							fInternalTradeReference := legGetTradeNumber( pComponent ),
							bProceed := TRUE
						},
						iComponent := iComponent + 1
					}
				},
				
				IF ( bProceed ) THEN
				{
					iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
					pOldFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
					IF ( iNbFlows == 1 ) THEN
					{
						sProcessing := "create",
						evtAddFlow( pEvent,fInternalTradeReference ),
						pNewFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
						evtFlowSetSource( pNewFlow,sNewFlowPortfolio ),
						evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow ) ),
						evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,0 ) ),
						evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,1 ) ),
						evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,2 ) ),
						evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,3 ) ),
						evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow,4 ) )
					}
					ELSE IF ( iNbFlows == 2 ) THEN
					{
						sProcessing := "modify",
						pNewFlow := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 )
					},
					
					IF ( ( sProcessing == "create" ) OR ( sProcessing == "modify" ) ) THEN
					{
						evtFlowSetDestinationPortfolio( pNewFlow,sFlowDestinationPortfolio ),
						evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow,abs( fSettlement ) ),
						evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow,sSettlementCcy ),
						evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow,dSettlementDate ),
						sPayReceive := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow ),
						IF ( ( sPayReceive == "Receive" AND sB2B == "No" ) OR ( sPayReceive == "Pay" AND sB2B == "Yes" ) ) THEN
							evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow,"Pay" )
						ELSE IF ( ( sPayReceive == "Pay" AND sB2B == "No" ) OR ( sPayReceive == "Receive" AND sB2B == "Yes" ) ) THEN
							evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow,"Receive" )
					}
				}
			}
			ELSE IF ( bScope2 ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) THEN
				{
					pInternalSwap := legGetContractAt( pPackage, 1 ),
					pLegAttachment := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap,"","nearleg" ),
					fAttachmentTrade := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachment ),
					IF ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) THEN
					{
						pLegAttachment2 := fxLegGetComponent( pInternalSwap,"","farleg" ),
						fAttachmentTrade2 := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachment2 )
					},
					sNewFlowDestination := legGetString( pLegAttachment,"Counterpart" ),
					sNewSourceDestination := legGetString( pLegAttachment,"Portfolio" ),
					bProceed := TRUE
				}
				ELSE IF ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) THEN
				{
					sPrimaryContract := legGetString( pPackage,"Primary_contract" ),
					bPLccyInPrimContract := strCONTAIN( sPrimaryContract,fxCntGetBase( legGetString( pPackage,"Instrument" ) ) ),
					IF ( bPLccyInPrimContract ) THEN
					{
						pLegAttachment := fxLegGetComponent( pMainComponent,"primswp","farleg" ),
						fAttachmentTrade := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachment )
					}
					ELSE
					{
						pLegAttachment := fxLegGetComponent( pMainComponent, "secswp", "farleg" ),
						fAttachmentTrade := legGetTradeNumber( pLegAttachment )
					},
					sNewFlowDestination := legGetString( pLegAttachment,"Counterpart" ),
					sNewSourceDestination := legGetString( pLegAttachment,"Portfolio" ),
					bProceed := TRUE
				},
				
				//add the appropriate fee(s)
				IF ( bProceed ) THEN
				{
					iNbFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows( pEvent ),
					IF ( ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) AND ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement == 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) )
					OR ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) AND ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 == 0.0 ) )
					OR ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) AND ( NOT ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 ) ) 
					OR ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 ) ) ) THEN
					{
						pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent, 0 ),
						IF ( iNbFlows == 1 ) THEN
						{
							sProcessing := "create",
							IF ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) AND ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement == 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
								fAttachmentTrade := fAttachmentTrade2,
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTrade ),
							pNewFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							evtFlowSetSource( pNewFlow0, sNewSourceDestination ),
							evtFlowSetDestinationPortfolio( pNewFlow0,sNewFlowDestination ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow0, evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow0,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow0,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow0,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow0,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow0,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) )
						}
						ELSE IF ( iNbFlows == 2 ) THEN
						{
							sProcessing := "modify",
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 )
						},
						
						IF ( ( sProcessing == "create" ) OR ( sProcessing == "modify" ) ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							fFlowAmount1 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow0 ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow0,abs( fFlowAmount1 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow0,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow0,dSettlementDate ),
							sPayReceive1 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow0 ),
							IF ( ( ( sPayReceive1 == "Pay" ) AND ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) ) 
							OR ( ( sPayReceive1 == "Receive" ) AND ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) ) ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow0,"Receive" )
							ELSE IF ( ( ( sPayReceive1 == "Receive" ) AND ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractFxISPLITSWAP" ) ) 
							OR ( ( sPayReceive1 == "Pay" ) AND ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) ) ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow0,"Pay" )
						}
					}
					ELSE IF ( ( sPackageRegistration == "mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE" ) AND ( sLegRegistration == "mxContractITRADE" ) AND ( bBothSwapLegAlive ) AND ( fSettlement <> 0.0 AND fSettlement2 <> 0.0 ) ) THEN
					{
						IF ( iNbFlows == 2 ) THEN
						{
							sProcessing := "create",
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							pOldFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTrade ),
							evtAddFlow( pEvent,fAttachmentTrade2 ),
							
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							evtFlowSetSource( pNewFlow1,sNewSourceDestination ),
							evtFlowSetDestinationPortfolio( pNewFlow1,sNewFlowDestination ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow1,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,0 ) ),
