							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow1,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow0,4 ) ),
							
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,3 ),
							evtFlowSetSource( pNewFlow2,sNewSourceDestination ),
							evtFlowSetDestinationPortfolio( pNewFlow2,sNewFlowDestination ),
							evtFlowOverrideNature( pNewFlow2,evtFlowGetNature( pOldFlow1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,0,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,0 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,1,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,1 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,2,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,2 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,3,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,3 ) ),
							evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt( pNewFlow2,4,evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt( pOldFlow1,4 ) )
						}
						ELSE IF ( iNbFlows == 4 ) THEN
						{
							sProcessing := "modify",
							pNewFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,2 ),
							pNewFlow2 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,3 )
						},
						
						IF ( ( sProcessing == "create" ) OR ( sProcessing == "modify" ) ) THEN
						{
							pOldFlow0 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,0 ),
							pOldFlow1 := evtGetFlowAt( pEvent,1 ),
							
							fFlowAmount1 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow0 ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow1,abs( fFlowAmount1 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow1,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow1,dSettlementDate ),
							sPayReceive1 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow0 ),
							IF ( sPayReceive1 == "Pay" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow1,"Receive" ),
							
							fFlowAmount2 := evtFlowGetAmount( pOldFlow1 ),
							evtFlowOverrideAmount( pNewFlow2,abs( fFlowAmount2 ) ),
							evtFlowOverrideCurrency( pNewFlow2,sSettlementCcy ),
							evtFlowSetValueDate( pNewFlow2,dSettlementDate ),
							sPayReceive2 := evtFlowGetPayReceive( pOldFlow1 ),
							IF ( sPayReceive2 == "Pay" ) THEN
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Pay" )
							ELSE
								evtFlowSetPayReceive( pNewFlow2,"Receive" )
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion.ALL.Pricing.FTP

/*
MXpress
Pricing rule for Fund Transfer Pricing

Version 1.4
- Recompute Option spread in case of a floored/capped rate

Version 1.3
- Recompute FTP spreads in case of a MM rollover

Version 1.2
- Remove the dependency with the PAlloc lookup table

Version 1.1
- No refresh during Booking and event, except in case of C&R
- CCS case: "Capital_ratio" and "Nominal" --> 1.00 * fSplitSpotRate 

Version1.0

Used algorithm:

Retrieve the deal: We assume that, via rule assignment, the deal passed to this formula is a single Loan/Deposit
- Get the Rate from the original deal
- Get the Currency from the original deal
- Get the Streams from the original deal
- Get the Period from the original deal
- Get the Payout from the original deal
- Get the Leg type from the original deal
- Get the Term from the original deal
- Get the Payment schedule from the original deal
- Get the Frequency from the original deal
- Get the Usage from the original deal
- Get the Single period from the original deal
- Get the Nature from the original deal
- Check if there is a Cap/Floorin the original deal
- Check the Stub periodin the original deal

Check the field Split and create the Theoretical Package when the field Split is set on "Yes"
- in case of Fixed rate: Original Loan + Funding Loan + IRS 
- in case of Fixed rate (CCS) case: Original Loan + Funding Loan + CCS
- in case of Floating rate: Original Loan + Funding Loan + IRS + Loan (with embedded option) + Loan (without embedded option)

if Split on "No" only Funding Package

Start the Pricing phase
- Adding the first component: Liquidity Component
- Adding the second component: IR Risk Component (IRR/CCS)
- Compounding 
- Amortization checks
- Adding the third component in case of an embedded option: Cap/Floor Component

Margin computation
- FTP Spread computation
- IRR Spread computation
- OPT Spread computation

Notes:
This rule uses a set of lookup tables (LUT):
- MX.ALL.FTP.PayFrequency contains the Payment Frequency rule
- MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation contains the Funding Index and the IR Generator for creating the Package considering as inputs: Currency, Period, Term, Nature and Frequency
*/

{
	sAction := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action" ),
	sActionSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.action.context" ),
	sBOSource := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source" ),
	sBOClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
    
    
	IF ( ( ( sAction <> "MOD" ) AND ( sActionSource <> "DUP" ) AND ( sBOSource <> "mxContractEventIEVENT" ) ) 
	  OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventICANCEL_REISSUE" ) OR ( sBOClass == "mxContractEventRatesIROLL_OVER" ) ) THEN

	{
		pLeg := This,
		pComponentFtp := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
		pContractFtp := legGetFatherContract( pComponentFtp ),
		sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContractFtp ),
		IF ( ( sContractRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" )
			AND ( NOT isNull( pComponentFtp) ) 
			AND ( NOT isNull( pContractFtp ) ) ) THEN
		{
			fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Rate_Margin" ),
			sCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Settl.Currency" ),
			sPayout := legGetString(pContractFtp,"Payout" ),
			pStreamsFtpLoan := legGetStreams( pContractFtp ),
			pStreamFtpLoan := streamsGetStream( pStreamsFtpLoan,0,0 ),
			sLegType := legGetString(pContractFtp,"Leg_type" ),
			sSinglePeriod := legGetString ( pComponentFtp,"Single_period" ),
			sPaymentFrequency := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Payment_Frequency" ),
			sFrequency := strToUpperCase( sPaymentFrequency ),
			sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Portfolio" ),
			pPortfolioUdf := ptfGetUserFields( sPortfolio ),
			
			sPeriod := "",
			iNumberPeriod := streamGetNumberOfPeriods( pStreamFtpLoan ),
			IF ( iNumberPeriod == 0 OR iNumberPeriod == 1 ) THEN
				sPeriod := "Single"
			ELSE
				sPeriod := "Multi",
			
			sTerm := "",
			sCalendar := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Payment_calendar" ),
			dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponentFtp,"Start" ),
			dEndDate := legGetDate( pComponentFtp,"Maturity" ),
			dShiftedDate := shiftschedule( dStartDate,2,1,"+1 YEAR NEXT",sCalendar ),
			IF ( dEndDate > dShiftedDate ) THEN
				sTerm := "Long term"
			ELSE
				sTerm := "Short term",
			
			IF ( legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Pay_schedule") == "Driving schedule" ) THEN
				sPaySchedule := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Pay_driving_schedule" )
			ELSE
				sPaySchedule := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Calc_driving_schedule" ),
			
			//Get the Collateral Agreement from the Lookup Table
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FTP.PayFrequency","ALL","Frequency",sFrequency ),
			sCollateralAgreement := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
			legSetString( pContractFtp,"Collat. agreement categ",sCollateralAgreement ),
			
			//Get the Nature from the original deal
			sNature := "",
			IF ( streamIsFloating( pStreamFtpLoan ) ) THEN
				sNature := "Floating"
			ELSE
				sNature := "Fixed",
			
			IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				sIndex := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Index" ),
				pIndex := indexGetIndexByLabel( sIndex ),
				pUnderlyingIndex := indexGetUnderlyingIndex( pIndex ),
				pScheduleDefinition := indexGetSchedulesDefinition( pUnderlyingIndex ),
				pSchedule := schedulesDefinitionGetDrivingSchedule( pScheduleDefinition ),
				sScheduleGenerator := scheduleGetGeneratorLabel( pSchedule ),
				IF ( strStartsWith( sScheduleGenerator,"1 DAY" ) ) THEN
					sFrequency:="1D"
				ELSE IF ( strStartsWith(sScheduleGenerator,"3M" ) ) THEN
					sFrequency:="3M"
			},
			
			//Check if there is a Cap/Floor
			sEmbeddedOption := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"First embedded option" ),
			bCapFloor := (sEmbeddedOption == "Cap" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Floor" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Collar" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Capped rate" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Floored rate" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Collared rate" ),
			
			//Check the Stub period
			sStubPeriod := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Stub_Period" ),
			sBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Broken_rate" ),
			sUpBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Up_front_broken_rate" ),
			sArrearsBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"In_arrears_broken_rate" ),
			
			//Create the Theoritical Package
			sSplit := "",
			pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","ALL","Currency",sCurrency,"Period",sPeriod,"Term",sTerm,"Frequency",sFrequency,"Nature",sNature ),
			IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
			{
				ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","No generator was defined for " + sCurrency )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				sSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
				sFundingIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
				sIRRIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ),
				
				//Get split spot
				IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
				{
					legGetString ( pComponentFtp,"pf_split_curr"),
					fSplitSpotRate := legGetNumeric ( pComponentFtp,"pf_spot_split_rate")
				
				}
			},
			
			IF ( sSplit == "No" ) THEN
			{
				//B2B
				pCloneContract := b2bClone( pComponentFtp,legGetTitle( pComponentFtp ),sLiquidityPortfolio ),
				// We set the clone to be internal
				legSetString( pCloneContract,"Internal","Yes" ),
				// We now set the Initial portfolio
				legSetString( pCloneContract,"Counterpart",sPortfolio )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				//------------------------------------------------------- Initialization Funding Loan ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------						
				
				// Add the first component: Liquidity Component
				pContainer := npOpen(),
				pFundingLoanLeg := legAddComponent( pContainer,"mxContractISINGLE","Loans/Deposits","Loan/Deposit" ),
				pComponentFundingLoan := legGetFatherContract( pFundingLoanLeg ),
				IF ( NOT isNull( pComponentFundingLoan ) ) THEN
				{
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Nature","Generator driven" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Instrument",sFundingIndex ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Payout",sPayout ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Internal","Yes" ),
					dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Start" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Start",dStart ),
					
					dMaturity := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Maturity" ),
					dLastCalcDate:= legGetDate ( pComponentFtp,"Last_Calculation_Date" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity",dMaturity ),
					IF ( dLastCalcDate <> dMaturity ) AND ( sSinglePeriod =="Yes" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity",dLastCalcDate ),
					
					dRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Roll_date" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Roll_date",dRollDate ),
					
					pUDF0 := legGetUserFields( pContractFtp ),
					pUDF1 := legGetUserFields( pComponentFundingLoan ),
					udfCopy( pUDF1, pUDF0 ),
					
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Stub_Period",sStubPeriod ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Broken_rate",sBrokenRate ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Up_front_broken_rate",sUpBrokenRate ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"In_arrears_broken_rate",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
					
					//Streams
					pStreamsFundingLoan := legGetStreams( pComponentFundingLoan ),
					pStreamFundingLoan := streamsGetStream( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,0 ),
					
					//Copy the Streams
					streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamFtpLoan ),
					streamsCopyCapitalStructure( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamFtpLoan ),
					streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
					streamsCopyModifications( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan ),
					
					sFrequencyFundingLoan := legGetString ( pComponentFundingLoan,"Payment_Frequency" ),
					
					pAddFlowsContractFtp := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsFtpLoan ),
					pAddFlowsFundingLoan := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsFundingLoan ),
					additionalFlowsCopy( pAddFlowsFundingLoan,pAddFlowsContractFtp,1.0,"REV" ),
					
					legOverwrite(pComponentFundingLoan,"Collat. agreement categ",sCollateralAgreement ),
					
					//---------------------------------------------------- End Initialization Funding Loan --------------------------------------------------------------------------				
					
					//---------------------------------------------------- Initialization IRS or Currency Swap ----------------------------------------------------------------------					
					
					// Add the second component: IR Risk Component
					
					IF ( sSplit == "IRS" ) THEN
					{
						pContainer2 := npOpen(),
						pIRRLeg := legAddComponent( pContainer2,"mxContractISINGLE","Interest rate swaps","IRS Vanilla" ),
						pComponentIRR := legGetFatherContract( pIRRLeg )
					}
					ELSE IF ( sSplit == "CCS") THEN
					{
						pContainer3 := npOpen(),
						pIRRLeg := legAddComponent( pContainer3,"mxContractISINGLE","Currency swaps","Currency Swap" ),
						pComponentIRR := legGetFatherContract( pIRRLeg )
					},
					IF ( NOT isNull( pComponentIRR ) ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Instrument",sIRRIndex ),
						
						//Set the nominal same as the nominal of external trade
						fNominal := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Nominal" ),
						IF ( sSplit ==  "IRS") THEN
						{
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Nominal",fNominal )
						}
						ELSE IF ( sSplit == "CCS") THEN
						{
							legGetString ( pComponentFtp,"pf_split_curr" ),
							legGetNumeric ( pComponentFtp,"pf_spot_split_rate" ),
							
							sSplitCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Settl.Currency" ),
							sNominalCcy := legGetString( pComponentIRR,"Nominal_unit" ),
							
							IF ( sNominalCcy == sCurrency ) THEN 
								legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Capital_ratio",fSplitSpotRate )
							
							ELSE IF ( ( sNominalCcy == sSplitCurrency ) AND ( fSplitSpotRate <> 0.00) ) THEN 
								legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Capital_ratio",1.00 * fSplitSpotRate ),
							
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Nominal", fNominal * 1.00 * fSplitSpotRate ),
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Other nominal",fNominal )
						},
						
						IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
						{
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive1","Receive" ),
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive2","Pay" )
						}
						ELSE
						{
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive1","Pay" ),
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive2","Receive" )
						},
						
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Leg_type",sLegType ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Leg_type2","Floating" ),
						
						IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
							legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Index1",indexGetIndexLabel( streamGetIndex( pStreamFtpLoan ) ) ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Index2",indexGetIndexLabel( streamGetIndex( pStreamFundingLoan ) ) ),
						
						sRateConvention := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Rate_convention" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_convention",sRateConvention ),
						sRateConvention1 := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Rate_convention" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_convention2",sRateConvention1 ),
						
						dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp, "Start" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Start",dStart ),
						
						dMaturity := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Maturity" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Maturity",dMaturity ),
						
						dRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Roll_date" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Roll_date",dRollDate ),
						
						pUDF0 := legGetUserFields( pContractFtp ),
						pUDF1 := legGetUserFields( pComponentIRR ),
						udfCopy( pUDF1, pUDF0 ),
						
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Stub_Period", sStubPeriod ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Broken_rate", sBrokenRate ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Up_front_broken_rate",sUpBrokenRate ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"In_arrears_broken_rate",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Broken_rate2",sBrokenRate ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Up_front_broken_rate2",sUpBrokenRate ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"In_arrears_broken_rate2",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
						
						legOverwrite ( pComponentIRR,"Schedules_link","Independent sets common amortizing" ),
						
						pStreamsIRR := legGetStreams( pComponentIRR ),
						pStreamIRR0 := streamsGetStream( pStreamsIRR,0,0 ),
						pStreamIRR1 := streamsGetStream( pStreamsIRR,0,1 ),
						
						streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
						streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan ),
						
						streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
						streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan ),
						streamsCopyModifications( pStreamsIRR, pStreamsFtpLoan ),
						streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsIRR,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
						streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsIRR,1,pStreamsIRR,0 )
					},
					
					IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
						streamCopyFixingCalendar( pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamIRR1 ),
					
					IF ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes") THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Maturity",legGetDate( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity" ) ),
					
					IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
						legSetNumeric( pComponentFundingLoan,"Amort_amount",fSplitSpotRate * fAmortAmount )
				},
				
				//-------------------------------------------------------------- Set up OIS/3M leg ----------------------------------------------
				bCompounding3m := ( ( sFrequencyFundingLoan == "3m" )
								AND ( ( sPaymentFrequency > sFrequencyFundingLoan ) OR ( strIndexOf( sPaymentFrequency,"y" ) > 0 ) OR ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) ) ),
				//Calculation schedule
				IF ( bCompounding3m ) THEN
				{
					//Copy from funding loan
					sCalcSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Calc_schedule" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Calc_schedule_2",sCalcSchedule ),
					sCalcDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Calc_driving_schedule" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Calc_driving_schedule2",sCalcDrivingSchedule ),
					
					//Payment schedule
					//Copy from calculation schedule of the external loan
					sPayDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Pay_driving_schedule" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_schedule_2","Driving schedule" ),
					
					IF ( sPayDrivingSchedule <> "" ) THEN
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_driving_schedule2",sPayDrivingSchedule )
					ELSE
					{
						sCalcDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Calc_driving_schedule" ),
						legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_driving_schedule2",sCalcDrivingSchedule )
					}
				},
				
				sFixingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_schedule" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_schedule_2",sFixingSchedule ),
				sFixScheduleChoice := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_schedule_choices" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_schedule_choices_2",sFixScheduleChoice ),
				sDeducedFixingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_deduction_formula" ),
				
				IF ( sDeducedFixingSchedule <> "" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_deduction_formula2",sDeducedFixingSchedule ),
				
				IF ( bCompounding3m ) THEN
				{
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Compounding_Mode2","(I at I) + M" ),
					legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Compounding_Mode","(I at I) + M" )
				},
				
				//----------------------------------- End set up OIS/3M leg ----------------------------------------------
				
				//-------------------------------------- Amortization ---------------------------------------------------
				
				streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
				streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan,dStart,TRUE ),
				
				sAmortizing := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amortizing" ),
				sAmortNature := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort__nature" ),
				fAmortAmount := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Amort_amount" ),
				sAmortFraction := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_fraction" ),
				sAmortGenerator := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_generator" ),
				sAmortFrequency := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_frequency" ),
				sAmortMargins := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_incl_margins" ),
				sAmortLeg := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_leg" ),
				sAmortPayCoupon := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_pay_coupons" ),
				sAmortPaymentShifter := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_payment_shifter" ),
				fAmortRate := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Amort_rate" ),
				dAmortRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Amort_roll_date" ),
				
				IF ( sAmortizing <> "Real coupon reinvestment" ) THEN
				{
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amortizing",sAmortizing ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort__nature",sAmortNature ),
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_amount",fAmortAmount ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_fraction",sAmortFraction ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_generator",sAmortGenerator ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_frequency",sAmortFrequency ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_incl_margins",sAmortMargins ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_leg",sAmortLeg ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_pay_coupons",sAmortPayCoupon ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_payment_shifter",sAmortPaymentShifter ),
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_rate",fAmortRate ),
					legSetDate( pComponentIRR,"Amort_roll_date",dAmortRollDate ),
					
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amortizing2",sAmortizing ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_nature2",sAmortNature ),
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_amount2",fAmortAmount ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_fraction2",sAmortFraction ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_generator2",sAmortGenerator ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_frequency2",sAmortFrequency ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_incl_margins2",sAmortMargins ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_leg2",sAmortLeg ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_pay_coupons2",sAmortPayCoupon ),
					legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_payment_shifter2",sAmortPaymentShifter ),
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_rate2",fAmortRate ),
					legSetDate( pComponentIRR,"Amort_roll_date2",dAmortRollDate )
				},
				//-------------------------------------------------- End of amortization -----------------------------------------------------
				
				//-------------------------------------------------- Clone Leg2 to Funding Loan ---------------------------------
				
				streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsIRR,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamIRR1 ),
				streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
				
				//--------------------------------------------------- End Clone Leg2 to Funding Loan ----------------------------
				
																																														
	

				
				//-------------------------------------- Price Margin Computation ------------------------------------------------------------					
				
				// Loan Price Computation
				legSetLocalImplied( pComponentFundingLoan,"Rate_Margin" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Npv",0.0 ),
				legCompute( pComponentFundingLoan,"noWorkflow" ),
				fFTPSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFundingLoan,"Rate_Margin" ),
				
				// Set the FTP Spread in main contract leg
				legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD",fFTPSpread ),
				
				// Swaps Price Computation
				fFTPSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin2",fFTPSpread ),
				legCompute( pComponentIRR,"noWorkflow" ),
				legSetLocalImplied( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Npv",0.0 ),
				legCompute( pComponentIRR, "noWorkflow" ),
				fIRRSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin" ) - legGetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin2" ),
				
				// Set the IRR Spread in Main Contract Leg
				legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"IRR_SPRD",fIRRSpread ),
                
                IF ( NOT isNull( pContainer3 ) ) THEN
					npClose( pContainer3 ),
				
				IF ( NOT isNull( pContainer2 ) ) THEN
					npClose( pContainer2 ),
				
				npClose( pContainer ),
                
                //Is Option spread customized by the end user?
                bOptSpreadCustom := legIsAttributeCustomized( pComponentFtp, "OPT_SPRD" ),
				
                // Option Price Computation
				IF ( bCapFloor AND ( NOT bOptSpreadCustom ) ) THEN
				{
                    pContainer4 := npOpen(),
                    pCloneContract := legClone( pContainer4,pComponentFtp ),
                    legClearValue ( pCloneContract,"Portfolio"),
                    
                    //Remove sales margin
                    fSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pCloneContract,"Sales_margin" ),
                    legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Sales_margin",0.0 ),
                    
                    //Remove sales margin from strike
                    fStrike:= legGetNumeric( pCloneContract,"Strike" ),
                    IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
                    	legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Strike",fStrike - fSalesMargin )
                    ELSE
                    	legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Strike",fStrike + fSalesMargin ),
                    
                    //Compute Rate/Margin
                    legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Npv",0.0 ),
                    legCompute( pCloneContract,"noWorkflow" ),
                    fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pCloneContract,"Rate_Margin" ),
                    
					//legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"First embedded option","No" ),
                   	//legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Sales_margin",0.0 ),
                    //legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Npv",0.0 ),
                    //legCompute( pCloneContract,"noWorkflow" ),
                    //fNewRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pCloneContract,"Rate_Margin" ),
                    
                    //legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD",  - fNewRateMargin + fRateMargin ),
                    legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD",  fRateMargin - ( fFTPSpread + fIRRSpread ) ),
                    
                    npClose( pContainer4 )
                    
				}
                ELSE
                	legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD",  0.0 ),
                
                fFtpMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD" ),
                fIrrMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"IRR_SPRD" ),
                fOptMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD" ),
                
                //Rate/Margin
                fTotalRMargin := fFtpMargin + fIrrMargin + fOptMargin,
                legOverwrite( pComponentFtp,"Rate_Margin",fTotalRMargin ),
                
                //Initialisation FTP_TRMRG
                fNewSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Sales_margin" ),
                IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
                	legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"pf_All_in_rate",fTotalRMargin + fNewSalesMargin)
                ELSE
                	legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"pf_All_in_rate",fTotalRMargin - fNewSalesMargin),
                
                //Triangulation
                sLastField := legGetLastInputField( pComponentFtp ),
                IF ( sLastField == "Sales_margin") THEN
                {
                    fNewSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Sales_margin" ),
                    IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
                    	fFtpTotalRMargin := fTotalRMargin + fNewSalesMargin
                    ELSE
                    	fFtpTotalRMargin := fTotalRMargin - fNewSalesMargin,
                    
                    legClearValue( pComponentFtp, "pf_All_in_rate"),
                    legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"pf_All_in_rate",fFtpTotalRMargin )
                }
                ELSE
                {
					fFtpTotalRMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp, "pf_All_in_rate" ),
                    IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
						fNewSalesMargin := fFtpTotalRMargin - fTotalRMargin
                    ELSE
                    	fNewSalesMargin := fTotalRMargin - fFtpTotalRMargin,
					legClearValue( pComponentFtp, "Sales_margin"),
					legSetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Sales_margin",fNewSalesMargin )
                }

			}
		}
	}
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingISDADayCountPerLeg

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sISDA := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	sLeg := getArgAsString( 2 ),
	sConvention := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	
	pCount := pNULL,
	iCount := 0,
	sCountNumb := "",
	pISDAChk := pNULL,
	iFixDayCount := 0,
	iNbFixDayCount := 0,
	sViewFixDayCount := "",
	sClearingEligibilityFixBasis := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonFixBasis := "",
	iFloatDayCount := 0,
	iNbFloatDayCount := 0,
	sViewFloatDayCount := "",
	sClearingEligibilityFlDC := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonFlDC := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonConvention := "",
	
	// ISDA Fix Day Count LUT Columns
	pCount := lookupResults ( "MX.IRD.ClearingFixBasis",scontext, "ISDA Day Convention", sISDA ),
	iCount := 1,
	sCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pCount,0,iCount ),
	WHILE ( sCountNumb <> "" ) DO
	{
		sCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pCount,0,iCount ),
		iCount := iCount + 1
	},
	iCount := iCount - 1,
	
	pISDAChk := lookupResults ( "MX.IRD.ClearingFixBasis",scontext, "ISDA Day Convention", sISDA ),
	IF ( sLeg == "Fixed" ) THEN
	{	
		IF ( NOT isNull ( pISDAChk ) ) THEN
		{
			iFixDayCount := 0,
			iNbFixDayCount := iCount,
			WHILE ( iFixDayCount < iNbFixDayCount ) DO
			{
				sViewFixDayCount := lookupResultsGetString( pISDAChk,0,iFixDayCount ),
				IF ( strContain( sConvention, sViewFixDayCount ) == TRUE ) THEN
				{
					sClearingEligibilityFixBasis := "Fix Basis",
					iFixDayCount := iNbFixDayCount
				}
				ELSE
					iFixDayCount := iFixDayCount + 1
			}
		},
		IF ( strContain(sClearingEligibilityFixBasis,"Fix Basis") == FALSE ) THEN
			sNotEligibleReasonFixBasis := "#Fix Basis "
	}
	ELSE IF ( ( sLeg <> "Fixed" ) AND ( sContext == "CME" ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( NOT isNull ( pISDAChk ) ) THEN
		{
			iFloatDayCount := 0,
			iNbFloatDayCount := iCount,
			WHILE ( iFloatDayCount < iNbFloatDayCount ) DO
			{
				sViewFloatDayCount := lookupResultsGetString( pISDAChk,0,iFloatDayCount ),
				IF ( strContain( sConvention, sViewFloatDayCount ) == TRUE ) THEN
				{
					sClearingEligibilityFlDC := "Floating Day Count",
					iFloatDayCount := iNbFloatDayCount
				}
				ELSE
					iFloatDayCount := iFloatDayCount + 1
			}
		}
	},
	
	IF ( strContain(sClearingEligibilityFixBasis,"Fix Basis") == FALSE ) THEN
		sNotEligibleReasonFixBasis := "#Fix Basis ",
	IF ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityFlDC,"Floating Day Count" ) == FALSE ) THEN
		sNotEligibleReasonFlDC := "#Floating Day Count ",
	
	sNotEligibleReasonConvention := sNotEligibleReasonFixBasis + sNotEligibleReasonFlDC,
	setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReasonConvention )
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingPayFreqPerLeg

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sLeg := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	sTypology := getArgAsString( 2 ),
	sCurrency := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	sBasisSwap := getArgAsString( 4 ),
	sZeroCoupon := getArgAsString( 5 ),
	sPayFreq := getArgAsString( 6 ),
	sCalcFreq := getArgAsString( 7 ),
	
	pPaymentFreq := pNULL,
	iPayCount := 0,
	sPayCountNumb := "",
	iPay := 0,
	iPaymentFreq := iPayCount,
	sPay := "",
	fPayFreq := 0.0,
	sClearingEligibilityFloatPayFreq := "",
	sClearingEligibilityFixPayFreq := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonFloatPayFreq := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonFixPayFreq := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonPayFreq := "",
	
	pPaymentFreq := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingPaymentFreq",sContext,
								"Typology", sTypology,
								"Clearing Eligible CCYs",sCurrency,
								"Check BasisSwap",sBasisSwap ),
	IF ( NOT isNull( pPaymentFreq ) ) THEN
	{
		iPayCount := 0,
		sPayCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pPaymentFreq,0,iPayCount ),
		WHILE ( sPayCountNumb <> "" ) DO
		{
			iPayCount := iPayCount + 1,
			sPayCountNumb := lookupResultsGetString( pPaymentFreq,0,iPayCount )
		},
		
		iPay := 0,
		iPaymentFreq := iPayCount,
		WHILE ( iPay < iPaymentFreq ) DO
		{
			sPay := lookupResultsGetString( pPaymentFreq,0,iPay ),
			IF ( sLeg == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( sZeroCoupon == "ZC" ) THEN
					fPayFreq := convertSToNumeric( sPayFreq ) * ( -1.0 )
				ELSE
					fPayFreq := convertSToNumeric( sPayFreq ),
				IF ( ( strContain( sPayFreq, sPay ) ) AND ( fPayFreq >= convertSToNumeric( sCalcFreq ) ) ) THEN
				{
					sClearingEligibilityFloatPayFreq := "Float Pay Frequency",
					iPay := iPaymentFreq
				}
				ELSE
					iPay := iPay + 1
			}
			ELSE IF ( sLeg == "Fixed" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sPayFreq == sPay ) OR ( ( sZeroCoupon == "ZC" ) AND ( strContain( sPayFreq,sPay ) ) ) ) THEN
				{
					sClearingEligibilityFixPayFreq := "Fix Pay Frequency",
					iPay := iPaymentFreq + 1
				}
				ELSE
					iPay := iPay + 1
			}
		},
		IF ( sLeg == "Floating" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityFloatPayFreq,"Float Pay Frequency" ) == FALSE ) THEN
				sNotEligibleReasonFloatPayFreq := "#Float Pay Frequency "
		}
		ELSE IF ( sLeg == "Fixed" ) THEN
		{
			IF ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityFixPayFreq,"Fix Pay Frequency" ) == FALSE ) THEN
			sNotEligibleReasonFixPayFreq := "#Fix Pay Frequency "
		}
	},
	sNotEligibleReasonPayFreq := sNotEligibleReasonFloatPayFreq + sNotEligibleReasonFixPayFreq,
	setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReasonPayFreq )
};

// mx.preTrade.completion._Functions.IRD.IRSClearingVNSIndexCCYPerLeg

/*
Version 1.0
*/

{
	sContext := getArgAsString( 0 ),
	sIndexOrInstrument := getArgAsString( 1 ),
	sCustomizedFlows := getArgAsString( 2 ),
	sZeroCoupon1 := getArgAsString( 3 ),
	sZeroCoupon2 := getArgAsString( 4 ),
	
	pLeg := This,
	pComponent := legGetComponentAt( pLeg,0 ),
	sCurrency := legGetString( pComponent,"Nominal unit" ),
	iCount := 0,
	sLine := "",
	pCount := pNULL,
	iCriteria := 1,
	iNbCriteria := iCount - 1,
	sLine := "",
	pClearIndex := pNULL,
	sViewCCY := "",
	sViewIndex := "",
	sFormattedCCY := "",
	sFormattedIndex := "",
	sClearingEligibilityCCY := "",
	sClearingEligibilityIndex := "",
	sVNS := "",
	sClearingEligibilityVNS := "",
	sZC := "",
	sEligibilityCheckCME := "",
	sEligibilityCheckSC := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonVNS := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonIndexCCY := "",
	sNotEligibleReasonVNSIndexCCY := "",
	
	iCount := 1,
	sLine := toString( iCount ),
	pCount := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingIndex",sContext,"CL_CRITERIA",sLine ),
	WHILE ( NOT isNull( pCount ) ) DO
	{
		sLine := toString( iCount ),
		pCount := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingIndex",sContext,"CL_CRITERIA",sLine ),
		iCount := iCount + 1
	},
	
	iCriteria := 1,
	iNbCriteria := iCount - 1,
	WHILE ( iCriteria < iNbCriteria ) DO
	{
		sLine := toString( iCriteria ),
		pClearIndex := lookupResults( "MX.IRD.ClearingIndex",sContext,"CL_CRITERIA",sLine ),
		sViewCCY := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0,0 ),
		sViewIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0,1 ),
		sFormattedCCY := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0,3 ),
		sFormattedIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0,4 ),
		
		IF ( ( sViewCCY <> "" )
		AND ( sViewIndex <> "" )
		AND ( strContain( sIndexOrInstrument,sViewCCY ) == TRUE )
		AND ( strContain( sIndexOrInstrument,sViewIndex ) == TRUE )
		AND ( strContain( sCurrency,sFormattedCCY ) == TRUE ) ) THEN
		{
			sClearingEligibilityCCY := "CCY",
			sClearingEligibilityIndex := "Index",
			IF ( ( sTypology == "IRS" ) OR ( sTypology == "OIS" ) )THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sCustomizedFlows == "Yes" ) OR ( legGetString( pComponent,"Amortizing" ) <> "None" ) ) THEN
				{
					sVNS := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0,2 ),
					IF ( sVNS == "VNS" ) THEN
						sClearingEligibilityVNS := "VNS"
				}
			},
			
			IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
			{
				IF ( ( sZeroCoupon1 == "ZC" ) OR ( sZeroCoupon2 == "ZC" ) ) THEN
				{
					sZC := lookupResultsGetString( pClearIndex,0, 2 ),
					IF ( ( strContain( sZC, "ZC") <> TRUE ) 
					OR ( ( strContain( sZC, "ZC") == TRUE ) AND ( strContain( sZC, "VNS") == TRUE ) ) ) THEN
					{
						legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","Not Clearing Eligible Product" ),
						sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible"
					}
				}
			},
			iCriteria := iNbCriteria + 1
		}
		ELSE
			iCriteria := iCriteria + 1
	},
	
	IF ( ( sVNS == "VNS" ) AND ( sTypology == "OIS" ) ) THEN
	{
		IF ( sContext == "SwapClear" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckSC := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonSC", "OIS VNS not eligible for SwapClear" )
		}
		ELSE IF ( sContext == "CME" ) THEN
		{
			sEligibilityCheckCME := "Not Eligible",
			legOverwrite( pComponent,"pf_NotEligibleReasonCME","OIS VNS is not eligible for CME" )
		}
	},
	
	IF ( ( sClearingEligibilityVNS <> "" ) AND ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityVNS,"VNS" ) == FALSE ) ) THEN
    	sNotEligibleReasonVNS := "#VNS ",
	
	IF ( ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityCCY,"CCY" ) == FALSE )
	AND ( strContain( sClearingEligibilityIndex,"Index" ) == FALSE ) ) THEN
		sNotEligibleReasonIndexCCY := "#Index #CCY ",
	
	sNotEligibleReasonVNSIndexCCY := sNotEligibleReasonVNS + sNotEligibleReasonIndexCCY,
	setReturnValue( sNotEligibleReasonVNSIndexCCY )
};

// mx.preTrade.mirroring.ALL.Booking.FTP

/*
MXpress
Mirroring rule for Fund Transfer Pricing

Version 1.4
- Update the FTP decomposition for floored/capped rate

Version 1.3
- Remove the dependency with the PAlloc table

Version 1.2
- Add the internal trader propagation

Version 1.1
- CCS case: "Capital_ratio" and "Nominal" --> 1.00 * fSplitSpotRate 
- Cap/Floor: negative sign on CapFloorSpread on Component withour Cap/Floor


Version 1.0
The aim is to book a FTP package and to split the Risk Allocation.
A FTP package is decomposed into: 
- A funding Loan/Deposit booked between the Liquidity portfolio and the FTP portal
- An Interest Swap or a Currency Swap booked between the Interest Rate Risk portfolio and the FTP portal
- In case of a floating loan/deposit with an embedded cap/floor, two additional opposite Loan/Deposits between the Option portfolio and the FTP portal
and the Risk Allocation is composed by:
- FTP margin
- IRR margin
- Option margin
The FTP Portal is an UDF in the Portfolio mask and if it is set to YES it represents the key to differentiate a simple loan/depo from a FTP Loan.

The algorithm is:

Retrieve the deal: We assume that, via rule assignment, the deal passed to this formula is a single Loan/Deposit
- Get the Rate from the original deal
- Get the Currency from the original deal
- Get the Streams from the original deal
- Get the Period from the original deal
- Get the Payout from the original deal
- Get the Leg type from the original deal
- Get the Term from the original deal
- Get the Payment schedule from the original deal
- Get the Frequency from the original deal
- Get the Collateral Agreement from the original deal
- Get the Single period from the original deal
- Get the Nature from the original deal
- Check if there is a Cap/Floor in the original deal
- Check the Stub period  in the original deal

Check the field Split and create the Mirroring when the field Split is set on "Yes" 
- in case of Fixed rate: Original Loan + Funding Loan + IRS 
- in case of Fixed rate (CCS) case: Original Loan + Funding Loan + CCS
- in case of Floating rate: Original Loan + Funding Loan + IRS + Loan (with embedded option) + Loan (without embedded option)

if Split on "No" only Funding Package

Start the Pricing phase
- Adding the first component:  Liquidity Component
- Adding the second component: IR Risk Component (IRR/CCS)
- Compounding 
- Amortization checks
- Adding the third component in case of an embedded option: Cap/Floor Component 

Margin computation
- FTP Spread computation
- IRR Spread computation
- OPT Spread computation

Notes:
This rule uses a set of lookup tables (LUT):
- MX.ALL.FTP.PAlloc contains the Portfolio Allocation
- MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation contains the Funding Index and the IR Generator to be used in the Package considering Currency, Period, Term, Nature and Frequency
*/

{
	// Retrieve the deal
	pLeg := This,
	pComponentFtp := legGetMainComponent( pLeg ),
	pContractFtp := legGetFatherContract( pComponentFtp ),
	sContractRegistration := legGetRegistration( pContractFtp ),
	pPackage := legGetFatherPackage( pComponentFtp ),
	
	IF ( sContractRegistration == "Loans/Deposits" ) THEN
	{
        //MM Rollover event 
        sSourceClass := properties.Get( "mx.preTrade.BO.source.class" ),
        fFTPSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD" ),
        IF (sSourceClass == "mxContractEventRatesIROLL_OVER") AND (fFTPSpread <> 0.0) THEN
        {
            pContainer := npOpen(),
            pNew := legClone(pContainer, pComponentFtp),
            legCompute(pNew),
            fFTPsprd := legGetNumeric( pNew,"FTP_SPRD" ),
            fIRRsprd := legGetNumeric( pNew,"IRR_SPRD" ),
            fOPTsprd := legGetNumeric( pNew,"OPT_SPRD" ),
            npClose(pContainer)/*,
			
            legOverwrite( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD",fFTPsprd ),
            legOverwrite( pComponentFtp,"IRR_SPRD",fIRRsprd ),
            legOverwrite( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD",fOPTsprd )*/
            // this part was commented as tests showed that pricing sequence is triggered when doing a MM rollover
		},
    
		sPortfolio := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Portfolio" ),
		
        sLiquidityPortfolio := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"XTP_LIQ" ),
		sIRRPortfolio := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"XTP_IRR" ),
		sCapFloorPortfolio := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"XTP_OPT" ),
        
		//Get the flow streams from the original deal and the FTP spread and the IRR spread
		fIRRSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"IRR_SPRD" ),
		fFTPSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"FTP_SPRD" ),
		fCapFloorSpread := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"OPT_SPRD" ),
		fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Rate_Margin" ),
		fSplitSpotRate := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"pf_spot_split_rate" ),
		
		//Get the Currency from the original deal
		sCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Settl.Currency" ),
		
		//Get the Streams from the original deal
		pStreamsFtpLoan := legGetStreams( pContractFtp ),
		pStreamFtpLoan := streamsGetStream( pStreamsFtpLoan,0,0 ),
		
		//Get the Period from the original deal
		sPeriod := "",
		iNbPeriods := streamGetNumberOfPeriods( pStreamFtpLoan ),
		IF ( ( iNbPeriods == 0 ) OR ( iNbPeriods == 1 ) ) THEN
			sPeriod := "Single"
		ELSE
			sPeriod := "Multi",
		
		//Get the Payout from the original deal
		sPayout := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Payout" ),
		
		//Get the Leg type from the original deal
		sLegType := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Leg_type" ),
		
		//Get the Term from the original deal
		sTerm := "",
		sCalendar := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Payment_calendar" ),
		dStartDate := legGetDate( pComponentFtp,"Start" ),
		dEndDate := legGetDate( pComponentFtp, "Maturity" ),
		dShiftedDate := shiftschedule( dStartDate,2,1,"+1 YEAR NEXT",sCalendar ),
		IF ( dEndDate > dShiftedDate ) THEN
			sTerm := "Long term"
		ELSE
			sTerm := "Short term",
		
		//Get the Frequency from the original deal
		sPaymentFrequency := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Payment_Frequency" ),
		sFrequency := strToUpperCase( sPaymentFrequency ),
		
		//Get the Collateral Agreement from the original deal
		sCollateralAgreement := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Collat. agreement categ" ),
		
		//Get the Single period from the original deal
		sSinglePeriod := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Single_period" ),
		
		//Get the Nature from the original deal
		sNature := "",
		IF ( streamIsFloating( pStreamFtpLoan ) ) THEN
			sNature := "Floating"
		ELSE
			sNature := "Fixed",
		
		IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
		{
			sIndex := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Index" ),
			pIndex := indexGetIndexByLabel( sIndex ),
			pUnderlyingIndex := indexGetUnderlyingIndex( pIndex ),
			pScheduleDefinition := indexGetSchedulesDefinition( pUnderlyingIndex ),
			pSchedule := schedulesDefinitionGetDrivingSchedule( pScheduleDefinition ),
			sScheduleGenerator := scheduleGetGeneratorLabel( pSchedule ),
			IF ( strStartsWith( sScheduleGenerator, "1 DAY" ) ) THEN
				sFrequency := "1D"
			ELSE IF ( strStartsWith( sScheduleGenerator,"3M" ) ) THEN
				sFrequency := "3M"
		},
		
		//Check if there is a Cap/Floor
		sEmbeddedOption := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"First embedded option" ),
		bCapFloor := ( sEmbeddedOption == "Cap" ) 
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Floor" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Collar" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Capped rate" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Floored rate" )
					OR ( sEmbeddedOption == "Collared rate" ),
		
		//Check the Stub period
		sStubPeriod := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Stub_Period" ),
		sBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Broken_rate" ),
		sUpBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Up_front_broken_rate" ),
		sArrearsBrokenRate := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"In_arrears_broken_rate" ),
		
		//Create the Mirroring 
		pResults := lookupResults( "MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","ALL","Currency",sCurrency,"Period",sPeriod,"Term",sTerm,"Frequency",sFrequency,"Nature",sNature ),
		IF ( isNull( pResults ) ) THEN
			ThrowError( "Error in MX.ALL.FTP.RiskAllocation","No generator was defined for " + sCurrency ),
		sSplit := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,0 ),
		sFundingIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,1 ),
		sIRRIndex := lookupResultsGetString( pResults,0,2 ),
		
        // If a B2B user is provided,use it the as Source Trader
		// If not,use the Source Trader of the initial deal instead
		// In any case,use the Source Trader of the initial deal as Destination Trader
		sDestinationTrader := legGetString( legGetMainComponent( pContractFtp ),"Source trader" ),
		sSourceTrader := legGetFOPInternalTrader( pContractFtp ),
		IF ( sSourceTrader == "" ) THEN
		{
			sSourceTrader := sDestinationTrader,
			legSetFOPInternalTrader( pContractFtp,sSourceTrader )
		},       
        
		IF ( sSplit == "No" ) THEN
		{
			//B2B
			pCloneContract := b2bClone( pComponentFtp,legGetTitle( pComponentFtp ),sLiquidityPortfolio ),
			// We set the clone to be internal
			legSetString( pCloneContract,"Internal","Yes" ),
			// We now set the "Counterpart" (initial portfolio)
			legSetString( pCloneContract,"Counterpart","sPortfolio" ),
			
			//If Cap/Floor: create the package with the Option Risk and without the IRR Risk
			IF ( bCapFloor ) THEN
			{
				//Remove floor
				legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"First embedded option","No" )
			},
			fRateMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Rate_Margin" ),
			legOverwrite( pCloneContract,"Rate_Margin",fRateMargin - fCapFloorSpread )
		}
		ELSE
		{
			//--------------------------------------------------------- Initialization Funding Loan -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			// Add the first component: Liquidity Component
			pComponentFundingLoan:= legAddComponent( pPackage,"mxContractISINGLE","Loans/Deposits","Loan/Deposit" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Nature","Generator driven" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Instrument",sFundingIndex ),
			
			//Set the Trader
			sTrader := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Trader" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Trader",sTrader ),
            
            //Set the Trade as internal
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Internal","Yes" ),
            
            //Internal trader
            legSetFOPInternalTrader( pComponentFundingLoan, sSourceTrader ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Source trader", sSourceTrader ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Destination trader", sSourceTrader ),
			
			// Set the Payout same as the Payout of the external trade
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Payout",sPayout ),
			
			//Set the Counterpart same as the portfolio of external trade
			sPortfolio := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Portfolio" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Counterpart",sPortfolio ),
			
			//Set the Destination Liquidity portfolio
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Portfolio",sLiquidityPortfolio ),
			
			//Set the start date same as the start date of external trade
			dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Start" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Start",dStart ),
			
			//Set the Maturity same as the Maturity of external trade
			dMaturity := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Maturity" ),
			dLastCalcDate := legGetDate( pComponentFtp,"Last_Calculation_Date" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity",dMaturity ),
			IF ( ( dLastCalcDate <> dMaturity ) AND ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity",dLastCalcDate ),
			
			//Set the Roll date same as the Roll date of external trade
			dRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Roll_date" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Roll_date",dRollDate ),
			
			//Copy UDFs
			pUDF0 := legGetUserFields( pContractFtp ),
			pUDF1 := legGetUserFields( pComponentFundingLoan ),
			udfCopy( pUDF1,pUDF0 ),
			
			//Set the Margins
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Rate_Margin",fFTPSpread ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"IRR_SPRD",0.0 ),
			
			//Set the Stub periods
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Stub_Period",sStubPeriod ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Broken_rate",sBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Up_front_broken_rate",sUpBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"In_arrears_broken_rate",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
			
			//Get the Streams
			pStreamsFundingLoan := legGetStreams( pComponentFundingLoan ),
			pStreamFundingLoan := streamsGetStream( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,0 ),
			
			//Copy the Streams
			streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyCapitalStructure( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
			streamsCopyModifications( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsFtpLoan ),
			
			//Get the Frequency
			sFrequencyFundingLoan := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Payment_Frequency" ),
			
			//Set the Collateral Agreement same as the Payout of the external trade
			legOverwrite(pComponentFundingLoan,"Collat. agreement categ", sCollateralAgreement),
			
			//Copy the Additional flows
			pAddFlowsContractFtp := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsFtpLoan ),
			pAddFlowsFundingLoan := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsFundingLoan ),
			additionalFlowsCopy( pAddFlowsFundingLoan,pAddFlowsContractFtp,1.0,"REV" ),
			
			//----------------------------------------------------------------- End Initialization Funding Loan -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------   
			
			//----------------------------------------------------------------- Initialization IRS or Currency Swap ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			// Add the second component: IR Risk Component
			
			IF ( sSplit == "IRS" ) THEN
				pComponentIRR:= legAddComponent( pPackage,"mxContractISINGLE","Interest rate swaps","IRS Vanilla" )
			ELSE IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
				pComponentIRR := legAddComponent( pPackage,"mxContractISINGLE","Currency swaps","Currency Swap" ),
			
			//Set the Generator
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Instrument",sIRRIndex ),
			         
			//Set the Nominal same as the Nominal of external trade 
			fNominal := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Nominal" ),
			IF ( sSplit == "IRS" ) THEN
				legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Nominal",fNominal )
			ELSE IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
			{
				sSplitCurrency := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Settl.Currency" ),
				sNominalCcy := legGetString( pComponentIRR,"Nominal_unit" ),
				
				IF ( sNominalCcy == sCurrency ) THEN
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Capital_ratio", fSplitSpotRate )
				ELSE IF ( ( sNominalCcy == sSplitCurrency ) AND ( fSplitSpotRate <> 0.00 ) ) THEN
					legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Capital_ratio",1.00 * fSplitSpotRate ),
				
				// Set nominals on CCS Component
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Nominal",fNominal * 1.00 * fSplitSpotRate ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Other nominal",fNominal )
			},
            
			//Set the Trader
			sTrader := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Trader" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Trader",sTrader ),
            
            //Set the Trade as internal
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Internal","Yes" ),
            
            //Internal trader
            legSetFOPInternalTrader( pComponentIRR, sSourceTrader ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Source trader", sSourceTrader ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Destination trader", sSourceTrader ),
			
			//Set the Counterpart same as the portfolio of external trade
			sPortfolio := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Portfolio" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Counterpart",sPortfolio ),
			
			//Set the Destination IRR portfolio
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Portfolio", sIRRPortfolio ),
			
			//Change the Direction
			IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive1","Receive" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive2","Pay" )
			}
			ELSE
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive1","Pay" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_Receive2","Receive" )
			},
			
			//Update the Leg Type
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Leg_type",sLegType ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Leg_type2","Floating" ),
			
			//Override the Index of the external leg
			IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Index1",indexGetIndexLabel( streamGetIndex( pStreamFtpLoan ) ) ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Index2",indexGetIndexLabel( streamGetIndex( pStreamFundingLoan ) ) ),
			
			//Set the Rate Convention same as of external trade
			sRateConvention := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Rate_convention" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_convention",sRateConvention ),
			
			sRateConvention1 := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Rate_convention" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_convention2",sRateConvention1 ),
			
			//Set the Start Date same as of external trade
			dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Start" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Start",dStart ),
			
			//Set the Maturity same as the Maturity of external trade
			dMaturity := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Maturity" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Maturity",dMaturity ),
			
			//Set the Roll date same as the Roll date of external trade
			dRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Roll_date" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Roll_date",dRollDate ),
			
			//Copy UDFs 
			pUDF0 := legGetUserFields( pContractFtp ),
			pUDF1 := legGetUserFields( pComponentIRR ),
			udfCopy( pUDF1,pUDF0 ),
			
			//Set the Margins
			//IRR Margin Leg1
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin",fIRRSpread + fFTPSpread ),
			
			//IRR Margin Leg2
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Rate_Margin2",fFTPSpread ),
			
			//Reset UDF
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"FTP_SPRD",0.0 ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"IRR_SPRD",0.0 ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"OPT_SPRD",0.0 ),
			
			//Set the Stub periods
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Stub_Period",sStubPeriod ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Broken_rate",sBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Up_front_broken_rate",sUpBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"In_arrears_broken_rate",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Broken_rate2",sBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Up_front_broken_rate2",sUpBrokenRate ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"In_arrears_broken_rate2",sArrearsBrokenRate ),
			
			//Schedule link
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Schedules_link","Independent sets across legs" ),
			
			//Get the Streams
			pStreamsIRR := legGetStreams( pComponentIRR ),
			pStreamIRR0 := streamsGetStream( pStreamsIRR,0,0 ),
			pStreamIRR1 := streamsGetStream( pStreamsIRR,0,1 ),
			
			//Copy the Streams schedule
			streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			
			//Copy the Streams (Capital Structure)
			streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyModifications( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsIRR,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
			streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsIRR,1,pStreamsIRR,0 ),
			
			//Set correct fixing calendar for CCS 
			IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
				streamCopyFixingCalendar( pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamIRR1 ),
			
			//Adjust Maturity for single period
			IF ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Maturity",legGetDate( pComponentFundingLoan,"Maturity" ) ),
			//-------------------------------------------------------------- Set up OIS/3M leg ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			bCompounding3m := ( ( sFrequencyFundingLoan == "3m" )
							AND ( ( sPaymentFrequency > sFrequencyFundingLoan ) OR ( strIndexOf(sPaymentFrequency,"y") > 0 ) OR ( sSinglePeriod == "Yes" ) ) ),
			
			//Calculation schedule
			IF ( bCompounding3m ) THEN
			{
				//Copy from Funding Loan
				sCalcSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Calc_schedule" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Calc_schedule_2",sCalcSchedule ),
				sCalcDrivingSchedule := legGetString ( pComponentFundingLoan,"Calc_driving_schedule" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Calc_driving_schedule2",sCalcDrivingSchedule )
			},
			
			//Payment schedule
			IF ( bCompounding3m ) THEN
			{
				//Copy from calculation schedule of the external loan
				sPayDrivingSchedule := legGetString ( pComponentFtp,"Pay_driving_schedule" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_schedule_2","Driving schedule" ),
				IF ( sPayDrivingSchedule <> "" ) THEN
					legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Pay_driving_schedule2",sPayDrivingSchedule )
				ELSE
				{
					sCalcDrivingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFtp,"Calc_driving_schedule" ),
					legOverwrite ( pComponentIRR,"Pay_driving_schedule2",sCalcDrivingSchedule )
				}
			},
			
			//Fixing schedule
			sFixingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_schedule" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_schedule_2",sFixingSchedule ),
			sFixScheduleChoice := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_schedule_choices" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_schedule_choices_2",sFixScheduleChoice ),
			sDeducedFixingSchedule := legGetString( pComponentFundingLoan,"Fix_deduction_formula" ),
			
			IF ( sDeducedFixingSchedule <> "" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Fix_deduction_formula2",sDeducedFixingSchedule ),
			
			//Compounding
			IF ( bCompounding3m ) THEN
			{
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Compounding_Mode2","(I at I) + M" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Compounding_Mode","(I at I) + M" )
			},
			
			IF ( sNature == "Floating" ) THEN
			{
				fFirstFixing := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"First_Fixing" ),
				legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"First_Fixing",fFirstFixing )
			},
			//----------------------------------------------------------------------- End set up OIS/3M leg --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			//------------------------------------------------------------------------ Amortization -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			//Copy custom amortization
			streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR0,pStreamFtpLoan ),
			streamsCopyCapitalStructureOnly( pStreamsIRR,pStreamsFtpLoan,pStreamIRR1,pStreamFtpLoan,dStart,TRUE ),
			
			//Set the Start Date
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Start", dStart ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Loan_start_date1",dStart ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentIRR,"Loan_start_date2",dStart ),
			
			//Amortizing schedule copy
			sAmortizing := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amortizing" ),
			sAmortNature := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort__nature" ),
			fAmortAmount := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Amort_amount" ),
			sAmortFraction := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_fraction" ),
			sAmortGenerator := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_generator" ),
			sAmortFrequency := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_frequency" ),
			sAmortMargins := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_incl_margins" ),
			sAmortLeg := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_leg" ),
			sAmortPayCoupon := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_pay_coupons" ),
			sAmortPaymentShifter := legGetString( pContractFtp,"Amort_payment_shifter" ),
			fAmortRate := legGetNumeric( pContractFtp,"Amort_rate" ),
			dAmortRollDate := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Amort_roll_date" ),
			
			//Real Coupon Reinvestment 
			IF ( sAmortizing <> "Real coupon reinvestment" ) THEN
			{
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amortizing",sAmortizing ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort__nature",sAmortNature ),
				legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_amount",fAmortAmount ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_fraction",sAmortFraction ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_generator",sAmortGenerator ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_frequency",sAmortFrequency ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_incl_margins",sAmortMargins ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_leg",sAmortLeg ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_pay_coupons",sAmortPayCoupon ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_payment_shifter",sAmortPaymentShifter ),
				legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_rate",fAmortRate ),
				legSetDate( pComponentIRR,"Amort_roll_date",dAmortRollDate ),
				
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amortizing2",sAmortizing ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_nature2",sAmortNature ),
				legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_amount2",fAmortAmount ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_fraction2",sAmortFraction ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_generator2",sAmortGenerator ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_frequency2",sAmortFrequency ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_incl_margins2",sAmortMargins ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_leg2",sAmortLeg ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_pay_coupons2",sAmortPayCoupon ),
				legSetString( pComponentIRR,"Amort_payment_shifter2",sAmortPaymentShifter ),
				legSetNumeric( pComponentIRR,"Amort_rate2",fAmortRate ),
				legSetDate( pComponentIRR,"Amort_roll_date2",dAmortRollDate )
			},
			//----------------------------------------------------------------- End of Amortization ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			//----------------------------------------------------------------- Initialization Clone Leg2 to Funding Loan---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			
			streamsCopySchedules( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsIRR,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamIRR1 ),
			streamsCopyCapitalStructure( pStreamsFundingLoan,pStreamsIRR,pStreamFundingLoan,pStreamIRR1 ),
			streamsCopyModificationsByLeg( pStreamsFundingLoan,0,pStreamsFtpLoan,0 ),
			
			//Overwriting the start date
			dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Start" ),
			legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Start",dStart ),
			
			//------------------------------------------------------------------- End of Clone leg 2 to Funding Loan --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------    
			
			//Fx rate propagated to amortizing schedule
			IF ( sSplit == "CCS" ) THEN
				legSetNumeric( pComponentFundingLoan,"Amort_amount",fSplitRate * fAmortAmount )
		},
		
		//------------------------------------------------------------------- Initialization Cap/Floor -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
		
		// Add the Component Cap/Floor
		IF ( bCapFloor ) THEN
		{
			//B2B - with cap/floor - no margin
			pCloneContract1 := b2bClone( pComponentFtp,legGetTitle( pComponentFtp ),sCapFloorPortfolio ),
			// We set the clone to be internal
			legSetString( pCloneContract1,"Internal","Yes" ),
			// We now set the "Counterpart" (initial portfolio)
			legSetString( pCloneContract1,"Counterpart",sPortfolio ),
			//Overwrite margin
			//legOverwrite( pCloneContract1,"Rate_Margin",0.0 ),
			//Overwrite strike
            
            //Remove sales margin
           	fSalesMargin := legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Sales_margin" ),
            legOverwrite( pCloneContract1,"Sales_margin",0.0 ),
			
            //Remove sales margin from Strike
            fStrike:= legGetNumeric( pComponentFtp,"Strike" ),
            IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
				legOverwrite( pCloneContract1,"Strike",fStrike - fSalesMargin )
            ELSE
				legOverwrite( pCloneContract1,"Strike",fStrike + fSalesMargin ),
			
			//Remove amortizing fee
			pStreamsCloneContract1 := legGetStreams( pCloneContract1 ),
			pAddFlowsCloneContract1 := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsCloneContract1 ),
			additionalFlowsClear( pAddFlowsCloneContract1 ),
			
			//B2B - without cap/floor + margin
			pCloneContract2 := b2bClone( pComponentFtp,legGetTitle( pComponentFtp ),sCapFloorPortfolio ),
			// We set the clone to be internal
			legSetString( pCloneContract2,"Internal","Yes" ),
			// We now set the "Counterpart" (initial portfolio)
			legSetString( pCloneContract2,"Counterpart",sPortfolio ),
			
            //Remove sales margin
            legOverwrite( pCloneContract2,"Sales_margin",0.0 ),
            
            //Overwrite margin - opposite margin
			fRateMargin:= legGetNumeric( pCloneContract2,"Rate_Margin" ),
			legOverwrite( pCloneContract2,"Rate_Margin",fRateMargin - fCapFloorSpread ),
			
			//Change the direction
			IF ( sPayout == "Lend" ) THEN
				legSetString( pCloneContract2,"Payout","Borrow" )
			ELSE
				legSetString( pCloneContract2,"Payout","Lend" ),
			
			//Remove Floor
			legOverwrite( pCloneContract2,"First embedded option","No" ),
			
			//Remove Amortizing Fee
			pStreamsCloneContract2 := legGetStreams( pCloneContract2 ),
			pAddFlowsCloneContract2 := streamsPushAdditionalFlows( pStreamsCloneContract2 ),
			additionalFlowsClear( pAddFlowsCloneContract2 )
		}
	},
	//-------------------------------------------------------------------- End Initialization  Cap/Floor ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	
	//-------------------------------------------------------------------- Create the Package --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	// Set the registration of the Package to Package Single
	legSetRegistration( pPackage,"mxContractIPACKAGE_SINGLE",0.0 ),
	//Overwriting the Start Date
	dStart := legGetDate( pContractFtp,"Start" ),
	legOverwrite( pComponentFundingLoan,"Start",dStart )
};

{

    pEvent := This,
    
    // Stage 1: Remove the Internal or Inter-entity Deals
	// Get Pointers 
    pEventUDFs := evtGetUserFields(pEvent),
    //sCapitalExchange := udfGetString(pEventUDFs,"UW_CAPEX"),
	sCapitalExchange := "Yes",
    fFxRate := 0.0,
    iUnwindFeeFlowNumber := 1000,    
    dEventDate := evtGetEventDate(pEvent),  
    pVBO:= evtGetVersionedBOAt(pEvent,0),
    
    pOldBO:= evtVersionedBOGetOld(pVBO),
    pNewBO := evtVersionedBOGetNew(pVBO),
    
    //	Get Unwind details
	fUnwindRatio := evtGetNumeric(pEvent,"UnwoundRatio")/100.0,    
    
	iContract := 0,
    iNumberOfContracts := legGetNumberOfContracts(pNewBO),

    WHILE (iContract < iNumberOfContracts) DO
    {
    	pNewContract := legGetContractAt(pNewBO,iContract),
    	pOldContract := legGetContractAt(pOldBO,iContract),
        
		iComponent := 0,
        iNumberOfComponents := legGetNumberOfComponents(pNewContract),
        
        WHILE (iComponent < iNumberOfComponents) DO
        {
        	pNewComponent := legGetComponentAt(pNewContract,iComponent),
        	pOldComponent := legGetComponentAt(pOldContract,iComponent),  
            
            sInternal := legGetString(pNewComponent,"Internal"),
            sCounterpart := legGetString(pNewComponent,"Counterpart"),
            sProductGroup := legGetProductGroup(pNewComponent),
            sTypology:=legGetTypology(pNewComponent),

        	IF (((sProductGroup == "LN_BR")OR (sProductGroup == "REPO")) AND (sCapitalExchange == "Yes") AND (sInternal == "No")) THEN
            {
             
                // Stage 1: Get the Outstanding Capital
                fTradeNumber := legGetNumeric(pNewComponent,"Trn_Number"),    
                sPortfolio := legGetString(pNewComponent,"Portfolio"),
                dSettlementDate := legGetDate(pNewComponent,"Settl_flow_date"),
                
                pStreams := legGetStreams(pNewComponent),
                
                // Get the outstanding Nominals
                iPhase := 0,      
                iNumberOfPhases := streamsGetNumberOfPhases(pStreams),
                
                WHILE (iPhase < iNumberOfPhases) DO
                {
                    pFirstLegStream := streamsGetStream(pStreams,iPhase,0),
        
                    
                    iFirstLegPeriod := 0,
                    iFirstLegNumberOfPeriods := streamGetNumberOfPeriods(pFirstLegStream),
                    
                    WHILE (iFirstLegPeriod < iFirstLegNumberOfPeriods) DO
                    {
                        IF (dEventDate < streamGetPeriodEndDate(pFirstLegStream,iFirstLegPeriod)) THEN
                        {
                            fFirstLegNominal := fUnwindRatio * streamGetPeriodRemainingCapital(pFirstLegStream,iFirstLegPeriod),
                            sFirstLegCurrency := streamGeneratorGetFinalCapitalCurrency(streamGetGenerator(pFirstLegStream)),
                            
                            iFirstLegPeriod := iFirstLegNumberOfPeriods
                        },
                        
                        iFirstLegPeriod := iFirstLegPeriod + 1
                    },
                    //For ACC    
                      iNbRemainingPeriods:=0, 
                    WHILE (iNbRemainingPeriods < iFirstLegNumberOfPeriods) DO
                    {
                        IF (dEventDate < streamGetPeriodEndDate(pFirstLegStream,iNbRemainingPeriods)) THEN
                        {
                    		fCashFlowsAcc:=fCashFlowsAcc+streamGetPeriodInterestFlow(pFirstLegStream,iNbRemainingPeriods)                                                       
                        },                        
                        iNbRemainingPeriods := iNbRemainingPeriods + 1
                    },                    
                    
                    
                    pSecondLegStream := streamsGetStream(pStreams,iPhase,1),
                    iSecondLegPeriod := 0,
                    iSecondLegNumberOfPeriods := streamGetNumberOfPeriods(pSecondLegStream),
                    
                    WHILE (iSecondLegPeriod < iSecondLegNumberOfPeriods) DO
                    {
                        IF (dEventDate < streamGetPeriodEndDate(pSecondLegStream,iSecondLegPeriod)) THEN
                        {
                            fSecondLegNominal := fUnwindRatio * streamGetPeriodRemainingCapital(pSecondLegStream,iSecondLegPeriod),
                            sSecondLegCurrency := streamGeneratorGetFinalCapitalCurrency(streamGetGenerator(pSecondLegStream)),
                            
                            //invert the nominal since bug with remaining capital
                            IF sTypology == "Repo DI" THEN
                            fSecondLegNominal:= fSecondLegNominal * -1.0,
                            
                            iSecondLegPeriod := iSecondLegNumberOfPeriods
                        },
                        
                        iSecondLegPeriod := iSecondLegPeriod + 1
                    },
        
                    iPhase := iPhase + 1
                },
        
                // Stage 2: Update Flows if they exists
                iFlow := 0, 
                iNumberOfFlows := evtGetNumberOfFlows(pEvent) ,
                
                bAddFirstLegFlow := TRUE,
                bAddSecondLegFlow := TRUE,
                
                WHILE (iFlow < iNumberOfFlows) DO 
                {
                
                    pEventFlow := evtGetFlowAt(pEvent,iFlow),
                    pEventFlowUDFs := evtFlowGetUDF(pEventFlow), 
                    sFlowAutomatic := udfGetString(pEventFlowUDFs,"AUTOMATIC"),
                    sFlowSource := evtFlowGetSource(pEventFlow),
                    sFlowDestination := evtFlowGetDestination(pEventFlow),
                    
                    // To Avoid Exception when using ptfGetDisplayedLabel on a counterparty
                    bFlowDestinationIsPortfolio := FALSE,
                    bFlowDestinationIsMainPortfolio := FALSE,
                    bFlowDestinationIsMainB2BPortfolio := FALSE,        
                    bFlowDestinationIsPortfolio := evtFlowIsDestinationPortfolio(pEventFlow),
                    
                    IF (bFlowDestinationIsPortfolio) THEN
                    {        
                        bFlowDestinationIsMainPortfolio := (ptfGetDisplayedLabel(sFlowDestination) == sMainPortfolio),
                        bFlowDestinationIsMainB2BPortfolio := (ptfGetDisplayedLabel(sFlowDestination) == sMainB2BPortfolio)        
                    },
                    
                    // Get Flow Details
                    sFlowSource := sFlowSource,
                    sFlowDestination := sFlowDestination,
                    dFlowDate := evtFlowGetValueDate(pEventFlow),
                    sFlowCurrency := evtFlowGetCurrency(pEventFlow), 
                    fFlowComponent := evtFlowGetComponentReference(pEventFlow),
                    fFlowAmount := evtFlowGetAmount(pEventFlow),
                    sFlowNature := evtFlowGetNature(pEventFlow),
                    sFlowTypology1 := evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt(pEventFlow,0),     
                    sFlowTypology2 := evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt(pEventFlow,1),     
                    sFlowTypology3 := evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt(pEventFlow,2),     
                    sFlowTypology4 := evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt(pEventFlow,3),                            
                    sFlowTypology5 := evtFlowGetTypologyLabelAt(pEventFlow,4),
                    sFlowPayReceive := evtFlowGetPayReceive(pEventFlow),         
                    
                    // In case capital flow is detected than we only update the nominals
                    IF ((sFlowSource == sPortfolio) AND (sFlowDestination == sCounterpart) AND(sFlowNature == "Capital") AND (sFlowTypology1 == "CAP") AND (sFlowTypology2 == "XIT") AND (sFlowTypology3 == "") AND 
                            (sFlowTypology4 == "") AND (sFlowTypology5 == "INT")) THEN
                    {
                        iUnwindFeeFlowNumber := iFlow,
                        dUnwindFeeDate := dFlowDate
                    },
                    
                    // In case capital flow is detected than we only update the nominals
                    IF ((sFlowCurrency == sFirstLegCurrency) AND (sFlowNature == "Capital") AND (sFlowTypology1 == "CAP") AND (sFlowTypology2 == "NOM") AND (sFlowTypology3 == "INIT") AND 
                            (sFlowTypology4 == "") AND (sFlowTypology5 == "INT")) THEN
                    {
                        bAddFirstLegFlow := FALSE,
                        evtFlowOverrideAmount(pEventFlow,fFirstLegNominal),
                        IF (toString(dUnwindFeeDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                        {
                            evtFlowSetValueDate(pEventFlow,dUnwindFeeDate)
                        }                      
                    },	
                    
                    IF ((sFlowCurrency == sSecondLegCurrency) AND (sFlowNature == "Capital") AND (sFlowTypology1 == "CAP") AND (sFlowTypology2 == "NOM") AND (sFlowTypology3 == "INIT") AND 
                            (sFlowTypology4 == "") AND (sFlowTypology5 == "INT")) THEN
                    {
                        bAddSecondLegFlow := FALSE,
                        evtFlowOverrideAmount(pEventFlow,fSecondLegNominal),
                        IF (toString(dUnwindFeeDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                        {
                            evtFlowSetValueDate(pEventFlow,dUnwindFeeDate)
                        }                            
                    },	            
        
                    iFlow := iFlow + 1
                },                        
                
                // Stage 3 := Update the Market Value
                IF (iUnwindFeeFlowNumber <> 1000) THEN
                {
                	dUnwindFeeDate := "00000000",
                    pUnwindFee := evtGetFlowAt(pEvent,iUnwindFeeFlowNumber),
                    sUnwindFeeCurrency := evtFlowGetCurrency(pUnwindFee),
                    dUnwindFeeDate := evtFlowGetValueDate(pUnwindFee),
                                           
                    fFirstNominalFxRate := cuGetFxForwardRate(sUnwindFeeCurrency,sFirstLegCurrency,dSettlementDate),       	
                    fSecondNominalFxRate := cuGetFxForwardRate(sUnwindFeeCurrency,sSecondLegCurrency,dSettlementDate), 
                    
                    fCapitalNpvImpact := fFirstLegNominal * fFirstNominalFxRate + fSecondLegNominal * fSecondNominalFxRate,
                    
                    // Get New NPV
                    pOldContainer := npOpen(TRUE),        	
                    pOldClone := npCloneLeg( pOldContainer,pOldComponent),        	
                        
                    legOverwrite(pOldClone,"Evaluation_date",dEventDate),
					legOverwrite(pOldClone,"Market_Data_date",dEventDate),
                    legOverwrite(pOldClone,"Settl_flow_date",dSettlementDate),
					                    
                    sNpvCurrency := legGetString(pOldClone,"Npv_unit"),
                    fNpvFxRate := cuGetFxForwardRate(sUnwindFeeCurrency,sNpvCurrency,dUnwindFeeDate),                     
                    
                    legCompute(pOldClone,"noWorkflow"),
                    fOldNpv := legGetNumeric(pOldClone,"Npv") * fNpvFxRate,
                    
                        
                    // Close Virtual Leg
                    npClose(pOldContainer),
                    
                    evtFlowSetAmount(pUnwindFee,fOldNpv * fUnwindRatio - fCapitalNpvImpact) 
                
                },
                
				// Stage 4: Add Flows 
                IF ((bAddFirstLegFlow) AND (fFirstLegNominal <> 0.0)) THEN
                {
                
                    pNewEventFlow := evtAddFlow(pEvent,fTradeNumber),                
                    pNewFlowUDFs := evtFlowGetUDF(pNewEventFlow),
                                
                    udfSetString(pNewFlowUDFs,"AUTOMATIC","Y"),
                    evtFlowSetSource(pNewEventFlow,sPortfolio),
                    evtFlowSetDestinationParty(pNewEventFlow,sCounterpart),
                    IF (toString(dUnwindFeeDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                    {
                    	evtFlowSetValueDate(pNewEventFlow,dUnwindFeeDate)
                    }
                    ELSE
                    {
                    	evtFlowSetValueDate(pNewEventFlow,dSettlementDate)
                    },
                    evtFlowSetCurrency(pNewEventFlow,sFirstLegCurrency),                    
                    evtFlowSetNature(pNewEventFlow,"Capital"),
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,0,"CAP"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,1,"NOM"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,2,"INIT"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,3,""),                            
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,4,"INT"),
                    evtFlowSetPayReceive(pNewEventFlow,"Receive"),
                    evtFlowSetComment(pNewEventFlow,"Capital Ex"),
                    evtFlowOverrideAmount(pNewEventFlow,fFirstLegNominal)        
        
                },
                
                IF ((bAddSecondLegFlow) AND (fSecondLegNominal <> 0.0)) THEN
                {
                
                    pNewEventFlow := evtAddFlow(pEvent,fTradeNumber),                
                    pNewFlowUDFs := evtFlowGetUDF(pNewEventFlow),
                                
                    udfSetString(pNewFlowUDFs,"AUTOMATIC","Y"),
                    evtFlowSetSource(pNewEventFlow,sPortfolio),
                    evtFlowSetDestinationParty(pNewEventFlow,sCounterpart),     
                    IF (toString(dUnwindFeeDate) <> "00000000") THEN
                    {
                    	evtFlowSetValueDate(pNewEventFlow,dUnwindFeeDate)
                    }
                    ELSE
                    {
                    	evtFlowSetValueDate(pNewEventFlow,dSettlementDate)
                    },
                    evtFlowSetCurrency(pNewEventFlow,sSecondLegCurrency),                    
                    evtFlowSetNature(pNewEventFlow,"Capital"),
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,0,"CAP"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,1,"NOM"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,2,"INIT"),     
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,3,""),                            
                    evtFlowSetTypologyLabelAt(pNewEventFlow,4,"INT"),
                    evtFlowSetPayReceive(pNewEventFlow,"Receive"),    
                    evtFlowSetComment(pNewEventFlow,"Capital Ex"),
                    evtFlowOverrideAmount(pNewEventFlow,fSecondLegNominal)        
        
                }               
                                
        	}, // Close Filter 

        	iComponent := iComponent + 1
        }, // Close Component Loop
    
        iContract := iContract + 1
    } // Close Contract Loop
}; // Close All
